AI.method: 研究使用DrawEduMath基准，这是一个包含真实学生手写、手绘数学问题解答的问答基准。研究评估了11个视觉语言模型在为期一年的时间跨度上的表现，特别关注模型在不同学生熟练程度和错误识别方面的表现。
AI.result: 研究发现所有评估的视觉语言模型在处理需要更多教学帮助的学生作品时表现不佳。在所有问答任务中，模型在评估学生错误相关问题上表现最差。这表明虽然VLMs可能被优化为数学问题解决专家，但在支持教育用例方面存在不足。
AI.conclusion: 视觉语言模型需要替代的发展激励才能充分支持教育用例。当前模型虽然擅长数学问题解决，但在识别和处理学生错误这一核心教学组件上表现不足，限制了其在教育应用中的有效性。

title: USE: Uncertainty Structure Estimation for Robust Semi-Supervised Learning
summary: In this study, a novel idea, Uncertainty Structure Estimation (USE), a lightweight, algorithm-agnostic procedure that emphasizes the often-overlooked role of unlabeled data quality is introduced for Semi-supervised learning (SSL). SSL has achieved impressive progress, but its reliability in deployment is limited by the quality of the unlabeled pool. In practice, unlabeled data are almost always contaminated by out-of-distribution (OOD) samples, where both near-OOD and far-OOD can negatively affect performance in different ways. We argue that the bottleneck does not lie in algorithmic design, but rather in the absence of principled mechanisms to assess and curate the quality of unlabeled data. The proposed USE trains a proxy model on the labeled set to compute entropy scores for unlabeled samples, and then derives a threshold, via statistical comparison against a reference distribution, that separates informative (structured) from uninformative (structureless) samples. This enables assessment as a preprocessing step, removing uninformative or harmful unlabeled data before SSL training begins. Through extensive experiments on imaging (CIFAR-100) and NLP (Yelp Review) data, it is evident that USE consistently improves accuracy and robustness under varying levels of OOD contamination. Thus, it can be concluded that the proposed approach reframes unlabeled data quality control as a structural assessment problem, and considers it as a necessary component for reliable and efficient SSL in realistic mixed-distribution environments.

AI.tldr: 提出不确定性结构估计(USE)，一种轻量级、算法无关的半监督学习方法，通过评估未标记数据质量来提升SSL的鲁棒性
AI.motivation: 半监督学习在实际部署中可靠性受限，主要因为未标记数据池常被分布外样本污染，而现有方法缺乏评估未标记数据质量的机制
AI.method: USE使用代理模型在标记集上训练，计算未标记样本的熵分数，通过统计比较参考分布得到阈值，区分信息性样本与非信息性样本
AI.result: 在图像(CIFAR-100)和NLP(Yelp Review)数据上的实验表明，USE在不同OOD污染水平下能一致提升准确性和鲁棒性
AI.conclusion: 将未标记数据质量控制重新定义为结构评估问题，是现实混合分布环境中可靠高效SSL的必要组件

title: Alien Science: Sampling Coherent but Cognitively Unavailable Research Directions from Idea Atoms
comment: Published at the ICLR 2026 Post-AGI Science and Society Workshop
summary: Large language models are adept at synthesizing and recombining familiar material, yet they often fail at a specific kind of creativity that matters most in research: producing ideas that are both coherent and non-obvious to the current community. We formalize this gap through cognitive availability, the likelihood that a research direction would be naturally proposed by a typical researcher given what they have worked on. We introduce a pipeline that (i) decomposes papers into granular conceptual units, (ii) clusters recurring units into a shared vocabulary of idea atoms, and (iii) learns two complementary models: a coherence model that scores whether a set of atoms constitutes a viable direction, and an availability model that scores how likely that direction is to be generated by researchers drawn from the community. We then sample "alien" directions that score high on coherence but low on availability. On a corpus of $\sim$7,500 recent LLM papers from NeurIPS, ICLR and ICML, we validate that (a) conceptual units preserve paper content under reconstruction, (b) idea atoms generalize across papers rather than memorizing paper-specific phrasing, and (c) the Alien sampler produces research directions that are more diverse than LLM baselines while maintaining coherence.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种量化研究创意"认知可得性"的方法，通过分解论文为概念单元、聚类为"思想原子"，并学习连贯性和可得性模型，来生成既连贯又非显而易见的"异类"研究方向。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型擅长合成和重组熟悉材料，但在产生既连贯又对当前研究社区非显而易见的创意方面存在不足。论文旨在填补这一差距，通过形式化"认知可得性"的概念来量化研究方向的创新性。
AI.method: 提出一个三阶段流水线：1) 将论文分解为细粒度概念单元；2) 将重复出现的单元聚类为共享的"思想原子"词汇表；3) 学习两个互补模型：评估方向可行性的连贯性模型和评估社区生成可能性的可得性模型。然后采样"异类"方向（高连贯性、低可得性）。
AI.result: 在约7,500篇近期LLM论文（来自NeurIPS、ICLR和ICML）上验证：1) 概念单元能在重构中保留论文内容；2) 思想原子能跨论文泛化而非记忆特定措辞；3) Alien采样器产生的研究方向比LLM基线更多样化同时保持连贯性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够形式化研究创意的"认知可得性"，并生成既连贯又非显而易见的"异类"研究方向，为LLM在科研创新中的应用提供了新视角。

title: Efficient Long-Horizon GUI Agents via Training-Free KV Cache Compression
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have emerged as powerful engines for autonomous GUI agents, yet their deployment is severely constrained by the substantial memory footprint and latency of the Key-Value (KV) cache during long-horizon interactions. While existing cache compression methods have proven effective for LLMs, we empirically demonstrate that they suffer from suboptimal performance in GUI scenarios due to a fundamental misalignment: unlike general visual tasks where attention sparsity varies across layers, GUI attention patterns exhibit uniform high-sparsity across all transformer layers. Motivated by this insight, we propose ST-Lite, a training-free KV cache compression framework tailored for efficient GUI agents that explicitly addresses the dynamic spatio-trajectory dependencies within GUI data streams. ST-Lite introduces a novel dual-branch scoring policy incorporating Component-centric Spatial Saliency (CSS) and Trajectory-aware Semantic Gating (TSG). Specifically, CSS preserves the structural integrity of interactive UI elements by evaluating local neighborhood saliency, while TSG mitigates historical redundancy by dynamically filtering visually repetitive KV pairs within the interaction trajectory. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that with only a 10-20% cache budget, ST-Lite achieves a 2.45x decoding acceleration while maintaining comparable or even superior performance compared to full-cache baselines, offering a scalable solution for resource-constrained GUI agents.

AI.tldr: ST-Lite：针对GUI代理的KV缓存压缩框架，通过组件空间显著性和轨迹感知语义门控，在10-20%缓存预算下实现2.45倍解码加速
AI.motivation: 大型视觉语言模型作为GUI自主代理时，KV缓存的内存占用和延迟问题严重制约部署。现有缓存压缩方法在GUI场景中表现不佳，因为GUI注意力模式在所有Transformer层都呈现均匀的高稀疏性，与通用视觉任务不同。
AI.method: 提出ST-Lite训练免费KV缓存压缩框架，包含双分支评分策略：1) 组件中心空间显著性(CSS) - 通过评估局部邻域显著性保持交互UI元素的结构完整性；2) 轨迹感知语义门控(TSG) - 通过动态过滤交互轨迹中视觉重复的KV对来减少历史冗余。
AI.result: 在仅10-20%缓存预算下，ST-Lite实现2.45倍解码加速，同时保持与全缓存基线相当甚至更优的性能。
AI.conclusion: ST-Lite为资源受限的GUI代理提供了可扩展的解决方案，通过专门针对GUI数据流的动态时空轨迹依赖关系进行优化，有效解决了KV缓存压缩问题。

title: Towards Orthographically-Informed Evaluation of Speech Recognition Systems for Indian Languages
summary: Evaluating ASR systems for Indian languages is challenging due to spelling variations, suffix splitting flexibility, and non-standard spellings in code-mixed words. Traditional Word Error Rate (WER) often presents a bleaker picture of system performance than what human users perceive. Better aligning evaluation with real-world performance requires capturing permissible orthographic variations, which is extremely challenging for under-resourced Indian languages. Leveraging recent advances in LLMs, we propose a framework for creating benchmarks that capture permissible variations. Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate that OIWER, by accounting for orthographic variations, reduces pessimistic error rates (an average improvement of 6.3 points), narrows inflated model gaps (e.g., Gemini-Canary performance difference drops from 18.1 to 11.5 points), and aligns more closely with human perception than prior methods like WER-SN by 4.9 points.

AI.tldr: 提出OIWER评估框架，利用LLM为印度语言ASR系统创建基准，考虑正字法变体，相比传统WER更贴近人类感知
AI.motivation: 印度语言ASR评估面临拼写变体、后缀分割灵活性和非标准拼写等挑战，传统WER过于悲观，不能准确反映真实性能
AI.method: 利用LLM创建基准框架，捕捉可接受的正字法变体，提出OIWER评估指标来替代传统WER
AI.result: OIWER降低悲观错误率（平均改善6.3分），缩小模型性能差距（如Gemini-Canary差距从18.1降至11.5分），比WER-SN更贴近人类感知（改善4.9分）
AI.conclusion: LLM驱动的OIWER框架能更好地评估印度语言ASR系统，更贴近人类感知，为低资源语言评估提供新方法

title: Exact and Asymptotically Complete Robust Verifications of Neural Networks via Quantum Optimization
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) enable high performance across domains but remain vulnerable to adversarial perturbations, limiting their use in safety-critical settings. Here, we introduce two quantum-optimization-based models for robust verification that reduce the combinatorial burden of certification under bounded input perturbations. For piecewise-linear activations (e.g., ReLU and hardtanh), our first model yields an exact formulation that is sound and complete, enabling precise identification of adversarial examples. For general activations (including sigmoid and tanh), our second model constructs scalable over-approximations via piecewise-constant bounds and is asymptotically complete, with approximation error vanishing as the segmentation is refined. We further integrate Quantum Benders Decomposition with interval arithmetic to accelerate solving, and propose certificate-transfer bounds that relate robustness guarantees of pruned networks to those of the original model. Finally, a layerwise partitioning strategy supports a quantum--classical hybrid workflow by coupling subproblems across depth. Experiments on robustness benchmarks show high certification accuracy, indicating that quantum optimization can serve as a principled primitive for robustness guarantees in neural networks with complex activations.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出两种基于量子优化的鲁棒性验证模型，用于神经网络在对抗扰动下的认证，通过量子Benders分解和区间算术加速求解，实验显示在鲁棒性基准测试中具有高认证精度。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在安全关键场景中易受对抗扰动攻击，限制了其应用。现有认证方法面临组合爆炸问题，特别是对于复杂激活函数。量子优化为解决这一组合负担提供了新途径。
AI.method: 1) 针对分段线性激活函数（ReLU、hardtanh）的精确模型，提供完备的认证；2) 针对一般激活函数（sigmoid、tanh）的分段常数边界近似模型，具有渐近完备性；3) 集成量子Benders分解与区间算术加速求解；4) 提出证书传递边界，将剪枝网络的鲁棒性保证与原模型关联；5) 分层分区策略支持量子-经典混合工作流。
AI.result: 在鲁棒性基准测试中展示了高认证精度，表明量子优化可以作为神经网络鲁棒性保证的原则性原语，特别是对于复杂激活函数网络。
AI.conclusion: 量子优化为神经网络鲁棒性验证提供了有效的组合优化解决方案，能够处理复杂激活函数，并通过量子-经典混合方法实现可扩展性，为安全关键应用中的神经网络部署提供了新的认证工具。

title: DIVA-GRPO: Enhancing Multimodal Reasoning through Difficulty-Adaptive Variant Advantage
comment: Accepted to ICLR 2026. Code and models are available at https://github.com/Siaaaaaa1/DIVA-GRPO
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) with group relative policy optimization (GRPO) has become a widely adopted approach for enhancing the reasoning capabilities of multimodal large language models (MLLMs). While GRPO enables long-chain reasoning without a critic, it often suffers from sparse rewards on difficult problems and advantage vanishing when group-level rewards are too consistent for overly easy or hard problems. Existing solutions (sample expansion, selective utilization, and indirect reward design) often fail to maintain enough variance in within-group reward distributions to yield clear optimization signals. To address this, we propose DIVA-GRPO, a difficulty-adaptive variant advantage method that adjusts variant difficulty distributions from a global perspective. DIVA-GRPO dynamically assesses problem difficulty, samples variants with appropriate difficulty levels, and calculates advantages across local and global groups using difficulty-weighted and normalized scaling. This alleviates reward sparsity and advantage vanishing while improving training stability. Extensive experiments on six reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that DIVA-GRPO outperforms existing approaches in training efficiency and reasoning performance. Code: https://github.com/Siaaaaaa1/DIVA-GRPO

AI.tldr: DIVA-GRPO提出了一种难度自适应的变体优势方法，用于解决GRPO在强化学习中的奖励稀疏和优势消失问题，通过动态调整难度分布来提升多模态大语言模型的推理能力。
AI.motivation: GRPO（群体相对策略优化）虽然无需critic即可实现长链推理，但在困难问题上存在奖励稀疏问题，在过于简单或困难的问题上则会出现优势消失。现有解决方案（样本扩展、选择性利用、间接奖励设计）往往无法在组内奖励分布中保持足够的方差来提供清晰的优化信号。
AI.method: DIVA-GRPO是一种难度自适应的变体优势方法，从全局视角调整变体难度分布。它动态评估问题难度，采样适当难度级别的变体，并使用难度加权和归一化缩放计算局部和全局群体的优势值。
AI.result: 在六个推理基准测试上的广泛实验表明，DIVA-GRPO在训练效率和推理性能方面优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: DIVA-GRPO通过难度自适应机制有效缓解了奖励稀疏和优势消失问题，同时提高了训练稳定性，为多模态大语言模型的推理能力提升提供了有效解决方案。

title: SKeDA: A Generative Watermarking Framework for Text-to-video Diffusion Models
summary: The rise of text-to-video generation models has raised growing concerns over content authenticity, copyright protection, and malicious misuse. Watermarking serves as an effective mechanism for regulating such AI-generated content, where high fidelity and strong robustness are particularly critical. Recent generative image watermarking methods provide a promising foundation by leveraging watermark information and pseudo-random keys to control the initial sampling noise, enabling lossless embedding. However, directly extending these techniques to videos introduces two key limitations: Existing designs implicitly rely on strict alignment between video frames and frame-dependent pseudo-random binary sequences used for watermark encryption. Once this alignment is disrupted, subsequent watermark extraction becomes unreliable; and Video-specific distortions, such as inter-frame compression, significantly degrade watermark reliability. To address these issues, we propose SKeDA, a generative watermarking framework tailored for text-to-video diffusion models. SKeDA consists of two components: (1) Shuffle-Key-based Distribution-preserving Sampling (SKe) employs a single base pseudo-random binary sequence for watermark encryption and derives frame-level encryption sequences through permutation. This design transforms watermark extraction from synchronization-sensitive sequence decoding into permutation-tolerant set-level aggregation, substantially improving robustness against frame reordering and loss; and (2) Differential Attention (DA), which computes inter-frame differences and dynamically adjusts attention weights during extraction, enhancing robustness against temporal distortions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SKeDA preserves high video generation quality and watermark robustness.

AI.tldr: SKeDA是一个为文本到视频扩散模型设计的生成式水印框架，通过Shuffle-Key-based Distribution-preserving Sampling和Differential Attention技术，解决了现有视频水印方法对帧对齐的依赖和对帧间压缩等视频特定失真的脆弱性问题。
AI.motivation: 随着文本到视频生成模型的兴起，内容真实性、版权保护和恶意滥用问题日益突出。水印技术是监管AI生成内容的有效机制，但现有图像水印方法直接扩展到视频存在两个关键限制：1) 依赖视频帧与帧相关伪随机二进制序列的严格对齐；2) 视频特定失真（如帧间压缩）会显著降低水印可靠性。
AI.method: SKeDA框架包含两个组件：1) Shuffle-Key-based Distribution-preserving Sampling (SKe)：使用单个基础伪随机二进制序列进行水印加密，通过排列生成帧级加密序列，将水印提取从同步敏感的序列解码转变为排列容忍的集合级聚合；2) Differential Attention (DA)：计算帧间差异并在提取时动态调整注意力权重，增强对时间失真的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，SKeDA在保持高质量视频生成的同时，显著提高了水印的鲁棒性，能够有效抵抗帧重排、丢失和视频特定失真。
AI.conclusion: SKeDA为文本到视频扩散模型提供了一个有效的生成式水印框架，解决了现有方法在视频应用中的局限性，为AI生成视频的内容认证和版权保护提供了可靠的技术方案。

title: S-VoCAL: A Dataset and Evaluation Framework for Inferring Speaking Voice Character Attributes in Literature
summary: With recent advances in Text-to-Speech (TTS) systems, synthetic audiobook narration has seen increased interest, reaching unprecedented levels of naturalness. However, larger gaps remain in synthetic narration systems' ability to impersonate fictional characters, and convey complex emotions or prosody. A promising direction to enhance character identification is the assignment of plausible voices to each fictional characters in a book. This step typically requires complex inference of attributes in book-length contexts, such as a character's age, gender, origin or physical health, which in turns requires dedicated benchmark datasets to evaluate extraction systems' performances. We present S-VoCAL (Speaking Voice Character Attributes in Literature), the first dataset and evaluation framework dedicated to evaluate the inference of voice-related fictional character attributes. S-VoCAL entails 8 attributes grounded in sociophonetic studies, and 952 character-book pairs derived from Project Gutenberg. Its evaluation framework addresses the particularities of each attribute, and includes a novel similarity metric based on recent Large Language Models embeddings. We demonstrate the applicability of S-VoCAL by applying a simple Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipeline to the task of inferring character attributes. Our results suggest that the RAG pipeline reliably infers attributes such as Age or Gender, but struggles on others such as Origin or Physical Health. The dataset and evaluation code are available at https://github.com/AbigailBerthe/S-VoCAL .

AI.tldr: S-VoCAL：首个用于评估虚构角色语音相关属性推断的数据集和评估框架，包含8个社会语音学属性、952个角色-书籍对，以及基于LLM嵌入的新型相似度度量。
AI.motivation: 随着TTS系统的发展，合成有声书叙述的自然度显著提升，但在角色扮演、情感表达和韵律方面仍有不足。为增强角色识别，需要为虚构角色分配合适的声音，这需要从书籍长度上下文中推断角色的年龄、性别、起源等属性。目前缺乏专门的数据集来评估此类属性提取系统的性能。
AI.method: 创建S-VoCAL数据集，包含8个基于社会语音学研究的属性，从Project Gutenberg中提取952个角色-书籍对。开发评估框架，针对每个属性的特殊性设计评估方法，并引入基于大语言模型嵌入的新型相似度度量。使用简单的检索增强生成（RAG）管道来演示属性推断任务。
AI.result: RAG管道在推断年龄、性别等属性上表现可靠，但在起源、身体健康等属性上存在困难。数据集和评估代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: S-VoCAL为评估虚构角色语音属性推断提供了首个专门的数据集和评估框架，有助于改进合成叙述系统的角色扮演能力，特别是在情感和韵律表达方面。

title: Physics-Aware Learnability: From Set-Theoretic Independence to Operational Constraints
comment: 31 pages, 4 figures (Main Text + Supplementary Information) / Comment welcome
summary: Beyond binary classification, learnability can become a logically fragile notion: in EMX, even the class of all finite subsets of $[0,1]$ is learnable in some models of ZFC and not in others. We argue the paradox is operational. The standard definitions quantify over arbitrary set-theoretic learners that implicitly assume non-operational resources (infinite precision, unphysical data access, and non-representable outputs). We introduce physics-aware learnability (PL), which defines the learnability relative to an explicit access model -- a family of admissible physical protocols. Finite-precision coarse-graining reduces continuum EMX to a countable problem, via an exact pushforward/pullback reduction that preserves the EMX objective, making the independence example provably learnable with explicit $(ε,δ)$ sample complexity. For quantum data, admissible learners are exactly POVMs on $d$ copies, turning sample size into copy complexity and yielding Helstrom(-type) lower bounds. For finite no-signaling and quantum models, PL feasibility becomes linear or semidefinite and is therefore decidable.

AI.tldr: 本文提出物理感知可学习性(PL)框架，将学习理论从抽象数学定义转向可操作的物理协议，解决了EMX学习中的集合论悖论，并应用于量子数据场景。
AI.motivation: 传统学习理论定义存在逻辑脆弱性：在EMX学习中，某些类在某些ZFC模型中可学习而在其他模型中不可学习。这种悖论源于定义中隐含的非操作性假设（无限精度、非物理数据访问、不可表示输出）。需要建立与物理实现相关的可学习性理论。
AI.method: 提出物理感知可学习性(PL)框架：1）相对于显式访问模型定义可学习性；2）有限精度粗粒化将连续EMX约简为可数问题；3）对于量子数据，将可接受学习器定义为d副本上的POVM测量；4）对于有限无信号和量子模型，PL可行性变为线性或半定规划问题。
AI.result: 1）通过有限精度粗粒化，解决了EMX学习的集合论悖论，给出了显式(ε,δ)样本复杂度；2）量子数据场景中，样本大小转化为副本复杂度，得到Helstrom型下界；3）有限无信号和量子模型的PL可行性可判定。
AI.conclusion: 物理感知可学习性框架将学习理论从抽象数学转向可操作的物理实现，解决了传统定义中的逻辑悖论，为量子机器学习提供了理论基础，并使有限模型的可行性判定成为可能。

title: HVR-Met: A Hypothesis-Verification-Replaning Agentic System for Extreme Weather Diagnosis
summary: While deep learning-based weather forecasting paradigms have made significant strides, addressing extreme weather diagnostics remains a formidable challenge. This gap exists primarily because the diagnostic process demands sophisticated multi-step logical reasoning, dynamic tool invocation, and expert-level prior judgment. Although agents possess inherent advantages in task decomposition and autonomous execution, current architectures are still hampered by critical bottlenecks: inadequate expert knowledge integration, a lack of professional-grade iterative reasoning loops, and the absence of fine-grained validation and evaluation systems for complex workflows under extreme conditions. To this end, we propose HVR-Met, a multi-agent meteorological diagnostic system characterized by the deep integration of expert knowledge. Its central innovation is the ``Hypothesis-Verification-Replanning'' closed-loop mechanism, which facilitates sophisticated iterative reasoning for anomalous meteorological signals during extreme weather events. To bridge gaps within existing evaluation frameworks, we further introduce a novel benchmark focused on atomic-level subtasks. Experimental evidence demonstrates that the system excels in complex diagnostic scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出了HVR-Met多智能体气象诊断系统，通过"假设-验证-重规划"闭环机制解决极端天气诊断中的复杂推理问题，并引入原子级子任务基准进行评估。
AI.motivation: 当前深度学习天气预报模型在极端天气诊断方面存在不足，因为诊断过程需要复杂的多步逻辑推理、动态工具调用和专家级先验判断。现有智能体架构存在专家知识整合不足、缺乏专业级迭代推理循环、以及复杂工作流验证评估系统缺失等问题。
AI.method: 提出HVR-Met多智能体气象诊断系统，核心创新是"假设-验证-重规划"闭环机制，实现极端天气异常气象信号的复杂迭代推理。系统深度整合专家知识，并引入原子级子任务基准进行细粒度评估。
AI.result: 实验证明该系统在复杂诊断场景中表现出色，能够有效处理极端天气诊断任务。
AI.conclusion: HVR-Met通过多智能体架构和闭环推理机制，成功解决了极端天气诊断中的复杂推理挑战，为气象诊断提供了新的解决方案。

title: A Case Study on Concept Induction for Neuron-Level Interpretability in CNN
summary: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) have advanced applications in domains such as healthcare, autonomous systems, and scene understanding, yet the internal semantics of their hidden neurons remain poorly understood. Prior work introduced a Concept Induction-based framework for hidden neuron analysis and demonstrated its effectiveness on the ADE20K dataset. In this case study, we investigate whether the approach generalizes by applying it to the SUN2012 dataset, a large-scale scene recognition benchmark. Using the same workflow, we assign interpretable semantic labels to neurons and validate them through web-sourced images and statistical testing. Our findings confirm that the method transfers to SUN2012, showing its broader applicability.

AI.tldr: 该研究将概念归纳框架应用于SUN2012数据集，验证了隐藏神经元分析方法在不同场景识别数据集上的可迁移性和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度神经网络在多个领域取得了成功，但其隐藏神经元的内部语义仍然难以理解。先前研究在ADE20K数据集上验证了概念归纳框架的有效性，但需要验证该方法是否能够推广到其他数据集。
AI.method: 采用与先前研究相同的工作流程，将概念归纳框架应用于SUN2012数据集（大规模场景识别基准）。通过为神经元分配可解释的语义标签，并使用网络来源的图像和统计测试进行验证。
AI.result: 研究发现该方法成功迁移到SUN2012数据集，证明了其更广泛的适用性。神经元被成功分配了可解释的语义标签，并通过验证测试。
AI.conclusion: 概念归纳框架在不同场景识别数据集上具有可迁移性，为深度神经网络隐藏神经元的可解释性分析提供了更广泛的应用基础。

title: Qayyem: A Real-time Platform for Scoring Proficiency of Arabic Essays
summary: Over the past years, Automated Essay Scoring (AES) systems have gained increasing attention as scalable and consistent solutions for assessing the proficiency of student writing. Despite recent progress, support for Arabic AES remains limited due to linguistic complexity and scarcity of large publicly-available annotated datasets. In this work, we present Qayyem, a Web-based platform designed to support Arabic AES by providing an integrated workflow for assignment creation, batch essay upload, scoring configuration, and per-trait essay evaluation. Qayyem abstracts the technical complexity of interacting with scoring server APIs, allowing instructors to access advanced scoring services through a user-friendly interface. The platform deploys a number of state-of-the-art Arabic essay scoring models with different effectiveness and efficiency figures.

AI.tldr: Qayyem是一个基于Web的阿拉伯语自动作文评分平台，提供作业创建、批量上传、评分配置和按特征评估的集成工作流程，部署了多种先进的阿拉伯语作文评分模型。
AI.motivation: 阿拉伯语自动作文评分系统由于语言复杂性和公开标注数据集稀缺而发展受限，需要更易用的平台来支持阿拉伯语作文评估。
AI.method: 开发基于Web的平台，抽象化与评分服务器API交互的技术复杂性，提供用户友好的界面，集成多种先进的阿拉伯语作文评分模型。
AI.result: Qayyem平台实现了阿拉伯语作文评分的集成工作流程，部署了具有不同效果和效率指标的最先进评分模型。
AI.conclusion: Qayyem为阿拉伯语自动作文评分提供了易用的平台解决方案，有助于推动阿拉伯语教育评估技术的发展。

title: Weight Updates as Activation Shifts: A Principled Framework for Steering
summary: Activation steering promises to be an extremely parameter-efficient form of adaptation, but its effectiveness depends on critical design choices -- such as intervention location and parameterization -- that currently rely on empirical heuristics rather than a principled foundation. We establish a first-order equivalence between activation-space interventions and weight-space updates, deriving the conditions under which activation steering can replicate fine-tuning behavior. This equivalence yields a principled framework for steering design and identifies the post-block output as a theoretically-backed and highly expressive intervention site. We further explain why certain intervention locations outperform others and show that weight updates and activation updates play distinct, complementary functional roles. This analysis motivates a new approach -- joint adaptation -- that trains in both spaces simultaneously. Our post-block steering achieves accuracy within 0.2%-0.9%$ of full-parameter tuning, on average across tasks and models, while training only 0.04% of model parameters. It consistently outperforms prior activation steering methods such as ReFT and PEFT approaches including LoRA, while using significantly fewer parameters. Finally, we show that joint adaptation often surpasses the performance ceilings of weight and activation updates in isolation, introducing a new paradigm for efficient model adaptation.

AI.tldr: 该论文建立了激活空间干预与权重空间更新的理论等价性，提出了基于后块输出的激活引导方法，以及联合权重和激活更新的新范式，在仅训练0.04%参数的情况下达到接近全参数微调的精度。
AI.motivation: 激活引导是一种参数高效的模型适应方法，但其有效性依赖于干预位置和参数化等设计选择，目前这些选择基于经验启发而非理论原则。需要建立理论框架来指导激活引导的设计。
AI.method: 1) 建立激活空间干预与权重空间更新的理论等价性，推导激活引导能够复现微调行为的条件；2) 识别后块输出作为理论支持的干预位置；3) 提出联合适应方法，同时在权重空间和激活空间进行训练。
AI.result: 后块激活引导在仅训练0.04%参数的情况下，在各项任务和模型上平均达到全参数微调0.2%-0.9%的精度。优于ReFT等激活引导方法和LoRA等PEFT方法，且参数更少。联合适应方法超越了单独权重或激活更新的性能上限。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为激活引导提供了理论基础，识别了后块输出作为有效的干预位置，并展示了权重更新和激活更新具有互补功能角色。联合适应方法为高效模型适应开辟了新范式。

title: FCN-LLM: Empower LLM for Brain Functional Connectivity Network Understanding via Graph-level Multi-task Instruction Tuning
summary: Large Language Models have achieved remarkable success in language understanding and reasoning, and their multimodal extensions enable comprehension of images, video, and audio. Inspired by this, foundation models for brain functional connectivity networks derived from resting-state fMRI have shown promise in clinical tasks. However, existing methods do not align FCNs with the text modality, limiting the ability of LLMs to directly understand FCNs. To address this, we propose FCN-LLM, a framework that enables LLMs to understand FCNs through graph-level, multi-task instruction tuning. Our approach employs a multi-scale FCN encoder capturing brain-region, functional subnetwork, and whole-brain features, projecting them into the semantic space of LLM. We design multi-paradigm instruction tasks covering 19 subject-specific attributes across demographics, phenotypes, and psychiatric conditions. A multi-stage learning strategy first aligns FCN embeddings with the LLM and then jointly fine-tunes the entire model to capture high-level semantic information. Experiments on a large-scale, multi-site FCN database show that FCN-LLM achieves strong zero-shot generalization on unseen datasets, outperforming conventional supervised and foundation models. This work introduces a new paradigm for integrating brain functional networks with LLMs, offering a flexible and interpretable framework for neuroscience.

AI.tldr: FCN-LLM：通过图级多任务指令调优，使LLM能够理解脑功能连接网络（FCN），实现脑网络与文本模态的对齐
AI.motivation: 现有方法未能将脑功能连接网络（FCN）与文本模态对齐，限制了LLM直接理解FCN的能力。需要开发一种框架，使LLM能够理解和处理脑功能网络数据。
AI.method: 提出FCN-LLM框架：1）使用多尺度FCN编码器捕获脑区、功能子网络和全脑特征；2）将特征投影到LLM的语义空间；3）设计多范式指令任务，涵盖19个受试者特定属性；4）采用多阶段学习策略，先对齐FCN嵌入，再联合微调整个模型。
AI.result: 在大规模多站点FCN数据库上的实验表明，FCN-LLM在未见数据集上实现了强大的零样本泛化能力，优于传统的监督学习和基础模型。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为脑功能网络与LLM的集成引入了新范式，为神经科学提供了一个灵活且可解释的框架。

title: Stateful Token Reduction for Long-Video Hybrid VLMs
summary: Token reduction is an effective way to accelerate long-video vision-language models (VLMs), but most existing methods are designed for dense Transformers and do not directly account for hybrid architectures that interleave attention with linear-time state-space blocks (e.g., Mamba). We study query-conditioned token reduction for hybrid video VLMs and analyze reduction behavior through two properties: layerwise sparsity (how many tokens capture query-relevant information) and importance stability (whether token-importance rankings persist across depth). Although token importance is sparse within each layer, the set of important tokens changes across layers, so aggressive early pruning is unreliable. Motivated by this, we propose a low-to-high progressive reduction schedule and a unified language-aware scoring mechanism for both attention and Mamba blocks (using an implicit-attention proxy for Mamba), enabling all-layer token reduction in hybrids. Under an aggressive compression setting (retaining 25% of visual tokens), our approach delivers substantial prefilling speedups (3.8--4.2x) with near-baseline accuracy at test time, and light finetuning under reduction further improves performance on long-context video benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了混合架构视频视觉语言模型（VLMs）的令牌缩减方法，提出了一种渐进式缩减调度和统一语言感知评分机制，在保持高精度的同时实现了显著的预填充加速。
AI.motivation: 现有令牌缩减方法主要针对密集Transformer设计，无法直接应用于混合架构（如结合注意力机制和线性时间状态空间块Mamba的视频VLMs）。需要专门研究混合架构中的查询条件令牌缩减，分析其缩减行为特性。
AI.method: 1) 分析令牌缩减的两个关键属性：层间稀疏性和重要性稳定性；2) 提出低到高渐进式缩减调度；3) 设计统一语言感知评分机制，适用于注意力块和Mamba块（对Mamba使用隐式注意力代理）；4) 支持混合架构中所有层的令牌缩减。
AI.result: 在激进压缩设置（保留25%视觉令牌）下，方法实现了3.8-4.2倍的预填充加速，同时保持接近基线的测试精度。在缩减条件下的轻量微调进一步提升了长上下文视频基准测试的性能。
AI.conclusion: 混合架构视频VLMs的令牌缩减需要专门方法，渐进式缩减调度和统一评分机制能有效平衡加速与精度，为高效长视频理解提供了实用解决方案。

title: Thoth: Mid-Training Bridges LLMs to Time Series Understanding
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable success in general-purpose reasoning. However, they still struggle to understand and reason about time series data, which limits their effectiveness in decision-making scenarios that depend on temporal dynamics. In this paper, we propose Thoth, the first family of mid-trained LLMs with general-purpose time series understanding capabilities. As a pivotal intermediate stage, mid-training achieves task- and domain-agnostic alignment between time series and natural language, for which we construct Book-of-Thoth, a high-quality, time-series-centric mid-training corpus. Book-of-Thoth enables both time-series-to-text and text-to-time-series generation, equipping LLMs with a foundational grasp of temporal patterns. To better evaluate advanced reasoning capabilities, we further present KnoTS, a novel benchmark of knowledge-intensive time series understanding, designed for joint reasoning over temporal patterns and domain knowledge. Extensive experiments demonstrate that mid-training with Book-of-Thoth enables Thoth to significantly outperform its base model and advanced LLMs across a range of time series question answering benchmarks. Moreover, Thoth exhibits superior capabilities when fine-tuned under data scarcity, underscoring the effectiveness of mid-training for time series understanding. Code is available at: https://github.com/thuml/Thoth.

AI.tldr: Thoth是首个具有通用时间序列理解能力的中期训练LLM家族，通过构建高质量时间序列语料库Book-of-Thoth，实现时间序列与自然语言的跨模态对齐，显著提升时间序列推理能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管LLMs在通用推理方面表现出色，但在理解和推理时间序列数据方面仍存在困难，这限制了其在依赖时间动态的决策场景中的有效性。需要开发能够理解时间序列的LLM。
AI.method: 提出Thoth框架：1) 构建Book-of-Thoth高质量时间序列语料库，支持时间序列到文本和文本到时间序列的双向生成；2) 采用中期训练策略，实现时间序列与自然语言的任务和领域无关对齐；3) 提出KnoTS基准测试，评估时间模式与领域知识的联合推理能力。
AI.result: 实验表明：1) Thoth在多个时间序列问答基准上显著优于基础模型和先进LLMs；2) 在数据稀缺情况下微调时表现出卓越能力；3) 中期训练策略有效提升了时间序列理解能力。
AI.conclusion: Thoth通过中期训练实现了时间序列与自然语言的有效对齐，为LLMs的时间序列理解提供了新范式，在数据稀缺场景下仍能保持优异性能，具有实际应用价值。

title: Efficient Decoder Scaling Strategy for Neural Routing Solvers
summary: Construction-based neural routing solvers, typically composed of an encoder and a decoder, have emerged as a promising approach for solving vehicle routing problems. While recent studies suggest that shifting parameters from the encoder to the decoder enhances performance, most works restrict the decoder size to 1-3M parameters, leaving the effects of scaling largely unexplored. To address this gap, we conduct a systematic study comparing two distinct strategies: scaling depth versus scaling width. We synthesize these strategies to construct a suite of 12 model configurations, spanning a parameter range from 1M to ~150M, and extensively evaluate their scaling behaviors across three critical dimensions: parameter efficiency, data efficiency, and compute efficiency. Our empirical results reveal that parameter count is insufficient to accurately predict the model performance, highlighting the critical and distinct roles of model depth (layer count) and width (embedding dimension). Crucially, we demonstrate that scaling depth yields superior performance gains to scaling width. Based on these findings, we provide and experimentally validate a set of design principles for the efficient allocation of parameters and compute resources to enhance the model performance.

AI.tldr: 该论文系统研究了基于构造的神经路由求解器中模型缩放策略，比较了深度缩放与宽度缩放的效果，发现深度缩放比宽度缩放带来更优的性能提升，并提出了参数和计算资源高效分配的设计原则。
AI.motivation: 虽然最近研究表明将参数从编码器转移到解码器能提升车辆路由问题的求解性能，但现有工作大多将解码器限制在1-3M参数范围内，模型缩放效果尚未得到充分探索。本文旨在填补这一研究空白。
AI.method: 构建了12种模型配置（参数范围1M到150M），系统比较深度缩放（层数增加）与宽度缩放（嵌入维度增加）两种策略。从参数效率、数据效率和计算效率三个维度评估缩放行为。
AI.result: 参数数量不足以准确预测模型性能；模型深度（层数）和宽度（嵌入维度）扮演关键且不同的角色；深度缩放比宽度缩放带来更优的性能提升；提出了参数和计算资源高效分配的设计原则并通过实验验证。
AI.conclusion: 模型缩放策略对神经路由求解器性能有重要影响，深度缩放优于宽度缩放。研究结果为高效分配参数和计算资源提供了设计指导原则。

title: AutoSkill: Experience-Driven Lifelong Learning via Skill Self-Evolution
summary: In practical LLM applications, users repeatedly express stable preferences and requirements, such as reducing hallucinations, following institutional writing conventions, or avoiding overly technical wording, yet such interaction experience is seldom consolidated into reusable knowledge. Consequently, LLM agents often fail to accumulate personalized capabilities across sessions. We present AutoSkill, an experience-driven lifelong learning framework that enables LLM agents to automatically derive, maintain, and reuse skills from dialogue and interaction traces. AutoSkill abstracts skills from user experience, supports their continual self-evolution, and dynamically injects relevant skills into future requests without retraining the underlying model. Designed as a model-agnostic plugin layer, it is compatible with existing LLMs and introduces a standardized skill representation for sharing and transfer across agents, users, and tasks. In this way, AutoSkill turns ephemeral interaction experience into explicit, reusable, and composable capabilities. This paper describes the motivation, architecture, skill lifecycle, and implementation of AutoSkill, and positions it with respect to prior work on memory, retrieval, personalization, and agentic systems. AutoSkill highlights a practical and scalable path toward lifelong personalized agents and personal digital surrogates.

AI.tldr: AutoSkill：一个经验驱动的终身学习框架，使LLM智能体能够从对话和交互轨迹中自动提取、维护和重用技能，将短暂交互经验转化为显式、可重用、可组合的能力。
AI.motivation: 在实际LLM应用中，用户反复表达稳定的偏好和需求（如减少幻觉、遵循机构写作惯例、避免过于技术性的措辞），但这些交互经验很少被整合为可重用知识。因此，LLM智能体往往无法跨会话积累个性化能力。
AI.method: AutoSkill是一个模型无关的插件层，从用户经验中抽象技能，支持技能的持续自我演化，并动态将相关技能注入未来请求中，无需重新训练底层模型。它采用标准化技能表示，支持跨智能体、用户和任务的共享与迁移。
AI.result: AutoSkill将短暂交互经验转化为显式、可重用、可组合的能力，为终身个性化智能体和个人数字代理提供了实用且可扩展的路径。
AI.conclusion: AutoSkill框架突出了向终身个性化智能体和个人数字代理发展的实用且可扩展路径，解决了LLM应用中经验知识难以积累和重用的问题。

title: AdURA-Net: Adaptive Uncertainty and Region-Aware Network
summary: One of the common issues in clinical decision-making is the presence of uncertainty, which often arises due to ambiguity in radiology reports, which often reflect genuine diagnostic uncertainty or limitations of automated label extraction in various complex cases. Especially the case of multilabel datasets such as CheXpert, MIMIC-CXR, etc., which contain labels such as positive, negative, and uncertain. In clinical decision-making, the uncertain label plays a tricky role as the model should not be forced to provide a confident prediction in the absence of sufficient evidence. The ability of the model to say it does not understand whenever it is not confident is crucial, especially in the cases of clinical decision-making involving high risks. Here, we propose AdURA-Net, a geometry-driven adaptive uncertainty-aware framework for reliable thoracic disease classification. The key highlights of the proposed model are: a) Adaptive dilated convolution and multiscale deformable alignment coupled with the backbone Densenet architecture capturing the anatomical complexities of the medical images, and b) Dual Head Loss, which combines masked binary cross entropy with logit and a Dirichlet evidential learning objective.

AI.tldr: AdURA-Net：一种几何驱动的自适应不确定性感知框架，用于可靠的胸部疾病分类，通过自适应扩张卷积和多尺度可变形对齐处理医学图像解剖复杂性，并结合双头损失函数处理不确定标签。
AI.motivation: 临床决策中存在不确定性，特别是在放射学报告中，多标签数据集（如CheXpert、MIMIC-CXR）包含阳性、阴性和不确定标签。模型不应在没有足够证据时被迫提供自信预测，而应能在不自信时表示不理解，这在涉及高风险的临床决策中至关重要。
AI.method: 提出AdURA-Net框架：1）自适应扩张卷积和多尺度可变形对齐与Densenet主干网络结合，捕捉医学图像的解剖复杂性；2）双头损失函数，结合掩码二元交叉熵与logit以及Dirichlet证据学习目标。
AI.result: 论文未提供具体实验结果，但框架设计旨在提高胸部疾病分类的可靠性，特别是在处理不确定标签时，使模型能够表达不确定性。
AI.conclusion: AdURA-Net通过几何驱动的方法和不确定性感知设计，为临床决策提供了更可靠的胸部疾病分类框架，特别适合处理医学图像中的不确定标签。

title: GroupGPT: A Token-efficient and Privacy-preserving Agentic Framework for Multi-User Chat Assistant
summary: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have enabled increasingly capable chatbots. However, most existing systems focus on single-user settings and do not generalize well to multi-user group chats, where agents require more proactive and accurate intervention under complex, evolving contexts. Existing approaches typically rely on LLMs for both reasoning and generation, leading to high token consumption, limited scalability, and potential privacy risks. To address these challenges, we propose GroupGPT, a token-efficient and privacy-preserving agentic framework for multi-user chat assistant. GroupGPT adopts a small-large model collaborative architecture to decouple intervention timing from response generation, enabling efficient and accurate decision-making. The framework also supports multimodal inputs, including memes, images, videos, and voice messages. We further introduce MUIR, a benchmark dataset for multi-user chat assistant intervention reasoning. MUIR contains 2,500 annotated group chat segments with intervention labels and rationales, supporting evaluation of timing accuracy and response quality. We evaluate a range of models on MUIR, from large language models to smaller counterparts. Extensive experiments demonstrate that GroupGPT produces accurate and well-timed responses, achieving an average score of 4.72/5.0 in LLM-based evaluation, and is well received by users across diverse group chat scenarios. Moreover, GroupGPT reduces token usage by up to 3 times compared to baseline methods, while providing privacy sanitization of user messages before cloud transmission. Code is available at: https://github.com/Eliot-Shen/GroupGPT .

AI.tldr: GroupGPT：面向多用户群聊的token高效、隐私保护的智能体框架，采用大小模型协作架构，分离干预时机判断与回复生成，支持多模态输入，并提出了MUIR评估基准。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM聊天系统主要针对单用户场景，在多用户群聊中表现不佳，需要更主动准确的干预。现有方法依赖LLM同时进行推理和生成，导致token消耗高、可扩展性有限、存在隐私风险。
AI.method: 提出GroupGPT框架，采用大小模型协作架构：小模型负责判断干预时机，大模型负责生成高质量回复。支持多模态输入（表情包、图片、视频、语音），并提供隐私保护机制。
AI.result: 在MUIR基准上评估，GroupGPT获得4.72/5.0的LLM评分，用户评价良好。相比基线方法减少最多3倍的token使用，同时提供消息隐私保护。
AI.conclusion: GroupGPT有效解决了多用户群聊中LLM系统的token效率、可扩展性和隐私问题，为多用户智能助手提供了实用框架。

title: ROKA: Robust Knowledge Unlearning against Adversaries
summary: The need for machine unlearning is critical for data privacy, yet existing methods often cause Knowledge Contamination by unintentionally damaging related knowledge. Such a degraded model performance after unlearning has been recently leveraged for new inference and backdoor attacks. Most studies design adversarial unlearning requests that require poisoning or duplicating training data. In this study, we introduce a new unlearning-induced attack model, namely indirect unlearning attack, which does not require data manipulation but exploits the consequence of knowledge contamination to perturb the model accuracy on security-critical predictions. To mitigate this attack, we introduce a theoretical framework that models neural networks as Neural Knowledge Systems. Based on this, we propose ROKA, a robust unlearning strategy centered on Neural Healing. Unlike conventional unlearning methods that only destroy information, ROKA constructively rebalances the model by nullifying the influence of forgotten data while strengthening its conceptual neighbors. To the best of our knowledge, our work is the first to provide a theoretical guarantee for knowledge preservation during unlearning. Evaluations on various large models, including vision transformers, multi-modal models, and large language models, show that ROKA effectively unlearns targets while preserving, or even enhancing, the accuracy of retained data, thereby mitigating the indirect unlearning attacks.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种新的间接遗忘攻击模型，该攻击利用知识污染效应在不操纵训练数据的情况下破坏模型性能，并提出了基于神经知识系统理论的ROKA遗忘策略，通过神经修复机制在遗忘目标数据的同时保护相关知识。
AI.motivation: 现有机器遗忘方法存在知识污染问题，即遗忘特定数据时会无意中损害相关知识的性能。这种性能退化已被用于新的推理和后门攻击。大多数研究需要数据中毒或重复训练数据来设计对抗性遗忘请求，但本文提出一种不需要数据操纵的间接遗忘攻击模型。
AI.method: 1) 提出间接遗忘攻击模型，利用知识污染效应扰动模型在安全关键预测上的准确性；2) 建立神经知识系统理论框架，将神经网络建模为知识系统；3) 提出ROKA遗忘策略，基于神经修复机制，通过消除遗忘数据的影响同时增强其概念邻居来重新平衡模型。
AI.result: 在各种大型模型（包括视觉Transformer、多模态模型和大型语言模型）上的评估表明，ROKA能有效遗忘目标数据，同时保持甚至提高保留数据的准确性，从而缓解间接遗忘攻击。这是首个为遗忘过程中的知识保护提供理论保证的工作。
AI.conclusion: 论文揭示了机器遗忘中的知识污染问题及其安全风险，提出了理论框架和实用解决方案ROKA，为安全、高效的机器遗忘提供了新方向，特别是在保护相关知识和防止攻击方面具有重要意义。

title: DeepResearch-9K: A Challenging Benchmark Dataset of Deep-Research Agent
summary: Deep-research agents are capable of executing multi-step web exploration, targeted retrieval, and sophisticated question answering. Despite their powerful capabilities, deep-research agents face two critical bottlenecks: (1) the lack of large-scale, challenging datasets with real-world difficulty, and (2) the absence of accessible, open-source frameworks for data synthesis and agent training. To bridge these gaps, we first construct DeepResearch-9K, a large-scale challenging dataset specifically designed for deep-research scenarios built from open-source multi-hop question-answering (QA) datasets via a low-cost autonomous pipeline. Notably, it consists of (1) 9000 questions spanning three difficulty levels from L1 to L3 (2) high-quality search trajectories with reasoning chains from Tongyi-DeepResearch-30B-A3B, a state-of-the-art deep-research agent, and (3) verifiable answers. Furthermore, we develop an open-source training framework DeepResearch-R1 that supports (1) multi-turn web interactions, (2) different reinforcement learning (RL) approaches, and (3) different reward models such as rule-based outcome reward and LLM-as-judge feedback. Finally, empirical results demonstrate that agents trained on DeepResearch-9K under our DeepResearch-R1 achieve state-of-the-art results on challenging deep-research benchmarks. We release the DeepResearch-9K dataset on https://huggingface.co/datasets/artillerywu/DeepResearch-9K and the code of DeepResearch-R1 on https://github.com/Applied-Machine-Learning-Lab/DeepResearch-R1.

AI.tldr: 提出了DeepResearch-9K数据集和DeepResearch-R1训练框架，用于解决深度研究智能体缺乏大规模挑战性数据集和开源训练框架的问题，在深度研究基准上取得了SOTA结果。
AI.motivation: 深度研究智能体虽然能够执行多步网络探索、定向检索和复杂问答，但面临两个关键瓶颈：1) 缺乏具有真实世界难度的大规模挑战性数据集；2) 缺少可访问的开源数据合成和智能体训练框架。
AI.method: 1) 构建DeepResearch-9K数据集：通过低成本自主流水线从开源多跳QA数据集构建，包含9000个问题（L1-L3三个难度级别）、高质量搜索轨迹和推理链、可验证答案；2) 开发DeepResearch-R1开源训练框架：支持多轮网络交互、不同强化学习方法、不同奖励模型（基于规则的成果奖励和LLM-as-judge反馈）。
AI.result: 在DeepResearch-R1框架下使用DeepResearch-9K训练的智能体，在具有挑战性的深度研究基准上取得了最先进的结果。
AI.conclusion: DeepResearch-9K数据集和DeepResearch-R1框架有效解决了深度研究智能体的数据稀缺和训练框架缺失问题，为社区提供了有价值的资源。

title: TACIT Benchmark: A Programmatic Visual Reasoning Benchmark for Generative and Discriminative Models
summary: Existing visual reasoning benchmarks predominantly rely on natural language prompts, evaluate narrow reasoning modalities, or depend on subjective scoring procedures such as LLM-as-judge. We introduce the TACIT Benchmark, a programmatic visual reasoning benchmark comprising 10 tasks across 6 reasoning domains: spatial navigation, abstract pattern completion, causal simulation, logical constraint satisfaction, graph theory, and topology. The benchmark provides dual-track evaluation: a generative track in which models must produce solution images verified through deterministic computer-vision pipelines, and a discriminative track offering five-way multiple choice with structurally plausible near-miss distractors. Each distractor violates exactly one structural constraint, requiring models to reason about fine-grained visual differences rather than exploit superficial cues. Version 0.1.0 distributes 6,000 puzzles (108,000 PNG images across three resolutions) with fully deterministic seeded generation and reproducible verification. The dataset, generation code, and evaluation harness are released under the Apache 2.0 license on HuggingFace (DOI: 10.57967/hf/7904).

AI.tldr: TACIT Benchmark是一个程序化的视觉推理基准测试，包含10个任务、6个推理领域，提供生成式和判别式双轨评估，通过确定性计算机视觉流程验证模型输出。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉推理基准主要依赖自然语言提示、评估狭窄的推理模式，或依赖主观评分方法（如LLM-as-judge），需要更客观、程序化的评估框架。
AI.method: 创建程序化视觉推理基准，包含6个推理领域：空间导航、抽象模式完成、因果模拟、逻辑约束满足、图论和拓扑。提供双轨评估：生成式轨道（模型必须生成解决方案图像并通过确定性计算机视觉流程验证）和判别式轨道（五选一多项选择，包含结构上合理的干扰项）。
AI.result: 发布了TACIT Benchmark v0.1.0，包含6,000个谜题（108,000张PNG图像，三种分辨率），具有完全确定性的种子生成和可重复验证。数据集、生成代码和评估工具在HuggingFace上以Apache 2.0许可证发布。
AI.conclusion: TACIT Benchmark为视觉推理提供了客观、程序化的评估框架，能够更准确地评估模型在多种推理领域的能力，避免了主观评分和表面线索的利用。

title: How RL Unlocks the Aha Moment in Geometric Interleaved Reasoning
summary: Solving complex geometric problems inherently requires interleaved reasoning: a tight alternation between constructing diagrams and performing logical deductions. Although recent Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated strong capabilities in visual generation and plotting, we identify a counter-intuitive and underexplored phenomenon. Naively applying Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) on interleaved plot-solution data leads to a substantial degradation in reasoning performance compared to text-only baselines. We argue that this failure stems from a fundamental limitation of SFT, which primarily induces distributional alignment: the model learns to reproduce the surface format of interleaved plotting but fails to internalize the causal dependency between the generated plot and reasoning steps. To overcome this limitation, we propose Faire (Functional alignment for interleaved reasoning), a reinforcement learning framework that enforces three casual constraints to move beyond superficial imitation toward functional alignment. Extensive experiments show that Faire induces a qualitative shift in model behavior in which the plotting is effectively internalized, yielding competitive performance on challenging geometric reasoning benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 论文提出Faire框架，通过强化学习解决多模态大语言模型在几何推理中绘图与逻辑推理交替时的性能退化问题，实现功能对齐而非表面模仿。
AI.motivation: 解决复杂几何问题需要绘图与逻辑推理的交替进行。研究发现，在多模态大语言模型上简单地使用监督微调处理交替绘图-解决方案数据会导致推理性能显著下降，这源于SFT只能实现分布对齐，无法让模型内化绘图与推理步骤之间的因果依赖关系。
AI.method: 提出Faire（Functional alignment for interleaved reasoning）强化学习框架，通过强制执行三个因果约束，超越表面模仿，实现功能对齐。这些约束确保绘图与后续推理步骤之间的因果依赖关系被正确建模。
AI.result: 实验表明Faire能诱导模型行为的质变，使绘图被有效内化，在具有挑战性的几何推理基准测试中取得有竞争力的性能。
AI.conclusion: Faire框架成功解决了多模态大语言模型在交替绘图推理中的性能退化问题，通过强化学习实现功能对齐，使模型能够真正内化绘图与推理之间的因果依赖关系。

title: Rooted Absorbed Prefix Trajectory Balance with Submodular Replay for GFlowNet Training
summary: Generative Flow Networks (GFlowNets) enable fine-tuning large language models to approximate reward-proportional posteriors, but they remain prone to mode collapse, manifesting as prefix collapse and length bias. We attribute this to two factors: (i) weak credit assignment to early prefixes, and (ii) biased replay that induces a shifted, non-representative training flow distribution. We propose Rooted absorbed prefix Trajectory Balance RapTB, an objective that anchors subtrajectory supervision at the root and propagates terminal rewards to intermediate prefixes via absorbed suffix-based backups, providing dense prefix-level learning signals. To mitigate replay-induced distribution shift, we further introduce SubM, a submodular replay refresh strategy that promotes both high reward and diversity. Empirically, on tasks such as molecule generation with LLM using SMILES strings, RapTB combined with SubM consistently improves optimization performance and molecular diversity while preserving high validity.

AI.tldr: 提出RapTB和SubM方法解决GFlowNets在LLM微调中的模式崩溃问题，通过根锚定轨迹平衡和子模重放策略改善奖励分配和多样性
AI.motivation: 生成流网络(GFlowNets)用于微调大语言模型以近似奖励比例后验分布，但存在模式崩溃问题，表现为前缀崩溃和长度偏差。这归因于两个因素：(1)对早期前缀的信用分配较弱，(2)有偏重放导致训练流分布偏移
AI.method: 提出RapTB（根锚定吸收前缀轨迹平衡）目标函数，将子轨迹监督锚定在根节点，通过吸收后缀备份将终端奖励传播到中间前缀，提供密集的前缀级学习信号。同时提出SubM（子模重放刷新策略），通过子模优化促进高奖励和多样性
AI.result: 在分子生成任务（使用SMILES字符串的LLM）上，RapTB结合SubM持续改善优化性能，提高分子多样性，同时保持高有效性
AI.conclusion: 通过改进的信用分配机制和多样性感知的重放策略，可以有效缓解GFlowNets在LLM微调中的模式崩溃问题，提升生成质量和多样性

title: Semantic XPath: Structured Agentic Memory Access for Conversational AI
summary: Conversational AI (ConvAI) agents increasingly maintain structured memory to support long-term, task-oriented interactions. In-context memory approaches append the growing history to the model input, which scales poorly under context-window limits. RAG-based methods retrieve request-relevant information, but most assume flat memory collections and ignore structure. We propose Semantic XPath, a tree-structured memory module to access and update structured conversational memory. Semantic XPath improves performance over flat-RAG baselines by 176.7% while using only 9.1% of the tokens required by in-context memory. We also introduce SemanticXPath Chat, an end-to-end ConvAI demo system that visualizes the structured memory and query execution details. Overall, this paper demonstrates a candidate for the next generation of long-term, task-oriented ConvAI systems built on structured memory.

AI.tldr: 提出Semantic XPath，一种树状结构记忆模块，用于访问和更新结构化对话记忆，相比平面RAG基线性能提升176.7%，仅需9.1%的token消耗。
AI.motivation: 当前对话AI系统在处理长期任务导向交互时面临挑战：上下文记忆方法受限于上下文窗口，而RAG方法大多假设平面记忆集合且忽略结构信息。
AI.method: 提出Semantic XPath，一个树状结构记忆模块，能够有效访问和更新结构化对话记忆。同时开发了SemanticXPath Chat端到端演示系统，可视化结构化记忆和查询执行细节。
AI.result: 相比平面RAG基线，性能提升176.7%，同时仅需9.1%的token消耗。展示了基于结构化记忆构建下一代长期任务导向对话AI系统的潜力。
AI.conclusion: Semantic XPath为构建下一代长期任务导向对话AI系统提供了有前景的候选方案，通过结构化记忆有效解决了上下文窗口限制和记忆结构利用不足的问题。

title: VisRef: Visual Refocusing while Thinking Improves Test-Time Scaling in Multi-Modal Large Reasoning Models
summary: Advances in large reasoning models have shown strong performance on complex reasoning tasks by scaling test-time compute through extended reasoning. However, recent studies observe that in vision-dependent tasks, extended textual reasoning at inference time can degrade performance as models progressively lose attention to visual tokens and increasingly rely on textual priors alone. To address this, prior works use reinforcement learning (RL)-based fine-tuning to route visual tokens or employ refocusing mechanisms during reasoning. While effective, these methods are computationally expensive, requiring large-scale data generation and policy optimization. To leverage the benefits of test-time compute without additional RL fine-tuning, we propose VisRef, a visually grounded test-time scaling framework. Our key idea is to actively guide the reasoning process by re-injecting a coreset of visual tokens that are semantically relevant to the reasoning context while remaining diverse and globally representative of the image, enabling more grounded multi-modal reasoning. Experiments on three visual reasoning benchmarks with state-of-the-art multi-modal large reasoning models demonstrate that, under fixed test-time compute budgets, VisRef consistently outperforms existing test-time scaling approaches by up to 6.4%.

AI.tldr: VisRef提出了一种视觉基础测试时扩展框架，通过重新注入语义相关且多样化的视觉标记来引导多模态推理，避免RL微调的高成本。
AI.motivation: 现有大型推理模型在视觉依赖任务中，随着推理时间延长会逐渐失去对视觉标记的关注，过度依赖文本先验，导致性能下降。现有方法使用RL微调或重聚焦机制，但计算成本高昂。
AI.method: 提出VisRef框架，在推理过程中主动重新注入语义相关、多样化且全局代表性的视觉标记核心集，引导推理过程保持视觉基础。
AI.result: 在三个视觉推理基准测试中，VisRef在固定测试时计算预算下，比现有测试时扩展方法性能提升最高达6.4%。
AI.conclusion: VisRef提供了一种高效的多模态推理引导方法，无需昂贵的RL微调，通过视觉标记重注入实现更基础的推理。

title: CARD: Towards Conditional Design of Multi-agent Topological Structures
summary: Large language model (LLM)-based multi-agent systems have shown strong capabilities in tasks such as code generation and collaborative reasoning. However, the effectiveness and robustness of these systems critically depend on their communication topology, which is often fixed or statically learned, ignoring real-world dynamics such as model upgrades, API (or tool) changes, or knowledge source variability. To address this limitation, we propose CARD (Conditional Agentic Graph Designer), a conditional graph-generation framework that instantiates AMACP, a protocol for adaptive multi-agent communication. CARD explicitly incorporates dynamic environmental signals into graph construction, enabling topology adaptation at both training and runtime. Through a conditional variational graph encoder and environment-aware optimization, CARD produces communication structures that are both effective and resilient to shifts in model capability or resource availability. Empirical results on HumanEval, MATH, and MMLU demonstrate that CARD consistently outperforms static and prompt-based baselines, achieving higher accuracy and robustness across diverse conditions. The source code is available at: https://github.com/Warma10032/CARD.

AI.tldr: CARD是一个条件图生成框架，用于自适应多智能体通信，通过动态环境信号优化通信拓扑，提升LLM多智能体系统的效果和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM多智能体系统的通信拓扑通常是固定或静态学习的，无法适应现实世界中的动态变化（如模型升级、API变更、知识源变化等），这限制了系统的有效性和鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出CARD（条件智能体图设计器）框架，基于AMACP协议实现自适应多智能体通信。采用条件变分图编码器，将动态环境信号显式纳入图构建过程，支持训练和运行时拓扑自适应，通过环境感知优化生成既有效又对模型能力或资源变化具有鲁棒性的通信结构。
AI.result: 在HumanEval、MATH和MMLU等基准测试中，CARD consistently outperforms static and prompt-based baselines，实现了更高的准确性和跨不同条件的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: CARD框架通过动态适应通信拓扑，显著提升了LLM多智能体系统的性能和鲁棒性，为解决现实世界动态变化提供了有效方案。

title: Benchmarking Few-shot Transferability of Pre-trained Models with Improved Evaluation Protocols
summary: Few-shot transfer has been revolutionized by stronger pre-trained models and improved adaptation algorithms.However, there lacks a unified, rigorous evaluation protocol that is both challenging and realistic for real-world usage. In this work, we establish FEWTRANS, a comprehensive benchmark containing 10 diverse datasets, and propose the Hyperparameter Ensemble (HPE) protocol to overcome the "validation set illusion" in data-scarce regimes. Our empirical findings demonstrate that the choice of pre-trained model is the dominant factor for performance, while many sophisticated transfer methods offer negligible practical advantages over a simple full-parameter fine-tuning baseline. To explain this surprising effectiveness, we provide an in-depth mechanistic analysis showing that full fine-tuning succeeds via distributed micro-adjustments and more flexible reshaping of high-level semantic presentations without suffering from overfitting. Additionally, we quantify the performance collapse of multimodal models in specialized domains as a result of linguistic rarity using adjusted Zipf frequency scores. By releasing FEWTRANS, we aim to provide a rigorous "ruler" to streamline reproducible advances in few-shot transfer learning research. We make the FEWTRANS benchmark publicly available at https://github.com/Frankluox/FewTrans.

AI.tldr: FEWTRANS是一个全面的少样本迁移学习基准，包含10个多样化数据集，并提出超参数集成协议来克服数据稀缺情况下的"验证集幻觉"。研究发现预训练模型选择是性能的主导因素，而许多复杂的迁移方法相比简单的全参数微调基线几乎没有实际优势。
AI.motivation: 当前少样本迁移学习缺乏统一、严谨且具有挑战性的评估协议，无法反映真实世界使用场景。需要建立一个全面的基准来推动可复现的少样本迁移学习研究。
AI.method: 建立了FEWTRANS基准，包含10个多样化数据集；提出了超参数集成协议来克服数据稀缺情况下的验证集幻觉；通过机制分析研究全参数微调的有效性；使用调整的Zipf频率分数量化多模态模型在专业领域的性能崩溃。
AI.result: 预训练模型选择是少样本迁移性能的主导因素；许多复杂的迁移方法相比简单的全参数微调基线几乎没有实际优势；全参数微调通过分布式微调整和更灵活的高层语义表示重塑取得成功；多模态模型在专业领域因语言稀有性出现性能崩溃。
AI.conclusion: FEWTRANS基准为少样本迁移学习研究提供了严谨的"标尺"，强调了预训练模型质量的重要性，并揭示了全参数微调的意外有效性，有助于推动该领域的可复现进展。

title: Incremental LTLf Synthesis
summary: In this paper, we study incremental LTLf synthesis -- a form of reactive synthesis where the goals are given incrementally while in execution. In other words, the protagonist agent is already executing a strategy for a certain goal when it receives a new goal: at this point, the agent has to abandon the current strategy and synthesize a new strategy still fulfilling the original goal, which was given at the beginning, as well as the new goal, starting from the current instant. In this paper, we formally define the problem of incremental synthesis and study its solution. We propose a solution technique that efficiently performs incremental synthesis for multiple LTLf goals by leveraging auxiliary data structures constructed during automata-based synthesis. We also consider an alternative solution technique based on LTLf formula progression. We show that, in spite of the fact that formula progression can generate formulas that are exponentially larger than the original ones, their minimal automata remain bounded in size by that of the original formula. On the other hand, we show experimentally that, if implemented naively, i.e., by actually computing the automaton of the progressed LTLf formulas from scratch every time a new goal arrives, the solution based on formula progression is not competitive.

AI.tldr: 本文研究增量LTLf综合问题，即代理在执行过程中不断接收新目标时，需要动态调整策略以满足所有累积目标。
AI.motivation: 在现实世界的反应式系统中，目标通常不是一次性给出的，而是在执行过程中逐步增加的。代理需要在保持原有目标的同时，处理新到达的目标，这需要高效的增量综合方法。
AI.method: 提出了两种解决方案：1）基于自动机的增量综合技术，利用辅助数据结构；2）基于LTLf公式递进的方法，并证明尽管递进公式可能指数级增长，但其最小自动机大小有界。
AI.result: 实验表明，如果每次新目标到达时都从头计算递进公式的自动机，基于公式递进的方法效率不高。而基于自动机的增量方法更有效。
AI.conclusion: 增量LTLf综合是一个重要且具有挑战性的问题，基于自动机的增量方法比基于公式递进的朴素实现更高效，为动态环境中的反应式综合提供了实用解决方案。

title: Physical Evaluation of Naturalistic Adversarial Patches for Camera-Based Traffic-Sign Detection
comment: Accepted to the 2nd IEEE Conference on Secure and Trustworthy CyberInfrastructure for IoT and Microelectronics (SaTC 2026), Houston, Texas, USA, March 24 to 26, 2026
summary: This paper studies how well Naturalistic Adversarial Patches (NAPs) transfer to a physical traffic sign setting when the detector is trained on a customized dataset for an autonomous vehicle (AV) environment. We construct a composite dataset, CompGTSRB (which is customized dataset for AV environment), by pasting traffic sign instances from the German Traffic Sign Recognition Benchmark (GTSRB) onto undistorted backgrounds captured from the target platform. CompGTSRB is used to train a YOLOv5 model and generate patches using a Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) with latent space optimization, following existing NAP methods. We carried out a series of experiments on our Quanser QCar testbed utilizing the front CSI camera provided in QCar. Across configurations, NAPs reduce the detector's STOP class confidence. Different configurations include distance, patch sizes, and patch placement. These results along with a detailed step-by-step methodology indicate the utility of CompGTSRB dataset and the proposed systematic physical protocols for credible patch evaluation. The research further motivate researching the defenses that address localized patch corruption in embedded perception pipelines.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了自然对抗补丁在物理交通标志场景中的迁移效果，使用自动驾驶环境定制数据集CompGTSRB训练YOLOv5检测器，通过GAN生成对抗补丁，并在Quanser QCar测试平台上进行物理实验验证补丁对STOP标志检测置信度的降低效果。
AI.motivation: 研究自然对抗补丁在物理交通标志检测系统中的实际攻击效果，特别是在自动驾驶环境下的安全性问题。现有研究多在数字环境下进行，缺乏对物理场景中对抗补丁迁移效果的深入分析。
AI.method: 1) 构建自动驾驶环境定制数据集CompGTSRB：将GTSRB交通标志粘贴到目标平台采集的真实背景上；2) 使用CompGTSRB训练YOLOv5目标检测器；3) 采用GAN结合潜在空间优化的方法生成自然对抗补丁；4) 在Quanser QCar测试平台上进行物理实验，测试不同距离、补丁大小和放置位置下的攻击效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，自然对抗补丁在不同配置下都能有效降低检测器对STOP标志的置信度。通过系统的物理协议验证了CompGTSRB数据集的有效性，证明了对抗补丁在物理环境中的实际威胁。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了自然对抗补丁在物理交通标志检测系统中的实际攻击效果，强调了自动驾驶感知系统面临的安全风险。研究结果呼吁开发针对局部补丁污染的防御机制，以增强嵌入式感知管道的鲁棒性。

title: DEP: A Decentralized Large Language Model Evaluation Protocol
summary: With the rapid development of Large Language Models (LLMs), a large number of benchmarks have been proposed. However, most benchmarks lack unified evaluation standard and require the manual implementation of custom scripts, making results hard to ensure consistency and reproducibility. Furthermore, mainstream evaluation frameworks are centralized, with datasets and answers, which increases the risk of benchmark leakage. To address these issues, we propose a Decentralized Evaluation Protocol (DEP), a decentralized yet unified and standardized evaluation framework through a matching server without constraining benchmarks. The server can be mounted locally or deployed remotely, and once adapted, it can be reused over the long term. By decoupling users, LLMs, and benchmarks, DEP enables modular, plug-and-play evaluation: benchmark files and evaluation logic stay exclusively on the server side. In remote setting, users cannot access the ground truth, thereby achieving data isolation and leak-proof evaluation. To facilitate practical adoption, we develop DEP Toolkit, a protocol-compatible toolkit that supports features such as breakpoint resume, concurrent requests, and congestion control. We also provide detailed documentation for adapting new benchmarks to DEP. Using DEP toolkit, we evaluate multiple LLMs across benchmarks. Experimental results verify the effectiveness of DEP and show that it reduces the cost of deploying benchmark evaluations. As of February 2026, we have adapted over 60 benchmarks and continue to promote community co-construction to support unified evaluation across various tasks and domains.

AI.tldr: 提出去中心化评估协议(DEP)，通过匹配服务器实现统一标准化的LLM评估框架，解决现有基准测试缺乏统一标准、手动实现脚本、数据泄露等问题
AI.motivation: 当前LLM基准测试存在三个主要问题：1) 缺乏统一评估标准，需要手动实现自定义脚本，导致结果一致性和可复现性差；2) 主流评估框架是中心化的，数据集和答案集中存储，增加了基准泄露风险；3) 评估过程不够模块化和可复用
AI.method: 提出去中心化评估协议(DEP)，通过匹配服务器将用户、LLM和基准测试解耦。基准文件和评估逻辑仅保留在服务器端，实现数据隔离和防泄露。开发DEP Toolkit支持断点续传、并发请求和拥塞控制等功能，并提供详细的基准适配文档
AI.result: 实验验证了DEP的有效性，显著降低了基准评估部署成本。截至2026年2月，已适配超过60个基准测试，并持续推动社区共建，支持跨任务和领域的统一评估
AI.conclusion: DEP提供了一个去中心化、统一标准化的LLM评估框架，解决了现有基准测试的一致性和泄露问题，通过模块化设计实现了长期可复用的评估系统

title: Analyzing Physical Adversarial Example Threats to Machine Learning in Election Systems
summary: Developments in the machine learning voting domain have shown both promising results and risks. Trained models perform well on ballot classification tasks (> 99% accuracy) but are at risk from adversarial example attacks that cause misclassifications. In this paper, we analyze an attacker who seeks to deploy adversarial examples against machine learning ballot classifiers to compromise a U.S. election. We first derive a probabilistic framework for determining the number of adversarial example ballots that must be printed to flip an election, in terms of the probability of each candidate winning and the total number of ballots cast. Second, it is an open question as to which type of adversarial example is most effective when physically printed in the voting domain. We analyze six different types of adversarial example attacks: l_infinity-APGD, l2-APGD, l1-APGD, l0 PGD, l0 + l_infinity PGD, and l0 + sigma-map PGD. Our experiments include physical realizations of 144,000 adversarial examples through printing and scanning with four different machine learning models. We empirically demonstrate an analysis gap between the physical and digital domains, wherein attacks most effective in the digital domain (l2 and l_infinity) differ from those most effective in the physical domain (l1 and l2, depending on the model). By unifying a probabilistic election framework with digital and physical adversarial example evaluations, we move beyond prior close race analyses to explicitly quantify when and how adversarial ballot manipulation could alter outcomes.

AI.tldr: 该论文分析了针对机器学习选票分类器的对抗样本攻击如何影响美国选举结果，提出了概率框架量化需要打印的对抗样本数量，并通过物理实验比较了六种对抗攻击方法在数字域和物理域的有效性差异。
AI.motivation: 机器学习选票分类器虽然准确率高（>99%），但面临对抗样本攻击风险。作者旨在分析攻击者如何通过打印对抗样本选票来操纵选举结果，填补数字域与物理域攻击效果差异的研究空白。
AI.method: 1) 建立概率框架计算翻转选举所需的对抗样本数量；2) 分析六种对抗攻击方法：l_infinity-APGD, l2-APGD, l1-APGD, l0 PGD, l0 + l_infinity PGD, l0 + sigma-map PGD；3) 通过打印和扫描14.4万个对抗样本进行物理实验，使用四种机器学习模型。
AI.result: 1) 数字域最有效的攻击（l2和l_infinity）与物理域最有效的攻击（l1和l2，取决于模型）存在差异；2) 建立了量化选举操纵可能性的统一框架；3) 物理实现验证了攻击的实际可行性。
AI.conclusion: 对抗样本攻击能够实际影响选举结果，数字域与物理域的攻击效果存在显著差异，需要重新评估机器学习投票系统的安全性。该研究为选举安全提供了量化分析框架。

title: How Well Does Agent Development Reflect Real-World Work?
summary: AI agents are increasingly developed and evaluated on benchmarks relevant to human work, yet it remains unclear how representative these benchmarking efforts are of the labor market as a whole. In this work, we systematically study the relationship between agent development efforts and the distribution of real-world human work by mapping benchmark instances to work domains and skills. We first analyze 43 benchmarks and 72,342 tasks, measuring their alignment with human employment and capital allocation across all 1,016 real-world occupations in the U.S. labor market. We reveal substantial mismatches between agent development that tends to be programming-centric, and the categories in which human labor and economic value are concentrated. Within work areas that agents currently target, we further characterize current agent utility by measuring their autonomy levels, providing practical guidance for agent interaction strategies across work scenarios. Building on these findings, we propose three measurable principles for designing benchmarks that better capture socially important and technically challenging forms of work: coverage, realism, and granular evaluation.

AI.tldr: 该论文系统研究了AI代理基准测试与真实世界劳动力市场的关系，发现当前代理开发主要集中在编程领域，与人类劳动和经济价值的分布存在严重不匹配，并提出了改进基准测试的三个原则。
AI.motivation: 当前AI代理越来越多地在与人类工作相关的基准上进行开发和评估，但尚不清楚这些基准测试工作是否能代表整个劳动力市场。需要系统研究代理开发工作与真实世界人类工作分布之间的关系。
AI.method: 1) 分析43个基准测试和72,342个任务，将它们映射到工作领域和技能；2) 测量这些基准与美国劳动力市场1,016个真实职业的人类就业和资本分配的对应关系；3) 在代理当前针对的工作领域内，通过测量其自主水平来表征当前代理效用；4) 基于研究发现提出三个可测量的基准设计原则。
AI.result: 揭示了代理开发（倾向于编程中心）与人类劳动和经济价值集中类别之间的严重不匹配。在代理当前针对的工作领域内，提供了跨工作场景的代理交互策略实用指导。
AI.conclusion: 提出了三个可测量的基准设计原则（覆盖性、真实性和细粒度评估），以更好地捕捉社会重要和技术挑战性的工作形式，使AI代理评估更加全面和实用。

title: Pretty Good Measurement for Radiomics: A Quantum-Inspired Multi-Class Classifier for Lung Cancer Subtyping and Prostate Cancer Risk Stratification
comment: 15 pages, 7 figures, 1 table, in preparation for journal submission
summary: We investigate a quantum-inspired approach to supervised multi-class classification based on the \emph{Pretty Good Measurement} (PGM), viewed as an operator-valued decision rule derived from quantum state discrimination. The method associates each class with an encoded mixed state and performs classification through a single POVM construction, thus providing a genuinely multi-class strategy without reduction to pairwise or one-vs-rest schemes. In this perspective, classification is reformulated as the discrimination of a finite ensemble of class-dependent density operators, with performance governed by the geometry induced by the encoding map and by the overlap structure among classes. To assess the practical scope of this framework, we apply the PGM-based classifier to two biomedical radiomics case studies: histopathological subtyping of non-small-cell lung carcinoma (NSCLC) and prostate cancer (PCa) risk stratification. The evaluation is conducted under protocols aligned with previously reported radiomics studies, enabling direct comparison with established classical baselines. The results show that the PGM-based classifier is consistently competitive and, in several settings, improves upon standard methods. In particular, the method performs especially well in the NSCLC binary and three-class tasks, while remaining competitive in the four-class case, where increased class overlap yields a more demanding discrimination geometry. In the PCa study, the PGM classifier remains close to the strongest ensemble baseline and exhibits clinically relevant sensitivity--specificity trade-offs across feature-selection scenarios.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于量子态判别中"相当好测量"（PGM）的量子启发的多类分类方法，并将其应用于生物医学影像组学中的肺癌和前列腺癌分类任务。
AI.motivation: 探索量子启发的分类方法，特别是基于量子态判别的PGM，为多类分类问题提供一种不依赖于成对或一对多分解的完整多类策略。该方法旨在利用量子信息理论中的几何结构来处理分类问题。
AI.method: 将每个类别编码为混合量子态，通过PGM构造单一的正算子值测度（POVM）进行分类。分类被重新表述为有限个类别相关密度算子的判别问题，性能由编码映射诱导的几何结构和类别间的重叠结构决定。
AI.result: 在非小细胞肺癌（NSCLC）亚型分类和前列腺癌（PCa）风险分层两个生物医学影像组学案例中，PGM分类器表现具有竞争力。在NSCLC的二类和三类任务中表现优异，在四类任务中保持竞争力。在前列腺癌研究中，PGM分类器接近最强的集成基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于PGM的量子启发分类方法为多类分类提供了有效的替代方案，在生物医学影像组学应用中展现出竞争力，特别是在类别重叠结构复杂的场景中。

title: Token-level Data Selection for Safe LLM Fine-tuning
summary: Fine-tuning large language models (LLMs) on custom datasets has become a standard approach for adapting these models to specific domains and applications. However, recent studies have shown that such fine-tuning can lead to significant degradation in the model's safety. Existing defense methods operate at the sample level and often suffer from an unsatisfactory trade-off between safety and utility. To address this limitation, we perform a systematic token-level diagnosis of safety degradation during fine-tuning. Based on this, we propose token-level data selection for safe LLM fine-tuning (TOSS), a novel framework that quantifies the safety risk of each token by measuring the loss difference between a safety-degraded model and a utility-oriented model. This token-level granularity enables accurate identification and removal of unsafe tokens, thereby preserving valuable task-specific information. In addition, we introduce a progressive refinement strategy, TOSS-Pro, which iteratively enhances the safety-degraded model's ability to identify unsafe tokens. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach robustly safeguards LLMs during fine-tuning while achieving superior downstream task performance, significantly outperforming existing sample-level defense methods. Our code is available at https://github.com/Polly-LYP/TOSS.

AI.tldr: TOSS：一种基于token级数据选择的LLM安全微调框架，通过量化每个token的安全风险来识别和移除不安全token，在保持任务性能的同时防止安全退化
AI.motivation: 现有LLM微调方法在特定领域数据集上会导致模型安全性显著下降，而现有的防御方法在样本级别操作，难以平衡安全性和实用性之间的权衡
AI.method: 提出token级安全诊断框架TOSS，通过比较安全退化模型和实用导向模型的损失差异来量化每个token的安全风险，并引入渐进式精炼策略TOSS-Pro迭代提升模型识别不安全token的能力
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在微调过程中能有效保护LLM安全，同时在下游任务上取得优异性能，显著优于现有的样本级防御方法
AI.conclusion: token级数据选择是解决LLM微调安全退化的有效方法，TOSS框架在安全性和实用性之间取得了更好的平衡

title: Dynamic Spatio-Temporal Graph Neural Network for Early Detection of Pornography Addiction in Adolescents Based on Electroencephalogram Signals
summary: Adolescent pornography addiction requires early detection based on objective neurobiological biomarkers because self-report is prone to subjective bias due to social stigma. Conventional machine learning has not been able to model dynamic functional connectivity of the brain that fluctuates temporally during addictive stimulus exposure. This study proposes a state-of-the-art Dynamic Spatio-Temporal Graph Neural Network (DST-GNN) that integrates Phase Lag Index (PLI)-based Graph Attention Network (GAT) for spatial modeling and Bidirectional Gated Recurrent Unit (BiGRU) for temporal dynamics. The dataset consists of 14 adolescents (7 addicted, 7 healthy) with 19-channel EEG across 9 experimental conditions. Leave-One-Subject-Out Cross Validation (LOSO-CV) evaluation shows F1-Score of 71.00%$\pm$12.10% and recall of 85.71%, a 104% improvement compared to baseline. Ablation study confirms temporal contribution of 21% and PLI graph construction of 57%. Frontal-central regions (Fz, Cz, C3, C4) are identified as dominant biomarkers with Beta contribution of 58.9% and Hjorth of 31.2%, while Cz-T7 connectivity is consistent as a trait-level biomarker for objective screening.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种动态时空图神经网络(DST-GNN)，结合相位滞后指数图注意力网络和双向门控循环单元，用于基于EEG的青少年色情成瘾早期检测，相比基线有104%的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 青少年色情成瘾需要基于客观神经生物学标志物的早期检测，因为自我报告容易因社会污名而产生主观偏差。传统机器学习无法建模大脑在成瘾刺激暴露期间随时间波动的动态功能连接。
AI.method: 提出动态时空图神经网络(DST-GNN)：1) 使用相位滞后指数(PLI)构建功能连接图；2) 图注意力网络(GAT)进行空间建模；3) 双向门控循环单元(BiGRU)捕捉时间动态。数据集包含14名青少年(7名成瘾，7名健康)的19通道EEG数据，覆盖9种实验条件。
AI.result: 留一受试者交叉验证(LOSO-CV)显示F1分数为71.00%±12.10%，召回率为85.71%，相比基线提升104%。消融研究确认时间贡献为21%，PLI图构建贡献为57%。识别出额中央区(Fz, Cz, C3, C4)为主要生物标志物，Beta波贡献58.9%，Hjorth参数贡献31.2%，Cz-T7连接性作为客观筛查的特质水平生物标志物。
AI.conclusion: DST-GNN能够有效建模大脑动态功能连接，为青少年色情成瘾提供客观的神经生物学检测方法，识别出关键脑区和连接性生物标志物，相比传统方法有显著改进。

title: Agents Learn Their Runtime: Interpreter Persistence as Training-Time Semantics
summary:
Tool-augmented LLMs are increasingly deployed as agents that interleave natural-language reasoning with executable Python actions, as in CodeAct-style frameworks. In deployment, these agents rely on runtime state that persists across steps. By contrast, common training pipelines treat agent traces as token sequences, with execution semantics left implicit. This raises a data-centric question: Is state persistence merely an inference-time scaffold, or can models learn to exploit it when training data exposes the corresponding execution semantics?
  We isolate state persistence as a training-time variable. We introduce Opaque Knapsack, a procedurally generated family of partially observable optimization tasks designed to prevent one-shot solutions. Item attributes and constraints are hidden behind budgeted tool calls, forcing multi-turn control flow and iterative state revision. Holding task instances, prompts, tools, model, and supervision fixed, we generate paired trajectories differing only in whether interpreter state persists across steps or resets after each action. We then fine-tune identical base models (Qwen3-8B) on each trace variant and evaluate all four train-runtime combinations.
  Our 2x2 cross-evaluation shows that execution semantics primarily affect how agents reach solutions, not whether they do: solution quality is statistically indistinguishable across conditions, but token cost and stability differ substantially. A persistent-trained model in a stateless runtime triggers missing-variable errors in roughly 80% of episodes; a stateless-trained model in a persistent runtime redundantly re-derives retained state, using roughly 3.5x more tokens.
  Interpreter persistence should be treated as a first-class semantic of agent traces. Aligning fine-tuning data with deployment runtimes improves efficiency and reduces brittle train-runtime mismatches.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了工具增强LLM中解释器状态持久性对训练和推理的影响，发现状态持久性应被视为智能体轨迹的一等语义，训练数据与部署运行时对齐可提升效率并减少脆弱性。
AI.motivation: 当前工具增强LLM在部署时依赖跨步骤的运行时状态持久性，但常见训练流程将智能体轨迹视为令牌序列，执行语义被隐式处理。这引发了一个数据中心问题：状态持久性仅仅是推理时的脚手架，还是模型可以在训练数据暴露相应执行语义时学会利用它？
AI.method: 引入Opaque Knapsack——一个程序生成的家族化部分可观察优化任务，防止一次性解决方案。通过隐藏项目属性和约束在预算工具调用后，强制多轮控制流和迭代状态修订。保持任务实例、提示、工具、模型和监督固定，生成仅在解释器状态是否跨步骤持久化方面不同的配对轨迹。然后在每个轨迹变体上微调相同的基模型(Qwen3-8B)，并评估所有四种训练-运行时组合。
AI.result: 2x2交叉评估显示，执行语义主要影响智能体如何达到解决方案，而不是是否达到解决方案：解决方案质量在统计上无法区分，但令牌成本和稳定性差异显著。在无状态运行时中，持久性训练模型在大约80%的剧集中触发缺失变量错误；在持久性运行时中，无状态训练模型冗余地重新推导保留状态，使用大约3.5倍更多的令牌。
AI.conclusion: 解释器持久性应被视为智能体轨迹的一等语义。将微调数据与部署运行时对齐可以提高效率并减少脆弱的训练-运行时不匹配。

title: Adversarial Patch Generation for Visual-Infrared Dense Prediction Tasks via Joint Position-Color Optimization
summary: Multimodal adversarial attacks for dense prediction remain largely underexplored. In particular, visual-infrared (VI) perception systems introduce unique challenges due to heterogeneous spectral characteristics and modality-specific intensity distributions. Existing adversarial patch methods are primarily designed for single-modal inputs and fail to account for crossspectral inconsistencies, leading to reduced attack effectiveness and poor stealthiness when applied to VI dense prediction models. To address these challenges, we propose a joint position-color optimization framework (AP-PCO) for generating adversarial patches in visual-infrared settings. The proposed method optimizes patch placement and color composition simultaneously using a fitness function derived from model outputs, enabling a single patch to perturb both visible and infrared modalities. To further bridge spectral discrepancies, we introduce a crossmodal color adaptation strategy that constrains patch appearance according to infrared grayscale characteristics while maintaining strong perturbations in the visible domain, thereby reducing cross-spectral saliency. The optimization procedure operates without requiring internal model information, supporting flexible black-box attacks. Extensive experiments on visual-infrared dense prediction tasks demonstrate that the proposed AP-PCO achieves consistently strong attack performance across multiple architectures, providing a practical benchmark for robustness evaluation in VI perception systems.

AI.tldr: 提出AP-PCO框架，通过联合位置-颜色优化生成视觉-红外对抗补丁，解决多模态密集预测中的攻击挑战
AI.motivation: 当前多模态对抗攻击研究不足，特别是视觉-红外感知系统存在光谱异质性和模态特定强度分布等独特挑战。现有单模态对抗补丁方法无法处理跨光谱不一致性，导致攻击效果差且隐蔽性不足。
AI.method: 提出联合位置-颜色优化框架(AP-PCO)：1) 同时优化补丁位置和颜色组成，使用模型输出构建的适应度函数；2) 引入跨模态颜色适应策略，根据红外灰度特征约束补丁外观，同时保持可见光域强扰动；3) 无需模型内部信息，支持黑盒攻击。
AI.result: 在视觉-红外密集预测任务上的广泛实验表明，AP-PCO在多种架构上实现了一致的强攻击性能，为VI感知系统的鲁棒性评估提供了实用基准。
AI.conclusion: AP-PCO框架有效解决了视觉-红外多模态对抗攻击的挑战，通过联合优化位置和颜色，实现了跨光谱的有效扰动，为多模态感知系统的安全性评估提供了新方法。

title: Reasoning or Rationalization? The Role of Justifications in Masked Diffusion Models for Fact Verification
summary: Unlike autoregressive models, which generate tokens sequentially and benefit from reasoning-before-answering strategies such as Chain-of-Thought, Masked Diffusion Language Models (MDLMs) refine all sequence positions simultaneously, raising questions about how these models handle tasks requiring justified verdicts. In this work, we investigate the dynamics of MDLM reasoning on fact verification, examining whether justifications serve as genuine reasoning or post-hoc rationalization. We observe that MDLMs typically converge on a verdict early in the diffusion process, treating it as a global anchor that is resolved before the justification is complete. Crucially, enforcing a reasoning-first constraint via delayed verdict unmasking actively degrades performance, dropping accuracy from 86.2% to 71.9% as accumulating justification tokens introduce inconsistencies that override initially correct predictions. Interventional experiments reveal that the model rationalizes incorrect forced verdicts in 56% of cases, and that verdicts are strongly causally dependent on justification quality (57.3% accuracy with corrupted justifications vs. 97.1% with ground-truth). This causal dependence explains the degradation under forced deliberation: as the model generates noisy justification tokens, it conditions on them, gradually overriding its initially correct assessment. Our findings suggest that for fact verification with MDLMs, extended deliberation can be counterproductive, risking the dilution of accurate early predictions with noise introduced during justification generation.

AI.tldr: MDLMs在事实核查任务中会早期确定结论，将其作为全局锚点，然后生成解释。强制先推理后结论的策略会降低性能，因为解释中的噪声会覆盖最初正确的预测。
AI.motivation: 研究Masked Diffusion Language Models（MDLMs）在需要推理的任务（如事实核查）中的工作机制，特别是它们如何处理结论与解释的关系，以及解释是真正的推理还是事后合理化。
AI.method: 通过实验分析MDLMs在事实核查任务中的动态过程，包括：1）观察模型如何收敛于结论；2）强制实施推理优先约束（延迟结论揭示）；3）干预实验（强制错误结论观察模型如何合理化）；4）因果依赖分析（使用损坏解释测试结论准确性）。
AI.result: 1）MDLMs通常在扩散过程早期就确定结论，将其作为全局锚点；2）强制推理优先策略使准确率从86.2%降至71.9%；3）模型在56%的情况下会合理化错误的强制结论；4）结论对解释质量有强因果依赖（损坏解释时准确率57.3%，真实解释时97.1%）。
AI.conclusion: 对于MDLMs的事实核查任务，延长推理过程可能适得其反，因为解释生成过程中引入的噪声会稀释早期准确预测。这与自回归模型的Chain-of-Thought策略形成对比。

title: Heaviside Low-Rank Support Matrix Machine
summary: Support matrix machine (SMM) is an emerging classification framework that directly handles matrix-structured observations, thereby avoiding the spatial correlations destroyed by vectorization. However, most existing SMM variants rely on convex or nonconvex surrogate loss functions, which may lead to high sensitivity to noise. To address this issue, we propose a novel Heaviside low-rank SMM model called HL-SMM, which leverages the Heaviside loss instead of the common hinge or ramp losses for robustness. Moreover, the low-rank constraint is adopted to accurately characterize the inherent global structure. In theory, we analyze the Karush-Kuhn-Tucker (KKT) points and rigorously prove the sufficient and necessary conditions. In algorithms, we develop an effective proximal alternating minimization (PAM) scheme, where all subproblems have closed-form solutions. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets validate that the proposed HL-SMM achieves superior classification accuracy and robustness compared to state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于Heaviside损失的低秩支持矩阵机（HL-SMM），用于矩阵结构数据的鲁棒分类，通过Heaviside损失替代传统凸/非凸损失函数提高抗噪性，并采用低秩约束捕捉全局结构。
AI.motivation: 现有支持矩阵机（SMM）大多依赖凸或非凸代理损失函数，对噪声敏感。需要开发更鲁棒的SMM模型来处理矩阵结构数据分类问题。
AI.method: 提出HL-SMM模型：1）使用Heaviside损失替代传统铰链损失或斜坡损失以提高鲁棒性；2）采用低秩约束准确刻画数据固有全局结构；3）理论分析KKT点并证明充分必要条件；4）开发有效的近端交替最小化（PAM）算法，所有子问题都有闭式解。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上的广泛实验验证了HL-SMM相比现有最先进方法具有更优的分类准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: HL-SMM通过Heaviside损失和低秩约束的结合，为矩阵结构数据分类提供了更鲁棒和准确的解决方案。

title: A Unified Framework to Quantify Cultural Intelligence of AI
