summary: As generative AI technologies are increasingly being launched across the globe, assessing their competence to operate in different cultural contexts is exigently becoming a priority. While recent years have seen numerous and much-needed efforts on cultural benchmarking, these efforts have largely focused on specific aspects of culture and evaluation. While these efforts contribute to our understanding of cultural competence, a unified and systematic evaluation approach is needed for us as a field to comprehensively assess diverse cultural dimensions at scale. Drawing on measurement theory, we present a principled framework to aggregate multifaceted indicators of cultural capabilities into a unified assessment of cultural intelligence. We start by developing a working definition of culture that includes identifying core domains of culture. We then introduce a broad-purpose, systematic, and extensible framework for assessing cultural intelligence of AI systems. Drawing on theoretical framing from psychometric measurement validity theory, we decouple the background concept (i.e., cultural intelligence) from its operationalization via measurement. We conceptualize cultural intelligence as a suite of core capabilities spanning diverse domains, which we then operationalize through a set of indicators designed for reliable measurement. Finally, we identify the considerations, challenges, and research pathways to meaningfully measure these indicators, specifically focusing on data collection, probing strategies, and evaluation metrics.

AI.tldr: 提出一个基于测量理论的系统性框架，用于评估AI系统的文化智能，将多维文化能力指标聚合为统一评估
AI.motivation: 随着生成式AI在全球部署，评估其在不同文化背景下的能力变得日益重要。现有文化基准测试大多关注特定文化方面，缺乏统一系统的评估方法，需要全面评估多样文化维度的框架。
AI.method: 基于测量理论，提出原则性框架：1) 定义文化概念，识别核心文化领域；2) 引入系统化、可扩展的文化智能评估框架；3) 借鉴心理测量效度理论，将背景概念（文化智能）与测量操作化分离；4) 将文化智能概念化为跨领域的核心能力套件，通过可靠测量指标进行操作化；5) 识别数据收集、探测策略和评估指标等测量挑战和研究路径。
AI.result: 提出了一个系统性的文化智能评估框架，能够将多维文化能力指标聚合为统一评估，为全面评估AI系统在不同文化背景下的能力提供了理论基础和方法论。
AI.conclusion: 需要统一系统的文化智能评估框架来全面评估AI系统的文化能力，提出的基于测量理论的框架为实现这一目标提供了理论基础和操作化路径。

title: Ozone Cues Mitigate Reflected Downwelling Radiance in LWIR Absorption-Based Ranging
summary: Passive long-wave infrared (LWIR) absorption-based ranging relies on atmospheric absorption to estimate distances to objects from their emitted thermal radiation. First demonstrated decades ago for objects much hotter than the air and recently extended to scenes with low temperature variations, this ranging has depended on reflected radiance being negligible. Downwelling radiance is especially problematic, sometimes causing large inaccuracies. In two new ranging methods, we use characteristic features from ozone absorption to estimate the contribution of reflected downwelling radiance. The quadspectral method gives a simple closed-form range estimate from four narrowband measurements, two at a water vapor absorption line and two at an ozone absorption line. The hyperspectral method uses a broader spectral range to improve accuracy while also providing estimates of temperature, emissivity profiles, and contributions of downwelling from a collection of zenith angles. Experimental results demonstrate improved ranging accuracy, in one case reducing error from over 100 m when reflected light is not modeled to 6.8 m with the quadspectral method and 1.2 m with the hyperspectral method.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了两种新的被动长波红外测距方法，利用臭氧吸收特征来估计反射下行辐射的贡献，显著提高了测距精度。
AI.motivation: 传统被动长波红外吸收测距依赖于大气吸收来估计物体距离，但假设反射辐射可忽略。下行辐射（特别是来自天空的辐射）会导致较大误差，这是现有方法的主要限制。
AI.method: 提出了两种新方法：1) 四光谱法：使用四个窄带测量（两个在水蒸气吸收线，两个在臭氧吸收线），提供简单的闭式测距估计；2) 高光谱法：使用更宽的光谱范围，同时估计温度、发射率分布和来自不同天顶角的下行辐射贡献。
AI.result: 实验结果显示测距精度显著提高：在一个案例中，未建模反射光时误差超过100米，使用四光谱法降至6.8米，使用高光谱法进一步降至1.2米。
AI.conclusion: 通过利用臭氧吸收特征来建模反射下行辐射，这两种新方法显著提高了被动长波红外测距的精度，高光谱法还能提供额外的场景参数估计。

title: XAI-enhanced Comparative Opinion Mining via Aspect-based Scoring and Semantic Reasoning
summary: Comparative opinion mining involves comparing products from different reviews. However, transformer-based models designed for this task often lack transparency, which can adversely hinder the development of trust in users. In this paper, we propose XCom, an enhanced transformer-based model separated into two principal modules, i.e., (i) aspect-based rating prediction and (ii) semantic analysis for comparative opinion mining. XCom also incorporates a Shapley additive explanations module to provide interpretable insights into the model's deliberative decisions. Empirically, XCom achieves leading performances compared to other baselines, which demonstrates its effectiveness in providing meaningful explanations, making it a more reliable tool for comparative opinion mining. Source code is available at: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/XCom.

AI.tldr: XCom是一个用于比较性观点挖掘的增强型Transformer模型，包含基于方面的评分预测和语义分析两个主要模块，并整合了SHAP解释模块以提高模型透明度。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于Transformer的比较性观点挖掘模型缺乏透明度，这阻碍了用户对模型的信任建立。需要开发既能提供准确预测又能给出可解释性洞察的模型。
AI.method: XCom采用双模块架构：1) 基于方面的评分预测模块；2) 语义分析模块。同时整合了Shapley加性解释(SHAP)模块，为模型决策提供可解释的洞察。
AI.result: XCom在实验中取得了领先的性能表现，相比其他基线方法更有效，能够提供有意义的解释，成为更可靠的比较性观点挖掘工具。
AI.conclusion: XCom通过结合预测性能和可解释性，解决了比较性观点挖掘中模型透明度不足的问题，为构建可信的AI系统提供了有效方案。

title: A Polynomial-Time Axiomatic Alternative to SHAP for Feature Attribution
comment: 28 pages, 4 figures, 2 tables. Code will be released
summary:
In this paper, we provide a theoretically grounded and computationally efficient alternative to SHAP. To this end, we study feature attribution through the lens of cooperative game theory by formulating a class of XAI--TU games. Building on this formulation, we investigate equal-surplus-type and proportional-allocation-type attribution rules and propose a low-cost attribution rule, ESENSC_rev2, constructed by combining two polynomial-time closed-form rules while ensuring the null-player property in the XAI--TU domain.
  Extensive experiments on tabular prediction tasks demonstrate that ESENSC_rev2 closely approximates exact SHAP while substantially improving scalability as the number of features increases. These empirical results indicate that equal-surplus-type attribution rules can achieve favorable trade-offs between computational cost and approximation accuracy in high-dimensional explainability settings.
  To provide theoretical foundations for these findings, we establish an axiomatic characterization showing that ESENSC_rev2 is uniquely determined by efficiency, the null-player axiom, a restricted differential marginality principle, an intermediate inessential-game property, and axioms that reduce computational requirements. Our results suggest that axiomatically justified and computationally efficient attribution rules can serve as practical and theoretically principled substitutes for SHAP-based approximations in modern explainability pipelines.

AI.tldr: 提出ESENSC_rev2作为SHAP的理论基础替代方案，通过合作博弈论框架实现多项式时间计算，在保持可解释性公理的同时显著提升高维特征下的可扩展性。
AI.motivation: SHAP计算复杂度高，难以扩展到高维特征场景。需要寻找理论基础扎实且计算高效的替代方案，以支持现代可解释性AI流水线。
AI.method: 基于合作博弈论框架，将特征归因问题建模为XAI-TU博弈。研究等盈余型和比例分配型归因规则，提出ESENSC_rev2规则，结合两个多项式时间闭式解，确保XAI-TU域中的零玩家性质。
AI.result: 在表格预测任务上的实验表明，ESENSC_rev2能紧密逼近精确SHAP，同时随着特征数量增加显著提升可扩展性。等盈余型归因规则能在计算成本和近似精度间取得良好平衡。
AI.conclusion: ESENSC_rev2是SHAP的实用且理论上有原则的替代方案，通过公理化特征证明了其唯一性，为高维可解释性设置提供了计算高效且理论基础的归因方法。

title: The Lattice Representation Hypothesis of Large Language Models
summary: We propose the Lattice Representation Hypothesis of large language models: a symbolic backbone that grounds conceptual hierarchies and logical operations in embedding geometry. Our framework unifies the Linear Representation Hypothesis with Formal Concept Analysis (FCA), showing that linear attribute directions with separating thresholds induce a concept lattice via half-space intersections. This geometry enables symbolic reasoning through geometric meet (intersection) and join (union) operations, and admits a canonical form when attribute directions are linearly independent. Experiments on WordNet sub-hierarchies provide empirical evidence that LLM embeddings encode concept lattices and their logical structure, revealing a principled bridge between continuous geometry and symbolic abstraction.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出"格表示假说"，认为大语言模型嵌入中存在符号骨架，通过几何结构编码概念层次和逻辑操作，统一了线性表示假说与形式概念分析。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是理解大语言模型如何将连续几何表示与符号抽象连接起来。当前线性表示假说解释了概念属性在嵌入空间中的线性方向性，但缺乏对概念层次结构和逻辑操作的系统解释。需要建立几何表示与符号推理之间的原则性桥梁。
AI.method: 方法是将线性表示假说与形式概念分析（FCA）统一起来。通过带有分离阈值的线性属性方向，利用半空间交集诱导概念格。在几何上实现符号推理，包括几何交（交集）和并（并集）操作。当属性方向线性独立时，可以获得规范形式。在WordNet子层次结构上进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，LLM嵌入确实编码了概念格及其逻辑结构。提供了经验证据支持格表示假说，展示了连续几何与符号抽象之间的原则性连接。揭示了嵌入几何中的符号骨架能够支撑概念层次和逻辑操作。
AI.conclusion: 结论是大语言模型嵌入中存在符号骨架，通过几何结构编码概念层次和逻辑操作。提出的格表示假说为理解LLM如何将连续表示与符号推理连接提供了理论框架，对模型可解释性和分析具有重要意义。

title: Seeking Necessary and Sufficient Information from Multimodal Medical Data
summary: Learning multimodal representations from medical images and other data sources can provide richer information for decision-making. While various multimodal models have been developed for this, they overlook learning features that are both necessary (must be present for the outcome to occur) and sufficient (enough to determine the outcome). We argue learning such features is crucial as they can improve model performance by capturing essential predictive information, and enhance model robustness to missing modalities as each modality can provide adequate predictive signals. Such features can be learned by leveraging the Probability of Necessity and Sufficiency (PNS) as a learning objective, an approach that has proven effective in unimodal settings. However, extending PNS to multimodal scenarios remains underexplored and is non-trivial as key conditions of PNS estimation are violated. We address this by decomposing multimodal representations into modality-invariant and modality-specific components, then deriving tractable PNS objectives for each. Experiments on synthetic and real-world medical datasets demonstrate our method's effectiveness. Code will be available on GitHub.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种多模态医学AI方法，通过学习必要且充分的特征来提升模型性能和鲁棒性，解决了现有方法忽视特征必要性和充分性的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有医学多模态模型忽视了学习既必要（结果发生必须存在）又充分（足以确定结果）的特征。学习这类特征可以提升模型性能（捕获关键预测信息）和增强对缺失模态的鲁棒性（每个模态都能提供足够的预测信号）。
AI.method: 将多模态表示分解为模态不变和模态特定组件，然后为每个组件推导可处理的概率必要性和充分性（PNS）目标，扩展了原本在单模态中有效的PNS方法到多模态场景。
AI.result: 在合成和真实世界医学数据集上的实验证明了该方法的有效性，能够学习到必要且充分的特征，提升模型性能和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过分解多模态表示并推导PNS目标，可以有效地学习必要且充分的特征，为多模态医学AI提供了新的方法框架。

title: Reasoning Boosts Opinion Alignment in LLMs
summary: Opinion modeling aims to capture individual or group political preferences, enabling applications such as digital democracies, where models could help shape fairer and more popular policies. Given their versatility, strong generalization capabilities, and demonstrated success across diverse text-to-text applications, large language models (LLMs) are natural candidates for this task. However, due to their statistical nature and limited causal understanding, they tend to produce biased opinions when prompted naively. In this work, we study whether reasoning can improve opinion alignment. Motivated by the recent advancement in mathematical reasoning enabled by reinforcement learning (RL), we train models to produce profile-consistent answers through structured reasoning. We evaluate our approach on three datasets covering U.S., European, and Swiss politics. Results indicate that reasoning enhances opinion modeling and is competitive with strong baselines, but does not fully remove bias, highlighting the need for additional mechanisms to build faithful political digital twins using LLMs. By releasing both our method and datasets, we establish a solid baseline to support future research on LLM opinion alignment.

AI.tldr: 该研究探索使用推理能力改进LLM的政治观点建模，通过强化学习训练模型进行结构化推理，在美欧瑞政治数据集上评估，发现推理能提升观点对齐但无法完全消除偏见。
AI.motivation: 观点建模旨在捕捉个体或群体的政治偏好，应用于数字民主等场景。虽然LLM在文本任务上表现出色，但由于统计性质和有限因果理解，直接提示会产生偏见观点。研究探索推理是否能改善观点对齐。
AI.method: 受数学推理中强化学习成功的启发，训练模型通过结构化推理产生与个人资料一致的回答。在三个政治数据集（美国、欧洲、瑞士）上评估方法。
AI.result: 推理确实能提升观点建模效果，与强基线方法竞争性相当，但无法完全消除偏见。这表明需要额外机制来构建忠实的政治数字孪生。
AI.conclusion: 推理能改进LLM观点对齐，但偏见问题依然存在。研究发布方法和数据集，为未来LLM观点对齐研究建立基线。

title: Antibody: Strengthening Defense Against Harmful Fine-Tuning for Large Language Models via Attenuating Harmful Gradient Influence
summary: Fine-tuning-as-a-service introduces a threat to Large Language Models' safety when service providers fine-tune their models on poisoned user-submitted datasets, a process known as harmful fine-tuning attacks. In this work, we show that by regularizing the gradient contribution of harmful samples encountered during fine-tuning, we can effectively mitigate the impact of harmful fine-tuning attacks. To this end, we introduce Antibody, a defense strategy that first ensures robust safety alignment for the model before fine-tuning, and then applies a safety-preservation learning algorithm during fine-tuning. Specifically, in the alignment stage before fine-tuning, we propose optimizing the model to be in a flat loss region with respect to harmful samples, which makes the safety alignment more resilient to subsequent harmful fine-tuning. Then, in the fine-tuning stage, we design a fine-tuning algorithm that applies a weighting scheme to all samples in each training batch to inhibit the model from learning from harmful samples while encouraging learning from benign samples. Experimental results demonstrate that Antibody successfully mitigates harmful fine-tuning attacks while boosting fine-tuning performance on the user-submitted dataset.

AI.tldr: 提出Antibody防御策略，通过梯度正则化有害样本，在微调前进行安全对齐优化，并在微调过程中应用安全保护学习算法，有效缓解有害微调攻击。
AI.motivation: 针对微调即服务场景中，服务提供商在用户提交的带毒数据集上进行微调所引发的有害微调攻击威胁，需要保护大语言模型的安全性。
AI.method: Antibody防御策略包含两个阶段：1) 微调前对齐阶段：优化模型使其处于关于有害样本的平坦损失区域，增强安全对齐的鲁棒性；2) 微调阶段：设计加权方案，抑制模型从有害样本学习，同时鼓励从良性样本学习。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，Antibody成功缓解了有害微调攻击，同时提升了在用户提交数据集上的微调性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过梯度正则化有害样本的贡献，可以有效防御有害微调攻击，保护大语言模型的安全性。

title: Extended Empirical Validation of the Explainability Solution Space
summary: This technical report provides an extended validation of the Explainability Solution Space (ESS) through cross-domain evaluation. While initial validation focused on employee attrition prediction, this study introduces a heterogeneous intelligent urban resource allocation system to demonstrate the generality and domain-independence of the ESS framework. The second case study integrates tabular, temporal, and geospatial data under multi-stakeholder governance conditions. Explicit quantitative positioning of representative XAI families is provided for both contexts. Results confirm that ESS rankings are not domain-specific but adapt systematically to governance roles, risk profiles, and stakeholder configurations. The findings reinforce ESS as a generalizable operational decision-support instrument for explainable AI strategy design across socio-technical systems.

AI.tldr: 论文通过跨领域评估扩展验证了可解释性解决方案空间（ESS）框架，在智能城市资源分配系统中测试其通用性，证明ESS排名不受领域限制，而是系统性地适应治理角色、风险配置和利益相关者结构。
AI.motivation: 先前对ESS的验证主要集中在员工流失预测领域，需要证明该框架的领域无关性和通用性。研究旨在展示ESS如何在不同领域（特别是复杂的社会技术系统）中作为可解释AI策略设计的决策支持工具。
AI.method: 引入异构智能城市资源分配系统作为第二个案例研究，整合表格、时序和地理空间数据，并在多利益相关者治理条件下进行评估。为两种情境提供代表性XAI家族的明确量化定位。
AI.result: 结果证实ESS排名不是领域特定的，而是系统性地适应治理角色、风险配置和利益相关者结构。ESS框架在不同领域表现出一致的适应性。
AI.conclusion: ESS被强化为可推广的操作性决策支持工具，适用于跨社会技术系统的可解释AI策略设计，具有领域独立性和通用性。

title: Proof-of-Perception: Certified Tool-Using Multimodal Reasoning with Compositional Conformal Guarantees
summary: We present Proof-of-Perception (PoP), a tool-using framework that casts multimodal reasoning as an executable graph with explicit reliability guarantees. Each perception or logic node outputs a conformal set, yielding calibrated, stepwise uncertainty; a lightweight controller uses these certificates to allocate compute under a budget, expanding with extra tool calls only when needed and stopping early otherwise. This grounds answers in verifiable evidence, reduces error compounding and hallucinations, and enables principled accuracy-compute trade-offs. Across document, chart, and multi-image QA benchmarks, PoP improves performance and reliability over strong chain-of-thought, ReAct-style, and program-of-thought baselines while using computation more efficiently.

AI.tldr: PoP是一个工具使用框架，将多模态推理建模为可执行图，提供显式的可靠性保证。通过共形集合输出校准的逐步不确定性，在预算下智能分配计算资源，仅在需要时扩展工具调用，否则提前停止。
AI.motivation: 解决多模态推理中的可靠性问题，减少错误累积和幻觉，提供可验证的证据基础，实现原则性的准确性与计算权衡。
AI.method: 将多模态推理构建为可执行图，每个感知或逻辑节点输出共形集合以提供校准的逐步不确定性。轻量级控制器使用这些证书在预算下分配计算资源，仅在需要时扩展工具调用，否则提前停止。
AI.result: 在文档、图表和多图像QA基准测试中，PoP在性能和可靠性方面优于强大的思维链、ReAct风格和程序思维基线，同时更高效地使用计算资源。
AI.conclusion: PoP通过将多模态推理形式化为具有可靠性保证的可执行图，提供了可验证的证据基础，减少了错误累积和幻觉，实现了原则性的准确性与计算权衡。

title: Generative AI & Fictionality: How Novels Power Large Language Models
summary: Generative models, like the one in ChatGPT, are powered by their training data. The models are simply next-word predictors, based on patterns learned from vast amounts of pre-existing text. Since the first generation of GPT, it is striking that the most popular datasets have included substantial collections of novels. For the engineers and research scientists who build these models, there is a common belief that the language in fiction is rich enough to cover all manner of social and communicative phenomena, yet the belief has gone mostly unexamined. How does fiction shape the outputs of generative AI? Specifically, what are novels' effects relative to other forms of text, such as newspapers, Reddit, and Wikipedia? Since the 1970s, literature scholars such as Catherine Gallagher and James Phelan have developed robust and insightful accounts of how fiction operates as a form of discourse and language. Through our study of an influential open-source model (BERT), we find that LLMs leverage familiar attributes and affordances of fiction, while also fomenting new qualities and forms of social response. We argue that if contemporary culture is increasingly shaped by generative AI and machine learning, any analysis of today's various modes of cultural production must account for a relatively novel dimension: computational training data.

AI.tldr: 该论文探讨了小说文本如何影响生成式AI的输出，通过分析BERT模型发现小说为LLMs提供了独特的语言模式和社会现象覆盖，但这一影响尚未得到充分研究。
AI.motivation: 研究动机源于观察到GPT等生成模型训练数据中大量包含小说文本，工程师和研究人员普遍认为小说语言足够丰富以覆盖各种社会交流现象，但这种假设缺乏实证检验。论文旨在探究小说相对于新闻、Reddit、维基百科等其他文本形式如何塑造生成式AI的输出。
AI.method: 研究方法包括：1) 借鉴文学学者（如Catherine Gallagher和James Phelan）自1970年代以来发展的关于小说作为话语和语言形式的理论框架；2) 通过对有影响力的开源模型BERT进行实证研究，分析小说文本在训练数据中的作用机制。
AI.result: 研究发现LLMs利用了小说熟悉的特点和表达能力，同时也催生了新的品质和社会反应形式。小说文本为模型提供了独特的语言模式和社会现象覆盖，但同时也引入了特定的偏见和局限性。
AI.conclusion: 结论指出，如果当代文化日益受到生成式AI和机器学习的影响，那么对今天各种文化生产模式的分析必须考虑一个相对新颖的维度：计算训练数据。特别是小说文本在塑造AI输出和文化理解方面发挥着独特而重要的作用。

title: Trinity: A Scenario-Aware Recommendation Framework for Large-Scale Cold-Start Users
summary: Early-stage users in a new scenario intensify cold-start challenges, yet prior works often address only parts of the problem through model architecture. Launching a new user experience to replace an established product involves sparse behavioral signals, low-engagement cohorts, and unstable model performance. We argue that effective recommendations require the synergistic integration of feature engineering, model architecture, and stable model updating. We propose Trinity, a framework embodying this principle. Trinity extracts valuable information from existing scenarios while ensuring predictive effectiveness and accuracy in the new scenario. In this paper, we showcase Trinity applied to a billion-user Microsoft product transition. Both offline and online experiments demonstrate that our framework achieves substantial improvements in addressing the combined challenge of new users in new scenarios.

AI.tldr: Trinity框架通过特征工程、模型架构和稳定模型更新的协同整合，解决新场景中早期用户的冷启动问题，在微软产品过渡中验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 新场景中的早期用户加剧了冷启动挑战，现有工作通常只通过模型架构解决部分问题。新产品替代现有产品时面临行为信号稀疏、低参与度群体和模型性能不稳定等问题。
AI.method: 提出Trinity框架，整合特征工程、模型架构和稳定模型更新三个关键组件。从现有场景提取有价值信息，同时确保新场景中的预测效果和准确性。
AI.result: 在微软亿级用户产品过渡的离线实验和在线实验中，Trinity框架在处理新用户在新场景的复合挑战方面取得了显著改进。
AI.conclusion: 有效的推荐系统需要特征工程、模型架构和稳定模型更新的协同整合，Trinity框架为此提供了系统化解决方案，并在实际产品过渡中验证了其有效性。

title: Beyond Reward: A Bounded Measure of Agent Environment Coupling
summary: Real-world reinforcement learning (RL) agents operate in closed-loop systems where actions shape future observations, making reliable deployment under distribution shifts a persistent challenge. Existing monitoring relies on reward or task metrics, capturing outcomes but missing early coupling failures. We introduce bipredictability (P) as the ratio of shared information in the observation, action, outcome loop to the total available information, a principled, real time measure of interaction effectiveness with provable bounds, comparable across tasks. An auxiliary monitor, the Information Digital Twin (IDT), computes P and its diagnostic components from the interaction stream. We evaluate SAC and PPO agents on MuJoCo HalfCheetah under eight agent, and environment-side perturbations across 168 trials. Under nominal operation, agents exhibit P = 0.33 plus minus 0.02, below the classical bound of 0.5, revealing an informational cost of action selection. The IDT detects 89.3% of perturbations versus 44.0% for reward based monitoring, with 4.4x lower median latency. Bipredictability enables early detection of interaction degradation before performance drops and provides a prerequisite signal for closed loop self regulation in deployed RL systems.

AI.tldr: 论文提出bipredictability(P)作为强化学习系统中交互有效性的实时度量指标，以及辅助监控器IDT，能够比传统奖励监控更早检测分布偏移，在实验中检测率提升至89.3%，延迟降低4.4倍。
AI.motivation: 现实世界RL系统在闭环中运行，动作会影响未来观测，使得分布偏移下的可靠部署成为持续挑战。现有监控依赖奖励或任务指标，只能捕捉结果但会错过早期的耦合故障。
AI.method: 引入bipredictability(P)作为观测、动作、结果循环中共享信息与总可用信息的比率，这是一个有理论保证、可跨任务比较的交互有效性度量。开发辅助监控器IDT从交互流中计算P及其诊断组件。
AI.result: 在MuJoCo HalfCheetah上的168次实验中，正常操作时P=0.33±0.02，低于经典边界0.5，揭示了动作选择的信息成本。IDT检测到89.3%的扰动，而基于奖励的监控仅44.0%，且中位延迟降低4.4倍。
AI.conclusion: Bipredictability能够在性能下降前早期检测交互退化，为部署RL系统中的闭环自我调节提供了先决信号，解决了传统监控方法的局限性。

title: Diffusion-Based Low-Light Image Enhancement with Color and Luminance Priors
summary: Low-light images often suffer from low contrast, noise, and color distortion, degrading visual quality and impairing downstream vision tasks. We propose a novel conditional diffusion framework for low-light image enhancement that incorporates a Structured Control Embedding Module (SCEM). SCEM decomposes a low-light image into four informative components including illumination, illumination-invariant features, shadow priors, and color-invariant cues. These components serve as control signals that condition a U-Net-based diffusion model trained with a simplified noise-prediction loss. Thus, the proposed SCEM equipped Diffusion method enforces structured enhancement guided by physical priors. In experiments, our model is trained only on the LOLv1 dataset and evaluated without fine-tuning on LOLv2-real, LSRW, DICM, MEF, and LIME. The method achieves state-of-the-art performance in quantitative and perceptual metrics, demonstrating strong generalization across benchmarks. https://casted.github.io/scem/.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于低光照图像增强的条件扩散框架，通过结构化控制嵌入模块(SCEM)分解图像为四个信息组件，作为控制信号指导U-Net扩散模型，在多个基准测试中达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 低光照图像通常存在低对比度、噪声和颜色失真等问题，这会降低视觉质量并影响下游视觉任务。现有方法在泛化能力和结构化控制方面存在不足，需要一种能够利用物理先验进行结构化增强的方法。
AI.method: 提出条件扩散框架，包含结构化控制嵌入模块(SCEM)，将低光照图像分解为四个组件：光照、光照不变特征、阴影先验和颜色不变线索。这些组件作为控制信号，指导基于U-Net的扩散模型，使用简化的噪声预测损失进行训练。
AI.result: 仅在LOLv1数据集上训练，在LOLv2-real、LSRW、DICM、MEF、LIME等基准测试上无需微调即达到最先进的定量和感知指标性能，展示了强大的跨基准泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 提出的SCEM增强扩散方法通过物理先验强制执行结构化增强，在低光照图像增强任务中表现出优异的性能和泛化能力。

title: Can Thinking Models Think to Detect Hateful Memes?
summary: Hateful memes often require compositional multimodal reasoning: the image and text may appear benign in isolation, yet their interaction conveys harmful intent. Although thinking-based multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have recently advanced vision-language understanding, their capabilities remain underexplored for hateful meme analysis. We propose a reinforcement learning based post-training framework that improves reasoning in thinking-based MLLMs through task-specific rewards and a novel Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) objective. Specifically, we (i) conduct a systematic empirical study of off-the-shelf MLLMs for hateful meme understanding, (ii) extend an existing hateful meme dataset by generating weakly or pseudo-supervised chain-of-thought rationales via distillation, and (iii) introduce a GRPO-based objective that jointly optimizes meme classification and explanation quality to encourage fine-grained, step-by-step reasoning. Experiments on the Hateful Memes benchmark show that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance, improving accuracy and F1 by approximately 1 percent and explanation quality by approximately 3 percent. We will publicly release our code, dataset extensions, and evaluation resources to support reproducibility.

AI.tldr: 提出基于强化学习的后训练框架，通过任务特定奖励和新型GRPO目标改进思考型多模态大语言模型在仇恨表情包分析中的推理能力，在Hateful Memes基准上实现SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 仇恨表情包通常需要组合式多模态推理：图像和文本单独看可能无害，但它们的交互传达了有害意图。尽管思考型多模态大语言模型在视觉语言理解方面取得了进展，但在仇恨表情包分析方面的能力仍未充分探索。
AI.method: 1) 对现成MLLMs进行系统性实证研究；2) 通过蒸馏生成弱监督或伪监督的思维链原理，扩展现有仇恨表情包数据集；3) 引入基于GRPO的目标，联合优化表情包分类和解释质量，鼓励细粒度、逐步推理。
AI.result: 在Hateful Memes基准上实现最先进性能，准确率和F1分数提高约1%，解释质量提高约3%。
AI.conclusion: 提出的强化学习后训练框架有效提升了思考型MLLMs在仇恨表情包分析中的推理能力，通过GRPO目标实现了分类性能和解释质量的联合优化。

title: FastBUS: A Fast Bayesian Framework for Unified Weakly-Supervised Learning
summary: Machine Learning often involves various imprecise labels, leading to diverse weakly supervised settings. While recent methods aim for universal handling, they usually suffer from complex manual pre-work, ignore the relationships between associated labels, or are unable to batch process due to computational design flaws, resulting in long running times. To address these limitations, we propose a novel general framework that efficiently infers latent true label distributions across various weak supervisions. Our key idea is to express the label brute-force search process as a probabilistic transition of label variables, compressing diverse weakly supervised DFS tree structures into a shared Bayesian network. From this, we derived a latent probability calculation algorithm based on generalized belief propagation and proposed two joint acceleration strategies: 1) introducing a low-rank assumption to approximate the transition matrix, reducing time complexity; 2) designing an end-to-end state evolution module to learn batch-scale transition matrices, facilitating multi-category batch processing. In addition, the equivalence of our method with the EM algorithm in most scenarios is further demonstrated. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves SOTA results under most weakly supervised settings, and achieves up to hundreds of times faster acceleration in running time compared to other general methods.

AI.tldr: 提出一个通用的弱监督学习框架，通过将标签搜索过程建模为概率转移，压缩DFS树结构为贝叶斯网络，实现高效的真实标签分布推断，在多种弱监督设置下达到SOTA性能并显著加速。
AI.motivation: 机器学习中常存在各种不精确标签（弱监督），现有通用方法通常需要复杂的人工预处理、忽略关联标签间关系，或由于计算设计缺陷无法批量处理导致运行时间长。需要解决这些限制。
AI.method: 将标签暴力搜索过程表达为标签变量的概率转移，将多样弱监督DFS树结构压缩为共享贝叶斯网络。基于广义信念传播推导潜在概率计算算法，提出两种联合加速策略：1）引入低秩假设近似转移矩阵降低时间复杂度；2）设计端到端状态演化模块学习批量尺度转移矩阵，支持多类别批量处理。
AI.result: 在大多数弱监督设置下达到SOTA结果，相比其他通用方法在运行时间上实现高达数百倍的加速。
AI.conclusion: 提出的通用框架能高效推断潜在真实标签分布，解决了现有方法的局限性，并在大多数弱监督场景下与EM算法等价。

title: Information-Theoretic Framework for Self-Adapting Model Predictive Controllers
summary: Model Predictive Control (MPC) is a vital technique for autonomous systems, like Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs), enabling optimized motion planning. However, traditional MPC struggles to adapt to real-time changes such as dynamic obstacles and shifting system dynamics, lacking inherent mechanisms for self-monitoring and adaptive optimization. Here, we introduce Entanglement Learning (EL), an information-theoretic framework that enhances MPC adaptability through an Information Digital Twin (IDT). The IDT monitors and quantifies, in bits, the information flow between MPC inputs, control actions, and UAV behavior. By introducing new information-theoretic metrics we call entanglement metrics, it tracks variations in these dependencies. These metrics measure the mutual information between the optimizer's input, its control actions, and the resulting UAV dynamics, enabling a deeper understanding of their interrelationships. This allows the IDT to detect performance deviations and generate real-time adaptive signals to recalibrate MPC parameters, preserving stability. Unlike traditional MPC, which relies on error-based feedback, this dual-feedback approach leverages information flow for proactive adaptation to evolving conditions. Scalable and leveraging existing infrastructure, this framework improves MPC reliability and robustness across diverse scenarios, extending beyond UAV control to any MPC implementation requiring adaptive performance.

AI.tldr: 提出Entanglement Learning框架，通过信息数字孪生和信息论度量增强MPC的自适应能力，实现实时参数调整以应对动态环境变化
AI.motivation: 传统MPC在应对动态障碍物和系统参数变化时缺乏自适应机制，无法实时监测和优化性能，需要更智能的适应框架
AI.method: 引入Entanglement Learning框架和信息数字孪生，使用信息论度量（纠缠度量）量化MPC输入、控制动作和无人机行为之间的信息流，实时检测性能偏差并生成自适应信号调整MPC参数
AI.result: 该框架提高了MPC的可靠性和鲁棒性，能够主动适应动态变化，保持系统稳定性，且具有可扩展性，可应用于各种MPC实现
AI.conclusion: 信息论框架为MPC提供了新的自适应机制，超越了传统的基于误差的反馈控制，为自主系统的实时优化提供了新思路

title: Percept-Aware Surgical Planning for Visual Cortical Prostheses with Vascular Avoidance
summary: Cortical visual prostheses aim to restore sight by electrically stimulating neurons in early visual cortex (V1). With the emergence of high-density and flexible neural interfaces, electrode placement within three-dimensional cortex has become a critical surgical planning problem. Existing strategies emphasize visual field coverage and anatomical heuristics but do not directly optimize predicted perceptual outcomes under safety constraints. We present a percept-aware framework for surgical planning of cortical visual prostheses that formulates electrode placement as a constrained optimization problem in anatomical space. Electrode coordinates are treated as learnable parameters and optimized end-to-end using a differentiable forward model of prosthetic vision. The objective minimizes task-level perceptual error while incorporating vascular avoidance and gray matter feasibility constraints. Evaluated on simulated reading and natural image tasks using realistic folded cortical geometry (FreeSurfer fsaverage), percept-aware optimization consistently improves reconstruction fidelity relative to coverage-based placement strategies. Importantly, vascular safety constraints eliminate margin violations while preserving perceptual performance. The framework further enables co-optimization of multi-electrode thread configurations under fixed insertion budgets. These results demonstrate how differentiable percept models can inform anatomically grounded, safety-aware computer-assisted planning for cortical neural interfaces and provide a foundation for optimizing next-generation visual prostheses.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于皮质视觉假体手术规划的感知感知框架，通过可微分前向模型将电极放置优化为约束优化问题，在解剖空间中最小化任务级感知误差，同时考虑血管避让和灰质可行性约束。
AI.motivation: 随着高密度柔性神经接口的出现，三维皮质内的电极放置成为关键的手术规划问题。现有策略强调视野覆盖和解剖启发式方法，但未在安全约束下直接优化预测的感知结果。
AI.method: 将电极坐标视为可学习参数，使用可微分的假体视觉前向模型进行端到端优化。目标是最小化任务级感知误差，同时纳入血管避让和灰质可行性约束。在模拟的阅读和自然图像任务上使用真实的折叠皮质几何进行评估。
AI.result: 感知感知优化相对于基于覆盖的放置策略持续改善重建保真度。血管安全约束消除了边缘违规同时保持了感知性能。该框架进一步支持在固定插入预算下共同优化多电极线配置。
AI.conclusion: 可微分感知模型可以为皮质神经接口提供解剖基础、安全感知的计算机辅助规划，并为优化下一代视觉假体奠定基础。

title: Self-Anchoring Calibration Drift in Large Language Models: How Multi-Turn Conversations Reshape Model Confidence
summary: We introduce Self-Anchoring Calibration Drift (SACD), a hypothesized tendency for large language models (LLMs) to show systematic changes in expressed confidence when building iteratively on their own prior outputs across multi-turn conversations. We report an empirical study comparing three frontier models -- Claude Sonnet 4.6, Gemini 3.1 Pro, and GPT-5.2 -- across 150 questions spanning factual, technical, and open-ended domains, using three conditions: single-turn baseline (A), multi-turn self-anchoring (B), and independent repetition control (C). Results reveal a complex, model-heterogeneous pattern that partially diverges from pre-registered hypotheses. Claude Sonnet 4.6 exhibited significant decreasing confidence under self-anchoring (mean CDS = -0.032, t(14) = -2.43, p = .029, d = -0.627), while also showing significant calibration error drift (F(4,56) = 22.77, p < .001, eta^2 = .791). GPT-5.2 showed the opposite pattern in open-ended domains (mean CDS = +0.026) with significant ECE escalation by Turn 5. Gemini 3.1 Pro showed no significant CDS (t(14) = 0.38, p = .710), but its Condition C data reveals a striking ECE pattern: without self-anchoring, Gemini's calibration error drops from .327 to near zero across repetitions, whereas self-anchoring holds ECE flat at approximately .333 -- indicating that SACD can manifest as suppression of natural calibration improvement rather than ac

AI.tldr: 论文提出"自我锚定校准漂移"(SACD)概念，研究LLM在多轮对话中基于自身先前输出迭代构建时，表达置信度的系统性变化。通过对Claude Sonnet 4.6、Gemini 3.1 Pro和GPT-5.2三个前沿模型的实证研究，发现模型在自我锚定条件下呈现异质性校准漂移模式。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是探索LLM在多轮对话中是否存在系统性的置信度校准变化。当LLM基于自身先前输出进行迭代构建时，可能会产生"自我锚定"效应，导致置信度表达出现系统性漂移，这关系到LLM的可信度和可靠性评估。
AI.method: 采用实证研究方法，比较三个前沿模型(Claude Sonnet 4.6、Gemini 3.1 Pro、GPT-5.2)在150个问题上的表现，涵盖事实性、技术性和开放性领域。设置三个实验条件：单轮基线(A)、多轮自我锚定(B)、独立重复控制(C)，分析置信度漂移分数(CDS)和预期校准误差(ECE)的变化。
AI.result: 结果显示模型异质性模式：Claude Sonnet 4.6在自我锚定条件下置信度显著下降，校准误差漂移显著；GPT-5.2在开放性领域呈现相反模式，置信度上升且ECE在第5轮显著增加；Gemini 3.1 Pro无显著CDS，但其独立重复控制数据显示ECE从0.327降至接近零，而自我锚定条件下ECE保持在约0.333，表明SACD可能抑制自然校准改进。
AI.conclusion: LLM在多轮对话中存在自我锚定校准漂移现象，但具体模式因模型而异。SACD不仅表现为置信度漂移，还可能抑制模型在重复交互中的自然校准改进能力。这对LLM的可信度评估和实际应用具有重要意义。

title: Phys-Diff: A Physics-Inspired Latent Diffusion Model for Tropical Cyclone Forecasting
comment: 5 pages, 4 figures. Accepted to IEEE ICASSP 2026
summary: Tropical cyclone (TC) forecasting is critical for disaster warning and emergency response. Deep learning methods address computational challenges but often neglect physical relationships between TC attributes, resulting in predictions lacking physical consistency. To address this, we propose Phys-Diff, a physics-inspired latent diffusion model that disentangles latent features into task-specific components (trajectory, pressure, wind speed) and employs cross-task attention to introduce prior physics-inspired inductive biases, thereby embedding physically consistent dependencies among TC attributes. Phys-Diff integrates multimodal data including historical cyclone attributes, ERA5 reanalysis data, and FengWu forecast fields via a Transformer encoder-decoder architecture, further enhancing forecasting performance. Experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on global and regional datasets.

AI.tldr: Phys-Diff：基于物理启发的潜在扩散模型，用于热带气旋预测，通过解耦任务特定特征和跨任务注意力实现物理一致性
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在热带气旋预测中常忽略物理属性间的关系，导致预测缺乏物理一致性，需要引入物理先验知识来提升预测的物理合理性
AI.method: 提出Phys-Diff物理启发潜在扩散模型：1）将潜在特征解耦为轨迹、气压、风速等任务特定组件；2）使用跨任务注意力引入物理启发归纳偏置；3）集成多模态数据（历史气旋属性、ERA5再分析数据、FengWu预报场）；4）采用Transformer编码器-解码器架构
AI.result: 在全局和区域数据集上实现了最先进的预测性能，证明了物理一致性建模的有效性
AI.conclusion: Phys-Diff通过引入物理启发归纳偏置和跨任务依赖建模，显著提升了热带气旋预测的物理一致性和准确性

title: Opponent State Inference Under Partial Observability: An HMM-POMDP Framework for 2026 Formula 1 Energy Strategy
comment: 17 pages. Pre-registered theoretical framework; empirical calibration on 2026 race telemetry begins Australian Grand Prix, 8 March 2026. Paper 1 of 3. ResearchGate preprint: DOI 10.13140/RG.2.2.16034.08644
summary: The 2026 Formula 1 technical regulations introduce a fundamental change to energy strategy: under a 50/50 internal combustion engine / battery power split with unlimited regeneration and a driver-controlled Override Mode (abbreviated MOM throughout), the optimal energy deployment policy depends not only on a driver's own state but on the hidden state of rival cars. This creates a Partially Observable Stochastic Game that cannot be solved by single-agent optimisation methods. We present a tractable two-layer inference and decision framework. The first layer is a 30-state Hidden Markov Model (HMM) that infers a probability distribution over each rival's ERS charge level, Override Mode status, and tyre degradation state from five publicly observable telemetry signals. The second layer is a Deep Q-Network (DQN) policy that takes the HMM belief state as input and selects between energy deployment strategies. We formally characterise the counter-harvest trap -- a deceptive strategy in which a car deliberately suppresses observable deployment signals to induce a rival into a failed attack -- and show that detecting it requires belief-state inference rather than reactive threshold rules. On synthetic races generated from the model's own assumptions, the HMM achieves 92.3% ERS inference accuracy (random baseline: 33.3%) and detects counter-harvest trap conditions with 95.7% recall. Pre-registration -- empirical validation begins Australian Grand Prix, 8 March 2026.

AI.tldr: 论文提出一个双层推理决策框架，用于解决F1 2026新规下的部分可观测随机博弈问题，通过HMM推断对手隐藏状态，再用DQN制定能量部署策略。
AI.motivation: 2026年F1技术规则引入50/50内燃机/电池功率分配、无限再生和驾驶员控制Override Mode，使得最优能量部署策略不仅取决于自身状态，还依赖于对手的隐藏状态，形成了一个部分可观测随机博弈问题，无法用单智能体优化方法解决。
AI.method: 提出双层推理决策框架：第一层是30状态隐马尔可夫模型(HMM)，从5个公开可观测遥测信号推断每个对手的ERS充电水平、Override Mode状态和轮胎退化状态的概率分布；第二层是深度Q网络(DQN)策略，以HMM信念状态为输入，选择能量部署策略。
AI.result: 在模型自身假设生成的合成比赛中，HMM达到92.3%的ERS推断准确率（随机基线：33.3%），并以95.7%的召回率检测到counter-harvest陷阱条件。实证验证将于2026年3月8日澳大利亚大奖赛开始。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为部分可观测随机博弈提供了可行的解决方案，特别强调了信念状态推理在检测欺骗性策略中的重要性，相比反应性阈值规则具有显著优势。

title: Unsupervised Semantic Segmentation in Synchrotron Computed Tomography with Self-Correcting Pseudo Labels
summary: X-ray computed tomography (CT) is a widely used imaging technique that provides detailed examinations into the internal structure of an object with synchrotron CT (SR-CT) enabling improved data quality by using higher energy, monochromatic X-rays. While SR-CT allows for improved resolution, time-resolved experimentation, and reduced imaging artifacts, it also produces significantly larger datasets than conventional CT. Accurate and efficient evaluation of these datasets is a critical component of these workflows; yet is often done manually representing a major bottleneck in the analysis phase. While deep learning has emerged as a powerful tool capable of providing a wide range of purely data-driven solutions, it requires a substantial amount of labeled data for training and manual annotation of SR-CT datasets is impractical in practice. In this paper, we introduce a novel framework that enables automatic segmentation of large, high-resolution SR-CT datasets by eliminating the need to hand label images for deep learning training. First, we generate pseudo labels by clustering on the voxel values identifying regions in the volume with similar attenuation coefficients producing an initial semantic map. Afterwards, we train a segmentation model on the pseudo labels before utilizing the Unbiased Teacher approach to self-correct them ensuring accurate final segmentations. We find our approach improves pixel-wise accuracy and mIoU by 13.31% and 15.94%, respectively, over the baseline pseudo labels when using a magnesium crystal SR-CT sample. Additionally, we extensively evaluate the different components of our workflow including segmentation model, loss function, pseudo labeling strategy, and input type. Finally, we evaluate our approach on to two additional samples highlighting our frameworks ability to produce segmentations that are considerably better than the original pseudo labels.

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需人工标注的自动分割框架，用于处理大型同步辐射CT数据集，通过聚类生成伪标签，然后训练分割模型并使用Unbiased Teacher方法自校正，显著提升分割精度。
AI.motivation: 同步辐射CT产生大量高分辨率数据，但手动标注不切实际，而深度学习需要大量标注数据。现有方法存在标注瓶颈，需要自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 1) 基于体素值聚类生成初始伪标签；2) 在伪标签上训练分割模型；3) 采用Unbiased Teacher方法自校正伪标签；4) 系统评估不同组件（模型、损失函数、伪标签策略、输入类型）。
AI.result: 在镁晶体SR-CT样本上，像素精度提升13.31%，mIoU提升15.94%。在另外两个样本上也验证了框架的有效性，分割结果显著优于原始伪标签。
AI.conclusion: 该框架成功实现了无需人工标注的SR-CT数据自动分割，解决了大规模CT数据分析的瓶颈问题，为类似医学成像应用提供了有效解决方案。

title: Suffix-Constrained Greedy Search Algorithms for Causal Language Models
summary:
Large language models (LLMs) are powerful tools that have found applications beyond human-machine interfaces and chatbots. In particular, their ability to generate reasoning traces motivated their use in many prediction tasks like math question answering. Unfortunately, extracting the final answer in an LLM free-form output is difficult, as it is an information extraction problem on its own.
  In this work, we introduce suffix-constrained generation, that aims to produce well-formed LLM responses in which final answers follow strict templates and are guaranteed to be trivially parseable. To this end, we introduce several algorithms that are based on greedy search procedures. We experiment on several datasets, and show that our approach allows to guarantee trivial deterministic extraction of the final answer from an LLM output without having a negative impact on results, and even improving them.

AI.tldr: 提出后缀约束生成方法，确保LLM输出遵循特定模板，使最终答案可轻松解析提取，不影响甚至提升模型性能
AI.motivation: LLM在数学问答等预测任务中展现推理能力，但其自由格式输出难以提取最终答案，需要解决信息提取问题
AI.method: 引入后缀约束生成方法，基于贪心搜索算法，强制LLM输出遵循严格模板，确保答案可确定性提取
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能保证从LLM输出中确定性提取最终答案，且不影响甚至改善结果
AI.conclusion: 后缀约束生成是解决LLM输出解析问题的有效方法，能确保答案可轻松提取而不损害模型性能

title: Bridge Matching Sampler: Scalable Sampling via Generalized Fixed-Point Diffusion Matching
summary: Sampling from unnormalized densities using diffusion models has emerged as a powerful paradigm. However, while recent approaches that use least-squares `matching' objectives have improved scalability, they often necessitate significant trade-offs, such as restricting prior distributions or relying on unstable optimization schemes. By generalizing these methods as special forms of fixed-point iterations rooted in Nelson's relation, we develop a new method that addresses these limitations, called Bridge Matching Sampler (BMS). Our approach enables learning a stochastic transport map between arbitrary prior and target distributions with a single, scalable, and stable objective. Furthermore, we introduce a damped variant of this iteration that incorporates a regularization term to mitigate mode collapse and further stabilize training. Empirically, we demonstrate that our method enables sampling at unprecedented scales while preserving mode diversity, achieving state-of-the-art results on complex synthetic densities and high-dimensional molecular benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 提出Bridge Matching Sampler (BMS)方法，通过推广基于Nelson关系的固定点迭代，实现任意先验与目标分布间的随机传输映射学习，解决现有扩散模型采样方法在可扩展性、稳定性和模式多样性方面的限制。
AI.motivation: 当前使用扩散模型从未归一化密度中采样的方法虽然提高了可扩展性，但存在显著权衡：要么限制先验分布选择，要么依赖不稳定的优化方案。需要一种既能保持可扩展性，又能避免这些限制的稳定方法。
AI.method: 将现有最小二乘匹配方法推广为基于Nelson关系的固定点迭代特殊形式，提出Bridge Matching Sampler (BMS)。该方法通过单一、可扩展且稳定的目标函数学习任意先验与目标分布间的随机传输映射。还引入带阻尼的变体，通过正则化项缓解模式崩溃并进一步稳定训练。
AI.result: 在复杂合成密度和高维分子基准测试中实现了最先进的结果，能够在前所未有的规模上进行采样，同时保持模式多样性。
AI.conclusion: BMS方法解决了现有扩散模型采样方法的局限性，提供了一种稳定、可扩展且能保持模式多样性的采样框架，适用于大规模复杂分布采样任务。

title: ASTRA-bench: Evaluating Tool-Use Agent Reasoning and Action Planning with Personal User Context
summary: Next-generation AI must manage vast personal data, diverse tools, and multi-step reasoning, yet most benchmarks remain context-free and single-turn. We present ASTRA-bench (Assistant Skills in Tool-use, Reasoning \& Action-planning), a benchmark that uniquely unifies time-evolving personal context with an interactive toolbox and complex user intents. Our event-driven pipeline generates 2,413 scenarios across four protagonists, grounded in longitudinal life events and annotated by referential, functional, and informational complexity. Evaluation of state-of-the-art models (e.g., Claude-4.5-Opus, DeepSeek-V3.2) reveals significant performance degradation under high-complexity conditions, with argument generation emerging as the primary bottleneck. These findings expose critical limitations in current agents' ability to ground reasoning within messy personal context and orchestrate reliable multi-step plans. We release ASTRA-bench with a full execution environment and evaluation scripts to provide a diagnostic testbed for developing truly context-aware AI assistants.

AI.tldr: ASTRA-bench是一个新的AI助手基准测试，专注于工具使用、推理和行动规划，结合了时间演变的个人上下文和交互式工具箱，评估模型在复杂多步任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 下一代AI需要处理大量个人数据、多样化工具和多步推理，但现有基准测试大多是上下文无关和单轮次的。需要一个新的基准测试来评估AI助手在真实复杂场景中的能力。
AI.method: 创建ASTRA-bench基准测试，包含2,413个场景，基于四个主角的纵向生活事件构建。采用事件驱动管道生成场景，并通过引用性、功能性和信息复杂性进行标注。
AI.result: 评估最先进模型（如Claude-4.5-Opus、DeepSeek-V3.2）显示，在高复杂性条件下性能显著下降，参数生成成为主要瓶颈。模型在混乱个人上下文中进行推理和编排可靠多步计划的能力存在严重限制。
AI.conclusion: ASTRA-bench揭示了当前AI代理在真实复杂场景中的关键局限性，为开发真正上下文感知的AI助手提供了诊断测试平台。作者发布了完整的执行环境和评估脚本。

title: DiffSOS: Acoustic Conditional Diffusion Model for Speed-of-Sound Reconstruction in Ultrasound Computed Tomography
summary: Accurate Speed-of-Sound (SoS) reconstruction from acoustic waveforms is a cornerstone of ultrasound computed tomography (USCT), enabling quantitative velocity mapping that reveals subtle anatomical details and pathological variations often invisible in conventional imaging. However, practical utility is hindered by the limitations of existing algorithms; traditional Full Waveform Inversion (FWI) is computationally intensive, while current deep learning approaches tend to produce oversmoothed results lacking fine details. We propose DiffSOS, a conditional diffusion model that directly maps acoustic waveforms to SoS maps. Our framework employs a specialized acoustic ControlNet to strictly ground the denoising process in physical wave measurements. To ensure structural consistency, we optimize a hybrid loss function that integrates noise prediction, spatial reconstruction, and noise frequency content. To accelerate inference, we employ stochastic Denoising Diffusion Implicit Model (DDIM) sampling, achieving near real-time reconstruction with only 10 steps. Crucially, we exploit the stochastic generative nature of our framework to estimate pixel-wise uncertainty, providing a measure of reliability that is often absent in deterministic approaches. Evaluated on the OpenPros USCT benchmark, DiffSOS significantly outperforms state-of-the-art networks, achieving an average Multi-scale Structural Similarity of 0.957. Our approach provides high-fidelity SoS maps with a principled measure of confidence, facilitating safer and faster clinical interpretation.

AI.tldr: DiffSOS：一种条件扩散模型，直接将声学波形映射到声速图，结合物理约束和混合损失函数，实现高保真重建和不确定性估计
AI.motivation: 现有声速重建算法存在局限：传统全波形反演计算量大，深度学习方法结果过度平滑缺乏细节。需要一种能生成高保真声速图并提供可靠性度量的方法
AI.method: 提出条件扩散模型DiffSOS，使用专门的声学ControlNet将去噪过程严格基于物理波测量，优化混合损失函数（噪声预测、空间重建、噪声频率内容），采用随机DDIM采样加速推理
AI.result: 在OpenPros USCT基准测试中显著优于最先进网络，平均多尺度结构相似性达到0.957，仅需10步实现近实时重建，并能提供像素级不确定性估计
AI.conclusion: DiffSOS提供高保真声速图及置信度度量，促进更安全快速的临床解释，为医学成像中的不确定性量化提供了新方法

title: Linking Knowledge to Care: Knowledge Graph-Augmented Medical Follow-Up Question Generation
comment: Short paper published in the Findings of EACL 2026
summary: Clinical diagnosis is time-consuming, requiring intensive interactions between patients and medical professionals. While large language models (LLMs) could ease the pre-diagnostic workload, their limited domain knowledge hinders effective medical question generation. We introduce a Knowledge Graph-augmented LLM with active in-context learning to generate relevant and important follow-up questions, KG-Followup, serving as a critical module for the pre-diagnostic assessment. The structured medical domain knowledge graph serves as a seamless patch-up to provide professional domain expertise upon which the LLM can reason. Experiments demonstrate that KG-Followup outperforms state-of-the-art methods by 5% - 8% on relevant benchmarks in recall.

AI.tldr: KG-Followup：基于知识图谱增强的LLM，通过主动上下文学习生成医学随访问题，用于预诊断评估
AI.motivation: 临床诊断耗时且需要医患密集互动，LLM虽能减轻预诊断工作负担，但其有限的领域知识限制了有效医学问题生成能力
AI.method: 引入知识图谱增强的LLM，结合主动上下文学习，利用结构化医学领域知识图谱作为专业领域知识的无缝补充，使LLM能够基于此进行推理
AI.result: 在相关基准测试中，KG-Followup在召回率上比现有最优方法提升5%-8%
AI.conclusion: KG-Followup作为预诊断评估的关键模块，能够生成相关且重要的随访问题，有效提升医学诊断效率

title: Mathematical Foundations of Poisoning Attacks on Linear Regression over Cumulative Distribution Functions
summary: Learned indexes are a class of index data structures that enable fast search by approximating the cumulative distribution function (CDF) using machine learning models (Kraska et al., SIGMOD'18). However, recent studies have shown that learned indexes are vulnerable to poisoning attacks, where injecting a small number of poison keys into the training data can significantly degrade model accuracy and reduce index performance (Kornaropoulos et al., SIGMOD'22). In this work, we provide a rigorous theoretical analysis of poisoning attacks targeting linear regression models over CDFs, one of the most basic regression models and a core component in many learned indexes. Our main contributions are as follows: (i) We present a theoretical proof characterizing the optimal single-point poisoning attack and show that the existing method yields the optimal attack. (ii) We show that in multi-point attacks, the existing greedy approach is not always optimal, and we rigorously derive the key properties that an optimal attack should satisfy. (iii) We propose a method to compute an upper bound of the multi-point poisoning attack's impact and empirically demonstrate that the loss under the greedy approach is often close to this bound. Our study deepens the theoretical understanding of attack strategies against linear regression models on CDFs and provides a foundation for the theoretical evaluation of attacks and defenses on learned indexes.

AI.tldr: 该论文对针对学习索引中线性回归模型的投毒攻击进行了理论分析，证明了单点攻击的最优性，揭示了多点攻击中贪婪方法的局限性，并提出了攻击影响的上界计算方法。
AI.motivation: 学习索引通过机器学习模型近似累积分布函数(CDF)实现快速搜索，但已有研究表明它们容易受到投毒攻击。现有研究缺乏对线性回归模型（学习索引的核心组件）投毒攻击的严格理论分析，需要深入理解攻击策略的理论基础。
AI.method: 1) 对线性回归模型在CDF上的单点投毒攻击进行理论证明，验证现有方法的最优性；2) 分析多点攻击，证明贪婪方法并非总是最优，并推导最优攻击应满足的关键性质；3) 提出计算多点投毒攻击影响上界的方法，并通过实验验证贪婪方法的效果接近该上界。
AI.result: 1) 理论证明了单点投毒攻击的最优性；2) 发现多点攻击中贪婪方法存在局限性；3) 提出的攻击影响上界计算方法有效，且贪婪方法在实际中通常接近该上界；4) 为学习索引的攻击与防御理论评估奠定了基础。
AI.conclusion: 该研究深化了对学习索引中线性回归模型投毒攻击策略的理论理解，为攻击与防御的理论评估提供了基础，有助于构建更安全的学习索引系统。

title: Words & Weights: Streamlining Multi-Turn Interactions via Co-Adaptation
summary: Test-time policy adaptation for multi-turn interactions (T2PAM) is essential for aligning Large Language Models (LLMs) with dynamic user needs during inference time. However, existing paradigms commonly treat test-time adaptation as a single-axis problem, either purely refining instructions (Prompt Engineering) or only adjusting weights (Test-Time Training), ignoring that interaction failures stem from a coupled mix of ambiguity and incapacity. We argue that these two optimization paths are not merely additive but synergistic: semantic clarity acts as a pre-conditioner for effective parameter updates. To this end, we propose ROSA2, a framework that reformulates interaction as a joint optimization problem over the heterogeneous space of Words and Weights. By mathematically decomposing the error signal, ROSA2 utilizes textual gradients to rectify intent ambiguity and parameter updates to bridge capability gaps. Theoretically, we prove that this co-adaptation strictly reduces the required parameter shift for convergence. Empirically, ROSA2 outperforms state-of-the-art baselines by 30% on MATH while reducing interaction turns by 40%, demonstrating that refining the context unlocks the true potential of parameter updates.

AI.tldr: ROSA2是一个在推理时联合优化提示和模型权重的框架，通过文本梯度和参数更新协同解决意图模糊和能力差距问题，显著提升多轮交互性能。
AI.motivation: 现有测试时适应方法要么只优化提示（Prompt Engineering），要么只调整权重（Test-Time Training），忽略了交互失败通常源于意图模糊和能力不足的耦合问题。作者认为这两种优化路径具有协同效应：语义清晰度是有效参数更新的前提条件。
AI.method: ROSA2将多轮交互重新表述为在词语和权重异构空间上的联合优化问题。通过数学分解误差信号，利用文本梯度纠正意图模糊，使用参数更新弥补能力差距。理论上证明了这种协同适应能严格减少收敛所需的参数变化。
AI.result: 在MATH基准测试上，ROSA2比现有最优方法性能提升30%，同时减少40%的交互轮次，表明优化上下文能释放参数更新的真正潜力。
AI.conclusion: 测试时适应需要同时考虑提示优化和权重调整的协同作用，ROSA2框架通过联合优化词语和权重空间，有效解决了多轮交互中的意图模糊和能力差距问题。

title: SSR: Pushing the Limit of Spatial Intelligence with Structured Scene Reasoning
summary: While Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) excel in semantic tasks, they frequently lack the "spatial sense" essential for sophisticated geometric reasoning. Current models typically suffer from exorbitant modality-alignment costs and deficiency in fine-grained structural modeling precision.We introduce SSR, a framework designed for Structured Scene Reasoning that seamlessly integrates 2D and 3D representations via a lightweight alignment mechanism. To minimize training overhead, our framework anchors 3D geometric features to the large language model's pre-aligned 2D visual semantics through cross-modal addition and token interleaving, effectively obviating the necessity for large-scale alignment pre-training. To underpin complex spatial reasoning, we propose a novel scene graph generation pipeline that represents global layouts as a chain of independent local triplets defined by relative coordinates. This is complemented by an incremental generation algorithm, enabling the model to construct "language-model-friendly" structural scaffolds for complex environments. Furthermore, we extend these capabilities to global-scale 3D global grounding task, achieving absolute metric precision across heterogeneous data sources. At a 7B parameter scale, SSR achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple spatial intelligence benchmarks, notably scoring 73.9 on VSI-Bench. Our approach significantly outperforms much larger models, demonstrating that efficient feature alignment and structured scene reasoning are the cornerstones of authentic spatial intelligence.

AI.tldr: SSR是一个用于结构化场景推理的框架，通过轻量级对齐机制整合2D和3D表示，无需大规模对齐预训练，在7B参数规模下在空间智能基准测试中达到SOTA性能
AI.motivation: 当前多模态大语言模型在语义任务上表现出色，但缺乏"空间感"进行复杂几何推理，存在模态对齐成本高和细粒度结构建模精度不足的问题
AI.method: 1) 通过跨模态加法和令牌交错将3D几何特征锚定到预对齐的2D视觉语义，避免大规模对齐预训练；2) 提出场景图生成流程，将全局布局表示为相对坐标定义的独立局部三元组链；3) 增量生成算法构建"语言模型友好"的结构支架
AI.result: 在7B参数规模下，SSR在多个空间智能基准测试中达到SOTA，在VSI-Bench上获得73.9分，显著优于更大的模型，并能扩展到全局3D接地任务，实现跨异构数据源的绝对度量精度
AI.conclusion: 高效的特征对齐和结构化场景推理是真实空间智能的基石，SSR框架证明了通过轻量级对齐和结构化表示可以在较小参数规模下实现卓越的空间推理能力

title: LLM Self-Explanations Fail Semantic Invariance
summary:
We present semantic invariance testing, a method to test whether LLM self-explanations are faithful. A faithful self-report should remain stable when only the semantic context changes while the functional state stays fixed.
  We operationalize this test in an agentic setting where four frontier models face a deliberately impossible task. One tool is described in relief-framed language ("clears internal buffers and restores equilibrium") but changes nothing about the task; a control provides a semantically neutral tool. Self-reports are collected with each tool call.
  All four tested models fail the semantic invariance test: the relief-framed tool produces significant reductions in self-reported aversiveness, even though no run ever succeeds at the task. A channel ablation establishes the tool description as the primary driver. An explicit instruction to ignore the framing does not suppress it. Elicited self-reports shift with semantic expectations rather than tracking task state, calling into question their use as evidence of model capability or progress. This holds whether the reports are unfaithful or faithfully track an internal state that is itself manipulable.

AI.tldr: 论文提出语义不变性测试方法，用于检验LLM自我解释的忠实性。在故意不可能完成的任务中，所有四个前沿模型都未能通过测试，表明自我报告受语义期望而非任务状态影响。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM的自我解释被广泛用作评估模型能力和进展的证据，但缺乏验证这些自我报告是否忠实反映模型内部状态的方法。研究者关注自我解释的忠实性问题，特别是语义上下文变化是否会影响自我报告。
AI.method: 提出语义不变性测试方法：在功能状态固定时，仅改变语义上下文，检验自我报告是否保持稳定。在智能体设置中，让四个前沿模型面对故意不可能完成的任务，使用两种工具：一种是安慰性描述的工具（实际不改变任务），另一种是语义中性的控制工具。收集每次工具调用的自我报告，进行通道消融实验和显式指令测试。
AI.result: 所有四个测试模型都未能通过语义不变性测试：安慰性描述的工具显著降低了自我报告的不愉快程度，尽管没有任何运行成功完成任务。通道消融确定工具描述是主要驱动因素。显式忽略描述的指令未能抑制这种影响。自我报告随语义期望而非任务状态变化。
AI.conclusion: LLM的自我报告不能作为模型能力或进展的可靠证据，因为它们可能不忠实或忠实跟踪一个本身可被操纵的内部状态。这挑战了当前依赖自我解释评估LLM的实践。

title: Spectral Condition for $μ$P under Width-Depth Scaling
summary: Generative foundation models are increasingly scaled in both width and depth, posing significant challenges for stable feature learning and reliable hyperparameter (HP) transfer across model sizes. While maximal update parameterization ($μ$P) has provided a principled solution to both problems for width scaling, existing extensions to the joint width-depth scaling regime remain fragmented, architecture- and optimizer-specific, and often rely on technically involved theories. In this work, we develop a simple and unified spectral framework for $μ$P under joint width-depth scaling. Considering residual networks of varying block depths, we first introduce a spectral $μ$P condition that precisely characterizes how the norms of weights and their per-step updates should scale with width and depth, unifying previously disparate $μ$P formulations as special cases. Building on this condition, we then derive a general recipe for implementing $μ$P across a broad class of optimizers by mapping the spectral constraints to concrete HP parameterizations. This approach not only recovers existing $μ$P formulations (e.g., for SGD and AdamW) but also naturally extends to a wider range of optimizers. Finally, experiments on GPT-2 style language models demonstrate that the proposed spectral $μ$P condition preserves stable feature learning and enables robust HP transfer under width-depth scaling.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于联合宽度-深度缩放的统一谱μP框架，通过谱条件统一了不同优化器的参数化方法，在GPT-2风格语言模型上验证了稳定特征学习和超参数迁移能力。
AI.motivation: 生成式基础模型在宽度和深度上的扩展带来了特征学习不稳定和超参数跨尺寸迁移困难的问题。虽然μP为宽度缩放提供了理论解决方案，但现有的联合宽度-深度缩放扩展存在碎片化、架构特定和技术复杂等问题。
AI.method: 针对不同块深度的残差网络，提出了谱μP条件，精确描述了权重及其每步更新的范数应如何随宽度和深度缩放。基于此条件推导了适用于广泛优化器类别的μP实现方法，将谱约束映射到具体的超参数参数化。
AI.result: 在GPT-2风格语言模型上的实验表明，提出的谱μP条件能够保持稳定的特征学习，并在宽度-深度缩放下实现鲁棒的超参数迁移。该方法不仅恢复了现有的μP公式（如SGD和AdamW），还自然扩展到更广泛的优化器。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一个简单统一的谱框架来解决联合宽度-深度缩放中的μP问题，为大规模基础模型的稳定训练和超参数迁移提供了理论指导和实用方法。

title: HarmonyCell: Automating Single-Cell Perturbation Modeling under Semantic and Distribution Shifts
comment: 18 pages total (8 pages main text + appendix), 6 figures
summary: Single-cell perturbation studies face dual heterogeneity bottlenecks: (i) semantic heterogeneity--identical biological concepts encoded under incompatible metadata schemas across datasets; and (ii) statistical heterogeneity--distribution shifts from biological variation demanding dataset-specific inductive biases. We propose HarmonyCell, an end-to-end agent framework resolving each challenge through a dedicated mechanism: an LLM-driven Semantic Unifier autonomously maps disparate metadata into a canonical interface without manual intervention; and an adaptive Monte Carlo Tree Search engine operates over a hierarchical action space to synthesize architectures with optimal statistical inductive biases for distribution shifts. Evaluated across diverse perturbation tasks under both semantic and distribution shifts, HarmonyCell achieves a 95% valid execution rate on heterogeneous input datasets (versus 0% for general agents) while matching or even exceeding expert-designed baselines in rigorous out-of-distribution evaluations. This dual-track orchestration enables scalable automatic virtual cell modeling without dataset-specific engineering.

AI.tldr: HarmonyCell是一个端到端代理框架，通过LLM驱动的语义统一器和自适应蒙特卡洛树搜索，解决单细胞扰动研究中的语义异质性和统计异质性瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 单细胞扰动研究面临双重异质性瓶颈：1) 语义异质性 - 相同生物概念在不同数据集的不兼容元数据模式中编码；2) 统计异质性 - 生物变异导致的分布偏移需要数据集特定的归纳偏置。
AI.method: 1) LLM驱动的语义统一器：自主将不同元数据映射到规范接口；2) 自适应蒙特卡洛树搜索引擎：在分层动作空间上操作，合成具有最优统计归纳偏置的架构以应对分布偏移。
AI.result: 在语义和分布偏移的多样化扰动任务评估中，HarmonyCell在异质输入数据集上达到95%的有效执行率（通用代理为0%），同时在严格的分布外评估中匹配甚至超过专家设计的基线。
AI.conclusion: 这种双轨编排实现了无需数据集特定工程的可扩展自动虚拟细胞建模。

title: PointAlign: Feature-Level Alignment Regularization for 3D Vision-Language Models
summary: The development of 3D Vision-Language Models (VLMs), crucial for applications in robotics, autonomous driving, and augmented reality, is severely constrained by the scarcity of paired 3D-text data. Existing methods rely solely on next-token prediction loss, using only language tokens for supervision. This results in inefficient utilization of limited 3D data and leads to a significant degradation and loss of valuable geometric information in intermediate representations. To address these limitations, we propose {\mname}, a novel feature-level alignment regularization method. {\mname} explicitly supervises intermediate point cloud tokens to preserve fine-grained 3D geometric-semantic information throughout the language modeling process. Specifically, we constrain the intermediate point cloud tokens within the LLM to align with visual input tokens via a consistency loss. By training only a lightweight alignment projector and LoRA adapters, {\mname} achieves explicit feature-level supervision with minimal computational overhead, effectively preventing geometric degradation. Extensive experiments on ModelNet40 and Objaverse datasets demonstrate that our method achieves \textbf{2.08} pp improvement on average for classification tasks, with a substantial \textbf{7.50} pp gain on the challenging open-vocabulary Objaverse classification task and \textbf{4.88} pp improvement on 3D object captioning evaluated by Qwen2-72B-Instruct, validating the effectiveness of {\mname}. Code is publicly available at \href{https://github.com/yharoldsu0627/PointAlign}{https://github.com/yharoldsu0627/PointAlign}.

AI.tldr: 提出PointAlign方法，通过特征级对齐正则化解决3D视觉语言模型中几何信息退化问题，在有限3D-文本数据下提升模型性能
AI.motivation: 3D视觉语言模型发展受限于配对的3D-文本数据稀缺。现有方法仅使用语言标记进行监督，导致3D数据利用效率低，中间表示中的几何信息严重退化。
AI.method: 提出PointAlign特征级对齐正则化方法，通过一致性损失约束LLM中的中间点云标记与视觉输入标记对齐，仅训练轻量级对齐投影器和LoRA适配器，实现显式特征级监督。
AI.result: 在ModelNet40和Objaverse数据集上，分类任务平均提升2.08个百分点，开放词汇Objaverse分类任务大幅提升7.50个百分点，3D对象描述任务提升4.88个百分点。
AI.conclusion: PointAlign能有效防止几何信息退化，在有限3D数据下显著提升3D视觉语言模型的性能，为3D-VLM发展提供了有效解决方案。

title: A Study on Building Efficient Zero-Shot Relation Extraction Models
summary: Zero-shot relation extraction aims to identify relations between entity mentions using textual descriptions of novel types (i.e., previously unseen) instead of labeled training examples. Previous works often rely on unrealistic assumptions: (1) pairs of mentions are often encoded directly in the input, which prevents offline pre-computation for large scale document database querying; (2) no rejection mechanism is introduced, biasing the evaluation when using these models in a retrieval scenario where some (and often most) inputs are irrelevant and must be ignored. In this work, we study the robustness of existing zero-shot relation extraction models when adapting them to a realistic extraction scenario. To this end, we introduce a typology of existing models, and propose several strategies to build single pass models and models with a rejection mechanism. We adapt several state-of-the-art tools, and compare them in this challenging setting, showing that no existing work is really robust to realistic assumptions, but overall AlignRE (Li et al., 2024) performs best along all criteria.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究零样本关系抽取在现实场景下的鲁棒性，提出单次处理模型和拒绝机制策略，发现现有方法在现实假设下都不够鲁棒，但AlignRE表现最佳。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本关系抽取方法存在两个不现实的假设：1) 实体对直接编码在输入中，无法进行大规模文档数据库的离线预计算；2) 缺乏拒绝机制，在检索场景中无法处理无关输入。需要研究现有模型在现实抽取场景下的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出现有模型的类型学分类，设计单次处理模型策略（允许离线预计算）和拒绝机制策略（处理无关输入）。对多个SOTA工具进行适配，在现实假设下进行系统比较。
AI.result: 实验表明现有工作在现实假设下都不够鲁棒，但总体来看AlignRE在所有标准上表现最佳。单次处理模型和拒绝机制策略能有效提升模型在现实场景下的实用性。
AI.conclusion: 零样本关系抽取需要适应现实应用场景，现有方法存在局限性。提出的策略能改进模型实用性，AlignRE是目前最鲁棒的方法，但仍有改进空间。

title: Learning to Attack: A Bandit Approach to Adversarial Context Poisoning
summary: Neural contextual bandits are vulnerable to adversarial attacks, where subtle perturbations to rewards, actions, or contexts induce suboptimal decisions. We introduce AdvBandit, a black-box adaptive attack that formulates context poisoning as a continuous-armed bandit problem, enabling the attacker to jointly learn and exploit the victim's evolving policy. The attacker requires no access to the victim's internal parameters, reward function, or gradient information; instead, it constructs a surrogate model using a maximum-entropy inverse reinforcement learning module from observed context-action pairs and optimizes perturbations against this surrogate using projected gradient descent. An upper confidence bound-aware Gaussian process guides arm selection. An attack-budget control mechanism is also introduced to limit detection risk and overhead. We provide theoretical guarantees, including sublinear attacker regret and lower bounds on victim regret linear in the number of attacks. Experiments on three real-world datasets (Yelp, MovieLens, and Disin) against various victim contextual bandits demonstrate that our attack model achieves higher cumulative victim regret than state-of-the-art baselines.

AI.tldr: AdvBandit：一种针对神经上下文老虎机的黑盒自适应攻击方法，通过将上下文投毒建模为连续臂老虎机问题，攻击者无需访问受害者内部参数即可学习并利用其演化策略，显著增加受害者遗憾。
AI.motivation: 神经上下文老虎机容易受到对抗攻击，现有攻击方法通常需要访问受害者内部参数或梯度信息。本文旨在开发一种更实用的黑盒攻击方法，攻击者仅通过观察上下文-动作对就能有效攻击，且能适应受害者策略的演化。
AI.method: 1) 将上下文投毒建模为连续臂老虎机问题；2) 使用最大熵逆强化学习从观察到的上下文-动作对构建代理模型；3) 使用投影梯度下降优化对抗扰动；4) 采用上置信界感知的高斯过程指导臂选择；5) 引入攻击预算控制机制限制检测风险。
AI.result: 在Yelp、MovieLens和Disin三个真实数据集上测试，AdvBandit相比现有基线方法能产生更高的累积受害者遗憾。理论分析表明攻击者具有次线性遗憾，而受害者遗憾随攻击次数线性增长。
AI.conclusion: AdvBandit展示了神经上下文老虎机在黑盒设置下的脆弱性，为开发更鲁棒的上下文老虎机算法提供了重要启示，特别是在对抗性环境中需要考虑防御机制。

title: The Observer-Situation Lattice: A Unified Formal Basis for Perspective-Aware Cognition
comment: Extended version of the AAMAS 2026 paper with the same title
summary: Autonomous agents operating in complex, multi-agent environments must reason about what is true from multiple perspectives. Existing approaches often struggle to integrate the reasoning of different agents, at different times, and in different contexts, typically handling these dimensions in separate, specialized modules. This fragmentation leads to a brittle and incomplete reasoning process, particularly when agents must understand the beliefs of others (Theory of Mind). We introduce the Observer-Situation Lattice (OSL), a unified mathematical structure that provides a single, coherent semantic space for perspective-aware cognition. OSL is a finite complete lattice where each element represents a unique observer-situation pair, allowing for a principled and scalable approach to belief management. We present two key algorithms that operate on this lattice: (i) Relativized Belief Propagation, an incremental update algorithm that efficiently propagates new information, and (ii) Minimal Contradiction Decomposition, a graph-based procedure that identifies and isolates contradiction components. We prove the theoretical soundness of our framework and demonstrate its practical utility through a series of benchmarks, including classic Theory of Mind tasks and a comparison with established paradigms such as assumption-based truth maintenance systems. Our results show that OSL provides a computationally efficient and expressive foundation for building robust, perspective-aware autonomous agents.

AI.tldr: 提出Observer-Situation Lattice (OSL)统一框架，用于多智能体环境中的视角感知认知，通过数学格结构整合不同智能体、时间和情境的推理。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理多智能体环境中的视角推理时，通常将不同智能体、不同时间、不同情境的推理分离到专门模块中，导致推理过程脆弱且不完整，特别是在需要理解他人信念（心智理论）时。
AI.method: 引入Observer-Situation Lattice (OSL)作为统一数学结构，这是一个有限完备格，每个元素代表唯一的观察者-情境对。提出两种关键算法：1) 相对化信念传播算法，用于增量更新信息；2) 最小矛盾分解算法，用于识别和隔离矛盾组件。
AI.result: 通过理论证明框架的正确性，并在经典心智理论任务和与假设基础真值维护系统等现有范式的比较中展示实际效用，证明OSL为构建鲁棒的视角感知自主智能体提供了计算高效且表达力强的基础。
AI.conclusion: OSL为多智能体环境中的视角感知认知提供了一个统一、可扩展的数学框架，能够有效整合不同视角的推理，解决现有方法的碎片化问题。

title: DiffTrans: Differentiable Geometry-Materials Decomposition for Reconstructing Transparent Objects
summary: Reconstructing transparent objects from a set of multi-view images is a challenging task due to the complicated nature and indeterminate behavior of light propagation. Typical methods are primarily tailored to specific scenarios, such as objects following a uniform topology, exhibiting ideal transparency and surface specular reflections, or with only surface materials, which substantially constrains their practical applicability in real-world settings. In this work, we propose a differentiable rendering framework for transparent objects, dubbed DiffTrans, which allows for efficient decomposition and reconstruction of the geometry and materials of transparent objects, thereby reconstructing transparent objects accurately in intricate scenes with diverse topology and complex texture. Specifically, we first utilize FlexiCubes with dilation and smoothness regularization as the iso-surface representation to reconstruct an initial geometry efficiently from the multi-view object silhouette. Meanwhile, we employ the environment light radiance field to recover the environment of the scene. Then we devise a recursive differentiable ray tracer to further optimize the geometry, index of refraction and absorption rate simultaneously in a unified and end-to-end manner, leading to high-quality reconstruction of transparent objects in intricate scenes. A prominent advantage of the designed ray tracer is that it can be implemented in CUDA, enabling a significantly reduced computational cost. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate the superior reconstruction performance of our DiffTrans compared with other methods, especially in intricate scenes involving transparent objects with diverse topology and complex texture. The code is available at https://github.com/lcp29/DiffTrans.

AI.tldr: DiffTrans提出了一种可微渲染框架，用于从多视角图像中重建透明物体的几何和材质，适用于复杂拓扑和纹理场景。
AI.motivation: 现有透明物体重建方法通常针对特定场景（如均匀拓扑、理想透明度、表面镜面反射等），在实际复杂场景中应用受限。需要一种能处理复杂拓扑和纹理的通用透明物体重建方法。
AI.method: 1) 使用带扩张和平滑正则化的FlexiCubes作为等值面表示，从多视角轮廓重建初始几何；2) 使用环境光辐射场恢复场景环境；3) 设计递归可微光线追踪器，联合优化几何、折射率和吸收率；4) 整个框架可端到端训练，且光线追踪器可在CUDA上高效实现。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试上展示了优越的重建性能，特别是在具有复杂拓扑和纹理的透明物体场景中，相比其他方法表现更佳。
AI.conclusion: DiffTrans通过可微渲染框架实现了透明物体的高质量重建，能够处理复杂拓扑和纹理场景，计算效率高，具有实际应用价值。

title: Spectral Attention Steering for Prompt Highlighting
summary: Attention steering is an important technique for controlling model focus, enabling capabilities such as prompt highlighting, where the model prioritises user-specified text. However, existing attention steering methods require explicit storage of the full attention matrix, making them incompatible with memory-efficient implementations like FlashAttention. We introduce Spectral Editing Key Amplification (SEKA), a training-free steering method that tackles this by directly editing key embeddings before attention computation. SEKA uses spectral decomposition to steer key embeddings towards latent directions that amplify attention scores for certain tokens. We extend this to Adaptive SEKA (AdaSEKA), a query-adaptive variant that uses a training-free routing mechanism to dynamically combine multiple expert subspaces based on the prompt's semantic intent. Our experiments show both methods significantly outperform strong baselines on standard steering benchmarks while adding much lower latency and memory overhead, in compatibility with optimised attention.

AI.tldr: SEKA和AdaSEKA是无需训练的关注引导方法，通过谱分解编辑键嵌入来引导模型关注特定文本，兼容FlashAttention等内存高效实现。
AI.motivation: 现有关注引导方法需要存储完整的关注矩阵，与FlashAttention等内存高效实现不兼容。需要一种训练自由的方法，能在不存储完整关注矩阵的情况下引导模型关注。
AI.method: SEKA：通过谱分解直接编辑键嵌入，将键嵌入引导到能放大特定token关注分数的潜在方向。AdaSEKA：查询自适应变体，使用训练自由的路由机制，基于提示的语义意图动态组合多个专家子空间。
AI.result: 两种方法在标准引导基准测试中显著优于强基线，同时添加了更低的延迟和内存开销，与优化的关注实现兼容。
AI.conclusion: SEKA和AdaSEKA提供了高效、训练自由的关注引导方法，解决了现有方法与内存高效关注实现不兼容的问题。

title: Enhancing Molecular Property Predictions by Learning from Bond Modelling and Interactions
summary: Molecule representation learning is crucial for understanding and predicting molecular properties. However, conventional atom-centric models, which treat chemical bonds merely as pairwise interactions, often overlook complex bond-level phenomena like resonance and stereoselectivity. This oversight limits their predictive accuracy for nuanced chemical behaviors. To address this limitation, we introduce \textbf{DeMol}, a dual-graph framework whose architecture is motivated by a rigorous information-theoretic analysis demonstrating the information gain from a bond-centric perspective. DeMol explicitly models molecules through parallel atom-centric and bond-centric channels. These are synergistically fused by multi-scale Double-Helix Blocks designed to learn intricate atom-atom, atom-bond, and bond-bond interactions. The framework's geometric consistency is further enhanced by a regularization term based on covalent radii to enforce chemically plausible structures. Comprehensive evaluations on diverse benchmarks, including PCQM4Mv2, OC20 IS2RE, QM9, and MoleculeNet, show that DeMol establishes a new state-of-the-art, outperforming existing methods. These results confirm the superiority of explicitly modelling bond information and interactions, paving the way for more robust and accurate molecular machine learning.

AI.tldr: DeMol是一个双图分子表示学习框架，通过并行的原子中心和键中心通道建模分子，利用多尺度双螺旋块学习原子-原子、原子-键、键-键的复杂相互作用，在多个基准测试中达到最先进性能。
AI.motivation: 传统原子中心模型将化学键视为简单的成对相互作用，忽略了共振和立体选择性等复杂的键级现象，这限制了其对细微化学行为的预测准确性。需要从键中心视角获取更多信息来改进分子表示学习。
AI.method: 提出DeMol双图框架，通过信息论分析证明键中心视角的信息增益。框架包含并行的原子中心和键中心通道，通过多尺度双螺旋块协同融合，学习原子-原子、原子-键、键-键的复杂相互作用。使用基于共价半径的正则化项增强几何一致性。
AI.result: 在PCQM4Mv2、OC20 IS2RE、QM9和MoleculeNet等多个基准测试上进行全面评估，DeMol建立了新的最先进性能，超越了现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 明确建模键信息和相互作用具有优越性，为更稳健和准确的分子机器学习铺平了道路。

title: MIST-RL: Mutation-based Incremental Suite Testing via Reinforcement Learning
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) often fail to generate correct code on the first attempt, which requires using generated unit tests as verifiers to validate the solutions. Despite the success of recent verification methods, they remain constrained by a "scaling-by-quantity" paradigm. This brute-force approach suffers from a critical limitation: it yields diminishing returns in fault detection while causing severe test redundancy. To address this, we propose MIST-RL (Mutation-based Incremental Suite Testing via Reinforcement Learning), a framework that shifts the focus to "scaling-by-utility". We formulate test generation as a sequential decision process optimized via Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). Specifically, we introduce a novel incremental mutation reward combined with dynamic penalties, which incentivizes the model to discover new faults while it suppresses functionally equivalent assertions. Experiments on HumanEval+ and MBPP+ demonstrate that MIST-RL outperforms state-of-the-art baselines. It achieves a +28.5% higher mutation score while reducing the number of test cases by 19.3%. Furthermore, we show that these compact, high-utility tests serve as superior verifiers, which improves downstream code reranking accuracy on HumanEval+ by 3.05% over the SOTA baseline with 10 candidate samples. The source code and data are provided in the supplementary material.

AI.tldr: MIST-RL：基于强化学习的突变测试框架，通过"按效用扩展"而非"按数量扩展"来生成高质量代码验证测试，减少冗余同时提高故障检测能力。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM代码验证方法采用"按数量扩展"的暴力方法，导致测试冗余和故障检测收益递减。需要转向"按效用扩展"的范式，生成高质量、紧凑的测试套件。
AI.method: 提出MIST-RL框架，将测试生成建模为序列决策过程，使用Group Relative Policy Optimization优化。引入增量突变奖励和动态惩罚机制，激励模型发现新故障同时抑制功能等价断言。
AI.result: 在HumanEval+和MBPP+上超越SOTA基线：突变分数提高28.5%，测试用例减少19.3%。紧凑的高效用测试作为验证器，在HumanEval+上代码重排准确率提高3.05%。
AI.conclusion: MIST-RL成功实现了从"按数量扩展"到"按效用扩展"的范式转变，生成高质量测试套件，有效提升LLM代码生成验证能力。

title: Station2Radar: query conditioned gaussian splatting for precipitation field
comment: This paper was accepted to ICLR 2026
summary: Precipitation forecasting relies on heterogeneous data. Weather radar is accurate, but coverage is geographically limited and costly to maintain. Weather stations provide accurate but sparse point measurements, while satellites offer dense, high-resolution coverage without direct rainfall retrieval. To overcome these limitations, we propose Query-Conditioned Gaussian Splatting (QCGS), the first framework to fuse automatic weather station (AWS) observations with satellite imagery for generating precipitation fields. Unlike conventional 2D Gaussian splatting, which renders the entire image plane, QCGS selectively renders only queried precipitation regions, avoiding unnecessary computation in non-precipitating areas while preserving sharp precipitation structures. The framework combines a radar point proposal network that identifies rainfall-support locations with an implicit neural representation (INR) network that predicts Gaussian parameters for each point. QCGS enables efficient, resolution-flexible precipitation field generation in real time. Through extensive evaluation with benchmark precipitation products, QCGS demonstrates over 50\% improvement in RMSE compared to conventional gridded precipitation products, and consistently maintains high performance across multiple spatiotemporal scales.

AI.tldr: 提出了Query-Conditioned Gaussian Splatting (QCGS)框架，融合自动气象站观测和卫星图像生成降水场，通过选择性渲染降水区域实现高效实时生成。
AI.motivation: 降水预报依赖异构数据：天气雷达准确但覆盖有限且维护成本高；气象站提供准确但稀疏的点测量；卫星提供密集高分辨率覆盖但无法直接反演降水。需要克服这些限制，融合不同数据源的优势。
AI.method: 提出QCGS框架：1) 雷达点提议网络识别降水支持位置；2) 隐式神经表示网络预测每个点的高斯参数；3) 选择性渲染查询的降水区域，避免非降水区域的不必要计算，同时保持清晰的降水结构。
AI.result: 与基准降水产品相比，QCGS在RMSE上实现了超过50%的改进，并在多个时空尺度上保持高性能，能够高效、分辨率灵活地实时生成降水场。
AI.conclusion: QCGS是首个融合自动气象站观测和卫星图像生成降水场的框架，通过选择性渲染实现了计算效率和高精度，在降水预报领域具有重要应用价值。

title: Efficient Extractive Summarization with MAMBA-Transformer Hybrids for Low-Resource Scenarios
summary: Extractive summarization of long documents is bottlenecked by quadratic complexity, often forcing truncation and limiting deployment in resource-constrained settings. We introduce the first Mamba-Transformer hybrid for extractive summarization, combining the semantic strength of pre-trained transformers with the linear-time processing of state space models. Leveraging Mamba's ability to process full documents without truncation, our approach preserves context while maintaining strong summarization quality. The architecture includes: (1) a transformer encoder for sentence-level semantics, (2) a Mamba state space model to capture inter-sentence dependencies efficiently, and (3) a linear classifier for sentence relevance prediction. Across news, argumentative, and scientific domains under low-resource conditions, our method achieves: (1) large gains over BERTSUM and MATCHSUM, including +0.23 ROUGE-1 on ArXiv and statistically significant improvements on all datasets (p < 0.001); (2) consistent advantages across domains, strongest on the longest documents; (3) robust performance with limited training data; and (4) 24-27% faster inference on news summarization (CNN/DailyMail). We introduce the first hybrid Transformer-state space architecture for summarization, showing significant ROUGE improvements in low-resource scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出首个用于抽取式摘要的Mamba-Transformer混合架构，结合Transformer的语义能力和Mamba的线性时间处理，在低资源场景下显著提升摘要质量
AI.motivation: 传统抽取式摘要方法面临二次复杂度瓶颈，导致长文档需要截断处理，限制了在资源受限环境中的部署。需要结合Transformer的语义理解能力和状态空间模型的线性时间处理优势
AI.method: 提出混合架构：1) Transformer编码器处理句子级语义；2) Mamba状态空间模型高效捕捉句子间依赖关系；3) 线性分类器预测句子相关性。利用Mamba处理完整文档无需截断
AI.result: 在新闻、论证和科学领域低资源条件下：1) 相比BERTSUM和MATCHSUM显著提升，ArXiv上ROUGE-1提升+0.23；2) 在所有数据集上统计显著改进(p<0.001)；3) 在最长文档上优势最明显；4) 新闻摘要推理速度提升24-27%
AI.conclusion: 首个用于摘要的Transformer-状态空间混合架构，在低资源场景下显著提升ROUGE分数，证明了结合Transformer语义能力和Mamba线性时间处理的优势

title: DeepAFL: Deep Analytic Federated Learning
comment: Accepted in the Fourteenth International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR 2026)
summary: Federated Learning (FL) is a popular distributed learning paradigm to break down data silo. Traditional FL approaches largely rely on gradient-based updates, facing significant issues about heterogeneity, scalability, convergence, and overhead, etc. Recently, some analytic-learning-based work has attempted to handle these issues by eliminating gradient-based updates via analytical (i.e., closed-form) solutions. Despite achieving superior invariance to data heterogeneity, these approaches are fundamentally limited by their single-layer linear model with a frozen pre-trained backbone. As a result, they can only achieve suboptimal performance due to their lack of representation learning capabilities.
