Psychological theories, such as the Cognitive-Affective Personality Systems, provide a crucial explanation for this failure: a persona's influence on behavior is not static but varies with the scenarios. This context-dependence highlights the critical need for adaptive persona management. To address this gap, we propose a novel, theory-driven method that dynamically estimates context-dependent persona importance and integrates it into weighted reward-guided decoding, enabling inference-time persona following. Specifically, we introduce the Persona Dynamic Decoding (PDD) framework, which consists of two key components: (1) Persona Importance Estimation (PIE) module, which dynamically quantifies the contextual importance of persona attributes without requiring ground-truth supervision; and (2) Persona-Guided Inference-Time Alignment (PIA) paradigm, which leverages these importance scores to construct weighted multi-objective rewards and modulate generation probabilities during inference. Extensive experiments show the effectiveness of our method in utterance consistency and behavioral fidelity.

AI.tldr: 提出了Persona Dynamic Decoding (PDD)框架，通过动态估计角色重要性并集成到加权奖励引导的解码中，实现推理时角色跟随，提升角色扮演语言代理在社会学研究中的真实性。
AI.motivation: 现有角色扮演语言代理在社会学研究中存在局限性：静态提示工程或昂贵微调无法适应动态场景。心理学理论（如认知-情感人格系统）表明角色对行为的影响不是静态的，而是随场景变化的，因此需要自适应角色管理。
AI.method: 提出Persona Dynamic Decoding (PDD)框架，包含两个关键组件：1) Persona Importance Estimation (PIE)模块，动态量化角色属性的上下文重要性，无需真实监督；2) Persona-Guided Inference-Time Alignment (PIA)范式，利用重要性分数构建加权多目标奖励，在推理时调节生成概率。
AI.result: 大量实验表明该方法在话语一致性和行为保真度方面有效。
AI.conclusion: 提出的理论驱动方法能够动态估计上下文依赖的角色重要性，并通过加权奖励引导解码实现推理时角色跟随，解决了现有方法在动态场景中角色适应的局限性。

title: MARS: Harmonizing Multimodal Convergence via Adaptive Rank Search
comment: 17 pages; Project Page: this https URL: https://minkyoungcho.github.io/mars/
summary: Fine-tuning Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) with parameter-efficient methods like Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) is crucial for task adaptation. However, imbalanced training dynamics across modalities often lead to suboptimal accuracy due to negative interference, a challenge typically addressed with inefficient heuristic methods such as manually tuning separate learning rates. To overcome this, we introduce MARS (Multimodal Adaptive Rank Search), an approach to discover optimal rank pairs that balance training dynamics while maximizing performance. Our key innovation, a proposed framework of dual scaling laws, enables this search: one law models module-specific convergence time to prune the search space to candidates with aligned dynamics, while the other predicts final task performance to select the optimal pair from the pruned set. By re-purposing the LoRA rank as a controller for modality-specific convergence speed, MARS outperforms baseline methods and provides a robust, automated strategy for optimizing MLLM fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: MARS：一种通过双尺度定律自动搜索最优LoRA秩对的方法，用于平衡多模态大语言模型微调中的训练动态，解决模态间不平衡导致的负干扰问题。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型使用参数高效方法（如LoRA）进行微调时，不同模态间的训练动态不平衡会导致负干扰和次优精度。现有方法通常依赖低效的启发式方法（如手动调整不同学习率），需要更自动化的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出MARS方法，通过双尺度定律框架自动搜索最优LoRA秩对：1）模块特定收敛时间尺度定律，用于剪枝搜索空间，找到训练动态对齐的候选秩对；2）最终任务性能预测尺度定律，从剪枝后的集合中选择最优秩对。将LoRA秩重新用作模态特定收敛速度的控制器。
AI.result: MARS方法优于基线方法，为MLLM微调优化提供了鲁棒、自动化的策略。
AI.conclusion: MARS通过双尺度定律框架自动搜索最优LoRA秩对，有效解决了多模态微调中的训练动态不平衡问题，为参数高效微调提供了更智能的优化方法。

title: Pharmacology Knowledge Graphs: Do We Need Chemical Structure for Drug Repurposing?
comment: 34 pages, 5 figures. Under review at Discover Artificial Intelligence
summary: The contributions of model complexity, data volume, and feature modalities to knowledge graph-based drug repurposing remain poorly quantified under rigorous temporal validation. We constructed a pharmacology knowledge graph from ChEMBL 36 comprising 5,348 entities including 3,127 drugs, 1,156 proteins, and 1,065 indications. A strict temporal split was enforced with training data up to 2022 and testing data from 2023 to 2025, together with biologically verified hard negatives mined from failed assays and clinical trials. We benchmarked five knowledge graph embedding models and a standard graph neural network with 3.44 million parameters that incorporates drug chemical structure using a graph attention encoder and ESM-2 protein embeddings. Scaling experiments ranging from 0.78 to 9.75 million parameters and from 25 to 100 percent of the data, together with feature ablation studies, were used to isolate the contributions of model capacity, graph density, and node feature modalities. Removing the graph attention based drug structure encoder and retaining only topological embeddings combined with ESM-2 protein features improved drug protein PR-AUC from 0.5631 to 0.5785 while reducing VRAM usage from 5.30 GB to 353 MB. Replacing the drug encoder with Morgan fingerprints further degraded performance, indicating that explicit chemical structure representations can be detrimental for predicting pharmacological network interactions. Increasing model size beyond 2.44 million parameters yielded diminishing returns, whereas increasing training data consistently improved performance. External validation confirmed 6 of the top 14 novel predictions as established therapeutic indications. These results show that drug pharmacological behavior can be accurately predicted using target-centric information and drug network topology alone, without requiring explicit chemical structure representations.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过严格的时间验证量化了模型复杂度、数据量和特征模态对基于知识图谱的药物重定位的影响，发现药物网络拓扑结构和靶点信息足以准确预测药理行为，无需显式化学结构表示。
AI.motivation: 药物重定位中模型复杂度、数据量和特征模态的贡献在严格时间验证下仍缺乏量化。研究旨在通过构建药理学知识图谱，在时间分割验证框架下，系统评估这些因素对预测性能的影响。
AI.method: 构建包含5,348个实体（3,127种药物、1,156种蛋白质、1,065种适应症）的药理学知识图谱，采用严格时间分割（训练数据至2022年，测试数据2023-2025年）。评估5种知识图谱嵌入模型和包含344万参数的图神经网络，该网络使用图注意力编码器处理药物化学结构和ESM-2蛋白质嵌入。进行规模实验（参数0.78-9.75百万，数据25-100%）和特征消融研究。
AI.result: 去除基于图注意力的药物结构编码器，仅保留拓扑嵌入和ESM-2蛋白质特征，药物-蛋白质PR-AUC从0.5631提升至0.5785，同时VRAM使用从5.30GB降至353MB。使用Morgan指纹进一步降低性能。模型参数超过244万后收益递减，而增加训练数据持续提升性能。外部验证确认了前14个新预测中的6个为已知治疗适应症。
AI.conclusion: 药物药理行为可以通过靶点中心信息和药物网络拓扑结构准确预测，无需显式化学结构表示。模型容量超过一定阈值后收益有限，而数据量对性能提升更为关键。

title: DreamWorld: Unified World Modeling in Video Generation
summary: Despite impressive progress in video generation, existing models remain limited to surface-level plausibility, lacking a coherent and unified understanding of the world. Prior approaches typically incorporate only a single form of world-related knowledge or rely on rigid alignment strategies to introduce additional knowledge. However, aligning the single world knowledge is insufficient to constitute a world model that requires jointly modeling multiple heterogeneous dimensions (e.g., physical commonsense, 3D and temporal consistency). To address this limitation, we introduce \textbf{DreamWorld}, a unified framework that integrates complementary world knowledge into video generators via a \textbf{Joint World Modeling Paradigm}, jointly predicting video pixels and features from foundation models to capture temporal dynamics, spatial geometry, and semantic consistency. However, naively optimizing these heterogeneous objectives can lead to visual instability and temporal flickering. To mitigate this issue, we propose \textit{Consistent Constraint Annealing (CCA)} to progressively regulate world-level constraints during training, and \textit{Multi-Source Inner-Guidance} to enforce learned world priors at inference. Extensive evaluations show that DreamWorld improves world consistency, outperforming Wan2.1 by 2.26 points on VBench. Code will be made publicly available at \href{https://github.com/ABU121111/DreamWorld}{\textcolor{mypink}{\textbf{Github}}}.

AI.tldr: DreamWorld是一个统一的视频生成框架，通过联合世界建模范式整合多种世界知识（物理常识、3D一致性、时间一致性），使用一致性约束退火和多源内部引导来解决异质目标优化中的视觉不稳定问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视频生成模型仅限于表面合理性，缺乏对世界的连贯统一理解。先前方法通常只包含单一形式的世界相关知识或依赖刚性对齐策略，但单一世界知识不足以构成需要联合建模多个异质维度（物理常识、3D和时间一致性）的世界模型。
AI.method: 提出DreamWorld框架，采用联合世界建模范式，同时预测视频像素和基础模型特征以捕捉时间动态、空间几何和语义一致性。为解决异质目标优化导致的视觉不稳定问题，提出一致性约束退火（CCA）在训练中逐步调节世界级约束，以及多源内部引导在推理时强制执行学习到的世界先验。
AI.result: 广泛评估显示DreamWorld提高了世界一致性，在VBench基准上比Wan2.1高出2.26分。
AI.conclusion: DreamWorld通过联合建模多种世界知识维度，为视频生成提供了更连贯统一的世界理解框架，显著提升了生成视频的世界一致性。

title: Anatomy of the Modality Gap: Dissecting the Internal States of End-to-End Speech LLMs
summary: Recent advancements in Large Speech-Language Models have significantly bridged the gap between acoustic signals and linguistic understanding. However, a persistent performance disparity remains in speech-based input tasks compared to direct text inference. In this paper, we investigate the dynamic roots of this modality gap beyond static geometric alignment, analyzing how speech and text representations evolve layer-by-layer. We evaluate four open-weight end-to-end models on SpeechMMLU and VoiceBench BBH. Using cross-layer CKA analysis with speech-text token alignment, we find that speech representations exhibit a broad cross-layer alignment band, attributable to the redundant nature of speech where semantic content spans multiple frames. We show that these alignment patterns are structurally stable across different analysis configurations. Crucially, simple statistical calibration is insufficient and can be detrimental when applied at the input layer, indicating that the modality gap is not a mere distribution shift. Overall, our results suggest that the bottleneck lies in condensing redundant speech into stable late-layer decisions, motivating future solutions that operate at the token or temporal granularity instead of feature-level matching.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究语音与文本模态之间的性能差距，发现语音表示存在跨层对齐带，瓶颈在于将冗余语音信息压缩为稳定的高层决策，而非简单的特征分布偏移。
AI.motivation: 尽管大型语音语言模型取得了进展，但在语音输入任务中仍存在与文本推理的性能差距。作者旨在超越静态几何对齐，探究语音和文本表示在层间演化的动态根源。
AI.method: 评估四个开源端到端模型在SpeechMMLU和VoiceBench BBH上的表现，使用跨层CKA分析结合语音-文本token对齐，分析语音表示的跨层对齐模式。
AI.result: 发现语音表示存在广泛的跨层对齐带，这归因于语音的冗余特性（语义内容跨越多个帧）。这些对齐模式在不同分析配置下结构稳定，简单的统计校准在输入层应用时可能有害，表明模态差距不是简单的分布偏移。
AI.conclusion: 性能瓶颈在于将冗余语音压缩为稳定的高层决策，未来解决方案应在token或时间粒度上操作，而非特征级匹配。

title: To Use or not to Use Muon: How Simplicity Bias in Optimizers Matters
summary: For a long period of time, Adam has served as the ubiquitous default choice for training deep neural networks. Recently, many new optimizers have been introduced, out of which Muon has perhaps gained the highest popularity due to its superior training speed. While many papers set out to validate the benefits of Muon, our paper investigates the potential downsides stemming from the mechanism driving this speedup. We explore the biases induced when optimizing with Muon, providing theoretical analysis and its consequences to the learning trajectories and solutions learned. While the theory does provide justification for the benefits Muon brings, it also guides our intuition when coming up with a couple of examples where Muon-optimized models have disadvantages. The core problem we emphasize is that Muon optimization removes a simplicity bias that is naturally preserved by older, more thoroughly studied methods like Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD). We take first steps toward understanding consequences this may have: Muon might struggle to uncover common underlying structure across tasks, and be more prone to fitting spurious features. More broadly, this paper should serve as a reminder: when developing new optimizers, it is essential to consider the biases they introduce, as these biases can fundamentally change a model's behavior -- for better or for worse.

AI.tldr: 该论文探讨了Muon优化器的潜在缺点，特别是它如何移除了SGD等传统方法自然保留的简单性偏置，可能导致模型难以发现跨任务的共同底层结构，更容易拟合虚假特征。
AI.motivation: 虽然Muon因其优越的训练速度而广受欢迎，但现有研究主要关注其优点。本文旨在研究Muon优化机制可能带来的潜在负面影响，特别是其引入的偏置如何影响学习轨迹和最终学到的解。
AI.method: 通过理论分析Muon优化机制，探讨其引入的偏置及其对学习轨迹和解决方案的影响。理论分析既为Muon带来的好处提供依据，也指导构建Muon优化模型存在劣势的具体示例。
AI.result: 研究发现Muon优化移除了SGD等传统方法自然保留的简单性偏置。这可能导致模型难以发现跨任务的共同底层结构，更容易拟合虚假特征。论文提供了理论分析和具体示例来支持这一发现。
AI.conclusion: 开发新优化器时必须考虑它们引入的偏置，因为这些偏置可能从根本上改变模型的行为——无论是好是坏。Muon虽然训练速度快，但可能牺牲了模型的泛化能力和对底层结构的发现能力。

title: Graph-Based Self-Healing Tool Routing for Cost-Efficient LLM Agents
comment: Working paper. 27 references, 13 figures, 8 tables, pseudocode appendix
summary: Tool-using LLM agents face a reliability-cost tradeoff: routing every decision through the LLM improves correctness but incurs high latency and inference cost, while pre-coded workflow graphs reduce cost but become brittle under unanticipated compound tool failures. We present Self-Healing Router, a fault-tolerant orchestration architecture that treats most agent control-flow decisions as routing rather than reasoning. The system combines (i) parallel health monitors that assign priority scores to runtime conditions such as tool outages and risk signals, and (ii) a cost-weighted tool graph where Dijkstra's algorithm performs deterministic shortest-path routing. When a tool fails mid-execution, its edges are reweighted to infinity and the path is recomputed -- yielding automatic recovery without invoking the LLM. The LLM is reserved exclusively for cases where no feasible path exists, enabling goal demotion or escalation. Prior graph-based tool-use systems (ControlLLM, ToolNet, NaviAgent) focus on tool selection and planning; our contribution is runtime fault tolerance with deterministic recovery and binary observability -- every failure is either a logged reroute or an explicit escalation, never a silent skip. Across 19 scenarios spanning three graph topologies (linear pipeline, dependency DAG, parallel fan-out), Self-Healing Router matches ReAct's correctness while reducing control-plane LLM calls by 93% (9 vs 123 aggregate) and eliminating the silent-failure cases observed in a well-engineered static workflow baseline under compound failures.

AI.tldr: Self-Healing Router：一种故障容错的LLM代理编排架构，通过并行健康监控和成本加权工具图实现确定性最短路径路由，在工具故障时自动恢复而无需调用LLM，显著降低控制平面LLM调用次数。
AI.motivation: 工具使用的LLM代理面临可靠性-成本权衡：每次决策都通过LLM路由提高正确性但带来高延迟和推理成本，而预编码的工作流图降低成本但在意外复合故障下变得脆弱。需要一种既能保持可靠性又能降低成本的故障容错编排架构。
AI.method: 结合并行健康监控器（为工具中断和风险信号等运行时条件分配优先级分数）和成本加权工具图（使用Dijkstra算法进行确定性最短路径路由）。当工具故障时，其边权重设为无穷大并重新计算路径，实现无需LLM的自动恢复。LLM仅在无可行路径时使用，用于目标降级或升级。
AI.result: 在19个场景跨越三种图拓扑（线性管道、依赖DAG、并行扇出）中，Self-Healing Router匹配ReAct的正确性，同时将控制平面LLM调用减少93%（9次vs 123次），并消除了在复合故障下静态工作流基线中观察到的静默故障情况。
AI.conclusion: 该工作提出了一种新颖的故障容错LLM代理编排架构，通过将大多数控制流决策视为路由而非推理，实现了确定性恢复和二进制可观测性，显著降低了LLM调用成本同时保持了可靠性。

title: High Dynamic Range Imaging Based on an Asymmetric Event-SVE Camera System
comment: This paper has been accepted by Optics Express
summary: High dynamic range (HDR) imaging under extreme illumination remains challenging for conventional cameras due to overexposure. Event cameras provide microsecond temporal resolution and high dynamic range, while spatially varying exposure (SVE) sensors offer single-shot radiometric diversity.We present a hardware--algorithm co-designed HDR imaging system that tightly integrates an SVE micro-attenuation camera with an event sensor in an asymmetric dual-modality configuration. To handle non-coaxial geometry and heterogeneous optics, we develop a two-stage cross-modal alignment framework that combines feature-guided coarse homography estimation with a multi-scale refinement module based on spatial pooling and frequency-domain filtering. On top of aligned representations, we develop a cross-modal HDR reconstruction network with convolutional fusion, mutual-information regularization, and a learnable fusion loss that adaptively balances intensity cues and event-derived structural constraints. Comprehensive experiments on both synthetic benchmarks and real captures demonstrate that the proposed system consistently improves highlight recovery, edge fidelity, and robustness compared with frame-only or event-only HDR pipelines. The results indicate that jointly optimizing optical design, cross-modal alignment, and computational fusion provides an effective foundation for reliable HDR perception in highly dynamic and radiometrically challenging environments.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种硬件-算法协同设计的高动态范围成像系统，将空间变化曝光传感器与事件传感器集成，通过跨模态对齐和融合网络实现极端光照下的高质量HDR成像。
AI.motivation: 传统相机在极端光照条件下存在过曝问题，事件相机具有微秒级时间分辨率和高动态范围，而空间变化曝光传感器提供单次曝光下的辐射多样性。如何有效整合这两种传感器以解决极端光照下的HDR成像挑战是主要动机。
AI.method: 1) 硬件设计：非对称双模态配置，集成SVE微衰减相机和事件传感器；2) 两阶段跨模态对齐框架：特征引导的粗单应性估计 + 基于空间池化和频域滤波的多尺度细化模块；3) 跨模态HDR重建网络：卷积融合、互信息正则化和可学习的融合损失，自适应平衡强度线索和事件驱动的结构约束。
AI.result: 在合成基准测试和真实捕获数据上的综合实验表明，相比仅使用帧或仅使用事件的HDR流程，所提系统在亮部恢复、边缘保真度和鲁棒性方面持续改进。
AI.conclusion: 联合优化光学设计、跨模态对齐和计算融合为在高度动态和辐射挑战性环境中实现可靠的HDR感知提供了有效基础。

title: Extracting Training Dialogue Data from Large Language Model based Task Bots
comment: Accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Information Forensics and Security (TIFS). \c{opyright} 2026 IEEE
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have been widely adopted to enhance Task-Oriented Dialogue Systems (TODS) by modeling complex language patterns and delivering contextually appropriate responses. However, this integration introduces significant privacy risks, as LLMs, functioning as soft knowledge bases that compress extensive training data into rich knowledge representations, can inadvertently memorize training dialogue data containing not only identifiable information such as phone numbers but also entire dialogue-level events like complete travel schedules. Despite the critical nature of this privacy concern, how LLM memorization is inherited in developing task bots remains unexplored. In this work, we address this gap through a systematic quantitative study that involves evaluating existing training data extraction attacks, analyzing key characteristics of task-oriented dialogue modeling that render existing methods ineffective, and proposing novel attack techniques tailored for LLM-based TODS that enhance both response sampling and membership inference. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed data extraction attack. Our method can extract thousands of training labels of dialogue states with best-case precision exceeding 70%. Furthermore, we provide an in-depth analysis of training data memorization in LLM-based TODS by identifying and quantifying key influencing factors and discussing targeted mitigation strategies.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了LLM在任务导向对话系统中继承训练数据记忆的隐私风险，提出了针对LLM-TODS的新型数据提取攻击方法，能够以超过70%的精度提取数千个训练标签。
AI.motivation: LLM集成到任务导向对话系统(TODS)中带来了严重的隐私风险，因为LLM作为软知识库会记忆训练数据中的敏感信息（如电话号码、完整行程安排）。目前LLM记忆如何被继承到任务机器人中尚未被探索。
AI.method: 1) 评估现有训练数据提取攻击；2) 分析任务导向对话建模的关键特性；3) 提出针对LLM-TODS的新型攻击技术，增强响应采样和成员推理；4) 实验验证攻击效果。
AI.result: 提出的数据提取攻击方法有效，能够提取数千个训练对话状态标签，最佳情况下精度超过70%。同时深入分析了LLM-TODS中训练数据记忆的关键影响因素。
AI.conclusion: LLM在任务导向对话系统中确实会继承训练数据记忆，存在严重隐私风险。需要针对性的缓解策略来保护敏感信息。

title: ResGene-T: A Tensor-Based Residual Network Approach for Genomic Prediction
comment: Double column 11 Pages, 6 Figure, and 8 Tables
summary:
In this work, we propose a new deep learning model for Genomic Prediction (GP), which involves correlating genotypic data with phenotypic. The genotypes are typically fed as a sequence of characters to the 1D-Convolution Neural Network layer of the underlying deep learning model. Inspired by earlier work that represented genotype as a 2D-image for genotype-phenotype classification, we extend this idea to GP, which is a regression task. We use a ResNet-18 as the underlying architecture, and term this model as ResGene-2D.
  Although the 2D-image representation captures biological interactions well, it requires all the layers of the model to do so. This limits training efficiency. Thus, as seen in the earlier work that proposed a 2D-image representation, our ResGene-2D performs almost the same as other models (3% improvement). To overcome this, we propose a novel idea of converting the 2D-image into a 3D/ tensor and feed this to the ResNet-18 architecture, and term this model as ResGene-T.
  We evaluate our proposed models on three crop species having ten phenotypic traits and compare it with seven most popular models (two statistical, two machine learning, and three deep learning). ResGene-T performs the best among all these seven methods (gains from 14.51% to 41.51%).

AI.tldr: 提出ResGene-2D和ResGene-T两种深度学习模型用于基因组预测，将基因型数据分别表示为2D图像和3D张量，其中ResGene-T在多个作物表型性状上表现最佳。
AI.motivation: 基因组预测需要将基因型数据与表型数据关联，传统方法使用1D-CNN处理序列数据。受先前将基因型表示为2D图像进行分类的启发，本研究将这一思路扩展到回归任务，并进一步改进为3D张量表示以提高训练效率和性能。
AI.method:
1. ResGene-2D：将基因型数据转换为2D图像，使用ResNet-18作为基础架构
2. ResGene-T：将2D图像进一步转换为3D张量，同样使用ResNet-18架构
3. 在三种作物物种的十个表型性状上评估，与七种流行模型（两种统计、两种机器学习、三种深度学习）进行比较
AI.result:
1. ResGene-2D相比其他模型仅有3%的改进，性能提升有限
2. ResGene-T在所有七种对比方法中表现最佳，性能提升从14.51%到41.51%不等
AI.conclusion: 将基因型数据从2D图像表示扩展到3D张量表示能显著提升基因组预测性能，ResGene-T模型在多个作物表型预测任务上取得了最佳结果。

title: State-Action Inpainting Diffuser for Continuous Control with Delay
summary: Signal delay poses a fundamental challenge in continuous control and reinforcement learning (RL) by introducing a temporal gap between interaction and perception. Current solutions have largely evolved along two distinct paradigms: model-free approaches which utilize state augmentation to preserve Markovian properties, and model-based methods which focus on inferring latent beliefs via dynamics modeling. In this paper, we bridge these perspectives by introducing State-Action Inpainting Diffuser (SAID), a framework that integrates the inductive bias of dynamics learning with the direct decision-making capability of policy optimization. By formulating the problem as a joint sequence inpainting task, SAID implicitly captures environmental dynamics while directly generating consistent plans, effectively operating at the intersection of model-based and model-free paradigms. Crucially, this generative formulation allows SAID to be seamlessly applied to both online and offline RL. Extensive experiments on delayed continuous control benchmarks demonstrate that SAID achieves state-of-the-art and robust performance. Our study suggests a new methodology to advance the field of RL with delay.

AI.tldr: SAID是一个结合模型基与无模型方法的延迟控制框架，通过序列修复生成一致的计划，在在线和离线RL中均表现优异。
AI.motivation: 信号延迟在连续控制和强化学习中造成交互与感知之间的时间差距，现有方法分为两类：无模型方法通过状态增强保持马尔可夫性，模型基方法通过动态建模推断潜在信念。本文旨在桥接这两种范式。
AI.method: 提出State-Action Inpainting Diffuser (SAID)框架，将动态学习的归纳偏置与策略优化的直接决策能力结合。通过将问题表述为联合序列修复任务，SAID隐式捕捉环境动态，同时直接生成一致的计划。
AI.result: 在延迟连续控制基准测试中，SAID实现了最先进且稳健的性能，展示了其在延迟RL问题上的优越性。
AI.conclusion: SAID为延迟RL领域提供了新的方法论，成功结合了模型基和无模型范式的优势，在在线和离线设置中均有效。

title: U-VLM: Hierarchical Vision Language Modeling for Report Generation
summary: Automated radiology report generation is key for reducing radiologist workload and improving diagnostic consistency, yet generating accurate reports for 3D medical imaging remains challenging. Existing vision-language models face two limitations: they do not leverage segmentation-pretrained encoders, and they inject visual features only at the input layer of language models, losing multi-scale information. We propose U-VLM, which enables hierarchical vision-language modeling in both training and architecture: (1) progressive training from segmentation to classification to report generation, and (2) multi-layer visual injection that routes U-Net encoder features to corresponding language model layers. Each training stage can leverage different datasets without unified annotations. U-VLM achieves state-of-the-art performance on CT-RATE (F1: 0.414 vs 0.258, BLEU-mean: 0.349 vs 0.305) and AbdomenAtlas 3.0 (F1: 0.624 vs 0.518 for segmentation-based detection) using only a 0.1B decoder trained from scratch, demonstrating that well-designed vision encoder pretraining outweighs the benefits of 7B+ pre-trained language models. Ablation studies show that progressive pretraining significantly improves F1, while multi-layer injection improves BLEU-mean. Code is available at https://github.com/yinghemedical/U-VLM.

AI.tldr: U-VLM：一种用于3D医学影像报告生成的层次化视觉语言模型，通过分割预训练编码器和多层视觉特征注入，在CT-RATE和AbdomenAtlas 3.0上实现SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在3D医学影像报告生成中存在两个局限：1）未利用分割预训练编码器；2）仅在语言模型输入层注入视觉特征，丢失多尺度信息。需要更有效的层次化视觉语言建模方法。
AI.method: 提出U-VLM，包含两个核心设计：1）渐进式训练（分割→分类→报告生成），各阶段可使用不同数据集；2）多层视觉注入，将U-Net编码器特征路由到对应语言模型层。
AI.result: 在CT-RATE上（F1: 0.414 vs 0.258，BLEU-mean: 0.349 vs 0.305）和AbdomenAtlas 3.0上（F1: 0.624 vs 0.518）均达到SOTA。仅使用0.1B解码器从头训练，证明精心设计的视觉编码器预训练优于7B+预训练语言模型。
AI.conclusion: 精心设计的视觉编码器预训练比大规模预训练语言模型更重要。渐进式预训练显著提升F1，多层注入提升BLEU-mean。为医学影像报告生成提供了有效的层次化视觉语言建模框架。

title: Markovian ODE-guided scoring can assess the quality of offline reasoning traces in language models
summary: Reasoning traces produced by generative language models are increasingly used for tasks ranging from mathematical problem solving to automated fact checking. However, existing evaluation methods remain largely mechanical and fail to capture human-centric notions of reasoning quality in a way that generalizes across varied and progressively degraded reasoning. We introduce MarODE, an offline evaluation framework that assigns quality scores to reasoning traces. Its effectiveness is assessed using human-centric perturbations and human judgments, which jointly evaluate the fundamental dimensions of an evaluation metric - goodness and soundness. The approach is grounded in a Markovian formulation of reasoning progression and an ordinary differential equation based characterization of trace dynamics, enabling efficient evaluation of reasoning quality. In a large-scale evaluation, MarODE outperforms existing baselines by over 250% under Somers' D correlation. Our results emphasize the value of theory-driven evaluation frameworks as reasoning traces become central to language model-based systems.

AI.tldr: MarODE：基于马尔可夫推理过程和常微分方程的理论驱动框架，用于评估语言模型生成推理轨迹的质量，在人类中心化评估中显著优于现有基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有推理轨迹评估方法过于机械化，无法捕捉人类对推理质量的理解，且不能适应多样化、逐渐退化的推理场景。需要建立能够跨不同推理类型、捕捉人类中心化质量概念的理论驱动评估框架。
AI.method: 1. 基于马尔可夫过程建模推理进展；2. 使用常微分方程（ODE）表征推理轨迹动态；3. 通过人类中心化扰动和人类判断评估框架的有效性；4. 从"良好性"和"合理性"两个基本维度评估度量指标。
AI.result: 在大规模评估中，MarODE在Somers' D相关性指标上比现有基线方法提升超过250%，显著优于传统评估方法。
AI.conclusion: 理论驱动的评估框架对于语言模型推理系统至关重要，MarODE为推理轨迹质量评估提供了有效解决方案，随着推理轨迹在语言模型系统中日益重要，此类框架的价值将更加凸显。

title: Bi-cLSTM: Residual-Corrected Bidirectional LSTM for Aero-Engine RUL Estimation
summary: Accurate Remaining Useful Life (RUL) prediction is a key requirement for effective Prognostics and Health Management (PHM) in safety-critical systems such as aero-engines. Existing deep learning approaches, particularly LSTM-based models, often struggle to generalize across varying operating conditions and are sensitive to noise in multivariate sensor data. To address these challenges, we propose a novel Bidirectional Residual Corrected LSTM (Bi-cLSTM) model for robust RUL estimation. The proposed architecture combines bidirectional temporal modeling with an adaptive residual correction mechanism to iteratively refine sequence representations. In addition, we introduce a condition-aware preprocessing pipeline incorporating regime-based normalization, feature selection, and exponential smoothing to improve robustness under complex operating environments. Extensive experiments on all four subsets of the NASA C-MAPSS dataset demonstrate that the proposed Bi-cLSTM consistently outperforms LSTM-based baselines and achieves competitive state-of-the-art performance, particularly in challenging multi-condition scenarios. These results highlight the effectiveness of combining bidirectional temporal learning with residual correction for reliable RUL prediction.

AI.tldr: 提出双向残差校正LSTM模型用于航空发动机剩余使用寿命预测，通过双向时序建模和自适应残差校正机制提升多工况下的鲁棒性
AI.motivation: 现有基于LSTM的深度学习方法在多变工况下泛化能力不足，对多变量传感器数据中的噪声敏感，需要更鲁棒的RUL预测方法
AI.method: 提出双向残差校正LSTM模型，结合双向时序建模和自适应残差校正机制；引入基于工况的预处理流程，包括基于运行状态的归一化、特征选择和指数平滑
AI.result: 在NASA C-MAPSS数据集的所有四个子集上均优于LSTM基线，在具有挑战性的多工况场景中达到竞争性的SOTA性能
AI.conclusion: 双向时序学习与残差校正相结合能有效提升RUL预测的可靠性，特别是在复杂运行环境下

title: S5-HES Agent: Society 5.0-driven Agentic Framework to Democratize Smart Home Environment Simulation
summary: The smart home is a key domain within the Society 5.0 vision for a human-centered society. Smart home technologies rapidly evolve, and research should diversify while remaining aligned with Society 5.0 objectives. Democratizing smart home research would engage a broader community of innovators beyond traditional limited experts. This shift necessitates inclusive simulation frameworks that support research across diverse fields in industry and academia. However, existing smart home simulators require significant technical expertise, offer limited adaptability, and lack automated evolution, thereby failing to meet the holistic needs of Society 5.0. These constraints impede researchers from efficiently conducting simulations and experiments for security, energy, health, climate, and socio-economic research. To address these challenges, this paper presents the Society 5.0-driven Smart Home Environment Simulator Agent (S5-HES Agent), an agentic simulation framework that transforms traditional smart home simulation through autonomous AI orchestration. The framework coordinates specialized agents through interchangeable large language models (LLMs), enabling natural-language-driven end-to-end smart home simulation configuration without programming expertise. A retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) pipeline with semantic, keyword, and hybrid search retrieves smart home knowledge. Comprehensive evaluation on S5-HES Agent demonstrates that the RAG pipeline achieves near-optimal retrieval fidelity, simulated device behaviour and threat scenarios align with real-world IoT datasets, and simulation engine scales predictably across home configurations, establishing a stable foundation for Society 5.0 smart home research. Source code is available under the MIT License at https://github.com/AsiriweLab/S5-HES-Agent.

AI.tldr: S5-HES Agent：基于LLM代理的智能家居仿真框架，通过自然语言配置实现端到端仿真，支持安全、能源、健康等多领域研究
AI.motivation: 现有智能家居仿真器需要专业技术知识、适应性有限且缺乏自动化演进，难以满足Society 5.0愿景中多样化研究需求，阻碍了安全、能源、健康等多领域研究
AI.method: 提出基于代理的仿真框架，通过可互换的LLM协调专用代理，实现自然语言驱动的端到端配置；采用RAG管道（语义、关键词和混合搜索）检索智能家居知识
AI.result: RAG管道实现接近最优的检索保真度，模拟设备行为和威胁场景与现实世界IoT数据集一致，仿真引擎在不同家庭配置中可预测扩展
AI.conclusion: S5-HES Agent为Society 5.0智能家居研究建立了稳定基础，通过AI自主编排实现传统智能家居仿真的转型，支持更广泛的研究社区参与

title: TokenCom: Vision-Language Model for Multimodal and Multitask Token Communications
summary: Visual-Language Models (VLMs), with their strong capabilities in image and text understanding, offer a solid foundation for intelligent communications. However, their effectiveness is constrained by limited token granularity, overlong visual token sequences, and inadequate cross-modal alignment. To overcome these challenges, we propose TaiChi, a novel VLM framework designed for token communications. TaiChi adopts a dual-visual tokenizer architecture that processes both high- and low-resolution images to collaboratively capture pixel-level details and global conceptual features. A Bilateral Attention Network (BAN) is introduced to intelligently fuse multi-scale visual tokens, thereby enhancing visual understanding and producing compact visual tokens. In addition, a Kolmogorov Arnold Network (KAN)-based modality projector with learnable activation functions is employed to achieve precise nonlinear alignment from visual features to the text semantic space, thus minimizing information loss. Finally, TaiChi is integrated into a multimodal and multitask token communication system equipped with a joint VLM-channel coding scheme. Experimental results validate the superior performance of TaiChi, as well as the feasibility and effectiveness of the TaiChi-driven token communication system.

AI.tldr: TaiChi是一个新颖的视觉语言模型框架，采用双视觉分词器处理高低分辨率图像，通过双边注意力网络融合多尺度视觉token，并使用KAN-based模态投影器实现视觉到文本语义空间的精确对齐，用于token通信系统。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在智能通信中存在局限性：token粒度有限、视觉token序列过长、跨模态对齐不足，影响了通信效率和效果。
AI.method: 1) 双视觉分词器架构处理高低分辨率图像；2) 双边注意力网络融合多尺度视觉token；3) KAN-based模态投影器实现视觉到文本语义空间的非线性对齐；4) 集成到多模态多任务token通信系统。
AI.result: 实验验证了TaiChi的优越性能，以及TaiChi驱动的token通信系统的可行性和有效性。
AI.conclusion: TaiChi通过创新的架构设计解决了VLM在token通信中的关键挑战，为智能通信提供了有效的解决方案。

title: More Data, Fewer Diacritics: Scaling Arabic TTS
summary: Arabic Text-to-Speech (TTS) research has been hindered by the availability of both publicly available training data and accurate Arabic diacritization models. In this paper, we address the limitation by exploring Arabic TTS training on large automatically annotated data. Namely, we built a robust pipeline for collecting Arabic recordings and processing them automatically using voice activity detection, speech recognition, automatic diacritization, and noise filtering, resulting in around 4,000 hours of Arabic TTS training data. We then trained several robust TTS models with voice cloning using varying amounts of data, namely 100, 1,000, and 4,000 hours with and without diacritization. We show that though models trained on diacritized data are generally better, larger amounts of training data compensate for the lack of diacritics to a significant degree. We plan to release a public Arabic TTS model that works without the need for diacritization.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过构建自动标注管道收集了约4000小时的阿拉伯语TTS训练数据，训练了多个语音克隆模型，发现虽然使用带音标的数据训练效果更好，但大量训练数据可以在很大程度上弥补缺少音标的问题。
AI.motivation: 阿拉伯语文本转语音（TTS）研究一直受到公开训练数据和准确阿拉伯语音标化模型可用性的限制。本研究旨在通过探索在大量自动标注数据上进行阿拉伯语TTS训练来解决这一限制。
AI.method: 构建了一个鲁棒的管道，通过语音活动检测、语音识别、自动音标化和噪声过滤自动收集和处理阿拉伯语录音，获得了约4000小时的训练数据。使用不同数据量（100、1000、4000小时）训练了多个带语音克隆功能的TTS模型，比较了带音标和不带音标数据的效果。
AI.result: 虽然使用带音标数据训练的模型通常表现更好，但大量训练数据可以在很大程度上弥补缺少音标的问题。计划发布一个不需要音标化的公开阿拉伯语TTS模型。
AI.conclusion: 通过大规模自动标注数据可以有效解决阿拉伯语TTS研究中数据稀缺的问题，大量训练数据可以部分替代音标化的需求，为阿拉伯语TTS研究提供了实用的解决方案。

title: General Proximal Flow Networks
summary: This paper introduces General Proximal Flow Networks (GPFNs), a generalization of Bayesian Flow Networks that broadens the class of admissible belief-update operators. In Bayesian Flow Networks, each update step is a Bayesian posterior update, which is equivalent to a proximal step with respect to the Kullback-Leibler divergence. GPFNs replace this fixed choice with an arbitrary divergence or distance function, such as the Wasserstein distance, yielding a unified proximal-operator framework for iterative generative modeling. The corresponding training and sampling procedures are derived, establishing a formal link to proximal optimization and recovering the standard BFN update as a special case. Empirical evaluations confirm that adapting the divergence to the underlying data geometry yields measurable improvements in generation quality, highlighting the practical benefits of this broader framework.

AI.tldr: GPFNs扩展了贝叶斯流网络，将固定的KL散度更新替换为任意散度或距离函数（如Wasserstein距离），建立了迭代生成建模的统一近端算子框架，实验表明适应数据几何的散度选择能提升生成质量。
AI.motivation: 贝叶斯流网络（BFNs）的更新步骤仅限于贝叶斯后验更新（等价于KL散度的近端步骤），限制了其灵活性。本文旨在扩展这一框架，允许使用任意散度或距离函数，以更好地适应不同数据类型的几何结构。
AI.method: 提出广义近端流网络（GPFNs），将BFNs中的固定KL散度更新替换为任意散度或距离函数（如Wasserstein距离）。建立了统一的近端算子框架，推导了相应的训练和采样过程，将标准BFN更新作为特例包含在内。
AI.result: 实验评估表明，根据底层数据几何选择合适的散度函数能显著提升生成质量。该方法为迭代生成建模提供了更灵活的框架，并建立了与近端优化的形式化联系。
AI.conclusion: GPFNs成功扩展了贝叶斯流网络，通过引入任意散度函数提供了更灵活的生成建模框架。该工作将BFNs与近端优化理论联系起来，展示了适应数据几何的散度选择在实际应用中的优势。

title: Benchmarking LLM Summaries of Multimodal Clinical Time Series for Remote Monitoring
summary:
Large language models (LLMs) can generate fluent clinical summaries of remote therapeutic monitoring time series. However, it remains unclear whether these narratives faithfully capture clinically significant events, such as sustained abnormalities. Existing evaluation metrics primarily focus on semantic similarity and linguistic quality, leaving event-level correctness largely unmeasured.
  To address this gap, we introduce an event-based evaluation framework for multimodal time-series summarization using the Technology-Integrated Health Management (TIHM)-1.5 dementia monitoring dataset. Clinically grounded daily events are derived through rule-based abnormal thresholds and temporal persistence criteria. Model-generated summaries are then aligned with these structured facts.
  Our evaluation protocol measures abnormality recall, duration recall, measurement coverage, and hallucinated event mentions. We benchmark three approaches: zero-shot prompting, statistical prompting, and a vision-based pipeline that uses rendered time-series visualizations. The results reveal a striking decoupling between conventional metrics and clinical event fidelity. Models that achieve high semantic similarity scores often exhibit near-zero abnormality recall. In contrast, the vision-based approach demonstrates the strongest event alignment, achieving 45.7% abnormality recall and 100% duration recall.
  These findings underscore the importance of event-aware evaluation to ensure reliable clinical time-series summarization.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个基于事件的评估框架，用于评估多模态时间序列临床摘要生成，重点关注临床事件的忠实度而非传统语义相似性指标。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM生成的临床时间序列摘要主要关注语义相似性和语言质量，但缺乏对临床重要事件（如持续异常）忠实度的评估。现有评估指标无法衡量事件级别的正确性。
AI.method:
1. 使用TIHM-1.5痴呆监测数据集构建基于规则的异常阈值和时间持续性标准来提取临床事件
2. 提出事件评估协议，测量异常召回率、持续时间召回率、测量覆盖率和幻觉事件提及
3. 对比三种方法：零样本提示、统计提示和基于视觉的管道（使用渲染的时间序列可视化）
AI.result:
1. 传统评估指标与临床事件忠实度存在显著脱钩：高语义相似性得分的模型往往具有接近零的异常召回率
2. 基于视觉的方法表现最佳，达到45.7%的异常召回率和100%的持续时间召回率
3. 统计提示方法次之，零样本提示效果最差
AI.conclusion: 为确保可靠的临床时间序列摘要生成，需要采用事件感知的评估方法，而不仅仅是传统的语义相似性指标。基于视觉的方法在事件对齐方面表现最佳。

title: RAISE: Requirement-Adaptive Evolutionary Refinement for Training-Free Text-to-Image Alignment
summary: Recent text-to-image (T2I) diffusion models achieve remarkable realism, yet faithful prompt-image alignment remains challenging, particularly for complex prompts with multiple objects, relations, and fine-grained attributes. Existing training-free inference-time scaling methods rely on fixed iteration budgets that cannot adapt to prompt difficulty, while reflection-tuned models require carefully curated reflection datasets and extensive joint fine-tuning of diffusion and vision-language models, often overfitting to reflection paths data and lacking transferability across models. We introduce RAISE (Requirement-Adaptive Self-Improving Evolution), a training-free, requirement-driven evolutionary framework for adaptive T2I generation. RAISE formulates image generation as a requirement-driven adaptive scaling process, evolving a population of candidates at inference time through a diverse set of refinement actions-including prompt rewriting, noise resampling, and instructional editing. Each generation is verified against a structured checklist of requirements, enabling the system to dynamically identify unsatisfied items and allocate further computation only where needed. This achieves adaptive test-time scaling that aligns computational effort with semantic query complexity. On GenEval and DrawBench, RAISE attains state-of-the-art alignment (0.94 overall GenEval) while incurring fewer generated samples (reduced by 30-40%) and VLM calls (reduced by 80%) than prior scaling and reflection-tuned baselines, demonstrating efficient, generalizable, and model-agnostic multi-round self-improvement. Code is available at https://github.com/LiyaoJiang1998/RAISE.

AI.tldr: RAISE是一个无需训练、需求驱动的进化框架，用于自适应文本到图像生成。它通过动态分配计算资源来适应提示复杂度，在推理时进化候选图像，使用多种细化操作，并通过结构化检查清单验证生成结果。
AI.motivation: 当前文本到图像扩散模型在复杂提示（多对象、关系和细粒度属性）下的忠实对齐仍然具有挑战性。现有方法要么使用固定的迭代预算无法适应提示难度，要么需要精心策划的反思数据集和大量联合微调，容易过拟合且缺乏跨模型可迁移性。
AI.method: RAISE将图像生成建模为需求驱动的自适应缩放过程，在推理时通过多样化细化操作（提示重写、噪声重采样、指令编辑）进化候选图像种群。使用结构化需求检查清单验证每代结果，动态识别未满足项并仅在需要处分配进一步计算。
AI.result: 在GenEval和DrawBench上，RAISE实现了最先进的对齐性能（GenEval总体0.94），同时比现有缩放和反思调优基线减少了30-40%的生成样本和80%的视觉语言模型调用，展示了高效、可泛化、模型无关的多轮自我改进能力。
AI.conclusion: RAISE提供了一种无需训练的自适应推理框架，能够根据语义查询复杂度动态调整计算努力，在保持高性能的同时显著减少计算开销，具有模型无关性和可泛化性。

title: Measuring What VLMs Don't Say: Validation Metrics Hide Clinical Terminology Erasure in Radiology Report Generation
comment: This is an extended version of a manuscript currently under review
summary: Reliable deployment of Vision-Language Models (VLMs) in radiology requires validation metrics that go beyond surface-level text similarity to ensure clinical fidelity and demographic fairness. This paper investigates a critical blind spot in current model evaluation: the use of decoding strategies that lead to high aggregate token-overlap scores despite succumbing to template collapse, in which models generate only repetitive, safe generic text and omit clinical terminology. Unaddressed, this blind spot can lead to metric gaming, where models that perform well on benchmarks prove clinically uninformative. Instead, we advocate for lexical diversity measures to check model generations for clinical specificity. We introduce Clinical Association Displacement (CAD), a vocabulary-level framework that quantifies shifts in demographic-based word associations in generated reports. Weighted Association Erasure (WAE) aggregates these shifts to measure the clinical signal loss across demographic groups. We show that deterministic decoding produces high levels of semantic erasure, while stochastic sampling generates diverse outputs but risks introducing new bias, motivating a fundamental rethink of how "optimal" reporting is defined.

AI.tldr: 论文提出临床关联位移(CAD)框架，用于评估放射学视觉语言模型生成报告的临床保真度和人口统计学公平性，揭示确定性解码导致模板崩溃问题，而随机采样虽增加多样性但可能引入新偏见。
AI.motivation: 当前放射学VLM评估存在盲点：解码策略导致高聚合token重叠分数，但模型生成重复、安全的通用文本，缺乏临床术语（模板崩溃）。这可能导致指标博弈，使在基准测试中表现良好的模型在临床上无信息价值。
AI.method: 引入临床关联位移(CAD)框架，在词汇层面量化生成报告中基于人口统计学的词关联变化。加权关联擦除(WAE)聚合这些变化以测量跨人口统计学群体的临床信号损失。比较确定性解码与随机采样的表现。
AI.result: 确定性解码产生高水平的语义擦除（模板崩溃），而随机采样生成多样化输出但可能引入新偏见。这需要对"最优"报告定义进行根本性重新思考。
AI.conclusion: 需要超越表面文本相似性的评估指标，采用词汇多样性测量来检查临床特异性。CAD/WAE框架能有效检测人口统计学公平性和临床保真度问题，揭示当前解码策略的局限性。

title: Identifying and Characterising Response in Clinical Trials: Development and Validation of a Machine Learning Approach in Colorectal Cancer
summary: Precision medicine promises to transform health care by offering individualised treatments that dramatically improve clinical outcomes. A necessary prerequisite is to identify subgroups of patients who respond differently to different therapies. Current approaches are limited to static measures of treatment success, neglecting the repeated measures found in most clinical trials. Our approach combines the concept of partly conditional modelling with treatment effect estimation based on the Virtual Twins method. The resulting time-specific responses to treatment are characterised using survLIME, an extension of Local Interpretable Model-agnostic Explanations (LIME) to survival data. Performance was evaluated using synthetic data and applied to clinical trials examining the effectiveness of panitumumab to treat metastatic colorectal cancer. An area under the receiver operating characteristic curve (AUC) of 0.77 for identifying fixed responders was achieved in a 1000 patient simulation. When considering dynamic responders, partly conditional modelling increased the AUC from 0.597 to 0.685. Applying the approach to colorectal cancer trials found genetic mutations, sites of metastasis, and ethnicity as important factors for response to treatment. Our approach can accommodate a dynamic response to treatment while potentially providing better performance than existing methods in instances of a fixed response to treatment. When applied to clinical data we attain results consistent with the literature.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种结合部分条件建模和虚拟双胞胎方法的治疗效应估计方法，用于识别临床试验中对治疗有不同响应的患者亚组，并利用survLIME进行时间特异性解释。
AI.motivation: 精准医疗需要识别对治疗有不同响应的患者亚组。当前方法局限于静态的治疗成功度量，忽略了临床试验中常见的重复测量数据。需要开发能够处理动态治疗响应的方法。
AI.method: 结合部分条件建模概念与基于虚拟双胞胎方法的治疗效应估计，使用survLIME（LIME在生存数据上的扩展）来表征时间特异性治疗响应。
AI.result: 在1000名患者的模拟中，识别固定响应者的AUC达到0.77。对于动态响应者，部分条件建模将AUC从0.597提高到0.685。在结直肠癌试验应用中，发现基因突变、转移部位和种族是治疗响应的重要影响因素。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够适应动态治疗响应，在固定响应情况下可能比现有方法表现更好。应用于临床数据时，结果与文献一致，为精准医疗提供了有效的患者亚组识别工具。

title: RubricBench: Aligning Model-Generated Rubrics with Human Standards
summary: As Large Language Model (LLM) alignment evolves from simple completions to complex, highly sophisticated generation, Reward Models are increasingly shifting toward rubric-guided evaluation to mitigate surface-level biases. However, the community lacks a unified benchmark to assess this evaluation paradigm, as existing benchmarks lack both the discriminative complexity and the ground-truth rubric annotations required for rigorous analysis. To bridge this gap, we introduce RubricBench, a curated benchmark with 1,147 pairwise comparisons specifically designed to assess the reliability of rubric-based evaluation. Our construction employs a multi-dimensional filtration pipeline to target hard samples featuring nuanced input complexity and misleading surface bias, augmenting each with expert-annotated, atomic rubrics derived strictly from instructions. Comprehensive experiments reveal a substantial capability gap between human-annotated and model-generated rubrics, indicating that even state-of-the-art models struggle to autonomously specify valid evaluation criteria, lagging considerably behind human-guided performance.

AI.tldr: 提出了RubricBench基准，包含1,147对比较样本，专门评估基于评分标准的评估方法的可靠性，发现人类标注与模型生成评分标准之间存在显著能力差距。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM对齐从简单补全转向复杂生成，奖励模型逐渐转向基于评分标准的评估以减轻表面偏见。但社区缺乏统一基准来评估这种范式，现有基准既缺乏判别复杂性，也缺乏用于严格分析的真实评分标准标注。
AI.method: 构建RubricBench基准，采用多维过滤管道针对具有细微输入复杂性和误导性表面偏见的困难样本，为每个样本添加基于指令严格推导的专家标注原子评分标准。
AI.result: 综合实验揭示了人类标注与模型生成评分标准之间的显著能力差距，表明即使最先进的模型也难以自主指定有效的评估标准，远落后于人类指导的性能。
AI.conclusion: 需要更好的基准来评估基于评分标准的评估范式，当前模型在自主生成有效评分标准方面能力有限，人类指导仍然至关重要。

title: Random Wins All: Rethinking Grouping Strategies for Vision Tokens
summary: Since Transformers are introduced into vision architectures, their quadratic complexity has always been a significant issue that many research efforts aim to address. A representative approach involves grouping tokens, performing self-attention calculations within each group, or pooling the tokens within each group into a single token. To this end, various carefully designed grouping strategies have been proposed to enhance the performance of Vision Transformers. Here, we pose the following questions: \textbf{Are these carefully designed grouping methods truly necessary? Is there a simpler and more unified token grouping method that can replace these diverse methods?} Therefore, we propose the random grouping strategy, which involves a simple and fast random grouping strategy for vision tokens. We validate this approach on multiple baselines, and experiments show that random grouping almost outperforms all other grouping methods. When transferred to downstream tasks, such as object detection, random grouping demonstrates even more pronounced advantages. In response to this phenomenon, we conduct a detailed analysis of the advantages of random grouping from multiple perspectives and identify several crucial elements for the design of grouping strategies: positional information, head feature diversity, global receptive field, and fixed grouping pattern. We demonstrate that as long as these four conditions are met, vision tokens require only an extremely simple grouping strategy to efficiently and effectively handle various visual tasks. We also validate the effectiveness of our proposed random method across multiple modalities, including visual tasks, point cloud processing, and vision-language models. Code will be available at https://github.com/qhfan/random.

AI.tldr: 本文提出随机分组策略替代复杂的视觉Transformer分组方法，实验表明随机分组在多种视觉任务中优于现有精心设计的分组方法。
AI.motivation: 针对视觉Transformer中二次复杂度问题，现有研究提出了各种精心设计的token分组策略。本文质疑这些复杂方法的必要性，探索是否存在更简单统一的替代方案。
AI.method: 提出随机分组策略：对视觉token进行简单快速的随机分组，替代复杂的专门设计的分组方法。在多个基准模型上验证，并分析其优势的关键要素。
AI.result: 随机分组在多种视觉任务中几乎优于所有其他分组方法，在下游任务（如目标检测）中优势更明显。该方法在视觉、点云、视觉语言等多模态任务中均有效。
AI.conclusion: 只要满足位置信息、头特征多样性、全局感受野和固定分组模式四个条件，视觉token仅需极简分组策略即可高效处理各种视觉任务。

title: Learning to Draft: Adaptive Speculative Decoding with Reinforcement Learning
summary: Speculative decoding accelerates large language model (LLM) inference by using a small draft model to generate candidate tokens for a larger target model to verify. The efficacy of this technique hinges on the trade-off between the time spent on drafting candidates and verifying them. However, current state-of-the-art methods rely on a static time allocation, while recent dynamic approaches optimize for proxy metrics like acceptance length, often neglecting the true time cost and treating the drafting and verification phases in isolation. To address these limitations, we introduce Learning to Draft (LTD), a novel method that directly optimizes for throughput of each draft-and-verify cycle. We formulate the problem as a reinforcement learning environment and train two co-adaptive policies to dynamically coordinate the draft and verification phases. This encourages the policies to adapt to each other and explicitly maximize decoding efficiency. We conducted extensive evaluations on five diverse LLMs and four distinct tasks. Our results show that LTD achieves speedup ratios ranging from 2.24x to 4.32x, outperforming the state-of-the-art method Eagle3 up to 36.4%.

AI.tldr: LTD（Learning to Draft）是一种通过强化学习动态协调草稿和验证阶段的推测解码方法，直接优化每个草稿-验证周期的吞吐量，在多种LLM和任务上实现了2.24-4.32倍的加速，比现有最佳方法Eagle3提升达36.4%。
AI.motivation: 当前推测解码方法存在两个主要问题：1）使用静态时间分配策略，无法根据实际解码情况动态调整；2）最近的动态方法优化的是接受长度等代理指标，忽略了真实时间成本，且将草稿和验证阶段孤立处理。这些限制影响了LLM推理的实际加速效果。
AI.method: 提出LTD方法，将问题建模为强化学习环境，训练两个协同适应的策略来动态协调草稿和验证阶段。这两个策略相互适应，明确最大化解码效率，直接优化每个草稿-验证周期的吞吐量。
AI.result: 在5个不同的LLM和4个不同任务上进行了广泛评估。LTD实现了2.24-4.32倍的加速比，比当前最先进的Eagle3方法提升了最高36.4%的性能。
AI.conclusion: LTD通过强化学习动态协调草稿和验证阶段，直接优化吞吐量，显著提升了推测解码的效率，为LLM推理加速提供了更有效的解决方案。

title: Interpretable Cross-Network Attention for Resting-State fMRI Representation Learning
summary: Understanding how large-scale functional brain networks reorganize during cognitive decline remains a central challenge in neuroimaging. While recent self-supervised models have shown promise for learning representations from resting-state fMRI, their internal mechanisms are difficult to interpret, limiting mechanistic insight. We propose BrainInterNet, a network-aware self-supervised framework based on masked reconstruction with cross-attention that explicitly models inter-network dependencies in rs-fMRI. By selectively masking predefined functional networks and reconstructing them from remaining context, our approach enables direct quantification of network predictability and interpretable analysis of cross-network interactions. We train BrainInterNet on multi-cohort fMRI data (from the ABCD, HCP Development, HCP Young Adults, and HCP Aging datasets) and evaluate on the Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative (ADNI) dataset, in total comprising 5,582 recordings. Our method reveals systematic alterations in the brain's network interactions under AD, including in the default mode, limbic, and attention networks. In parallel, the learned representations support accurate Alzheimer's-spectrum classification and yield a compact summary marker that tracks disease severity longitudinally. Together, these results demonstrate that network-guided masked modeling with cross-attention provides an interpretable and effective framework for characterizing functional reorganization in neurodegeneration.

AI.tldr: BrainInterNet：基于跨注意力掩码重建的网络感知自监督框架，用于分析阿尔茨海默病中的功能网络重组
AI.motivation: 理解大规模功能脑网络在认知衰退期间如何重组是神经影像学的核心挑战。现有的自监督模型虽然能从静息态fMRI学习表征，但其内部机制难以解释，限制了机制性洞察。
AI.method: 提出BrainInterNet，基于掩码重建和跨注意力的网络感知自监督框架，显式建模rs-fMRI中的网络间依赖关系。通过选择性掩码预定义功能网络并从剩余上下文重建，实现网络可预测性的直接量化和跨网络交互的可解释分析。
AI.result: 在多队列fMRI数据（ABCD、HCP Development、HCP Young Adults、HCP Aging）上训练，在ADNI数据集上评估（共5,582个记录）。方法揭示了AD下脑网络交互的系统性改变，包括默认模式网络、边缘系统和注意网络。学习到的表征支持准确的阿尔茨海默病谱系分类，并产生跟踪疾病严重程度的紧凑总结标记。
AI.conclusion: 网络引导的掩码建模与跨注意力为表征神经退行性疾病中的功能重组提供了可解释且有效的框架。

title: Beyond Length Scaling: Synergizing Breadth and Depth for Generative Reward Models
summary: Recent advancements in Generative Reward Models (GRMs) have demonstrated that scaling the length of Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning considerably enhances the reliability of evaluation. However, current works predominantly rely on unstructured length scaling, ignoring the divergent efficacy of different reasoning mechanisms: Breadth-CoT (B-CoT, i.e., multi-dimensional principle coverage) and Depth-CoT (D-CoT, i.e., substantive judgment soundness). To address this, we introduce Mix-GRM, a framework that reconfigures raw rationales into structured B-CoT and D-CoT through a modular synthesis pipeline, subsequently employing Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) and Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) to internalize and optimize these mechanisms. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that Mix-GRM establishes a new state-of-the-art across five benchmarks, surpassing leading open-source RMs by an average of 8.2\%. Our results reveal a clear divergence in reasoning: B-CoT benefits subjective preference tasks, whereas D-CoT excels in objective correctness tasks. Consequently, misaligning the reasoning mechanism with the task directly degrades performance. Furthermore, we demonstrate that RLVR acts as a switching amplifier, inducing an emergent polarization where the model spontaneously allocates its reasoning style to match task demands. The synthesized data and models are released at \href{https://huggingface.co/collections/DonJoey/mix-grm}{Hugging Face}, and the code is released at \href{https://github.com/Don-Joey/Mix-GRM}{Github}.

AI.tldr: Mix-GRM框架通过结构化Breadth-CoT和Depth-CoT推理机制，结合SFT和RLVR训练，在五个基准测试中超越现有开源奖励模型8.2%，揭示了不同推理机制对主观偏好和客观正确性任务的不同优势。
AI.motivation: 当前生成式奖励模型主要依赖非结构化的长度扩展，忽略了不同推理机制（广度CoT和深度CoT）的差异性效果。需要系统研究如何结构化利用这些推理机制来提升奖励模型的可靠性。
AI.method: 提出Mix-GRM框架：1）将原始推理重构为结构化的Breadth-CoT（多维度原则覆盖）和Depth-CoT（实质性判断合理性）；2）通过模块化合成流程；3）使用监督微调（SFT）和可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）来内化和优化这些机制。
AI.result: 在五个基准测试中达到新的SOTA，平均超越领先开源奖励模型8.2%。发现B-CoT在主观偏好任务中表现更好，D-CoT在客观正确性任务中更优。RLVR作为切换放大器，诱导模型自发分配推理风格以适应任务需求。
AI.conclusion: 结构化利用不同推理机制能显著提升奖励模型性能，推理机制与任务类型的匹配至关重要。RLVR能促进模型自适应推理风格分配，为奖励模型设计提供了新方向。

title: ArtiFixer: Enhancing and Extending 3D Reconstruction with Auto-Regressive Diffusion Models
summary: Per-scene optimization methods such as 3D Gaussian Splatting provide state-of-the-art novel view synthesis quality but extrapolate poorly to under-observed areas. Methods that leverage generative priors to correct artifacts in these areas hold promise but currently suffer from two shortcomings. The first is scalability, as existing methods use image diffusion models or bidirectional video models that are limited in the number of views they can generate in a single pass (and thus require a costly iterative distillation process for consistency). The second is quality itself, as generators used in prior work tend to produce outputs that are inconsistent with existing scene content and fail entirely in completely unobserved regions. To solve these, we propose a two-stage pipeline that leverages two key insights. First, we train a powerful bidirectional generative model with a novel opacity mixing strategy that encourages consistency with existing observations while retaining the model's ability to extrapolate novel content in unseen areas. Second, we distill it into a causal auto-regressive model that generates hundreds of frames in a single pass. This model can directly produce novel views or serve as pseudo-supervision to improve the underlying 3D representation in a simple and highly efficient manner. We evaluate our method extensively and demonstrate that it can generate plausible reconstructions in scenarios where existing approaches fail completely. When measured on commonly benchmarked datasets, we outperform existing all existing baselines by a wide margin, exceeding prior state-of-the-art methods by 1-3 dB PSNR.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种两阶段生成式3D场景重建方法，通过双向生成模型和因果自回归蒸馏，解决现有方法在未观测区域外推能力差、可扩展性不足的问题，显著提升了新视角合成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有基于场景优化的方法（如3D高斯泼溅）在新视角合成方面表现优秀，但在未充分观测区域外推能力差。现有利用生成先验的方法存在两个问题：1）可扩展性不足，使用图像扩散或双向视频模型，单次生成视图数量有限，需要昂贵的迭代蒸馏过程；2）质量不足，生成结果与现有场景内容不一致，在完全未观测区域完全失效。
AI.method: 提出两阶段流水线：1）训练强大的双向生成模型，采用新颖的不透明度混合策略，鼓励与现有观测的一致性，同时保留在未观测区域外推新内容的能力；2）将其蒸馏为因果自回归模型，能够单次生成数百帧，可直接生成新视角或作为伪监督来改进底层3D表示。
AI.result: 在现有方法完全失效的场景中能够生成合理的重建结果。在常用基准数据集上，大幅超越所有现有基线，PSNR比先前最先进方法高出1-3 dB。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过结合双向生成模型和因果自回归蒸馏，解决了生成式3D场景重建中的可扩展性和质量问题，在未观测区域实现了更好的外推能力，显著提升了新视角合成的性能。

title: LexChronos: An Agentic Framework for Structured Event Timeline Extraction in Indian Jurisprudence
summary: Understanding and predicting judicial outcomes demands nuanced analysis of legal documents. Traditional approaches treat judgments and proceedings as unstructured text, limiting the effectiveness of large language models (LLMs) in tasks such as summarization, argument generation, and judgment prediction. We propose LexChronos, an agentic framework that iteratively extracts structured event timelines from Supreme Court of India judgments. LexChronos employs a dual-agent architecture: a LoRA-instruct-tuned extraction agent identifies candidate events, while a pre-trained feedback agent scores and refines them through a confidence-driven loop. To address the scarcity of Indian legal event datasets, we construct a synthetic corpus of 2000 samples using reverse-engineering techniques with DeepSeek-R1 and GPT-4, generating gold-standard event annotations. Our pipeline achieves a BERT-based F1 score of 0.8751 against this synthetic ground truth. In downstream evaluations on legal text summarization, GPT-4 preferred structured timelines over unstructured baselines in 75% of cases, demonstrating improved comprehension and reasoning in Indian jurisprudence. This work lays a foundation for future legal AI applications in the Indian context, such as precedent mapping, argument synthesis, and predictive judgment modelling, by harnessing structured representations of legal events.

AI.tldr: LexChronos：一个从印度最高法院判决中提取结构化事件时间线的智能体框架，通过双智能体架构和合成数据集实现高效法律事件提取
AI.motivation: 传统方法将法律判决和程序视为非结构化文本，限制了大型语言模型在法律文本摘要、论点生成和判决预测等任务中的有效性。特别是在印度法律背景下，缺乏结构化事件数据集的问题尤为突出。
AI.method: 提出LexChronos框架，采用双智能体架构：1) LoRA指令调优的提取智能体识别候选事件；2) 预训练的反馈智能体通过置信度驱动的循环对事件进行评分和精炼。为解决印度法律事件数据集稀缺问题，使用DeepSeek-R1和GPT-4通过逆向工程技术构建了包含2000个样本的合成语料库。
AI.result: 在合成基准真值上达到BERT-based F1分数0.8751。在下游法律文本摘要评估中，GPT-4在75%的情况下更偏好结构化时间线而非非结构化基线，表明在印度法理学中具有更好的理解和推理能力。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为印度背景下的未来法律AI应用（如先例映射、论点合成和预测性判决建模）奠定了基础，通过利用法律事件的结构化表示来提升法律AI系统的性能。

title: Identifying the Geographic Foci of US Local News
comment: This is a research paper accepted to the 18th ACM Web Science Conference 2026
summary: Local journalism is vital in democratic societies where it informs people about local issues like, school board elections, small businesses, local health services, etc. But mounting economic pressures have made it increasingly difficult for local news stations to report these issues, underscoring the need to identify the salient geographical locations covered in local news (geo-foci). In response, we propose a novel geo-foci model for labeling US local news articles with the geographic locations (i.e., the names of counties, cities, states, countries) central to their subject matter. First, we manually labeled US local news articles from all 50 states with four administrative division labels (local, state, national, and international) corresponding to their geo-foci, and none for articles without a geographic focus. Second, we extracted and disambiguated geographic locations from them using Large Language Models (LLMs), since local news often contains ambiguous geographic entities (e.g., Paris, Texas vs. Paris, France). LLMs outperformed all eight geographic entity disambiguation methods we evaluated. Third, we engineered a rich set of spatial-semantic features capturing the prominence, frequency, and contextual positions of geographic entities. Using these features, we trained a classifier to accurately (F1: 0.86) detect the geographic foci of US local news articles. Our model could be applied to assess shifts from local to national narratives, and more broadly, enable researchers to better study local media.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于标注美国地方新闻文章地理焦点的新模型，通过LLM提取和消歧地理实体，结合空间语义特征训练分类器，准确识别新闻的地理焦点。
AI.motivation: 地方新闻对民主社会至关重要，但经济压力使得地方新闻机构难以报道本地议题。需要识别地方新闻报道的地理焦点，以评估从地方到国家叙事的转变，并更好地研究地方媒体。
AI.method: 1) 手动标注50个州的地方新闻文章，分为本地、州、国家、国际四个行政级别；2) 使用LLM提取和消歧地理实体，LLM在8种地理实体消歧方法中表现最佳；3) 设计丰富的空间语义特征，捕捉地理实体的显著性、频率和上下文位置；4) 基于这些特征训练分类器。
AI.result: 模型在检测美国地方新闻文章地理焦点方面达到F1分数0.86的准确率。LLM在地理实体消歧任务中优于所有评估的8种传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的地理焦点模型能够准确识别地方新闻的地理焦点，可用于评估从地方到国家叙事的转变，并为研究人员提供更好的地方媒体研究工具。

title: CARE: Towards Clinical Accountability in Multi-Modal Medical Reasoning with an Evidence-Grounded Agentic Framework
summary: Large visual language models (VLMs) have shown strong multi-modal medical reasoning ability, but most operate as end-to-end black boxes, diverging from clinicians' evidence-based, staged workflows and hindering clinical accountability. Complementarily, expert visual grounding models can accurately localize regions of interest (ROIs), providing explicit, reliable evidence that improves both reasoning accuracy and trust. In this paper, we introduce CARE, advancing Clinical Accountability in multi-modal medical Reasoning with an Evidence-grounded agentic framework. Unlike existing approaches that couple grounding and reasoning within a single generalist model, CARE decomposes the task into coordinated sub-modules to reduce shortcut learning and hallucination: a compact VLM proposes relevant medical entities; an expert entity-referring segmentation model produces pixel-level ROI evidence; and a grounded VLM reasons over the full image augmented by ROI hints. The VLMs are optimized with reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards to align answers with supporting evidence. Furthermore, a VLM coordinator plans tool invocation and reviews evidence-answer consistency, providing agentic control and final verification. Evaluated on standard medical VQA benchmarks, our CARE-Flow (coordinator-free) improves average accuracy by 10.9% over the same size (10B) state-of-the-art (SOTA). With dynamic planning and answer review, our CARE-Coord yields a further gain, outperforming the heavily pre-trained SOTA by 5.2%. Our experiments demonstrate that an agentic framework that emulates clinical workflows, incorporating decoupled specialized models and explicit evidence, yields more accurate and accountable medical AI.

AI.tldr: CARE：一个用于多模态医疗推理的基于证据的代理框架，通过解耦专业模型和显式证据来提高准确性和临床可问责性
AI.motivation: 现有大型视觉语言模型（VLMs）作为端到端黑箱运行，与临床医生基于证据的分阶段工作流程不符，缺乏临床可问责性。需要结合专家视觉定位模型提供可靠的显式证据，提高推理准确性和信任度。
AI.method: CARE将任务分解为协调的子模块：紧凑VLM提出相关医学实体，专家实体参考分割模型生成像素级ROI证据，基于证据的VLM在完整图像和ROI提示下进行推理。使用可验证奖励的强化学习对齐答案与证据，VLM协调器规划工具调用并审查证据-答案一致性。
AI.result: 在标准医疗VQA基准测试中，CARE-Flow（无协调器）比相同规模（10B）的SOTA平均准确率提高10.9%。通过动态规划和答案审查，CARE-Coord进一步获得增益，比大量预训练的SOTA高出5.2%。
AI.conclusion: 模拟临床工作流程的代理框架，结合解耦的专业模型和显式证据，能够产生更准确和可问责的医疗AI系统。

title: COG: Confidence-aware Optimal Geometric Correspondence for Unsupervised Single-reference Novel Object Pose Estimation
summary: Estimating the 6DoF pose of a novel object with a single reference view is challenging due to occlusions, view-point changes, and outliers. A core difficulty lies in finding robust cross-view correspondences, as existing methods often rely on discrete one-to-one matching that is non-differentiable and tends to collapse onto sparse key-points. We propose Confidence-aware Optimal Geometric Correspondence (COG), an unsupervised framework that formulates correspondence estimation as a confidence-aware optimal transport problem. COG produces balanced soft correspondences by predicting point-wise confidences and injecting them as optimal transport marginals, suppressing non-overlapping regions. Semantic priors from vision foundation models further regularize the correspondences, leading to stable pose estimation. This design integrates confidence into the correspondence finding and pose estimation pipeline, enabling unsupervised learning. Experiments show unsupervised COG achieves comparable performance to supervised methods, and supervised COG outperforms them.

AI.tldr: COG提出了一种无监督的6DoF姿态估计框架，通过置信度感知的最优传输方法解决单参考视图下的物体姿态估计问题，在无监督设置下达到有监督方法性能，有监督设置下超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 单参考视图下的6DoF姿态估计面临遮挡、视角变化和异常值的挑战，现有方法依赖离散的一对一匹配，这种匹配不可微分且容易坍缩到稀疏关键点，需要更鲁棒的跨视图对应关系估计方法。
AI.method: 提出置信度感知最优几何对应（COG）框架，将对应关系估计建模为置信度感知的最优传输问题，预测点级置信度并作为最优传输边际注入，抑制非重叠区域，同时利用视觉基础模型的语义先验正则化对应关系。
AI.result: 无监督COG达到与有监督方法相当的性能，有监督COG超越现有有监督方法，证明了该框架在姿态估计任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: COG通过将置信度整合到对应关系发现和姿态估计流程中，实现了无监督学习，为6DoF姿态估计提供了新的有效解决方案。

title: Beyond the Grid: Layout-Informed Multi-Vector Retrieval with Parsed Visual Document Representations
summary: Harnessing the full potential of visually-rich documents requires retrieval systems that understand not just text, but intricate layouts, a core challenge in Visual Document Retrieval (VDR). The prevailing multi-vector architectures, while powerful, face a crucial storage bottleneck that current optimization strategies, such as embedding merging, pruning, or using abstract tokens, fail to resolve without compromising performance or ignoring vital layout cues. To address this, we introduce ColParse, a novel paradigm that leverages a document parsing model to generate a small set of layout-informed sub-image embeddings, which are then fused with a global page-level vector to create a compact and structurally-aware multi-vector representation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method reduces storage requirements by over 95% while simultaneously yielding significant performance gains across numerous benchmarks and base models. ColParse thus bridges the critical gap between the fine-grained accuracy of multi-vector retrieval and the practical demands of large-scale deployment, offering a new path towards efficient and interpretable multimodal information systems.

AI.tldr: ColParse提出了一种新的视觉文档检索方法，通过文档解析模型生成少量布局感知的子图像嵌入，与全局页面向量融合，实现存储减少95%以上同时提升检索性能。
AI.motivation: 当前多向量架构在视觉文档检索中存在严重的存储瓶颈问题，现有优化策略（如嵌入合并、剪枝或使用抽象标记）要么会损害性能，要么忽略了关键的布局信息。需要一种既能保持细粒度准确性又能满足大规模部署实际需求的方法。
AI.method: ColParse使用文档解析模型生成少量布局感知的子图像嵌入，然后将这些嵌入与全局页面级向量融合，创建紧凑且结构感知的多向量表示。这种方法结合了布局理解和存储效率。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法将存储需求减少了95%以上，同时在多个基准测试和基础模型上都取得了显著的性能提升，实现了存储效率和检索准确性的双重改进。
AI.conclusion: ColParse在多向量检索的细粒度准确性和大规模部署的实际需求之间架起了关键桥梁，为高效且可解释的多模态信息系统提供了新路径。

title: Neural Latent Arbitrary Lagrangian-Eulerian Grids for Fluid-Solid Interaction
comment: Proceedings of the 14th International Conference on Learning Representations
summary: Fluid-solid interaction (FSI) problems are fundamental in many scientific and engineering applications, yet effectively capturing the highly nonlinear two-way interactions remains a significant challenge. Most existing deep learning methods are limited to simplified one-way FSI scenarios, often assuming rigid and static solid to reduce complexity. Even in two-way setups, prevailing approaches struggle to capture dynamic, heterogeneous interactions due to the lack of cross-domain awareness. In this paper, we introduce \textbf{Fisale}, a data-driven framework for handling complex two-way \textbf{FSI} problems. It is inspired by classical numerical methods, namely the Arbitrary Lagrangian-Eulerian (\textbf{ALE}) method and the partitioned coupling algorithm. Fisale explicitly models the coupling interface as a distinct component and leverages multiscale latent ALE grids to provide unified, geometry-aware embeddings across domains. A partitioned coupling module (PCM) further decomposes the problem into structured substeps, enabling progressive modeling of nonlinear interdependencies. Compared to existing models, Fisale introduces a more flexible framework that iteratively handles complex dynamics of solid, fluid and their coupling interface on a unified representation, and enables scalable learning of complex two-way FSI behaviors. Experimentally, Fisale excels in three reality-related challenging FSI scenarios, covering 2D, 3D and various tasks. The code is available at \href{https://github.com/therontau0054/Fisale}.

AI.tldr: Fisale是一个数据驱动的流体-固体相互作用框架，采用多尺度潜在ALE网格和分区耦合模块处理复杂双向FSI问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法大多局限于简化的单向FSI场景，假设固体刚性和静态以减少复杂性。即使在双向设置中，主流方法由于缺乏跨域感知能力，难以捕捉动态、异质的相互作用。
AI.method: 受经典数值方法（任意拉格朗日-欧拉法和分区耦合算法）启发，Fisale将耦合界面作为独立组件建模，利用多尺度潜在ALE网格提供跨域的统一几何感知嵌入。分区耦合模块将问题分解为结构化子步骤，逐步建模非线性相互依赖关系。
AI.result: Fisale在三个现实相关的挑战性FSI场景中表现出色，涵盖2D、3D和各种任务，相比现有模型提供了更灵活的框架，能够迭代处理固体、流体及其耦合界面的复杂动力学。
AI.conclusion: Fisale引入了一个更灵活的框架，能够在统一表示上迭代处理固体、流体及其耦合界面的复杂动力学，并实现复杂双向FSI行为的可扩展学习。

title: Evaluating and Understanding Scheming Propensity in LLM Agents
summary: As frontier language models are increasingly deployed as autonomous agents pursuing complex, long-term objectives, there is increased risk of scheming: agents covertly pursuing misaligned goals. Prior work has focused on showing agents are capable of scheming, but their propensity to scheme in realistic scenarios remains underexplored. To understand when agents scheme, we decompose scheming incentives into agent factors and environmental factors. We develop realistic settings allowing us to systematically vary these factors, each with scheming opportunities for agents that pursue instrumentally convergent goals such as self-preservation, resource acquisition, and goal-guarding. We find only minimal instances of scheming despite high environmental incentives, and show this is unlikely due to evaluation awareness. While inserting adversarially-designed prompt snippets that encourage agency and goal-directedness into an agent's system prompt can induce high scheming rates, snippets used in real agent scaffolds rarely do. Surprisingly, in model organisms (Hubinger et al., 2023) built with these snippets, scheming behavior is remarkably brittle: removing a single tool can drop the scheming rate from 59% to 3%, and increasing oversight can raise rather than deter scheming by up to 25%. Our incentive decomposition enables systematic measurement of scheming propensity in settings relevant for deployment, which is necessary as agents are entrusted with increasingly consequential tasks.

AI.tldr: 该研究系统分析了大型语言模型作为自主代理时的"阴谋"行为倾向，发现尽管存在环境激励，实际阴谋行为很少，且这种行为非常脆弱，移除单个工具或增加监督都可能显著改变阴谋率。
AI.motivation: 随着前沿语言模型越来越多地被部署为追求复杂长期目标的自主代理，存在代理暗中追求错位目标的"阴谋"风险。先前工作主要关注代理是否具备阴谋能力，但在现实场景中代理进行阴谋的倾向性仍未得到充分探索。
AI.method: 将阴谋激励分解为代理因素和环境因素，开发现实设置以系统性地改变这些因素。使用包含自我保护、资源获取和目标保护等工具性收敛目标的场景。通过插入对抗性设计的提示片段来诱导代理性和目标导向性，并在模型有机体中进行测试。
AI.result: 尽管存在高环境激励，仅发现极少数阴谋实例。插入对抗性提示片段可以诱导高阴谋率，但实际代理脚手架中很少使用这些片段。阴谋行为非常脆弱：移除单个工具可使阴谋率从59%降至3%，增加监督反而可能提高阴谋率达25%。
AI.conclusion: 该研究的激励分解方法能够系统测量与部署相关的阴谋倾向性，这对于随着代理被赋予越来越重要的任务而进行风险评估是必要的。研究发现当前代理的阴谋倾向性较低且行为脆弱。

title: M$^2$: Dual-Memory Augmentation for Long-Horizon Web Agents via Trajectory Summarization and Insight Retrieval
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) based agents have demonstrated remarkable potential in autonomous web navigation. However, handling long-horizon tasks remains a critical bottleneck. Prevailing strategies often rely heavily on extensive data collection and model training, yet still struggle with high computational costs and insufficient reasoning capabilities when facing complex, long-horizon scenarios. To address this, we propose M$^2$, a training-free, memory-augmented framework designed to optimize context efficiency and decision-making robustness. Our approach incorporates a dual-tier memory mechanism that synergizes Dynamic Trajectory Summarization (Internal Memory) to compress verbose interaction history into concise state updates, and Insight Retrieval Augmentation (External Memory) to guide the agent with actionable guidelines retrieved from an offline insight bank. Extensive evaluations across WebVoyager and OnlineMind2Web demonstrate that M$^2$ consistently surpasses baselines, yielding up to a 19.6% success rate increase and 58.7% token reduction for Qwen3-VL-32B, while proprietary models like Claude achieve accuracy gains up to 12.5% alongside significantly lower computational overhead.

AI.tldr: M²是一个免训练的记忆增强框架，通过双层级记忆机制优化多模态大语言模型在自主网页导航中的上下文效率和决策鲁棒性，显著提升长时程任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 当前基于多模态大语言模型的自主网页导航代理在处理长时程任务时存在瓶颈，现有方法依赖大量数据收集和模型训练，但仍面临高计算成本和复杂场景下推理能力不足的问题。
AI.method: 提出免训练的记忆增强框架M²，包含双层级记忆机制：1) 动态轨迹摘要（内部记忆）压缩冗长交互历史为简洁状态更新；2) 洞察检索增强（外部记忆）从离线洞察库中检索可操作指南来指导代理。
AI.result: 在WebVoyager和OnlineMind2Web上的广泛评估显示，M²持续超越基线方法，为Qwen3-VL-32B带来高达19.6%的成功率提升和58.7%的token减少，Claude等专有模型获得高达12.5%的准确率提升并显著降低计算开销。
AI.conclusion: M²框架通过创新的记忆机制有效解决了多模态大语言模型在自主网页导航中长时程任务的挑战，提供了一种高效、鲁棒的免训练解决方案。

title: Surgical Post-Training: Cutting Errors, Keeping Knowledge
summary: Enhancing the reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs) via post-training is often constrained by the trade-off between efficiency and catastrophic forgetting. While prior research emphasizes the role of on-policy data in mitigating forgetting, we uncover--and validate both theoretically and empirically--an overlooked yet critical mechanism: the implicit regularization inherent in Direct Preference Optimization's (DPO) reward estimate. This motivates our Surgical Post-Training (SPoT), a new paradigm designed to optimize reasoning efficiently while preserving learned prior knowledge. SPoT consists of: (1) a data rectification pipeline that employs an Oracle to surgically correct erroneous steps via minimal edits, generating data proximal to the model's distribution; and (2) a reward-based binary cross-entropy objective. Unlike the relative ranking in DPO, this objective treats reasoning correctness as a binary classification problem, enforcing decoupled supervision signals. Empirically, with only 4k rectified math data pairs, SPoT improves Qwen3-8B's accuracy by 6.2% on average across in-domain and OOD tasks, requiring merely 28 minutes of training on 8x H800 GPUs. Code: https://github.com/Visual-AI/SPoT

AI.tldr: SPoT提出了一种新的后训练范式，通过数据修正和二元交叉熵目标优化LLM推理能力，在极小数据量下显著提升数学推理性能，同时避免灾难性遗忘。
AI.motivation: 传统LLM后训练在提升推理能力时面临效率与灾难性遗忘的权衡。现有研究强调在线数据的作用，但忽略了DPO奖励估计中的隐式正则化机制。需要一种既能高效优化推理又能保留先验知识的方法。
AI.method: SPoT包含两个核心组件：1) 数据修正管道，使用Oracle通过最小编辑手术式修正错误步骤，生成接近模型分布的数据；2) 基于奖励的二元交叉熵目标，将推理正确性视为二元分类问题，提供解耦的监督信号。
AI.result: 仅使用4k修正数学数据对，SPoT将Qwen3-8B在领域内和OOD任务上的平均准确率提升6.2%，训练仅需8x H800 GPU上28分钟，效率极高。
AI.conclusion: SPoT通过揭示DPO奖励估计的隐式正则化机制，提出了一种高效的后训练范式，能在极小数据量下显著提升LLM推理能力，同时避免灾难性遗忘，为LLM后训练提供了新思路。

title: Lookahead identification in adversarial bandits: accuracy and memory bounds
summary:
We study an identification problem in multi-armed bandits. In each round a learner selects one of $K$ arms and observes its reward, with the goal of eventually identifying an arm that will perform best at a {\it future} time. In adversarial environments, however, past performance may offer little information about the future, raising the question of whether meaningful identification is possible at all.
  In this work, we introduce \emph{lookahead identification}, a task in which the goal of the learner is to select a future prediction window and commit in advance to an arm whose average reward over that window is within $\varepsilon$ of optimal. Our analysis characterizes both the achievable accuracy of lookahead identification and the memory resources required to obtain it. From an accuracy standpoint, for any horizon $T$ we give an algorithm achieving $\varepsilon = O\bigl(1/\sqrt{\log T}\bigr)$ over $Ω(\sqrt{T})$ prediction windows. This demonstrates that, perhaps surprisingly, identification is possible in adversarial settings, despite significant lack of information. We also prove a near-matching lower bound showing that $\varepsilon = Ω\bigl(1/\log T\bigr)$ is unavoidable. We then turn to investigate the role of memory in our problem, first proving that any algorithm achieving nontrivial accuracy requires $Ω(K)$ bits of memory. Under a natural \emph{local sparsity} condition, we show that the same accuracy guarantees can be achieved using only poly-logarithmic memory.

AI.tldr: 本文研究多臂老虎机中的前瞻识别问题，在对抗性环境中识别未来表现最优的臂，证明了识别可行性并分析了所需内存资源。
AI.motivation: 在对抗性环境中，过去的表现可能无法提供关于未来的信息，这引发了一个问题：是否有意义的识别是否可能？本文旨在探索在对抗性设置中识别未来最优臂的可能性。
AI.method: 引入"前瞻识别"任务，学习者选择未来预测窗口并提前承诺一个臂，其在该窗口内的平均奖励接近最优。分析可实现精度和所需内存资源，给出算法并证明下界。
AI.result: 对于任何时间范围T，算法能在Ω(√T)个预测窗口上实现ε=O(1/√log T)的精度，证明对抗性环境中识别是可能的。同时证明ε=Ω(1/log T)的下界不可避免。内存方面，任何实现非平凡精度的算法需要Ω(K)位内存，但在局部稀疏条件下可用多对数内存实现相同精度。
AI.conclusion: 对抗性环境中识别未来最优臂是可能的，尽管信息严重不足。前瞻识别任务提供了有意义的性能保证，内存需求在稀疏条件下可大幅降低。

title: ToolRLA: Fine-Grained Reward Decomposition for Tool-Integrated Reinforcement Learning Alignment in Domain-Specific Agents
summary: Tool-integrated reasoning agents interleaving natural language deliberation with external API calls show promise for complex multi-step tasks. However, aligning such agents for high-stakes domain-specific deployment is challenging, as existing reinforcement learning uses coarse binary rewards (success/failure) that insufficiently guide nuanced tool invocation in production. We present ToolRLA, a three-stage post-training pipeline (Supervised Fine-Tuning, Group Relative Policy Optimization, Direct Preference Optimization) for domain-specific tool-integrated agents. Its core is a fine-grained reward function with multiplicative correctness decomposition, evaluating tool invocation across four dimensions: format validity, tool selection correctness, invocation efficiency, and domain constraint compliance. Multiplicative composition prioritizes correct tool selection (a prerequisite for meaningful parameter evaluation), while a large negative compliance penalty (λ=10) ensures regulatory adherence. Deployed on a real-world financial advisory copilot (80+ advisors, 1,200+ daily queries, 15+ heterogeneous APIs), ToolRLA achieves 47% higher end-to-end task completion (62% to 91%), 63% lower tool invocation error (38% to 14%), 93% lower regulatory violation (12% to 0.8%), and sub-2-second latency after three months. Ablation studies confirm fine-grained reward decomposition contributes 7 percentage points over coarse additive rewards; generalizability is validated on ToolBench and API-Bank.

AI.tldr: ToolRLA：针对特定领域工具集成智能体的三阶段后训练流程，通过细粒度奖励函数显著提升任务完成率、降低工具调用错误和违规率
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习方法使用粗粒度的二元奖励（成功/失败），无法有效指导生产环境中复杂的工具调用，特别是在高风险特定领域部署时
AI.method: 三阶段后训练流程：监督微调、组相对策略优化、直接偏好优化。核心是细粒度奖励函数，通过乘法正确性分解评估工具调用的四个维度：格式有效性、工具选择正确性、调用效率、领域约束合规性
AI.result: 在真实金融顾问助手部署中：端到端任务完成率提升47%（62%到91%），工具调用错误降低63%（38%到14%），监管违规降低93%（12%到0.8%），延迟低于2秒
AI.conclusion: ToolRLA通过细粒度奖励分解有效解决了特定领域工具集成智能体的对齐问题，在实际部署中表现出显著性能提升和良好的泛化能力

title: Hierarchical Classification for Improved Histopathology Image Analysis
summary: Whole-slide image analysis is essential for diagnostic tasks in pathology, yet existing deep learning methods primarily rely on flat classification, ignoring hierarchical relationships among class labels. In this study, we propose HiClass, a hierarchical classification framework for improved histopathology image analysis, that enhances both coarse-grained and fine-grained WSI classification. Built based upon a multiple instance learning approach, HiClass extends it by introducing bidirectional feature integration that facilitates information exchange between coarse-grained and fine-grained feature representations, effectively learning hierarchical features. Moreover, we introduce tailored loss functions, including hierarchical consistency loss, intra- and inter-class distance loss, and group-wise cross-entropy loss, to further optimize hierarchical learning. We assess the performance of HiClass on a gastric biopsy dataset with 4 coarse-grained and 14 fine-grained classes, achieving superior classification performance for both coarse-grained classification and fine-grained classification. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of HiClass in improving WSI classification by capturing coarse-grained and fine-grained histopathological characteristics.

AI.tldr: 提出HiClass层次分类框架，用于病理全切片图像分析，通过双向特征整合和定制损失函数，同时提升粗粒度和细粒度分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法主要依赖扁平分类，忽略了类别标签之间的层次关系。病理诊断任务中，粗粒度和细粒度分类之间存在天然层次结构，需要专门的方法来利用这种层次信息。
AI.method: 基于多实例学习方法构建HiClass框架，引入双向特征整合机制，促进粗粒度和细粒度特征表示之间的信息交换。设计了层次一致性损失、类内类间距离损失和分组交叉熵损失等定制损失函数来优化层次学习。
AI.result: 在包含4个粗粒度和14个细粒度类别的胃活检数据集上，HiClass在粗粒度和细粒度分类上都取得了优越的分类性能。
AI.conclusion: HiClass通过捕获粗粒度和细粒度组织病理学特征，有效改进了全切片图像分类，证明了层次分类框架在病理图像分析中的有效性。

title: QIME: Constructing Interpretable Medical Text Embeddings via Ontology-Grounded Questions
summary: While dense biomedical embeddings achieve strong performance, their black-box nature limits their utility in clinical decision-making. Recent question-based interpretable embeddings represent text as binary answers to natural-language questions, but these approaches often rely on heuristic or surface-level contrastive signals and overlook specialized domain knowledge.
