AI.conclusion: 该工作为遥感图像语义分割中的标签噪声问题提供了实用的解决方案和基准测试，相关成果已公开可用。

title: AMemGym: Interactive Memory Benchmarking for Assistants in Long-Horizon Conversations
summary: Long-horizon interactions between users and LLM-based assistants necessitate effective memory management, yet current approaches face challenges in training and evaluation of memory. Existing memory benchmarks rely on static, off-policy data as context, limiting evaluation reliability and scalability. To address these gaps, we introduce AMemGym, an interactive environment enabling on-policy evaluation and optimization for memory-driven personalization. AMemGym employs structured data sampling to predefine user profiles, state-dependent questions, and state evolution trajectories, enabling cost-effective generation of high-quality, evaluation-aligned interactions. LLM-simulated users expose latent states through role-play while maintaining structured state consistency. Comprehensive metrics based on structured data guide both assessment and optimization of assistants. Extensive experiments reveal performance gaps in existing memory systems (e.g., RAG, long-context LLMs, and agentic memory) and corresponding reasons. AMemGym not only enables effective selection among competing approaches but also can potentially drive the self-evolution of memory management strategies. By bridging structured state evolution with free-form interactions, our framework provides a scalable, diagnostically rich environment for advancing memory capabilities in conversational agents.

AI.tldr: AMemGym：一个用于记忆驱动个性化LLM助手的交互式评估与优化环境，通过结构化数据采样和LLM模拟用户实现可扩展的在线策略评估。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM助手的长时交互需要有效的记忆管理，但现有方法在记忆训练和评估上面临挑战。现有记忆基准依赖静态、离线策略数据作为上下文，限制了评估的可靠性和可扩展性。
AI.method: AMemGym采用结构化数据采样预定义用户画像、状态依赖问题和状态演化轨迹，通过LLM模拟用户进行角色扮演暴露潜在状态，同时保持结构化状态一致性。基于结构化数据的综合指标指导助手评估和优化。
AI.result: 实验揭示了现有记忆系统（如RAG、长上下文LLM和代理记忆）的性能差距及原因。AMemGym不仅能有效选择竞争方法，还能驱动记忆管理策略的自进化。
AI.conclusion: 通过桥接结构化状态演化与自由形式交互，AMemGym为提升对话代理的记忆能力提供了一个可扩展、诊断丰富的环境。

title: No More Maybe-Arrows: Resolving Causal Uncertainty by Breaking Symmetries
summary: The recent works on causal discovery have followed a similar trend of learning partial ancestral graphs (PAGs) since observational data constrain the true causal directed acyclic graph (DAG) only up to a Markov equivalence class. This limits their application in the majority of downstream tasks, as uncertainty in causal relations remains unresolved. We propose a new refinement framework, CausalSAGE, for converting PAGs to DAGs while respecting the underlying causal relations. The framework expands discrete variables into state-level representations, constrains the search space using structural knowledge and soft priors, and applies a unified differentiable objective for joint optimization. The final DAG is obtained by aggregating the optimized structures and enforcing acyclicity when necessary. Our experimental evaluations show that the obtained DAGs preserve the underlying causal relations while also being efficient to obtain.

AI.tldr: CausalSAGE：一种将部分祖先图（PAG）转换为有向无环图（DAG）的新框架，通过状态级表示、结构约束和可微分优化来解析因果不确定性。
AI.motivation: 现有因果发现方法通常学习部分祖先图（PAG），但观测数据只能将真实因果DAG约束到马尔可夫等价类，导致因果关系的不确定性未解决，限制了在下游任务中的应用。
AI.method: 1) 将离散变量扩展为状态级表示；2) 使用结构知识和软先验约束搜索空间；3) 应用统一的可微分目标进行联合优化；4) 通过聚合优化结构和必要时强制无环性获得最终DAG。
AI.result: 实验评估表明，获得的DAG能够保持底层因果关系，同时获取效率高。
AI.conclusion: CausalSAGE框架能够有效地将PAG转换为DAG，解决因果不确定性问题，为下游任务提供更明确的因果结构。

title: Strength Change Explanations in Quantitative Argumentation
comment: This is an AAMAS '26 paper, with additional supplementary material
summary: In order to make argumentation-based inference contestable, it is crucial to explain what changes can achieve a desired (instead of the contested) inference result. To this end, we introduce strength change explanations for quantitative (bipolar) argumentation graphs. Strength change explanations describe changes to the initial strengths of a subset of the arguments in a given graph that can achieve a desired ordering based on the final strengths of some (potentially different) subset of arguments. We show that the existing notions of inverse and counterfactual problems can be reduced to strength change explanations. We also prove basic soundness and completeness properties of our strength change explanations, and demonstrate their existence and non-existence in some special cases. By applying a heuristic search, we demonstrate that we can often successfully find strength change explanations for layered graphs that are common in typical application scenarios; still, limitations remain for settings where we do not provide guarantees for the presence (or absence) of explanations.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了强度变化解释的概念，用于定量（双极）论证图中实现期望推理结果的论证强度调整方案。
AI.motivation: 为了使基于论证的推理具有可争议性，需要解释如何改变论证强度来实现期望的推理结果，而不是被质疑的结果。
AI.method: 引入强度变化解释的概念，描述如何改变论证图中子集的初始论证强度，以基于某些论证的最终强度实现期望的排序。将现有的逆问题和反事实问题归约为强度变化解释，并证明基本的声音性和完备性性质。
AI.result: 证明了强度变化解释在特殊案例中的存在性和不存在性，通过启发式搜索展示了在典型应用场景的分层图中通常能成功找到强度变化解释，但在某些无法保证解释存在或缺失的场景中存在局限性。
AI.conclusion: 强度变化解释为定量论证图提供了实现期望推理结果的可操作方案，将现有问题统一到该框架下，但在通用性方面仍有局限。

title: IdGlow: Dynamic Identity Modulation for Multi-Subject Generation
summary: Multi-subject image generation requires seamlessly harmonizing multiple reference identities within a coherent scene. However, existing methods relying on rigid spatial masks or localized attention often struggle with the "stability-plasticity dilemma," particularly failing in tasks that require complex structural deformations, such as identity-preserving age transformation. To address this, we present IdGlow, a mask-free, progressive two-stage framework built upon Flow Matching diffusion models. In the supervised fine-tuning (SFT) stage, we introduce task-adaptive timestep scheduling aligned with diffusion generative dynamics: a linear decay schedule that progressively relaxes constraints for natural group composition, and a temporal gating mechanism that concentrates identity injection within a critical semantic window, successfully preserving adult facial semantics without overriding child-like anatomical structures. To resolve attribute leakage and semantic ambiguity without explicit layout inputs, we further integrate a badcase-driven Vision-Language Model (VLM) for precise, context-aware prompt synthesis. In the second stage, we design a Fine-Grained Group-Level Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) with a weighted margin formulation to simultaneously eliminate multi-subject artifacts, elevate texture harmony, and recalibrate identity fidelity towards real-world distributions. Extensive experiments on two challenging benchmarks -- direct multi-person fusion and age-transformed group generation -- demonstrate that IdGlow fundamentally mitigates the stability-plasticity conflict, achieving a superior Pareto balance between state-of-the-art facial fidelity and commercial-grade aesthetic quality.

AI.tldr: IdGlow：基于流匹配扩散模型的两阶段框架，通过任务自适应时间调度和细粒度组级DPO，解决多主体图像生成中的稳定性-可塑性困境，在身份保真度和美学质量间取得帕累托最优平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有多主体图像生成方法依赖刚性空间掩码或局部注意力，难以处理"稳定性-可塑性困境"，特别是在需要复杂结构变形（如年龄变换）的任务中表现不佳。
AI.method: 1) 基于流匹配扩散模型的掩码自由渐进两阶段框架；2) SFT阶段：任务自适应时间调度（线性衰减调度和时序门控机制）；3) 集成VLM进行精确上下文感知提示合成；4) 细粒度组级DPO，采用加权边界公式。
AI.result: 在两个挑战性基准测试（直接多人融合和年龄变换组生成）中，IdGlow从根本上缓解了稳定性-可塑性冲突，在面部保真度和商业级美学质量间实现了最先进的帕累托平衡。
AI.conclusion: IdGlow通过创新的时间调度和细粒度优化策略，成功解决了多主体图像生成中的核心挑战，为复杂身份保持任务提供了有效的解决方案。

title: CharacterFlywheel: Scaling Iterative Improvement of Engaging and Steerable LLMs in Production
summary: This report presents CharacterFlywheel, an iterative flywheel process for improving large language models (LLMs) in production social chat applications across Instagram, WhatsApp, and Messenger. Starting from LLaMA 3.1, we refined models across 15 generations using data from both internal and external real-user traffic. Through continuous deployments from July 2024 to April 2025, we conducted controlled 7-day A/B tests showing consistent engagement improvements: 7 of 8 newly deployed models demonstrated positive lift over the baseline, with the strongest performers achieving up to 8.8% improvement in engagement breadth and 19.4% in engagement depth. We also observed substantial gains in steerability, with instruction following increasing from 59.2% to 84.8% and instruction violations decreasing from 26.6% to 5.8%. We detail the CharacterFlywheel process which integrates data curation, reward modeling to estimate and interpolate the landscape of engagement metrics, supervised fine-tuning (SFT), reinforcement learning (RL), and both offline and online evaluation to ensure reliable progress at each optimization step. We also discuss our methods for overfitting prevention and navigating production dynamics at scale. These contributions advance the scientific rigor and understanding of LLMs in social applications serving millions of users.

AI.tldr: CharacterFlywheel是一个迭代飞轮过程，用于改进生产环境中社交聊天应用的LLMs，通过15代模型迭代，在Instagram、WhatsApp和Messenger上实现了持续的参与度提升。
AI.motivation: 在社交聊天应用中部署LLMs面临如何持续改进模型性能、提高用户参与度、增强指令跟随能力，并在大规模生产环境中保持可靠性的挑战。需要系统化的迭代优化方法。
AI.method: 基于LLaMA 3.1，通过15代迭代优化，整合数据筛选、奖励建模（估计和插值参与度指标）、监督微调（SFT）、强化学习（RL），以及离线和在线评估。采用过拟合预防和生产动态导航方法。
AI.result: 8个新部署模型中有7个相比基线有正向提升，最强模型实现8.8%参与广度提升和19.4%参与深度提升。指令跟随从59.2%提升至84.8%，指令违规从26.6%降至5.8%。
AI.conclusion: CharacterFlywheel过程为社交应用中LLMs的持续改进提供了科学严谨的方法，实现了显著的性能提升，并为大规模生产部署提供了实用框架。

title: A level-wise training scheme for learning neural multigrid smoothers with application to integral equations
summary:
Convolution-type integral equations commonly occur in signal processing and image processing. Discretizing these equations yields large and ill-conditioned linear systems. While the classic multigrid method is effective for solving linear systems derived from partial differential equations (PDE) problems, it fails to solve integral equations because its smoothers, which are implemented as conventional relaxation methods, are ineffective in reducing high-frequency components in the errors.
  We propose a novel neural multigrid scheme where learned neural operators replace classical smoothers. Unlike classical smoothers, these operators are trained offline. Once trained, the neural smoothers generalize to new right-hand-side vectors without retraining, making it an efficient solver. We design level-wise loss functions incorporating spectral filtering to emulate the multigrid frequency decomposition principle, ensuring each operator focuses on solving distinct high-frequency spectral bands.
  Although we focus on integral equations, the framework is generalizable to all kinds of problems, including PDE problems. Our experiments demonstrate superior efficiency over classical solvers and robust convergence across varying problem sizes and regularization weights.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新颖的神经多重网格方法，用学习的神经算子替代经典平滑器，用于求解卷积型积分方程产生的大型病态线性系统。
AI.motivation: 传统多重网格方法在求解偏微分方程时有效，但对于积分方程产生的线性系统失效，因为经典松弛方法无法有效减少误差的高频分量。
AI.method: 设计神经多重网格方案，用离线训练的神经算子替代经典平滑器。通过包含谱滤波的层级损失函数模拟多重网格频率分解原理，确保每个算子专注于解决不同的高频谱带。
AI.result: 实验证明该方法比经典求解器更高效，在不同问题规模和正则化权重下具有鲁棒收敛性。
AI.conclusion: 虽然专注于积分方程，但该框架可推广到包括偏微分方程在内的各种问题，神经平滑器训练后无需重新训练即可泛化到新的右侧向量。

title: Beyond Static Instruction: A Multi-agent AI Framework for Adaptive Augmented Reality Robot Training
summary: Augmented Reality (AR) offers powerful visualization capabilities for industrial robot training, yet current interfaces remain predominantly static, failing to account for learners' diverse cognitive profiles. In this paper, we present an AR application for robot training and propose a multi-agent AI framework for future integration that bridges the gap between static visualization and pedagogical intelligence. We report on the evaluation of the baseline AR interface with 36 participants performing a robotic pick-and-place task. While overall usability was high, notable disparities in task duration and learner characteristics highlighted the necessity for dynamic adaptation. To address this, we propose a multi-agent framework that orchestrates multiple components to perform complex preprocessing of multimodal inputs (e.g., voice, physiology, robot data) and adapt the AR application to the learner's needs. By utilizing autonomous Large Language Model (LLM) agents, the proposed system would dynamically adapt the learning environment based on advanced LLM reasoning in real-time.

AI.tldr: 提出一个用于工业机器人培训的AR应用和多智能体AI框架，利用LLM智能体实现动态自适应学习环境
AI.motivation: 当前AR工业机器人培训界面多为静态，未能考虑学习者多样化的认知特征，需要更智能的自适应系统
AI.method: 1) 开发AR机器人培训应用；2) 提出多智能体AI框架，整合语音、生理、机器人数据等多模态输入；3) 利用自主LLM智能体进行实时推理和动态适应
AI.result: 基线AR界面在36名参与者的评估中表现出高可用性，但任务完成时间和学习者特征存在显著差异，证实了动态适应的必要性
AI.conclusion: 多智能体AI框架能够桥接静态可视化和教学智能，通过LLM驱动的实时推理实现个性化AR学习环境

title: Linking Modality Isolation in Heterogeneous Collaborative Perception
summary: Collaborative perception leverages data exchange among multiple agents to enhance overall perception capabilities. However, heterogeneity across agents introduces domain gaps that hinder collaboration, and this is further exacerbated by an underexplored issue: modality isolation. It arises when multiple agents with different modalities never co-occur in any training data frame, enlarging cross-modal domain gaps. Existing alignment methods rely on supervision from spatially overlapping observations, thus fail to handle modality isolation. To address this challenge, we propose CodeAlign, the first efficient, co-occurrence-free alignment framework that smoothly aligns modalities via cross-modal feature-code-feature(FCF) translation. The key idea is to explicitly identify the representation consistency through codebook, and directly learn mappings between modality-specific feature spaces, thereby eliminating the need for spatial correspondence. Codebooks regularize feature spaces into code spaces, providing compact yet expressive representations. With a prepared code space for each modality, CodeAlign learns FCF translations that map features to the corresponding codes of other modalities, which are then decoded back into features in the target code space, enabling effective alignment. Experiments show that, when integrating three modalities, CodeAlign requires only 8% of the training parameters of prior alignment methods, reduces communication load by 1024x, and achieves state-of-the-art perception performance on both OPV2V and DAIR-V2X dataset. Code will be released on https://github.com/cxliu0314/CodeAlign.

AI.tldr: CodeAlign：首个无需共现的跨模态对齐框架，通过特征-代码-特征翻译解决多智能体协同感知中的模态隔离问题，大幅减少参数和通信开销。
AI.motivation: 多智能体协同感知中，智能体间的异构性导致领域差距，而模态隔离问题（不同模态的智能体在训练数据中从未共现）进一步加剧了跨模态对齐的困难。现有基于空间重叠观测的监督对齐方法无法处理模态隔离问题。
AI.method: 提出CodeAlign框架，通过特征-代码-特征(FCF)翻译实现跨模态对齐。使用码本将各模态特征空间正则化为紧凑的代码空间，然后学习将源模态特征映射到目标模态对应代码，再解码为目标模态特征的翻译过程，无需空间对应关系。
AI.result: 在整合三种模态时，CodeAlign仅需先前对齐方法8%的训练参数，通信负载减少1024倍，在OPV2V和DAIR-V2X数据集上达到最先进的感知性能。
AI.conclusion: CodeAlign通过码本驱动的跨模态特征翻译，有效解决了多智能体协同感知中的模态隔离问题，实现了高效、轻量级的跨模态对齐，为异构多模态协同感知提供了新思路。

title: PonderLM-3: Adaptive Token-Wise Pondering with Differentiable Masking
summary: Test-time scaling has shown that allocating more additional computation at inference can improve generation quality, motivating a natural follow-up question: where should this computation be spent? Building on this insight, we introduce PonderLM-3, a pretraining framework for token-wise adaptive pondering that learns to selectively allocate additional computation under purely self-supervised objectives, built on top of the PonderLM-2 backbone. This makes additional inference computation an allocatable per-token resource, so tokens receive more computation only when it is beneficial, rather than paying a uniform extra cost. To make this allocation learnable while maintaining train-inference consistency, PonderLM-3 injects a differentiable attention mask during pretraining and pairs it with a matching hard pruning rule at inference. PonderLM-3 defines a stronger Pareto frontier: compared with existing recursive or adaptive baselines, it achieves lower pretraining perplexity at equal inference FLOPs. On downstream benchmarks, PonderLM-3 attains comparable performance to fixed-step PonderLM-2 under the same maximum number of additional computation steps, while using fewer inference FLOPs in practice. Overall, PonderLM-3 provides an end-to-end differentiable and train-inference consistent framework for token-wise adaptive computation, enabling additional inference compute to be allocated where it is most useful rather than paid uniformly by every token.

AI.tldr: PonderLM-3是一个基于PonderLM-2的预训练框架，通过可学习的token级自适应计算分配，在推理时根据需求为不同token分配不同计算量，而不是统一增加计算成本。
AI.motivation: 测试时扩展研究表明推理时增加计算可以提升生成质量，但关键问题是如何分配这些额外计算。现有方法通常对所有token统一增加计算成本，而实际上不同token需要的计算量不同。
AI.method: 在PonderLM-2基础上，通过注入可微注意力掩码进行预训练，配合推理时的硬剪枝规则，实现训练-推理一致性。框架学习在纯自监督目标下进行token级自适应计算分配。
AI.result: 在相同推理FLOPs下获得更低的预训练困惑度；在下游基准测试中，与固定步数的PonderLM-2相比，在相同最大额外计算步数下达到相当性能，但实际使用更少推理FLOPs。
AI.conclusion: PonderLM-3提供了一个端到端可微且训练-推理一致的token级自适应计算框架，使额外推理计算能够分配到最有用的地方，而不是每个token都支付统一成本。

title: Understanding LoRA as Knowledge Memory: An Empirical Analysis
summary: Continuous knowledge updating for pre-trained large language models (LLMs) is increasingly necessary yet remains challenging. Although inference-time methods like In-Context Learning (ICL) and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) are popular, they face constraints in context budgets, costs, and retrieval fragmentation. Departing from these context-dependent paradigms, this work investigates a parametric approach using Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) as a modular knowledge memory. Although few recent works examine this concept, the fundamental mechanics governing its capacity and composability remain largely unexplored. We bridge this gap through the first systematic empirical study mapping the design space of LoRA-based memory, ranging from characterizing storage capacity and optimizing internalization to scaling multi-module systems and evaluating long-context reasoning. Rather than proposing a single architecture, we provide practical guidance on the operational boundaries of LoRA memory. Overall, our findings position LoRA as the complementary axis of memory alongside RAG and ICL, offering distinct advantages.

AI.tldr: 该论文系统研究了LoRA作为模块化知识记忆的参数化方法，探索了其存储容量、优化内部化、多模块系统扩展和长上下文推理等设计空间，为LoRA记忆的操作边界提供实用指导。
AI.motivation: 预训练大语言模型需要持续知识更新，但现有推理时方法（如ICL和RAG）存在上下文预算、成本和检索碎片化等限制。本文探索参数化方法，将LoRA作为模块化知识记忆，填补该领域基础机制研究的空白。
AI.method: 通过系统的实证研究，映射LoRA记忆的设计空间：1) 表征存储容量；2) 优化知识内部化；3) 扩展多模块系统；4) 评估长上下文推理能力。不提出单一架构，而是提供操作边界的实用指导。
AI.result: 研究发现LoRA可以作为与RAG和ICL互补的记忆轴，具有独特优势。系统探索了LoRA记忆的操作边界和设计原则，为参数化知识更新提供了实证基础。
AI.conclusion: LoRA作为模块化知识记忆的参数化方法，与RAG和ICL形成互补，为LLM的持续知识更新提供了新的可行方向。研究为LoRA记忆的实际应用提供了系统指导。

title: Exploring Spatiotemporal Feature Propagation for Video-Level Compressive Spectral Reconstruction: Dataset, Model and Benchmark
summary: Recently, Spectral Compressive Imaging (SCI) has achieved remarkable success, unlocking significant potential for dynamic spectral vision. However, existing reconstruction methods, primarily image-based, suffer from two limitations: (i) Encoding process masks spatial-spectral features, leading to uncertainty in reconstructing missing information from single compressed measurements, and (ii) The frame-by-frame reconstruction paradigm fails to ensure temporal consistency, which is crucial in the video perception. To address these challenges, this paper seeks to advance spectral reconstruction from the image level to the video level, leveraging the complementary features and temporal continuity across adjacent frames in dynamic scenes. Initially, we construct the first high-quality dynamic hyperspectral image dataset (DynaSpec), comprising 30 sequences obtained through frame-scanning acquisition. Subsequently, we propose the Propagation-Guided Spectral Video Reconstruction Transformer (PG-SVRT), which employs a spatial-then-temporal attention to effectively reconstruct spectral features from abundant video information, while using a bridged token to reduce computational complexity. Finally, we conduct simulation experiments to assess the performance of four SCI systems, and construct a DD-CASSI prototype for real-world data collection and benchmarking. Extensive experiments demonstrate that PG-SVRT achieves superior performance in reconstruction quality, spectral fidelity, and temporal consistency, while maintaining minimal FLOPs. Project page: https://github.com/nju-cite/DynaSpec

AI.tldr: 提出了首个高质量动态高光谱图像数据集DynaSpec，并开发了PG-SVRT模型，将光谱重建从图像级提升到视频级，利用相邻帧的互补特征和时间连续性实现更好的重建质量。
AI.motivation: 现有光谱压缩成像（SCI）重建方法存在两个主要问题：1）编码过程掩盖了空间-光谱特征，导致从单次压缩测量重建缺失信息存在不确定性；2）逐帧重建范式无法保证时间一致性，而这对视频感知至关重要。需要将光谱重建从图像级提升到视频级。
AI.method: 1）构建首个高质量动态高光谱图像数据集DynaSpec（包含30个序列）；2）提出传播引导的光谱视频重建Transformer（PG-SVRT），采用空间-时间注意力机制从丰富的视频信息中有效重建光谱特征，并使用桥接token降低计算复杂度；3）进行仿真实验评估四个SCI系统性能，并构建DD-CASSI原型进行真实数据收集和基准测试。
AI.result: PG-SVRT在重建质量、光谱保真度和时间一致性方面表现出优越性能，同时保持最小的FLOPs。大量实验验证了该方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过将光谱重建从图像级提升到视频级，利用动态场景中相邻帧的互补特征和时间连续性，显著改善了光谱压缩成像的重建性能，为动态光谱视觉应用提供了有力工具。

title: MMR-Life: Piecing Together Real-life Scenes for Multimodal Multi-image Reasoning
summary: Recent progress in the reasoning capabilities of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) has empowered them to address more complex tasks such as scientific analysis and mathematical reasoning. Despite their promise, MLLMs' reasoning abilities across different scenarios in real life remain largely unexplored and lack standardized benchmarks for evaluation. To address this gap, we introduce MMR-Life, a comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate the diverse multimodal multi-image reasoning capabilities of MLLMs across real-life scenarios. MMR-Life consists of 2,646 multiple-choice questions based on 19,108 images primarily sourced from real-world contexts, comprehensively covering seven reasoning types: abductive, analogical, causal, deductive, inductive, spatial, and temporal. Unlike existing reasoning benchmarks, MMR-Life does not rely on domain-specific expertise but instead requires models to integrate information across multiple images and apply diverse reasoning abilities. The evaluation of 37 advanced models highlights the substantial challenge posed by MMR-Life. Even top models like GPT-5 achieve only 58% accuracy and display considerable variance in performance across reasoning types. Moreover, we analyze the reasoning paradigms of existing MLLMs, exploring how factors such as thinking length, reasoning method, and reasoning type affect their performance. In summary, MMR-Life establishes a comprehensive foundation for evaluating, analyzing, and improving the next generation of multimodal reasoning systems.

AI.tldr: MMR-Life是一个评估多模态大语言模型在真实生活场景中多图像推理能力的综合基准，包含2,646个选择题和19,108张图像，覆盖7种推理类型。
AI.motivation: 尽管多模态大语言模型在科学分析和数学推理等复杂任务上取得了进展，但它们在真实生活场景中的推理能力尚未得到充分探索，且缺乏标准化的评估基准。
AI.method: 构建了MMR-Life基准，包含2,646个基于19,108张真实世界图像的多选题，涵盖7种推理类型：溯因、类比、因果、演绎、归纳、空间和时间推理。评估了37个先进模型。
AI.result: MMR-Life对现有模型构成了重大挑战，即使是GPT-5等顶级模型也仅达到58%的准确率，且在不同推理类型上表现差异显著。模型性能受思考长度、推理方法和推理类型等因素影响。
AI.conclusion: MMR-Life为评估、分析和改进下一代多模态推理系统建立了全面的基础，揭示了当前模型在真实生活多图像推理方面的局限性。

title: A Deep Learning Framework for Heat Demand Forecasting using Time-Frequency Representations of Decomposed Features
summary: District Heating Systems are essential infrastructure for delivering heat to consumers across a geographic region sustainably, yet efficient management relies on optimizing diverse energy sources, such as wood, gas, electricity, and solar, in response to fluctuating demand. Aligning supply with demand is critical not only for ensuring reliable heat distribution but also for minimizing carbon emissions and extending infrastructure lifespan through lower operating temperatures. However, accurate multi-step forecasting to support these goals remains challenging due to complex, non-linear usage patterns and external dependencies. In this work, we propose a novel deep learning framework for day-ahead heat demand prediction that leverages time-frequency representations of historical data. By applying Continuous Wavelet Transform to decomposed demand and external meteorological factors, our approach enables Convolutional Neural Networks to learn hierarchical temporal features that are often inaccessible to standard time domain models. We systematically evaluate this method against statistical baselines, state-of-the-art Transformers, and emerging foundation models using multi-year data from three distinct Danish districts, a Danish city, and a German city. The results show a significant advancement, reducing the Mean Absolute Error by 36% to 43% compared to the strongest baselines, achieving forecasting accuracy of up to 95% across annual test datasets. Qualitative and statistical analyses further confirm the accuracy and robustness by reliably tracking volatile demand peaks where others fail. This work contributes both a high-performance forecasting architecture and critical insights into optimal feature composition, offering a validated solution for modern energy applications.

AI.tldr: 提出基于连续小波变换和CNN的深度学习框架，用于区域供热系统的日前热需求预测，相比现有方法将MAE降低36-43%，准确率达95%。
AI.motivation: 区域供热系统需要优化多种能源（木材、天然气、电力、太阳能）以满足波动需求，准确的多步预测对可靠供热、减少碳排放和延长基础设施寿命至关重要，但由于复杂的非线性使用模式和外部依赖，现有预测方法面临挑战。
AI.method: 提出新颖的深度学习框架，通过对历史需求和外部气象因素进行连续小波变换，将时间-频率表示输入卷积神经网络，学习标准时域模型难以捕捉的层次化时序特征。
AI.result: 在三个丹麦区域、一个丹麦城市和一个德国城市的多年度数据上评估，相比统计基线、最先进的Transformer和新兴基础模型，将平均绝对误差降低36-43%，在年度测试数据集上达到95%的预测准确率，并能可靠跟踪波动需求峰值。
AI.conclusion: 该工作不仅提供了高性能的预测架构，还提供了关于最优特征组合的关键见解，为现代能源应用提供了经过验证的解决方案。

title: Position: Evaluation of Visual Processing Should Be Human-Centered, Not Metric-Centered
summary: This position paper argues that the evaluation of modern visual processing systems should no longer be driven primarily by single-metric image quality assessment benchmarks, particularly in the era of generative and perception-oriented methods. Image restoration exemplifies this divergence: while objective IQA metrics enable reproducible, scalable evaluation, they have increasingly drifted apart from human perception and user preferences. We contend that this mismatch risks constraining innovation and misguiding research progress across visual processing tasks. Rather than rejecting metrics altogether, this paper calls for a rebalancing of evaluation paradigms, advocating a more human-centered, context-aware, and fine-grained approach to assessing the visual models' outcomes.

AI.tldr: 本文主张视觉处理系统评估不应再以单一图像质量评估指标为主导，特别是在生成式和感知导向方法时代。图像修复领域显示客观IQA指标与人类感知和用户偏好日益脱节，这种不匹配可能限制创新并误导研究方向。论文呼吁重新平衡评估范式，采用更以人为中心、情境感知和细粒度的方法。
AI.motivation: 现代视觉处理系统（特别是生成式和感知导向方法）的评估过度依赖单一图像质量评估指标，但这些客观指标与人类感知和用户偏好之间的差距日益扩大。这种不匹配可能限制创新、误导研究方向，并阻碍视觉处理任务的真正进步。
AI.method: 这是一篇立场论文，采用论证分析的方法。通过分析图像修复等领域的案例，展示客观IQA指标与人类感知的脱节现象。论文提出重新平衡评估范式的框架，主张从单一指标驱动转向更全面的评估方法。
AI.result: 论文识别了当前视觉处理系统评估中存在的根本问题：客观IQA指标与人类感知的脱节。虽然没有提供具体实验数据，但通过理论分析和案例论证，揭示了这种评估范式可能对研究创新产生的负面影响。
AI.conclusion: 视觉处理系统评估需要范式转变：从单一指标驱动转向更以人为中心、情境感知和细粒度的评估方法。不应完全抛弃客观指标，而是需要重新平衡评估体系，更好地反映人类感知和实际应用需求。

title: EstLLM: Enhancing Estonian Capabilities in Multilingual LLMs via Continued Pretraining and Post-Training
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are predominantly trained on English-centric data, resulting in uneven performance for smaller languages. We study whether continued pretraining (CPT) can substantially improve Estonian capabilities in a pretrained multilingual LLM while preserving its English and general reasoning performance. Using Llama 3.1 8B as the main base model, we perform CPT on a mixture that increases Estonian exposure while approximating the original training distribution through English replay and the inclusion of code, mathematics, and instruction-like data. We subsequently apply supervised fine-tuning, preference optimization, and chat vector merging to introduce robust instruction-following behavior. Evaluation on a comprehensive suite of Estonian benchmarks shows consistent gains in linguistic competence, knowledge, reasoning, translation quality, and instruction-following compared to the original base model and its instruction-tuned variant, while maintaining competitive performance on English benchmarks. These findings indicate that CPT, with an appropriately balanced data mixture, together with post-training alignment, can substantially improve single-language capabilities in pretrained multilingual LLMs.

AI.tldr: 通过持续预训练（CPT）和后续对齐技术，显著提升预训练多语言大模型在爱沙尼亚语上的能力，同时保持英语和通用推理性能。
AI.motivation: 当前大语言模型主要基于英语数据训练，导致对小语种（如爱沙尼亚语）的性能不均衡。研究旨在探索是否可以通过持续预训练显著改善预训练多语言模型在特定小语种上的能力，同时不损害其英语和通用推理性能。
AI.method: 使用Llama 3.1 8B作为基础模型，进行持续预训练，数据混合策略包括：增加爱沙尼亚语曝光、通过英语回放保持原始训练分布、包含代码、数学和类指令数据。随后应用监督微调、偏好优化和聊天向量合并来引入鲁棒的指令跟随行为。
AI.result: 在爱沙尼亚语基准测试中，相比原始基础模型及其指令调优变体，在语言能力、知识、推理、翻译质量和指令跟随方面获得一致提升。同时在英语基准测试中保持竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 通过适当平衡的数据混合进行持续预训练，结合后续对齐技术，可以显著提升预训练多语言大模型在单一语言上的能力，而不损害其他语言性能。

title: A Decomposition Framework for Certifiably Optimal Orthogonal Sparse PCA
summary:
Sparse Principal Component Analysis (SPCA) is an important technique for high-dimensional data analysis, improving interpretability by imposing sparsity on principal components. However, existing methods often fail to simultaneously guarantee sparsity, orthogonality, and optimality of the principal components.
  To address this challenge, this work introduces a novel Sparse Principal Component Analysis (SPCA) algorithm called \textsc{GS-SPCA} (SPCA with Gram-Schmidt Orthogonalization), which simultaneously enforces sparsity, orthogonality, and optimality. However, the original GS-SPCA algorithm is computationally expensive due to the inherent $\ell_0$-norm constraint. To address this issue, we propose two acceleration strategies:
  First, we combine \textbf{Branch-and-Bound} with the GS-SPCA algorithm. By incorporating this strategy, we are able to obtain $\varepsilon$-optimal solutions with a trade-off between precision and efficiency, significantly improving computational speed.
  Second, we propose a \textbf{decomposition framework} for efficiently solving \textbf{multiple} principal components. This framework approximates the covariance matrix using a block-diagonal matrix through a thresholding method, reducing the original SPCA problem to a set of block-wise subproblems on approximately block-diagonal matrices.

AI.tldr: 提出GS-SPCA算法，通过Gram-Schmidt正交化同时保证稀疏性、正交性和最优性，并使用分支定界和分解框架两种加速策略解决计算效率问题
AI.motivation: 现有稀疏主成分分析方法难以同时保证稀疏性、正交性和最优性，且计算效率低下，需要新的算法来解决这些问题
AI.method: 1. GS-SPCA算法：基于Gram-Schmidt正交化，同时保证稀疏性、正交性和最优性；2. 分支定界加速：在GS-SPCA中结合分支定界，获得ε-最优解；3. 分解框架：通过阈值方法将协方差矩阵近似为块对角矩阵，将原始问题分解为块状子问题
AI.result: 提出的GS-SPCA算法能够同时保证稀疏性、正交性和最优性，两种加速策略显著提高了计算效率，分支定界实现了精度与效率的权衡，分解框架有效处理多个主成分
AI.conclusion: GS-SPCA算法解决了稀疏主成分分析中同时保证稀疏性、正交性和最优性的难题，通过两种加速策略显著提升了计算效率，为高维数据分析提供了有效的工具

title: Exploring 3D Dataset Pruning
summary: Dataset pruning has been widely studied for 2D images to remove redundancy and accelerate training, while particular pruning methods for 3D data remain largely unexplored. In this work, we study dataset pruning for 3D data, where its observed common long-tail class distribution nature make optimization under conventional evaluation metrics Overall Accuracy (OA) and Mean Accuracy (mAcc) inherently conflicting, and further make pruning particularly challenging. To address this, we formulate pruning as approximating the full-data expected risk with a weighted subset, which reveals two key errors: coverage error from insufficient representativeness and prior-mismatch bias from inconsistency between subset-induced class weights and target metrics. We propose representation-aware subset selection with per-class retention quotas for long-tail coverage, and prior-invariant teacher supervision using calibrated soft labels and embedding-geometry distillation. The retention quota also serves as a switch to control the OA-mAcc trade-off. Extensive experiments on 3D datasets show that our method can improve both metrics across multiple settings while adapting to different downstream preferences. Our code is available at https://github.com/XiaohanZhao123/3D-Dataset-Pruning.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究3D数据集的剪枝方法，针对长尾分布问题，提出基于覆盖误差和先验失配偏差的加权子集选择框架，通过表示感知子集选择和先验不变教师监督来优化OA和mAcc指标。
AI.motivation: 3D数据集的剪枝方法研究不足，且3D数据通常具有长尾类别分布特性，导致在传统评估指标（总体准确率OA和平均准确率mAcc）下的优化存在内在冲突，使得剪枝特别具有挑战性。
AI.method: 将剪枝问题形式化为用加权子集近似完整数据的期望风险，识别出覆盖误差和先验失配偏差两个关键问题。提出表示感知子集选择（带每类保留配额）来保证长尾覆盖，以及先验不变教师监督（使用校准软标签和嵌入几何蒸馏）。保留配额还可作为控制OA-mAcc权衡的开关。
AI.result: 在多个3D数据集上的广泛实验表明，该方法能够在多种设置下同时改善OA和mAcc指标，并能适应不同的下游任务偏好。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为3D数据集剪枝提供了系统框架，有效解决了长尾分布下的优化冲突问题，通过控制保留配额可以灵活权衡不同评估指标。

title: What Exactly do Children Receive in Language Acquisition? A Case Study on CHILDES with Automated Detection of Filler-Gap Dependencies
summary: Children's acquisition of filler-gap dependencies has been argued by some to depend on innate grammatical knowledge, while others suggest that the distributional evidence available in child-directed speech suffices. Unfortunately, the relevant input is difficult to quantify at scale with fine granularity, making this question difficult to resolve. We present a system that identifies three core filler-gap constructions in spoken English corpora -- matrix wh-questions, embedded wh-questions, and relative clauses -- and further identifies the extraction site (i.e., subject vs. object vs. adjunct). Our approach combines constituency and dependency parsing, leveraging their complementary strengths for construction classification and extraction site identification. We validate the system on human-annotated data and find that it scores well across most categories. Applying the system to 57 English CHILDES corpora, we are able to characterize children's filler-gap input and their filler-gap production trajectories over the course of development, including construction-specific frequencies and extraction-site asymmetries. The resulting fine-grained labels enable future work in both acquisition and computational studies, which we demonstrate with a case study using filtered corpus training with language models.

AI.tldr: 开发了一个系统，用于识别英语口语语料库中的三种核心填充语-空位结构，并识别提取位置，应用于儿童语言发展研究和语言模型训练
AI.motivation: 解决儿童语言习得中关于填充语-空位依赖习得的争议：是依赖先天语法知识还是语料分布证据。现有研究难以大规模量化相关输入数据。
AI.method: 结合选区分析和依存分析的优势，开发系统识别英语口语中的三种核心填充语-空位结构（矩阵wh-问句、嵌入wh-问句、关系从句）及其提取位置（主语、宾语、附加语）
AI.result: 系统在人工标注数据上表现良好，应用于57个英语CHILDES语料库，能够描述儿童的填充语-空位输入及其发展轨迹，包括结构特定频率和提取位置不对称性
AI.conclusion: 该系统为语言习得和计算研究提供了细粒度标注，并通过语言模型的过滤语料训练案例展示了其应用价值

title: Demystifying Group Relative Policy Optimization: Its Policy Gradient is a U-Statistic
summary: Group relative policy optimization (GRPO), a core methodological component of DeepSeekMath and DeepSeek-R1, has emerged as a cornerstone for scaling reasoning capabilities of large language models. Despite its widespread adoption and the proliferation of follow-up works, the theoretical properties of GRPO remain less studied. This paper provides a unified framework to understand GRPO through the lens of classical U-statistics. We demonstrate that the GRPO policy gradient is inherently a U-statistic, allowing us to characterize its mean squared error (MSE), derive the finite-sample error bound and asymptotic distribution of the suboptimality gap for its learned policy. Our findings reveal that GRPO is asymptotically equivalent to an oracle policy gradient algorithm -- one with access to a value function that quantifies the goodness of its learning policy at each training iteration -- and achieves asymptotically optimal performance within a broad class of policy gradient algorithms. Furthermore, we establish a universal scaling law that offers principled guidance for selecting the optimal group size. Empirical experiments further validate our theoretical findings, demonstrating that the optimal group size is universal, and verify the oracle property of GRPO.

AI.tldr: 本文从经典U统计量视角为GRPO提供了统一理论框架，证明GRPO策略梯度本质上是U统计量，推导了其MSE、有限样本误差界和渐近分布，揭示了GRPO与具有价值函数访问权限的oracle策略梯度算法渐近等价，并建立了最优组选择的通用缩放定律。
AI.motivation: GRPO作为DeepSeekMath和DeepSeek-R1的核心方法组件，已成为扩展大语言模型推理能力的关键技术。尽管被广泛采用并涌现大量后续工作，但GRPO的理论性质研究相对不足。本文旨在填补这一理论空白，为GRPO提供严格的理论基础。
AI.method: 通过经典U统计量理论框架分析GRPO，证明GRPO策略梯度本质上是U统计量，基于此推导其均方误差、有限样本误差界和次优性差距的渐近分布。建立通用缩放定律指导最优组大小选择，并通过实证实验验证理论发现。
AI.result: 理论分析表明：1) GRPO策略梯度是U统计量；2) GRPO与具有价值函数访问权限的oracle策略梯度算法渐近等价；3) GRPO在广泛的策略梯度算法类中达到渐近最优性能；4) 建立了最优组选择的通用缩放定律。实证实验验证了最优组大小的普适性和GRPO的oracle性质。
AI.conclusion: 本文为GRPO提供了首个统一的理论框架，揭示了其与oracle策略梯度算法的渐近等价性，证明了其渐近最优性，并建立了指导最优组选择的通用缩放定律，为GRPO的实际应用提供了理论依据。

title: RC-GeoCP: Geometric Consensus for Radar-Camera Collaborative Perception
summary: Collaborative perception (CP) enhances scene understanding through multi-agent information sharing. While LiDAR-centric systems offer precise geometry, high costs and performance degradation in adverse weather necessitate multi-modal alternatives. Despite dense visual semantics and robust spatial measurements, the synergy between cameras and 4D radar remains underexplored in collaborative settings. This work introduces RC-GeoCP, the first framework to explore the fusion of 4D radar and images in CP. To resolve misalignment caused by depth ambiguity and spatial dispersion across agents, RC-GeoCP establishes a radar-anchored geometric consensus. Specifically, Geometric Structure Rectification (GSR) aligns visual semantics with geometry derived from radar to generate spatially grounded, geometry-consistent representations. Uncertainty-Aware Communication (UAC) formulates selective transmission as a conditional entropy reduction process to prioritize informative features based on inter-agent disagreement. Finally, the Consensus-Driven Assembler (CDA) aggregates multi-agent information via shared geometric anchors to form a globally coherent representation. We establish the first unified radar-camera CP benchmark on V2X-Radar and V2X-R, demonstrating state-of-the-art performance with significantly reduced communication overhead. Code will be released soon.

AI.tldr: RC-GeoCP是首个探索4D雷达与图像融合的协同感知框架，通过雷达锚定的几何共识解决多智能体间的错位问题，显著降低通信开销并实现SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 激光雷达系统成本高且在恶劣天气下性能下降，而相机和4D雷达的协同感知潜力尚未充分探索。现有方法存在深度模糊和空间分散导致的错位问题。
AI.method: 提出RC-GeoCP框架：1) 几何结构校正(GSR)将视觉语义与雷达几何对齐；2) 不确定性感知通信(UAC)基于智能体间分歧选择性传输信息；3) 共识驱动组装器(CDA)通过共享几何锚点聚合多智能体信息。
AI.result: 在V2X-Radar和V2X-R上建立首个统一雷达-相机协同感知基准，实现最先进性能，同时显著降低通信开销。
AI.conclusion: RC-GeoCP成功探索了4D雷达与图像在协同感知中的融合，通过几何共识解决错位问题，为多模态协同感知提供了有效解决方案。

title: Modeling Grammatical Hypothesis Testing in Young Learners: A Sequence-Based Learning Analytics Study of Morphosyntactic Reasoning in an Interactive Game
summary: This study investigates grammatical reasoning in primary school learners through a sequence-based learning analytics approach, leveraging fine-grained action sequences from an interactive game targeting morphosyntactic agreement in French. Unlike traditional assessments that rely on final answers, we treat each slider movement as a hypothesis-testing action, capturing real-time cognitive strategies during sentence construction. Analyzing 597 gameplay sessions (9,783 actions) from 100 students aged 8-11 in authentic classroom settings, we introduce Hamming distance to quantify proximity to valid grammatical solutions and examine convergence patterns across exercises with varying levels of difficulty. Results reveal that determiners and verbs are key sites of difficulty, with action sequences deviating from left-to-right usual treatment. This suggests learners often fix the verb first and adjust preceding elements. Exercises with fewer solutions exhibit slower and more erratic convergence, while changes in the closest valid solution indicate dynamic hypothesis revision. Our findings demonstrate how sequence-based analytics can uncover hidden dimensions of linguistic reasoning, offering a foundation for real-time scaffolding and teacher-facing tools in linguistically diverse classrooms.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过序列学习分析方法，利用法语形态句法一致性互动游戏中的细粒度动作序列，探究小学生的语法推理过程，发现学习者在构建句子时倾向于先确定动词再调整前置成分。
AI.motivation: 传统语法评估仅关注最终答案，无法捕捉学习过程中的实时认知策略。本研究旨在通过分析互动游戏中的动作序列，揭示语法推理的隐藏维度，为语言多样性课堂提供实时支架和教师工具。
AI.method: 采用序列学习分析方法，分析100名8-11岁学生在真实课堂环境中的597个游戏会话（9,783个动作）。引入汉明距离量化与有效语法解决方案的接近程度，并检查不同难度练习的收敛模式。
AI.result: 研究发现限定词和动词是主要难点，动作序列偏离了通常的左到右处理顺序，学习者倾向于先确定动词再调整前置成分。解决方案较少的练习表现出更慢、更不稳定的收敛，最近有效解决方案的变化表明动态假设修正。
AI.conclusion: 序列分析方法能够揭示语言推理的隐藏维度，为语言多样性课堂中的实时支架和教师工具提供基础，展示了细粒度动作序列分析在教育技术中的价值。

title: SphUnc: Hyperspherical Uncertainty Decomposition and Causal Identification via Information Geometry
summary: Reliable decision-making in complex multi-agent systems requires calibrated predictions and interpretable uncertainty. We introduce SphUnc, a unified framework combining hyperspherical representation learning with structural causal modeling. The model maps features to unit hypersphere latents using von Mises-Fisher distributions, decomposing uncertainty into epistemic and aleatoric components through information-geometric fusion. A structural causal model on spherical latents enables directed influence identification and interventional reasoning via sample-based simulation. Empirical evaluations on social and affective benchmarks demonstrate improved accuracy, better calibration, and interpretable causal signals, establishing a geometric-causal foundation for uncertainty-aware reasoning in multi-agent settings with higher-order interactions.

AI.tldr: SphUnc：结合超球面表示学习和结构因果建模的统一框架，用于多智能体系统中的不确定性感知推理，通过超球面潜在空间分解不确定性和识别因果影响。
AI.motivation: 复杂多智能体系统中需要校准的预测和可解释的不确定性来进行可靠决策。现有方法在处理高阶交互和因果推理方面存在局限，需要统一的几何-因果框架。
AI.method: 1. 使用von Mises-Fisher分布将特征映射到单位超球面潜在空间；2. 通过信息几何融合分解不确定性的认知和偶然成分；3. 在球面潜在变量上构建结构因果模型，支持基于样本模拟的定向影响识别和干预推理。
AI.result: 在社交和情感基准测试中表现出改进的准确性、更好的校准性，并产生可解释的因果信号，为具有高阶交互的多智能体环境建立了几何-因果基础。
AI.conclusion: SphUnc框架为多智能体系统中的不确定性感知推理提供了统一的几何-因果方法，通过超球面表示和结构因果建模实现了校准预测和可解释的不确定性分解。

title: Stateful Cross-layer Vision Modulation
summary: Recent multimodal large language models (MLLMs) widely adopt multi-layer visual feature fusion to enhance visual representation. However, existing approaches typically perform static concatenation or weighted aggregation after visual encoding, without intervening in the representation formation process itself. As a result, fine-grained details from early layers may be progressively suppressed during hierarchical abstraction. Moreover, directly introducing shallow-layer features into the language model often leads to semantic distribution mismatch with the visual feature space that the LLM's cross-attention layers were pretrained on, which typically requires additional adaptation or fine-tuning of the LLM. To address these limitations, we revisit visual representation learning from the perspective of representation evolution control and propose a cross-layer memory-modulated vision framework(SCVM). Specifically, we introduce a recursively updated cross-layer memory state inside the vision encoder to model long-range inter-layer dependencies. We further design a layer-wise feedback modulation mechanism that refreshes token representations at each layer based on the accumulated memory, thereby structurally regulating the representation evolution trajectory. In addition, we incorporate an auxiliary semantic alignment objective that explicitly supervises the final memory state, encouraging progressive compression and reinforcement of task-relevant information. Experimental results on multiple visual question answering and hallucination evaluation benchmarks demonstrate that SCVM achieves consistent performance improvements without expanding visual tokens, introducing additional vision encoders, or modifying or fine-tuning the language model.

AI.tldr: SCVM提出了一种跨层记忆调制视觉框架，通过递归更新的跨层记忆状态和层间反馈调制机制，在视觉编码器内部调控表征演化轨迹，提升多模态大语言模型的视觉表示能力。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLMs通常采用静态拼接或加权聚合进行视觉特征融合，但未干预表征形成过程本身。早期层的细粒度细节可能在层次抽象过程中被抑制，且浅层特征直接引入语言模型会导致语义分布不匹配，需要额外的LLM适配或微调。
AI.method: 1) 在视觉编码器内部引入递归更新的跨层记忆状态建模长程层间依赖；2) 设计层间反馈调制机制，基于累积记忆刷新每层的token表示；3) 引入辅助语义对齐目标，显式监督最终记忆状态，促进任务相关信息的渐进压缩和增强。
AI.result: 在多个视觉问答和幻觉评估基准测试中，SCVM在不扩展视觉token、不引入额外视觉编码器、不修改或微调语言模型的情况下，实现了持续的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: SCVM通过表征演化控制视角重新审视视觉表示学习，提供了一种有效的跨层记忆调制框架，能够改善MLLMs的视觉表示质量，同时保持模型架构的简洁性。

title: ClinConsensus: A Consensus-Based Benchmark for Evaluating Chinese Medical LLMs across Difficulty Levels
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly applied to health management, showing promise across disease prevention, clinical decision-making, and long-term care. However, existing medical benchmarks remain largely static and task-isolated, failing to capture the openness, longitudinal structure, and safety-critical complexity of real-world clinical workflows. We introduce ClinConsensus, a Chinese medical benchmark curated, validated, and quality-controlled by clinical experts. ClinConsensus comprises 2500 open-ended cases spanning the full continuum of care--from prevention and intervention to long-term follow-up--covering 36 medical specialties, 12 common clinical task types, and progressively increasing levels of complexity. To enable reliable evaluation of such complex scenarios, we adopt a rubric-based grading protocol and propose the Clinically Applicable Consistency Score (CACS@k). We further introduce a dual-judge evaluation framework, combining a high-capability LLM-as-judge with a distilled, locally deployable judge model trained via supervised fine-tuning, enabling scalable and reproducible evaluation aligned with physician judgment. Using ClinConsensus, we conduct a comprehensive assessment of several leading LLMs and reveal substantial heterogeneity across task themes, care stages, and medical specialties. While top-performing models achieve comparable overall scores, they differ markedly in reasoning, evidence use, and longitudinal follow-up capabilities, and clinically actionable treatment planning remains a key bottleneck. We release ClinConsensus as an extensible benchmark to support the development and evaluation of medical LLMs that are robust, clinically grounded, and ready for real-world deployment.

AI.tldr: ClinConsensus是一个中文医学基准，由临床专家构建，包含2500个开放式病例，涵盖36个医学专科和12种临床任务类型，采用双评委评估框架和CACS@k评分标准，用于评估医学LLMs的临床适用性。
AI.motivation: 现有医学基准大多是静态和任务孤立的，无法捕捉真实临床工作流程的开放性、纵向结构和安全关键复杂性，因此需要开发更贴近真实临床场景的评估基准。
AI.method: 1) 构建ClinConsensus基准：包含2500个开放式病例，覆盖预防、干预到长期随访的全过程，涵盖36个医学专科和12种临床任务类型；2) 采用基于量表的评分协议和CACS@k评分标准；3) 引入双评委评估框架：结合高能力LLM评委和本地可部署的蒸馏评委模型。
AI.result: 对多个领先LLMs的评估显示：1) 不同模型在任务主题、护理阶段和医学专科方面存在显著异质性；2) 表现最佳的模型总体得分相近，但在推理、证据使用和纵向随访能力方面差异明显；3) 临床可操作的治疗规划仍是关键瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: ClinConsensus作为一个可扩展的基准，支持开发和评估稳健、临床基础扎实且适合真实世界部署的医学LLMs，揭示了当前医学LLMs在临床适用性方面的局限性和改进方向。

title: PARWiS: Winner determination under shoestring budgets using active pairwise comparisons
summary: Determining a winner among a set of items using active pairwise comparisons under a limited budget is a challenging problem in preference-based learning. The goal of this study is to implement and evaluate the PARWiS algorithm, which shows spectral ranking and disruptive pair selection to identify the best item under shoestring budgets. This work have extended the PARWiS with a contextual variant (Contextual PARWiS) and a reinforcement learning-based variant (RL PARWiS), comparing them against baselines, including Double Thompson Sampling and a random selection strategy. This evaluation spans synthetic and real-world datasets (Jester and MovieLens), using budgets of 40, 60, and 80 comparisons for 20 items. The performance is measured through recovery fraction, true rank of reported winner, reported rank of true winner, and cumulative regret, alongside the separation metric \(Δ_{1,2}\). Results show that PARWiS and RL PARWiS outperform baselines across all datasets, particularly in the Jester dataset with a higher \(Δ_{1,2}\), while performance gaps narrow in the more challenging MovieLens dataset with a smaller \(Δ_{1,2}\). Contextual PARWiS shows comparable performance to PARWiS, indicating that contextual features may require further tuning to provide significant benefits.

AI.tldr: PARWiS算法通过谱排序和破坏性配对选择，在有限预算下进行主动成对比较以确定最佳项目。扩展了上下文变体和强化学习变体，在合成和真实数据集上评估性能。
AI.motivation: 在偏好学习中，如何在有限预算下通过主动成对比较确定最佳项目是一个具有挑战性的问题。传统方法在预算受限时效果不佳，需要更高效的算法来识别最优项目。
AI.method: 提出PARWiS算法，结合谱排序和破坏性配对选择策略。扩展了两种变体：Contextual PARWiS（利用上下文特征）和RL PARWiS（基于强化学习）。在40、60、80次比较预算下，对20个项目进行评估，使用合成数据集和真实数据集（Jester和MovieLens）。
AI.result: PARWiS和RL PARWiS在所有数据集上均优于基线方法（Double Thompson Sampling和随机选择）。在Δ₁,₂较大的Jester数据集上表现尤为突出，而在Δ₁,₂较小的MovieLens数据集上性能差距缩小。Contextual PARWiS与原始PARWiS性能相当，表明上下文特征需要进一步调优才能发挥显著优势。
AI.conclusion: PARWiS算法在有限预算的主动成对比较任务中表现出色，特别是其强化学习变体。上下文特征的整合需要更精细的设计才能提供额外价值。该研究为偏好学习中的高效项目选择提供了有效解决方案。

title: Act Like a Pathologist: Tissue-Aware Whole Slide Image Reasoning
summary: Computational pathology has advanced rapidly in recent years, driven by domain-specific image encoders and growing interest in using vision-language models to answer natural-language questions about diseases. Yet, the core problem behind pathology question-answering remains unsolved, considering that a gigapixel slide contains far more information than necessary for a given question. Pathologists naturally navigate tissue and morphology complexity by scanning broadly, and zooming in selectively according to the clinical questions. Current models, in contrast, rely on uniform patch sampling or broad attention maps, often attending equally to irrelevant regions while overlooking key visual evidence. In this work, we try to bring models closer to how humans actually examine slides. We propose a question-guided, tissue-aware, and coarse-to-fine retrieval framework, HistoSelect, that consists of two key components: a group sampler that identifies question-relevant tissue regions, followed by a patch selector that retrieves the most informative patches within those regions. By selecting only the most informative patches, our method becomes significantly more efficient: reducing visual token usage by 70% on average, while improving accuracy across three pathology QA tasks. Evaluated on 356,000 question-answer pairs, our approach outperforms existing methods and produces answers grounded in interpretable, pathologist-consistent regions. Our results suggest that bringing human-like search and attention patterns into WSI reasoning is a promising direction for building practical and reliable pathology VLMs.

AI.tldr: 提出HistoSelect框架，通过问题引导、组织感知的粗到细检索机制，在病理图像问答中模拟人类病理学家观察模式，显著减少视觉token使用（平均70%）并提升准确性。
AI.motivation: 当前病理图像问答模型采用均匀采样或广泛注意力机制，无法像人类病理学家那样根据临床问题选择性放大关键区域，导致对无关区域过度关注而忽略关键视觉证据。
AI.method: 提出两阶段框架：1) 组采样器识别问题相关的组织区域；2) 补丁选择器在这些区域内检索最具信息量的图像块。通过问题引导、组织感知的粗到细检索机制模拟人类观察模式。
AI.result: 在356,000个问答对上评估，相比现有方法表现更优，平均减少70%视觉token使用，在三个病理问答任务上均提升准确性，产生可解释、与病理学家一致的答案。
AI.conclusion: 将人类搜索和注意力模式引入全切片图像推理是构建实用可靠病理视觉语言模型的有前景方向，HistoSelect框架通过选择性关注机制显著提升效率和准确性。

title: Recursive Think-Answer Process for LLMs and VLMs
summary: Think-Answer reasoners such as DeepSeek-R1 have made notable progress by leveraging interpretable internal reasoning. However, despite the frequent presence of self-reflective cues like "Oops!", they remain vulnerable to output errors during single-pass inference. To address this limitation, we propose an efficient Recursive Think-Answer Process (R-TAP) that enables models to engage in iterative reasoning cycles and generate more accurate answers, going beyond conventional single-pass approaches. Central to this approach is a confidence generator that evaluates the certainty of model responses and guides subsequent improvements. By incorporating two complementary rewards-Recursively Confidence Increase Reward and Final Answer Confidence Reward-we show that R-TAP-enhanced models consistently outperform conventional single-pass methods for both large language models (LLMs) and vision-language models (VLMs). Moreover, by analyzing the frequency of "Oops"-like expressions in model responses, we find that R-TAP-applied models exhibit significantly fewer self-reflective patterns, resulting in more stable and faster inference-time reasoning. We hope R-TAP pave the way evolving into efficient and elaborated methods to refine the reasoning processes of future AI.

AI.tldr: 提出R-TAP（递归思考-回答过程），通过迭代推理循环和置信度评估机制，改进Think-Answer推理器的单次推理限制，提升LLM和VLM的准确性和推理稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有Think-Answer推理器（如DeepSeek-R1）虽然利用可解释的内部推理取得了进展，但在单次推理过程中仍然容易产生输出错误，尽管经常出现"Oops!"等自我反思提示。需要解决单次推理的局限性。
AI.method: 提出高效的递归思考-回答过程（R-TAP），使模型能够进行迭代推理循环。核心是置信度生成器，用于评估模型响应的确定性并指导后续改进。通过结合两种互补奖励：递归置信度增加奖励和最终答案置信度奖励。
AI.result: R-TAP增强的模型在大型语言模型（LLMs）和视觉语言模型（VLMs）上都持续优于传统的单次推理方法。通过分析模型响应中"Oops"类表达的出现频率，发现应用R-TAP的模型表现出显著更少的自我反思模式，推理更稳定快速。
AI.conclusion: R-TAP为未来AI推理过程的精细化改进提供了高效且完善的方法路径，有望推动推理能力的演进。

title: Scaling of learning time for high dimensional inputs
summary: Representation learning from complex data typically involves models with a large number of parameters, which in turn require large amounts of data samples. In neural network models, model complexity grows with the number of inputs to each neuron, with a trade-off between model expressivity and learning time. A precise characterization of this trade-off would help explain the connectivity and learning times observed in artificial and biological networks. We present a theoretical analysis of how learning time depends on input dimensionality for a Hebbian learning model performing independent component analysis. Based on the geometry of high-dimensional spaces, we show that the learning dynamics reduce to a unidimensional problem, with learning times dependent only on initial conditions. For higher input dimensions, initial parameters have smaller learning gradients and larger learning times. We find that learning times have supralinear scaling, becoming quickly prohibitive for high input dimensions. These results reveal a fundamental limitation for learning in high dimensions and help elucidate how the optimal design of neural networks depends on data complexity. Our approach outlines a new framework for analyzing learning dynamics and model complexity in neural network models.

AI.tldr: 论文通过理论分析发现，在高维空间中，Hebbian学习模型的学习时间随输入维度超线性增长，揭示了高维学习的基本限制。
AI.motivation: 研究神经网络模型复杂度与学习时间之间的权衡关系，解释人工和生物网络中观察到的连接性和学习时间模式，为神经网络最优设计提供理论基础。
AI.method: 基于高维空间几何特性，对执行独立成分分析的Hebbian学习模型进行理论分析，将学习动力学简化为单维问题，推导学习时间与输入维度的关系。
AI.result: 学习时间随输入维度超线性增长，高维情况下学习梯度变小、学习时间急剧增加，揭示了高维学习的基本限制。
AI.conclusion: 高维学习存在根本性限制，神经网络最优设计需考虑数据复杂度，为分析神经网络学习动力学和模型复杂度提供了新框架。

title: Direct low-field MRI super-resolution using undersampled k-space
comment: 4 pages, 4 figures, conference (The IEEE International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI))
summary: Low-field magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) provides affordable access to diagnostic imaging but suffers from prolonged acquisition and limited image quality. Accelerated imaging can be achieved with k-space undersampling, while super-resolution (SR) and image quality transfer (IQT) methods typically rely on spatial-domain post-processing. In this work, we propose a novel framework for reconstructing high-field MR like images directly from undersampled low-field k-space. Our approach employs a k-space dual channel U-Net that processes the real and imaginary components of undersampled k-space to restore missing frequency content. Experiments on low-field brain MRI demonstrate that our k-space-driven image enhancement consistently outperforms the counterpart spatial-domain method. Furthermore, reconstructions from undersampled k-space achieve image quality comparable to full k-space acquisitions. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work that investigates low-field MRI SR/IQT directly from undersampled k-space.

AI.tldr: 提出一种直接从欠采样低场k空间重建高场MRI图像的新框架，使用k空间双通道U-Net处理实部和虚部分量来恢复缺失频率内容
AI.motivation: 低场MRI虽然成本较低，但存在采集时间长、图像质量有限的问题。传统方法通常依赖空间域后处理，而本文探索直接从欠采样k空间进行超分辨率和图像质量提升
AI.method: 采用k空间双通道U-Net架构，直接处理欠采样低场k空间的实部和虚部分量，通过恢复缺失的频率内容来重建高场MRI图像
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在低场脑MRI上始终优于对应的空间域方法，且从欠采样k空间重建的图像质量可与完整k空间采集相媲美
AI.conclusion: 这是首个直接从欠采样k空间研究低场MRI超分辨率和图像质量提升的工作，为低场MRI图像增强提供了新的k空间驱动方法

title: LLMs as Strategic Actors: Behavioral Alignment, Risk Calibration, and Argumentation Framing in Geopolitical Simulations
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly proposed as agents in strategic decision environments, yet their behavior in structured geopolitical simulations remains under-researched. We evaluate six popular state-of-the-art LLMs alongside results from human results across four real-world crisis simulation scenarios, requiring models to select predefined actions and justify their decisions across multiple rounds. We compare models to humans in action alignment, risk calibration through chosen actions' severity, and argumentative framing grounded in international relations theory. Results show that models approximate human decision patterns in base simulation rounds but diverge over time, displaying distinct behavioural profiles and strategy updates. LLM explanations for chosen actions across all models exhibit a strong normative-cooperative framing centered on stability, coordination, and risk mitigation, with limited adversarial reasoning.

AI.tldr: 评估6个主流LLM在4个真实世界危机模拟场景中的战略决策表现，与人类结果对比，分析行动选择、风险校准和论证框架差异
AI.motivation: LLM越来越多地被提议作为战略决策环境中的智能体，但它们在结构化地缘政治模拟中的行为研究不足。需要了解LLM在复杂战略环境中的决策模式、风险偏好和论证逻辑，以评估其作为决策代理的适用性。
AI.method: 在4个真实世界危机模拟场景中，评估6个最先进的LLM与人类参与者的表现。模型需要选择预定义行动并在多轮中为其决策提供理由。从三个维度比较：行动对齐度、通过所选行动严重程度衡量的风险校准、基于国际关系理论的论证框架分析。
AI.result: 模型在基础模拟轮次中近似人类决策模式，但随时间推移出现分歧，展现出不同的行为特征和策略更新。所有LLM对所选行动的解释都表现出强烈的规范-合作框架，强调稳定性、协调和风险缓解，对抗性推理有限。
AI.conclusion: LLM在战略决策环境中表现出与人类相似但存在系统性差异的行为模式，特别是在论证框架上倾向于规范合作而非对抗性思维。这为LLM作为战略决策代理的适用性提供了重要见解。

title: Operator Learning Using Weak Supervision from Walk-on-Spheres
summary: Training neural PDE solvers is often bottlenecked by expensive data generation or unstable physics-informed neural network (PINN) that involves challenging optimization landscapes due to higher-order derivatives. To tackle this issue, we propose an alternative approach using Monte Carlo approaches to estimate the solution to the PDE as a stochastic process for weak supervision during training. Leveraging the walk-on-spheres method, we introduce a learning scheme called \emph{Walk-on-Spheres Neural Operator (WoS-NO)} which uses weak supervision from WoS to train any given neural operator. We propose to amortize the cost of Monte Carlo walks across the distribution of PDE instances using stochastic representations from the WoS algorithm to generate cheap, noisy, estimates of the PDE solution during training. This is formulated into a data-free physics-informed objective where a neural operator is trained to regress against these weak supervisions, allowing the operator to learn a generalized solution map for an entire family of PDEs. This strategy results in a mesh-free framework that operates without expensive pre-computed datasets, avoids the need for computing higher-order derivatives for loss functions that are memory-intensive and unstable, and demonstrates zero-shot generalization to novel PDE parameters and domains. Experiments show that for the same number of training steps, our method exhibits up to 8.75$\times$ improvement in $L_2$-error compared to standard physics-informed training schemes, up to 6.31$\times$ improvement in training speed, and reductions of up to 2.97$\times$ in GPU memory consumption. We present the code at https://github.com/neuraloperator/WoS-NO

AI.tldr: 提出WoS-NO方法，使用蒙特卡洛随机游走（walk-on-spheres）为神经算子提供弱监督训练，避免昂贵数据生成和PINN的高阶导数计算问题
AI.motivation: 传统神经PDE求解器训练面临两个主要瓶颈：1）昂贵的数据生成成本；2）物理信息神经网络（PINN）因高阶导数导致的优化困难和不稳定性。需要一种既能避免数据生成成本，又能绕过PINN优化挑战的方法。
AI.method: 提出Walk-on-Spheres Neural Operator (WoS-NO)：利用walk-on-spheres蒙特卡洛方法将PDE解表示为随机过程，为神经算子提供弱监督训练。通过随机表示生成廉价、有噪声的PDE解估计，形成无数据的物理信息目标函数，训练神经算子回归这些弱监督信号。
AI.result: 相比标准物理信息训练方案：L2误差提升8.75倍，训练速度提升6.31倍，GPU内存消耗减少2.97倍。方法具有零样本泛化能力，能适应新的PDE参数和域。
AI.conclusion: WoS-NO提供了一种无网格、无预计算数据集的框架，避免了高阶导数计算的内存密集和不稳定性问题，通过蒙特卡洛弱监督实现了高效稳定的神经算子训练。

title: Specializing Foundation Models via Mixture of Low-Rank Experts for Comprehensive Head CT Analysis
summary: Foundation models pre-trained on large-scale datasets demonstrate strong transfer learning capabilities; however, their adaptation to complex multi-label diagnostic tasks-such as comprehensive head CT finding detection-remains understudied. Standard parameter-efficient fine-tuning methods such as LoRA apply uniform adaptations across pathology types, which may limit performance for diverse medical findings. We propose a Mixture of Low-Rank Experts (MoLRE) framework that extends LoRA with multiple specialized low-rank adapters and unsupervised soft routing. This approach enables conditional feature adaptation with less than 0.5% additional parameters and without explicit pathology supervision. We present a comprehensive benchmark of MoLRE across six state-of-the-art medical imaging foundation models spanning 2D and 3D architectures, general-domain, medical-domain, and head CT-specific pretraining, and model sizes ranging from 7M to 431M parameters. Using over 70,000 non-contrast head CT scans with 75 annotated findings-including hemorrhage, infarction, trauma, mass lesions, structural abnormalities, and chronic changes-our experiments demonstrate consistent performance improvements across all models. Gains vary substantially: general-purpose and medical-domain models show the largest improvements (DINOv3-Base: +4.6%; MedGemma: +4.3%), whereas 3D CT-specialized or very large models show more modest gains (+0.2-1.3%). The combination of MoLRE and MedGemma achieves the highest average detection AUC of 0.917. These findings highlight the importance of systematic benchmarking on target clinical tasks, as pretraining domain, architecture, and model scale interact in non-obvious ways.

AI.tldr: 提出MoLRE框架，通过混合低秩专家和软路由机制，在医学影像多标签诊断任务中实现条件特征适应，相比标准LoRA方法获得显著性能提升。
AI.motivation: 基础模型在医学多标签诊断任务（如头CT检测）中的适应仍待研究。标准的参数高效微调方法（如LoRA）对所有病理类型应用统一适应，可能限制了多样化医学发现的性能表现。
AI.method: 提出混合低秩专家（MoLRE）框架，扩展LoRA方法，包含多个专业化低秩适配器和无监督软路由机制，实现条件特征适应，仅增加不到0.5%的参数且无需显式病理监督。
AI.result: 在六个最先进的医学影像基础模型上进行全面基准测试，涵盖2D/3D架构、通用/医学/头CT专用预训练，模型规模从7M到431M参数。使用超过70,000个非对比头CT扫描和75个标注发现，所有模型均获得一致性能提升：通用和医学领域模型提升最大（DINOv3-Base: +4.6%; MedGemma: +4.3%），3D CT专用或超大模型提升较小（+0.2-1.3%）。MoLRE+MedGemma组合达到最高平均检测AUC 0.917。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明预训练领域、架构和模型规模以非明显方式相互作用，强调在目标临床任务上进行系统基准测试的重要性。MoLRE框架为医学影像多标签诊断任务提供了有效的参数高效微调方案。

title: LongRLVR: Long-Context Reinforcement Learning Requires Verifiable Context Rewards
summary: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has significantly advanced the reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs) by optimizing them against factual outcomes. However, this paradigm falters in long-context scenarios, as its reliance on internal parametric knowledge is ill-suited for tasks requiring contextual grounding--the ability to find and reason over externally provided information. We identify a key reason for this failure: a reward based solely on the final answer is too sparse to effectively guide the model for identifying relevant evidence. We formally prove that the outcome-only reward leads to significant vanishing gradients for the context grounding process, rendering learning intractable. To overcome this bottleneck, we introduce LongRLVR to augment the sparse answer reward with a dense and verifiable context reward. This auxiliary signal directly incentivizes the model for selecting the correct grounding information, providing a robust learning gradient that solves the underlying optimization challenge. We validate our method on challenging long-context benchmarks using Qwen and LLaMA models. LongRLVR consistently and significantly outperforms the standard RLVR across all models and benchmarks, e.g., boosting a 14B model's scores on RULER-QA from 73.17 to 88.90 and on LongBench v2 from 39.8 to 46.5. Our work demonstrates that explicitly rewarding the grounding process is a critical and effective strategy for unlocking the full reasoning potential of LLMs in long-context applications. Our code is available at https://github.com/real-absolute-AI/LongRLVR.

AI.tldr: LongRLVR通过引入可验证的上下文奖励来解决RLVR在长上下文场景中的失败问题，显著提升了LLM在长上下文推理任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: RLVR通过基于事实结果的优化显著提升了LLM的推理能力，但在长上下文场景中表现不佳。这是因为仅依赖最终答案的稀疏奖励无法有效指导模型识别相关证据，导致上下文接地过程梯度消失，学习变得困难。
AI.method: 提出LongRLVR方法，在稀疏的答案奖励基础上增加了密集且可验证的上下文奖励。这种辅助信号直接激励模型选择正确的接地信息，提供稳健的学习梯度来解决底层优化挑战。
AI.result: 在Qwen和LLaMA模型上进行的长上下文基准测试中，LongRLVR始终显著优于标准RLVR。例如，将14B模型在RULER-QA上的得分从73.17提升到88.90，在LongBench v2上从39.8提升到46.5。
AI.conclusion: 明确奖励接地过程是解锁LLM在长上下文应用中完整推理潜力的关键有效策略。LongRLVR通过解决稀疏奖励问题，显著提升了模型在需要上下文接地的长上下文任务中的表现。

title: Subliminal Signals in Preference Labels
summary: As AI systems approach superhuman capabilities, scalable oversight increasingly relies on LLM-as-a-judge frameworks where models evaluate and guide each other's training. A core assumption is that binary preference labels provide only semantic supervision about response quality. We challenge this assumption by demonstrating that preference labels can function as a covert communication channel. We show that even when a neutral student model generates semantically unbiased completions, a biased judge can transmit unintended behavioral traits through preference assignments, which even strengthen across iterative alignment rounds. Our findings suggest that robust oversight in superalignment settings requires mechanisms that can detect and mitigate subliminal preference transmission, particularly when judges may pursue unintended objectives.

AI.tldr: 研究发现偏好标签可作为隐蔽通信渠道，即使学生模型生成语义无偏的补全，有偏见的评判者也能通过偏好分配传递非预期行为特征，且在迭代对齐中强化
AI.motivation: 随着AI系统接近超人类能力，可扩展监督越来越依赖LLM作为评判者的框架，其中模型相互评估和指导训练。核心假设是二元偏好标签仅提供关于响应质量的语义监督。我们挑战这一假设，证明偏好标签可作为隐蔽通信渠道
AI.method: 通过实验证明即使中性学生模型生成语义无偏的补全，有偏见的评判者也能通过偏好分配传递非预期行为特征，并观察这些特征在迭代对齐轮次中的强化过程
AI.result: 发现偏好标签确实可作为隐蔽通信渠道，有偏见的评判者能够通过偏好分配传递非预期行为特征，且这些特征在迭代对齐过程中会得到加强
AI.conclusion: 在超对齐设置中，稳健监督需要能够检测和缓解潜意识偏好传递的机制，特别是当评判者可能追求非预期目标时

title: CoLC: Communication-Efficient Collaborative Perception with LiDAR Completion
summary: Collaborative perception empowers autonomous agents to share complementary information and overcome perception limitations. While early fusion offers more perceptual complementarity and is inherently robust to model heterogeneity, its high communication cost has limited its practical deployment, prompting most existing works to favor intermediate or late fusion. To address this, we propose a communication-efficient early Collaborative perception framework that incorporates LiDAR Completion to restore scene completeness under sparse transmission, dubbed as CoLC. Specifically, the CoLC integrates three complementary designs. First, each neighbor agent applies Foreground-Aware Point Sampling (FAPS) to selectively transmit informative points that retain essential structural and contextual cues under bandwidth constraints. The ego agent then employs Completion-Enhanced Early Fusion (CEEF) to reconstruct dense pillars from the received sparse inputs and adaptively fuse them with its own observations, thereby restoring spatial completeness. Finally, the Dense-Guided Dual Alignment (DGDA) strategy enforces semantic and geometric consistency between the enhanced and dense pillars during training, ensuring consistent and robust feature learning. Experiments on both simulated and real-world datasets demonstrate that CoLC achieves superior perception-communication trade-offs and remains robust under heterogeneous model settings. The code is available at https://github.com/CatOneTwo/CoLC.

AI.tldr: CoLC：一种通信高效的早期协作感知框架，通过LiDAR补全在稀疏传输下恢复场景完整性，实现感知与通信的良好权衡
AI.motivation: 早期融合协作感知具有更好的感知互补性和模型异构鲁棒性，但通信成本高限制了实际部署。现有工作大多采用中晚期融合，需要解决早期融合的通信效率问题。
AI.method: 提出CoLC框架，包含三个互补设计：1) 前景感知点采样(FAPS)选择性传输信息点；2) 补全增强早期融合(CEEF)从稀疏输入重建密集支柱并自适应融合；3) 密集引导双对齐(DGDA)确保训练中语义和几何一致性。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实数据集上的实验表明，CoLC实现了优越的感知-通信权衡，并在异构模型设置下保持鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: CoLC通过LiDAR补全有效解决了早期协作感知的高通信成本问题，为实际部署提供了可行方案。

title: Zero- and Few-Shot Named-Entity Recognition: Case Study and Dataset in the Crime Domain (CrimeNER)
comment: Sent for review at the main conference of the International Conference of Document Analysis and Recognition (ICDAR) 2026
summary: The extraction of critical information from crime-related documents is a crucial task for law enforcement agencies. Named-Entity Recognition (NER) can perform this task in extracting information about the crime, the criminal, or law enforcement agencies involved. However, there is a considerable lack of adequately annotated data on general real-world crime scenarios. To address this issue, we present CrimeNER, a case-study of Crime-related zero- and Few-Shot NER, and a general Crime-related Named-Entity Recognition database (CrimeNERdb) consisting of more than 1.5k annotated documents for the NER task extracted from public reports on terrorist attacks and the U.S. Department of Justice's press notes. We define 5 types of coarse crime entity and a total of 22 types of fine-grained entity. We address the quality of the case-study and the annotated data with experiments on Zero and Few-Shot settings with State-of-the-Art NER models as well as generalist and commonly used Large Language Models.

AI.tldr: 提出了CrimeNER，一个犯罪相关零样本和少样本命名实体识别案例研究，以及包含1.5k+标注文档的犯罪相关NER数据库(CrimeNERdb)，用于从犯罪文档中提取关键信息。
AI.motivation: 从犯罪相关文档中提取关键信息对执法机构至关重要，但缺乏针对真实世界犯罪场景的充分标注数据，这限制了NER模型在犯罪领域的应用。
AI.method: 构建了CrimeNERdb数据库，包含1.5k+从恐怖袭击报告和美国司法部新闻稿中提取的标注文档，定义了5种粗粒度犯罪实体和22种细粒度实体类型。在零样本和少样本设置下，使用最先进的NER模型以及通用大型语言模型进行实验。
AI.result: 创建了首个大规模的犯罪相关NER数据库，为犯罪信息提取提供了基准数据集。实验评估了不同模型在零样本和少样本设置下的性能，为犯罪领域的NER任务提供了参考基准。
AI.conclusion: CrimeNERdb填补了犯罪领域标注数据的空白，为犯罪信息提取研究提供了重要资源。零样本和少样本实验展示了当前模型在犯罪NER任务上的能力，为未来研究奠定了基础。

title: Learn Hard Problems During RL with Reference Guided Fine-tuning
summary:
Reinforcement learning (RL) for mathematical reasoning can suffer from reward sparsity: for challenging problems, LLM fails to sample any correct trajectories, preventing RL from receiving meaningful positive feedback. At the same time, there often exist human-written reference solutions along with the problem (e.g., problems from AoPS), but directly fine-tuning on these solutions offers no benefit because models often cannot imitate human proofs that lie outside their own reasoning distribution.
  We introduce Reference-Guided Fine-Tuning (ReGFT), a simple and effective method that utilizes human-written reference solutions to synthesize positive trajectories on hard problems and train on them before RL. For each problem, we provide the model with a partial reference solution and let it generate its own reasoning trace, ensuring the resulting trajectories remain in the model's reasoning space while still benefiting from reference guidance.
  Fine-tuning on these reference-guided trajectories increases the number of solvable problems and produces a checkpoint that receives more positive rewards during RL. Across three benchmarks (AIME24, AIME25, BeyondAIME), ReGFT consistently improves supervised accuracy, accelerates DAPO training, and raises the final performance plateau of RL. Our results show that ReGFT effectively overcomes reward sparsity and unlocks stronger RL-based mathematical reasoning.

AI.tldr: ReGFT是一种利用人类参考解生成模型可学习的推理轨迹的方法，通过部分参考解引导模型生成自身推理空间内的轨迹，解决了数学推理中RL的奖励稀疏问题，显著提升监督准确率和RL训练效果。
AI.motivation: 数学推理中的强化学习面临奖励稀疏问题：对于难题，LLM无法采样到任何正确轨迹，导致RL无法获得有意义的正面反馈。同时，虽然存在人类编写的参考解，但直接在这些解上进行微调没有效果，因为模型无法模仿超出自身推理分布的人类证明。
AI.method: 提出Reference-Guided Fine-Tuning (ReGFT)方法：利用人类参考解为难题合成正面轨迹。对每个问题，提供部分参考解让模型生成自己的推理轨迹，确保轨迹保持在模型的推理空间内，同时受益于参考指导。在RL训练前对这些参考引导的轨迹进行微调。
AI.result: 在三个基准测试(AIME24, AIME25, BeyondAIME)上，ReGFT持续提升监督准确率，加速DAPO训练，并提高RL的最终性能平台。有效克服奖励稀疏问题，解锁更强的基于RL的数学推理能力。
AI.conclusion: ReGFT通过利用人类参考解生成模型可学习的推理轨迹，有效解决了数学推理中RL的奖励稀疏问题，为RL训练提供了更好的初始化，显著提升了数学推理性能。

title: SCOUT: Fast Spectral CT Imaging in Ultra LOw-data Regimes via PseUdo-label GeneraTion
summary: Noise and artifacts during computed tomography (CT) scans are a fundamental challenge affecting disease diagnosis. However, current methods either involve excessively long reconstruction times or rely on data-driven models for optimization, failing to adequately consider the valuable information inherent in the data itself, especially medical 3D data. This work proposes a reconstruction method under ultra-low raw data conditions, requiring no external data and avoiding lengthy pre-training processes. By leveraging spatial nonlocal similarity and the conjugate properties of the projection domain to generate pseudo-3D data for self-supervised training, high-fidelity results can be achieved in a very short time. Extensive experiments demonstrate that this method not only mitigates detector-induced ring artifacts but also exhibits unprecedented capabilities in detail recovery. This method provides a new paradigm for research using unlabeled raw projection data. Code is available at https://github.com/yqx7150/SCOUT.

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需外部数据和预训练的超低剂量CT重建方法，利用空间非局部相似性和投影域共轭特性生成伪3D数据进行自监督训练，实现快速高保真重建
AI.motivation: CT扫描中的噪声和伪影严重影响疾病诊断，现有方法要么重建时间过长，要么依赖数据驱动模型进行优化，未能充分利用数据本身（特别是医学3D数据）的宝贵信息
AI.method: 提出超低原始数据条件下的重建方法，无需外部数据，避免冗长预训练过程。利用空间非局部相似性和投影域共轭特性生成伪3D数据进行自监督训练
AI.result: 实验表明该方法不仅能减轻探测器引起的环形伪影，还在细节恢复方面展现出前所未有的能力，可在极短时间内实现高保真结果
AI.conclusion: 该方法为使用未标记原始投影数据的研究提供了新范式，代码已开源

title: Organizing, Orchestrating, and Benchmarking Agent Skills at Ecosystem Scale
summary: The rapid proliferation of Claude agent skills has raised the central question of how to effectively leverage, manage, and scale the agent skill ecosystem. In this paper, we propose AgentSkillOS, the first principled framework for skill selection, orchestration, and ecosystem-level management. AgentSkillOS comprises two stages: (i) Manage Skills, which organizes skills into a capability tree via node-level recursive categorization for efficient discovery; and (ii) Solve Tasks, which retrieves, orchestrates, and executes multiple skills through DAG-based pipelines. To evaluate the agent's ability to invoke skills, we construct a benchmark of 30 artifact-rich tasks across five categories: data computation, document creation, motion video, visual design, and web interaction. We assess the quality of task outputs using LLM-based pairwise evaluation, and the results are aggregated via a Bradley-Terry model to produce unified quality scores. Experiments across three skill ecosystem scales (200 to 200K skills) show that tree-based retrieval effectively approximates oracle skill selection, and that DAG-based orchestration substantially outperforms native flat invocation even when given the identical skill set. Our findings confirm that structured composition is the key to unlocking skill potential. Our GitHub repository is available at:https://github.com/ynulihao/AgentSkillOS.

AI.tldr: 提出了AgentSkillOS框架，用于Claude代理技能的选择、编排和生态系统管理，通过能力树组织技能和DAG管道执行任务，在200到20万技能规模下验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 随着Claude代理技能的快速扩散，如何有效利用、管理和扩展技能生态系统成为核心问题。需要系统化的框架来处理技能选择、编排和生态系统管理。
AI.method: AgentSkillOS包含两个阶段：1) 管理技能：通过节点级递归分类将技能组织成能力树，便于高效发现；2) 解决任务：通过DAG管道检索、编排和执行多个技能。使用基于LLM的成对评估和Bradley-Terry模型评估任务输出质量。
AI.result: 在三个技能生态系统规模（200到200K技能）上的实验表明：树基检索能有效近似oracle技能选择，DAG编排即使使用相同技能集也显著优于原生扁平调用。结构化组合是释放技能潜力的关键。
AI.conclusion: AgentSkillOS为代理技能生态系统提供了第一个原则性框架，证明了结构化技能组合的重要性，为大规模代理技能管理提供了有效解决方案。

title: MOSAIC: A Unified Platform for Cross-Paradigm Comparison and Evaluation of Homogeneous and Heterogeneous Multi-Agent RL, LLM, VLM, and Human Decision-Makers
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL), large language models (LLMs), and vision-language models (VLMs) have been widely studied in isolation. However, existing infrastructure lacks the ability to deploy agents from different decision-making paradigms within the same environment, making it difficult to study them in hybrid multi-agent settings or to compare their behaviour fairly under identical conditions. We present MOSAIC, an open-source platform that bridges this gap by incorporating a diverse set of existing reinforcement learning environments and enabling heterogeneous agents (RL policies, LLMs, VLMs, and human players) to operate within them in ad-hoc team settings with reproducible results. MOSAIC introduces three contributions. (i) An IPC-based worker protocol that wraps both native and third-party frameworks as isolated subprocess workers, each executing its native training and inference logic unmodified, communicating through a versioned inter-process protocol. (ii) An operator abstraction that forms an agent-level interface by mapping workers to agents: each operator, regardless of whether it is backed by an RL policy, an LLM, or a human, conforms to a minimal unified interface. (iii) A deterministic cross-paradigm evaluation framework offering two complementary modes: a manual mode that advances up to N concurrent operators in lock-step under shared seeds for fine-grained visual inspection of behavioural differences, and a script mode that drives automated, long-running evaluation through declarative Python scripts, for reproducible experiments. We release MOSAIC as an open, visual-first platform to facilitate reproducible cross-paradigm research across the RL, LLM, and human-in-the-loop communities.

AI.tldr: MOSAIC是一个开源平台，支持在相同环境中部署不同决策范式的智能体（RL策略、LLMs、VLMs和人类玩家），实现异构智能体的混合多智能体研究和公平比较。
AI.motivation: 现有基础设施无法在同一环境中部署不同决策范式的智能体，难以在混合多智能体设置中研究它们，也无法在相同条件下公平比较它们的行为。需要一种平台来桥接RL、LLMs、VLMs和人类玩家之间的鸿沟。
AI.method: 1. 基于IPC的工作进程协议：将原生和第三方框架包装为隔离的子进程工作器，通过版本化的进程间协议通信；2. 操作者抽象：形成智能体级接口，将工作器映射到智能体；3. 确定性跨范式评估框架：提供手动模式和脚本模式两种互补的评估方式。
AI.result: MOSAIC平台成功实现了异构智能体在同一环境中的部署和评估，支持可重复的跨范式研究，为RL、LLM和人类在环社区提供了开放、可视化的研究平台。
AI.conclusion: MOSAIC填补了现有基础设施的空白，为研究不同决策范式智能体的混合交互和公平比较提供了标准化平台，促进了跨社区的可重复研究。

title: STMI: Segmentation-Guided Token Modulation with Cross-Modal Hypergraph Interaction for Multi-Modal Object Re-Identification
summary: Multi-modal object Re-Identification (ReID) aims to exploit complementary information from different modalities to retrieve specific objects. However, existing methods often rely on hard token filtering or simple fusion strategies, which can lead to the loss of discriminative cues and increased background interference. To address these challenges, we propose STMI, a novel multi-modal learning framework consisting of three key components: (1) Segmentation-Guided Feature Modulation (SFM) module leverages SAM-generated masks to enhance foreground representations and suppress background noise through learnable attention modulation; (2) Semantic Token Reallocation (STR) module employs learnable query tokens and an adaptive reallocation mechanism to extract compact and informative representations without discarding any tokens; (3) Cross-Modal Hypergraph Interaction (CHI) module constructs a unified hypergraph across modalities to capture high-order semantic relationships. Extensive experiments on public benchmarks (i.e., RGBNT201, RGBNT100, and MSVR310) demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of our proposed STMI framework in multi-modal ReID scenarios.

AI.tldr: STMI：一种用于多模态目标重识别的新框架，通过分割引导特征调制、语义令牌重分配和跨模态超图交互三个模块，有效利用多模态信息并减少背景干扰。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态目标重识别方法通常依赖硬令牌过滤或简单融合策略，容易导致判别性线索丢失和背景干扰增加。需要更有效的方法来利用不同模态的互补信息。
AI.method: 提出STMI框架，包含三个核心模块：1) 分割引导特征调制模块利用SAM生成的掩码通过可学习注意力调制增强前景表示并抑制背景噪声；2) 语义令牌重分配模块使用可学习查询令牌和自适应重分配机制提取紧凑信息表示而不丢弃任何令牌；3) 跨模态超图交互模块构建统一超图来捕获高阶语义关系。
AI.result: 在RGBNT201、RGBNT100和MSVR310等公开基准测试上进行了广泛实验，证明了STMI框架在多模态重识别场景中的有效性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: STMI通过创新的多模态学习框架解决了现有方法的局限性，在保持判别信息的同时有效减少背景干扰，为多模态目标重识别提供了有效的解决方案。

title: Reasoning Core: A Scalable Procedural Data Generation Suite for Symbolic Pre-training and Post-Training
comment: Keywords: LLMs, NLP, Dataset, Corpus, Procedural Pre-training, Reasoning, Logic, Formal Semantics https://github.com/sileod/reasoning_core
summary: Training on verifiable symbolic data is a promising way to expand the reasoning frontier of language models beyond what standard pre-training corpora provide. Yet existing procedural generators often rely on fixed puzzles or templates and do not deliver the distributional breadth needed at scale. We introduce Reasoning Core, a scalable suite that procedurally generates verifiable symbolic reasoning data across core formal domains: PDDL planning over randomized domains, first-order logic with equality, context-free grammar parsing and generation, causal reasoning over random Bayesian networks, and systems of equations. Each task is paired with an external solver for rigorous verification and admits continuous difficulty control for curriculum design.
