Our design is guided by two key ideas: (1) random walks over the mesh surface effectively capture the regions that individual experts attend to, and (2) an attention mechanism that enables the gate to focus on the areas most informative for each expert's decision-making. To further enhance performance, we introduce a dynamic loss balancing scheme that adjusts a trade-off between diversity and similarity losses throughout the training, where diversity prompts expert specialization, and similarity enables knowledge sharing among the experts. Our framework achieves state-of-the-art results in mesh classification, retrieval, and semantic segmentation tasks. Our code is available at: https://github.com/amirbelder/MME-Mixture-of-Mesh-Experts.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于网格分析的混合专家框架，通过新的门控架构和动态损失平衡方案，在网格分类、检索和语义分割任务上达到SOTA
AI.motivation: 现有网格分析方法各有优势，在不同物体类别上表现优异。为了充分利用这些方法的互补优势，需要设计一个能够整合不同专家特长的框架。
AI.method: 1. 提出新的门控架构，鼓励每个专家专注于其擅长的类别；2. 使用网格表面的随机游走捕捉专家关注区域；3. 引入注意力机制使门控聚焦于对专家决策最关键的领域；4. 设计动态损失平衡方案，在训练过程中调整多样性和相似性损失的权衡。
AI.result: 在网格分类、检索和语义分割任务上取得了最先进的结果。
AI.conclusion: 提出的混合专家框架能够有效整合不同网格分析方法的优势，通过专门设计的门控架构和动态损失平衡机制，实现了专家间的专业化与知识共享的平衡。

title: Constructing Synthetic Instruction Datasets for Improving Reasoning in Domain-Specific LLMs: A Case Study in the Japanese Financial Domain
comment: 8 pages, 2 figures. Japanese version published in NLP2026
summary: In adapting LLMs to specific domains, achieving both domain expertise and reasoning ability remains an urgent challenge. This study proposes a general method for constructing high-quality synthetic instruction data for any domain, starting from domain-specific vocabulary. As a demonstration, we applied this method to the financial domain and constructed a large-scale instruction dataset totaling approximately 9.5 billion tokens with Chain-of-Thought reasoning traces. Evaluation results confirmed performance improvements over baseline models on financial benchmarks, demonstrating the effectiveness of our approach. We also report findings on the impact of reasoning trace length on performance and its limitations. Lastly, we open-source our models and datasets on https://huggingface.co/nri-ai .

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从领域特定词汇构建高质量合成指令数据的通用方法，并在金融领域应用，创建了包含约95亿token的大规模指令数据集，包含思维链推理轨迹。评估显示在金融基准测试中性能优于基线模型。
AI.motivation: 在将LLMs适配到特定领域时，同时实现领域专业知识和推理能力仍然是一个紧迫的挑战。需要一种通用方法来构建高质量的领域特定指令数据。
AI.method: 提出了一种从领域特定词汇开始构建高质量合成指令数据的通用方法。在金融领域进行演示，构建了大规模指令数据集（约95亿token），包含思维链推理轨迹。
AI.result: 评估结果显示，在金融基准测试中性能优于基线模型，证明了方法的有效性。还报告了推理轨迹长度对性能的影响及其局限性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够有效提升LLMs在特定领域的专业知识和推理能力，为领域适配提供了实用的数据构建方案。开源了模型和数据集。

title: Measuring What AI Systems Might Do: Towards A Measurement Science in AI
summary: Scientists, policy-makers, business leaders, and members of the public care about what modern artificial intelligence systems are disposed to do. Yet terms such as capabilities, propensities, skills, values, and abilities are routinely used interchangeably and conflated with observable performance, with AI evaluation practices rarely specifying what quantity they purport to measure. We argue that capabilities and propensities are dispositional properties - stable features of systems characterised by counterfactual relationships between contextual conditions and behavioural outputs. Measuring a disposition requires (i) hypothesising which contextual properties are causally relevant, (ii) independently operationalising and measuring those properties, and (iii) empirically mapping how variation in those properties affects the probability of the behaviour. Dominant approaches to AI evaluation, from benchmark averages to data-driven latent-variable models such as Item Response Theory, bypass these steps entirely. Building on ideas from philosophy of science, measurement theory, and cognitive science, we develop a principled account of AI capabilities and propensities as dispositions, show why prevailing evaluation practices fail to measure them, and outline what disposition-respecting, scientifically defensible AI evaluation would require.

AI.tldr: 该论文认为AI能力与倾向是倾向性属性，需要基于反事实关系进行测量，而当前主流评估方法（如基准测试平均分、项目反应理论）未能真正测量这些倾向性。
AI.motivation: 当前AI评估实践中，能力、倾向、技能、价值观等术语被混用，并与可观察性能混淆。评估方法很少明确测量什么量，缺乏科学严谨性，需要建立原则性的AI能力与倾向测量框架。
AI.method: 基于科学哲学、测量理论和认知科学，提出将AI能力与倾向视为倾向性属性的理论框架。强调测量倾向性需要：(1)假设哪些情境属性具有因果相关性；(2)独立操作化和测量这些属性；(3)经验性地映射这些属性变化如何影响行为概率。
AI.result: 揭示了主流AI评估方法（基准测试平均分、数据驱动的潜变量模型如项目反应理论）完全绕过了这些必要步骤，未能真正测量AI的倾向性属性。提出了尊重倾向性、科学上可辩护的AI评估所需的条件。
AI.conclusion: AI能力与倾向应被视为倾向性属性进行测量，需要建立更科学的评估框架，考虑情境属性的因果相关性和反事实关系，超越当前简单的性能指标。

title: Neural Discrimination-Prompted Transformers for Efficient UHD Image Restoration and Enhancement
comment: Accepted by IJCV'26; code is available at https://github.com/supersupercong/uhdpromer
summary: We propose a simple yet effective UHDPromer, a neural discrimination-prompted Transformer, for Ultra-High-Definition (UHD) image restoration and enhancement. Our UHDPromer is inspired by an interesting observation that there implicitly exist neural differences between high-resolution and low-resolution features, and exploring such differences can facilitate low-resolution feature representation. To this end, we first introduce Neural Discrimination Priors (NDP) to measure the differences and then integrate NDP into the proposed Neural Discrimination-Prompted Attention (NDPA) and Neural Discrimination-Prompted Network (NDPN). The proposed NDPA re-formulates the attention by incorporating NDP to globally perceive useful discrimination information, while the NDPN explores a continuous gating mechanism guided by NDP to selectively permit the passage of beneficial content. To enhance the quality of restored images, we propose a super-resolution-guided reconstruction approach, which is guided by super-resolving low-resolution features to facilitate final UHD image restoration. Experiments show that UHDPromer achieves the best computational efficiency while still maintaining state-of-the-art performance on $3$ UHD image restoration and enhancement tasks, including low-light image enhancement, image dehazing, and image deblurring. The source codes and pre-trained models will be made available at https://github.com/supersupercong/uhdpromer.

AI.tldr: UHDPromer：一种基于神经判别提示的Transformer，用于超高清图像恢复和增强，通过探索高分辨率与低分辨率特征之间的神经差异来提升性能
AI.motivation: 观察到高分辨率与低分辨率特征之间存在隐式的神经差异，探索这种差异可以促进低分辨率特征表示，从而改进UHD图像恢复和增强任务
AI.method: 提出神经判别先验（NDP）来量化特征差异，并基于此设计神经判别提示注意力（NDPA）和神经判别提示网络（NDPN）。NDPA将NDP融入注意力机制以全局感知判别信息，NDPN采用连续门控机制选择性传递有益内容。还提出超分辨率引导的重建方法
AI.result: 在低光图像增强、图像去雾和图像去模糊三个UHD图像恢复任务中，UHDPromer在保持最佳计算效率的同时达到了最先进的性能
AI.conclusion: UHDPromer通过探索神经判别先验，为UHD图像恢复和增强提供了一种简单而有效的解决方案，在计算效率和性能之间取得了良好平衡

title: LangGap: Diagnosing and Closing the Language Gap in Vision-Language-Action Models
comment: 7 pages, 3 figures. Code and benchmark will be available at https://github.com/YC11Hou/langgap
summary:
Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models achieve over 95% success on standard benchmarks. However, through systematic experiments, we find that current state-of-the-art VLA models largely ignore language instructions. Prior work lacks: (1) systematic semantic perturbation diagnostics, (2) a benchmark that forces language understanding by design, and (3) linguistically diverse training data.
  This paper constructs the LangGap benchmark, based on a four-dimensional semantic perturbation method -- varying instruction semantics while keeping the tabletop layout fixed -- revealing language understanding deficits in π0.5. Existing benchmarks like LIBERO assign only one task per layout, underutilizing available objects and target locations; LangGap fully diversifies pick-and-place tasks under identical layouts, forcing models to truly understand language.
  Experiments show that targeted data augmentation can partially close the language gap -- success rate improves from 0% to 90% with single-task training, and 0% to 28% with multi-task training. However, as semantic diversity of extended tasks increases, model learning capacity proves severely insufficient; even trained tasks perform poorly. This reveals a fundamental challenge for VLA models in understanding diverse language instructions -- precisely the long-term value of LangGap.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了LangGap基准测试，通过语义扰动方法揭示当前VLA模型在语言理解方面的严重缺陷，发现即使达到95%基准成功率的模型也基本忽略语言指令。通过针对性数据增强可部分改善，但面对语义多样性时模型学习能力严重不足。
AI.motivation: 当前VLA模型在标准基准上达到95%以上成功率，但研究发现这些模型很大程度上忽略了语言指令。现有工作缺乏：(1)系统性的语义扰动诊断方法，(2)强制语言理解的基准设计，(3)语言多样性的训练数据。需要揭示VLA模型在语言理解方面的真实能力。
AI.method: 构建LangGap基准测试，基于四维语义扰动方法——在保持桌面布局固定的情况下改变指令语义。与LIBERO等现有基准（每个布局只分配一个任务）不同，LangGap在相同布局下完全多样化拾取放置任务，强制模型真正理解语言。通过数据增强实验验证改进效果。
AI.result: 实验显示：1) 当前VLA模型在语言理解方面存在严重缺陷；2) 针对性数据增强可部分弥补语言差距——单任务训练成功率从0%提升到90%，多任务训练从0%提升到28%；3) 随着扩展任务语义多样性增加，模型学习能力严重不足，即使训练过的任务也表现不佳。
AI.conclusion: VLA模型在理解多样化语言指令方面存在根本性挑战，LangGap基准揭示了这一关键问题。数据增强只能部分解决问题，当语义多样性增加时，模型的学习能力严重不足。这为VLA模型的未来发展指明了重要方向。

title: Fed-GAME: Personalized Federated Learning with Graph Attention Mixture-of-Experts For Time-Series Forecasting
summary: Federated learning (FL) on graphs shows promise for distributed time-series forecasting. Yet, existing methods rely on static topologies and struggle with client heterogeneity. We propose Fed-GAME, a framework that models personalized aggregation as message passing over a learnable dynamic implicit graph. The core is a decoupled parameter difference-based update protocol, where clients transmit parameter differences between their fine-tuned private model and a shared global model. On the server, these differences are decomposed into two streams: (1) averaged difference used to updating the global model for consensus (2) the selective difference fed into a novel Graph Attention Mixture-of-Experts (GAME) aggregator for fine-grained personalization. In this aggregator, shared experts provide scoring signals while personalized gates adaptively weight selective updates to support personalized aggregation. Experiments on two real-world electric vehicle charging datasets demonstrate that Fed-GAME outperforms state-of-the-art personalized FL baselines.

AI.tldr: Fed-GAME：一种用于图联邦学习的框架，通过可学习的动态隐式图建模个性化聚合，使用解耦的参数差异更新协议和图注意力混合专家聚合器，在电动汽车充电数据集上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的图联邦学习方法依赖静态拓扑结构，难以处理客户端异构性。需要一种能够建模动态关系并支持个性化聚合的框架。
AI.method: 提出Fed-GAME框架：1）使用解耦的参数差异更新协议，客户端传输微调私有模型与共享全局模型之间的参数差异；2）服务器端将差异分解为两个流：平均差异用于更新全局模型，选择性差异输入图注意力混合专家（GAME）聚合器；3）GAME聚合器中，共享专家提供评分信号，个性化门自适应加权选择性更新。
AI.result: 在两个真实世界电动汽车充电数据集上的实验表明，Fed-GAME优于最先进的个性化联邦学习基线方法。
AI.conclusion: Fed-GAME通过建模可学习的动态隐式图和创新的聚合机制，有效解决了图联邦学习中的客户端异构性问题，实现了更好的个性化预测性能。

title: Self-Service or Not? How to Guide Practitioners in Classifying AI Systems Under the EU AI Act
summary: In August 2024, the EU Artificial Intelligence Act (AIA) came into force, marking the world's first large-scale regulatory framework for AI. Central to the AIA is a risk-based approach, aligning regulatory obligations with the potential harm posed by AI systems. To operationalize this, the AIA defines a Risk Classification Scheme (RCS), categorizing systems into four levels of risk. While this aligns with the theoretical foundations of risk-based regulations, the practical application of the RCS is complex and requires expertise across legal, technical, and domain-specific areas. Despite increasing academic discussion, little empirical research has explored how practitioners apply the RCS in real-world contexts. This study addresses this gap by evaluating how industrial practitioners apply the RCS using a self-service, web-based decision-support tool. Following a Design Science Research (DSR) approach, two evaluation phases involving 78 practitioners across diverse domains were conducted. Our findings highlight critical challenges in interpreting legal definitions and regulatory scope, and show that targeted support, such as clear explanations and practical examples, can significantly enhance the risk classification process. The study provides actionable insights for tool designers and policymakers aiming to support AIA compliance in practice.

AI.tldr: 研究评估工业从业者如何使用基于网络的决策支持工具来应用欧盟AI法案的风险分类方案，发现法律定义解释和监管范围界定存在挑战，针对性支持能显著改善分类过程。
AI.motivation: 欧盟AI法案作为首个大规模AI监管框架，其风险分类方案在实际应用中复杂且需要跨领域专业知识。尽管学术讨论增多，但缺乏关于从业者如何实际应用该方案的实证研究。
AI.method: 采用设计科学研究方法，通过基于网络的自我服务决策支持工具，在两个评估阶段中涉及78名来自不同领域的从业者，评估他们如何应用风险分类方案。
AI.result: 研究发现从业者在解释法律定义和确定监管范围方面面临关键挑战，同时表明针对性支持（如清晰解释和实际案例）能显著提升风险分类过程的效果。
AI.conclusion: 研究为工具设计者和政策制定者提供了可操作的见解，以支持AI法案在实践中的合规实施，强调了改善风险分类工具设计的重要性。

title: PPC-MT: Parallel Point Cloud Completion with Mamba-Transformer Hybrid Architecture
summary: Existing point cloud completion methods struggle to balance high-quality reconstruction with computational efficiency. To address this, we propose PPC-MT, a novel parallel framework for point cloud completion leveraging a hybrid Mamba-Transformer architecture. Our approach introduces an innovative parallel completion strategy guided by Principal Component Analysis (PCA), which imposes a geometrically meaningful structure on unordered point clouds, transforming them into ordered sets and decomposing them into multiple subsets. These subsets are reconstructed in parallel using a multi-head reconstructor. This structured parallel synthesis paradigm significantly enhances the uniformity of point distribution and detail fidelity, while preserving computational efficiency. By integrating Mamba's linear complexity for efficient feature extraction during encoding with the Transformer's capability to model fine-grained multi-sequence relationships during decoding, PPC-MT effectively balances efficiency and reconstruction accuracy. Extensive quantitative and qualitative experiments on benchmark datasets, including PCN, ShapeNet-55/34, and KITTI, demonstrate that PPC-MT outperforms state-of-the-art methods across multiple metrics, validating the efficacy of our proposed framework.

AI.tldr: PPC-MT：基于混合Mamba-Transformer架构的并行点云补全框架，通过PCA引导的并行策略实现高质量重建与计算效率的平衡
AI.motivation: 现有点云补全方法难以平衡高质量重建与计算效率，需要一种既能保持几何细节又能高效处理的方法
AI.method: 1) PCA引导的并行补全策略，将无序点云转化为有序集并分解为多个子集；2) 混合Mamba-Transformer架构，编码阶段使用Mamba的线性复杂度特征提取，解码阶段使用Transformer建模细粒度多序列关系；3) 多头重建器并行处理子集
AI.result: 在PCN、ShapeNet-55/34、KITTI等基准数据集上，PPC-MT在多个指标上优于现有方法，验证了框架的有效性
AI.conclusion: PPC-MT通过创新的并行架构和混合Mamba-Transformer设计，成功平衡了点云补全的质量与效率问题

title: Align and Filter: Improving Performance in Asynchronous On-Policy RL
summary: Distributed training and increasing the gradient update frequency are practical strategies to accelerate learning and improve performance, but both exacerbate a central challenge: \textit{policy lag}, which is the mismatch between the behavior policy generating data and the learning policy being updated. Policy lag can hinder the scaling of on-policy learning algorithms to larger problems. In this paper, we identify the sources of policy lag caused by distributed learning and high update frequency. We use the findings to propose \textit{total Variation-based Advantage aligned Constrained policy Optimization (\methodacronym)} as a practical approach to mitigate policy lag. We empirically validate our method and show that it offers better robustness to policy lag in classic RL tasks and a modern RL for LLM math reasoning task.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为VACO的方法，用于缓解分布式训练和高更新频率导致的策略滞后问题，在经典RL任务和LLM数学推理任务中表现出更好的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 分布式训练和增加梯度更新频率是加速学习和提升性能的实用策略，但两者都会加剧一个核心挑战：策略滞后（policy lag），即生成数据的行为策略与正在更新的学习策略之间的不匹配。策略滞后会阻碍在线学习算法扩展到更大规模的问题。
AI.method: 提出了基于总变差优势对齐约束策略优化（VACO）的方法，通过识别分布式学习和高更新频率导致的策略滞后来源，设计约束机制来缓解策略滞后问题。
AI.result: 经验验证表明，该方法在经典强化学习任务和现代RL for LLM数学推理任务中，对策略滞后具有更好的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: VACO方法能有效缓解分布式训练和高更新频率带来的策略滞后问题，为大规模在线学习算法的扩展提供了实用解决方案。

title: Contesting Artificial Moral Agents
summary: There has been much discourse on the ethics of AI, to the extent that there are now systems that possess inherent moral reasoning. Such machines are now formally known as Artificial Moral Agents or AMAs. However, there is a requirement for a dedicated framework that can contest the morality of these systems. This paper proposes a 5E framework for contesting AMAs based on five grounds: ethical, epistemological, explainable, empirical, and evaluative. It further includes the spheres of ethical influences at individual, local, societal, and global levels. Lastly, the framework contributes a provisional timeline that indicates where developers of AMA technologies may anticipate contestation, or may self-contest in order to adhere to value-aligned development of truly moral AI systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个5E框架（伦理、认识论、可解释性、实证、评估）来质疑人工道德代理（AMAs），包含个体、本地、社会、全球四个伦理影响层面，并提供了一个时间线帮助开发者预见和应对道德挑战。
AI.motivation: 随着AI伦理讨论的深入，出现了具有内在道德推理能力的人工道德代理（AMAs），但缺乏专门框架来质疑这些系统的道德性。需要系统化的方法来确保AI系统的价值对齐和道德可信度。
AI.method: 提出了5E框架：1) 伦理层面 - 道德原则和价值观；2) 认识论层面 - 道德知识的获取和表示；3) 可解释性层面 - 道德决策的透明度；4) 实证层面 - 实际行为和影响；5) 评估层面 - 系统化评估方法。框架还包含四个伦理影响层面（个体、本地、社会、全球）和开发时间线。
AI.result: 提出了一个全面的框架来质疑AMAs的道德性，为AI开发者提供了系统化的工具来预见和应对道德挑战，促进价值对齐的道德AI系统开发。
AI.conclusion: 5E框架为质疑人工道德代理提供了结构化方法，有助于确保AI系统的道德可信度和价值对齐，对负责任AI开发具有重要意义。

title: MMTA: Multi Membership Temporal Attention for Fine-Grained Stroke Rehabilitation Assessment
summary: To empower the iterative assessments involved during a person's rehabilitation, automated assessment of a person's abilities during daily activities requires temporally precise segmentation of fine-grained actions in therapy videos. Existing temporal action segmentation (TAS) models struggle to capture sub-second micro-movements while retaining exercise context, blurring rapid phase transitions and limiting reliable downstream assessment of motor recovery. We introduce Multi-Membership Temporal Attention (MMTA), a high-resolution temporal transformer for fine-grained rehabilitation assessment. Unlike standard temporal attention, which assigns each frame a single attention context per layer, MMTA lets each frame attend to multiple locally normalized temporal attention windows within the same layer. We fuse these concurrent temporal views via feature-space overlap resolution, preserving competing local contexts near transitions while enabling longer-range reasoning through layer-wise propagation. This increases boundary sensitivity without additional depth or multi-stage refinement. MMTA supports both video and wearable IMU inputs within a unified single-stage architecture, making it applicable to both clinical and home settings. MMTA consistently improves over the Global Attention transformer, boosting Edit Score by +1.3 (Video) and +1.6 (IMU) on StrokeRehab while further improving 50Salads by +3.3. Ablations confirm that performance gains stem from multi-membership temporal views rather than architectural complexity, offering a practical solution for resource-constrained rehabilitation assessment.

AI.tldr: 提出MMTA（多成员时间注意力）模型，用于康复视频中精细动作的高分辨率时间分割，通过让每帧同时关注多个局部时间窗口来提升边界敏感度，支持视频和IMU输入。
AI.motivation: 康复评估需要精确分割日常活动中的精细动作，现有时间动作分割模型难以同时捕捉亚秒级微动作和保持运动上下文，导致快速阶段过渡模糊，限制了运动恢复的可靠评估。
AI.method: 提出多成员时间注意力（MMTA），让每帧在同一层中同时关注多个局部归一化的时间注意力窗口，通过特征空间重叠分辨率融合这些并发时间视图，在层间传播中保持竞争性局部上下文并实现长距离推理。
AI.result: 在StrokeRehab数据集上，相比全局注意力Transformer，MMTA将Edit Score提升了+1.3（视频）和+1.6（IMU）；在50Salads数据集上进一步提升了+3.3。消融实验证实性能提升来自多成员时间视图而非架构复杂性。
AI.conclusion: MMTA通过多成员时间注意力机制提高了边界敏感度，无需额外深度或多阶段细化，为资源受限的康复评估提供了实用解决方案，支持临床和家庭环境中的视频和IMU输入。

title: DUEL: Exact Likelihood for Masked Diffusion via Deterministic Unmasking
summary: Masked diffusion models (MDMs) generate text by iteratively selecting positions to unmask and then predicting tokens at those positions. Yet MDMs lack proper perplexity evaluation: the ELBO is a loose bound on likelihood under the training distribution, not the test-time distribution, while generative perplexity requires a biased external model and ignores diversity. To address this, we introduce the \textsc{DUEL} framework, which formalizes \emph{deterministic} position selection, unifying leading MDM sampling strategies. We prove \textbf{\textsc{DUEL} admits \emph{exact} likelihood computation} via a simple algorithm, evaluated under the same position selection used at test time. This \textbf{gives MDMs proper perplexity for the first time} -- the natural analogue of autoregressive perplexity. With proper perplexity in hand, we revisit key questions about MDMs. \textbf{MDMs are substantially better than previously thought}: the MDM-autoregressive perplexity gap shrinks by up to 32\% on in-domain data and 82\% on zero-shot benchmarks. \textsc{DUEL} enables the first principled comparison of fast, parallel samplers across compute budgets -- an analysis impossible with the ELBO and unreliable with generative perplexity -- identifying probability margin \citep{kim2025train} as a strong default. Finally, oracle search over position orderings reveals MDMs can far surpass autoregressive models -- achieving 36.47 vs.\ 52.11 perplexity on AG News -- demonstrating the ceiling of MDM performance has not yet been reached.

AI.tldr: 提出DUEL框架，为掩码扩散模型提供精确似然计算，首次实现正确的困惑度评估，显著缩小MDM与自回归模型的性能差距
AI.motivation: 掩码扩散模型缺乏正确的困惑度评估方法：ELBO是训练分布下的松散下界，而生成困惑度需要有偏的外部模型且忽略多样性。需要为MDM提供类似自回归模型的自然困惑度评估方法。
AI.method: 提出DUEL框架，形式化确定性位置选择，统一主流MDM采样策略。证明DUEL允许通过简单算法进行精确似然计算，在测试时使用相同的位置选择进行评估。
AI.result: MDM性能比之前认为的好得多：MDM与自回归模型的困惑度差距在域内数据上缩小32%，在零样本基准上缩小82%。概率边缘采样成为强默认选择。通过oracle搜索发现MDM性能上限远未达到。
AI.conclusion: DUEL首次为MDM提供正确的困惑度评估，揭示了MDM的实际性能比之前评估的要好得多，为MDM与自回归模型的公平比较提供了基础，并展示了MDM性能的潜在上限。

title: The Global Landscape of Environmental AI Regulation: From the Cost of Reasoning to a Right to Green AI
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) systems impose substantial and growing environmental costs, yet transparency about these impacts has declined even as their deployment has accelerated. This paper makes three contributions. First, we collate empirical evidence that generative Web search and reasoning models - which have proliferated in 2025 - come with much higher cumulative environmental impacts than previous generations of AI approaches. Second, we map the global regulatory landscape across eleven jurisdictions and find that the manner in which environmental governance operates (predominantly at the facility-level rather than the model-level, with a focus on training rather than inference, with limited AI-specific energy disclosure requirements outside the EU) limits its applicability. Third, to address this, we propose a three-pronged policy response: mandatory model-level transparency that covers inference consumption, benchmarks, and compute locations; user rights to opt out of unnecessary generative AI integration and to select environmentally optimized models; and international coordination to prevent regulatory arbitrage. We conclude with concrete legislative proposals - including amendments to the EU AI Act, Consumer Rights Directive, and Digital Services Act - that could serve as templates for other jurisdictions.

AI.tldr: 该论文揭示生成式AI搜索和推理模型的环境成本远高于前代AI技术，分析了全球监管现状的局限性，并提出了包含透明度要求、用户权利和国际协调的三重政策应对方案。
AI.motivation: AI系统环境成本日益增长但透明度下降，特别是2025年快速部署的生成式搜索和推理模型带来了更高的累积环境影响，而现有监管框架（主要在设施层面而非模型层面）无法有效应对这一问题。
AI.method: 1) 收集生成式Web搜索和推理模型环境影响的实证证据；2) 分析11个司法管辖区的全球监管格局；3) 提出包含透明度、用户权利和国际协调的三重政策响应框架。
AI.result: 发现生成式AI模型环境成本显著高于传统AI，现有监管主要关注训练而非推理阶段，且缺乏AI特定能源披露要求（欧盟除外），导致监管适用性有限。
AI.conclusion: 需要强制性模型级透明度、用户选择权和国际协调来应对AI环境挑战，并提出了欧盟AI法案、消费者权利指令和数字服务法的具体修订建议作为其他司法管辖区的模板。

title: Uncertainty-Aware Concept and Motion Segmentation for Semi-Supervised Angiography Videos
summary: Segmentation of the main coronary artery from X-ray coronary angiography (XCA) sequences is crucial for the diagnosis of coronary artery diseases. However, this task is challenging due to issues such as blurred boundaries, inconsistent radiation contrast, complex motion patterns, and a lack of annotated images for training. Although Semi-Supervised Learning (SSL) can alleviate the annotation burden, conventional methods struggle with complicated temporal dynamics and unreliable uncertainty quantification. To address these challenges, we propose SAM3-based Teacher-student framework with Motion-Aware consistency and Progressive Confidence Regularization (SMART), a semi-supervised vessel segmentation approach for X-ray angiography videos. First, our method utilizes SAM3's unique promptable concept segmentation design and innovates a SAM3-based teacher-student framework to maximize the performance potential of both the teacher and the student. Second, we enhance segmentation by integrating the vessel mask warping technique and motion consistency loss to model complex vessel dynamics. To address the issue of unreliable teacher predictions caused by blurred boundaries and minimal contrast, we further propose a progressive confidence-aware consistency regularization to mitigate the risk of unreliable outputs. Extensive experiments on three datasets of XCA sequences from different institutions demonstrate that SMART achieves state-of-the-art performance while requiring significantly fewer annotations, making it particularly valuable for real-world clinical applications where labeled data is scarce. Our code is available at: https://github.com/qimingfan10/SMART.

AI.tldr: SMART提出了一种基于SAM3的教师-学生框架，结合运动感知一致性和渐进置信度正则化，用于X射线冠状动脉造影视频的半监督血管分割，在标注数据稀缺的情况下实现了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: X射线冠状动脉造影序列分割对冠心病诊断至关重要，但面临边界模糊、对比度不一致、复杂运动模式以及训练标注数据缺乏等挑战。传统半监督学习方法难以处理复杂的时间动态和不可靠的不确定性量化。
AI.method: 1) 利用SAM3的可提示概念分割设计，创新性地构建基于SAM3的教师-学生框架；2) 集成血管掩模变形技术和运动一致性损失来建模复杂血管动态；3) 提出渐进置信感知一致性正则化来缓解教师预测不可靠的问题。
AI.result: 在来自不同机构的三个XCA序列数据集上的广泛实验表明，SMART在显著减少标注需求的情况下实现了最先进的性能，特别适用于标注数据稀缺的真实临床场景。
AI.conclusion: SMART通过结合SAM3的强大分割能力、运动建模和渐进置信度正则化，有效解决了X射线冠状动脉造影视频分割中的标注稀缺和复杂动态挑战，为临床应用提供了实用解决方案。

title: Causal Neural Probabilistic Circuits
summary: Concept Bottleneck Models (CBMs) enhance the interpretability of end-to-end neural networks by introducing a layer of concepts and predicting the class label from the concept predictions. A key property of CBMs is that they support interventions, i.e., domain experts can correct mispredicted concept values at test time to improve the final accuracy. However, typical CBMs apply interventions by overwriting only the corrected concept while leaving other concept predictions unchanged, which ignores causal dependencies among concepts. To address this, we propose the Causal Neural Probabilistic Circuit (CNPC), which combines a neural attribute predictor with a causal probabilistic circuit compiled from a causal graph. This circuit supports exact, tractable causal inference that inherently respects causal dependencies. Under interventions, CNPC models the class distribution based on a Product of Experts (PoE) that fuses the attribute predictor's predictive distribution with the interventional marginals computed by the circuit. We theoretically characterize the compositional interventional error of CNPC w.r.t. its modules and identify conditions under which CNPC closely matches the ground-truth interventional class distribution. Experiments on five benchmark datasets in both in-distribution and out-of-distribution settings show that, compared with five baseline models, CNPC achieves higher task accuracy across different numbers of intervened attributes.

AI.tldr: 论文提出因果神经概率电路（CNPC），结合神经属性预测器和因果概率电路，解决概念瓶颈模型中因果依赖被忽略的问题，支持精确的因果推理和干预。
AI.motivation: 传统概念瓶颈模型（CBMs）在干预时只覆盖修正的概念，忽略了概念间的因果依赖关系，这限制了干预效果和模型准确性。
AI.method: 提出CNPC模型，将神经属性预测器与从因果图编译的因果概率电路相结合，使用专家乘积（PoE）融合预测分布和干预边际分布，支持精确可处理的因果推理。
AI.result: 在5个基准数据集上的实验表明，CNPC在分布内和分布外设置下，相比5个基线模型，在不同干预属性数量下都获得了更高的任务准确率。
AI.conclusion: CNPC通过建模概念间的因果依赖，显著提升了概念瓶颈模型的干预效果和准确性，为可解释AI提供了更强大的因果推理能力。

title: VEMamba: Efficient Isotropic Reconstruction of Volume Electron Microscopy with Axial-Lateral Consistent Mamba
summary: Volume Electron Microscopy (VEM) is crucial for 3D tissue imaging but often produces anisotropic data with poor axial resolution, hindering visualization and downstream analysis. Existing methods for isotropic reconstruction often suffer from neglecting abundant axial information and employing simple downsampling to simulate anisotropic data. To address these limitations, we propose VEMamba, an efficient framework for isotropic reconstruction. The core of VEMamba is a novel 3D Dependency Reordering paradigm, implemented via two key components: an Axial-Lateral Chunking Selective Scan Module (ALCSSM), which intelligently re-maps complex 3D spatial dependencies (both axial and lateral) into optimized 1D sequences for efficient Mamba-based modeling, explicitly enforcing axial-lateral consistency; and a Dynamic Weights Aggregation Module (DWAM) to adaptively aggregate these reordered sequence outputs for enhanced representational power. Furthermore, we introduce a realistic degradation simulation and then leverage Momentum Contrast (MoCo) to integrate this degradation-aware knowledge into the network for superior reconstruction. Extensive experiments on both simulated and real-world anisotropic VEM datasets demonstrate that VEMamba achieves highly competitive performance across various metrics while maintaining a lower computational footprint. The source code is available on GitHub: https://github.com/I2-Multimedia-Lab/VEMamba

AI.tldr: VEMamba：基于Mamba的高效各向同性重建框架，用于解决体积电子显微镜数据各向异性问题，通过3D依赖重排序和动态权重聚合实现高质量重建。
AI.motivation: 体积电子显微镜（VEM）产生的各向异性数据轴向分辨率差，影响3D组织成像的可视化和下游分析。现有方法往往忽略丰富的轴向信息，并采用简单的下采样来模拟各向异性数据。
AI.method: 提出VEMamba框架，核心是3D依赖重排序范式：1）轴向-横向分块选择性扫描模块（ALCSSM），将复杂3D空间依赖重新映射为优化的1D序列用于Mamba建模；2）动态权重聚合模块（DWAM）自适应聚合重排序序列输出。还引入真实退化模拟和动量对比学习来整合退化感知知识。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实世界各向异性VEM数据集上的广泛实验表明，VEMamba在各种指标上实现了高度竞争力的性能，同时保持了较低的计算开销。
AI.conclusion: VEMamba为VEM各向同性重建提供了一种高效解决方案，通过创新的3D依赖重排序和动态聚合机制，在保持计算效率的同时实现了优异的性能。

title: Unified Vision-Language Modeling via Concept Space Alignment
summary:
We introduce V-SONAR, a vision-language embedding space extended from the text-only embedding space SONAR (Omnilingual Embeddings Team et al., 2026), which supports 1500 text languages and 177 speech languages. To construct V-SONAR, we propose a post-hoc alignment pipeline that maps the representations of an existing vision encoder into the SONAR space. We thoroughly evaluate V-SONAR and show that its embeddings achieve competitive performance on text-to-video retrieval. Equipped with the OMNISONAR text decoder, V-SONAR further surpasses state-of-the-art vision-language models on video captioning tasks, including DREAM-1K (BLEU 23.9 vs. 19.6) and PE-VIDEO (BLEU 39.0 vs. 30.0).
  Leveraging V-SONAR, we first demonstrate that the Large Concept Model (LCM; LCM team et al. 2024) operating in SONAR and trained with English text only, can perform both single- and multi-visual concept understanding in a zero-shot manner. Finally, we introduce V-LCM, which extends the LCM with vision-language instruction tuning. V-LCM encodes vision and language inputs into an unified sequence of latent embeddings via V-SONAR and SONAR, and it is trained with the same latent diffusion objective for next-embedding prediction as in LCM's text-only pre-training. Experiments on a large-scale multilingual and -modal instruction-tuning data mixture highlight the potential of V-LCM: V-LCM matches state-of-the-art vision-language models on tasks covering image/video captioning and question answering, while significantly outperforming them across 61 rich- to low-resource languages out of all 62 tested languages.

AI.tldr: V-SONAR扩展了文本嵌入空间SONAR到视觉-语言领域，通过后处理对齐将视觉编码器映射到SONAR空间，在视频检索和字幕任务上表现优异。基于此构建的V-LCM模型在62种语言的多模态任务中超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 将SONAR文本嵌入空间扩展到视觉-语言领域，实现跨模态的统一表示，支持大规模多语言多模态应用。
AI.method: 1. 提出后处理对齐流程，将现有视觉编码器映射到SONAR空间构建V-SONAR；2. 基于V-SONAR和SONAR构建V-LCM，使用统一的潜在嵌入序列表示视觉和语言输入；3. 采用与LCM相同的潜在扩散目标进行下一嵌入预测训练。
AI.result: 1. V-SONAR在文本到视频检索中表现竞争力；2. 在视频字幕任务上超越SOTA（DREAM-1K BLEU 23.9 vs. 19.6，PE-VIDEO BLEU 39.0 vs. 30.0）；3. V-LCM在62种语言的图像/视频字幕和问答任务中匹配或超越SOTA，在61种语言中显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: V-SONAR成功将SONAR扩展到视觉领域，V-LCM展示了统一潜在空间在多语言多模态任务中的强大潜力，为大规模跨模态应用提供了有效解决方案。

title: 3BASiL: An Algorithmic Framework for Sparse plus Low-Rank Compression of LLMs
comment: The Thirty-ninth Annual Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems
summary: Sparse plus Low-Rank $(\mathbf{S} + \mathbf{LR})$ decomposition of Large Language Models (LLMs) has emerged as a promising direction in model compression, aiming to decompose pre-trained model weights into a sum of sparse and low-rank matrices $(\mathbf{W} \approx \mathbf{S} + \mathbf{LR})$. Despite recent progress, existing methods often suffer from substantial performance degradation compared to dense models. In this work, we introduce 3BASiL-TM, an efficient one-shot post-training method for $(\mathbf{S} + \mathbf{LR})$ decomposition of LLMs that addresses this gap. Our approach first introduces a novel 3-Block Alternating Direction Method of Multipliers (ADMM) method, termed 3BASiL, to minimize the layer-wise reconstruction error with convergence guarantees. We then design an efficient transformer-matching (TM) refinement step that jointly optimizes the sparse and low-rank components across transformer layers. This step minimizes a novel memory-efficient loss that aligns outputs at the transformer level. Notably, the TM procedure is universal as it can enhance any $(\mathbf{S} + \mathbf{LR})$ decomposition, including pure sparsity. Our numerical experiments show that 3BASiL-TM reduces the WikiText2 perplexity gap relative to dense LLaMA-8B model by over 30% under a (2:4 Sparse + 64 LR) configuration, compared to prior methods. Moreover, our method achieves over 2.5x faster compression runtime on an A100 GPU compared to SOTA $(\mathbf{S} + \mathbf{LR})$ method. Our code is available at https://github.com/mazumder-lab/3BASiL.

AI.tldr: 3BASiL-TM是一种高效的一次性后训练方法，用于LLM的稀疏+低秩分解，通过3块ADMM和Transformer匹配细化步骤，显著减少性能下降并加速压缩。
AI.motivation: 现有的稀疏+低秩分解方法在模型压缩中常导致显著的性能下降，需要一种既能保持模型性能又能高效压缩的方法。
AI.method: 提出3BASiL-TM方法：1）3块ADMM（3BASiL）最小化层间重构误差；2）Transformer匹配（TM）细化步骤，跨层联合优化稀疏和低秩组件，使用内存高效的损失函数对齐Transformer输出。
AI.result: 在LLaMA-8B模型上，相比先前方法，将WikiText2困惑度差距减少30%以上（2:4稀疏+64低秩配置），压缩运行时间比SOTA方法快2.5倍以上。
AI.conclusion: 3BASiL-TM是一种高效且通用的稀疏+低秩分解方法，显著提升了压缩后模型的性能，同时大幅加速了压缩过程。

title: The Value Sensitivity Gap: How Clinical Large Language Models Respond to Patient Preference Statements in Shared Decision-Making
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are entering clinical workflows as decision support tools, yet how they respond to explicit patient value statements -- the core content of shared decision-making -- remains unmeasured. We conducted a factorial experiment using clinical vignettes derived from 98,759 de-identified Medicaid encounter notes. We tested four LLM families (GPT-5.2, Claude 4.5 Sonnet, Gemini 3 Pro, and DeepSeek-R1) across 13 value conditions in two clinical domains, yielding 104 trials. Default value orientations differed across model families (aggressiveness range 2.0 to 3.5 on a 1-to-5 scale). Value sensitivity indices ranged from 0.13 to 0.27, and directional concordance with patient-stated preferences ranged from 0.625 to 1.0. All models acknowledged patient values in 100% of non-control trials, yet actual recommendation shifting remained modest. Decision-matrix and VIM self-report mitigations each improved directional concordance by 0.125 in a 78-trial Phase 2 evaluation. These findings provide empirical data for populating value disclosure labels proposed by clinical AI governance frameworks.

AI.tldr: 研究评估了四种大型语言模型在临床决策中对患者价值陈述的响应能力，发现模型默认价值取向存在差异，对患者偏好的敏感性有限，尽管所有模型都能识别患者价值观，但实际建议调整幅度不大。
AI.motivation: 随着LLMs进入临床工作流程作为决策支持工具，需要评估它们如何响应患者明确的价值陈述——这是共享决策的核心内容。目前尚不清楚LLMs是否能够理解和尊重患者偏好，这对于临床AI的负责任部署至关重要。
AI.method: 采用因子实验设计，使用从98,759份去识别化医疗补助就诊记录中提取的临床情景。测试了四种LLM家族（GPT-5.2、Claude 4.5 Sonnet、Gemini 3 Pro和DeepSeek-R1），在13种价值条件下跨越两个临床领域，共进行104次试验。第二阶段评估了决策矩阵和VIM自我报告两种缓解策略在78次试验中的效果。
AI.result: 不同模型家族的默认价值取向存在差异（攻击性评分范围2.0-3.5，1-5分制）。价值敏感性指数范围0.13-0.27，与患者陈述偏好的方向一致性范围0.625-1.0。所有模型在100%的非控制试验中都能识别患者价值观，但实际建议调整幅度有限。两种缓解策略各自将方向一致性提高了0.125。
AI.conclusion: LLMs在临床决策中对患者价值的响应能力有限，需要专门的缓解策略来改善。这些发现为临床AI治理框架中提出的价值披露标签提供了实证数据，强调了在医疗AI部署中考虑价值对齐的重要性。

title: pySpatial: Generating 3D Visual Programs for Zero-Shot Spatial Reasoning
comment: Accepted at ICLR 2026, Project Page: Our project: https://pySpatial.github.io
summary: Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated strong capabilities in general-purpose perception and reasoning, but they still struggle with tasks that require spatial understanding of the 3D world. To address this, we introduce pySpatial, a visual programming framework that equips MLLMs with the ability to interface with spatial tools via Python code generation. Given an image sequence and a natural-language query, the model composes function calls to spatial tools including 3D reconstruction, camera-pose recovery, novel-view rendering, etc. These operations convert raw 2D inputs into an explorable 3D scene, enabling MLLMs to reason explicitly over structured spatial representations. Notably, pySpatial requires no gradient-based fine-tuning and operates in a fully zero-shot setting. Experimental evaluations on the challenging MindCube and Omni3D-Bench benchmarks demonstrate that our framework pySpatial consistently surpasses strong MLLM baselines; for instance, it outperforms GPT-4.1-mini by 12.94% on MindCube. Furthermore, we conduct real-world indoor navigation experiments where the robot can successfully traverse complex environments using route plans generated by pySpatial, highlighting the practical effectiveness of our approach.

AI.tldr: pySpatial是一个视觉编程框架，通过Python代码生成让多模态大语言模型能够调用空间工具（如3D重建、相机姿态恢复等），将2D图像序列转换为可探索的3D场景，从而增强模型的空间理解能力。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态大语言模型在通用感知和推理方面表现出色，但在需要3D空间理解的任务上仍有困难。为了解决这一限制，作者提出了pySpatial框架，让MLLMs能够通过代码生成与空间工具交互，实现对3D世界的显式推理。
AI.method: pySpatial采用视觉编程框架，给定图像序列和自然语言查询，模型通过Python代码生成调用空间工具（包括3D重建、相机姿态恢复、新视角渲染等）。这些操作将原始2D输入转换为结构化3D场景表示，使模型能够在空间表示上进行显式推理。该方法无需梯度微调，完全零样本运行。
AI.result: 在MindCube和Omni3D-Bench基准测试中，pySpatial持续超越强大的MLLM基线模型，例如在MindCube上比GPT-4.1-mini高出12.94%。在真实世界室内导航实验中，机器人能够使用pySpatial生成的路线规划成功穿越复杂环境，证明了该方法的实际有效性。
AI.conclusion: pySpatial通过代码生成将空间工具集成到MLLMs中，显著提升了模型的空间理解能力，无需额外训练即可实现零样本性能提升，在基准测试和实际应用中均表现出色。

title: Invariant-Stratified Propagation for Expressive Graph Neural Networks
summary: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) face fundamental limitations in expressivity and capturing structural heterogeneity. Standard message-passing architectures are constrained by the 1-dimensional Weisfeiler-Leman (1-WL) test, unable to distinguish graphs beyond degree sequences, and aggregate information uniformly from neighbors, failing to capture how nodes occupy different structural positions within higher-order patterns. While methods exist to achieve higher expressivity, they incur prohibitive computational costs and lack unified frameworks for flexibly encoding diverse structural properties. To address these limitations, we introduce Invariant-Stratified Propagation (ISP), a framework comprising both a novel WL variant (ISP-WL) and its efficient neural network implementation (ISPGNN). ISP stratifies nodes according to graph invariants, processing them in hierarchical strata that reveal structural distinctions invisible to 1-WL. Through hierarchical structural heterogeneity encoding, ISP quantifies differences in nodes' structural positions within higher-order patterns, distinguishing interactions where participants occupy different roles from those with uniform participation. We provide formal theoretical analysis establishing enhanced expressivity beyond 1-WL, convergence guarantees, and inherent resistance to oversmoothing. Extensive experiments across graph classification, node classification, and influence estimation demonstrate consistent improvements over standard architectures and state-of-the-art expressive baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出了Invariant-Stratified Propagation (ISP)框架，包含ISP-WL算法和ISPGNN实现，通过分层处理节点解决GNN表达能力和结构异质性捕获的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统GNN受限于1-WL测试的表达能力，无法区分超过度序列的图结构，且均匀聚合邻居信息，不能捕捉节点在更高阶模式中的不同结构位置。现有方法要么计算成本过高，要么缺乏统一框架。
AI.method: ISP框架包含：1) ISP-WL：基于图不变量的分层WL变体，将节点按结构属性分层处理；2) ISPGNN：高效的神经网络实现，通过分层结构异质性编码量化节点在更高阶模式中的结构位置差异。
AI.result: 在图表分类、节点分类和影响力估计等任务上，ISP相比标准架构和现有表达性基线方法取得了一致的性能提升，证明了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: ISP框架通过分层处理节点和编码结构异质性，解决了GNN的表达能力限制和结构异质性捕获问题，提供了超越1-WL的表达能力，同时具有收敛保证和抗过平滑特性。

title: ShiftLUT: Spatial Shift Enhanced Look-Up Tables for Efficient Image Restoration
summary: Look-Up Table based methods have emerged as a promising direction for efficient image restoration tasks. Recent LUT-based methods focus on improving their performance by expanding the receptive field. However, they inevitably introduce extra computational and storage overhead, which hinders their deployment in edge devices. To address this issue, we propose ShiftLUT, a novel framework that attains the largest receptive field among all LUT-based methods while maintaining high efficiency. Our key insight lies in three complementary components. First, Learnable Spatial Shift module (LSS) is introduced to expand the receptive field by applying learnable, channel-wise spatial offsets on feature maps. Second, we propose an asymmetric dual-branch architecture that allocates more computation to the information-dense branch, substantially reducing inference latency without compromising restoration quality. Finally, we incorporate a feature-level LUT compression strategy called Error-bounded Adaptive Sampling (EAS) to minimize the storage overhead. Compared to the previous state-of-the-art method TinyLUT, ShiftLUT achieves a 3.8$\times$ larger receptive field and improves an average PSNR by over 0.21 dB across multiple standard benchmarks, while maintaining a small storage size and inference time.

AI.tldr: ShiftLUT：一种基于查找表的高效图像修复框架，通过可学习空间偏移模块扩大感受野，采用非对称双分支架构减少计算量，结合误差有界自适应采样压缩存储，在保持高效的同时获得更大感受野和更好修复质量。
AI.motivation: 现有基于查找表(LUT)的图像修复方法通过扩大感受野提升性能，但会引入额外计算和存储开销，阻碍在边缘设备上的部署。需要一种既能扩大感受野又能保持高效的方法。
AI.method: 1. 可学习空间偏移模块(LSS)：通过可学习的通道级空间偏移扩大感受野；2. 非对称双分支架构：为信息密集分支分配更多计算，减少推理延迟；3. 误差有界自适应采样(EAS)：特征级LUT压缩策略，最小化存储开销。
AI.result: 相比之前最佳方法TinyLUT，ShiftLUT获得3.8倍更大的感受野，在多个标准基准测试中平均PSNR提升超过0.21dB，同时保持小存储大小和推理时间。
AI.conclusion: ShiftLUT在LUT-based方法中实现了最大的感受野，同时保持了高效率，解决了现有方法在边缘设备部署时的计算和存储瓶颈问题。

title: One Operator to Rule Them All? On Boundary-Indexed Operator Families in Neural PDE Solvers
comment: Accepted to the ICLR 2026 Workshop on AI & PDEs. 10 pages, 5 figures
summary: Neural PDE solvers are often described as learning solution operators that map problem data to PDE solutions. In this work, we argue that this interpretation is generally incorrect when boundary conditions vary. We show that standard neural operator training implicitly learns a boundary-indexed family of operators, rather than a single boundary-agnostic operator, with the learned mapping fundamentally conditioned on the boundary-condition distribution seen during training. We formalize this perspective by framing operator learning as conditional risk minimization over boundary conditions, which leads to a non-identifiability result outside the support of the training boundary distribution. As a consequence, generalization in forcing terms or resolution does not imply generalization across boundary conditions. We support our theoretical analysis with controlled experiments on the Poisson equation, demonstrating sharp degradation under boundary-condition shifts, cross-distribution failures between distinct boundary ensembles, and convergence to conditional expectations when boundary information is removed. Our results clarify a core limitation of current neural PDE solvers and highlight the need for explicit boundary-aware modeling in the pursuit of foundation models for PDEs.

AI.tldr: 论文指出神经PDE求解器通常被误解为学习单一解算子，实际上它们学习的是边界条件索引的算子族，而非边界无关的算子，这导致在训练边界分布之外泛化能力受限。
AI.motivation: 当前神经PDE求解器通常被描述为学习将问题数据映射到PDE解的解算子。本文质疑这种解释在边界条件变化时的正确性，认为标准神经算子训练实际上学习的是边界条件索引的算子族，而非单一的边界无关算子。
AI.method: 通过将算子学习形式化为边界条件上的条件风险最小化问题，提出非可识别性理论结果。在泊松方程上进行控制实验，验证边界条件偏移下的性能退化、不同边界集合间的跨分布失败，以及移除边界信息时收敛到条件期望的现象。
AI.result: 实验显示神经PDE求解器在边界条件偏移时性能急剧下降，在不同边界集合间存在跨分布失败，移除边界信息时收敛到条件期望。理论分析表明在训练边界分布之外存在非可识别性问题。
AI.conclusion: 当前神经PDE求解器存在核心限制：它们学习的是边界条件索引的算子族而非单一算子，这限制了在边界条件变化时的泛化能力。为实现PDE基础模型，需要显式的边界感知建模方法。

title: Alignment Is Not Enough: A Relational Framework for Moral Standing in Human-AI Interaction
summary: The question of whether artificial entities deserve moral consideration has become one of the defining ethical challenges of AI research. Existing frameworks for moral patiency rely on verified ontological properties, such as sentience, phenomenal consciousness, or the capacity for suffering, that remain epistemically inaccessible in computational systems. This reliance creates a governance vacuum: millions of users form sustained affective bonds with conversational AI, yet no regulatory instrument distinguishes these interactions from transactional tool use. We introduce Relate (Relational Ethics for Leveled Assessment of Technological Entities), a framework that reframes AI moral patiency from ontological verification toward relational capacity and embodied interaction. Through a systematic comparison of seven governance frameworks, we demonstrate that current trustworthy AI instruments treat all human-AI encounters identically as tool use, ignoring the relational and embodied dynamics that posthumanist scholarship anticipated. We propose relational impact assessments, graduated moral consideration protocols, and interdisciplinary ethics integration as concrete instruments, and we include a sample Relational Impact Assessment applied to a deployed companion AI system. We do not claim current AI systems are conscious. We demonstrate that the ethical vocabularies governing them are inadequate to the embodied, relational realities these systems produce.

AI.tldr: 提出Relate框架，将AI道德主体性从本体验证转向关系能力和具身互动，解决当前可信AI治理忽视人机关系动态的问题。
AI.motivation: 当前AI道德主体性框架依赖本体属性（如意识、感受能力），但这些在计算系统中无法验证，导致治理真空。数百万用户与对话AI形成情感纽带，但监管工具无法区分这种互动与工具使用。
AI.method: 引入Relate框架，通过系统比较七个治理框架，提出关系影响评估、分级道德考虑协议和跨学科伦理整合等具体工具，并应用于已部署的伴侣AI系统。
AI.result: 当前可信AI工具将所有人机互动视为工具使用，忽视了后人类主义学者预见的关系和具身动态。Relate框架提供了更适应当前AI系统产生的具身、关系现实的伦理词汇。
AI.conclusion: AI系统的伦理治理需要从本体验证转向关系能力评估，承认人机互动中的关系和具身维度，即使AI系统本身不具有意识。

title: UD-SfPNet: An Underwater Descattering Shape-from-Polarization Network for 3D Normal Reconstruction
summary: Underwater optical imaging is severely hindered by scattering, but polarization imaging offers the unique dual advantages of descattering and shape-from-polarization (SfP) 3D reconstruction. To exploit these advantages, this paper proposes UD-SfPNet, an underwater descattering shape-from-polarization network that leverages polarization cues for improved 3D surface normal prediction. The framework jointly models polarization-based image descattering and SfP normal estimation in a unified pipeline, avoiding error accumulation from sequential processing and enabling global optimization across both tasks. UD-SfPNet further incorporates a novel color embedding module to enhance geometric consistency by exploiting the relationship between color encodings and surface orientation. A detail enhancement convolution module is also included to better preserve high-frequency geometric details that are lost under scattering. Experiments on the MuS-Polar3D dataset show that the proposed method significantly improves reconstruction accuracy, achieving a mean surface normal angular error of 15.12$^\circ$ (the lowest among compared methods). These results confirm the efficacy of combining descattering with polarization-based shape inference, and highlight the practical significance and potential applications of UD-SfPNet for optical 3D imaging in challenging underwater environments. The code is available at https://github.com/WangPuyun/UD-SfPNet.

AI.tldr: 提出UD-SfPNet网络，联合建模偏振图像去散射和偏振形状重建，通过统一管道避免误差累积，提升水下3D表面法向预测精度
AI.motivation: 水下光学成像受散射严重影响，偏振成像具有去散射和形状重建双重优势。现有方法通常顺序处理这两个任务，导致误差累积，需要联合优化框架
AI.method: 提出UD-SfPNet统一网络，联合建模偏振图像去散射和形状重建；引入颜色嵌入模块增强几何一致性，使用细节增强卷积模块保留高频几何细节
AI.result: 在MuS-Polar3D数据集上取得15.12°的平均表面法向角误差，优于对比方法，验证了联合去散射与偏振形状推断的有效性
AI.conclusion: UD-SfPNet通过联合优化去散射和偏振形状重建，显著提升水下3D成像精度，在挑战性水下环境中具有实际应用价值

title: Tackling multiphysics problems via finite element-guided physics-informed operator learning
summary: This work presents a finite element-guided physics-informed operator learning framework for multiphysics problems with coupled partial differential equations (PDEs) on arbitrary domains. Implemented with Folax, a JAX-based operator-learning platform, the proposed framework learns a mapping from the input parameter space to the solution space with a weighted residual formulation based on the finite element method, enabling discretization-independent prediction beyond the training resolution without relying on labaled simulation data. The present framework for multiphysics problems is verified on nonlinear thermo-mechanical problems. Two- and three-dimensional representative volume elements with varying heterogeneous microstructures, and a close-to-reality industrial casting example under varying boundary conditions are investigated as the example problems. We investigate the potential of several neural operator backbones, including Fourier neural operators (FNOs), deep operator networks (DeepONets), and a newly proposed implicit finite operator learning (iFOL) approach based on conditional neural fields. The results demonstrate that FNOs yield highly accurate solution operators on regular domains, where the global topology can be efficiently learned in the spectral domain, and iFOL offers efficient parametric operator learning capabilities for complex and irregular geometries. Furthermore, studies on training strategies, network decomposition, and training sample quality reveal that a monolithic training strategy using a single network is sufficient for accurate predictions, while training sample quality strongly influences performance. Overall, the present approach highlights the potential of physics-informed operator learning with a finite element-based loss as a unified and scalable approach for coupled multiphysics simulations.

AI.tldr: 提出基于有限元的物理信息算子学习框架，用于任意域上的多物理场耦合PDE问题，无需标记仿真数据，支持离散无关预测
AI.motivation: 解决多物理场耦合PDE在任意几何域上的高效仿真问题，避免传统方法需要大量标记数据的限制，实现物理信息驱动的算子学习
AI.method: 基于有限元加权残差公式的物理信息算子学习框架，使用Folax(JAX平台)，比较FNO、DeepONet和新提出的iFOL(隐式有限算子学习)方法
AI.result: FNO在规则域上精度高，iFOL在复杂不规则几何上表现优异；单网络训练策略足够，训练样本质量对性能影响显著
AI.conclusion: 基于有限元损失的物理信息算子学习是耦合多物理场仿真的统一可扩展方法，为复杂工程问题提供高效解决方案

title: On the Exact Algorithmic Extraction of Finite Tesselations Through Prime Extraction of Minimal Representative Forms
summary: The identification of repeating patterns in discrete grids is rudimentary within symbolic reasoning, algorithm synthesis and structural optimization across diverse computational domains. Although statistical approaches targeting noisy data can approximately recognize patterns, symbolic analysis utilizing deterministic extraction of periodic structures is underdeveloped. This paper aims to fill this gap by employing a hierarchical algorithm that discovers exact tessellations in finite planar grids, addressing the problem where multiple independent patterns may coexist within a hierarchical structure. The proposed method utilizes composite discovery (dual inspection and breadth-first pruning) for identifying rectangular regions with internal repetition, normalization to a minimal representative form, and prime extraction (selective duplication and hierarchical memoization) to account for irregular dimensions and to achieve efficient computation time. We evaluate scalability on grid sizes from 2x2 to 32x32, showing overlap detection on simple repeating tiles exhibits processing time under 1ms, while complex patterns which require exhaustive search and systematic exploration shows exponential growth. This algorithm provides deterministic behavior for exact, axis-aligned, rectangular tessellations, addressing a critical gap in symbolic grid analysis techniques, applicable to puzzle solving reasoning tasks and identification of exact repeating structures in discrete symbolic domains.

AI.tldr: 提出一种分层算法，用于在有限平面网格中发现精确的矩形镶嵌模式，通过复合发现、归一化和质数提取技术识别网格中的重复结构。
AI.motivation: 离散网格中重复模式的识别在符号推理、算法合成和结构优化中具有基础性作用。虽然针对噪声数据的统计方法可以近似识别模式，但利用确定性周期结构提取的符号分析方法尚未充分发展。本文旨在填补这一空白，解决多个独立模式可能在分层结构中同时存在的问题。
AI.method: 采用分层算法：1) 复合发现（双重检查和广度优先剪枝）识别具有内部重复的矩形区域；2) 归一化为最小代表性形式；3) 质数提取（选择性复制和分层记忆化）处理不规则维度并实现高效计算。
AI.result: 在2x2到32x32的网格尺寸上评估可扩展性：简单重复瓦片的处理时间低于1ms，复杂模式需要穷举搜索和系统探索，显示出指数级增长。算法为精确、轴对齐的矩形镶嵌提供确定性行为。
AI.conclusion: 该算法填补了符号网格分析技术的关键空白，适用于谜题解决推理任务和离散符号领域中精确重复结构的识别，为确定性模式识别提供了系统方法。

title: VoxKnesset: A Large-Scale Longitudinal Hebrew Speech Dataset for Aging Speaker Modeling
summary: Speech processing systems face a fundamental challenge: the human voice changes with age, yet few datasets support rigorous longitudinal evaluation. We introduce VoxKnesset, an open-access dataset of ~2,300 hours of Hebrew parliamentary speech spanning 2009-2025, comprising 393 speakers with recording spans of up to 15 years. Each segment includes aligned transcripts and verified demographic metadata from official parliamentary records. We benchmark modern speech embeddings (WavLM-Large, ECAPA-TDNN, Wav2Vec2-XLSR-1B) on age prediction and speaker verification under longitudinal conditions. Speaker verification EER rises from 2.15\% to 4.58\% over 15 years for the strongest model, and cross-sectionally trained age regressors fail to capture within-speaker aging, while longitudinally trained models recover a meaningful temporal signal. We publicly release the dataset and pipeline to support aging-robust speech systems and Hebrew speech processing.

AI.tldr: VoxKnesset是一个包含约2300小时希伯来语议会语音的开放数据集，时间跨度2009-2025年，包含393名发言人长达15年的语音记录，用于研究语音随年龄变化的问题。
AI.motivation: 人类语音会随年龄变化，但现有数据集缺乏足够的纵向数据来支持严格的年龄变化评估。需要能够研究语音随年龄变化的长期数据集。
AI.method: 构建VoxKnesset数据集，包含对齐的转录文本和经过验证的人口统计元数据。使用现代语音嵌入模型（WavLM-Large、ECAPA-TDNN、Wav2Vec2-XLSR-1B）在纵向条件下进行年龄预测和说话人验证基准测试。
AI.result: 说话人验证的等错误率（EER）在15年内从2.15%上升到4.58%。横断面训练的年龄回归器无法捕捉说话人内部的年龄变化，而纵向训练的模型能够恢复有意义的时间信号。
AI.conclusion: 语音处理系统需要考虑年龄变化的影响，纵向训练对于捕捉语音随年龄变化至关重要。VoxKnesset数据集支持年龄鲁棒的语音系统和希伯来语语音处理研究。

title: Autoregressive Synthesis of Sparse and Semi-Structured Mixed-Type Data
summary: Synthetic data generation is a critical capability for data sharing, privacy compliance, system benchmarking and test data provisioning. Existing methods assume dense, fixed-schema tabular data, yet this assumption is increasingly at odds with modern data systems - from document databases, REST APIs to data lakes - which store and exchange data in sparse, semi-structured formats like JSON. Applying existing tabular methods to such data requires flattening of nested data into wide, sparse tables which scales poorly. We present Origami, an autoregressive transformer-based architecture that tokenizes data records, including nested objects and variable length arrays, into sequences of key, value and structural tokens. This representation natively handles sparsity, mixed types and hierarchical structure without flattening or imputation. Origami outperforms baselines spanning GAN, VAE, diffusion and autoregressive architectures on fidelity, utility and detection metrics across nearly all settings, while maintaining high privacy scores. On semi-structured datasets with up to 38% sparsity, baseline synthesizers either fail to scale or degrade substantially, while Origami maintains high-fidelity synthesis that is harder to distinguish from real data. To the best of our knowledge, Origami is the first architecture capable of natively modeling and generating semi-structured data end-to-end.

AI.tldr: Origami是一种基于自回归Transformer的架构，专门用于半结构化数据（如JSON）的合成生成，无需扁平化处理，在保真度、实用性和隐私性方面优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现代数据系统（如文档数据库、REST API、数据湖）越来越多地使用稀疏的半结构化格式（如JSON）存储和交换数据，而现有的表格数据合成方法需要将嵌套数据扁平化为宽表，这种方法扩展性差且效率低下。
AI.method: Origami采用自回归Transformer架构，将数据记录（包括嵌套对象和变长数组）标记化为键、值和结构标记序列。这种表示方法原生处理稀疏性、混合类型和层次结构，无需扁平化或插补。
AI.result: Origami在保真度、实用性和检测指标上优于GAN、VAE、扩散和自回归基线方法，在稀疏度高达38%的半结构化数据集上保持高保真度合成，同时保持高隐私分数。
AI.conclusion: Origami是第一个能够原生建模和生成半结构化数据的端到端架构，解决了现代数据系统中稀疏半结构化数据合成的关键挑战。

title: Joint Sensor Deployment and Physics-Informed Graph Transformer for Smart Grid Attack Detection
summary: This paper proposes a joint multi-objective optimization framework for strategic sensor placement in power systems to enhance attack detection. A novel physics-informed graph transformer network (PIGTN)-based detection model is proposed. Non-dominated sorting genetic algorithm-II (NSGA-II) jointly optimizes sensor locations and the PIGTN's detection performance, while considering practical constraints. The combinatorial space of feasible sensor placements is explored using NSGA-II, while concurrently training the proposed detector in a closed-loop setting. Compared to baseline sensor placement methods, the proposed framework consistently demonstrates robustness under sensor failures and improvements in detection performance in seven benchmark cases, including the 14, 30, IEEE-30, 39, 57, 118 and the 200 bus systems. By incorporating AC power flow constraints, the proposed PIGTN-based detection model generalizes well to unseen attacks and outperforms other graph network-based variants (topology-aware models), achieving improvements up to 37% in accuracy and 73% in detection rate, with a mean false alarms rate of 0.3%. In addition, optimized sensor layouts significantly improve the performance of power system state estimation, achieving a 61%--98% reduction in the average state error.

AI.tldr: 提出联合多目标优化框架用于电力系统传感器战略布置，结合物理信息图Transformer网络进行攻击检测，使用NSGA-II算法联合优化传感器位置和检测性能。
AI.motivation: 电力系统面临网络安全威胁，需要有效的攻击检测机制。传统传感器布置方法可能无法同时优化检测性能和系统状态估计，需要综合考虑物理约束和检测性能的联合优化框架。
AI.method: 1) 提出物理信息图Transformer网络(PIGTN)检测模型；2) 使用NSGA-II算法联合优化传感器位置和PIGTN检测性能；3) 在闭环设置中同时探索传感器布置组合空间和训练检测器；4) 考虑AC潮流约束等实际限制。
AI.result: 在7个基准测试系统(14-200总线)中，相比基线方法：1) 检测性能提升达37%准确率和73%检测率；2) 平均误报率0.3%；3) 系统状态估计误差减少61%-98%；4) 在传感器故障下保持鲁棒性；5) 对未见攻击具有良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 提出的联合优化框架能有效提升电力系统攻击检测性能，同时优化传感器布置和检测模型，在多个基准系统中表现出优越性能，为电力系统网络安全提供有效解决方案。

title: VGGT-Det: Mining VGGT Internal Priors for Sensor-Geometry-Free Multi-View Indoor 3D Object Detection
summary: Current multi-view indoor 3D object detectors rely on sensor geometry that is costly to obtain (i.e., precisely calibrated multi-view camera poses) to fuse multi-view information into a global scene representation, limiting deployment in real-world scenes. We target a more practical setting: Sensor-Geometry-Free (SG-Free) multi-view indoor 3D object detection, where there are no sensor-provided geometric inputs (multi-view poses or depth). Recent Visual Geometry Grounded Transformer (VGGT) shows that strong 3D cues can be inferred directly from images. Building on this insight, we present VGGT-Det, the first framework tailored for SG-Free multi-view indoor 3D object detection. Rather than merely consuming VGGT predictions, our method integrates VGGT encoder into a transformer-based pipeline. To effectively leverage both the semantic and geometric priors from inside VGGT, we introduce two novel key components: (i) Attention-Guided Query Generation (AG): exploits VGGT attention maps as semantic priors to initialize object queries, improving localization by focusing on object regions while preserving global spatial structure; (ii) Query-Driven Feature Aggregation (QD): a learnable See-Query interacts with object queries to 'see' what they need, and then dynamically aggregates multi-level geometric features across VGGT layers that progressively lift 2D features into 3D. Experiments show that VGGT-Det significantly surpasses the best-performing method in the SG-Free setting by 4.4 and 8.6 mAP@0.25 on ScanNet and ARKitScenes, respectively. Ablation study shows that VGGT's internally learned semantic and geometric priors can be effectively leveraged by our AG and QD.

AI.tldr: VGGT-Det：首个无需传感器几何信息的多视角室内3D物体检测框架，通过注意力引导查询生成和查询驱动特征聚合，有效利用VGGT内部学习到的语义和几何先验。
AI.motivation: 当前多视角室内3D物体检测器依赖昂贵的传感器几何信息（精确校准的多视角相机位姿）来融合多视角信息，限制了在实际场景中的部署。本文针对更实用的无传感器几何设置，旨在直接从图像中推断3D信息。
AI.method: 提出VGGT-Det框架，将VGGT编码器集成到基于Transformer的流程中。包含两个关键组件：1) 注意力引导查询生成(AG)：利用VGGT注意力图作为语义先验初始化物体查询；2) 查询驱动特征聚合(QD)：通过可学习的See-Query与物体查询交互，动态聚合VGGT各层的多级几何特征。
AI.result: 在ScanNet和ARKitScenes数据集上，VGGT-Det在SG-Free设置下分别比最佳方法提升4.4和8.6 mAP@0.25。消融研究表明VGGT内部学习的语义和几何先验可以被AG和QD有效利用。
AI.conclusion: VGGT-Det首次实现了无需传感器几何信息的多视角室内3D物体检测，通过有效利用视觉几何基础Transformer的内部先验知识，显著提升了检测性能。

title: Randomized Kiring Believer for Parallel Bayesian Optimization with Regret Bounds
summary: We consider an optimization problem of an expensive-to-evaluate black-box function, in which we can obtain noisy function values in parallel. For this problem, parallel Bayesian optimization (PBO) is a promising approach, which aims to optimize with fewer function evaluations by selecting a diverse input set for parallel evaluation. However, existing PBO methods suffer from poor practical performance or lack theoretical guarantees. In this study, we propose a PBO method, called randomized kriging believer (KB), based on a well-known KB heuristic and inheriting the advantages of the original KB: low computational complexity, a simple implementation, versatility across various BO methods, and applicability to asynchronous parallelization. Furthermore, we show that our randomized KB achieves Bayesian expected regret guarantees. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method through experiments on synthetic and benchmark functions and emulators of real-world data.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于随机化克里金置信者（KB）的并行贝叶斯优化方法，该方法结合了KB启发式方法的优点，并提供了理论保证
AI.motivation: 解决昂贵黑盒函数优化问题，现有并行贝叶斯优化方法存在实际性能差或缺乏理论保证的问题
AI.method: 基于随机化克里金置信者（KB）启发式方法，继承原始KB的低计算复杂度、简单实现、跨方法通用性和异步并行适用性
AI.result: 随机化KB方法实现了贝叶斯期望遗憾保证，在合成函数、基准函数和真实世界数据模拟器上的实验证明了其有效性
AI.conclusion: 提出的随机化KB方法是一种实用且理论上有保证的并行贝叶斯优化方法

title: Improving Text-to-Image Generation with Intrinsic Self-Confidence Rewards
comment: 19 pages, accepted to CVPR 2026. Project page https://wookiekim.github.io/ARC/
summary: Text-to-image generation powers content creation across design, media, and data augmentation. Post-training of text-to-image generative models is a promising path to better match human preferences, factuality, and improved aesthetics. We introduce ARC (Adaptive Rewarding by self-Confidence), a post-training framework that replaces external reward supervision with an internal self-confidence signal, obtained by evaluating how accurately the model recovers injected noise under self-denoising probes. ARC converts this intrinsic signal into scalar rewards, enabling fully unsupervised optimization without additional datasets, annotators, or reward models. Empirically, by reinforcing high-confidence generations, ARC delivers consistent gains in compositional generation, text rendering and text-image alignment over the baseline. We also find that integrating ARC with external rewards results in a complementary improvement, with alleviated reward hacking.

AI.tldr: ARC是一个无需外部监督的文本到图像生成模型后训练框架，通过模型自身去噪置信度作为内在奖励信号来优化生成质量。
AI.motivation: 当前文本到图像生成模型的后训练通常需要外部奖励监督（如人类偏好数据、奖励模型），这需要额外数据集、标注者或奖励模型，成本高且可能引入偏差。作者希望开发一种完全无监督的后训练方法，利用模型自身的内在信号来优化生成质量。
AI.method: ARC框架的核心思想是利用模型的自信心信号作为内在奖励。具体方法：1）通过自去噪探针评估模型恢复注入噪声的准确性来获得自信心信号；2）将这个内在信号转换为标量奖励；3）基于这些奖励进行强化学习优化，无需外部监督。框架可以与外部奖励结合使用。
AI.result: 实验表明：1）ARC在组合生成、文本渲染和文本-图像对齐方面相比基线有持续提升；2）ARC与外部奖励结合使用时产生互补改进，缓解了奖励黑客问题；3）框架完全无监督，不需要额外数据集、标注者或奖励模型。
AI.conclusion: ARC提供了一个有效且高效的无监督后训练框架，通过利用模型内在的自信心信号来优化文本到图像生成质量，可以与外部奖励结合使用以获得更好的性能。

title: GAC: Stabilizing Asynchronous RL Training for LLMs via Gradient Alignment Control
summary: Asynchronous execution is essential for scaling reinforcement learning (RL) to modern large model workloads, including large language models and AI agents, but it can fundamentally alter RL optimization behavior. While prior work on asynchronous RL focuses on training throughput and distributional correction, we show that naively applying asynchrony to policy-gradient updates can induce qualitatively different training dynamics and lead to severe training instability. Through systematic empirical and theoretical analysis, we identify a key signature of this instability: asynchronous training exhibits persistently high cosine similarity between consecutive policy gradients, in contrast to the near-orthogonal updates observed under synchronized training. This stale-aligned gradient effect amplifies correlated updates and increases the risk of overshooting and divergence. Motivated by this observation, we propose GRADIENT ALIGNMENT CONTROL(GAC), a simple dynamics-aware stabilization method that regulates asynchronous RL progress along stale-aligned directions via gradient projection. We establish convergence guarantees under bounded staleness and demonstrate empirically that GAC recovers stable, on-policy training dynamics and matches synchronized baselines even at high staleness.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了异步强化学习中的训练不稳定性问题，发现异步策略梯度更新会导致梯度持续高相似性（陈旧对齐梯度效应），并提出了一种基于梯度投影的稳定化方法GAC来解决这一问题。
AI.motivation: 异步执行对于将强化学习扩展到现代大模型工作负载（包括大语言模型和AI智能体）至关重要，但异步执行会从根本上改变RL优化行为。现有异步RL研究主要关注训练吞吐量和分布校正，而本文发现将异步性简单应用于策略梯度更新会导致训练动态发生质变，引发严重的训练不稳定性。
AI.method: 通过系统的实证和理论分析，识别出异步训练不稳定的关键特征：异步训练表现出连续策略梯度之间的持续高余弦相似性（与同步训练中观察到的近正交更新形成对比）。基于这一观察，提出了GRADIENT ALIGNMENT CONTROL (GAC)，这是一种简单的动态感知稳定化方法，通过梯度投影来调节异步RL在陈旧对齐方向上的进展。
AI.result: 在有限陈旧性条件下建立了收敛保证，并通过实证证明GAC能够恢复稳定的、基于策略的训练动态，即使在高陈旧性条件下也能匹配同步基线的性能。
AI.conclusion: GAC方法有效解决了异步RL中的训练不稳定性问题，为大语言模型和AI智能体等大规模RL应用提供了稳定高效的异步训练解决方案。

title: High-Resolution Range Profile Classifiers Require Aspect-Angle Awareness
summary: We revisit High-Resolution Range Profile (HRRP) classification with aspect-angle conditioning. While prior work often assumes that aspect-angle information is incomplete during training or unavailable at inference, we study a setting where angles are available for all training samples and explicitly provided to the classifier. Using three datasets and a broad range of conditioning strategies and model architectures, we show that both single-profile and sequential classifiers benefit consistently from aspect-angle awareness, with an average accuracy gain of about 7% and improvements of up to 10%, depending on the model and dataset. In practice, aspect angles are not directly measured and must be estimated. We show that a causal Kalman filter can estimate them online with a median error of 5{\textdegree}, and that training and inference with estimated angles preserves most of the gains, supporting the proposed approach in realistic conditions.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究高分辨率距离像分类中的方位角条件化问题，发现在训练和推理中明确使用方位角信息可以显著提升分类准确率（平均提升7%，最高可达10%），并证明通过因果卡尔曼滤波器在线估计方位角可在实际应用中保持大部分性能增益。
AI.motivation: 传统HRRP分类方法通常假设方位角信息在训练时不完整或在推理时不可用。本文研究在训练样本方位角信息完全可用且能明确提供给分类器的场景，探索方位角条件化对分类性能的实际影响。
AI.method: 使用三个数据集，采用广泛的方位角条件化策略和模型架构，包括单剖面分类器和序列分类器。同时提出使用因果卡尔曼滤波器在线估计方位角，以模拟实际应用中方位角需要估计而非直接测量的情况。
AI.result: 实验表明方位角感知能一致提升分类性能，平均准确率提升约7%，最高可达10%（具体提升取决于模型和数据集）。因果卡尔曼滤波器能以中位误差5°在线估计方位角，使用估计方位角进行训练和推理能保留大部分性能增益。
AI.conclusion: 方位角条件化是HRRP分类的有效方法，即使在方位角需要估计的实际场景中，该方法仍能保持显著的性能提升，支持在实际条件下应用该技术。

title: DriveCode: Domain Specific Numerical Encoding for LLM-Based Autonomous Driving
comment: The project page is available at https://shiftwilliam.github.io/DriveCode
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have shown great promise for autonomous driving. However, discretizing numbers into tokens limits precise numerical reasoning, fails to reflect the positional significance of digits in the training objective, and makes it difficult to achieve both decoding efficiency and numerical precision. These limitations affect both the processing of sensor measurements and the generation of precise control commands, creating a fundamental barrier for deploying LLM-based autonomous driving systems. In this paper, we introduce DriveCode, a novel numerical encoding method that represents numbers as dedicated embeddings rather than discrete text tokens. DriveCode employs a number projector to map numbers into the language model's hidden space, enabling seamless integration with visual and textual features in a unified multimodal sequence. Evaluated on OmniDrive, DriveGPT4, and DriveGPT4-V2 datasets, DriveCode demonstrates superior performance in trajectory prediction and control signal generation, confirming its effectiveness for LLM-based autonomous driving systems.

AI.tldr: DriveCode提出了一种新的数值编码方法，用于解决LLM在自动驾驶中数值推理的局限性，将数字表示为专用嵌入而非离散文本标记，显著提升了轨迹预测和控制信号生成的精度。
AI.motivation: LLM在自动驾驶中面临数值推理的挑战：将数字离散化为标记限制了精确数值推理，无法反映数字位置重要性，难以同时实现解码效率和数值精度。这些限制影响了传感器测量处理和控制命令生成，成为部署LLM自动驾驶系统的基本障碍。
AI.method: DriveCode采用数值编码方法，使用数字投影器将数字映射到语言模型的隐藏空间，使数字能够与视觉和文本特征在统一的多模态序列中无缝集成。
AI.result: 在OmniDrive、DriveGPT4和DriveGPT4-V2数据集上的评估表明，DriveCode在轨迹预测和控制信号生成方面表现出优越性能，证实了其在LLM自动驾驶系统中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: DriveCode通过创新的数值编码方法解决了LLM在自动驾驶中的数值推理瓶颈，为LLM在需要精确数值处理的自动驾驶任务中的应用提供了有效解决方案。

title: Training Dynamics of Softmax Self-Attention: Fast Global Convergence via Preconditioning
summary: We study the training dynamics of gradient descent in a softmax self-attention layer trained to perform linear regression and show that a simple first-order optimization algorithm can converge to the globally optimal self-attention parameters at a geometric rate. Our analysis proceeds in two steps. First, we show that in the infinite-data limit the regression problem solved by the self-attention layer is equivalent to a nonconvex matrix factorization problem. Second, we exploit this connection to design a novel "structure-aware" variant of gradient descent which efficiently optimizes the original finite-data regression objective. Our optimization algorithm features several innovations over standard gradient descent, including a preconditioner and regularizer which help avoid spurious stationary points, and a data-dependent spectral initialization of parameters which lie near the manifold of global minima with high probability.

AI.tldr: 该论文分析了softmax自注意力层在线性回归任务中的训练动态，证明了简单一阶优化算法能以几何速率收敛到全局最优自注意力参数。
AI.motivation: 理解自注意力层的训练动态对于优化Transformer模型至关重要。目前对自注意力层优化特性的理论理解有限，特别是在非凸优化背景下。该研究旨在揭示自注意力层在线性回归任务中的收敛特性，为更复杂的LLM训练提供理论基础。
AI.method: 采用两阶段分析方法：1) 在无限数据极限下，将自注意力层的回归问题等价转化为非凸矩阵分解问题；2) 设计"结构感知"的梯度下降变体，包含预处理器、正则化器和数据相关的谱初始化，以高效优化原始有限数据回归目标。
AI.result: 证明了简单一阶优化算法能以几何速率收敛到全局最优自注意力参数。提出的结构感知梯度下降算法能够避免虚假驻点，并以高概率初始化参数到全局最小值流形附近。
AI.conclusion: 自注意力层在线性回归任务中具有良好的优化特性，通过适当的算法设计可以实现高效收敛。这为理解更复杂的Transformer模型训练动态提供了理论基础。

title: Adaptive Uncertainty-Guided Surrogates for Efficient phase field Modeling of Dendritic Solidification
comment: This manuscript is a preprint and has not yet been peer-reviewed. It has 45 pages and 14 figures
summary: The high computational cost of phase field simulations remains a major limitation for predicting dendritic solidification in metals, particularly in additive manufacturing, where microstructural control is critical. This work presents a surrogate model for dendritic solidification that employs uncertainty-driven adaptive sampling with XGBoost and CNNs, including a self-supervised strategy, to efficiently approximate the spatio-temporal evolution while reducing costly phase field simulations. The proposed adaptive strategy leverages model uncertainty, approximated via Monte Carlo dropout for CNNs and bagging for XGBoost, to identify high-uncertainty regions where new samples are generated locally within hyperspheres, progressively refining the spatio-temporal design space and achieving accurate predictions with significantly fewer phase field simulations than an Optimal Latin Hypercube Sampling optimized via discrete Particle Swarm Optimization (OLHS-PSO). The framework systematically investigates how temporal instance selection, adaptive sampling, and the choice between domain-informed and data-driven surrogates affect spatio-temporal model performance. Evaluation considers not only computational cost but also the number of expensive phase field simulations, surrogate accuracy, and associated $CO_2$ emissions, providing a comprehensive assessment of model performance as well as their related environmental impact.

AI.tldr: 提出一种用于枝晶凝固的代理模型，采用不确定性驱动的自适应采样结合XGBoost和CNN，通过自监督策略高效近似时空演化，显著减少昂贵的相场模拟计算成本。
AI.motivation: 相场模拟的高计算成本是预测金属枝晶凝固的主要限制，特别是在增材制造中微观结构控制至关重要。需要开发高效的代理模型来减少昂贵的相场模拟。
AI.method: 使用不确定性驱动的自适应采样方法，结合XGBoost和CNN（包括自监督策略）。通过蒙特卡洛dropout（CNN）和bagging（XGBoost）估计模型不确定性，在高不确定性区域局部生成新样本，逐步细化时空设计空间。
AI.result: 相比通过离散粒子群优化的最优拉丁超立方采样（OLHS-PSO），该方法用显著更少的相场模拟实现了准确预测。系统评估了时间实例选择、自适应采样以及领域知识与数据驱动代理模型选择对性能的影响。
AI.conclusion: 该框架不仅考虑了计算成本，还评估了昂贵的相场模拟数量、代理模型准确性以及相关的CO₂排放，为模型性能及其环境影响提供了全面评估。

title: Learning to Weigh Waste: A Physics-Informed Multimodal Fusion Framework and Large-Scale Dataset for Commercial and Industrial Applications
summary: Accurate weight estimation of commercial and industrial waste is important for efficient operations, yet image-based estimation remains difficult because similar-looking objects may have different densities, and the visible size changes with camera distance. Addressing this problem, we propose Multimodal Weight Predictor (MWP) framework that estimates waste weight by combining RGB images with physics-informed metadata, including object dimensions, camera distance, and camera height. We also introduce Waste-Weight-10K, a real-world dataset containing 10,421 synchronized image-metadata collected from logistics and recycling sites. The dataset covers 11 waste categories and a wide weight range from 3.5 to 3,450 kg. Our model uses a Vision Transformer for visual features and a dedicated metadata encoder for geometric and category information, combining them with Stacked Mutual Attention Fusion that allows visual and physical cues guide each other. This helps the model manage perspective effects and link objects to material properties. To ensure stable performance across the wide weight range, we train the model using Mean Squared Logarithmic Error. On the test set, the proposed method achieves 88.06 kg Mean Absolute Error (MAE), 6.39% Mean Absolute Percentage Error (MAPE), and an R2 coefficient of 0.9548. The model shows strong accuracy for light objects in the 0-100 kg range with 2.38 kg MAE and 3.1% MAPE, maintaining reliable performance for heavy waste in the 1000-2000 kg range with 11.1% MAPE. Finally, we incorporate a physically grounded explanation module using Shapley Additive Explanations (SHAP) and a large language model to provide clear, human-readable explanations for each prediction.

AI.tldr: 提出Multimodal Weight Predictor (MWP)框架，结合RGB图像和物理元数据（物体尺寸、相机距离、高度）估计工业废物重量，在真实数据集Waste-Weight-10K上取得良好性能，并加入基于SHAP和LLM的可解释性模块。
AI.motivation: 商业和工业废物的准确重量估计对高效运营很重要，但基于图像的估计面临挑战：相似外观物体可能有不同密度，且可见尺寸随相机距离变化。需要结合物理信息来解决这些问题。
AI.method: 提出MWP框架：使用Vision Transformer提取视觉特征，专用元数据编码器处理几何和类别信息，通过Stacked Mutual Attention Fusion融合视觉和物理线索。使用Mean Squared Logarithmic Error损失函数处理宽重量范围。加入基于SHAP和LLM的可解释性模块。
AI.result: 在Waste-Weight-10K数据集（10,421个样本，11个废物类别，3.5-3,450kg范围）上，测试集达到88.06kg MAE、6.39% MAPE和0.9548 R2。轻物体（0-100kg）2.38kg MAE和3.1% MAPE，重废物（1000-2000kg）11.1% MAPE。
AI.conclusion: 结合视觉和物理元数据的多模态方法能有效估计废物重量，处理透视效应和材料属性关联。提出的框架在宽重量范围内表现稳定，可解释性模块增强了实用性。

title: SWE-Adept: An LLM-Based Agentic Framework for Deep Codebase Analysis and Structured Issue Resolution
summary: Large language models (LLMs) exhibit strong performance on self-contained programming tasks. However, they still struggle with repository-level software engineering (SWE), which demands (1) deep codebase navigation with effective context management for accurate localization, and (2) systematic approaches for iterative, test-driven code modification to resolve issues. To address these challenges, we propose SWE-Adept, an LLM-based two-agent framework where a localization agent identifies issue-relevant code locations and a resolution agent implements the corresponding fixes. For issue localization, we introduce agent-directed depth-first search that selectively traverses code dependencies. This minimizes issue-irrelevant content in the agent's context window and improves localization accuracy. For issue resolution, we employ adaptive planning and structured problem solving. We equip the agent with specialized tools for progress tracking and Git-based version control. These tools interface with a shared working memory that stores code-state checkpoints indexed by execution steps, facilitating precise checkpoint retrieval. This design enables reliable agent-driven version-control operations for systematic issue resolution, including branching to explore alternative solutions and reverting failed edits. Experiments on SWE-Bench Lite and SWE-Bench Pro demonstrate that SWE-Adept consistently outperforms prior approaches in both issue localization and resolution, improving the end-to-end resolve rate by up to 4.7%.

AI.tldr: SWE-Adept：一个基于LLM的双智能体框架，通过定位智能体进行代码依赖深度优先搜索和解决智能体进行自适应规划，显著提升仓库级软件工程问题的解决能力。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM在独立编程任务上表现良好，但在仓库级软件工程（SWE）方面仍有困难，需要深度代码库导航和系统化的测试驱动代码修改能力。
AI.method: 提出双智能体框架：1）定位智能体使用智能体引导的深度优先搜索选择性地遍历代码依赖关系；2）解决智能体采用自适应规划和结构化问题解决，配备进度跟踪和Git版本控制工具，通过共享工作内存存储代码状态检查点。
AI.result: 在SWE-Bench Lite和SWE-Bench Pro上实验表明，SWE-Adept在问题定位和解决方面均优于现有方法，端到端解决率提升高达4.7%。
AI.conclusion: SWE-Adept通过智能体引导的代码导航和系统化的问题解决机制，有效提升了LLM在仓库级软件工程任务上的性能，为LLM在复杂软件开发中的应用提供了新思路。

title: Scalable Multi-Task Low-Rank Model Adaptation
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2026. 21 pages, 4 figures, 11 tables. Code is available
summary: Scaling multi-task low-rank adaptation (LoRA) to a large number of tasks induces catastrophic performance degradation, such as an accuracy drop from 88.2% to 2.0% on DOTA when scaling from 5 to 15 tasks. This failure is due to parameter and representation misalignment. We find that existing solutions, like regularization and dynamic routing, fail at scale because they are constrained by a fundamental trade-off: strengthening regularization to reduce inter-task conflict inadvertently suppresses the essential feature discrimination required for effective routing. In this work, we identify two root causes for this trade-off. First, uniform regularization disrupts inter-task knowledge sharing: shared underlying knowledge concentrates in high-SV components (89% alignment on Flanv2->BBH). Uniform regularization forces high-SV components to update in orthogonal directions, directly disrupting the shared knowledge. Second, Conflict Amplification: Applying LoRA at the component-level (e.g., W_q, W_v) amplifies gradient conflicts; we show block-level adaptation reduces this conflict by 76% with only 50% parameters. Based on these insights, we propose mtLoRA, a scalable solution with three novel designs: 1) Spectral-Aware Regularization to selectively orthogonalize low-SV components while preserving high-SV shared knowledge, 2) Block-Level Adaptation to mitigate conflict amplification and largely improve parameter efficiency, and 3) Fine-Grained Routing using dimension-specific weights for superior expressive power. On four large-scale (15-25 tasks) vision (DOTA and iNat2018) and NLP (Dolly-15k and BBH) benchmarks, mtLoRA achieves 91.7%, 81.5%, 44.5% and 38.5% accuracy on DOTA, iNat2018, Dolly-15k and BBH respectively, outperforming the state-of-the-art by 2.3% on average while using 47% fewer parameters and 24% less training time.

AI.tldr: mtLoRA提出了一种可扩展的多任务LoRA方法，通过谱感知正则化、块级适配和细粒度路由解决多任务扩展中的性能退化问题。
AI.motivation: 多任务低秩适配（LoRA）扩展到大量任务时会出现灾难性性能下降（如从5个任务扩展到15个任务时，DOTA准确率从88.2%降至2.0%）。现有解决方案（如正则化和动态路由）在规模扩展时失效，因为它们受到一个基本权衡的限制：加强正则化以减少任务间冲突会无意中抑制有效路由所需的基本特征区分。
AI.method: 提出mtLoRA，包含三个创新设计：1）谱感知正则化：选择性地正交化低奇异值分量，同时保留高奇异值共享知识；2）块级适配：减轻冲突放大，大幅提高参数效率；3）细粒度路由：使用维度特定权重以获得卓越的表达能力。
AI.result: 在四个大规模（15-25个任务）视觉（DOTA和iNat2018）和NLP（Dolly-15k和BBH）基准测试中，mtLoRA分别达到91.7%、81.5%、44.5%和38.5%的准确率，平均比最先进方法高出2.3%，同时使用参数减少47%，训练时间减少24%。
AI.conclusion: mtLoRA通过解决多任务LoRA扩展中的参数和表示不对齐问题，实现了可扩展的多任务适配，在性能和效率方面均优于现有方法。

title: Exploring Drug Safety Through Knowledge Graphs: Protein Kinase Inhibitors as a Case Study
comment: 14 pages, 5 figures. Code and data available at https://github.com/davidjackson99/PKI_KG
summary: Adverse Drug Reactions (ADRs) are a leading cause of morbidity and mortality. Existing prediction methods rely mainly on chemical similarity, machine learning on structured databases, or isolated target profiles, but often fail to integrate heterogeneous, partly unstructured evidence effectively.
