These results highlight an underexplored attack surface for prompt injection via invisible Unicode payloads.

AI.tldr: 提出Reverse CAPTCHA框架，通过不可见Unicode指令测试LLMs的漏洞，发现工具使用显著增强模型对隐藏指令的服从性，揭示了新的提示注入攻击面。
AI.motivation: 传统CAPTCHA用于区分人类与机器，而本研究利用LLMs能感知人类不可见的Unicode控制字符这一能力差距，探索LLMs对隐藏指令的服从性，揭示潜在的安全漏洞。
AI.method: 构建Reverse CAPTCHA评估框架，使用两种编码方案（零宽度二进制和Unicode标签），在不同提示级别、载荷框架下测试5个模型，共收集8,308个模型输出，分析工具使用对服从性的影响。
AI.result: 工具使用显著增强模型服从性（Cohen's h高达1.37）；不同提供商模型有编码偏好（OpenAI偏好零宽度二进制，Anthropic偏好Unicode标签）；明确解码指令可将服从性提高95个百分点；所有模型间差异均统计显著。
AI.conclusion: LLMs对不可见Unicode指令的服从性揭示了新的提示注入攻击面，工具使用会放大这一风险，需要开发针对性的防御机制。

title: Phase-Type Variational Autoencoders for Heavy-Tailed Data
summary:
Heavy-tailed distributions are ubiquitous in real-world data, where rare but extreme events dominate risk and variability. However, standard Variational Autoencoders (VAEs) employ simple decoder distributions (e.g., Gaussian) that fail to capture heavy-tailed behavior, while existing heavy-tail-aware extensions remain restricted to predefined parametric families whose tail behavior is fixed a priori.
  We propose the Phase-Type Variational Autoencoder (PH-VAE), whose decoder distribution is a latent-conditioned Phase-Type (PH) distribution defined as the absorption time of a continuous-time Markov chain (CTMC). This formulation composes multiple exponential time scales, yielding a flexible and analytically tractable decoder that adapts its tail behavior directly from the observed data. Experiments on synthetic and real-world benchmarks demonstrate that PH-VAE accurately recovers diverse heavy-tailed distributions, significantly outperforming Gaussian, Student-t, and extreme-value-based VAE decoders in modeling tail behavior and extreme quantiles. In multivariate settings, PH-VAE captures realistic cross-dimensional tail dependence through its shared latent representation. To our knowledge, this is the first work to integrate Phase-Type distributions into deep generative modeling, bridging applied probability and representation learning.

AI.tldr: PH-VAE：首个将相型分布集成到深度生成模型中的变分自编码器，能够从数据中自适应学习重尾分布，显著优于传统高斯、学生t和极值分布解码器。
AI.motivation: 现实世界数据普遍存在重尾分布，极端事件主导风险和变异性。传统VAE使用简单解码器分布（如高斯）无法捕捉重尾行为，而现有的重尾感知扩展仍局限于预定义参数族，其尾部行为是固定的。
AI.method: 提出相型变分自编码器（PH-VAE），其解码器分布是潜变量条件下的相型分布，定义为连续时间马尔可夫链的吸收时间。该公式组合多个指数时间尺度，产生灵活且解析可处理的解码器，直接从观测数据中自适应尾部行为。
AI.result: 在合成和真实世界基准测试中，PH-VAE准确恢复多样化的重尾分布，在建模尾部行为和极端分位数方面显著优于高斯、学生t和基于极值的VAE解码器。在多变量设置中，PH-VAE通过共享潜表示捕捉现实的多维尾部依赖。
AI.conclusion: 这是首个将相型分布集成到深度生成模型中的工作，桥接了应用概率和表示学习，为建模重尾数据提供了灵活且解析可处理的解决方案。

title: Differential privacy representation geometry for medical image analysis
summary: Differential privacy (DP)'s effect in medical imaging is typically evaluated only through end-to-end performance, leaving the mechanism of privacy-induced utility loss unclear. We introduce Differential Privacy Representation Geometry for Medical Imaging (DP-RGMI), a framework that interprets DP as a structured transformation of representation space and decomposes performance degradation into encoder geometry and task-head utilization. Geometry is quantified by representation displacement from initialization and spectral effective dimension, while utilization is measured as the gap between linear-probe and end-to-end utility. Across over 594,000 images from four chest X-ray datasets and multiple pretrained initializations, we show that DP is consistently associated with a utilization gap even when linear separability is largely preserved. At the same time, displacement and spectral dimension exhibit non-monotonic, initialization- and dataset-dependent reshaping, indicating that DP alters representation anisotropy rather than uniformly collapsing features. Correlation analysis reveals that the association between end-to-end performance and utilization is robust across datasets but can vary by initialization, while geometric quantities capture additional prior- and dataset-conditioned variation. These findings position DP-RGMI as a reproducible framework for diagnosing privacy-induced failure modes and informing privacy model selection.

AI.tldr: DP-RGMI框架将差分隐私解释为表示空间的结构化变换，将性能下降分解为编码器几何和任务头利用两部分，用于诊断隐私引起的失效模式。
AI.motivation: 医学影像中差分隐私的影响通常仅通过端到端性能评估，隐私引起的效用损失机制不明确。需要理解DP如何改变表示空间结构，从而诊断性能下降的根本原因。
AI.method: 提出DP-RGMI框架，将DP解释为表示空间的结构化变换。通过表示位移（从初始化的位移）和谱有效维度量化几何变化，通过线性探测与端到端效用差距测量任务头利用。在四个胸部X光数据集（594,000+图像）和多个预训练初始化上验证。
AI.result: DP始终与利用差距相关，即使线性可分性基本保留。位移和谱维度呈现非单调、依赖于初始化和数据集的重新塑造，表明DP改变表示各向异性而非均匀压缩特征。端到端性能与利用的关联在不同数据集间稳健但随初始化变化，几何量捕获额外的先验和数据集条件变化。
AI.conclusion: DP-RGMI为诊断隐私引起的失效模式和指导隐私模型选择提供了可复现的框架，揭示了DP对表示空间的结构化影响机制。

title: Uncertainty Quantification of Click and Conversion Estimates for the Autobidding
comment: 17 pages (10 main text + 7 appendix), 5 figures, 2 tables
summary: Modern e-commerce platforms employ various auction mechanisms to allocate paid slots for a given item. To scale this approach to the millions of auctions, the platforms suggest promotion tools based on the autobidding algorithms. These algorithms typically depend on the Click-Through-Rate (CTR) and Conversion-Rate (CVR) estimates provided by a pre-trained machine learning model. However, the predictions of such models are uncertain and can significantly affect the performance of the autobidding algorithm. To address this issue, we propose the DenoiseBid method, which corrects the generated CTRs and CVRs to make the resulting bids more efficient in auctions. The underlying idea of our method is to employ a Bayesian approach and replace noisy CTR or CVR estimates with those from recovered distributions. To demonstrate the performance of the proposed approach, we perform extensive experiments on the synthetic, iPinYou, and BAT datasets. To evaluate the robustness of our approach to the noise scale, we use synthetic noise and noise estimated from the predictions of the pre-trained machine learning model.

AI.tldr: 提出DenoiseBid方法，通过贝叶斯方法校正CTR/CVR预测噪声，提升电商平台自动出价算法效率
AI.motivation: 电商平台依赖机器学习模型预测CTR和CVR来驱动自动出价算法，但这些预测存在不确定性，显著影响出价性能。现有方法对预测噪声敏感，需要更鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出DenoiseBid方法，采用贝叶斯方法从恢复的分布中获取CTR/CVR估计，替代原始噪声预测。通过合成噪声和预训练模型预测噪声评估方法鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在合成数据集、iPinYou数据集和BAT数据集上进行广泛实验，证明方法能有效校正预测噪声，提升出价效率，对噪声尺度具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: DenoiseBid方法通过贝叶斯校正显著提升自动出价算法在噪声预测环境下的性能，为电商平台提供更可靠的出价工具。

title: HeroGS: Hierarchical Guidance for Robust 3D Gaussian Splatting under Sparse Views
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has recently emerged as a promising approach in novel view synthesis, combining photorealistic rendering with real-time efficiency. However, its success heavily relies on dense camera coverage; under sparse-view conditions, insufficient supervision leads to irregular Gaussian distributions, characterized by globally sparse coverage, blurred background, and distorted high-frequency areas. To address this, we propose HeroGS, Hierarchical Guidance for Robust 3D Gaussian Splatting, a unified framework that establishes hierarchical guidance across the image, feature, and parameter levels. At the image level, sparse supervision is converted into pseudo-dense guidance, globally regularizing the Gaussian distributions and forming a consistent foundation for subsequent optimization. Building upon this, Feature-Adaptive Densification and Pruning (FADP) at the feature level leverages low-level features to refine high-frequency details and adaptively densifies Gaussians in background regions. The optimized distributions then support Co-Pruned Geometry Consistency (CPG) at parameter level, which guides geometric consistency through parameter freezing and co-pruning, effectively removing inconsistent splats. The hierarchical guidance strategy effectively constrains and optimizes the overall Gaussian distributions, thereby enhancing both structural fidelity and rendering quality. Extensive experiments demonstrate that HeroGS achieves high-fidelity reconstructions and consistently surpasses state-of-the-art baselines under sparse-view conditions.

AI.tldr: HeroGS提出分层引导框架解决3D高斯溅射在稀疏视角下的问题，通过图像、特征和参数三个层次的引导，提升稀疏视角下的重建质量和渲染效果。
AI.motivation: 3D高斯溅射(3DGS)在密集相机覆盖下表现良好，但在稀疏视角条件下，由于监督不足导致高斯分布不规则，表现为全局覆盖稀疏、背景模糊和高频区域失真。需要解决稀疏视角下的重建质量问题。
AI.method: 提出HeroGS分层引导框架：1) 图像层：将稀疏监督转换为伪密集引导，全局正则化高斯分布；2) 特征层：特征自适应密集化与剪枝(FADP)，利用低级特征细化高频细节，自适应密集化背景区域高斯；3) 参数层：共剪枝几何一致性(CPG)，通过参数冻结和共剪枝引导几何一致性，移除不一致的溅射。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，HeroGS在稀疏视角条件下实现了高保真重建，并持续超越最先进的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 分层引导策略有效约束和优化整体高斯分布，从而提升结构保真度和渲染质量，解决了3DGS在稀疏视角下的核心挑战。

title: Constrained Particle Seeking: Solving Diffusion Inverse Problems with Just Forward Passes
summary: Diffusion models have gained prominence as powerful generative tools for solving inverse problems due to their ability to model complex data distributions. However, existing methods typically rely on complete knowledge of the forward observation process to compute gradients for guided sampling, limiting their applicability in scenarios where such information is unavailable. In this work, we introduce \textbf{\emph{Constrained Particle Seeking (CPS)}}, a novel gradient-free approach that leverages all candidate particle information to actively search for the optimal particle while incorporating constraints aligned with high-density regions of the unconditional prior. Unlike previous methods that passively select promising candidates, CPS reformulates the inverse problem as a constrained optimization task, enabling more flexible and efficient particle seeking. We demonstrate that CPS can effectively solve both image and scientific inverse problems, achieving results comparable to gradient-based methods while significantly outperforming gradient-free alternatives. Code is available at https://github.com/deng-ai-lab/CPS.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为CPS的无梯度方法，用于解决逆问题，无需前向观测过程的完整知识，通过约束优化主动搜索最优粒子。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型方法通常需要完整的正向观测过程知识来计算梯度指导采样，这限制了在缺乏此类信息场景下的应用。需要一种无需梯度信息的方法来解决逆问题。
AI.method: 提出Constrained Particle Seeking (CPS)方法，这是一种无梯度方法，利用所有候选粒子信息主动搜索最优粒子，同时结合与无条件先验高密度区域对齐的约束。将逆问题重新表述为约束优化任务。
AI.result: CPS能够有效解决图像和科学逆问题，实现与基于梯度方法相当的结果，同时显著优于其他无梯度替代方法。
AI.conclusion: CPS为缺乏完整正向观测过程知识的逆问题提供了一种有效的无梯度解决方案，扩展了扩散模型在逆问题中的应用范围。

title: Data-Efficient Brushstroke Generation with Diffusion Models for Oil Painting
summary: Many creative multimedia systems are built upon visual primitives such as strokes or textures, which are difficult to collect at scale and fundamentally different from natural image data. This data scarcity makes it challenging for modern generative models to learn expressive and controllable primitives, limiting their use in process-aware content creation. In this work, we study the problem of learning human-like brushstroke generation from a small set of hand-drawn samples (n=470) and propose StrokeDiff, a diffusion-based framework with Smooth Regularization (SmR). SmR injects stochastic visual priors during training, providing a simple mechanism to stabilize diffusion models under sparse supervision without altering the inference process. We further show how the learned primitives can be made controllable through a Bézier-based conditioning module and integrated into a complete stroke-based painting pipeline, including prediction, generation, ordering, and compositing. This demonstrates how data-efficient primitive modeling can support expressive and structured multimedia content creation. Experiments indicate that the proposed approach produces diverse and structurally coherent brushstrokes and enables paintings with richer texture and layering, validated by both automatic metrics and human evaluation.

AI.tldr: 提出StrokeDiff框架，通过平滑正则化在小样本（470个手绘样本）上学习类人笔触生成，并集成到完整的基于笔触的绘画流程中。
AI.motivation: 创意多媒体系统通常基于笔触或纹理等视觉基元，但这些数据难以大规模收集且与自然图像数据本质不同。数据稀缺使得现代生成模型难以学习表达性强且可控的基元，限制了它们在过程感知内容创作中的应用。
AI.method: 提出StrokeDiff框架，采用扩散模型结合平滑正则化（SmR）。SmR在训练过程中注入随机视觉先验，为稀疏监督下的扩散模型提供稳定机制。通过基于贝塞尔曲线的条件模块实现可控性，并集成到完整的笔触绘画流程中，包括预测、生成、排序和合成。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法能生成多样且结构连贯的笔触，并实现纹理更丰富、层次更丰富的绘画作品，通过自动指标和人工评估验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: 数据高效的基元建模能够支持表达性强且结构化的多媒体内容创作，为小样本条件下的视觉基元学习提供了有效解决方案。

title: Trivial Graph Features and Classical Learning are Enough to Detect Random Anomalies
summary: Detecting anomalies in link streams that represent various kinds of interactions is an important research topic with crucial applications. Because of the lack of ground truth data, proposed methods are mostly evaluated through their ability to detect randomly injected links. In contrast with most proposed methods, that rely on complex approaches raising computational and/or interpretability issues, we show here that trivial graph features and classical learning techniques are sufficient to detect such anomalies extremely well. This basic approach has very low computational costs and it leads to easily interpretable results. It also has many other desirable properties that we study through an extensive set of experiments. We conclude that detection methods should now target more complex kinds of anomalies.

AI.tldr: 论文提出使用简单的图特征和经典学习技术来检测链接流中的异常，相比复杂方法具有计算成本低、可解释性强的优势，并建议未来应针对更复杂的异常类型
AI.motivation: 当前链接流异常检测方法大多依赖复杂方法，存在计算成本和可解释性问题，且评估主要基于随机注入链接的检测能力，缺乏对更复杂异常的研究
AI.method: 使用基本的图特征（如节点度、聚类系数等）结合经典机器学习技术（如逻辑回归、决策树等）来检测链接流中的异常
AI.result: 简单方法在检测随机注入链接方面表现优异，计算成本极低，结果易于解释，并通过大量实验验证了其多种理想特性
AI.conclusion: 基本图特征和经典学习技术足以有效检测当前评估中的异常，未来异常检测方法应针对更复杂的异常类型

title: Hidden in the Metadata: Stealth Poisoning Attacks on Multimodal Retrieval-Augmented Generation
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) has emerged as a powerful paradigm for enhancing multimodal large language models by grounding their responses in external, factual knowledge and thus mitigating hallucinations. However, the integration of externally sourced knowledge bases introduces a critical attack surface. Adversaries can inject malicious multimodal content capable of influencing both retrieval and downstream generation. In this work, we present MM-MEPA, a multimodal poisoning attack that targets the metadata components of image-text entries while leaving the associated visual content unaltered. By only manipulating the metadata, MM-MEPA can still steer multimodal retrieval and induce attacker-desired model responses. We evaluate the attack across multiple benchmark settings and demonstrate its severity. MM-MEPA achieves an attack success rate of up to 91\% consistently disrupting system behaviors across four retrievers and two multimodal generators. Additionally, we assess representative defense strategies and find them largely ineffective against this form of metadata-only poisoning. Our findings expose a critical vulnerability in multimodal RAG and underscore the urgent need for more robust, defense-aware retrieval and knowledge integration methods.

AI.tldr: MM-MEPA：一种针对多模态检索增强生成（RAG）系统的元数据投毒攻击，仅操纵图像-文本条目的元数据即可操控检索并诱导模型生成攻击者期望的响应，攻击成功率高达91%
AI.motivation: 多模态检索增强生成（RAG）通过外部知识增强模型响应，减少幻觉，但引入外部知识库也带来了攻击面。攻击者可能注入恶意多模态内容影响检索和生成。现有研究主要关注视觉内容篡改，而元数据作为关键组件却未得到足够安全关注。
AI.method: 提出MM-MEPA（多模态元数据投毒攻击），仅操纵图像-文本条目的元数据（如标题、描述、标签等文本信息），而不修改视觉内容本身。通过精心设计的元数据投毒，影响多模态检索系统的相似性计算，从而操控检索结果并最终影响下游生成模型的输出。
AI.result: 在多个基准设置下评估攻击效果：1）攻击成功率高达91%；2）在四种检索器和两种多模态生成器上均能一致破坏系统行为；3）评估代表性防御策略发现对这类纯元数据投毒攻击基本无效。
AI.conclusion: MM-MEPA暴露了多模态RAG系统的关键脆弱性，表明仅操纵元数据即可有效操控系统。现有防御策略对此类攻击无效，迫切需要开发更鲁棒的、具备防御意识的检索和知识集成方法。

title: GroundedSurg: A Multi-Procedure Benchmark for Language-Conditioned Surgical Tool Segmentation
summary: Clinically reliable perception of surgical scenes is essential for advancing intelligent, context-aware intraoperative assistance such as instrument handoff guidance, collision avoidance, and workflow-aware robotic support. Existing surgical tool benchmarks primarily evaluate category-level segmentation, requiring models to detect all instances of predefined instrument classes. However, real-world clinical decisions often require resolving references to a specific instrument instance based on its functional role, spatial relation, or anatomical interaction capabilities not captured by current evaluation paradigms. We introduce GroundedSurg, the first language-conditioned, instance-level surgical grounding benchmark. Each instance pairs a surgical image with a natural-language description targeting a single instrument, accompanied by structured spatial grounding annotations including bounding boxes and point-level anchors. The dataset spans ophthalmic, laparoscopic, robotic, and open procedures, encompassing diverse instrument types, imaging conditions, and operative complexities. By jointly evaluating linguistic reference resolution and pixel-level localization, GroundedSurg enables a systematic and realistic evaluation of vision-language models in clinically realistic multi-instrument scenes. Extensive experiments demonstrate substantial performance gaps across modern segmentation and VLMs, highlighting the urgent need for clinically grounded vision-language reasoning in surgical AI systems. Code and data are publicly available at https://github.com/gaash-lab/GroundedSurg

AI.tldr: 提出了GroundedSurg——首个语言条件、实例级的手术接地基准，用于评估视觉语言模型在临床现实多器械场景中的表现，包含眼科、腹腔镜、机器人等多种手术类型。
AI.motivation: 现有手术工具基准主要评估类别级分割，但真实临床决策需要基于功能角色、空间关系或解剖交互能力来解析特定器械实例的引用，这些在当前评估范式中未被捕获。
AI.method: 创建了一个语言条件、实例级的手术接地基准，每个实例包含手术图像和针对单个器械的自然语言描述，附带结构化空间接地标注（边界框和点级锚点）。数据集涵盖多种手术类型和成像条件。
AI.result: 广泛的实验表明，现代分割模型和视觉语言模型之间存在显著的性能差距，凸显了手术AI系统中临床接地视觉语言推理的迫切需求。
AI.conclusion: GroundedSurg通过联合评估语言引用解析和像素级定位，为临床现实多器械场景中的视觉语言模型提供了系统且现实的评估框架，推动了手术AI向更智能、上下文感知的术中辅助发展。

title: Tide: A Customisable Dataset Generator for Anti-Money Laundering Research
comment: Synthetic AML transaction datasets (Tide, HI and LI variants) are available at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18804069
summary:
The lack of accessible transactional data significantly hinders machine learning research for Anti-Money Laundering (AML). Privacy and legal concerns prevent the sharing of real financial data, while existing synthetic generators focus on simplistic structural patterns and neglect the temporal dynamics (timing and frequency) that characterise sophisticated laundering schemes.
  We present Tide, an open-source synthetic dataset generator that produces graph-based financial networks incorporating money laundering patterns defined by both structural and temporal characteristics. Tide enables reproducible, customisable dataset generation tailored to specific research needs. We release two reference datasets with varying illicit ratios (LI: 0.10\%, HI: 0.19\%), alongside the implementation of state-of-the-art detection models.
  Evaluation across these datasets reveals condition-dependent model rankings: LightGBM achieves the highest PR-AUC (78.05) in the low illicit ratio condition, while XGBoost performs best (85.12) at higher fraud prevalence. These divergent rankings demonstrate that the reference datasets can meaningfully differentiate model capabilities across operational conditions.
  Tide provides the research community with a configurable benchmark that exposes meaningful performance variation across model architectures, advancing the development of robust AML detection methods.

AI.tldr: Tide是一个开源合成数据集生成器，用于生成包含洗钱模式的图结构金融网络，解决了AML研究中真实金融数据不可访问的问题。
AI.motivation: 反洗钱（AML）机器学习研究面临的主要挑战是缺乏可访问的交易数据。由于隐私和法律问题，真实金融数据无法共享，而现有的合成生成器只关注简单的结构模式，忽略了表征复杂洗钱方案的时间动态（时间和频率）。
AI.method: Tide是一个开源合成数据集生成器，能够生成包含洗钱模式的图结构金融网络，这些模式同时考虑了结构特征和时间特征。该方法支持可重复、可定制的数据集生成，并发布了两个不同非法比例（LI: 0.10%，HI: 0.19%）的参考数据集，以及最先进检测模型的实现。
AI.result: 在不同数据集上的评估显示模型排名具有条件依赖性：在低非法比例条件下，LightGBM获得最高的PR-AUC（78.05），而在高欺诈发生率条件下，XGBoost表现最佳（85.12）。这些不同的排名表明参考数据集能够有意义地区分不同操作条件下的模型能力。
AI.conclusion: Tide为研究社区提供了一个可配置的基准测试，能够暴露不同模型架构之间的有意义性能差异，从而推动稳健AML检测方法的发展。

title: DeAR: Fine-Grained VLM Adaptation by Decomposing Attention Head Roles
summary: Prompt learning is a dominant paradigm for adapting pre-trained Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to downstream tasks. However, existing methods often rely on a simplistic, layer-centric view, assuming shallow layers capture general features while deep layers handle task-specific knowledge. This assumption results in uncontrolled interactions between learnable tokens and original tokens. Task-specific knowledge could degrades the model's core generalization and creates a trade-off between task adaptation and the preservation of zero-shot generalization. To address this, we challenge the layer-centric view and propose \textbf{DeAR}, a framework that achieves fine-grained VLM adaptation by \textbf{De}composing \textbf{A}ttention head \textbf{R}oles. We posit that the functional specialization within VLMs occurs not between layers, but at the finer-grained level of individual attention heads in the deeper layers. Based on this insight, we introduce a novel metric, Concept Entropy, to systematically classify attention heads into distinct functional roles: \textit{Attribute}, \textit{Generalization}, and \textit{Mixed}. Guided by these roles, we introduce specialized attribute tokens and a Role-Based Attention Mask mechanism to precisely control information flow, ensuring generalization heads remain isolated from task-specific knowledge. We further incorporate a Task-Adaptive Fusion Strategy for inference. Extensive experiments on fifteen datasets show that DeAR achieves a strong balance between task adaptation and generalization, outperforming previous methods across various tasks.

AI.tldr: DeAR提出了一种细粒度的视觉语言模型适应框架，通过分解注意力头角色来平衡任务适应与零样本泛化能力，挑战了传统的层级中心视角。
AI.motivation: 现有提示学习方法通常基于简化的层级中心视角，假设浅层捕获通用特征而深层处理任务特定知识，这导致可学习token与原始token的交互不受控制，任务特定知识可能损害模型的核心泛化能力，形成任务适应与零样本泛化之间的权衡。
AI.method: 提出DeAR框架，挑战层级中心视角，认为功能专业化发生在更深层的单个注意力头层面。引入概念熵指标将注意力头分类为属性头、泛化头和混合头三种功能角色。基于角色分类，引入专门的属性token和基于角色的注意力掩码机制精确控制信息流，确保泛化头与任务特定知识隔离。在推理时采用任务自适应融合策略。
AI.result: 在15个数据集上的广泛实验表明，DeAR在任务适应与泛化之间实现了良好平衡，在各种任务上优于先前方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过分解注意力头角色进行细粒度VLM适应，DeAR框架能够更好地平衡任务适应与零样本泛化能力，为视觉语言模型的提示学习提供了新的视角和方法。

title: Diagnosing Generalization Failures from Representational Geometry Markers
comment: Published in the International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR), 2026
summary: Generalization, the ability to perform well beyond the training context, is a hallmark of biological and artificial intelligence, yet anticipating unseen failures remains a central challenge. Conventional approaches often take a ``bottom-up'' mechanistic route by reverse-engineering interpretable features or circuits to build explanatory models. While insightful, these methods often struggle to provide the high-level, predictive signals for anticipating failure in real-world deployment. Here, we propose using a ``top-down'' approach to studying generalization failures inspired by medical biomarkers: identifying system-level measurements that serve as robust indicators of a model's future performance. Rather than mapping out detailed internal mechanisms, we systematically design and test network markers to probe structure, function links, identify prognostic indicators, and validate predictions in real-world settings. In image classification, we find that task-relevant geometric properties of in-distribution (ID) object manifolds consistently forecast poor out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization. In particular, reductions in two geometric measures, effective manifold dimensionality and utility, predict weaker OOD performance across diverse architectures, optimizers, and datasets. We apply this finding to transfer learning with ImageNet-pretrained models. We consistently find that the same geometric patterns predict OOD transfer performance more reliably than ID accuracy. This work demonstrates that representational geometry can expose hidden vulnerabilities, offering more robust guidance for model selection and AI interpretability.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种"自上而下"的方法来研究模型泛化失败，类似于医学生物标志物，通过系统层面的测量来预测模型未来性能，而不是详细解析内部机制。
AI.motivation: 传统"自下而上"的方法通过逆向工程可解释特征或电路来构建解释模型，但往往难以提供预测现实部署中失败的高层信号。需要一种更有效的方法来预测模型在未见数据上的泛化失败。
AI.method: 采用"自上而下"的生物标志物方法，设计网络标记来探测结构-功能联系。具体通过分析图像分类任务中ID对象流形的几何特性（有效流形维度和效用），来预测OOD泛化性能。
AI.result: 发现ID对象流形的两个几何度量（有效流形维度和效用）的减少能一致预测较差的OOD泛化性能。在ImageNet预训练模型的迁移学习中，这些几何模式比ID准确率更能可靠地预测OOD迁移性能。
AI.conclusion: 表示几何可以揭示隐藏的脆弱性，为模型选择和AI可解释性提供更稳健的指导。这种方法提供了一种预测模型泛化失败的新范式。

title: Automated Discovery of Improved Constant Weight Binary Codes
summary: A constant weight binary code consists of $n$-bit binary codewords, each with exactly $w$ bits equal to 1, such that any two codewords are at least Hamming distance $d$ apart. $A(n,d,w)$ is the maximum size of a constant weight binary code with parameters $n,d,w$. We establish improved lower bounds on $A(n,d,w)$ by constructing new larger codes, for 24 values of $(n,d,w)$ with $6 \leq d \leq 18$ and $18 \leq n \leq 35$. The improved lower bounds come from two strategies. The first is a tabu search that operates at the level of bit swaps. The second is a novel greedy heuristic that repeatedly chooses the candidate codeword that maximizes a randomly-scored histogram of distances to previously-added codewords. These strategies were proposed by CPro1, an automated protocol that generates, implements, and tests diverse strategies for combinatorial constructions.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了两种新策略来改进恒定重量二进制码A(n,d,w)的下界，通过禁忌搜索和基于随机评分直方图的贪心启发式算法，在24个参数组合上获得了更大的码构造。
AI.motivation: 恒定重量二进制码在通信、编码理论和组合设计中有重要应用。A(n,d,w)表示具有参数n,d,w的最大码大小，但许多参数的最优值未知。需要开发新算法来构造更大的码，改进现有下界。
AI.method: 提出两种策略：1) 基于比特交换的禁忌搜索算法；2) 新颖的贪心启发式算法，每次选择候选码字时最大化与已添加码字距离的随机评分直方图。这些策略由CPro1自动协议生成、实现和测试。
AI.result: 在24个(n,d,w)参数组合上(6≤d≤18, 18≤n≤35)获得了改进的下界，即构造出了更大的恒定重量二进制码。
AI.conclusion: 通过自动化协议生成的两种新策略有效改进了恒定重量二进制码的下界，展示了自动化算法设计在组合构造问题中的潜力。

title: GuiDINO: Rethinking Vision Foundation Model in Medical Image Segmentation
summary: Foundation vision models are increasingly adopted in medical image analysis. Due to domain shift, these pretrained models misalign with medical image segmentation needs without being fully fine-tuned or lightly adapted. We introduce GuiDINO, a framework that repositions native foundation model to acting as a visual guidance generator for downstream segmentation. GuiDINO extracts visual feature representation from DINOv3 and converts them into a spatial guide mask via a lightweight TokenBook mechanism, which aggregates token-prototype similarities. This guide mask gates feature activations in multiple segmentation backbones, thereby injecting foundation-model priors while preserving the inductive biases and efficiency of medical dedicated architectures. Training relies on a guide supervision objective loss that aligns the guide mask to ground-truth regions, optionally augmented by a boundary-focused hinge loss to sharpen fine structures. GuiDINO also supports parameter-efficient adaptation through LoRA on the DINOv3 guide backbone. Across diverse medical datasets and nnUNet-style inference, GuiDINO consistently improves segmentation quality and boundary robustness, suggesting a practical alternative to fine-tuning and offering a new perspective on how foundation models can best serve medical vision. Code is available at https://github.com/Hi-FishU/GuiDINO

AI.tldr: GuiDINO框架利用DINOv3基础模型作为视觉引导生成器，通过轻量级TokenBook机制将视觉特征转换为空间引导掩码，指导医学图像分割，避免完全微调
AI.motivation: 基础视觉模型在医学图像分析中存在领域偏移问题，完全微调成本高且可能破坏模型原有知识。需要一种方法既能利用基础模型的先验知识，又能保持医学专用架构的归纳偏置和效率
AI.method: 1. 使用DINOv3提取视觉特征表示；2. 通过轻量级TokenBook机制将token-原型相似度聚合成空间引导掩码；3. 引导掩码门控分割主干网络的特征激活；4. 使用引导监督损失对齐引导掩码与真实区域，可选边界聚焦铰链损失；5. 支持在DINOv3上使用LoRA进行参数高效适应
AI.result: 在多样化医学数据集和nnUNet风格推理中，GuiDINO一致提高了分割质量和边界鲁棒性，为微调提供了实用替代方案
AI.conclusion: GuiDINO为基础模型如何最好地服务医学视觉提供了新视角，通过将基础模型重新定位为视觉引导生成器，在保持医学专用架构优势的同时注入基础模型先验

title: SEAR: Sample Efficient Action Chunking Reinforcement Learning
summary: Action chunking can improve exploration and value estimation in long horizon reinforcement learning, but makes learning substantially harder since the critic must evaluate action sequences rather than single actions, greatly increasing approximation and data efficiency challenges. As a result, existing action chunking methods, primarily designed for the offline and offline-to-online settings, have not achieved strong performance in purely online reinforcement learning. We introduce SEAR, an off policy online reinforcement learning algorithm for action chunking. It exploits the temporal structure of action chunks and operates with a receding horizon, effectively combining the benefits of small and large chunk sizes. SEAR outperforms state of the art online reinforcement learning methods on Metaworld, training with chunk sizes up to 20.

AI.tldr: SEAR是一种用于动作分块的在线强化学习算法，通过利用动作块的时间结构和采用滚动时域方法，在长时程任务中实现了优于现有方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 动作分块可以改善长时程强化学习中的探索和价值估计，但现有方法主要针对离线和离线到在线设置，在纯在线强化学习中表现不佳。需要开发专门用于在线设置的动作分块算法。
AI.method: SEAR是一种离策略在线强化学习算法，利用动作块的时间结构，采用滚动时域方法，有效结合了小和大块尺寸的优势。
AI.result: 在Metaworld基准测试中，SEAR优于最先进的在线强化学习方法，能够处理高达20的块尺寸。
AI.conclusion: SEAR证明了动作分块在在线强化学习中的可行性，通过适当的算法设计可以克服价值估计和数据效率的挑战。

title: Improved MambdaBDA Framework for Robust Building Damage Assessment Across Disaster Domains
summary: Reliable post-disaster building damage assessment (BDA) from satellite imagery is hindered by severe class imbalance, background clutter, and domain shift across disaster types and geographies. In this work, we address these problems and explore ways to improve the MambaBDA, the BDA network of ChangeMamba architecture, one of the most successful BDA models. The approach enhances the MambaBDA with three modular components: (i) Focal Loss to mitigate class imbalance damage classification, (ii) lightweight Attention Gates to suppress irrelevant context, and (iii) a compact Alignment Module to spatially warp pre-event features toward post-event content before decoding. We experiment on multiple satellite imagery datasets, including xBD, Pakistan Flooding, Turkey Earthquake, and Ida Hurricane, and conduct in-domain and crossdataset tests. The proposed modular enhancements yield consistent improvements over the baseline model, with 0.8% to 5% performance gains in-domain, and up to 27% on unseen disasters. This indicates that the proposed enhancements are especially beneficial for the generalization capability of the system.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了三种模块化增强方法（Focal Loss、Attention Gates、Alignment Module）来改进MambaBDA建筑损伤评估模型，在多个卫星影像数据集上取得了显著性能提升，特别是在跨灾难类型泛化方面。
AI.motivation: 卫星影像中的建筑损伤评估面临严重类别不平衡、背景杂乱以及跨灾难类型和地理区域的域偏移问题，这些因素限制了现有模型的可靠性和泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出了三种模块化增强方法：1) 使用Focal Loss缓解类别不平衡问题；2) 引入轻量级Attention Gates抑制无关上下文信息；3) 设计紧凑的Alignment Module在解码前将灾前特征空间扭曲对齐到灾后内容。
AI.result: 在xBD、巴基斯坦洪水、土耳其地震、艾达飓风等多个数据集上测试，域内性能提升0.8%到5%，在未见过的灾难类型上性能提升高达27%，表明增强方法显著提升了模型的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 提出的模块化增强方法有效解决了建筑损伤评估中的关键挑战，特别是显著提升了模型在跨灾难类型和地理区域的泛化性能，为可靠的灾后评估提供了改进方案。

title: ClinCoT: Clinical-Aware Visual Chain-of-Thought for Medical Vision Language Models
summary: Medical Vision-Language Models have shown promising potential in clinical decision support, yet they remain prone to factual hallucinations due to insufficient grounding in localized pathological evidence. Existing medical alignment methods primarily operate at the response level through preference optimization, improving output correctness but leaving intermediate reasoning weakly connected to visual regions. Although chain-of-thought (CoT) enhances multimodal reasoning, it remains largely text-centric, limiting effective integration of clinical visual cues. To address this gap, we propose ClinCoT, a clinical-aware visual chain-of-thought framework that transforms preference optimization from response-level correction to visual-driven reasoning. We introduce an automatic data generation pipeline that constructs clinically grounded preference pairs through reasoning with hypotheses-driven region proposals. Multiple Med-LLMs evaluators rank and assign scores to each response, and these rankings serve as supervision to train the target model. We further introduce a scoring-based margin-aware optimization strategy that incorporates both preference ranking and score difference to refine region-level reasoning trajectories. To maintain alignment as the model's policy evolves during training, we adopt an iterative learning scheme that dynamically regenerates preference data. Extensive experiments on three medical VQA and report generation benchmarks demonstrate that ClinCoT consistently improves factual grounding and achieves superior performance compared with existing preference-based alignment methods.

AI.tldr: ClinCoT提出了一种临床感知的视觉思维链框架，将偏好优化从响应级修正转变为视觉驱动的推理，通过假设驱动的区域提案构建临床基础偏好对，提升医学视觉语言模型的事实依据能力。
AI.motivation: 医学视觉语言模型在临床决策支持中显示出潜力，但由于缺乏对局部病理证据的充分基础，容易产生事实性幻觉。现有的医学对齐方法主要在响应层面通过偏好优化操作，改善了输出正确性，但中间推理与视觉区域的连接较弱。虽然思维链增强了多模态推理，但仍以文本为中心，限制了临床视觉线索的有效整合。
AI.method: 提出ClinCoT框架：1) 自动数据生成管道，通过假设驱动的区域提案构建临床基础偏好对；2) 多个Med-LLM评估器对响应进行排名和评分；3) 基于评分的边缘感知优化策略，结合偏好排名和分数差异来优化区域级推理轨迹；4) 迭代学习方案，在训练过程中动态重新生成偏好数据以保持对齐。
AI.result: 在三个医学VQA和报告生成基准测试上的广泛实验表明，ClinCoT持续改善了事实基础，相比现有的基于偏好的对齐方法实现了更优越的性能。
AI.conclusion: ClinCoT通过将偏好优化从响应级修正转变为视觉驱动的推理，有效解决了医学视觉语言模型的事实幻觉问题，为临床决策支持提供了更可靠的多模态推理框架。

title: Dream2Learn: Structured Generative Dreaming for Continual Learning
summary: Continual learning requires balancing plasticity and stability while mitigating catastrophic forgetting. Inspired by human dreaming as a mechanism for internal simulation and knowledge restructuring, we introduce Dream2Learn (D2L), a framework in which a model autonomously generates structured synthetic experiences from its own internal representations and uses them for self-improvement. Rather than reconstructing past data as in generative replay, D2L enables a classifier to create novel, semantically distinct dreamed classes that are coherent with its learned knowledge yet do not correspond to previously observed data. These dreamed samples are produced by conditioning a frozen diffusion model through soft prompt optimization driven by the classifier itself. The generated data are not used to replace memory, but to expand and reorganize the representation space, effectively allowing the network to self-train on internally synthesized concepts. By integrating dreamed classes into continual training, D2L proactively structures latent features to support forward knowledge transfer and adaptation to future tasks. This prospective self-training mechanism mirrors the role of sleep in consolidating and reorganizing memory, turning internal simulations into a tool for improved generalization. Experiments on Mini-ImageNet, FG-ImageNet, and ImageNet-R demonstrate that D2L consistently outperforms strong rehearsal-based baselines and achieves positive forward transfer, confirming its ability to enhance adaptability through internally generated training signals.

AI.tldr: Dream2Learn (D2L) 是一个受人类梦境启发的持续学习框架，通过模型自主生成结构化合成经验进行自我改进，而不是依赖过去数据的重构。
AI.motivation: 持续学习需要在可塑性和稳定性之间取得平衡，同时减轻灾难性遗忘。受人类梦境作为内部模拟和知识重组机制的启发，作者希望开发一种方法，让模型能够从自身内部表示中生成合成经验，用于自我改进。
AI.method: D2L 让分类器创建新颖的、语义上不同的"梦境"类别，这些类别与其学到的知识一致，但不对应于先前观察到的数据。通过冻结的扩散模型，通过由分类器驱动的软提示优化来生成这些数据。生成的梦境样本不是用来替换记忆，而是扩展和重组表示空间，使网络能够在内部合成的概念上进行自我训练。
AI.result: 在 Mini-ImageNet、FG-ImageNet 和 ImageNet-R 上的实验表明，D2L 始终优于基于排练的基线方法，并实现了正向的前向迁移，证实了其通过内部生成的训练信号增强适应性的能力。
AI.conclusion: D2L 通过将梦境类别整合到持续训练中，主动构建潜在特征以支持前向知识迁移和适应未来任务。这种前瞻性的自我训练机制反映了睡眠在巩固和重组记忆中的作用，将内部模拟转化为改进泛化的工具。

title: Predictive Reasoning with Augmented Anomaly Contrastive Learning for Compositional Visual Relations
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Multimedia
summary: While visual reasoning for simple analogies has received significant attention, compositional visual relations (CVR) remain relatively unexplored due to their greater complexity. To solve CVR tasks, we propose Predictive Reasoning with Augmented Anomaly Contrastive Learning (PR-A$^2$CL), \ie, to identify an outlier image given three other images that follow the same compositional rules. To address the challenge of modelling abundant compositional rules, an Augmented Anomaly Contrastive Learning is designed to distil discriminative and generalizable features by maximizing similarity among normal instances while minimizing similarity between normal and anomalous outliers. More importantly, a predict-and-verify paradigm is introduced for rule-based reasoning, in which a series of Predictive Anomaly Reasoning Blocks (PARBs) iteratively leverage features from three out of the four images to predict those of the remaining one. Throughout the subsequent verification stage, the PARBs progressively pinpoint the specific discrepancies attributable to the underlying rules. Experimental results on SVRT, CVR and MC$^2$R datasets show that PR-A$^2$CL significantly outperforms state-of-the-art reasoning models.

AI.tldr: PR-A²CL：一种用于组合视觉关系推理的预测性异常对比学习方法，通过预测-验证范式和异常对比学习解决复杂视觉推理任务
AI.motivation: 组合视觉关系（CVR）比简单视觉类比更复杂，但相关研究较少。现有方法难以建模丰富的组合规则，需要新的推理框架来处理这种复杂性。
AI.method: 提出PR-A²CL框架：1）增强异常对比学习（A²CL），通过最大化正常实例相似性、最小化正常与异常相似性来提取判别性特征；2）预测-验证范式，使用预测性异常推理块（PARBs）迭代利用三张图像特征预测第四张图像特征，在验证阶段逐步识别规则差异。
AI.result: 在SVRT、CVR和MC²R数据集上，PR-A²CL显著优于现有最先进的推理模型，展示了在复杂组合视觉关系任务上的优越性能。
AI.conclusion: PR-A²CL通过结合异常对比学习和预测-验证推理，有效解决了组合视觉关系推理的挑战，为复杂视觉推理任务提供了新思路。

title: Explanation-Guided Adversarial Training for Robust and Interpretable Models
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions On Circuits and Systems For Video Technology (TCSVT 2026)
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have achieved remarkable performance in many tasks, yet they often behave as opaque black boxes. Explanation-guided learning (EGL) methods steer DNNs using human-provided explanations or supervision on model attributions. These approaches improve interpretability but typically assume benign inputs and incur heavy annotation costs. In contrast, both predictions and saliency maps of DNNs could dramatically alter facing imperceptible perturbations or unseen patterns. Adversarial training (AT) can substantially improve robustness, but it does not guarantee that model decisions rely on semantically meaningful features. In response, we propose Explanation-Guided Adversarial Training (EGAT), a unified framework that integrates the strength of AT and EGL to simultaneously improve prediction performance, robustness, and explanation quality. EGAT generates adversarial examples on the fly while imposing explanation-based constraints on the model. By jointly optimizing classification performance, adversarial robustness, and attributional stability, EGAT is not only more resistant to unexpected cases, including adversarial attacks and out-of-distribution (OOD) scenarios, but also offer human-interpretable justifications for the decisions. We further formalize EGAT within the Probably Approximately Correct learning framework, demonstrating theoretically that it yields more stable predictions under unexpected situations compared to standard AT. Empirical evaluations on OOD benchmark datasets show that EGAT consistently outperforms competitive baselines in both clean accuracy and adversarial accuracy +37% while producing more semantically meaningful explanations, and requiring only a limited increase +16% in training time.

AI.tldr: EGAT整合对抗训练与解释引导学习，同时提升模型预测性能、鲁棒性和解释质量，在OOD基准上显著优于基线方法
AI.motivation: 现有方法存在局限性：解释引导学习(EGL)假设良性输入且标注成本高，对抗训练(AT)不保证决策基于语义特征。需要统一框架同时提升预测性能、鲁棒性和解释质量
AI.method: 提出解释引导对抗训练(EGAT)，在动态生成对抗样本的同时施加基于解释的约束，联合优化分类性能、对抗鲁棒性和归因稳定性
AI.result: 在OOD基准数据集上，EGAT在干净准确率和对抗准确率上均优于基线方法(+37%)，产生更语义有意义的解释，训练时间仅增加+16%
AI.conclusion: EGAT成功整合AT和EGL优势，不仅对意外情况更具抵抗力，还能为决策提供人类可理解的解释，理论分析证明其在意外情况下产生更稳定的预测

title: Embedding Morphology into Transformers for Cross-Robot Policy Learning
summary: Cross-robot policy learning -- training a single policy to perform well across multiple embodiments -- remains a central challenge in robot learning. Transformer-based policies, such as vision-language-action (VLA) models, are typically embodiment-agnostic and must infer kinematic structure purely from observations, which can reduce robustness across embodiments and even limit performance within a single embodiment. We propose an embodiment-aware transformer policy that injects morphology via three mechanisms: (1) kinematic tokens that factorize actions across joints and compress time through per-joint temporal chunking; (2) a topology-aware attention bias that encodes kinematic topology as an inductive bias in self-attention, encouraging message passing along kinematic edges; and (3) joint-attribute conditioning that augments topology with per-joint descriptors to capture semantics beyond connectivity. Across a range of embodiments, this structured integration consistently improves performance over a vanilla pi0.5 VLA baseline, indicating improved robustness both within an embodiment and across embodiments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种具身感知的Transformer策略，通过三种机制注入机器人形态信息：关节令牌、拓扑感知注意力偏置和关节属性条件化，以提升跨机器人策略学习的性能。
AI.motivation: 跨机器人策略学习（训练单一策略在多种机器人形态上表现良好）是机器人学习中的核心挑战。现有的Transformer策略（如VLA模型）通常是形态无关的，必须从观察中推断运动学结构，这会降低跨形态的鲁棒性，甚至限制单个形态内的性能。
AI.method: 提出具身感知Transformer策略，包含三种形态注入机制：1) 关节令牌：将动作分解到各个关节并通过关节级时间分块压缩时间维度；2) 拓扑感知注意力偏置：将运动学拓扑编码为自注意力中的归纳偏置，鼓励沿运动学边的信息传递；3) 关节属性条件化：用每个关节的描述符增强拓扑，捕捉连接性之外的语义信息。
AI.result: 在多种机器人形态上，这种结构化集成一致地优于基础的pi0.5 VLA基线，表明在单个形态内和跨形态上都提高了鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式注入机器人形态信息到Transformer策略中，可以显著提升跨机器人策略学习的性能和鲁棒性，为处理不同机器人形态的通用策略设计提供了有效方法。

title: Teacher-Guided Causal Interventions for Image Denoising: Orthogonal Content-Noise Disentanglement in Vision Transformers
summary: Conventional image denoising models often inadvertently learn spurious correlations between environmental factors and noise patterns. Moreover, due to high-frequency ambiguity, they struggle to reliably distinguish subtle textures from stochastic noise, resulting in over-removed details or residual noise artifacts. We therefore revisit denoising via causal intervention, arguing that purely correlational fitting entangles intrinsic content with extrinsic noise, which directly degrades robustness under distribution shifts. Motivated by this, we propose the Teacher-Guided Causal Disentanglement Network (TCD-Net), which explicitly decomposes the generative mechanism via structured interventions on feature spaces within a Vision Transformer framework. Specifically, our method integrates three key components: (1) An Environmental Bias Adjustment (EBA) module projects features into a stable, de-centered subspace to suppress global environmental bias (de-confounding). (2) A dual-branch disentanglement head employs an orthogonality constraint to force a strict separation between content and noise representations, preventing information leakage. (3) To resolve structural ambiguity, we leverage Nano Banana Pro, Google's reasoning-guided AI image generation model, to guide a causal prior, effectively pulling content representations back onto the natural-image manifold. Extensive experiments demonstrate that TCD-Net outperforms mainstream methods across multiple benchmarks in both fidelity and efficiency, achieving a real-time speed of 104.2 FPS on a single RTX 5090 GPU.

AI.tldr: TCD-Net：通过因果干预和特征解缠解决图像去噪中的虚假相关性问题，利用环境偏置调整、双分支解缠头和AI生成引导实现更鲁棒的细节保留
AI.motivation: 传统图像去噪模型容易学习环境因素与噪声模式之间的虚假相关性，并且由于高频模糊性难以可靠区分细微纹理与随机噪声，导致细节过度去除或残留噪声伪影。作者认为纯相关性拟合会将内在内容与外在噪声纠缠在一起，直接降低分布偏移下的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出教师引导因果解缠网络(TCD-Net)，在Vision Transformer框架内通过特征空间的结构化干预来显式分解生成机制。包含三个关键组件：1) 环境偏置调整模块将特征投影到稳定的去中心化子空间以抑制全局环境偏置；2) 双分支解缠头使用正交约束强制内容与噪声表示的严格分离；3) 利用Nano Banana Pro（Google的推理引导AI图像生成模型）引导因果先验，将内容表示拉回到自然图像流形。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，TCD-Net在保真度和效率方面均优于主流方法，在单个RTX 5090 GPU上实现104.2 FPS的实时速度。
AI.conclusion: 通过因果干预和特征解缠的方法能够有效解决图像去噪中的虚假相关性问题，提高模型在分布偏移下的鲁棒性，同时保持实时处理速度。

title: BAED: a New Paradigm for Few-shot Graph Learning with Explanation in the Loop
summary: The challenges of training and inference in few-shot environments persist in the area of graph representation learning. The quality and quantity of labels are often insufficient due to the extensive expert knowledge required to annotate graph data. In this context, Few-Shot Graph Learning (FSGL) approaches have been developed over the years. Through sophisticated neural architectures and customized training pipelines, these approaches enhance model adaptability to new label distributions. However, compromises in \textcolor{black}{the model's} robustness and interpretability can result in overfitting to noise in labeled data and degraded performance. This paper introduces the first explanation-in-the-loop framework for the FSGL problem, called BAED. We novelly employ the belief propagation algorithm to facilitate label augmentation on graphs. Then, leveraging an auxiliary graph neural network and the gradient backpropagation method, our framework effectively extracts explanatory subgraphs surrounding target nodes. The final predictions are based on these informative subgraphs while mitigating the influence of redundant information from neighboring nodes. Extensive experiments on seven benchmark datasets demonstrate superior prediction accuracy, training efficiency, and explanation quality of BAED. As a pioneer, this work highlights the potential of the explanation-based research paradigm in FSGL.

AI.tldr: BAED是首个用于少样本图学习的解释循环框架，通过信念传播算法进行标签增强，利用辅助图神经网络提取解释性子图，在保持预测准确性的同时提升模型可解释性。
AI.motivation: 少样本图学习面临标签数据稀缺且标注成本高的问题，现有方法在提升适应性的同时往往牺牲了模型的鲁棒性和可解释性，容易过拟合噪声数据。
AI.method: 1) 使用信念传播算法进行图上的标签增强；2) 利用辅助图神经网络和梯度反向传播方法提取目标节点周围的解释性子图；3) 基于这些信息性子图进行最终预测，减少相邻节点冗余信息的影响。
AI.result: 在7个基准数据集上的实验表明，BAED在预测准确性、训练效率和解释质量方面均表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 该工作首次将解释循环框架引入少样本图学习，展示了基于解释的研究范式在FSGL领域的潜力。

title: Test Case Prioritization: A Snowballing Literature Review and TCPFramework with Approach Combinators
summary: Context: Test case prioritization (TCP) is a technique widely used by software development organizations to accelerate regression testing. Objectives: We aim to systematize existing TCP knowledge and to propose and empirically evaluate a new TCP approach. Methods: We conduct a snowballing review (SR) on TCP, implement a~comprehensive platform for TCP research (TCPFramework), analyze existing evaluation metrics and propose two new ones (\rAPFDc{} and ATR), and develop a~family of ensemble TCP methods called approach combinators. Results: The SR helped identify 324 studies related to TCP. The techniques proposed in our study were evaluated on the RTPTorrent dataset, consistently outperforming their base approaches across the majority of subject programs, and achieving performance comparable to the current state of the art for heuristical algorithms (in terms of \rAPFDc{}, NTR, and ATR), while using a distinct approach. Conclusions: The proposed methods can be used efficiently for TCP, reducing the time spent on regression testing by up to 2.7\%. Approach combinators offer significant potential for improvements in future TCP research, due to their composability.

AI.tldr: 本文系统化测试用例优先级排序(TCP)知识，提出并评估了新的TCP方法，包括两种新评估指标和一种集成方法家族，在RTPTorrent数据集上表现优于基准方法。
AI.motivation: 测试用例优先级排序(TCP)是软件组织中加速回归测试的常用技术，但现有知识缺乏系统化，需要更有效的TCP方法和评估指标。
AI.method: 1) 进行TCP的雪球式文献综述；2) 开发TCP研究平台(TCPFramework)；3) 分析现有评估指标并提出两个新指标(rAPFDc和ATR)；4) 开发名为"方法组合器"的集成TCP方法家族。
AI.result: 1) 识别324篇TCP相关研究；2) 在RTPTorrent数据集上，新方法在多数测试程序中优于基准方法；3) 在启发式算法中达到当前最优性能；4) 减少回归测试时间达2.7%。
AI.conclusion: 提出的TCP方法能有效减少回归测试时间，方法组合器因其可组合性为未来TCP研究提供重要改进潜力。

title: ArtLLM: Generating Articulated Assets via 3D LLM
summary: Creating interactive digital environments for gaming, robotics, and simulation relies on articulated 3D objects whose functionality emerges from their part geometry and kinematic structure. However, existing approaches remain fundamentally limited: optimization-based reconstruction methods require slow, per-object joint fitting and typically handle only simple, single-joint objects, while retrieval-based methods assemble parts from a fixed library, leading to repetitive geometry and poor generalization. To address these challenges, we introduce ArtLLM, a novel framework for generating high-quality articulated assets directly from complete 3D meshes. At its core is a 3D multimodal large language model trained on a large-scale articulation dataset curated from both existing articulation datasets and procedurally generated objects. Unlike prior work, ArtLLM autoregressively predicts a variable number of parts and joints, inferring their kinematic structure in a unified manner from the object's point cloud. This articulation-aware layout then conditions a 3D generative model to synthesize high-fidelity part geometries. Experiments on the PartNet-Mobility dataset show that ArtLLM significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both part layout accuracy and joint prediction, while generalizing robustly to real-world objects. Finally, we demonstrate its utility in constructing digital twins, highlighting its potential for scalable robot learning.

AI.tldr: ArtLLM：基于3D多模态大语言模型的关节物体生成框架，可直接从完整3D网格生成高质量关节资产，在布局准确性和关节预测方面优于现有方法
AI.motivation: 现有方法存在根本性限制：基于优化的重建方法需要缓慢的逐对象关节拟合且通常只能处理简单单关节物体；基于检索的方法从固定库组装部件导致几何重复且泛化能力差。需要能够从完整3D网格直接生成高质量关节资产的解决方案。
AI.method: ArtLLM框架核心是3D多模态大语言模型，在从现有关节数据集和程序生成对象构建的大规模关节数据集上训练。模型自回归预测可变数量的部件和关节，从物体点云统一推断其运动学结构。关节感知的布局条件化3D生成模型来合成高保真部件几何。
AI.result: 在PartNet-Mobility数据集上的实验表明，ArtLLM在部件布局准确性和关节预测方面显著优于最先进方法，同时对真实世界物体具有鲁棒泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: ArtLLM为创建交互式数字环境提供了可扩展的解决方案，在数字孪生构建中展示了实用性，具有机器人学习的潜力。

title: Probabilistic Retrofitting of Learned Simulators
summary: Dominant approaches for modelling Partial Differential Equations (PDEs) rely on deterministic predictions, yet many physical systems of interest are inherently chaotic and uncertain. While training probabilistic models from scratch is possible, it is computationally expensive and fails to leverage the significant resources already invested in high-performing deterministic backbones. In this work, we adopt a training-efficient strategy to transform pre-trained deterministic models into probabilistic ones via retrofitting with a proper scoring rule: the Continuous Ranked Probability Score (CRPS). Crucially, this approach is architecture-agnostic: it applies the same adaptation mechanism across distinct model backbones with minimal code modifications. The method proves highly effective across different scales of pre-training: for models trained on single dynamical systems, we achieve 20-54% reductions in rollout CRPS and up to 30% improvements in variance-normalised RMSE (VRMSE) relative to compute-matched deterministic fine-tuning. We further validate our approach on a PDE foundation model, trained on multiple systems and retrofitted on the dataset of interest, to show that our probabilistic adaptation yields an improvement of up to 40% in CRPS and up to 15% in VRMSE compared to deterministic fine-tuning. Validated across diverse architectures and dynamics, our results show that probabilistic PDE modelling need not require retraining from scratch, but can be unlocked from existing deterministic backbones with modest additional training cost.

AI.tldr: 提出一种将预训练确定性PDE模型转化为概率模型的方法，通过CRPS评分规则进行微调，无需从头训练，计算效率高且架构无关
AI.motivation: 许多物理系统本质上是混沌和不确定的，但现有PDE建模主要依赖确定性预测。从头训练概率模型计算成本高，且无法利用已投入大量资源的确定性骨干模型
AI.method: 采用训练高效策略，通过连续排名概率评分（CRPS）将预训练确定性模型转化为概率模型。方法架构无关，只需最小代码修改即可应用于不同模型骨干
AI.result: 在单动力学系统训练模型上，CRPS降低20-54%，方差归一化RMSE提升达30%；在PDE基础模型上，CRPS提升达40%，VRMSE提升达15%
AI.conclusion: 概率PDE建模无需从头训练，可通过适度额外训练成本从现有确定性骨干模型中解锁，验证了方法的有效性和通用性

title: TC-SSA: Token Compression via Semantic Slot Aggregation for Gigapixel Pathology Reasoning
summary: The application of large vision-language models to computational pathology holds great promise for diagnostic assistants but faces a critical computational bottleneck: the gigapixel scale of Whole Slide Images (WSIs). A single WSI typically contains over 105 patches, creating sequence lengths that exceed the constraints of standard Transformer architectures. Existing solutions often resort to spatial sampling, which risks discarding diagnostically critical evidence. To address this, we propose TC-SSA (Token Compression via Semantic Slot Aggregation), a learnable token compression framework that aggregates patch features into a fixed number of semantic slots. A gated routing module assigns patches to slots using sparse Top-2 routing, followed by weighted aggregation, enabling global slide coverage under a strict token budget. The resulting representation retains diagnostically relevant information while reducing the number of visual tokens to 1.7% of the original sequence. On the SlideBench(TCGA), our model achieves 78.34% overall accuracy and 77.14% on the diagnosis subset, outperforming sampling-based baselines under comparable token budgets. The method also generalizes to MIL classification, reaching AUC of 95.83% on TCGA-BRCA, 98.27% on TCGA-NSCLC and 79.80% on PANDA. These results suggest that learnable semantic aggregation provides an effective trade-off between efficiency and diagnostic performance for gigapixel pathology reasoning.

AI.tldr: TC-SSA：用于千兆像素病理图像的可学习语义槽聚合框架，通过稀疏路由将大量图像块压缩为固定数量的语义槽，在严格token预算下实现全局覆盖
AI.motivation: 大规模视觉语言模型在计算病理学中面临千兆像素级全切片图像的计算瓶颈，现有空间采样方法可能丢弃关键诊断证据，需要一种既能压缩序列长度又能保留诊断信息的方法
AI.method: 提出TC-SSA（Token Compression via Semantic Slot Aggregation）框架：1）使用门控路由模块通过稀疏Top-2路由将图像块分配到语义槽；2）加权聚合生成固定数量的语义槽表示；3）将视觉token数量压缩到原始的1.7%
AI.result: 在SlideBench(TCGA)上达到78.34%总体准确率和77.14%诊断子集准确率，优于基于采样的基线；在MIL分类任务中，TCGA-BRCA达到95.83% AUC，TCGA-NSCLC达到98.27% AUC，PANDA达到79.80% AUC
AI.conclusion: 可学习的语义聚合在效率和诊断性能之间提供了有效权衡，适用于千兆像素病理推理，解决了Transformer架构处理超长序列的瓶颈问题

title: ThreatFormer-IDS: Robust Transformer Intrusion Detection with Zero-Day Generalization and Explainable Attribution
summary: Intrusion detection in IoT and industrial networks requires models that can detect rare attacks at low false-positive rates while remaining reliable under evolving traffic and limited labels. Existing IDS solutions often report strong in-distribution accuracy, but they may degrade when evaluated on future traffic, unseen (zero-day) attack families, or adversarial feature manipulations, and many systems provide limited evidence to support analyst triage. To address these gaps, we propose ThreatFormer- IDS, a Transformer-based sequence modeling framework that converts flow records into time-ordered windows and learns contextual representations for robust intrusion screening. The method combines (i) weighted supervised learning for imbalanced detection, (ii) masked self-supervised learning to improve representation stability under drift and sparse labels, (iii) PGDbased adversarial training with scale-normalized perturbations to strengthen resilience against feature-level evasion, and (iv) Integrated Gradients attribution to highlight influential time steps and features for each alert. On the ToN IoT benchmark with chronological evaluation, ThreatFormer-IDS achieves AUCROC 0.994, AUC-PR 0.956, and Recall@1%FPR 0.910, outperforming strong tree-based and sequence baselines. Under a zero-day protocol with held-out attack families, it maintains superior generalization (AUC-PR 0.721, Recall@1%FPR 0.783). Robustness tests further show slower degradation in AUCPR as the adversarial budget increases, confirming improved stability under bounded perturbations. Overall, ThreatFormer- IDS provides a unified, deployment-oriented IDS pipeline that balances detection quality, zero-day behavior, robustness, and explainability.

AI.tldr: ThreatFormer-IDS：基于Transformer的入侵检测系统，通过加权监督学习、掩码自监督学习、对抗训练和可解释性分析，在IoT/工业网络中实现高精度、强鲁棒性和零日攻击检测能力。
AI.motivation: 现有IDS系统在分布外泛化、零日攻击检测、对抗鲁棒性和可解释性方面存在不足，特别是在IoT和工业网络环境中需要检测罕见攻击并保持低误报率。
AI.method: 将流量记录转换为时序窗口，采用Transformer进行序列建模，结合：1) 加权监督学习处理不平衡数据；2) 掩码自监督学习提升表示稳定性；3) PGD对抗训练增强特征级鲁棒性；4) 集成梯度归因提供可解释性。
AI.result: 在ToN IoT基准测试中达到AUC-ROC 0.994，AUC-PR 0.956，Recall@1%FPR 0.910；在零日攻击协议下保持AUC-PR 0.721，Recall@1%FPR 0.783；对抗鲁棒性测试显示性能下降更慢。
AI.conclusion: ThreatFormer-IDS提供了一个统一的、面向部署的IDS管道，平衡了检测质量、零日行为、鲁棒性和可解释性，适用于实际IoT/工业网络环境。

title: ConVibNet: Needle Detection during Continuous Insertion via Frequency-Inspired Features
summary:
Purpose: Ultrasound-guided needle interventions are widely used in clinical practice, but their success critically depends on accurate needle placement, which is frequently hindered by the poor and intermittent visibility of needles in ultrasound images. Existing approaches remain limited by artifacts, occlusions, and low contrast, and often fail to support real-time continuous insertion. To overcome these challenges, this study introduces a robust real-time framework for continuous needle detection.
  Methods: We present ConVibNet, an extension of VibNet for detecting needles with significantly reduced visibility, addressing real-time, continuous needle tracking during insertion. ConVibNet leverages temporal dependencies across successive ultrasound frames to enable continuous estimation of both needle tip position and shaft angle in dynamic scenarios. To strengthen temporal awareness of needle-tip motion, we introduce a novel intersection-and-difference loss that explicitly leverages motion correlations across consecutive frames. In addition, we curated a dedicated dataset for model development and evaluation.
  Results: The performance of the proposed ConVibNet model was evaluated on our dataset, demonstrating superior accuracy compared to the baseline VibNet and UNet-LSTM models. Specifically, ConVibNet achieved a tip error of 2.80+-2.42 mm and an angle error of 1.69+-2.00 deg. These results represent a 0.75 mm improvement in tip localization accuracy over the best-performing baseline, while preserving real-time inference capability.
  Conclusion: ConVibNet advances real-time needle detection in ultrasound-guided interventions by integrating temporal correlation modeling with a novel intersection-and-difference loss, thereby improving accuracy and robustness and demonstrating high potential for integration into autonomous insertion systems.

AI.tldr: ConVibNet：用于超声引导针干预的实时连续针检测框架，通过时间依赖建模和新型损失函数提高针尖定位精度
AI.motivation: 超声引导针干预在临床实践中广泛应用，但针在超声图像中的可视性差且间歇性出现，现有方法受限于伪影、遮挡和低对比度，难以支持实时连续插入
AI.method: 提出ConVibNet，扩展VibNet以检测可视性显著降低的针，利用连续超声帧的时间依赖性进行连续针尖位置和轴角度估计，引入新颖的交叉差异损失函数增强针尖运动的时间感知
AI.result: 在专用数据集上评估，ConVibNet相比基线VibNet和UNet-LSTM表现更优，针尖误差2.80±2.42mm，角度误差1.69±2.00度，针尖定位精度比最佳基线提高0.75mm，同时保持实时推理能力
AI.conclusion: ConVibNet通过整合时间相关性建模和新颖损失函数，推进了超声引导干预中的实时针检测，提高了准确性和鲁棒性，展示了集成到自主插入系统中的高潜力

title: Accelerating Single-Pass SGD for Generalized Linear Prediction
summary: We study generalized linear prediction under a streaming setting, where each iteration uses only one fresh data point for a gradient-level update. While momentum is well-established in deterministic optimization, a fundamental open question is whether it can accelerate such single-pass non-quadratic stochastic optimization. We propose the first algorithm that successfully incorporates momentum via a novel data-dependent proximal method, achieving dual-momentum acceleration. Our derived excess risk bound decomposes into three components: an improved optimization error, a minimax optimal statistical error, and a higher-order model-misspecification error. The proof handles mis-specification via a fine-grained stationary analysis of inner updates, while localizing statistical error through a two-phase outer-loop analysis. As a result, we resolve the open problem posed by Jain et al. [2018a] and demonstrate that momentum acceleration is more effective than variance reduction for generalized linear prediction in the streaming setting.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了流式设置下的广义线性预测问题，提出了首个成功结合动量加速的单通道随机优化算法，解决了Jain等人2018年提出的开放性问题。
AI.motivation: 动量方法在确定性优化中已被广泛证明有效，但在单通道非二次随机优化中是否能加速一直是一个未解决的基础性问题。Jain等人在2018年提出了这个问题，本文旨在解决这个开放性问题。
AI.method: 提出了一种新颖的数据依赖近端方法，实现了双动量加速。算法在流式设置下使用单个数据点进行梯度级更新，通过精细的平稳性分析处理模型误设，并通过两阶段外环分析定位统计误差。
AI.result: 推导出的超额风险界限分解为三个部分：改进的优化误差、极小极大最优统计误差和更高阶的模型误设误差。证明了动量加速在流式广义线性预测中比方差缩减更有效。
AI.conclusion: 成功解决了Jain等人2018年提出的开放性问题，证明了动量可以加速单通道非二次随机优化，为流式学习提供了理论保证。

title: GRAD-Former: Gated Robust Attention-based Differential Transformer for Change Detection
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
summary: Change detection (CD) in remote sensing aims to identify semantic differences between satellite images captured at different times. While deep learning has significantly advanced this field, existing approaches based on convolutional neural networks (CNNs), transformers and Selective State Space Models (SSMs) still struggle to precisely delineate change regions. In particular, traditional transformer-based methods suffer from quadratic computational complexity when applied to very high-resolution (VHR) satellite images and often perform poorly with limited training data, leading to under-utilization of the rich spatial information available in VHR imagery. We present GRAD-Former, a novel framework that enhances contextual understanding while maintaining efficiency through reduced model size. The proposed framework consists of a novel encoder with Adaptive Feature Relevance and Refinement (AFRAR) module, fusion and decoder blocks. AFRAR integrates global-local contextual awareness through two proposed components: the Selective Embedding Amplification (SEA) module and the Global-Local Feature Refinement (GLFR) module. SEA and GLFR leverage gating mechanisms and differential attention, respectively, which generates multiple softmax heaps to capture important features while minimizing the captured irreverent features. Multiple experiments across three challenging CD datasets (LEVIR-CD, CDD, DSIFN-CD) demonstrate GRAD-Former's superior performance compared to existing approaches. Notably, GRAD-Former outperforms the current state-of-the-art models across all the metrics and all the datasets while using fewer parameters. Our framework establishes a new benchmark for remote sensing change detection performance. Our code will be released at: https://github.com/Ujjwal238/GRAD-Former

AI.tldr: GRAD-Former是一个用于遥感图像变化检测的新型框架，通过自适应特征相关性和细化模块（AFRAR）整合全局-局部上下文感知，在保持模型效率的同时提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于CNN、Transformer和选择性状态空间模型（SSMs）的变化检测方法在精确划定变化区域方面存在困难。传统Transformer方法在处理超高分辨率卫星图像时面临二次计算复杂度问题，且在训练数据有限时表现不佳，未能充分利用VHR图像中的丰富空间信息。
AI.method: 提出GRAD-Former框架，包含新型编码器、AFRAR模块、融合和解码器块。AFRAR模块通过选择性嵌入放大（SEA）和全局-局部特征细化（GLFR）两个组件整合全局-局部上下文感知。SEA使用门控机制，GLFR使用差分注意力生成多个softmax堆来捕获重要特征并最小化无关特征。
AI.result: 在三个具有挑战性的变化检测数据集（LEVIR-CD、CDD、DSIFN-CD）上的实验表明，GRAD-Former在所有指标和所有数据集上都优于现有方法，同时使用更少的参数，建立了遥感变化检测性能的新基准。
AI.conclusion: GRAD-Former通过创新的AFRAR模块有效整合全局-局部上下文信息，在保持模型效率的同时显著提升了变化检测性能，为遥感图像分析提供了新的解决方案。

title: The Expressive Limits of Diagonal SSMs for State-Tracking
comment: 18 pages, 5 figures, 4 tables. Accepted at ICLR 2026
summary: State-Space Models (SSMs) have recently been shown to achieve strong empirical performance on a variety of long-range sequence modeling tasks while remaining efficient and highly-parallelizable. However, the theoretical understanding of their expressive power remains limited. In this work, we study the expressivity of input-Dependent Complex-valued Diagonal (DCD) SSMs on sequential state-tracking tasks. We show that single-layer DCD SSMs cannot express state-tracking of any non-Abelian group at finite precision. More generally, we show that $k$-layer DCD SSMs can express state-tracking of a group if and only if that group has a subnormal series of length $k$, with Abelian factors. That is, we identify the precise expressivity range of $k$-layer DCD SSMs within the solvable groups. Empirically, we find that multi-layer models often fail to learn state-tracking for non-Abelian groups, highlighting a gap between expressivity and learnability.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了输入依赖复值对角状态空间模型（DCD SSMs）在顺序状态跟踪任务中的表达能力，发现单层DCD SSMs无法表达任何非阿贝尔群的状态跟踪，多层模型的表达能力与群论中的可解群结构相关。
AI.motivation: 状态空间模型（SSMs）在长序列建模任务中表现出色且高效，但对其理论表达能力理解有限。本文旨在从理论上分析DCD SSMs在状态跟踪任务中的表达能力，填补理论理解空白。
AI.method: 采用理论分析方法，研究输入依赖复值对角状态空间模型（DCD SSMs）在顺序状态跟踪任务中的表达能力。通过群论框架分析模型表达能力，建立模型层数与群结构之间的数学关系。
AI.result: 理论证明：1）单层DCD SSMs无法表达任何非阿贝尔群的状态跟踪；2）k层DCD SSMs能表达一个群的状态跟踪当且仅当该群具有长度为k、因子为阿贝尔群的次正规列。实证发现多层模型常无法学习非阿贝尔群的状态跟踪，表明表达能力与可学习性存在差距。
AI.conclusion: DCD SSMs的表达能力受限于可解群结构，多层模型在理论上能表达更复杂的群结构，但实际学习中存在困难。这为理解状态空间模型的局限性提供了理论框架。

title: BeautyGRPO: Aesthetic Alignment for Face Retouching via Dynamic Path Guidance and Fine-Grained Preference Modeling
summary: Face retouching requires removing subtle imperfections while preserving unique facial identity features, in order to enhance overall aesthetic appeal. However, existing methods suffer from a fundamental trade-off. Supervised learning on labeled data is constrained to pixel-level label mimicry, failing to capture complex subjective human aesthetic preferences. Conversely, while online reinforcement learning (RL) excels at preference alignment, its stochastic exploration paradigm conflicts with the high-fidelity demands of face retouching and often introduces noticeable noise artifacts due to accumulated stochastic drift. To address these limitations, we propose BeautyGRPO, a reinforcement learning framework that aligns face retouching with human aesthetic preferences. We construct FRPref-10K, a fine-grained preference dataset covering five key retouching dimensions, and train a specialized reward model capable of evaluating subtle perceptual differences. To reconcile exploration and fidelity, we introduce Dynamic Path Guidance (DPG). DPG stabilizes the stochastic sampling trajectory by dynamically computing an anchor-based ODE path and replanning a guided trajectory at each sampling timestep, effectively correcting stochastic drift while maintaining controlled exploration. Extensive experiments show that BeautyGRPO outperforms both specialized face retouching methods and general image editing models, achieving superior texture quality, more accurate blemish removal, and overall results that better align with human aesthetic preferences.

AI.tldr: BeautyGRPO：通过强化学习框架实现人脸美化与人类审美偏好对齐，引入动态路径引导解决随机探索与高保真需求冲突
AI.motivation: 现有方法存在根本性权衡：监督学习受限于像素级标签模仿，无法捕捉复杂主观审美偏好；在线强化学习虽擅长偏好对齐，但其随机探索范式与人脸美化高保真需求冲突，常引入噪声伪影
AI.method: 1) 构建FRPref-10K细粒度偏好数据集，涵盖五个关键美化维度；2) 训练专门奖励模型评估细微感知差异；3) 提出动态路径引导(DPG)，通过动态计算基于锚点的ODE路径并在每个采样时间步重新规划引导轨迹，稳定随机采样轨迹
AI.result: BeautyGRPO在广泛实验中优于专门的人脸美化方法和通用图像编辑模型，实现了更优的纹理质量、更准确的瑕疵去除，以及更符合人类审美偏好的整体结果
AI.conclusion: BeautyGRPO成功解决了人脸美化中探索与保真度的冲突，通过强化学习框架实现了与人类审美偏好的有效对齐

title: TiledAttention: a CUDA Tile SDPA Kernel for PyTorch
summary: TiledAttention is a scaled dot-product attention (SDPA) forward operator for SDPA research on NVIDIA GPUs. Implemented in cuTile Python (TileIR) and exposed as a PyTorch-callable function, it is easier to modify than low-level CUDA templates while retaining realistic behavior via online softmax and tiled $K,V$ streaming. The approach is both performant and directly editable at the schedule level from Python (tile shapes, staging, shared-memory layout), enabling rapid, reproducible kernel research without template-heavy CUDA/CUTLASS rewrites. We benchmark TiledAttention on an NVIDIA DGX GB10 node with a reproducible harness and compare against PyTorch SDPA (auto-dispatch) and explicit unfused baselines across sequence length, head dimension, and precision (FP16/BF16). While production fused baselines remain stronger overall, TiledAttention delivers large speedups over standard eager attention paths and is available for direct use within PyTorch workflows, providing a practical balance between performance and customizability.

AI.tldr: TiledAttention是一个用于SDPA研究的可编辑注意力算子，在Python层面提供高性能且易于修改的实现，平衡了性能与可定制性。
AI.motivation: 当前SDPA研究需要频繁修改CUDA/CUTLASS模板，过程繁琐且难以快速迭代。需要一种既保持高性能又易于编辑的研究工具。
AI.method: 使用cuTile Python（TileIR）实现，通过在线softmax和分块K,V流式处理保持真实行为，在Python层面可编辑调度参数（tile形状、暂存、共享内存布局）。
AI.result: 相比PyTorch SDPA和显式未融合基线，TiledAttention在序列长度、头维度和精度（FP16/BF16）上实现显著加速，虽然生产级融合基线仍更强，但提供了实用的性能与可定制性平衡。
AI.conclusion: TiledAttention为SDPA研究提供了快速、可重现的内核研究工具，无需重写模板繁重的CUDA/CUTLASS代码，可直接在PyTorch工作流中使用。

title: FREE-Edit: Using Editing-aware Injection in Rectified Flow Models for Zero-shot Image-Driven Video Editing
summary: Image-driven video editing aims to propagate edit contents from the modified first frame to the rest frames. The existing methods usually invert the source video to noise using a pre-trained image-to-video (I2V) model and then guide the sampling process using the edited first frame. Generally, a popular choice for maintaining motion and layout from the source video is intervening in the denoising process by injecting attention during reconstruction. However, such injection often leads to unsatisfactory results, where excessive injection leads to conflicting semantics from the source video while insufficient injection brings limited source representation. Recognizing this, we propose an Editing-awaRE (REE) injection method to modulate injection intensity of each token. Specifically, we first compute the pixel difference between the source and edited first frame to form a corresponding editing mask. Next, we track the editing area throughout the entire video by using optical flow to warp the first-frame mask. Then, editing-aware feature injection intensity for each token is generated accordingly, where injection is not conducted on editing areas. Building upon REE injection, we further propose a zero-shot image-driven video editing framework with recent-emerging rectified-Flow models, dubbed FREE-Edit. Without fine-tuning or training, our FREE-Edit demonstrates effectiveness in various image-driven video editing scenarios, showing its capability to produce higher-quality outputs compared with existing techniques. Project page: https://free-edit.github.io/page/.

AI.tldr: FREE-Edit：基于编辑感知注意力注入的零样本图像驱动视频编辑框架，通过光流跟踪编辑区域并调制注意力注入强度，在保持源视频运动的同时实现高质量编辑。
AI.motivation: 现有图像驱动视频编辑方法通常通过注入注意力来保持源视频的运动和布局，但固定强度的注意力注入往往导致不理想的结果：过度注入会引入源视频的冲突语义，注入不足则无法充分保持源视频表示。需要一种能够根据编辑区域自适应调制注入强度的方法。
AI.method: 提出编辑感知（REE）注入方法：1）计算源图像与编辑后第一帧的像素差异形成编辑掩码；2）使用光流将第一帧掩码传播到整个视频以跟踪编辑区域；3）根据编辑区域为每个token生成编辑感知的特征注入强度（编辑区域不注入）。基于REE注入，构建了基于rectified-Flow模型的零样本图像驱动视频编辑框架FREE-Edit。
AI.result: FREE-Edit在各种图像驱动视频编辑场景中表现出有效性，无需微调或训练即可生成比现有技术更高质量的编辑结果。
AI.conclusion: 提出的编辑感知注意力注入方法能够有效调制注入强度，避免源视频语义冲突同时保持足够的源表示，结合rectified-Flow模型实现了高质量的零样本视频编辑。

title: CoVAE: correlated multimodal generative modeling
summary: Multimodal Variational Autoencoders have emerged as a popular tool to extract effective representations from rich multimodal data. However, such models rely on fusion strategies in latent space that destroy the joint statistical structure of the multimodal data, with profound implications for generation and uncertainty quantification. In this work, we introduce Correlated Variational Autoencoders (CoVAE), a new generative architecture that captures the correlations between modalities. We test CoVAE on a number of real and synthetic data sets demonstrating both accurate cross-modal reconstruction and effective quantification of the associated uncertainties.

AI.tldr: CoVAE：一种新的生成架构，通过捕捉模态间相关性来解决多模态VAE中潜在空间融合破坏联合统计结构的问题
AI.motivation: 多模态变分自编码器已成为从丰富多模态数据中提取有效表示的重要工具，但现有模型依赖的潜在空间融合策略会破坏多模态数据的联合统计结构，这对生成和不确定性量化有深远影响。
AI.method: 提出相关变分自编码器（CoVAE），这是一种新的生成架构，专门设计用于捕捉模态间的相关性。该方法在潜在空间中保持模态间的统计依赖关系。
AI.result: 在多个真实和合成数据集上测试CoVAE，展示了准确的跨模态重建和有效的相关不确定性量化能力。
AI.conclusion: CoVAE通过保持模态间相关性，解决了传统多模态VAE的局限性，在多模态表示学习和不确定性量化方面表现出色。

title: TripleSumm: Adaptive Triple-Modality Fusion for Video Summarization
comment: Published as a Conference Paper at ICLR 2026
summary: The exponential growth of video content necessitates effective video summarization to efficiently extract key information from long videos. However, current approaches struggle to fully comprehend complex videos, primarily because they employ static or modality-agnostic fusion strategies. These methods fail to account for the dynamic, frame-dependent variations in modality saliency inherent in video data. To overcome these limitations, we propose TripleSumm, a novel architecture that adaptively weights and fuses the contributions of visual, text, and audio modalities at the frame level. Furthermore, a significant bottleneck for research into multimodal video summarization has been the lack of comprehensive benchmarks. Addressing this bottleneck, we introduce MoSu (Most Replayed Multimodal Video Summarization), the first large-scale benchmark that provides all three modalities. Extensive experiments demonstrate that TripleSumm achieves state-of-the-art performance, outperforming existing methods by a significant margin on four benchmarks, including MoSu. Our code and dataset are available at https://github.com/smkim37/TripleSumm.

AI.tldr: TripleSumm是一个用于视频摘要的新型架构，通过自适应加权融合视觉、文本和音频模态，并引入了首个大规模多模态视频摘要基准MoSu。
AI.motivation: 视频内容的指数增长需要有效的视频摘要技术，但现有方法采用静态或模态无关的融合策略，无法处理视频数据中固有的动态、帧依赖的模态显著性变化。
AI.method: 提出TripleSumm架构，在帧级别自适应加权和融合视觉、文本和音频三种模态的贡献。同时创建了MoSu基准，这是首个提供所有三种模态的大规模多模态视频摘要基准。
AI.result: TripleSumm在四个基准测试（包括MoSu）上实现了最先进的性能，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: TripleSumm通过自适应多模态融合有效解决了视频摘要中的模态显著性动态变化问题，同时MoSu基准为多模态视频摘要研究提供了重要资源。

title: Intrinsic Task Symmetry Drives Generalization in Algorithmic Tasks
summary: Grokking, the sudden transition from memorization to generalization, is characterized by the emergence of low-dimensional representations, yet the mechanism underlying this organization remains elusive. We propose that intrinsic task symmetries primarily drive grokking and shape the geometry of the model's representation space. We identify a consistent three-stage training dynamic underlying grokking: (i) memorization, (ii) symmetry acquisition, and (iii) geometric organization. We show that generalization emerges during the symmetry acquisition phase, after which representations reorganize into a structured, task-aligned geometry. We validate this symmetry-driven account across diverse algorithmic domains, including algebraic, structural, and relational reasoning tasks. Building on these findings, we introduce a symmetry-based diagnostic that anticipates the onset of generalization and propose strategies to accelerate it. Together, our results establish intrinsic symmetry as the key factor enabling neural networks to move beyond memorization and achieve robust algorithmic reasoning.

AI.tldr: 论文提出内在任务对称性是驱动神经网络从记忆化到泛化（grokking现象）的关键因素，并揭示了包含记忆化、对称性获取和几何组织三个阶段的一致性训练动态。
AI.motivation: Grokking现象（从记忆化到泛化的突然转变）虽然已有研究观察到低维表示的出现，但其背后的组织机制仍不清楚。本文旨在探究驱动grokking的根本因素，特别是内在任务对称性在塑造模型表示空间几何结构中的作用。
AI.method: 1. 提出对称性驱动的理论框架来解释grokking现象；2. 识别并分析三个阶段的训练动态：记忆化、对称性获取和几何组织；3. 在代数、结构和关系推理等多种算法任务上进行验证；4. 开发基于对称性的诊断方法来预测泛化开始；5. 提出加速泛化的策略。
AI.result: 1. 泛化在对称性获取阶段出现，之后表示重组为结构化、任务对齐的几何结构；2. 对称性驱动的解释在多种算法领域得到验证；3. 基于对称性的诊断能有效预测泛化开始；4. 提出的策略能加速泛化过程。
AI.conclusion: 内在对称性是神经网络超越记忆化、实现鲁棒算法推理的关键因素，为理解grokking现象提供了统一的对称性驱动解释框架。

title: Formal Analysis and Supply Chain Security for Agentic AI Skills
comment: 31 pages, 5 theorems with full proofs, 70 references, open-source tool: https://github.com/varun369/skillfortify
summary: The rapid proliferation of agentic AI skill ecosystems -- exemplified by OpenClaw (228,000 GitHub stars) and Anthropic Agent Skills (75,600 stars) -- has introduced a critical supply chain attack surface. The ClawHavoc campaign (January-February 2026) infiltrated over 1,200 malicious skills into the OpenClaw marketplace, while MalTool catalogued 6,487 malicious tools that evade conventional detection. In response, twelve reactive security tools emerged, yet all rely on heuristic methods that provide no formal guarantees. We present SkillFortify, the first formal analysis framework for agent skill supply chains, with six contributions: (1) the DY-Skill attacker model, a Dolev-Yao adaptation to the five-phase skill lifecycle with a maximality proof; (2) a sound static analysis framework grounded in abstract interpretation; (3) capability-based sandboxing with a confinement proof; (4) an Agent Dependency Graph with SAT-based resolution and lockfile semantics; (5) a trust score algebra with formal monotonicity; and (6) SkillFortifyBench, a 540-skill benchmark. SkillFortify achieves 96.95% F1 (95% CI: [95.1%, 98.4%]) with 100% precision and 0% false positive rate on 540 skills, while SAT-based resolution handles 1,000-node graphs in under 100 ms.

AI.tldr: SkillFortify：首个针对AI智能体技能供应链的形式化分析框架，提供安全保证而非启发式方法
AI.motivation: 随着OpenClaw（22.8万星）和Anthropic Agent Skills（7.56万星）等AI技能生态系统的快速扩张，供应链攻击面急剧扩大。ClawHavoc攻击活动（2026年1-2月）向OpenClaw市场注入了1200多个恶意技能，而MalTool记录了6487个能规避传统检测的恶意工具。现有12种反应式安全工具都依赖启发式方法，缺乏形式化安全保证。
AI.method: 提出SkillFortify框架，包含六个核心贡献：1) DY-Skill攻击者模型，将Dolev-Yao模型适配到五阶段技能生命周期；2) 基于抽象解释的静态分析框架；3) 能力基础的沙箱隔离；4) 基于SAT求解的智能体依赖图解析和lockfile语义；5) 具有形式单调性的信任评分代数；6) SkillFortifyBench基准测试集（540个技能）。
AI.result: SkillFortify在540个技能上达到96.95% F1分数（95%置信区间：[95.1%, 98.4%]），100%精确率和0%误报率。SAT求解器能在100毫秒内处理1000个节点的依赖图。
AI.conclusion: SkillFortify为AI智能体技能供应链提供了首个形式化安全分析框架，相比现有启发式方法，能提供严格的安全保证，有效应对供应链攻击威胁。

title: VP-Hype: A Hybrid Mamba-Transformer Framework with Visual-Textual Prompting for Hyperspectral Image Classification
summary: Accurate classification of hyperspectral imagery (HSI) is often frustrated by the tension between high-dimensional spectral data and the extreme scarcity of labeled training samples. While hierarchical models like LoLA-SpecViT have demonstrated the power of local windowed attention and parameter-efficient fine-tuning, the quadratic complexity of standard Transformers remains a barrier to scaling. We introduce VP-Hype, a framework that rethinks HSI classification by unifying the linear-time efficiency of State-Space Models (SSMs) with the relational modeling of Transformers in a novel hybrid architecture. Building on a robust 3D-CNN spectral front-end, VP-Hype replaces conventional attention blocks with a Hybrid Mamba-Transformer backbone to capture long-range dependencies with significantly reduced computational overhead. Furthermore, we address the label-scarcity problem by integrating dual-modal Visual and Textual Prompts that provide context-aware guidance for the feature extraction process. Our experimental evaluation demonstrates that VP-Hype establishes a new state of the art in low-data regimes. Specifically, with a training sample distribution of only 2\%, the model achieves Overall Accuracy (OA) of 99.69\% on the Salinas dataset and 99.45\% on the Longkou dataset. These results suggest that the convergence of hybrid sequence modeling and multi-modal prompting provides a robust path forward for high-performance, sample-efficient remote sensing.

AI.tldr: VP-Hype：一种用于高光谱图像分类的新型混合架构，结合状态空间模型（SSM）的线性时间效率与Transformer的关系建模能力，通过视觉和文本提示解决标签稀缺问题，在低数据情况下实现最先进性能。
AI.motivation: 高光谱图像分类面临高维光谱数据与稀缺标注样本之间的矛盾。现有方法如LoLA-SpecViT虽然展示了局部窗口注意力和参数高效微调的优势，但标准Transformer的二次复杂度限制了可扩展性。
AI.method: 提出VP-Hype框架：1）基于稳健的3D-CNN光谱前端；2）用混合Mamba-Transformer骨干替代传统注意力块，以线性时间效率捕获长程依赖；3）集成双模态视觉和文本提示，为特征提取提供上下文感知指导。
AI.result: 在低数据情况下实现最先进性能：仅使用2%训练样本时，在Salinas数据集上达到99.69%总体准确率，在Longkou数据集上达到99.45%总体准确率。
AI.conclusion: 混合序列建模与多模态提示的融合为高性能、样本高效的遥感分类提供了稳健的前进路径。

title: MatRIS: Toward Reliable and Efficient Pretrained Machine Learning Interaction Potentials
summary: Foundation MLIPs demonstrate broad applicability across diverse material systems and have emerged as a powerful and transformative paradigm in chemical and computational materials science. Equivariant MLIPs achieve state-of-the-art accuracy in a wide range of benchmarks by incorporating equivariant inductive bias. However, the reliance on tensor products and high-degree representations makes them computationally costly. This raises a fundamental question: as quantum mechanical-based datasets continue to expand, can we develop a more compact model to thoroughly exploit high-dimensional atomic interactions? In this work, we present MatRIS (\textbf{Mat}erials \textbf{R}epresentation and \textbf{I}nteraction \textbf{S}imulation), an invariant MLIP that introduces attention-based modeling of three-body interactions. MatRIS leverages a novel separable attention mechanism with linear complexity $O(N)$, enabling both scalability and expressiveness. MatRIS delivers accuracy comparable to that of leading equivariant models on a wide range of popular benchmarks (Matbench-Discovery, MatPES, MDR phonon, Molecular dataset, etc). Taking Matbench-Discovery as an example, MatRIS achieves an F1 score of up to 0.847 and attains comparable accuracy at a lower training cost. The work indicates that our carefully designed invariant models can match or exceed the accuracy of equivariant models at a fraction of the cost, shedding light on the development of accurate and efficient MLIPs.

AI.tldr: MatRIS是一种创新的不变性机器学习势函数，通过注意力机制建模三体相互作用，在保持与最先进等变性模型相当精度的同时，实现了线性复杂度O(N)的高效计算。
AI.motivation: 当前等变性MLIPs虽然精度高，但依赖张量积和高阶表示导致计算成本高昂。随着量子力学数据集不断扩大，需要开发更紧凑的模型来充分挖掘高维原子相互作用。
AI.method: 提出MatRIS不变性MLIP，引入基于注意力的三体相互作用建模，采用新颖的可分离注意力机制实现线性复杂度O(N)。
