AI.result: 在多个基准测试（Matbench-Discovery、MatPES、MDR phonon等）上达到与领先等变性模型相当的精度，Matbench-Discovery上F1分数达0.847，训练成本更低。
AI.conclusion: 精心设计的不变性模型能以更低成本匹配甚至超越等变性模型的精度，为开发准确高效的MLIPs提供了新思路。

title: RnG: A Unified Transformer for Complete 3D Modeling from Partial Observations
summary: Human perceive the 3D world through 2D observations from limited viewpoints. While recent feed-forward generalizable 3D reconstruction models excel at recovering 3D structures from sparse images, their representations are often confined to observed regions, leaving unseen geometry un-modeled. This raises a key, fundamental challenge: Can we infer a complete 3D structure from partial 2D observations? We present RnG (Reconstruction and Generation), a novel feed-forward Transformer that unifies these two tasks by predicting an implicit, complete 3D representation. At the core of RnG, we propose a reconstruction-guided causal attention mechanism that separates reconstruction and generation at the attention level, and treats the KV-cache as an implicit 3D representation. Then, arbitrary poses can efficiently query this cache to render high-fidelity, novel-view RGBD outputs. As a result, RnG not only accurately reconstructs visible geometry but also generates plausible, coherent unseen geometry and appearance. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in both generalizable 3D reconstruction and novel view generation, while operating efficiently enough for real-time interactive applications. Project page: https://npucvr.github.io/RnG

AI.tldr: RnG是一个统一的Transformer模型，通过重建引导的因果注意力机制，从稀疏2D图像预测完整的3D隐式表示，同时实现3D重建和生成任务
AI.motivation: 现有前馈式泛化3D重建模型只能重建观测到的区域，无法推断未观测的几何结构。本文旨在解决从部分2D观测推断完整3D结构这一基础挑战
AI.method: 提出RnG Transformer，采用重建引导的因果注意力机制，在注意力层面分离重建和生成任务，将KV缓存作为隐式3D表示，支持任意视角的高保真RGBD渲染
AI.result: 在泛化3D重建和新视角生成任务上达到最先进性能，同时保持实时交互应用的高效性
AI.conclusion: RnG成功统一了3D重建和生成任务，能够从稀疏2D观测中准确重建可见几何并生成合理、连贯的未观测几何和外观

title: Mitigating topology biases in Graph Diffusion via Counterfactual Intervention
summary: Graph diffusion models have gained significant attention in graph generation tasks, but they often inherit and amplify topology biases from sensitive attributes (e.g. gender, age, region), leading to unfair synthetic graphs. Existing fair graph generation using diffusion models is limited to specific graph-based applications with complete labels or requires simultaneous updates for graph structure and node attributes, making them unsuitable for general usage. To relax these limitations by applying the debiasing method directly on graph topology, we propose Fair Graph Diffusion Model (FairGDiff), a counterfactual-based one-step solution that mitigates topology biases while balancing fairness and utility. In detail, we construct a causal model to capture the relationship between sensitive attributes, biased link formation, and the generated graph structure. By answering the counterfactual question "Would the graph structure change if the sensitive attribute were different?", we estimate an unbiased treatment and incorporate it into the diffusion process. FairGDiff integrates counterfactual learning into both forward diffusion and backward denoising, ensuring that the generated graphs are independent of sensitive attributes while preserving structural integrity. Extensive experiments on real-world datasets demonstrate that FairGDiff achieves a superior trade-off between fairness and utility, outperforming existing fair graph generation methods while maintaining scalability.

AI.tldr: FairGDiff：一种基于反事实学习的公平图扩散模型，通过因果建模和反事实干预来减轻图拓扑中的敏感属性偏见，在保持图结构完整性的同时实现公平性
AI.motivation: 现有图扩散模型在生成图时会继承并放大敏感属性（如性别、年龄、地区）带来的拓扑偏见，导致不公平的合成图。现有的公平图生成方法要么局限于特定应用场景，要么需要同时更新图结构和节点属性，缺乏通用性。
AI.method: 提出FairGDiff，一种基于反事实的一步解决方案：1) 构建因果模型捕捉敏感属性、有偏链接形成和生成图结构之间的关系；2) 通过回答反事实问题"如果敏感属性不同，图结构会改变吗？"来估计无偏处理；3) 将反事实学习整合到前向扩散和后向去噪过程中，确保生成的图独立于敏感属性同时保持结构完整性。
AI.result: 在真实世界数据集上的广泛实验表明，FairGDiff在公平性和效用之间实现了优越的权衡，优于现有的公平图生成方法，同时保持了可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: FairGDiff通过将反事实学习直接应用于图拓扑，有效减轻了图扩散模型中的拓扑偏见，为公平图生成提供了一种通用且有效的解决方案。

title: VisNec: Measuring and Leveraging Visual Necessity for Multimodal Instruction Tuning
summary: The effectiveness of multimodal instruction tuning depends not only on dataset scale, but critically on whether training samples genuinely require visual reasoning. However, existing instruction datasets often contain a substantial portion of visually redundant samples (solvable from text alone), as well as multimodally misaligned supervision that can degrade learning. To address this, we propose VisNec (Visual Necessity Score), a principled data selection framework that measures the marginal contribution of visual input during instruction tuning. By comparing predictive loss with and without visual context, VisNec identifies whether a training instance is vision-critical, redundant, or misaligned. To preserve task diversity, we combine VisNec with semantic clustering and select high-necessity samples within each cluster. Across 10 downstream benchmarks, training on only 15% of the LLaVA-665K dataset selected by VisNec achieves 100.2% of full-data performance. On the smaller Vision-Flan-186K dataset, our selection not only further reduces data size but also surpasses full-data training by 15.8%. These results demonstrate that measuring and leveraging visual necessity provides an effective solution for both efficient and robust multimodal instruction tuning. Codes and selected subsets will be released upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: VisNec框架通过评估视觉输入在指令调优中的边际贡献，筛选出真正需要视觉推理的训练样本，仅用15%数据即可达到全数据性能
AI.motivation: 当前多模态指令调优数据集存在大量视觉冗余样本（仅通过文本即可解决）和多模态对齐错误的监督信号，这会影响学习效果。需要一种方法来识别真正需要视觉推理的训练样本。
AI.method: 提出VisNec（视觉必要性评分）框架，通过比较有/无视觉上下文时的预测损失，评估视觉输入的边际贡献。将训练样本分为三类：视觉关键型、冗余型、对齐错误型。为保持任务多样性，结合语义聚类并在每个聚类中选择高必要性样本。
AI.result: 在LLaVA-665K数据集上，仅使用VisNec选择的15%数据即可达到全数据性能的100.2%。在Vision-Flan-186K数据集上，选择的数据不仅进一步减少规模，还比全数据训练性能提升15.8%。
AI.conclusion: 测量和利用视觉必要性为高效且鲁棒的多模态指令调优提供了有效解决方案，显著减少数据需求同时提升性能。

title: Temporal Representations for Exploration: Learning Complex Exploratory Behavior without Extrinsic Rewards
summary: Effective exploration in reinforcement learning requires not only tracking where an agent has been, but also understanding how the agent perceives and represents the world. To learn powerful representations, an agent should actively explore states that contribute to its knowledge of the environment. Temporal representations can capture the information necessary to solve a wide range of potential tasks while avoiding the computational cost associated with full state reconstruction. In this paper, we propose an exploration method that leverages temporal contrastive representations to guide exploration, prioritizing states with unpredictable future outcomes. We demonstrate that such representations can enable the learning of complex exploratory x in locomotion, manipulation, and embodied-AI tasks, revealing capabilities and behaviors that traditionally require extrinsic rewards. Unlike approaches that rely on explicit distance learning or episodic memory mechanisms (e.g., quasimetric-based methods), our method builds directly on temporal similarities, yielding a simpler yet effective strategy for exploration.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于时序对比表示的探索方法，通过优先探索未来结果不可预测的状态来引导强化学习智能体，无需外部奖励即可学习复杂技能。
AI.motivation: 强化学习中的有效探索不仅需要跟踪智能体去过的地方，还需要理解智能体如何感知和表示世界。为了学习强大的表示，智能体应主动探索那些有助于其了解环境的状态。时序表示可以捕获解决广泛潜在任务所需的信息，同时避免与完整状态重建相关的计算成本。
AI.method: 提出一种利用时序对比表示来引导探索的方法，优先考虑未来结果不可预测的状态。该方法基于时序相似性构建，而不是依赖显式距离学习或情景记忆机制（如基于拟度量的方法）。
AI.result: 该方法能够在运动、操作和具身AI任务中学习复杂的探索行为，展现出传统上需要外部奖励才能获得的能力和行为。相比基于拟度量等方法，该方法更简单但同样有效。
AI.conclusion: 时序对比表示提供了一种简单而有效的探索策略，能够引导智能体学习复杂技能而无需外部奖励，为强化学习的探索问题提供了新的解决方案。

title: CoSMo3D: Open-World Promptable 3D Semantic Part Segmentation through LLM-Guided Canonical Spatial Modeling
summary: Open-world promptable 3D semantic segmentation remains brittle as semantics are inferred in the input sensor coordinates. Yet, humans, in contrast, interpret parts via functional roles in a canonical space -- wings extend laterally, handles protrude to the side, and legs support from below. Psychophysical evidence shows that we mentally rotate objects into canonical frames to reveal these roles. To fill this gap, we propose \methodName{}, which attains canonical space perception by inducing a latent canonical reference frame learned directly from data. By construction, we create a unified canonical dataset through LLM-guided intra- and cross-category alignment, exposing canonical spatial regularities across 200 categories. By induction, we realize canonicality inside the model through a dual-branch architecture with canonical map anchoring and canonical box calibration, collapsing pose variation and symmetry into a stable canonical embedding. This shift from input pose space to canonical embedding yields far more stable and transferable part semantics. Experimental results show that \methodName{} establishes new state of the art in open-world promptable 3D segmentation.

AI.tldr: 提出CanonicalMap方法，通过从数据中学习潜在规范参考框架，实现3D语义分割中的规范空间感知，显著提升开放世界可提示3D分割性能。
AI.motivation: 当前开放世界可提示3D语义分割在输入传感器坐标系中推断语义较为脆弱，而人类通过功能角色在规范空间中解释物体部件。心理学证据表明人类通过心理旋转将物体转换到规范框架来揭示这些角色。
AI.method: 提出CanonicalMap方法：1）通过LLM引导的类别内和跨类别对齐创建统一的规范数据集；2）采用双分支架构，包含规范图锚定和规范框校准，将姿态变化和对称性折叠为稳定的规范嵌入。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在开放世界可提示3D分割中建立了新的最先进性能，从输入姿态空间到规范嵌入的转换产生了更稳定和可迁移的部件语义。
AI.conclusion: 通过诱导从数据中学习的潜在规范参考框架实现规范空间感知，显著提升了3D语义分割的稳定性和可迁移性，为开放世界可提示3D分割提供了新思路。

title: Noise-Calibrated Inference from Differentially Private Sufficient Statistics in Exponential Families
summary: Many differentially private (DP) data release systems either output DP synthetic data and leave analysts to perform inference as usual, which can lead to severe miscalibration, or output a DP point estimate without a principled way to do uncertainty quantification. This paper develops a clean and tractable middle ground for exponential families: release only DP sufficient statistics, then perform noise-calibrated likelihood-based inference and optional parametric synthetic data generation as post-processing. Our contributions are: (1) a general recipe for approximate-DP release of clipped sufficient statistics under the Gaussian mechanism; (2) asymptotic normality, explicit variance inflation, and valid Wald-style confidence intervals for the plug-in DP MLE; (3) a noise-aware likelihood correction that is first-order equivalent to the plug-in but supports bootstrap-based intervals; and (4) a matching minimax lower bound showing the privacy distortion rate is unavoidable. The resulting theory yields concrete design rules and a practical pipeline for releasing DP synthetic data with principled uncertainty quantification, validated on three exponential families and real census data.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种差分隐私数据发布的新方法：仅发布DP充分统计量，然后进行噪声校准的似然推断和可选的参数化合成数据生成。该方法在指数族分布中提供了原则性的不确定性量化，避免了现有方法的缺陷。
AI.motivation: 现有差分隐私数据发布系统存在两个极端：要么输出DP合成数据但导致推断严重失准，要么输出DP点估计但缺乏原则性的不确定性量化方法。需要一种既能保护隐私又能提供可靠统计推断的中间方案。
AI.method: 1) 提出高斯机制下截断充分统计量的近似DP发布通用方法；2) 推导DP MLE的渐近正态性、显式方差膨胀和有效的Wald置信区间；3) 提出噪声感知似然校正方法，支持基于bootstrap的区间估计；4) 证明匹配的极小极大下界，显示隐私失真率不可避免。
AI.result: 理论结果产生了具体的设计规则和实用流程，用于发布具有原则性不确定性量化的DP合成数据。在三个指数族分布和真实人口普查数据上验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为指数族分布提供了一种干净、可处理的中间方案：仅发布DP充分统计量，然后进行噪声校准的似然推断和可选的参数化合成数据生成，实现了隐私保护与统计推断质量的平衡。

title: Multi-Condition Digital Twin Calibration for Axial Piston Pumps : Compound Fault Simulation
summary: Axial piston pumps are indispensable power sources in high-stakes fluid power systems, including aerospace, marine, and heavy machinery applications. Their operational reliability is frequently compromised by compound faults that simultaneously affect multiple friction pairs. Conventional data-driven diagnosis methods suffer from severe data scarcity for compound faults and poor generalization across varying operating conditions. This paper proposes a novel multi-condition physics-data coupled digital twin calibration framework that explicitly resolves the fundamental uncertainty of pump outlet flow ripple. The framework comprises three synergistic stages: in-situ virtual high-frequency flow sensing on a dedicated rigid metallic segment, surrogate model-assisted calibration of the 3D CFD source model using physically estimated ripple amplitudes, and multi-objective inverse transient analysis for viscoelastic unsteady-friction pipeline parameter identification. Comprehensive experiments on a test rig demonstrate that the calibrated digital twin accurately reproduces both single-fault and two representative compound-fault. These results establish a high-fidelity synthetic fault-generation capability that directly enables robust zero-shot fault diagnosis under previously unseen operating regimes and fault combinations, thereby advancing predictive maintenance in complex hydraulic systems.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种用于轴向柱塞泵复合故障诊断的多条件物理-数据耦合数字孪生校准框架，通过解决泵出口流量脉动的不确定性，实现零样本故障诊断。
AI.motivation: 轴向柱塞泵在航空航天、海洋工程等关键流体动力系统中至关重要，但复合故障同时影响多个摩擦副，传统数据驱动方法面临数据稀缺和跨工况泛化能力差的问题。
AI.method: 提出三阶段框架：1) 在刚性金属段上进行原位虚拟高频流量传感；2) 使用物理估计脉动幅度的代理模型辅助校准3D CFD源模型；3) 多目标逆瞬态分析识别粘弹性非定常摩擦管道参数。
AI.result: 实验证明校准后的数字孪生能准确复现单故障和两种代表性复合故障，建立了高保真合成故障生成能力，实现了在未见工况和故障组合下的鲁棒零样本故障诊断。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为复杂液压系统的预测性维护提供了有效解决方案，通过物理-数据耦合方法解决了传统数据驱动方法的局限性。

title: Monocular 3D Object Position Estimation with VLMs for Human-Robot Interaction
comment: Accepted at Workshop on Integrating Image Processing with Large-Scale Language/Vision Models for Advanced Visual Understanding (LVLM) at IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP) 2025
summary: Pre-trained general-purpose Vision-Language Models (VLM) hold the potential to enhance intuitive human-machine interactions due to their rich world knowledge and 2D object detection capabilities. However, VLMs for 3D coordinates detection tasks are rare. In this work, we investigate interactive abilities of VLMs by returning 3D object positions given a monocular RGB image from a wrist-mounted camera, natural language input, and robot states. We collected and curated a heterogeneous dataset of more than 100,000 images and finetuned a VLM using QLoRA with a custom regression head. By implementing conditional routing, our model maintains its ability to process general visual queries while adding specialized 3D position estimation capabilities. Our results demonstrate robust predictive performance with a median MAE of 13 mm on the test set and a five-fold improvement over a simpler baseline without finetuning. In about 25% of the cases, predictions are within a range considered acceptable for the robot to interact with objects.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于视觉语言模型（VLM）的3D坐标检测方法，通过微调使VLM能够从单目RGB图像、自然语言输入和机器人状态中估计3D物体位置，实现了在保持通用视觉查询能力的同时增强3D定位功能。
AI.motivation: 虽然预训练的通用视觉语言模型（VLM）具有丰富的世界知识和2D物体检测能力，但缺乏3D坐标检测功能。作者希望探索VLM在交互能力方面的潜力，特别是从腕戴相机图像、自然语言输入和机器人状态中返回3D物体位置的能力。
AI.method: 作者收集并整理了一个包含10万多张图像的异构数据集，使用QLoRA微调VLM，并添加自定义回归头。通过实现条件路由机制，模型在保持处理通用视觉查询能力的同时，增加了专门的3D位置估计功能。
AI.result: 模型在测试集上表现出稳健的预测性能，中位数MAE为13毫米，比未微调的简单基线提高了五倍。在约25%的情况下，预测结果在机器人可与物体交互的可接受范围内。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，通过适当的微调和架构设计，视觉语言模型可以扩展其能力，从单纯的2D视觉理解扩展到3D空间定位，为更直观的人机交互提供了可能性。

title: CausalWrap: Model-Agnostic Causal Constraint Wrappers for Tabular Synthetic Data
summary: Tabular synthetic data generators are typically trained to match observational distributions, which can yield high conventional utility (e.g., column correlations, predictive accuracy) yet poor preservation of structural relations relevant to causal analysis and out-of-distribution (OOD) reasoning. When the downstream use of synthetic data involves causal reasoning -- estimating treatment effects, evaluating policies, or testing mediation pathways -- merely matching the observational distribution is insufficient: structural fidelity and treatment-mechanism preservation become essential. We propose CausalWrap (CW), a model-agnostic wrapper that injects partial causal knowledge (PCK) -- trusted edges, forbidden edges, and qualitative/monotonic constraints -- into any pretrained base generator (GAN, VAE, or diffusion model), without requiring access to its internals. CW learns a lightweight, differentiable post-hoc correction map applied to samples from the base generator, optimized with causal penalty terms under an augmented-Lagrangian schedule. We provide theoretical results connecting penalty-based optimization to constraint satisfaction and relating approximate factorization to joint distributional control. We validate CW on simulated structural causal models (SCMs) with known ground-truth interventions, semi-synthetic causal benchmarks (IHDP and an ACIC-style suite), and a real-world ICU cohort (MIMIC-IV) with expert-elicited partial graphs. CW improves causal fidelity across diverse base generators -- e.g., reducing average treatment effect (ATE) error by up to 63% on ACIC and lifting ATE agreement from 0.00 to 0.38 on the intensive care unit (ICU) cohort -- while largely retaining conventional utility.

AI.tldr: CausalWrap (CW) 是一个模型无关的包装器，通过注入部分因果知识来提升表格合成数据生成器的因果保真度，同时保持传统效用。
AI.motivation: 传统的表格合成数据生成器通常只匹配观测分布，虽然能获得较高的传统效用（如列相关性、预测准确性），但在因果分析和分布外推理相关的结构关系保持方面表现不佳。当下游应用涉及因果推理（如估计处理效应、评估政策、测试中介路径）时，仅仅匹配观测分布是不够的，需要结构保真度和处理机制保持。
AI.method: CausalWrap (CW) 是一个模型无关的包装器，可以向任何预训练的基础生成器（GAN、VAE或扩散模型）注入部分因果知识（PCK），包括可信边、禁止边和定性/单调约束，无需访问其内部结构。CW学习一个轻量级的、可微分的后处理校正映射，应用于基础生成器的样本，通过增强拉格朗日调度下的因果惩罚项进行优化。
AI.result: 在模拟结构因果模型（SCMs）、半合成因果基准（IHDP和ACIC风格套件）以及具有专家启发部分图的真实世界ICU队列（MIMIC-IV）上验证。CW显著提升了各种基础生成器的因果保真度：在ACIC上平均处理效应（ATE）误差降低高达63%，在ICU队列上ATE一致性从0.00提升到0.38，同时基本保持了传统效用。
AI.conclusion: CausalWrap 提供了一种实用的方法来增强合成数据生成器的因果保真度，通过注入部分因果知识而不需要重新训练基础模型，为因果推理应用提供了更可靠的合成数据。

title: LiaisonAgent: An Multi-Agent Framework for Autonomous Risk Investigation and Governance
summary: The rapid evolution of sophisticated cyberattacks has strained modern Security Operations Centers (SOC), which traditionally rely on rule-based or signature-driven detection systems. These legacy frameworks often generate high volumes of technical alerts that lack organizational context, leading to analyst fatigue and delayed incident responses. This paper presents LiaisonAgent, an autonomous multi-agent system designed to bridge the gap between technical risk detection and business-level risk governance. Built upon the QWQ-32B large reasoning model, LiaisonAgent integrates specialized sub-agents, including human-computer interaction agents, comprehensive judgment agents, and automated disposal agents-to execute end-to-end investigation workflows. The system leverages a hybrid planning architecture that combines deterministic workflows for compliance with autonomous reasoning based on the ReAct paradigm to handle ambiguous operational scenarios. Experimental evaluations across diverse security contexts, such as large-scale data exfiltration and unauthorized account borrowing, achieve an end-to-end tool-calling success rate of 97.8% and a risk judgment accuracy of 95%. Furthermore, the system exhibits significant resilience against out-of-distribution noise and adversarial prompt injections, while achieving a 92.7% reduction in manual investigation overhead.

AI.tldr: LiaisonAgent是一个基于QWQ-32B大语言模型的多智能体系统，用于自动化安全运营中心(SOC)的端到端调查工作流，将技术风险检测与业务级风险治理相连接。
AI.motivation: 传统SOC依赖基于规则或签名的检测系统，产生大量缺乏组织上下文的技术警报，导致分析师疲劳和事件响应延迟。需要将技术风险检测与业务级风险治理相连接。
AI.method: 基于QWQ-32B大推理模型构建多智能体系统，包含人机交互代理、综合判断代理和自动处置代理。采用混合规划架构，结合确定性工作流和基于ReAct范式的自主推理。
AI.result: 端到端工具调用成功率97.8%，风险判断准确率95%，对分布外噪声和对抗性提示注入具有显著韧性，手动调查开销减少92.7%。
AI.conclusion: LiaisonAgent能够有效自动化SOC调查工作流，在保持高准确性的同时显著减少人工干预，为技术风险检测与业务治理的整合提供了可行方案。

title: Towards Policy-Adaptive Image Guardrail: Benchmark and Method
summary: Accurate rejection of sensitive or harmful visual content, i.e., harmful image guardrail, is critical in many application scenarios. This task must continuously adapt to the evolving safety policies and content across various domains and over time. However, traditional classifiers, confined to fixed categories, require frequent retraining when new policies are introduced. Vision-language models (VLMs) offer a more adaptable and generalizable foundation for dynamic safety guardrails. Despite this potential, existing VLM-based safeguarding methods are typically trained and evaluated under only a fixed safety policy. We find that these models are heavily overfitted to the seen policy, fail to generalize to unseen policies, and even lose the basic instruction-following ability and general knowledge. To address this issue, in this paper we make two key contributions. First, we benchmark the cross-policy generalization performance of existing VLMs with SafeEditBench, a new evaluation suite. SafeEditBench leverages image-editing models to convert unsafe images into safe counterparts, producing policy-aligned datasets where each safe-unsafe image pair remains visually similar except for localized regions violating specific safety rules. Human annotators then provide accurate safe/unsafe labels under five distinct policies, enabling fine-grained assessment of policy-aware generalization. Second, we introduce SafeGuard-VL, a reinforcement learning-based method with verifiable rewards (RLVR) for robust unsafe-image guardrails. Instead of relying solely on supervised fine-tuning (SFT) under fixed policies, SafeGuard-VL explicitly optimizes the model with policy-grounded rewards, promoting verifiable adaptation across evolving policies. Extensive experiments verify the effectiveness of our method for unsafe image guardrails across various policies.

AI.tldr: 提出SafeEditBench基准和SafeGuard-VL方法，解决视觉语言模型在有害图像防护中跨政策泛化能力不足的问题，通过强化学习实现可验证的跨政策适应。
AI.motivation: 传统有害图像防护分类器局限于固定类别，难以适应不断演化的安全政策。现有VLM方法通常在单一固定政策下训练评估，存在过拟合问题，无法泛化到未见政策，甚至丧失基本指令遵循能力和常识知识。
AI.method: 1) 提出SafeEditBench评估套件：利用图像编辑模型将不安全图像转换为安全对应物，创建政策对齐数据集，每对图像视觉相似但包含违反特定安全规则的局部区域，人工标注五种不同政策下的安全/不安全标签；2) 提出SafeGuard-VL方法：基于强化学习与可验证奖励（RLVR），通过政策基础奖励显式优化模型，而非仅依赖固定政策下的监督微调。
AI.result: 实验验证了SafeGuard-VL方法在各种政策下对不安全图像防护的有效性，解决了现有VLM方法跨政策泛化能力不足的问题。
AI.conclusion: SafeEditBench为评估政策感知泛化能力提供了细粒度基准，SafeGuard-VL通过强化学习与可验证奖励实现了对演化政策的稳健适应，为动态安全防护提供了有效解决方案。

title: Revealing Combinatorial Reasoning of GNNs via Graph Concept Bottleneck Layer
summary: Despite their success in various domains, the growing dependence on GNNs raises a critical concern about the nature of the combinatorial reasoning underlying their predictions, which is often hidden within their black-box architectures. Addressing this challenge requires understanding how GNNs translate topological patterns into logical rules. However, current works only uncover the hard logical rules over graph concepts, which cannot quantify the contribution of each concept to prediction. Moreover, they are post-hoc interpretable methods that generate explanations after model training and may not accurately reflect the true combinatorial reasoning of GNNs, since they approximate it with a surrogate. In this work, we develop a graph concept bottleneck layer that can be integrated into any GNN architectures to guide them to predict the selected discriminative global graph concepts. The predicted concept scores are further projected to class labels by a sparse linear layer. It enforces the combinatorial reasoning of GNNs' predictions to fit the soft logical rule over graph concepts and thus can quantify the contribution of each concept. To further improve the quality of the concept bottleneck, we treat concepts as "graph words" and graphs as "graph sentences", and leverage language models to learn graph concept embeddings. Extensive experiments on multiple datasets show that our method GCBMs achieve state-of-the-art performance both in classification and interpretability.

AI.tldr: GCBMs提出了一种图概念瓶颈层，通过将图视为"图句子"、概念视为"图单词"，利用语言模型学习图概念嵌入，强制GNN预测遵循软逻辑规则，实现可量化的组合推理解释。
AI.motivation: 当前GNN解释方法存在两个主要问题：1) 只能揭示硬逻辑规则，无法量化每个概念对预测的贡献；2) 是后验解释方法，使用代理模型近似，可能无法准确反映GNN的真实组合推理过程。
AI.method: 提出图概念瓶颈层，可集成到任何GNN架构中，引导模型预测选定的判别性全局图概念。预测的概念分数通过稀疏线性层映射到类别标签，强制GNN预测遵循图概念的软逻辑规则。将概念视为"图单词"、图视为"图句子"，利用语言模型学习图概念嵌入。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上的实验表明，GCBMs在分类性能和可解释性方面都达到了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: GCBMs通过图概念瓶颈层和语言模型驱动的概念嵌入学习，实现了GNN组合推理的可量化解释，同时保持了优异的分类性能。

title: AgilePruner: An Empirical Study of Attention and Diversity for Adaptive Visual Token Pruning in Large Vision-Language Models
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have adopted visual token pruning strategies to mitigate substantial computational overhead incurred by extensive visual token sequences. While prior works primarily focus on either attention-based or diversity-based pruning methods, in-depth analysis of these approaches' characteristics and limitations remains largely unexplored. In this work, we conduct thorough empirical analysis using effective rank (erank) as a measure of feature diversity and attention score entropy to investigate visual token processing mechanisms and analyze the strengths and weaknesses of each approach. Our analysis reveals two insights: (1) Our erank-based quantitative analysis shows that many diversity-oriented pruning methods preserve substantially less feature diversity than intended; moreover, analysis using the CHAIR dataset reveals that the diversity they do retain is closely tied to increased hallucination frequency compared to attention-based pruning. (2) We further observe that attention-based approaches are more effective on simple images where visual evidence is concentrated, while diversity-based methods better handle complex images with distributed features. Building on these empirical insights, we show that incorporating image-aware adjustments into existing hybrid pruning strategies consistently improves their performance. We also provide a minimal instantiation of our empirical findings through a simple adaptive pruning mechanism, which achieves strong and reliable performance across standard benchmarks as well as hallucination-specific evaluations. Our project page available at https://cvsp-lab.github.io/AgilePruner.

AI.tldr: 本文对视觉语言模型中的视觉token剪枝策略进行深入分析，发现注意力剪枝和多样性剪枝各有优劣，并提出自适应剪枝机制提升性能
AI.motivation: 大型视觉语言模型面临大量视觉token带来的计算开销问题，现有剪枝方法主要关注注意力或多样性，但缺乏对这些方法特性与局限性的深入分析
AI.method: 使用有效秩(e-rank)衡量特征多样性，结合注意力分数熵分析视觉token处理机制；通过CHAIR数据集分析幻觉频率；提出图像感知调整和自适应剪枝机制
AI.result: 1) 多样性剪枝方法保留的特征多样性低于预期，且保留的多样性与幻觉频率增加相关；2) 注意力剪枝在简单图像上更有效，多样性剪枝在复杂图像上表现更好；3) 自适应剪枝机制在标准基准和幻觉评估中表现稳定可靠
AI.conclusion: 通过深入分析视觉token剪枝机制，揭示了不同方法的特性与局限性，提出的自适应剪枝策略能有效平衡计算效率与模型性能

title: Latent attention on masked patches for flow reconstruction
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures, submitted to ICCS (International Conference on Computational Science) 2026
summary: Vision transformers have demonstrated outstanding performance on image generation applications, but their adoption in scientific disciplines, like fluid dynamics, has been limited. We introduce the Latent Attention on Masked Patches (LAMP) model, an interpretable regression-based modified vision transformer designed for masked flow reconstruction. LAMP follows a three-fold strategy: (i) partition of each flow snapshot into patches, (ii) dimensionality reduction of each patch via patch-wise proper orthogonal decomposition, and (iii) reconstruction of the full field from a masked input using a single-layer transformer trained via closed-form linear regression. We test the method on two canonical 2D unsteady wakes: a wake past a bluff body, and a chaotic wake past a flat plate. We show that the LAMP accurately reconstructs the full flow field from a 90\%-masked and noisy input, across signal-to-noise ratios between 10 and 30\,dB. Incorporating nonlinear measurement states can reduce the prediction error by up to an order of magnitude. The learned attention matrix yields physically interpretable multi-fidelity optimal sensor-placement maps. The modularity of the framework enables nonlinear compression and deep attention blocks, thereby providing an efficient baseline for nonlinear and high-dimensional masked flow reconstruction.

AI.tldr: LAMP是一种基于视觉Transformer的掩码流场重建模型，通过补丁分割、POD降维和单层Transformer回归实现高精度重建，在90%掩码和噪声条件下仍能准确恢复流场。
AI.motivation: 视觉Transformer在图像生成中表现出色，但在流体动力学等科学领域的应用有限。需要开发一种可解释的回归模型来处理掩码流场重建问题，特别是在高噪声条件下的鲁棒重建。
AI.method: LAMP采用三阶段策略：1) 将流场快照分割为补丁；2) 通过补丁级POD进行降维；3) 使用单层Transformer通过闭式线性回归从掩码输入重建全场。支持非线性测量状态和深度注意力模块。
AI.result: 在两种2D非定常尾流（钝体尾流和平板混沌尾流）上测试，LAMP能在90%掩码和10-30dB信噪比噪声条件下准确重建流场。非线性测量状态可将预测误差降低一个数量级，注意力矩阵可生成物理可解释的多保真度最优传感器布置图。
AI.conclusion: LAMP为非线性高维掩码流场重建提供了高效基准，其模块化框架支持非线性压缩和深度注意力块，在科学应用中具有良好可解释性和物理意义。

title: Efficient Flow Matching for Sparse-View CT Reconstruction
summary: Generative models, particularly Diffusion Models (DM), have shown strong potential for Computed Tomography (CT) reconstruction serving as expressive priors for solving ill-posed inverse problems. However, diffusion-based reconstruction relies on Stochastic Differential Equations (SDEs) for forward diffusion and reverse denoising, where such stochasticity can interfere with repeated data consistency corrections in CT reconstruction. Since CT reconstruction is often time-critical in clinical and interventional scenarios, improving reconstruction efficiency is essential. In contrast, Flow Matching (FM) models sampling as a deterministic Ordinary Differential Equation (ODE), yielding smooth trajectories without stochastic noise injection. This deterministic formulation is naturally compatible with repeated data consistency operations. Furthermore, we observe that FM-predicted velocity fields exhibit strong correlations across adjacent steps. Motivated by this, we propose an FM-based CT reconstruction framework (FMCT) and an efficient variant (EFMCT) that reuses previously predicted velocity fields over consecutive steps to substantially reduce the number of Neural network Function Evaluations (NFEs), thereby improving inference efficiency. We provide theoretical analysis showing that the error introduced by velocity reuse is bounded when combined with data consistency operations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FMCT/EFMCT achieve competitive reconstruction quality while significantly improving computational efficiency compared with diffusion-based methods. The codebase is open-sourced at https://github.com/EFMCT/EFMCT.

AI.tldr: 提出FMCT和EFMCT框架，基于Flow Matching进行CT重建，通过重用速度场减少神经网络评估次数，提高计算效率
AI.motivation: 扩散模型在CT重建中作为先验表现良好，但随机性会干扰数据一致性校正，且CT重建常需快速响应；Flow Matching的确定性ODE公式更适合重复数据一致性操作
AI.method: 提出FMCT框架，基于Flow Matching进行CT重建；进一步提出EFMCT，重用相邻步骤预测的速度场，显著减少神经网络评估次数
AI.result: FMCT/EFMCT在保持竞争力的重建质量的同时，相比基于扩散的方法显著提高了计算效率；理论分析表明速度场重用引入的误差在数据一致性操作下是有界的
AI.conclusion: Flow Matching为CT重建提供了更高效的确定性框架，速度场重用策略进一步提升了推理效率，适合临床和介入场景的时间关键性要求

title: The MAMA-MIA Challenge: Advancing Generalizability and Fairness in Breast MRI Tumor Segmentation and Treatment Response Prediction
summary: Breast cancer is the most frequently diagnosed malignancy among women worldwide and a leading cause of cancer-related mortality. Dynamic contrast-enhanced magnetic resonance imaging plays a central role in tumor characterization and treatment monitoring, particularly in patients receiving neoadjuvant chemotherapy. However, existing artificial intelligence models for breast magnetic resonance imaging are often developed using single-center data and evaluated using aggregate performance metrics, limiting their generalizability and obscuring potential performance disparities across demographic subgroups. The MAMA-MIA Challenge was designed to address these limitations by introducing a large-scale benchmark that jointly evaluates primary tumor segmentation and prediction of pathologic complete response using pre-treatment magnetic resonance imaging only. The training cohort comprised 1,506 patients from multiple institutions in the United States, while evaluation was conducted on an external test set of 574 patients from three independent European centers to assess cross-continental and cross-institutional generalization. A unified scoring framework combined predictive performance with subgroup consistency across age, menopausal status, and breast density. Twenty-six international teams participated in the final evaluation phase. Results demonstrate substantial performance variability under external testing and reveal trade-offs between overall accuracy and subgroup fairness. The challenge provides standardized datasets, evaluation protocols, and public resources to promote the development of robust and equitable artificial intelligence systems for breast cancer imaging.

AI.tldr: MAMA-MIA挑战赛是一个大规模基准测试，用于评估乳腺癌MRI的肿瘤分割和病理完全缓解预测，重点关注跨机构泛化性和亚组公平性。
AI.motivation: 现有乳腺癌MRI人工智能模型通常基于单中心数据开发，使用聚合性能指标评估，限制了其泛化能力，并掩盖了不同人口亚组间的性能差异。
AI.method: 设计了一个大规模基准测试，联合评估原发性肿瘤分割和仅使用治疗前MRI预测病理完全缓解。训练队列包含来自美国多个机构的1,506名患者，在来自三个独立欧洲中心的574名患者的外部测试集上进行评估，以评估跨大陆和跨机构泛化。统一评分框架结合了预测性能和跨年龄、绝经状态和乳腺密度的亚组一致性。
AI.result: 26个国际团队参与了最终评估阶段。结果显示在外部测试下存在显著的性能变异性，并揭示了整体准确性与亚组公平性之间的权衡。
AI.conclusion: 该挑战赛提供了标准化数据集、评估协议和公共资源，以促进开发稳健且公平的乳腺癌影像人工智能系统。

title: Leave-One-Out Prediction for General Hypothesis Classes
summary:
Leave-one-out (LOO) prediction provides a principled, data-dependent measure of generalization, yet guarantees in fully transductive settings remain poorly understood beyond specialized models. We introduce Median of Level-Set Aggregation (MLSA), a general aggregation procedure based on empirical-risk level sets around the ERM. For arbitrary fixed datasets and losses satisfying a mild monotonicity condition, we establish a multiplicative oracle inequality for the LOO error of the form \[ LOO_S(\hat{h}) \;\le\; C \cdot \frac{1}{n} \min_{h\in H} L_S(h) \;+\; \frac{Comp(S,H,\ell)}{n}, \qquad C>1. \]
  The analysis is based on a local level-set growth condition controlling how the set of near-optimal empirical-risk minimizers expands as the tolerance increases. We verify this condition in several canonical settings. For classification with VC classes under the 0-1 loss, the resulting complexity scales as $O(d \log n)$, where $d$ is the VC dimension. For finite hypothesis and density classes under bounded or log loss, it scales as $O(\log |H|)$ and $O(\log |P|)$, respectively. For logistic regression with bounded covariates and parameters, a volumetric argument based on the empirical covariance matrix yields complexity scaling as $O(d \log n)$ up to problem-dependent factors.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种称为"中位数水平集聚合"（MLSA）的新方法，用于分析留一法预测的泛化性能，在任意固定数据集和满足单调性条件的损失函数下，建立了留一法误差的乘法oracle不等式。
AI.motivation: 留一法预测提供了原则性的、数据依赖的泛化度量，但在完全转导设置下的理论保证仍然不够充分，特别是对于通用模型。现有研究主要局限于特定模型，需要更通用的理论框架来分析留一法预测的泛化性能。
AI.method: 提出中位数水平集聚合（MLSA）方法，基于经验风险水平集围绕经验风险最小化器进行聚合。分析基于局部水平集增长条件，控制近最优经验风险最小化器集合随容差增加而扩展的方式。验证了该方法在多个经典设置中的适用性。
AI.result: 建立了留一法误差的乘法oracle不等式：LOO_S(ĥ) ≤ C·(1/n)min_{h∈H}L_S(h) + Comp(S,H,ℓ)/n，其中C>1。在VC类分类问题中复杂度为O(d log n)，有限假设类和密度类中为O(log|H|)和O(log|P|)，逻辑回归中为O(d log n)。
AI.conclusion: MLSA为留一法预测提供了通用的理论框架，在多种经典机器学习设置中建立了可证明的泛化保证，填补了完全转导设置下留一法理论分析的空白。

title: Cross-Modal Guidance for Fast Diffusion-Based Computed Tomography
comment: Accepted at the IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing (ICASSP) 2026
summary: Diffusion models have emerged as powerful priors for solving inverse problems in computed tomography (CT). In certain applications, such as neutron CT, it can be expensive to collect large amounts of measurements even for a single scan, leading to sparse data sets from which it is challenging to obtain high quality reconstructions even with diffusion models. One strategy to mitigate this challenge is to leverage a complementary, easily available imaging modality; however, such approaches typically require retraining the diffusion model with large datasets. In this work, we propose incorporating an additional modality without retraining the diffusion prior, enabling accelerated imaging of costly modalities. We further examine the impact of imperfect side modalities on cross-modal guidance. Our method is evaluated on sparse-view neutron computed tomography, where reconstruction quality is substantially improved by incorporating X-ray computed tomography of the same samples.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种无需重新训练扩散先验的跨模态引导方法，用于改进稀疏数据CT重建，通过结合X射线CT来增强中子CT重建质量
AI.motivation: 在CT成像中，某些昂贵模态（如中子CT）难以收集大量测量数据，导致稀疏数据集难以获得高质量重建。传统方法需要重新训练扩散模型，成本高昂。需要一种无需重新训练就能利用互补模态的方法。
AI.method: 提出跨模态引导方法，在不重新训练扩散先验的情况下，将易获取的互补成像模态（如X射线CT）信息整合到重建过程中。该方法通过引导扩散过程，利用辅助模态的结构信息来增强主模态的重建质量。
AI.result: 在稀疏视图中子CT实验中，通过结合相同样本的X射线CT，重建质量得到显著改善。方法能够有效处理不完美的辅助模态，展示了跨模态引导的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法提供了一种高效利用互补成像模态的途径，无需重新训练扩散模型，为昂贵成像模态的加速成像提供了可行方案，特别是在数据稀疏场景下具有重要应用价值。

title: Expanding LLM Agent Boundaries with Strategy-Guided Exploration
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) has demonstrated notable success in post-training large language models (LLMs) as agents for tasks such as computer use, tool calling, and coding. However, exploration remains a central challenge in RL for LLM agents, especially as they operate in language-action spaces with complex observations and sparse outcome rewards. In this work, we address exploration for LLM agents by leveraging the ability of LLMs to plan and reason in language about the environment to shift exploration from low-level actions to higher-level language strategies. We thus propose Strategy-Guided Exploration (SGE), which first generates a concise natural-language strategy that describes what to do to make progress toward the goal, and then generates environment actions conditioned on that strategy. By exploring in the space of strategies rather than the space of actions, SGE induces structured and diverse exploration that targets different environment outcomes. To increase strategy diversity during RL, SGE introduces mixed-temperature sampling, which explores diverse strategies in parallel, along with a strategy reflection process that grounds strategy generation on the outcomes of previous strategies in the environment. Across UI interaction, tool-calling, coding, and embodied agent environments, SGE consistently outperforms exploration-focused RL baselines, improving both learning efficiency and final performance. We show that SGE enables the agent to learn to solve tasks too difficult for the base model.

AI.tldr: 提出SGE方法，通过让LLM生成高层次语言策略来指导探索，在策略空间而非动作空间进行探索，提升RL在LLM智能体中的效果
AI.motivation: RL在LLM智能体训练中面临探索挑战，特别是在语言-动作空间中，观测复杂且奖励稀疏。传统RL在低层动作空间的探索效率低下，需要更结构化的探索方法
AI.method: SGE方法：1) 生成简洁的自然语言策略描述如何达成目标；2) 基于策略生成环境动作；3) 混合温度采样并行探索多样化策略；4) 策略反思过程基于先前策略结果进行策略生成
AI.result: 在UI交互、工具调用、编程和具身智能体环境中，SGE始终优于探索导向的RL基线方法，提高了学习效率和最终性能，使智能体能够解决基础模型无法完成的任务
AI.conclusion: 通过将探索从低层动作空间转移到高层语言策略空间，SGE实现了结构化且多样化的探索，有效解决了LLM智能体RL中的探索挑战

title: FoSS: Modeling Long Range Dependencies and Multimodal Uncertainty in Trajectory Prediction via Fourier State Space Integration
summary: Accurate trajectory prediction is vital for safe autonomous driving, yet existing approaches struggle to balance modeling power and computational efficiency. Attention-based architectures incur quadratic complexity with increasing agents, while recurrent models struggle to capture long-range dependencies and fine-grained local dynamics. Building upon this, we present FoSS, a dual-branch framework that unifies frequency-domain reasoning with linear-time sequence modeling. The frequency-domain branch performs a discrete Fourier transform to decompose trajectories into amplitude components encoding global intent and phase components capturing local variations, followed by a progressive helix reordering module that preserves spectral order; two selective state-space submodules, Coarse2Fine-SSM and SpecEvolve-SSM, refine spectral features with O(N) complexity. In parallel, a time-domain dynamic selective SSM reconstructs self-attention behavior in linear time to retain long-range temporal context. A cross-attention layer fuses temporal and spectral representations, while learnable queries generate multiple candidate trajectories, and a weighted fusion head expresses motion uncertainty. Experiments on Argoverse 1 and Argoverse 2 benchmarks demonstrate that FoSS achieves state-of-the-art accuracy while reducing computation by 22.5% and parameters by over 40%. Comprehensive ablations confirm the necessity of each component.

AI.tldr: FoSS是一个用于自动驾驶轨迹预测的双分支框架，结合频域推理和线性时间序列建模，在保持高精度的同时显著降低计算和参数需求。
AI.motivation: 现有轨迹预测方法难以平衡建模能力和计算效率：基于注意力的架构具有二次复杂度，而循环模型难以捕捉长距离依赖和细粒度局部动态。
AI.method: 提出双分支框架：1) 频域分支通过离散傅里叶变换将轨迹分解为振幅（全局意图）和相位（局部变化），使用渐进螺旋重排序模块保持谱序，通过两个选择性状态空间子模块（Coarse2Fine-SSM和SpecEvolve-SSM）以O(N)复杂度细化谱特征；2) 时域动态选择性SSM以线性时间重建自注意力行为保留长距离时间上下文；通过交叉注意力层融合时空表示，可学习查询生成多个候选轨迹，加权融合头表达运动不确定性。
AI.result: 在Argoverse 1和Argoverse 2基准测试中达到最先进精度，同时减少22.5%的计算量和超过40%的参数。
AI.conclusion: FoSS通过统一频域推理和线性时间序列建模，实现了轨迹预测中建模能力与计算效率的良好平衡，为自动驾驶系统提供了高效准确的预测解决方案。

title: Strategic Advice in the Age of Personal AI
summary: Personal AI assistants have changed how people use institutional and professional advice. We study this new strategic setting in which individuals may stochastically consult a personal AI whose recommendation is predictable to the focal advisor. Personal AI enters this strategic environment along two dimensions: how often it is consulted and how much weight it receives in the human's decision when consulted. Anticipating this, the advisor responds by counteracting the personal AI recommendation. Counteraction becomes more aggressive as personal AI is consulted more often. Yet advisor performance is non-monotone: equilibrium loss is highest at intermediate levels of adoption and vanishes when personal AI is never used or always used. Trust affects performance through a single relative influence index, and greater relative influence of personal AI increases advisor vulnerability. Extending the framework to costly credibility building, we characterize how personal AI adoption reshapes incentives to invest in trust.

AI.tldr: 研究个人AI助手如何改变战略咨询环境，分析AI使用频率和权重对专业顾问行为的影响，发现顾问会对抗AI建议，且顾问表现呈非单调性变化
AI.motivation: 个人AI助手正在改变人们获取机构专业建议的方式，需要研究这种新的战略环境，其中个人可能随机咨询可预测的AI，而专业顾问会对此做出战略反应
AI.method: 建立战略博弈模型，分析个人AI的两个维度（咨询频率和决策权重），研究顾问如何对抗AI建议，并扩展到成本可信度建设框架
AI.result: 顾问会对抗AI建议，对抗程度随AI使用频率增加而增强；顾问表现呈非单调性，中等采纳水平时损失最大；信任通过相对影响力指数影响表现；AI相对影响力增加会提高顾问脆弱性
AI.conclusion: 个人AI采纳重塑了信任投资激励，AI相对影响力是关键因素，顾问在中等采纳水平时面临最大挑战，完全采纳或完全不采纳时问题消失

title: Universal NP-Hardness of Clustering under General Utilities
summary: Clustering is a central primitive in unsupervised learning, yet practice is dominated by heuristics whose outputs can be unstable and highly sensitive to representations, hyperparameters, and initialisation. Existing theoretical results are largely objective-specific and do not explain these behaviours at a unifying level. We formalise the common optimisation core underlying diverse clustering paradigms by defining the Universal Clustering Problem (UCP): the maximisation of a polynomial-time computable partition utility over a finite metric space. We prove the NP-hardness of UCP via two independent polynomial-time reductions from graph colouring and from exact cover by 3-sets (X3C). By mapping ten major paradigms -- including k-means, GMMs, DBSCAN, spectral clustering, and affinity propagation -- to the UCP framework, we demonstrate that each inherits this fundamental intractability. Our results provide a unified explanation for characteristic failure modes, such as local optima in alternating methods and greedy merge-order traps in hierarchical clustering. Finally, we show that clustering limitations reflect interacting computational and epistemic constraints, motivating a shift toward stability-aware objectives and interaction-driven formulations with explicit guarantees.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了通用聚类问题(UCP)框架，统一了多种聚类范式，证明了其NP难性，并解释了实际聚类算法中的常见失败模式。
AI.motivation: 当前聚类实践主要依赖启发式方法，这些方法输出不稳定且对表示、超参数和初始化高度敏感。现有理论结果大多是目标特定的，缺乏统一的理论解释这些行为。
AI.method: 定义通用聚类问题(UCP)：在有限度量空间上最大化多项式时间可计算的分区效用函数。通过从图着色和精确3集合覆盖(X3C)的两个独立多项式时间归约证明UCP的NP难性。将k-means、GMMs、DBSCAN、谱聚类、亲和传播等10种主要聚类范式映射到UCP框架。
AI.result: 证明了UCP是NP难问题，因此所有映射到该框架的聚类范式都继承了这种基本难解性。为交替方法中的局部最优和层次聚类中的贪婪合并顺序陷阱等特征性失败模式提供了统一解释。
AI.conclusion: 聚类局限性反映了计算和认知约束的相互作用，需要转向具有稳定性感知的目标和具有明确保证的交互驱动公式。

title: Multi-Level Bidirectional Decoder Interaction for Uncertainty-Aware Breast Ultrasound Analysis
comment: 10 pages, 3 figures, 2 tables. The code is available at: https://github.com/C-loud-Nine/Uncertainty-Aware-Multi-Level-Decoder-Interaction
summary: Breast ultrasound interpretation requires simultaneous lesion segmentation and tissue classification. However, conventional multi-task learning approaches suffer from task interference and rigid coordination strategies that fail to adapt to instance-specific prediction difficulty. We propose a multi-task framework addressing these limitations through multi-level decoder interaction and uncertainty-aware adaptive coordination. Task Interaction Modules operate at all decoder levels, establishing bidirectional segmentation-classification communication during spatial reconstruction through attention weighted pooling and multiplicative modulation. Unlike prior single-level or encoder-only approaches, this multi-level design captures scale specific task synergies across semantic-to-spatial scales, producing complementary task interaction streams. Uncertainty-Proxy Attention adaptively weights base versus enhanced features at each level using feature activation variance, enabling per-level and per-sample task balancing without heuristic tuning. To support instance-adaptive prediction, multi-scale context fusion captures morphological cues across varying lesion sizes. Evaluation on multiple publicly available breast ultrasound datasets demonstrates competitive performance, including 74.5% lesion IoU and 90.6% classification accuracy on BUSI dataset. Ablation studies confirm that multi-level task interaction provides significant performance gains, validating that decoder-level bidirectional communication is more effective than conventional encoder-only parameter sharing. The code is available at: https://github.com/C-loud-Nine/Uncertainty-Aware-Multi-Level-Decoder-Interaction.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于乳腺超声图像分析的多任务学习框架，通过多级解码器交互和不确定性感知自适应协调，同时进行病灶分割和组织分类，解决了传统多任务学习中的任务干扰和刚性协调问题。
AI.motivation: 乳腺超声图像分析需要同时进行病灶分割和组织分类，但传统的多任务学习方法存在任务干扰和刚性协调策略的问题，无法适应实例特定的预测难度。
AI.method: 1) 多级解码器交互：在所有解码器级别使用任务交互模块，通过注意力加权池化和乘法调制建立分割与分类之间的双向通信；2) 不确定性代理注意力：使用特征激活方差自适应加权基础特征与增强特征，实现每级和每样本的任务平衡；3) 多尺度上下文融合：捕获不同病灶大小的形态学线索。
AI.result: 在多个公开乳腺超声数据集上表现出色，在BUSI数据集上达到74.5%的病灶IoU和90.6%的分类准确率。消融实验证实多级任务交互带来显著性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 解码器级别的双向通信比传统的仅编码器参数共享更有效，多级任务交互和不确定性感知协调能够有效解决多任务学习中的任务干扰问题。

title: Never Saddle for Reparameterized Steepest Descent as Mirror Flow
summary: How does the choice of optimization algorithm shape a model's ability to learn features? To address this question for steepest descent methods --including sign descent, which is closely related to Adam --we introduce steepest mirror flows as a unifying theoretical framework. This framework reveals how optimization geometry governs learning dynamics, implicit bias, and sparsity and it provides two explanations for why Adam and AdamW often outperform SGD in fine-tuning. Focusing on diagonal linear networks and deep diagonal linear reparameterizations (a simplified proxy for attention), we show that steeper descent facilitates both saddle-point escape and feature learning. In contrast, gradient descent requires unrealistically large learning rates to escape saddles, an uncommon regime in fine-tuning. Empirically, we confirm that saddle-point escape is a central challenge in fine-tuning. Furthermore, we demonstrate that decoupled weight decay, as in AdamW, stabilizes feature learning by enforcing novel balance equations. Together, these results highlight two mechanisms how steepest descent can aid modern optimization.

AI.tldr: 该论文探讨了优化算法选择如何影响模型学习特征的能力，提出了最陡镜像流理论框架，解释了Adam/AdamW在微调中优于SGD的原因，包括鞍点逃逸和特征学习机制。
AI.motivation: 研究优化算法选择如何塑造模型学习特征的能力，特别是解释为什么Adam和AdamW在微调中经常优于SGD，理解优化几何如何影响学习动态、隐式偏差和稀疏性。
AI.method: 提出最陡镜像流作为统一理论框架，分析最陡下降方法（包括与Adam密切相关的符号下降）。聚焦对角线性网络和深度对角线性重参数化（作为注意力的简化代理），理论分析鞍点逃逸和特征学习机制，并进行实证验证。
AI.result: 发现更陡的下降促进鞍点逃逸和特征学习，而梯度下降需要不现实的大学习率才能逃逸鞍点。实证确认鞍点逃逸是微调中的核心挑战，并证明AdamW中的解耦权重衰减通过强制新的平衡方程来稳定特征学习。
AI.conclusion: 优化几何对学习动态有重要影响，最陡下降通过促进鞍点逃逸和稳定特征学习两种机制帮助现代优化，这解释了Adam/AdamW在微调中的优势。

title: Agentic Scientific Simulation: Execution-Grounded Model Construction and Reconstruction
summary:
LLM agents are increasingly used for code generation, but physics-based simulation poses a deeper challenge: natural-language descriptions of simulation models are inherently underspecified, and different admissible resolutions of implicit choices produce physically valid but scientifically distinct configurations. Without explicit detection and resolution of these ambiguities, neither the correctness of the result nor its reproducibility from the original description can be assured.
  This paper investigates agentic scientific simulation, where model construction is organized as an execution-grounded interpret-act-validate loop and the simulator serves as the authoritative arbiter of physical validity rather than merely a runtime. We present JutulGPT, a reference implementation built on the fully differentiable Julia-based reservoir simulator JutulDarcy. The agent combines structured retrieval of documentation and examples with code synthesis, static analysis, execution, and systematic interpretation of solver diagnostics. Underspecified modelling choices are detected explicitly and resolved either autonomously (with logged assumptions) or through targeted user queries.
  The results demonstrate that agent-mediated model construction can be grounded in simulator validation, while also revealing a structural limitation: choices resolved tacitly through simulator defaults are invisible to the assumption log and to any downstream representation. A secondary experiment with autonomous reconstruction of a reference model from progressively abstract textual descriptions shows that reconstruction variability exposes latent degrees of freedom in simulation descriptions and provides a practical methodology for auditing reproducibility. All code, prompts, and agent logs are publicly available.

AI.tldr: JutulGPT：基于LLM代理的科学仿真代码生成系统，通过执行-解释-验证循环解决物理仿真中的模糊描述问题，确保结果正确性和可复现性。
AI.motivation: 物理仿真中的自然语言描述存在固有模糊性，不同的隐式选择会产生物理有效但科学上不同的配置。传统LLM代码生成无法检测和解决这些模糊性，导致结果正确性和可复现性无法保证。
AI.method: 提出代理化科学仿真框架，将模型构建组织为执行-解释-验证循环。基于Julia可微分储层仿真器JutulDarcy构建JutulGPT，结合结构化文档检索、代码合成、静态分析、执行和求解器诊断解释，显式检测模糊建模选择并自主解决或通过用户查询解决。
AI.result: 代理介导的模型构建可以基于仿真器验证，但发现结构限制：通过仿真器默认值隐式解决的选择对假设日志和下游表示不可见。通过逐步抽象文本描述自主重建参考模型的实验显示，重建变异性暴露了仿真描述中的潜在自由度，提供了审计可复现性的实用方法。
AI.conclusion: 代理化科学仿真能够解决物理仿真中的模糊描述问题，但需要显式记录所有建模假设。重建变异性分析为审计仿真可复现性提供了新方法。

title: When Does RL Help Medical VLMs? Disentangling Vision, SFT, and RL Gains
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) is increasingly used to post-train medical Vision-Language Models (VLMs), yet it remains unclear whether RL improves medical visual reasoning or mainly sharpens behaviors already induced by supervised fine-tuning (SFT). We present a controlled study that disentangles these effects along three axes: vision, SFT, and RL. Using MedMNIST as a multi-modality testbed, we probe visual perception by benchmarking VLM vision towers against vision-only baselines, quantify reasoning support and sampling efficiency via Accuracy@1 versus Pass@K, and evaluate when RL closes the support gap and how gains transfer across modalities. We find that RL is most effective when the model already has non-trivial support (high Pass@K): it primarily sharpens the output distribution, improving Acc@1 and sampling efficiency, while SFT expands support and makes RL effective. Based on these findings, we propose a boundary-aware recipe and instantiate it by RL post-training an OctoMed-initialized model on a small, balanced subset of PMC multiple-choice VQA, achieving strong average performance across six medical VQA benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 研究探讨RL在医学视觉语言模型中的作用，发现RL主要在模型已有一定支持度时发挥作用，通过锐化输出分布来提高准确率和采样效率，而SFT则扩展支持度并为RL有效性奠定基础。
AI.motivation: 虽然强化学习越来越多地用于医学视觉语言模型的后训练，但尚不清楚RL是否真正改善了医学视觉推理能力，还是仅仅强化了监督微调已经诱导的行为。需要厘清RL在医学VLM中的实际作用机制。
AI.method: 使用MedMNIST作为多模态测试平台，从三个维度分析：视觉能力、SFT作用和RL作用。通过基准测试比较VLM视觉塔与纯视觉基线，使用Accuracy@1与Pass@K量化推理支持和采样效率，评估RL何时能弥补支持差距及其跨模态迁移效果。
AI.result: 发现RL在模型已有非平凡支持度（高Pass@K）时最有效：主要作用是锐化输出分布，提高Acc@1和采样效率；而SFT扩展支持度并使RL有效。基于此提出了边界感知的训练方案。
AI.conclusion: RL在医学VLM中的作用主要是优化已有能力而非创造新能力，SFT为RL有效性奠定基础。提出的边界感知训练方案在六个医学VQA基准上取得了强劲的平均性能。

title: Accelerating PDE Surrogates via RL-Guided Mesh Optimization
summary: Deep surrogate models for parametric partial differential equations (PDEs) can deliver high-fidelity approximations but remain prohibitively data-hungry: training often requires thousands of fine-grid simulations, each incurring substantial computational cost. To address this challenge, we introduce RLMesh, an end-to-end framework for efficient surrogate training under limited simulation budget. The key idea is to use reinforcement learning (RL) to adaptively allocate mesh grid points non-uniformly within each simulation domain, focusing numerical resolution in regions most critical for accurate PDE solutions. A lightweight proxy model further accelerates RL training by providing efficient reward estimates without full surrogate retraining. Experiments on PDE benchmarks demonstrate that RLMesh achieves competitive accuracy to baselines but with substantially fewer simulation queries. These results show that solver-level spatial adaptivity can dramatically improve the efficiency of surrogate training pipelines, enabling practical deployment of learning-based PDE surrogates across a wide range of problems.

AI.tldr: RLMesh：使用强化学习自适应分配网格点，在有限仿真预算下高效训练PDE代理模型
AI.motivation: 参数化偏微分方程（PDE）的深度代理模型需要大量高精度仿真数据，计算成本极高。现有方法需要数千次精细网格仿真，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 提出RLMesh端到端框架：1）使用强化学习（RL）在仿真域内非均匀自适应分配网格点，将数值分辨率集中在PDE解最关键的区域内；2）引入轻量级代理模型加速RL训练，无需完整代理模型重训练即可提供高效奖励估计。
AI.result: 在PDE基准测试中，RLMesh达到与基线方法相当的精度，但显著减少了仿真查询次数。证明求解器级别的空间自适应能大幅提升代理训练流程的效率。
AI.conclusion: 空间自适应策略能显著提高学习型PDE代理模型的训练效率，使其在广泛问题中具有实际部署可行性。

title: AG-VAS: Anchor-Guided Zero-Shot Visual Anomaly Segmentation with Large Multimodal Models
summary: Large multimodal models (LMMs) exhibit strong task generalization capabilities, offering new opportunities for zero-shot visual anomaly segmentation (ZSAS). However, existing LMM-based segmentation approaches still face fundamental limitations: anomaly concepts are inherently abstract and context-dependent, lacking stable visual prototypes, and the weak alignment between high-level semantic embeddings and pixel-level spatial features hinders precise anomaly localization. To address these challenges, we present AG-VAS (Anchor-Guided Visual Anomaly Segmentation), a new framework that expands the LMM vocabulary with three learnable semantic anchor tokens-[SEG], [NOR], and [ANO], establishing a unified anchor-guided segmentation paradigm. Specifically, [SEG] serves as an absolute semantic anchor that translates abstract anomaly semantics into explicit, spatially grounded visual entities (e.g., holes or scratches), while [NOR] and [ANO] act as relative anchors that model the contextual contrast between normal and abnormal patterns across categories. To further enhance cross-modal alignment, we introduce a Semantic-Pixel Alignment Module (SPAM) that aligns language-level semantic embeddings with high-resolution visual features, along with an Anchor-Guided Mask Decoder (AGMD) that performs anchor-conditioned mask prediction for precise anomaly localization. In addition, we curate Anomaly-Instruct20K, a large-scale instruction dataset that organizes anomaly knowledge into structured descriptions of appearance, shape, and spatial attributes, facilitating effective learning and integration of the proposed semantic anchors. Extensive experiments on six industrial and medical benchmarks demonstrate that AG-VAS achieves consistent state-of-the-art performance in the zero-shot setting.

AI.tldr: AG-VAS：一种基于可学习语义锚点令牌的零样本视觉异常分割框架，通过[SEG]、[NOR]、[ANO]三个锚点建立统一的锚点引导分割范式，解决LMM在异常分割中语义抽象和空间对齐的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大型多模态模型（LMM）的异常分割方法面临两个根本限制：1）异常概念本质上是抽象且上下文相关的，缺乏稳定的视觉原型；2）高层语义嵌入与像素级空间特征之间的弱对齐阻碍了精确的异常定位。
AI.method: 1）引入三个可学习的语义锚点令牌：[SEG]（绝对语义锚点，将抽象异常语义转化为显式的空间实体）、[NOR]和[ANO]（相对锚点，建模跨类别的正常与异常模式对比）；2）提出语义-像素对齐模块（SPAM）对齐语言级语义嵌入与高分辨率视觉特征；3）设计锚点引导掩码解码器（AGMD）进行锚点条件掩码预测；4）构建Anomaly-Instruct20K大规模指令数据集，结构化描述异常的外观、形状和空间属性。
AI.result: 在六个工业和医学基准测试上的广泛实验表明，AG-VAS在零样本设置下实现了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: AG-VAS通过引入语义锚点令牌和增强跨模态对齐，有效解决了LMM在零样本视觉异常分割中的核心挑战，为抽象概念的分割提供了新的范式。

title: Scaling Laws of SignSGD in Linear Regression: When Does It Outperform SGD?
summary: We study scaling laws of signSGD under a power-law random features (PLRF) model that accounts for both feature and target decay. We analyze the population risk of a linear model trained with one-pass signSGD on Gaussian-sketched features. We express the risk as a function of model size, training steps, learning rate, and the feature and target decay parameters. Comparing against the SGD risk analyzed by Paquette et al. (2024), we identify a drift-normalization effect and a noise-reshaping effect unique to signSGD. We then obtain compute-optimal scaling laws under the optimal choice of learning rate. Our analysis shows that the noise-reshaping effect can make the compute-optimal slope of signSGD steeper than that of SGD in regimes where noise is dominant. Finally, we observe that the widely used warmup-stable-decay (WSD) schedule further reduces the noise term and sharpens the compute-optimal slope, when feature decay is fast but target decay is slow.

AI.tldr: 本文在幂律随机特征模型下研究signSGD的缩放规律，分析其与SGD在风险、计算最优配置和噪声效应方面的差异，并发现WSD调度能进一步优化噪声项。
AI.motivation: 研究signSGD在幂律随机特征模型下的缩放规律，理解其与标准SGD在优化特性上的差异，特别是signSGD特有的漂移归一化和噪声重塑效应，为大规模优化算法设计提供理论指导。
AI.method: 在幂律随机特征模型下，分析线性模型使用单次signSGD在高斯草图特征上的训练。将风险表达为模型大小、训练步数、学习率以及特征和目标衰减参数的函数，并与SGD风险进行对比。
AI.result: 识别出signSGD特有的漂移归一化和噪声重塑效应；在噪声主导的机制下，signSGD的计算最优斜率比SGD更陡峭；WSD调度在特征衰减快但目标衰减慢的情况下能进一步减少噪声项并锐化计算最优斜率。
AI.conclusion: signSGD在幂律随机特征模型下表现出与SGD不同的缩放特性，其特有的噪声效应在某些机制下能带来更优的计算效率，而WSD调度能进一步增强这种优势。

title: Empowering Future Cybersecurity Leaders: Advancing Students through FINDS Education for Digital Forensic Excellence
summary: The Forensics Investigations Network in Digital Sciences (FINDS) Research Center of Excellence (CoE), funded by the U.S. Army Research Laboratory, advances Digital Forensic Engineering Education (DFEE) through an integrated research education framework for AI enabled cybersecurity workforce development. FINDS combines high performance computing (HPC), secure software engineering, adversarial analytics, and experiential learning to address emerging cyber and synthetic media threats. This paper introduces the Multidependency Capacity Building Skills Graph (MCBSG), a directed acyclic graph based model that encodes hierarchical and cross domain dependencies among competencies in AI-driven forensic programming, statistical inference, digital evidence processing, and threat detection. The MCBSG enables structured modeling of skill acquisition pathways and quantitative capacity assessment. Supervised machine learning methods, including entropy-based Decision Tree Classifiers and regression modeling, are applied to longitudinal multi cohort datasets capturing mentoring interactions, laboratory performance metrics, curriculum artifacts, and workshop participation. Feature importance analysis and cross validation identify key predictors of technical proficiency and research readiness. Three year statistical evaluation demonstrates significant gains in forensic programming accuracy, adversarial reasoning, and HPC-enabled investigative workflows. Results validate the MCBSG as a scalable, interpretable framework for data-driven, inclusive cybersecurity education aligned with national defense workforce priorities.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了MCBSG（多依赖能力建设技能图）模型，用于AI驱动的网络安全取证教育，通过有向无环图编码技能依赖关系，结合机器学习方法评估学生能力发展。
AI.motivation: 应对新兴网络威胁和合成媒体威胁，发展AI赋能的网络安全取证教育，满足国防网络安全人才需求。传统教育方法缺乏对技能获取路径的结构化建模和量化评估。
AI.method: 提出MCBSG有向无环图模型，编码AI驱动取证编程、统计推断、数字证据处理和威胁检测等领域的技能层次和跨域依赖关系。应用监督机器学习方法（基于熵的决策树分类器和回归模型）分析多队列纵向数据集，包括导师互动、实验室表现指标、课程工件和研讨会参与等数据。
AI.result: 三年统计评估显示在取证编程准确性、对抗推理和HPC赋能调查工作流程方面有显著提升。特征重要性分析和交叉验证识别出技术熟练度和研究准备度的关键预测因子。验证了MCBSG作为可扩展、可解释的框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MCBSG是一个可扩展、可解释的框架，支持数据驱动的包容性网络安全教育，符合国防人才优先需求。该框架能够结构化建模技能获取路径并进行量化能力评估。

title: Open-Vocabulary vs Supervised Learning Methods for Post-Disaster Visual Scene Understanding
summary: Aerial imagery is critical for large-scale post-disaster damage assessment. Automated interpretation remains challenging due to clutter, visual variability, and strong cross-event domain shift, while supervised approaches still rely on costly, task-specific annotations with limited coverage across disaster types and regions. Recent open-vocabulary and foundation vision models offer an appealing alternative, by reducing dependence on fixed label sets and extensive task-specific annotations. Instead, they leverage large-scale pretraining and vision-language representations. These properties are particularly relevant for post-disaster domains, where visual concepts are ambiguous and data availability is constrained. In this work, we present a comparative evaluation of supervised learning and open-vocabulary vision models for post-disaster scene understanding, focusing on semantic segmentation and object detection across multiple datasets, including FloodNet+, RescueNet, DFire, and LADD. We examine performance trends, failure modes, and practical trade-offs between different learning paradigms, providing insight into their applicability for real-world disaster response. The most notable remark across all evaluated benchmarks is that supervised training remains the most reliable approach (i.e., when the label space is fixed and annotations are available), especially for small objects and fine boundary delineation in cluttered scenes.

AI.tldr: 该论文比较了监督学习和开放词汇视觉模型在灾后场景理解中的表现，发现尽管开放词汇模型有潜力，但在固定标签集和标注可用时，监督学习仍是更可靠的方法，特别是在小物体检测和复杂场景边界划分方面。
AI.motivation: 灾后航空影像分析对大规模损害评估至关重要，但自动化解释面临挑战：场景杂乱、视觉变化大、跨事件领域偏移强。监督方法依赖昂贵、任务特定的标注，且覆盖灾害类型和区域有限。开放词汇和基础视觉模型通过减少对固定标签集和大量任务特定标注的依赖，提供了有吸引力的替代方案。
AI.method: 对监督学习和开放词汇视觉模型在灾后场景理解中进行比较评估，重点关注语义分割和物体检测。使用多个数据集（FloodNet+、RescueNet、DFire、LADD）进行实验，分析性能趋势、失败模式和不同学习范式之间的实际权衡。
AI.result: 在所有评估的基准测试中，最显著的发现是监督训练仍然是最可靠的方法（当标签空间固定且标注可用时），特别是在杂乱场景中的小物体检测和精细边界划分方面表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 虽然开放词汇视觉模型在减少标注依赖方面有优势，但在实际灾后响应应用中，当固定标签集和标注可用时，监督学习方法仍然是更可靠的选择，特别是在处理小物体和复杂场景边界时。

title: GENAI WORKBENCH: AI-Assisted Analysis and Synthesis of Engineering Systems from Multimodal Engineering Data
comment: 7 pages, 3 figures, accepted to be presented at IISE Annual Conference 2026
summary: Modern engineering design platforms excel at discipline-specific tasks such as CAD, CAM, and CAE, but often lack native systems engineering frameworks. This creates a disconnect where system-level requirements and architectures are managed separately from detailed component design, hindering holistic development and increasing integration risks. To address this, we present the conceptual framework for the GenAI Workbench, a Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) environment that integrates systems engineering principles into the designer's workflow. Built on an open-source PLM platform, it establishes a unified digital thread by linking semantic data from documents, physical B-rep geometry, and relational system graphs. The workbench facilitates an AI-assisted workflow where a designer can ingest source documents, from which the system automatically extracts requirements and uses vision-language models to generate an initial system architecture, such as a Design Structure Matrix (DSM). This paper presents the conceptual architecture, proposed methodology, and anticipated impact of this work-in-progress framework, which aims to foster a more integrated, data-driven, and informed engineering design methodology.

AI.tldr: 提出GenAI Workbench框架，将基于模型的系统工程(MBSE)集成到工程设计平台，通过AI辅助工作流连接文档语义、几何模型和系统图，实现统一数字线程。
AI.motivation: 现代工程设计平台在CAD、CAM、CAE等专业任务上表现出色，但缺乏原生系统工程框架，导致系统级需求与详细组件设计分离，增加了集成风险并阻碍整体开发。
AI.method: 基于开源PLM平台构建MBSE环境，建立统一数字线程，连接文档语义数据、物理B-rep几何和关系系统图。采用AI辅助工作流，设计师输入源文档后，系统自动提取需求并使用视觉语言模型生成初始系统架构(如设计结构矩阵DSM)。
AI.result: 提出了概念架构、方法论和预期影响，这是一个进行中的框架，旨在促进更集成、数据驱动和智能的工程设计方法。
AI.conclusion: GenAI Workbench框架有望解决工程设计中的系统集成问题，通过AI辅助的MBSE环境实现更全面的工程开发。

title: You Only Need One Stage: Novel-View Synthesis From A Single Blind Face Image
summary: We propose a novel one-stage method, NVB-Face, for generating consistent Novel-View images directly from a single Blind Face image. Existing approaches to novel-view synthesis for objects or faces typically require a high-resolution RGB image as input. When dealing with degraded images, the conventional pipeline follows a two-stage process: first restoring the image to high resolution, then synthesizing novel views from the restored result. However, this approach is highly dependent on the quality of the restored image, often leading to inaccuracies and inconsistencies in the final output. To address this limitation, we extract single-view features directly from the blind face image and introduce a feature manipulator that transforms these features into 3D-aware, multi-view latent representations. Leveraging the powerful generative capacity of a diffusion model, our framework synthesizes high-quality, consistent novel-view face images. Experimental results show that our method significantly outperforms traditional two-stage approaches in both consistency and fidelity.

AI.tldr: NVB-Face：一种从单张盲脸图像直接生成一致新视角图像的单阶段方法，无需先进行图像恢复
AI.motivation: 现有新视角合成方法通常需要高分辨率RGB图像作为输入。对于退化图像，传统方法采用两阶段流程：先恢复图像，再从恢复结果合成新视角。这种方法高度依赖恢复图像的质量，常导致最终输出不准确和不一致。
AI.method: 直接从盲脸图像提取单视角特征，引入特征操纵器将这些特征转换为3D感知的多视角潜在表示。利用扩散模型的强大生成能力，合成高质量、一致的新视角人脸图像。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在一致性和保真度方面显著优于传统的两阶段方法。
AI.conclusion: NVB-Face通过单阶段方法有效解决了从退化图像生成一致新视角的挑战，避免了传统两阶段方法的依赖性问题。

title: Adam Converges Without Any Modification On Update Rules
summary: Adam is the default algorithm for training neural networks, including large language models (LLMs). However, \citet{reddi2019convergence} provided an example that Adam diverges, raising concerns for its deployment in AI model training. We identify a key mismatch between the divergence example and practice: \citet{reddi2019convergence} pick the problem after picking the hyperparameters of Adam, i.e., $(β_1,β_2)$; while practical applications often fix the problem first and then tune $(β_1,β_2)$. In this work, we prove that Adam converges with proper problem-dependent hyperparameters. First, we prove that Adam converges when $β_2$ is large and $β_1 < \sqrt{β_2}$. Second, when $β_2$ is small, we point out a region of $(β_1,β_2)$ combinations where Adam can diverge to infinity. Our results indicate a phase transition for Adam from divergence to convergence when changing the $(β_1, β_2)$ combination. To our knowledge, this is the first phase transition in $(β_1,β_2)$ 2D-plane reported in the literature, providing rigorous theoretical guarantees for Adam optimizer. We further point out that the critical boundary $(β_1^*, β_2^*)$ is problem-dependent, and particularly, dependent on batch size. This provides suggestions on how to tune $β_1$ and $β_2$: when Adam does not work well, we suggest tuning up $β_2$ inversely with batch size to surpass the threshold $β_2^*$, and then trying $β_1< \sqrt{β_2}$. Our suggestions are supported by reports from several empirical studies, which observe improved LLM training performance when applying them.

AI.tldr: 该论文分析了Adam优化器的收敛性问题，证明了通过适当选择超参数(β₁,β₂)可以确保Adam收敛，并发现了从发散到收敛的相变现象，为LLM训练中的超参数调优提供了理论指导。
AI.motivation: Adam作为训练神经网络（包括大语言模型）的默认优化器，但Reddi等人(2019)提出了Adam可能发散的例子，这对AI模型训练部署提出了担忧。作者发现理论反例与实践之间存在关键不匹配：理论反例是在选定超参数后构造问题，而实际应用是先固定问题再调优超参数。
AI.method: 通过理论分析证明Adam在适当问题依赖的超参数下的收敛性：1) 当β₂较大且β₁<√β₂时，Adam收敛；2) 当β₂较小时，识别出(β₁,β₂)组合的发散区域。发现了从发散到收敛的相变现象，并分析了临界边界(β₁*,β₂*)的问题依赖性，特别是与批量大小的关系。
AI.result: 证明了Adam在适当超参数下的收敛性，首次在(β₁,β₂)二维平面上报告了相变现象，为Adam优化器提供了严格的理论保证。发现临界边界是问题依赖的，特别是依赖于批量大小，为超参数调优提供了具体建议：当Adam效果不佳时，建议按批量大小反比调高β₂以超过阈值β₂*，然后尝试β₁<√β₂。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为Adam优化器提供了重要的理论保证，解决了关于其收敛性的担忧。提出的超参数调优建议得到了多个实证研究的支持，这些研究观察到在应用这些建议后LLM训练性能得到改善。这为大语言模型训练中的优化器选择和使用提供了理论指导。

title: Perspective-Equivariant Fine-tuning for Multispectral Demosaicing without Ground Truth
summary: Multispectral demosaicing is crucial to reconstruct full-resolution spectral images from snapshot mosaiced measurements, enabling real-time imaging from neurosurgery to autonomous driving. Classical methods are blurry, while supervised learning requires costly ground truth (GT) obtained from slow line-scanning systems. We propose Perspective-Equivariant Fine-tuning for Demosaicing (PEFD), a framework that learns multispectral demosaicing from mosaiced measurements alone. PEFD a) exploits the projective geometry of camera-based imaging systems to leverage a richer group structure than previous demosaicing methods to recover more null-space information, and b) learns efficiently without GT by adapting pretrained foundation models designed for 1-3 channel imaging. On intraoperative and automotive datasets, PEFD recovers fine details such as blood vessels and preserves spectral fidelity, substantially outperforming recent approaches, nearing supervised performance.

AI.tldr: 提出PEFD框架，利用相机成像系统的投影几何特性，通过无监督方式从马赛克测量中学习多光谱去马赛克，无需昂贵的地面真值数据。
AI.motivation: 多光谱去马赛克在神经外科到自动驾驶等实时成像应用中至关重要。传统方法模糊，监督学习需要昂贵的线扫描系统获取地面真值数据，成本高昂且耗时。
AI.method: PEFD框架：a) 利用相机成像系统的投影几何特性，比先前方法利用更丰富的群结构恢复更多零空间信息；b) 通过适配为1-3通道成像设计的预训练基础模型，无需地面真值高效学习。
AI.result: 在手术和自动驾驶数据集上，PEFD恢复了血管等精细细节并保持光谱保真度，显著优于近期方法，接近监督学习性能。
AI.conclusion: PEFD提供了一种无需地面真值的高效多光谱去马赛克方法，在实时成像应用中具有重要价值。

title: On the Rate of Convergence of GD in Non-linear Neural Networks: An Adversarial Robustness Perspective
summary: We study the convergence dynamics of Gradient Descent (GD) in a minimal binary classification setting, consisting of a two-neuron ReLU network and two training instances. We prove that even under these strong simplifying assumptions, while GD successfully converges to an optimal robustness margin, effectively maximizing the distance between the decision boundary and the training points, this convergence occurs at a prohibitively slow rate, scaling strictly as $Θ(1/\ln(t))$. To the best of our knowledge, this establishes the first explicit lower bound on the convergence rate of the robustness margin in a non-linear model. Through empirical simulations, we further demonstrate that this inherent failure mode is pervasive, exhibiting the exact same tight convergence rate across multiple natural network initializations. Our theoretical guarantees are derived via a rigorous analysis of the GD trajectories across the distinct activation patterns of the model. Specifically, we develop tight control over the system's dynamics to bound the trajectory of the decision boundary, overcoming the primary technical challenge introduced by the non-linear nature of the architecture.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了梯度下降在最小二神经元ReLU网络上的收敛动态，证明了即使在这种简化设置下，鲁棒性边界的收敛速度极慢，仅为Θ(1/ln(t))，这是非线性模型中鲁棒性边界收敛速度的首个显式下界。
AI.motivation: 研究梯度下降在神经网络中的收敛特性，特别是在鲁棒性边界优化方面的收敛速度。当前研究缺乏对非线性模型中鲁棒性边界收敛速度的理论分析，本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 采用理论分析和实证模拟相结合的方法。理论方面：在最小化设置（二神经元ReLU网络、两个训练样本）下，通过严格分析梯度下降轨迹和模型的不同激活模式，推导收敛速度下界。技术挑战在于克服架构的非线性特性，通过紧密控制系统动态来界定决策边界的轨迹。
AI.result: 证明了梯度下降虽然能收敛到最优鲁棒性边界（最大化决策边界与训练点之间的距离），但收敛速度极慢，严格为Θ(1/ln(t))。这是非线性模型中鲁棒性边界收敛速度的首个显式下界。实证模拟进一步表明这种失败模式具有普遍性，在不同自然网络初始化下都表现出相同的紧致收敛率。
AI.conclusion: 即使在高度简化的设置下，梯度下降优化神经网络鲁棒性边界的收敛速度也极其缓慢，这对实际应用中的鲁棒性训练具有重要意义。该结果为理解神经网络训练动态提供了新的理论洞见。

title: MixerCSeg: An Efficient Mixer Architecture for Crack Segmentation via Decoupled Mamba Attention
summary: Feature encoders play a key role in pixel-level crack segmentation by shaping the representation of fine textures and thin structures. Existing CNN-, Transformer-, and Mamba-based models each capture only part of the required spatial or structural information, leaving clear gaps in modeling complex crack patterns. To address this, we present MixerCSeg, a mixer architecture designed like a coordinated team of specialists, where CNN-like pathways focus on local textures, Transformer-style paths capture global dependencies, and Mamba-inspired flows model sequential context within a single encoder. At the core of MixerCSeg is the TransMixer, which explores Mamba's latent attention behavior while establishing dedicated pathways that naturally express both locality and global awareness. To further enhance structural fidelity, we introduce a spatial block processing strategy and a Direction-guided Edge Gated Convolution (DEGConv) that strengthens edge sensitivity under irregular crack geometries with minimal computational overhead. A Spatial Refinement Multi-Level Fusion (SRF) module is then employed to refine multi-scale details without increasing complexity. Extensive experiments on multiple crack segmentation benchmarks show that MixerCSeg achieves state-of-the-art performance with only 2.05 GFLOPs and 2.54 M parameters, demonstrating both efficiency and strong representational capability. The code is available at https://github.com/spiderforest/MixerCSeg.

AI.tldr: MixerCSeg：一种用于像素级裂纹分割的混合架构，结合了CNN、Transformer和Mamba的优势，通过专用路径分别处理局部纹理、全局依赖和序列上下文，实现了高效且强大的裂纹模式建模。
AI.motivation: 现有裂纹分割方法（CNN、Transformer、Mamba）各自只能捕捉部分所需的空间或结构信息，在建模复杂裂纹模式时存在明显不足，需要一种能综合多种优势的编码器架构。
AI.method: 提出MixerCSeg混合架构，包含：1) TransMixer核心模块，探索Mamba的潜在注意力行为并建立专用路径表达局部性和全局感知；2) 空间块处理策略；3) 方向引导边缘门控卷积(DEGConv)增强边缘敏感性；4) 空间细化多级融合(SRF)模块优化多尺度细节。
AI.result: 在多个裂纹分割基准测试中达到最先进性能，仅需2.05 GFLOPs和2.54M参数，在效率和表示能力方面均表现优异。
AI.conclusion: MixerCSeg通过协调CNN、Transformer和Mamba的优势，成功解决了裂纹分割中复杂模式建模的挑战，为像素级分割任务提供了一种高效且强大的混合架构解决方案。

title: Stochastic Multi-Armed Bandits with Limited Control Variates
summary: Motivated by wireless networks where interference or channel state estimates provide partial insight into throughput, we study a variant of the classical stochastic multi-armed bandit problem in which the learner has limited access to auxiliary information. Recent work has shown that such auxiliary information, when available as control variates, can be used to get tighter confidence bounds, leading to lower regret. However, existing works assume that control variates are available in every round, which may not be realistic in several real-life scenarios. To address this, we propose UCB-LCV, an upper confidence bound (UCB) based algorithm that effectively combines the estimators obtained from rewards and control variates. When there is no control variate, UCB-LCV leads to a novel algorithm that we call UCB-NORMAL, outperforming its existing algorithms for the standard MAB setting with normally distributed rewards. Finally, we discuss variants of the proposed UCB-LCV that apply to general distributions and experimentally demonstrate that UCB-LCV outperforms existing bandit algorithms.

AI.tldr: 提出UCB-LCV算法，将控制变量与奖励估计结合以降低多臂老虎机问题的遗憾，当无控制变量时退化为UCB-NORMAL算法，在正态分布奖励场景中表现优于现有算法。
AI.motivation: 在无线网络等实际场景中，干扰或信道状态估计只能提供部分吞吐量信息，现有研究假设控制变量每轮都可用，但这在现实场景中不切实际。需要设计能有效结合奖励和控制变量估计的算法。
AI.method: 提出UCB-LCV算法，基于上置信界框架，将奖励估计和控制变量估计有效结合。当无控制变量时，算法退化为UCB-NORMAL，专门处理正态分布奖励的标准多臂老虎机问题。还讨论了适用于一般分布的变体。
AI.result: UCB-LCV在实验中优于现有老虎机算法。UCB-NORMAL在标准多臂老虎机设置中（正态分布奖励）表现优于现有算法。
AI.conclusion: UCB-LCV能有效利用部分可用的控制变量信息降低遗憾，UCB-NORMAL为处理正态分布奖励的标准多臂老虎机问题提供了新的有效算法。

title: TIMI: Training-Free Image-to-3D Multi-Instance Generation with Spatial Fidelity
summary: Precise spatial fidelity in Image-to-3D multi-instance generation is critical for downstream real-world applications. Recent work attempts to address this by fine-tuning pre-trained Image-to-3D (I23D) models on multi-instance datasets, which incurs substantial training overhead and struggles to guarantee spatial fidelity. In fact, we observe that pre-trained I23D models already possess meaningful spatial priors, which remain underutilized as evidenced by instance entanglement issues. Motivated by this, we propose TIMI, a novel Training-free framework for Image-to-3D Multi-Instance generation that achieves high spatial fidelity. Specifically, we first introduce an Instance-aware Separation Guidance (ISG) module, which facilitates instance disentanglement during the early denoising stage. Next, to stabilize the guidance introduced by ISG, we devise a Spatial-stabilized Geometry-adaptive Update (SGU) module that promotes the preservation of the geometric characteristics of instances while maintaining their relative relationships. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method yields better performance in terms of both global layout and distinct local instances compared to existing multi-instance methods, without requiring additional training and with faster inference speed.

AI.tldr: TIMI：无需训练的Image-to-3D多实例生成框架，通过实例感知分离引导和空间稳定几何自适应更新模块，实现高空间保真度
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过微调预训练模型实现多实例生成，但训练成本高且空间保真度难以保证。研究发现预训练I23D模型已具备有意义的空间先验，但存在实例纠缠问题未被充分利用
AI.method: 提出TIMI训练免费框架：1）实例感知分离引导（ISG）模块，在早期去噪阶段促进实例解纠缠；2）空间稳定几何自适应更新（SGU）模块，稳定ISG引导，保持实例几何特征和相对关系
AI.result: 实验表明，TIMI在全局布局和局部实例区分方面优于现有方法，无需额外训练且推理速度更快
AI.conclusion: TIMI通过有效利用预训练模型的空间先验，实现了高质量的多实例3D生成，为下游应用提供了实用的解决方案

title: Continuous Exposure-Time Modeling for Realistic Atmospheric Turbulence Synthesis
summary: Atmospheric turbulence significantly degrades long-range imaging by introducing geometric warping and exposure-time-dependent blur, which adversely affects both visual quality and the performance of high-level vision tasks. Existing methods for synthesizing turbulence effects often oversimplify the relationship between blur and exposure-time, typically assuming fixed or binary exposure settings. This leads to unrealistic synthetic data and limited generalization capability of trained models. To address this gap, we revisit the modulation transfer function (MTF) formulation and propose a novel Exposure-Time-dependent MTF (ET-MTF) that models blur as a continuous function of exposure-time. For blur synthesis, we derive a tilt-invariant point spread function (PSF) from the ET-MTF, which, when integrated with a spatially varying blur-width field, provides a comprehensive and physically accurate characterization of turbulence-induced blur. Building on this synthesis pipeline, we construct ET-Turb, a large-scale synthetic turbulence dataset that explicitly incorporates continuous exposure-time modeling across diverse optical and atmospheric conditions. The dataset comprises 5,083 videos (2,005,835 frames), partitioned into 3,988 training and 1,095 test videos. Extensive experiments demonstrate that models trained on ET-Turb produce more realistic restorations and achieve superior generalization on real-world turbulence data compared to those trained on other datasets. The dataset is publicly available at: github.com/Jun-Wei-Zeng/ET-Turb.

AI.tldr: 提出ET-Turb数据集，通过曝光时间依赖的MTF模型连续建模大气湍流模糊，生成大规模合成数据提升去湍流模型的泛化能力
AI.motivation: 现有湍流合成方法过度简化模糊与曝光时间关系（通常假设固定或二元曝光设置），导致合成数据不真实且训练模型泛化能力有限
AI.method: 提出曝光时间依赖的MTF（ET-MTF）将模糊建模为曝光时间的连续函数；推导倾斜不变点扩散函数（PSF），结合空间变化的模糊宽度场，构建物理准确的湍流模糊合成流程
AI.result: 构建ET-Turb数据集（5,083个视频，2,005,835帧），包含3,988训练和1,095测试视频；实验表明在该数据集上训练的模型能产生更真实的恢复结果，在真实湍流数据上具有更优的泛化能力
AI.conclusion: 通过连续曝光时间建模的湍流合成方法能生成更真实的合成数据，显著提升去湍流模型的性能和泛化能力

title: Machine Learning (ML) library in Linux kernel
summary: Linux kernel is a huge code base with enormous number of subsystems and possible configuration options that results in unmanageable complexity of elaborating an efficient configuration. Machine Learning (ML) is approach/area of learning from data, finding patterns, and making predictions without implementing algorithms by developers that can introduce a self-evolving capability in Linux kernel. However, introduction of ML approaches in Linux kernel is not easy way because there is no direct use of floating-point operations (FPU) in kernel space and, potentially, ML models can be a reason of significant performance degradation in Linux kernel. Paper suggests the ML infrastructure architecture in Linux kernel that can solve the declared problem and introduce of employing ML models in kernel space. Suggested approach of kernel ML library has been implemented as Proof Of Concept (PoC) project with the goal to demonstrate feasibility of the suggestion and to design the interface of interaction the kernel-space ML model proxy and the ML model user-space thread.

AI.tldr: 提出在Linux内核中引入机器学习基础设施的架构，解决内核空间无法直接使用浮点运算的问题，通过内核ML库和用户空间线程代理实现ML模型在内核中的部署
