summary: Early detection of lung cancer in chest radiographs (CXRs) is crucial for improving patient outcomes, yet nodule detection remains challenging due to their subtle appearance and variability in radiological characteristics like size, texture, and boundary. For robust analysis, this diversity must be well represented in training datasets for deep learning based Computer-Assisted Diagnosis (CAD) systems. However, assembling such datasets is costly and often impractical, motivating the need for realistic synthetic data generation. Existing methods lack fine-grained control over synthetic nodule generation, limiting their utility in addressing data scarcity. This paper proposes a novel diffusion-based framework with low-rank adaptation (LoRA) adapters for characteristic controlled nodule synthesis on CXRs. We begin by addressing size and shape control through nodule mask conditioned training of the base diffusion model. To achieve individual characteristic control, we train separate LoRA modules, each dedicated to a specific radiological feature. However, since nodules rarely exhibit isolated characteristics, effective multi-characteristic control requires a balanced integration of features. We address this by leveraging the dynamic composability of LoRAs and revisiting existing merging strategies. Building on this, we identify two key issues, overlapping attention regions and non-orthogonal parameter spaces. To overcome these limitations, we introduce a novel orthogonality loss term during LoRA composition training. Extensive experiments on both in-house and public datasets demonstrate improved downstream nodule detection. Radiologist evaluations confirm the fine-grained controllability of our generated nodules, and across multiple quantitative metrics, our method surpasses existing nodule generation approaches for CXRs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于扩散模型和LoRA适配器的胸部X光片结节生成框架，通过特征控制合成逼真的肺结节图像，以解决医学影像数据稀缺问题。
AI.motivation: 胸部X光片中肺结节的早期检测对改善患者预后至关重要，但由于结节外观细微且放射学特征（大小、纹理、边界）多样，检测具有挑战性。构建包含这种多样性的训练数据集成本高昂且不切实际，因此需要逼真的合成数据生成方法。现有方法缺乏对合成结节生成的细粒度控制，限制了其在解决数据稀缺问题中的实用性。
AI.method: 提出基于扩散模型的框架，采用低秩适配器（LoRA）进行特征控制结节合成。首先通过结节掩码条件训练基础扩散模型实现大小和形状控制。然后训练独立的LoRA模块，每个模块专注于特定的放射学特征。针对多特征控制需求，利用LoRA的动态组合性并改进现有合并策略。为解决注意力区域重叠和参数空间非正交问题，在LoRA组合训练中引入新的正交性损失项。
AI.result: 在内部和公共数据集上的广泛实验表明，该方法提高了下游结节检测性能。放射科医生评估确认了生成结节的细粒度可控性，在多个定量指标上超越了现有的胸部X光片结节生成方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过特征控制的合成结节生成有效解决了医学影像数据稀缺问题，为计算机辅助诊断系统提供了更丰富和多样化的训练数据，具有重要的临床应用价值。

title: Optimisation of SOUP-GAN and CSR-GAN for High Resolution MR Images Reconstruction
summary: Magnetic Resonance (MR) imaging is a diagnostic tool used in modern medicine; however, its output can be affected by motion artefacts and may be limited by equipment. This research focuses on MRI image quality enhancement using two efficient Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) models: SOUP-GAN and CSR-GAN. In both models, meaningful architectural modifications were introduced. The generator and discriminator of each were further deepened by adding convolutional layers and were enhanced in filter sizes as well. The LeakyReLU activation function was used to improve gradient flow, and hyperparameter tuning strategies were applied, including a reduced learning rate and an optimal batch size. Moreover, spectral normalisation was proposed to address mode collapse and improve training stability. The experiment shows that CSR-GAN has better performance in reconstructing the image with higher frequency details and reducing noise compared to other methods, with an optimised PSNR of 34.6 and SSIM of 0.89. However, SOUP-GAN performed the best in terms of delivering less noisy images with good structures, achieving a PSNR of 34.4 and SSIM of 0.83. The obtained results indicate that the proposed enhanced GAN model can be a useful tool for MR image quality improvement for subsequent better disease diagnostics.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出两种改进的GAN模型（SOUP-GAN和CSR-GAN）用于MRI图像质量增强，通过加深网络结构、优化激活函数和超参数调整，有效减少运动伪影和噪声，提升图像质量。
AI.motivation: MRI成像在医学诊断中至关重要，但常受运动伪影和设备限制影响图像质量。需要开发有效的图像增强方法来改善MRI图像质量，以便进行更准确的疾病诊断。
AI.method: 提出两种改进的GAN模型：SOUP-GAN和CSR-GAN。主要改进包括：加深生成器和判别器的卷积层、增加滤波器尺寸、使用LeakyReLU激活函数改善梯度流、调整超参数（降低学习率、优化批次大小）、引入谱归一化解决模式崩溃和训练稳定性问题。
AI.result: CSR-GAN在重建高频细节和降噪方面表现最佳，PSNR达到34.6，SSIM为0.89；SOUP-GAN在生成低噪声且结构良好的图像方面表现最好，PSNR为34.4，SSIM为0.83。两种模型都能有效提升MRI图像质量。
AI.conclusion: 提出的增强GAN模型可作为MRI图像质量改进的有效工具，有助于后续更准确的疾病诊断。CSR-GAN更适合需要高频细节的场景，而SOUP-GAN在噪声控制方面更优。

title: FastLightGen: Fast and Light Video Generation with Fewer Steps and Parameters
summary: The recent advent of powerful video generation models, such as Hunyuan, WanX, Veo3, and Kling, has inaugurated a new era in the field. However, the practical deployment of these models is severely impeded by their substantial computational overhead, which stems from enormous parameter counts and the iterative, multi-step sampling process required during inference. Prior research on accelerating generative models has predominantly followed two distinct trajectories: reducing the number of sampling steps (e.g., LCM, DMD, and MagicDistillation) or compressing the model size for more efficient inference (e.g., ICMD). The potential of simultaneously compressing both to create a fast and lightweight model remains an unexplored avenue. In this paper, we propose FastLightGen, an algorithm that transforms large, computationally expensive models into fast, lightweight counterparts. The core idea is to construct an optimal teacher model, one engineered to maximize student performance, within a synergistic framework for distilling both model size and inference steps. Our extensive experiments on HunyuanVideo-ATI2V and WanX-TI2V reveal that a generator using 4-step sampling and 30\% parameter pruning achieves optimal visual quality under a constrained inference budget. Furthermore, FastLightGen consistently outperforms all competing methods, establishing a new state-of-the-art in efficient video generation.

AI.tldr: FastLightGen提出了一种同时压缩模型大小和减少采样步数的协同蒸馏框架，将大型视频生成模型转化为快速轻量级版本，在推理预算约束下实现最优视觉质量。
AI.motivation: 当前视频生成模型（如Hunyuan、WanX等）参数量大且需要多步迭代采样，导致计算开销巨大，严重阻碍实际部署。现有加速方法要么减少采样步数，要么压缩模型大小，但尚未探索同时压缩两者的协同方法。
AI.method: 提出FastLightGen算法，核心思想是在协同蒸馏框架中构建最优教师模型（engineered to maximize student performance），同时蒸馏模型大小和推理步数。通过4步采样和30%参数剪枝，在推理预算约束下实现最优视觉质量。
AI.result: 在HunyuanVideo-ATI2V和WanX-TI2V上的实验表明，使用4步采样和30%参数剪枝的生成器在约束推理预算下达到最优视觉质量。FastLightGen在所有竞争方法中表现最佳，建立了高效视频生成的新SOTA。
AI.conclusion: FastLightGen通过同时压缩模型大小和采样步数的协同蒸馏方法，成功解决了大型视频生成模型的计算开销问题，为高效视频生成提供了新的解决方案。

title: Tipping the Balance: Impact of Class Imbalance Correction on the Performance of Clinical Risk Prediction Models
summary: Objective: ML-based clinical risk prediction models are increasingly used to support decision-making in healthcare. While class-imbalance correction techniques are commonly applied to improve model performance in settings with rare outcomes, their impact on probabilistic calibration remains insufficiently understood. This study evaluated the effect of widely used resampling strategies on both discrimination and calibration across real-world clinical prediction tasks. Methods: Ten clinical datasets spanning diverse medical domains and including 605,842 patients were analyzed. Multiple machine-learning model families, including linear models and several non-linear approaches, were evaluated. Models were trained on the original data and under three commonly used 1:1 class-imbalance correction strategies (SMOTE, RUS, ROS). Performance was assessed on held-out data using discrimination and calibration metrics. Results: Across all datasets and model families, resampling had no positive impact on predictive performance. Changes in the Receiver Operating Characteristic Area Under Curve (ROC-AUC) relative to models trained on the original data were small and inconsistent (ROS: -0.002, p<0.05; RUS: -0.004, p>0.05; SMOTE: -0.01, p<0.05), with no resampling strategy demonstrating a systematic improvement. In contrast, resampling in general degraded the calibration performance. Models trained using imbalance correction exhibited higher Brier scores (0.029 to 0.080, p<0.05), reflecting poorer probabilistic accuracy, and marked deviations in calibration intercept and slope, indicating systematic distortions of predicted risk despite preserved rank-based performance. Conclusion: In a diverse set of real-world clinical prediction tasks, commonly used class-imbalance correction techniques did not provide generalizable improvements in discrimination and were associated with degraded calibration.

AI.tldr: 临床风险预测中常用的类别不平衡校正技术（SMOTE、RUS、ROS）在10个真实世界数据集上评估，结果显示这些方法对预测性能无正面影响，反而会降低概率校准质量。
AI.motivation: 机器学习临床风险预测模型在医疗决策中应用日益广泛，类别不平衡校正技术常用于改善罕见结局场景下的模型性能，但这些技术对概率校准的影响尚未充分理解。本研究旨在评估常用重采样策略对临床预测任务中区分度和校准的影响。
AI.method: 分析了10个涵盖不同医疗领域的临床数据集（共605,842名患者），评估了包括线性模型和多种非线性方法在内的多个机器学习模型家族。在原始数据上训练模型，并应用三种常用的1:1类别不平衡校正策略（SMOTE、RUS、ROS）。在保留数据上使用区分度和校准指标评估性能。
AI.result: 在所有数据集和模型家族中，重采样对预测性能无正面影响。ROC-AUC相对于原始数据训练的模型变化小且不一致（ROS: -0.002, p<0.05; RUS: -0.004, p>0.05; SMOTE: -0.01, p<0.05），无任何重采样策略显示系统性改进。相反，重采样普遍降低了校准性能，使用不平衡校正训练的模型表现出更高的Brier分数（0.029到0.080, p<0.05），反映了较差的概率准确性，校准截距和斜率出现显著偏差。
AI.conclusion: 在多样化的真实世界临床预测任务中，常用的类别不平衡校正技术未能提供可泛化的区分度改进，并且与校准性能下降相关。尽管保持了基于排名的性能，但预测风险存在系统性扭曲。

title: DiffusionXRay: A Diffusion and GAN-Based Approach for Enhancing Digitally Reconstructed Chest Radiographs
summary: Deep learning-based automated diagnosis of lung cancer has emerged as a crucial advancement that enables healthcare professionals to detect and initiate treatment earlier. However, these models require extensive training datasets with diverse case-specific properties. High-quality annotated data is particularly challenging to obtain, especially for cases with subtle pulmonary nodules that are difficult to detect even for experienced radiologists. This scarcity of well-labeled datasets can limit model performance and generalization across different patient populations. Digitally reconstructed radiographs (DRR) using CT-Scan to generate synthetic frontal chest X-rays with artificially inserted lung nodules offers one potential solution. However, this approach suffers from significant image quality degradation, particularly in the form of blurred anatomical features and loss of fine lung field structures. To overcome this, we introduce DiffusionXRay, a novel image restoration pipeline for Chest X-ray images that synergistically leverages denoising diffusion probabilistic models (DDPMs) and generative adversarial networks (GANs). DiffusionXRay incorporates a unique two-stage training process: First, we investigate two independent approaches, DDPM-LQ and GAN-based MUNIT-LQ, to generate low-quality CXRs, addressing the challenge of training data scarcity, posing this as a style transfer problem. Subsequently, we train a DDPM-based model on paired low-quality and high-quality images, enabling it to learn the nuances of X-ray image restoration. Our method demonstrates promising results in enhancing image clarity, contrast, and overall diagnostic value of chest X-rays while preserving subtle yet clinically significant artifacts, validated by both quantitative metrics and expert radiological assessment.

AI.tldr: 提出DiffusionXRay，一种结合DDPM和GAN的胸部X光图像恢复方法，用于解决肺癌自动诊断中高质量标注数据稀缺的问题
AI.motivation: 肺癌自动诊断需要大量多样化标注数据，但高质量标注数据稀缺，特别是对于细微肺结节。现有DRR方法生成的合成X光图像质量差，存在解剖特征模糊和精细结构丢失问题
AI.method: 提出两阶段训练流程：1) 使用DDPM-LQ和GAN-based MUNIT-LQ生成低质量CXR图像；2) 在配对的低质量-高质量图像上训练DDPM模型，学习X光图像恢复的细微特征
AI.result: 方法在增强图像清晰度、对比度和整体诊断价值方面表现出色，同时保留了临床重要的细微伪影，通过定量指标和放射学专家评估验证
AI.conclusion: DiffusionXRay为解决医学图像数据稀缺问题提供了有效解决方案，通过生成高质量合成数据提升肺癌自动诊断模型的性能

title: Scaling Quantum Machine Learning without Tricks: High-Resolution and Diverse Image Generation
comment: 25 pages, 16 figures. Main text: 14 pages, 7 figures. Appendix: 11 pages, 9 figures
summary: Quantum generative modeling is a rapidly evolving discipline at the intersection of quantum computing and machine learning. Contemporary quantum machine learning is generally limited to toy examples or heavily restricted datasets with few elements. This is not only due to the current limitations of available quantum hardware but also due to the absence of inductive biases arising from application-agnostic designs. Current quantum solutions must resort to tricks to scale down high-resolution images, such as relying heavily on dimensionality reduction or utilizing multiple quantum models for low-resolution image patches. Building on recent developments in classical image loading to quantum computers, we circumvent these limitations and train quantum Wasserstein GANs on the established classical MNIST and Fashion-MNIST datasets. Using the complete datasets, our system generates full-resolution images across all ten classes and establishes a new state-of-the-art performance with a single end-to-end quantum generator without tricks. As a proof-of-principle, we also demonstrate that our approach can be extended to color images, exemplified on the Street View House Numbers dataset. We analyze how the choice of variational circuit architecture introduces inductive biases, which crucially unlock this performance. Furthermore, enhanced noise input techniques enable highly diverse image generation while maintaining quality. Finally, we show promising results even under quantum shot noise conditions.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种量子Wasserstein GAN，能够直接在完整MNIST和Fashion-MNIST数据集上生成全分辨率图像，无需降维或分块处理，实现了量子生成模型的性能突破。
AI.motivation: 当前量子机器学习受限于硬件限制和缺乏应用特定的归纳偏置，通常只能处理简化数据集或依赖降维技巧。作者旨在克服这些限制，实现量子生成模型在完整数据集上的端到端训练。
AI.method: 采用量子Wasserstein GAN架构，利用经典图像加载到量子计算机的技术，使用完整的MNIST和Fashion-MNIST数据集。通过变分电路架构设计引入归纳偏置，并采用增强的噪声输入技术来提高生成多样性。
AI.result: 实现了在完整MNIST和Fashion-MNIST数据集上生成全分辨率图像，建立了新的最先进性能。方法可扩展到彩色图像（SVHN数据集），且在量子噪声条件下仍能保持良好性能。
AI.conclusion: 该工作展示了量子生成模型在完整数据集上的可行性，通过精心设计的变分电路架构引入归纳偏置是性能提升的关键，为量子机器学习向实际应用迈出了重要一步。

title: CMI-RewardBench: Evaluating Music Reward Models with Compositional Multimodal Instruction
summary: While music generation models have evolved to handle complex multimodal inputs mixing text, lyrics, and reference audio, evaluation mechanisms have lagged behind. In this paper, we bridge this critical gap by establishing a comprehensive ecosystem for music reward modeling under Compositional Multimodal Instruction (CMI), where the generated music may be conditioned on text descriptions, lyrics, and audio prompts. We first introduce CMI-Pref-Pseudo, a large-scale preference dataset comprising 110k pseudo-labeled samples, and CMI-Pref, a high-quality, human-annotated corpus tailored for fine-grained alignment tasks. To unify the evaluation landscape, we propose CMI-RewardBench, a unified benchmark that evaluates music reward models on heterogeneous samples across musicality, text-music alignment, and compositional instruction alignment. Leveraging these resources, we develop CMI reward models (CMI-RMs), a parameter-efficient reward model family capable of processing heterogeneous inputs. We evaluate their correlation with human judgments scores on musicality and alignment on CMI-Pref along with previous datasets. Further experiments demonstrate that CMI-RM not only correlates strongly with human judgments, but also enables effective inference-time scaling via top-k filtering. The necessary training data, benchmarks, and reward models are publicly available.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个用于音乐生成模型评估的综合生态系统，包括大规模偏好数据集、统一基准测试和参数高效的奖励模型家族，以解决多模态音乐生成评估滞后的问题。
AI.motivation: 音乐生成模型已能处理复杂的多模态输入（文本、歌词、参考音频），但评估机制滞后。需要建立全面的音乐奖励建模生态系统来弥合这一关键差距。
AI.method: 1) 构建CMI-Pref-Pseudo（11万伪标注样本）和CMI-Pref（高质量人工标注）数据集；2) 提出CMI-RewardBench统一基准测试；3) 开发CMI-RM参数高效奖励模型家族，能处理异构输入。
AI.result: CMI-RM与人类在音乐性和对齐性判断上强相关，并通过top-k过滤实现有效的推理时扩展。在CMI-Pref和先前数据集上均表现出良好相关性。
AI.conclusion: 建立了全面的音乐奖励建模生态系统，包括数据集、基准测试和奖励模型，显著提升了多模态音乐生成的评估能力，相关资源已公开。

title: CoopDiff: A Diffusion-Guided Approach for Cooperation under Corruptions
summary: Cooperative perception lets agents share information to expand coverage and improve scene understanding. However, in real-world scenarios, diverse and unpredictable corruptions undermine its robustness and generalization. To address these challenges, we introduce CoopDiff, a diffusion-based cooperative perception framework that mitigates corruptions via a denoising mechanism. CoopDiff adopts a teacher-student paradigm: the Quality-Aware Teacher performs voxel-level early fusion with Quality of Interest weighting and semantic guidance, then produces clean supervision features via a diffusion denoiser. The Dual-Branch Diffusion Student first separates ego and cooperative streams in encoding to reconstruct the teacher's clean targets. And then, an Ego-Guided Cross-Attention mechanism facilitates balanced decoding under degradation by adaptively integrating ego and cooperative features. We evaluate CoopDiff on two constructed multi-degradation benchmarks, OPV2Vn and DAIR-V2Xn, each incorporating six corruption types, including environmental and sensor-level distortions. Benefiting from the inherent denoising properties of diffusion, CoopDiff consistently outperforms prior methods across all degradation types and lowers the relative corruption error. Furthermore, it offers a tunable balance between precision and inference efficiency.

AI.tldr: CoopDiff是一个基于扩散模型的协作感知框架，通过去噪机制处理现实世界中的多样化损坏，在教师-学生范式下实现鲁棒的感知融合。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中的协作感知面临多样且不可预测的损坏（环境干扰、传感器失真等），这些损坏会削弱系统的鲁棒性和泛化能力。现有方法在处理这些复杂损坏时表现不足，需要一种能够有效缓解损坏影响的协作感知框架。
AI.method: CoopDiff采用教师-学生范式：1) 质量感知教师：通过兴趣质量加权和语义指导进行体素级早期融合，然后使用扩散去噪器生成干净的监督特征；2) 双分支扩散学生：在编码阶段分离自车和协作流以重建教师的干净目标，然后通过自车引导的交叉注意力机制在解码阶段自适应地融合自车和协作特征。
AI.result: 在构建的两个多损坏基准测试OPV2Vn和DAIR-V2Xn（各包含六种损坏类型）上，CoopDiff在所有损坏类型上都优于现有方法，降低了相对损坏误差。同时，该框架提供了精度和推理效率之间的可调平衡。
AI.conclusion: CoopDiff通过扩散模型的固有去噪特性，有效提升了协作感知系统在现实世界损坏条件下的鲁棒性和性能，为处理多样化损坏提供了有效的解决方案。

title: A Monte Carlo estimator of flow fields for sampling and noise problems
comment: 10 pages, 5 figures. Proceedings of the 42nd International Symposium on Lattice Field Theory (LATTICE2025)
summary: Learned field transformations may help address ubiquitous critical slowing down and signal-to-noise problems in lattice field theory. In the context of an annealed sequence of distributions, field transformations are defined by integrating flow fields that exactly solve a local transport problem. These proceedings discuss a new Monte Carlo approach to evaluating these flow fields, which can then be used directly in such contexts or as a means of generating unbiased training data for machine learning approaches. By defining the Monte Carlo estimator using coupled Langevin noise, the statistical noise in the required integrals is significantly mitigated. Demonstrations of the method include a U(1) transport problem and an SU(N) glueball correlator.

AI.tldr: 提出一种新的蒙特卡洛方法，用于评估场变换中的流场，通过耦合朗之万噪声显著降低统计噪声，应用于U(1)输运问题和SU(N)胶球关联函数。
AI.motivation: 解决格点场论中普遍存在的临界减速和信噪比问题。学习场变换可能有助于解决这些问题，但需要有效方法来评估定义这些变换的流场。
AI.method: 提出新的蒙特卡洛方法评估流场，使用耦合朗之万噪声定义蒙特卡洛估计器，显著降低所需积分中的统计噪声。该方法可直接用于场变换，或为机器学习方法生成无偏训练数据。
AI.result: 方法在U(1)输运问题和SU(N)胶球关联函数中得到验证，展示了统计噪声的显著降低。
AI.conclusion: 提出的蒙特卡洛方法能有效评估场变换中的流场，为解决格点场论中的临界减速和信噪比问题提供了新工具。

title: MVR: Multi-view Video Reward Shaping for Reinforcement Learning
summary: Reward design is of great importance for solving complex tasks with reinforcement learning. Recent studies have explored using image-text similarity produced by vision-language models (VLMs) to augment rewards of a task with visual feedback. A common practice linearly adds VLM scores to task or success rewards without explicit shaping, potentially altering the optimal policy. Moreover, such approaches, often relying on single static images, struggle with tasks whose desired behavior involves complex, dynamic motions spanning multiple visually different states. Furthermore, single viewpoints can occlude critical aspects of an agent's behavior. To address these issues, this paper presents Multi-View Video Reward Shaping (MVR), a framework that models the relevance of states regarding the target task using videos captured from multiple viewpoints. MVR leverages video-text similarity from a frozen pre-trained VLM to learn a state relevance function that mitigates the bias towards specific static poses inherent in image-based methods. Additionally, we introduce a state-dependent reward shaping formulation that integrates task-specific rewards and VLM-based guidance, automatically reducing the influence of VLM guidance once the desired motion pattern is achieved. We confirm the efficacy of the proposed framework with extensive experiments on challenging humanoid locomotion tasks from HumanoidBench and manipulation tasks from MetaWorld, verifying the design choices through ablation studies.

AI.tldr: MVR框架通过多视角视频和视频-文本相似性学习状态相关性函数，解决基于图像的VLM奖励设计问题，避免对特定静态姿态的偏好，并在复杂人形运动和操作任务中验证有效性。
AI.motivation: 当前基于视觉语言模型(VLM)的奖励设计存在三个主要问题：1) 线性添加VLM分数可能改变最优策略；2) 依赖单张静态图像难以处理涉及复杂动态运动的任务；3) 单视角可能遮挡关键行为。需要一种能处理多状态、多视角动态任务的方法。
AI.method: 提出多视角视频奖励塑形(MVR)框架：1) 使用多视角视频捕捉动态行为；2) 利用预训练VLM的视频-文本相似性学习状态相关性函数；3) 引入状态依赖的奖励塑形公式，自动减少VLM指导的影响；4) 在HumanoidBench和MetaWorld任务上进行实验验证。
AI.result: 在挑战性的人形运动任务和操作任务上验证了MVR的有效性，通过消融研究确认了设计选择。相比基于图像的方法，MVR能更好地处理复杂动态运动，避免对特定静态姿态的偏好。
AI.conclusion: MVR框架通过多视角视频和状态依赖的奖励塑形，解决了基于VLM的奖励设计中的关键问题，为复杂视觉任务的强化学习提供了更有效的奖励设计方法。

title: Cross-modal Identity Mapping: Minimizing Information Loss in Modality Conversion via Reinforcement Learning
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) often omit or misrepresent critical visual content in generated image captions. Minimizing such information loss will force LVLMs to focus on image details to generate precise descriptions. However, measuring information loss during modality conversion is inherently challenging due to the modal gap between visual content and text output. In this paper, we argue that the quality of an image caption is positively correlated with the similarity between images retrieved via text search using that caption. Based on this insight, we further propose Cross-modal Identity Mapping (CIM), a reinforcement learning framework that enhances image captioning without requiring additional annotations. Specifically, the method quantitatively evaluates the information loss from two perspectives: Gallery Representation Consistency and Query-gallery Image Relevance. Supervised under these metrics, LVLM minimizes information loss and aims to achieve identity mapping from images to captions. The experimental results demonstrate the superior performance of our method in image captioning, even when compared with Supervised Fine-Tuning. Particularly, on the COCO-LN500 benchmark, CIM achieves a 20% improvement in relation reasoning on Qwen2.5-VL-7B.The code will be released when the paper is accepted.

AI.tldr: 提出Cross-modal Identity Mapping (CIM)强化学习框架，通过跨模态检索相似性评估信息损失，无需额外标注即可提升大视觉语言模型的图像描述质量
AI.motivation: 大视觉语言模型在生成图像描述时经常遗漏或错误表示关键视觉内容，由于视觉内容与文本输出之间的模态差距，测量模态转换中的信息损失具有挑战性
AI.method: 提出跨模态身份映射(CIM)强化学习框架，基于"图像描述质量与使用该描述进行文本搜索检索到的图像相似性正相关"的洞察，从Gallery Representation Consistency和Query-gallery Image Relevance两个角度定量评估信息损失，监督LVLM最小化信息损失
AI.result: 在COCO-LN500基准测试中，CIM在Qwen2.5-VL-7B上实现了关系推理20%的改进，性能优于监督微调
AI.conclusion: CIM框架通过跨模态检索相似性有效评估和减少信息损失，显著提升图像描述质量，为无需额外标注的LVLM优化提供了新思路

title: Wild-Drive: Off-Road Scene Captioning and Path Planning via Robust Multi-modal Routing and Efficient Large Language Model
summary: Explainability and transparent decision-making are essential for the safe deployment of autonomous driving systems. Scene captioning summarizes environmental conditions and risk factors in natural language, improving transparency, safety, and human--robot interaction. However, most existing approaches target structured urban scenarios; in off-road environments, they are vulnerable to single-modality degradations caused by rain, fog, snow, and darkness, and they lack a unified framework that jointly models structured scene captioning and path planning. To bridge this gap, we propose Wild-Drive, an efficient framework for off-road scene captioning and path planning. Wild-Drive adopts modern multimodal encoders and introduces a task-conditioned modality-routing bridge, MoRo-Former, to adaptively aggregate reliable information under degraded sensing. It then integrates an efficient large language model (LLM), together with a planning token and a gate recurrent unit (GRU) decoder, to generate structured captions and predict future trajectories. We also build the OR-C2P Benchmark, which covers structured off-road scene captioning and path planning under diverse sensor corruption conditions. Experiments on OR-C2P dataset and a self-collected dataset show that Wild-Drive outperforms prior LLM-based methods and remains more stable under degraded sensing. The code and benchmark will be publicly available at https://github.com/wangzihanggg/Wild-Drive.

AI.tldr: Wild-Drive是一个用于越野场景描述和路径规划的框架，采用多模态编码器和任务条件模态路由桥（MoRo-Former）来适应传感器退化，结合高效LLM生成结构化描述和预测轨迹。
AI.motivation: 现有场景描述方法主要针对结构化城市场景，在越野环境中容易受到雨、雾、雪、黑暗等单模态退化影响，且缺乏统一框架来联合建模结构化场景描述和路径规划。
AI.method: 采用现代多模态编码器，引入任务条件模态路由桥MoRo-Former自适应聚合可靠信息，集成高效LLM配合规划token和GRU解码器生成结构化描述和预测未来轨迹。
AI.result: 在OR-C2P数据集和自收集数据集上，Wild-Drive优于现有LLM方法，在传感器退化条件下表现更稳定。
AI.conclusion: Wild-Drive为越野自动驾驶提供了可解释的决策框架，通过多模态融合和LLM集成解决了传感器退化问题，提高了透明度和安全性。

title: Towards Principled Dataset Distillation: A Spectral Distribution Perspective
summary: Dataset distillation (DD) aims to compress large-scale datasets into compact synthetic counterparts for efficient model training. However, existing DD methods exhibit substantial performance degradation on long-tailed datasets. We identify two fundamental challenges: heuristic design choices for distribution discrepancy measure and uniform treatment of imbalanced classes. To address these limitations, we propose Class-Aware Spectral Distribution Matching (CSDM), which reformulates distribution alignment via the spectrum of a well-behaved kernel function. This technique maps the original samples into frequency space, resulting in the Spectral Distribution Distance (SDD). To mitigate class imbalance, we exploit the unified form of SDD to perform amplitude-phase decomposition, which adaptively prioritizes the realism in tail classes. On CIFAR-10-LT, with 10 images per class, CSDM achieves a 14.0% improvement over state-of-the-art DD methods, with only a 5.7% performance drop when the number of images in tail classes decreases from 500 to 25, demonstrating strong stability on long-tailed data.

AI.tldr: CSDM提出了一种基于谱分布匹配的类感知数据集蒸馏方法，显著提升了长尾数据集上的性能表现。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集蒸馏方法在长尾数据集上性能显著下降，主要存在两个问题：分布差异度量的启发式设计选择，以及对不平衡类别的统一处理方式。
AI.method: 提出类感知谱分布匹配（CSDM），通过核函数谱将原始样本映射到频率空间，得到谱分布距离（SDD）。利用SDD的统一形式进行振幅-相位分解，自适应地优先考虑尾部类别的真实性。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10-LT上，每类10张图像，CSDM比最先进的DD方法提升了14.0%。当尾部类别图像数量从500减少到25时，性能仅下降5.7%，在长尾数据上表现出强大的稳定性。
AI.conclusion: CSDM通过谱分布匹配和类感知处理，有效解决了长尾数据集蒸馏中的分布对齐和类别不平衡问题，显著提升了性能稳定性。

title: Search Multilayer Perceptron-Based Fusion for Efficient and Accurate Siamese Tracking
comment: 23 pages, 12 figures, 7 tables. This work was completed in 2024 and accepted for publication in IEEE TCDS (2026)
summary: Siamese visual trackers have recently advanced through increasingly sophisticated fusion mechanisms built on convolutional or Transformer architectures. However, both struggle to deliver pixel-level interactions efficiently on resource-constrained hardware, leading to a persistent accuracy-efficiency imbalance. Motivated by this limitation, we redesign the Siamese neck with a simple yet effective Multilayer Perception (MLP)-based fusion module that enables pixel-level interaction with minimal structural overhead. Nevertheless, naively stacking MLP blocks introduces a new challenge: computational cost can scale quadratically with channel width. To overcome this, we construct a hierarchical search space of carefully designed MLP modules and introduce a customized relaxation strategy that enables differentiable neural architecture search (DNAS) to decouple channel-width optimization from other architectural choices. This targeted decoupling automatically balances channel width and depth, yielding a low-complexity architecture. The resulting tracker achieves state-of-the-art accuracy-efficiency trade-offs. It ranks among the top performers on four general-purpose and three aerial tracking benchmarks, while maintaining real-time performance on both resource-constrained Graphics Processing Units (GPUs) and Neural Processing Units (NPUs).

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于MLP的Siamese视觉跟踪器融合模块，通过可微分神经架构搜索优化通道宽度与深度平衡，实现像素级交互与实时性能
AI.motivation: 现有Siamese跟踪器在卷积或Transformer架构上构建的融合机制难以在资源受限硬件上实现高效的像素级交互，存在精度与效率的不平衡问题
AI.method: 1) 设计基于MLP的简单有效融合模块实现像素级交互；2) 构建层次化MLP模块搜索空间；3) 引入定制松弛策略实现可微分神经架构搜索，解耦通道宽度优化与其他架构选择
AI.result: 在四个通用和三个航空跟踪基准测试中达到顶尖性能，在资源受限GPU和NPU上保持实时性能，实现最优的精度-效率权衡
AI.conclusion: MLP-based融合模块结合DNAS优化能有效解决Siamese跟踪器的精度-效率不平衡问题，为资源受限硬件提供高效解决方案

title: WhisperNet: A Scalable Solution for Bandwidth-Efficient Collaboration
summary: Collaborative perception is vital for autonomous driving yet remains constrained by tight communication budgets. Earlier work reduced bandwidth by compressing full feature maps with fixed-rate encoders, which adapts poorly to a changing environment, and it further evolved into spatial selection methods that improve efficiency by focusing on salient regions, but this object-centric approach often sacrifices global context, weakening holistic scene understanding. To overcome these limitations, we introduce \textit{WhisperNet}, a bandwidth-aware framework that proposes a novel, receiver-centric paradigm for global coordination across agents. Senders generate lightweight saliency metadata, while the receiver formulates a global request plan that dynamically budgets feature contributions across agents and features, retrieving only the most informative features. A collaborative feature routing module then aligns related messages before fusion to ensure structural consistency. Extensive experiments show that WhisperNet achieves state-of-the-art performance, improving AP@0.7 on OPV2V by 2.4\% with only 0.5\% of the communication cost. As a plug-and-play component, it boosts strong baselines with merely 5\% of full bandwidth while maintaining robustness under localization noise. These results demonstrate that globally-coordinated allocation across \textit{what} and \textit{where} to share is the key to achieving efficient collaborative perception.

AI.tldr: WhisperNet是一个用于自动驾驶协作感知的带宽感知框架，采用接收者中心的全局协调范式，通过轻量级显著性元数据和动态特征贡献预算，仅传输最信息丰富的特征，在极低通信成本下实现SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有协作感知方法存在两个主要问题：1）固定速率编码器压缩完整特征图，无法适应动态环境变化；2）空间选择方法聚焦显著区域但牺牲全局上下文，削弱整体场景理解。需要克服这些限制以实现高效协作感知。
AI.method: 提出接收者中心的全局协调范式：发送者生成轻量级显著性元数据，接收者制定全局请求计划，动态预算跨代理和跨特征的特征贡献，仅检索最信息丰富的特征。包含协作特征路由模块，在融合前对齐相关消息以确保结构一致性。
AI.result: 在OPV2V数据集上，AP@0.7提升2.4%，通信成本仅为0.5%。作为即插即用组件，仅使用5%完整带宽即可提升强基线模型性能，并在定位噪声下保持鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 跨"共享什么"和"在哪里共享"的全局协调分配是实现高效协作感知的关键。WhisperNet展示了接收者中心范式在极低通信成本下实现高性能的潜力。

title: Token Management in Multi-Tenant AI Inference Platforms
summary: Multi-tenant AI inference platforms must balance resource utilization against service-level guarantees under variable demand. Conventional approaches fail to achieve this balance: dedicated endpoints strand capacity on idle models, while rate limits ignore the heterogeneous cost of inference requests. We introduce \emph{token pools}, a control-plane abstraction that represents inference capacity as explicit entitlements expressed in inference-native units (token throughput, KV cache, concurrency). Unlike rate limits, which govern request admission without regard to execution cost, token pools authorize both admission and autoscaling from the same capacity model, ensuring consistency between what is promised and what is provisioned. The abstraction captures burst modes across multiple dimensions invisible to conventional throttling. Dynamic per-entitlement limits on each burst dimension enable fine-grained control over resource consumption while permitting work-conserving backfill by low-priority traffic. The design supports priority-aware allocation, service tiers with differentiated guarantees, and debt-based fairness mechanisms, all without modifying the underlying inference runtime or cluster scheduler. In experiments on a Kubernetes cluster with vLLM backends, token pools maintain a bounded P99 latency for guaranteed workloads during overload by selectively throttling spot traffic, while a baseline without admission control experiences unbounded latency degradation across all workloads. A second experiment demonstrates debt-based fair-share convergence among elastic workloads with heterogeneous SLO requirements during capacity scarcity.

AI.tldr: 提出token pools作为多租户AI推理平台的控制平面抽象，将推理容量表示为token吞吐量、KV缓存和并发度等推理原生单位的显式授权，统一管理请求准入和自动扩缩容，在过载时保障有保证工作负载的延迟SLO。
AI.motivation: 多租户AI推理平台需要在可变需求下平衡资源利用率和服务级别保证。传统方法存在缺陷：专用端点导致空闲模型容量浪费，而速率限制忽略了推理请求的异构成本。需要一种能统一管理准入控制和自动扩缩容的容量模型。
AI.method: 引入token pools抽象，将推理容量表示为token吞吐量、KV缓存和并发度等推理原生单位的显式授权。支持多维度突发模式，通过动态的每授权限制实现细粒度资源控制，允许低优先级流量进行工作保持型回填。设计支持优先级感知分配、差异化服务层级和基于债务的公平机制。
AI.result: 在Kubernetes集群和vLLM后端的实验中，token pools在过载时通过选择性限制spot流量，维持了有保证工作负载的有界P99延迟，而基线无准入控制方案在所有工作负载上都经历了无界延迟退化。第二个实验展示了在容量稀缺时，具有异构SLO需求的弹性工作负载之间基于债务的公平共享收敛。
AI.conclusion: token pools提供了一种有效的控制平面抽象，能够在多租户AI推理平台中统一管理准入控制和自动扩缩容，确保承诺容量与配置容量的一致性，同时支持细粒度资源控制、优先级感知分配和公平性机制。

title: Dual Distillation for Few-Shot Anomaly Detection
summary: Anomaly detection is a critical task in computer vision with profound implications for medical imaging, where identifying pathologies early can directly impact patient outcomes. While recent unsupervised anomaly detection approaches show promise, they require substantial normal training data and struggle to generalize across anatomical contexts. We introduce D$^2$4FAD, a novel dual distillation framework for few-shot anomaly detection that identifies anomalies in previously unseen tasks using only a small number of normal reference images. Our approach leverages a pre-trained encoder as a teacher network to extract multi-scale features from both support and query images, while a student decoder learns to distill knowledge from the teacher on query images and self-distill on support images. We further propose a learn-to-weight mechanism that dynamically assesses the reference value of each support image conditioned on the query, optimizing anomaly detection performance. To evaluate our method, we curate a comprehensive benchmark dataset comprising 13,084 images across four organs, four imaging modalities, and five disease categories. Extensive experiments demonstrate that D$^2$4FAD significantly outperforms existing approaches, establishing a new state-of-the-art in few-shot medical anomaly detection. Code is available at https://github.com/ttttqz/D24FAD.

AI.tldr: D²4FAD：一种用于医学图像异常检测的双蒸馏框架，仅需少量正常参考图像即可在新任务中检测异常，通过教师-学生架构和多尺度特征提取实现少样本学习。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督异常检测方法需要大量正常训练数据，且难以跨解剖结构泛化。医学影像中早期发现病理对患者预后至关重要，但数据获取困难，需要少样本学习方法。
AI.method: 提出双蒸馏框架：1) 使用预训练编码器作为教师网络提取支持图像和查询图像的多尺度特征；2) 学生解码器在查询图像上从教师蒸馏知识，在支持图像上自蒸馏；3) 引入学习加权机制，根据查询图像动态评估每个支持图像的参考价值。
AI.result: 在包含13,084张图像、4个器官、4种成像模态、5种疾病类别的综合基准数据集上，D²4FAD显著优于现有方法，建立了医学少样本异常检测的新SOTA。
AI.conclusion: D²4FAD通过双蒸馏框架和动态加权机制，实现了仅需少量正常参考图像的少样本异常检测，在医学影像领域具有重要应用价值。

title: QANTIS: A Hardware-Validated Quantum Platform for POMDP Planning and Multi-Target Data Association
comment: 31 pages, 4 figures, 12 tables; 45-experiment hardware study on IBM Heron QPUs
summary: Autonomous navigation under uncertainty requires solving partially observable Markov decision processes (POMDPs) for planning and assigning sensor measurements to tracked targets--a task known as multi-target data association (MTDA). Both problems become computationally demanding at scale: belief conditioning costs $\mathcal{O}(P(e)^{-1})$ per node under rare evidence, while MTDA is NP-hard. Quantum amplitude amplification can quadratically reduce the belief-update query cost to $\mathcal{O}(P(e)^{-1/2})$, while QUBO reformulations expose MTDA to quantum and quantum-inspired optimisation heuristics. We present QANTIS, a modular platform that integrates quantum belief update (Grover amplitude amplification and BIQAE), QUBO-based data association via FPC-QAOA, and composable error mitigation, and we report a 45-experiment hardware study on three IBM Heron backends. On hardware, a single Grover iterate applied to a Tiger belief oracle amplifies a rare observation probability from $0.179$ to $0.907$ ($5.1\times$; ISA 18) while preserving the Bayesian posterior (Hellinger $0.0015$), increasing usable-shot yield from 1,463 to 7,429. We interpret this as a hardware validation of the quadratic query-complexity mechanism at $k=1$ with posterior preservation, rather than a wall-clock advantage claim. We further demonstrate, to our knowledge, the first closed-loop hybrid quantum-classical Tiger POMDP on superconducting hardware ($T=8$, max Hellinger below $0.015$), and empirically characterise NISQ feasibility boundaries: ZNE-based error mitigation is beneficial below ISA $\approx 100$ and harmful above ISA $\gtrsim 1{,}000$; FPC-QAOA is meaningful at $\leq 15$ QUBO variables (ISA $\lesssim 450$). These results characterise practical operating regimes on current superconducting hardware rather than wall-clock quantum advantage at today's problem scales.

AI.tldr: QANTIS是一个量子增强的自主导航平台，整合了量子信念更新（Grover振幅放大和BIQAE）、基于QUBO的数据关联（FPC-QAOA）和可组合误差缓解，在IBM Heron量子硬件上进行了45个实验验证。
AI.motivation: 自主导航在不确定性下需要解决部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDPs）和多目标数据关联（MTDA）问题，这两个问题在大规模时计算成本都很高：信念更新在罕见证据下成本为O(P(e)^{-1})，而MTDA是NP难问题。量子计算可能提供二次加速。
AI.method: 开发了QANTIS平台，整合了三个核心模块：1）量子信念更新（使用Grover振幅放大和BIQAE算法），2）基于QUBO的数据关联（使用FPC-QAOA算法），3）可组合误差缓解技术。在IBM Heron超导量子硬件上进行了45个实验验证。
AI.result: 硬件实验显示：单个Grover迭代将罕见观测概率从0.179提升到0.907（5.1倍），同时保持贝叶斯后验（Hellinger距离0.0015）。实现了首个闭环混合量子-经典Tiger POMDP。确定了NISQ可行性边界：ZNE误差缓解在ISA≈100以下有益，在ISA≳1000以上有害；FPC-QAOA在≤15个QUBO变量时有效。
AI.conclusion: 该工作展示了在当前超导量子硬件上量子增强自主导航的可行性，验证了量子查询复杂度二次加速机制，但并非声称在现有问题规模上具有实际时间优势。确定了NISQ设备的实际操作边界，为量子增强自主导航系统提供了实用指导。

title: Preoperative-to-intraoperative Liver Registration for Laparoscopic Surgery via Latent-Grounded Correspondence Constraints
summary: In laparoscopic liver surgery, augmented reality technology enhances intraoperative anatomical guidance by overlaying 3D liver models from preoperative CT/MRI onto laparoscopic 2D views. However, existing registration methods lack explicit modeling of reliable 2D-3D geometric correspondences supported by latent evidence, leading to limited interpretability and potentially unstable alignment in clinical scenarios. In this work, we introduce Land-Reg, a correspondence-driven deformable registration framework that explicitly learns latent-grounded 2D-3D landmark correspondences as an interpretable intermediate representation to bridge cross-modal alignment. For rigid registration, Land-Reg embraces a Cross-modal Latent Alignment module to map multi-modal features into a unified latent space. Further, an Uncertainty-enhanced Overlap Landmark Detector with similarity matching is proposed to robustly estimate explicit 2D-3D landmark correspondences. For non-rigid registration, we design a novel shape-constrained supervision strategy that anchors shape deformation to matched landmarks through reprojection consistency and incorporates local-isometric regularization to alleviate inherent 2D-3D depth ambiguity, while a rendered-mask alignment enforces global shape consistency. Experimental results on the P2ILF dataset demonstrate the superiority of our method on both rigid pose estimation and non-rigid deformation. Our code will be available at https://github.com/cuiruize/Land-Reg.

AI.tldr: 提出Land-Reg框架，通过显式学习基于潜在证据的2D-3D地标对应关系，实现腹腔镜肝脏手术中的可变形配准，提高配准的稳定性和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有腹腔镜肝脏手术增强现实配准方法缺乏对可靠2D-3D几何对应关系的显式建模，导致可解释性有限且在临床场景中配准不稳定。
AI.method: 1) 跨模态潜在对齐模块统一多模态特征；2) 不确定性增强重叠地标检测器估计显式2D-3D对应关系；3) 形状约束监督策略通过重投影一致性锚定形变；4) 局部等距正则化缓解深度模糊；5) 渲染掩码对齐保证全局形状一致性。
AI.result: 在P2ILF数据集上，该方法在刚性姿态估计和非刚性形变配准方面均表现出优越性能。
AI.conclusion: Land-Reg通过显式学习基于潜在证据的2D-3D地标对应关系，为跨模态配准提供了可解释的中间表示，提高了临床场景中的配准稳定性和准确性。

title: KROM: Kernelized Reduced Order Modeling
summary: We propose KROM, a kernel-based reduced-order framework for fast solution of nonlinear partial differential equations. KROM formulates PDE solution as a minimum-norm (Gaussian-process) recovery problem in an RKHS, and accelerates the resulting kernel solves by sparsifying the precision matrix via sparse Cholesky factorization. A central ingredient is an empirical kernel constructed from a snapshot library of PDE solutions (generated under varying forcings, initial data, boundary data, or parameters). This snapshot-driven kernel adapts to problem-specific structure -- boundary behavior, oscillations, nonsmooth features, linear constraints, conservation and dissipation laws -- thereby reducing the dependence on hand-tuned stationary kernels. The resulting method yields an implicit reduced model: after sparsification, only a localized subset of effective degrees of freedom is used online. We report numerical results for semilinear elliptic equations, discontinuous-coefficient Darcy flow, viscous Burgers, Allen--Cahn, and two-dimensional Navier--Stokes, showing that empirical kernels can match or outperform Matérn baselines, especially in nonsmooth regimes. We also provide error bounds that separate discretization effects, snapshot-space approximation error, and sparse-Cholesky approximation error.

AI.tldr: KROM：基于核的降阶框架，通过稀疏Cholesky分解加速非线性偏微分方程求解，使用经验核适应问题特定结构
AI.motivation: 传统PDE求解方法依赖手工调参的平稳核函数，难以适应复杂的边界行为、振荡、非光滑特征等问题特定结构。需要一种能够自动适应问题结构、减少人工调参的快速求解框架。
AI.method: 1. 将PDE求解表述为再生核希尔伯特空间中的最小范数恢复问题；2. 使用PDE解的快照库构建经验核函数；3. 通过稀疏Cholesky分解稀疏化精度矩阵来加速核求解；4. 形成隐式降阶模型，仅在线使用局部有效的自由度子集。
AI.result: 在多种PDE问题上测试（半线性椭圆方程、不连续系数达西流、粘性Burgers方程、Allen-Cahn方程、二维Navier-Stokes方程），经验核函数能够匹配或优于Matérn基线方法，特别是在非光滑区域表现更佳。
AI.conclusion: KROM框架通过经验核函数和稀疏Cholesky分解，实现了对非线性PDE的快速求解，能够自动适应问题特定结构，减少对人工调参的依赖，在非光滑区域表现优异。

title: Learning Domain-Aware Task Prompt Representations for Multi-Domain All-in-One Image Restoration
summary: Recently, significant breakthroughs have been made in all-in-one image restoration (AiOIR), which can handle multiple restoration tasks with a single model. However, existing methods typically focus on a specific image domain, such as natural scene, medical imaging, or remote sensing. In this work, we aim to extend AiOIR to multiple domains and propose the first multi-domain all-in-one image restoration method, DATPRL-IR, based on our proposed Domain-Aware Task Prompt Representation Learning. Specifically, we first construct a task prompt pool containing multiple task prompts, in which task-related knowledge is implicitly encoded. For each input image, the model adaptively selects the most relevant task prompts and composes them into an instance-level task representation via a prompt composition mechanism (PCM). Furthermore, to endow the model with domain awareness, we introduce another domain prompt pool and distill domain priors from multimodal large language models into the domain prompts. PCM is utilized to combine the adaptively selected domain prompts into a domain representation for each input image. Finally, the two representations are fused to form a domain-aware task prompt representation which can make full use of both specific and shared knowledge across tasks and domains to guide the subsequent restoration process. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our DATPRL-IR significantly outperforms existing SOTA image restoration methods, while exhibiting strong generalization capabilities. Code is available at https://github.com/GuangluDong0728/DATPRL-IR.

AI.tldr: 本文提出首个多领域一体化图像修复方法DATPRL-IR，通过领域感知任务提示表示学习，能够处理多个图像领域（自然场景、医学影像、遥感等）的多种修复任务。
AI.motivation: 现有的一体化图像修复方法通常专注于特定图像领域（如自然场景、医学影像或遥感），缺乏跨多个领域的通用修复能力。本文旨在将一体化图像修复扩展到多个领域，实现跨领域的通用图像修复。
AI.method: 提出领域感知任务提示表示学习（DATPRL-IR）：1）构建任务提示池，隐式编码任务相关知识；2）通过提示组合机制（PCM）为每个输入图像自适应选择最相关的任务提示，组合成实例级任务表示；3）引入领域提示池，从多模态大语言模型中蒸馏领域先验知识到领域提示；4）使用PCM组合自适应选择的领域提示形成领域表示；5）融合两种表示形成领域感知任务提示表示，充分利用跨任务和跨领域的特定知识和共享知识。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，DATPRL-IR显著优于现有的SOTA图像修复方法，同时展现出强大的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的DATPRL-IR是首个多领域一体化图像修复方法，通过领域感知任务提示表示学习，能够有效处理多个图像领域的多种修复任务，在性能和泛化能力上均表现出色。

title: Dual-space posterior sampling for Bayesian inference in constrained inverse problems
summary: Inverse problems constrained by partial differential equations are often ill-conditioned due to noisy and incomplete data or inherent non-uniqueness. A prominent example is full waveform inversion, which estimates Earth's subsurface properties by fitting seismic measurements subject to the wave equation, where ill-conditioning is inherent to noisy, band-limited, finite-aperture data and shadow zones. Casting the inverse problem into a Bayesian framework allows for a more comprehensive description of its solution, where instead of a single estimate, the posterior distribution characterizes non-uniqueness and can be sampled to quantify uncertainty. However, no clear procedure exists for translating hard physical constraints, such as the wave equation, into prior distributions amenable to existing sampling techniques. To address this, we perform posterior sampling in the dual space using an augmented Lagrangian formulation, which translates hard constraints into penalties amenable to sampling algorithms while ensuring their exact satisfaction. We achieve this by seamlessly integrating the alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM) with Stein variational gradient descent (SVGD) -- a particle-based sampler -- where the constraint is relaxed at each iteration and multiplier updates progressively enforce satisfaction. This enables constrained posterior sampling while inheriting the favorable conditioning properties of dual-space solvers, where partial constraint relaxation allows productive updates even when the current model is far from the true solution. We validate the method on a stylized Rosenbrock conditional inference problem and on frequency-domain full waveform inversion for a Gaussian anomaly model and the Marmousi~II benchmark, demonstrating well-calibrated uncertainty estimates and posterior contraction with increasing data coverage.

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合ADMM与SVGD的双空间后验采样方法，将硬物理约束转化为惩罚项，用于求解偏微分方程约束的逆问题，如全波形反演
AI.motivation: 偏微分方程约束的逆问题通常病态，存在噪声、数据不完整和非唯一性。虽然贝叶斯框架能通过后验分布描述非唯一性和量化不确定性，但缺乏将硬物理约束（如波动方程）转化为适合现有采样技术的先验分布的方法
AI.method: 采用增广拉格朗日方法在双空间进行后验采样，将硬约束转化为惩罚项。无缝集成交替方向乘子法（ADMM）与Stein变分梯度下降（SVGD），在每次迭代中松弛约束，通过乘子更新逐步强制满足约束
AI.result: 在Rosenbrock条件推理问题和频率域全波形反演（高斯异常模型和Marmousi II基准）上验证了方法，展示了良好校准的不确定性估计和随数据覆盖增加的后验收缩
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够进行约束后验采样，继承了双空间求解器的良好条件特性，即使当前模型远离真实解时也能进行有效更新

title: ContextCov: Deriving and Enforcing Executable Constraints from Agent Instruction Files
summary:
As Large Language Model (LLM) agents increasingly execute complex, autonomous software engineering tasks, developers rely on natural language Agent Instructions (e.g., AGENTS.md) to enforce project-specific coding conventions, tooling, and architectural boundaries. However, these instructions are passive text. Agents frequently deviate from them due to context limitations or conflicting legacy code, a phenomenon we term Context Drift. Because agents operate without real-time human supervision, these silent violations rapidly compound into technical debt.
  To bridge this gap, we introduce ContextCov, a framework that transforms passive Agent Instructions into active, executable guardrails. ContextCov extracts natural language constraints and synthesizes enforcement checks across three domains: static AST analysis for code patterns, runtime shell shims that intercept prohibited commands, and architectural validators for structural and semantic constraints. Evaluations on 723 open-source repositories demonstrate that ContextCov successfully extracts over 46,000 executable checks with 99.997% syntax validity, providing a necessary automated compliance layer for safe, agent-driven development. Source code and evaluation results are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/ContextCov-4510/.

AI.tldr: ContextCov：将被动的大语言模型代理指令转化为主动可执行的防护栏，通过静态AST分析、运行时shell拦截和架构验证器来防止代理在软件开发任务中的上下文漂移问题。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM代理执行复杂的自主软件工程任务，开发者依赖自然语言代理指令来强制执行项目特定的编码规范、工具和架构边界。但这些指令是被动文本，代理经常因上下文限制或与遗留代码冲突而偏离指令，这种现象称为"上下文漂移"。由于代理在没有实时人工监督的情况下运行，这些无声违规会迅速累积成技术债务。
AI.method: ContextCov框架将被动代理指令转化为主动可执行的防护栏。它提取自然语言约束并在三个领域合成强制执行检查：1) 用于代码模式的静态AST分析；2) 拦截禁止命令的运行时shell垫片；3) 用于结构和语义约束的架构验证器。
AI.result: 在723个开源仓库上的评估表明，ContextCov成功提取了超过46,000个可执行检查，语法有效性达到99.997%，为安全的代理驱动开发提供了必要的自动化合规层。
AI.conclusion: ContextCov通过将被动指令转化为主动防护栏，解决了LLM代理在软件开发中的上下文漂移问题，为代理驱动的开发提供了自动化合规保障。

title: Action-Guided Attention for Video Action Anticipation
summary: Anticipating future actions in videos is challenging, as the observed frames provide only evidence of past activities, requiring the inference of latent intentions to predict upcoming actions. Existing transformer-based approaches, which rely on dot-product attention over pixel representations, often lack the high-level semantics necessary to model video sequences for effective action anticipation. As a result, these methods tend to overfit to explicit visual cues present in the past frames, limiting their ability to capture underlying intentions and degrading generalization to unseen samples. To address this, we propose Action-Guided Attention (AGA), an attention mechanism that explicitly leverages predicted action sequences as queries and keys to guide sequence modeling. Our approach fosters the attention module to emphasize relevant moments from the past based on the upcoming activity and combine this information with the current frame embedding via a dedicated gating function. The design of AGA enables post-training analysis of the knowledge discovered from the training set. Experiments on the widely adopted EPIC-Kitchens-100 benchmark demonstrate that AGA generalizes well from validation to unseen test sets. Post-training analysis can further examine the action dependencies captured by the model and the counterfactual evidence it has internalized, offering transparent and interpretable insights into its anticipative predictions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Action-Guided Attention (AGA)，一种利用预测动作序列作为查询和键来引导视频序列建模的注意力机制，以解决视频动作预测中缺乏高层语义和过度依赖显式视觉线索的问题。
AI.motivation: 视频动作预测面临挑战，因为观察到的帧仅提供过去活动的证据，需要推断潜在意图来预测即将发生的动作。现有的基于Transformer的方法依赖像素表示的注意力机制，往往缺乏建模视频序列所需的高层语义，导致过度拟合过去帧中的显式视觉线索，限制了捕捉潜在意图的能力，并降低了对未见样本的泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出Action-Guided Attention (AGA)注意力机制，明确利用预测的动作序列作为查询和键来引导序列建模。该方法促使注意力模块基于即将发生的活动强调过去的相关时刻，并通过专门的门控函数将此信息与当前帧嵌入相结合。AGA的设计支持训练后分析从训练集中发现的知识。
AI.result: 在广泛采用的EPIC-Kitchens-100基准测试上的实验表明，AGA在从验证集到未见测试集上具有良好的泛化能力。训练后分析可以进一步检查模型捕获的动作依赖关系和内部化的反事实证据，为其预测性预测提供透明和可解释的见解。
AI.conclusion: AGA通过利用预测动作序列作为注意力机制的引导，有效解决了视频动作预测中高层语义缺失和过度拟合的问题，提高了模型的泛化能力和可解释性。

title: Aurchestra: Fine-Grained, Real-Time Soundscape Control on Resource-Constrained Hearables
comment: 15 pages, 11 figures, 4 tables, submitted to ACM MobiSys 2026
summary: Hearables are becoming ubiquitous, yet their sound controls remain blunt: users can either enable global noise suppression or focus on a single target sound. Real-world acoustic scenes, however, contain many simultaneous sources that users may want to adjust independently. We introduce Aurchestra, the first system to provide fine-grained, real-time soundscape control on resource-constrained hearables. Our system has two key components: (1) a dynamic interface that surfaces only active sound classes and (2) a real-time, on-device multi-output extraction network that generates separate streams for each selected class, achieving robust performance for upto 5 overlapping target sounds, and letting users mix their environment by customizing per-class volumes, much like an audio engineer mixes tracks. We optimize the model architecture for multiple compute-limited platforms and demonstrate real-time performance on 6 ms streaming audio chunks. Across real-world environments in previously unseen indoor and outdoor scenarios, our system enables expressive per-class sound control and achieves substantial improvements in target-class enhancement and interference suppression. Our results show that the world need not be heard as a single, undifferentiated stream: with Aurchestra, the soundscape becomes truly programmable.

AI.tldr: Aurchestra系统在可穿戴设备上实现细粒度实时声景控制，可将环境声音分离为多个独立音源并进行音量调节
AI.motivation: 当前可穿戴设备的音频控制功能有限，用户只能全局降噪或聚焦单一音源，无法对现实复杂声景中的多个音源进行独立调节
AI.method: 系统包含动态界面（仅显示活跃声音类别）和实时设备端多输出提取网络，可分离多达5个重叠目标声音，支持用户像音频工程师一样调节各音源音量
AI.result: 在未见过的室内外真实环境中，系统实现了表达性的每类别声音控制，在目标类别增强和干扰抑制方面有显著改进，可在6ms音频块上实时运行
AI.conclusion: 声景可以编程化，世界不必被听作单一未分化的音频流，Aurchestra为可穿戴设备提供了细粒度声景控制能力

title: An Analysis of Multi-Task Architectures for the Hierarchic Multi-Label Problem of Vehicle Model and Make Classification
summary: Most information in our world is organized hierarchically; however, many Deep Learning approaches do not leverage this semantically rich structure. Research suggests that human learning benefits from exploiting the hierarchical structure of information, and intelligent models could similarly take advantage of this through multi-task learning. In this work, we analyze the advantages and limitations of multi-task learning in a hierarchical multi-label classification problem: car make and model classification. Considering both parallel and cascaded multi-task architectures, we evaluate their impact on different Deep Learning classifiers (CNNs, Transformers) while varying key factors such as dropout rate and loss weighting to gain deeper insight into the effectiveness of this approach. The tests are conducted on two established benchmarks: StanfordCars and CompCars. We observe the effectiveness of the multi-task paradigm on both datasets, improving the performance of the investigated CNN in almost all scenarios. Furthermore, the approach yields significant improvements on the CompCars dataset for both types of models.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了在多标签分类任务中利用层次结构进行多任务学习的优势，通过汽车品牌和型号分类任务评估了并行和级联多任务架构在不同深度学习模型上的效果。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中的信息大多具有层次结构，但许多深度学习方法未能充分利用这种语义丰富的结构。人类学习可以利用信息的层次结构，智能模型也可以通过多任务学习获得类似优势。
AI.method: 在汽车品牌和型号分类的层次多标签分类问题上，分析多任务学习的优势和限制。考虑并行和级联多任务架构，评估它们对CNN和Transformer等不同深度学习分类器的影响，同时改变dropout率和损失权重等关键因素。
AI.result: 在StanfordCars和CompCars两个基准数据集上观察到多任务范式的有效性，在几乎所有场景中都提升了CNN的性能。在CompCars数据集上，两种模型类型都获得了显著改进。
AI.conclusion: 多任务学习在层次分类任务中具有实际价值，能够有效利用信息的层次结构提升模型性能，特别是在CompCars数据集上表现突出。

title: Neurosymbolic Learning for Advanced Persistent Threat Detection under Extreme Class Imbalance
comment: 6 pages, 4 figures, accepted at IEEE ICC 2026
summary: The growing deployment of Internet of Things (IoT) devices in smart cities and industrial environments increases vulnerability to stealthy, multi-stage advanced persistent threats (APTs) that exploit wireless communication. Detection is challenging due to severe class imbalance in network traffic, which limits the effectiveness of traditional deep learning approaches and their lack of explainability in classification decisions. To address these challenges, this paper proposes a neurosymbolic architecture that integrates an optimized BERT model with logic tensor networks (LTN) for explainable APT detection in wireless IoT networks. The proposed method addresses the challenges of mobile IoT environments through efficient feature encoding that transforms network flow data into BERT-compatible sequences while preserving temporal dependencies critical for APT stage identification. Severe class imbalance is mitigated using focal loss, hierarchical classification that separates normal traffic detection from attack categorization, and adaptive sampling strategies. Evaluation on the SCVIC-APT2021 dataset demonstrates an operationally viable binary classification F1 score of 95.27% with a false positive rate of 0.14%, and a 76.75% macro F1 score for multi-class attack categorization. Furthermore, a novel explainability analysis statistically validates the importance of distinct network features. These results demonstrate that neurosymbolic learning enables high-performance, interpretable, and operationally viable APT detection for IoT network monitoring architectures.

AI.tldr: 提出一种神经符号架构，结合优化的BERT模型与逻辑张量网络(LTN)，用于无线物联网网络中可解释的高级持续性威胁(APT)检测，解决类别不平衡和可解释性问题。
AI.motivation: 物联网设备在智慧城市和工业环境中的部署增加，使其容易受到利用无线通信的隐蔽、多阶段APT攻击。传统深度学习方法面临类别严重不平衡和分类决策缺乏可解释性的挑战。
AI.method:
1. 神经符号架构：集成优化的BERT模型与逻辑张量网络(LTN)用于可解释的APT检测
2. 高效特征编码：将网络流数据转换为BERT兼容序列，同时保留APT阶段识别的关键时间依赖
3. 类别不平衡处理：使用焦点损失、分层分类（正常流量检测与攻击分类分离）和自适应采样策略
4. 可解释性分析：统计验证不同网络特征的重要性
AI.result:
在SCVIC-APT2021数据集上评估：
- 二元分类F1分数：95.27%，误报率0.14%
- 多类攻击分类宏F1分数：76.75%
- 可解释性分析统计验证了不同网络特征的重要性
AI.conclusion: 神经符号学习能够实现高性能、可解释且操作可行的物联网网络监控架构APT检测。

title: NeuroSymb-MRG: Differentiable Abductive Reasoning with Active Uncertainty Minimization for Radiology Report Generation
summary: Automatic generation of radiology reports seeks to reduce clinician workload while improving documentation consistency. Existing methods that adopt encoder-decoder or retrieval-augmented pipelines achieve progress in fluency but remain vulnerable to visual-linguistic biases, factual inconsistency, and lack of explicit multi-hop clinical reasoning. We present NeuroSymb-MRG, a unified framework that integrates NeuroSymbolic abductive reasoning with active uncertainty minimization to produce structured, clinically grounded reports. The system maps image features to probabilistic clinical concepts, composes differentiable logic-based reasoning chains, decodes those chains into templated clauses, and refines the textual output via retrieval and constrained language-model editing. An active sampling loop driven by rule-level uncertainty and diversity guides clinician-in-the-loop adjudication and promptbook refinement. Experiments on standard benchmarks demonstrate consistent improvements in factual consistency and standard language metrics compared to representative baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出NeuroSymb-MRG框架，结合神经符号推理与主动不确定性最小化，用于生成结构化、临床基础扎实的放射学报告，解决现有方法的视觉-语言偏见、事实不一致和缺乏显式临床推理等问题。
AI.motivation: 现有放射学报告自动生成方法（编码器-解码器或检索增强流水线）在流畅性方面取得进展，但仍存在视觉-语言偏见、事实不一致、缺乏显式多跳临床推理等问题。需要一种能产生结构化、临床基础扎实报告的系统。
AI.method: NeuroSymb-MRG框架：1) 将图像特征映射到概率性临床概念；2) 构建可微分的基于逻辑的推理链；3) 将推理链解码为模板化子句；4) 通过检索和约束语言模型编辑优化文本输出；5) 基于规则级不确定性和多样性的主动采样循环指导临床医生参与裁决和提示书优化。
AI.result: 在标准基准测试中，相比代表性基线方法，在事实一致性和标准语言指标方面均取得一致改进。
AI.conclusion: NeuroSymb-MRG框架通过神经符号推理与主动不确定性最小化的结合，有效提升了放射学报告生成的事实一致性和临床合理性，为医疗文档自动生成提供了新方向。

title: Wireless Power Control Based on Large Language Models
summary: This paper investigates the power control problem in wireless networks by repurposing pre-trained large language models (LLMs) as relational reasoning backbones. In hyper-connected interference environments, traditional optimization methods face high computational cost, while standard message passing neural networks suffer from aggregation bottlenecks that can obscure critical high-interference structures. In response, we propose PC-LLM, a physics-informed framework that augments a pre-trained Transformer with an interference-aware attention bias. The proposed bias tuning mechanism injects the physical channel gain matrix directly into the self-attention logits, enabling explicit fusion of wireless topology with pre-trained relational priors without retraining the backbone from scratch. Extensive experiments demonstrate that PC-LLM consistently outperforms both traditional optimization methods and state-of-the-art graph neural network baselines, while exhibiting exceptional zero-shot generalization to unseen environments. We further observe a structural-semantic decoupling phenomenon: Topology-relevant relational reasoning is concentrated in shallow layers, whereas deeper layers encode task-irrelevant semantic noise. Motivated by this finding, we develop a lightweight adaptation strategy that reduces model depth by 50\%, significantly lowering inference cost while preserving state-of-the-art spectral efficiency.

AI.tldr: PC-LLM：利用预训练LLM作为关系推理骨干解决无线网络功率控制问题，通过物理感知注意力偏置融合无线拓扑，实现卓越性能与零样本泛化能力
AI.motivation: 在超连接干扰环境中，传统优化方法计算成本高，标准消息传递神经网络存在聚合瓶颈，无法有效处理高干扰结构。需要一种能融合无线拓扑物理特性与预训练关系先验的高效解决方案。
AI.method: 提出PC-LLM框架，将预训练Transformer增强为物理感知模型。通过干扰感知注意力偏置机制，直接将物理信道增益矩阵注入自注意力logits中，无需从头训练骨干网络。还开发了轻量级适应策略，基于结构-语义解耦现象减少模型深度。
AI.result: PC-LLM在性能上持续优于传统优化方法和最先进的图神经网络基线，展现出卓越的零样本泛化能力。发现结构-语义解耦现象：拓扑相关关系推理集中在浅层，深层编码任务无关语义噪声。通过减少50%模型深度，显著降低推理成本同时保持最优频谱效率。
AI.conclusion: 预训练LLM可作为无线网络功率控制的有效关系推理骨干，物理感知注意力偏置能成功融合领域知识，结构-语义解耦现象为模型高效化提供了理论基础。

title: StepVAR: Structure-Texture Guided Pruning for Visual Autoregressive Models
summary: Visual AutoRegressive (VAR) models based on next-scale prediction enable efficient hierarchical generation, yet the inference cost grows quadratically at high resolutions. We observe that the computationally intensive later scales predominantly refine high-frequency textures and exhibit substantial spatial redundancy, in contrast to earlier scales that determine the global structural layout. Existing pruning methods primarily focus on high-frequency detection for token selection, often overlooking structural coherence and consequently degrading global semantics. To address this limitation, we propose StepVAR, a training-free token pruning framework that accelerates VAR inference by jointly considering structural and textural importance. Specifically, we employ a lightweight high-pass filter to capture local texture details, while leveraging Principal Component Analysis (PCA) to preserve global structural information. This dual-criterion design enables the model to retain tokens critical for both fine-grained fidelity and overall composition. To maintain valid next-scale prediction under sparse tokens, we further introduce a nearest neighbor feature propagation strategy to reconstruct dense feature maps from pruned representations. Extensive experiments on state-of-the-art text-to-image and text-to-video VAR models demonstrate that StepVAR achieves substantial inference speedups while maintaining generation quality. Quantitative and qualitative evaluations consistently show that our method outperforms existing acceleration approaches, validating its effectiveness and general applicability across diverse VAR architectures.

AI.tldr: StepVAR：一种无需训练的分层视觉自回归模型推理加速框架，通过联合考虑结构和纹理重要性进行token剪枝，显著提升推理速度同时保持生成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉自回归模型在高分辨率下推理成本呈二次增长，后期尺度主要细化高频纹理且存在空间冗余，而现有剪枝方法主要关注高频检测，忽略了结构一致性，导致全局语义退化。
AI.method: 提出StepVAR框架：1) 使用轻量级高通滤波器捕获局部纹理细节；2) 利用主成分分析保留全局结构信息；3) 引入最近邻特征传播策略，从剪枝表示中重建密集特征图以保持有效的下一尺度预测。
AI.result: 在先进的文本到图像和文本到视频VAR模型上的实验表明，StepVAR实现了显著的推理加速，同时保持了生成质量。定量和定性评估一致显示该方法优于现有加速方法。
AI.conclusion: StepVAR通过联合考虑结构和纹理重要性，有效解决了VAR模型推理效率问题，在不同VAR架构上具有通用性和有效性。

title: PARCER as an Operational Contract to Reduce Variance, Cost, and Risk in LLM Systems
comment: 11 pages. Presents the PARCER framework for LLM governance. Appendix contains the full YAML operational contract
summary: Systems based on Large Language Models (LLMs) have become formidable tools for automating research and software production. However, their governance remains a challenge when technical requirements demand absolute consistency, auditability, and predictable control over cost and latency. Recent literature highlights two phenomena that aggravate this scenario: the stochastic variance inherent in the model's judgment (often treated as "systemic noise") and the substantial degradation of context utilization in long inputs, with critical losses when decisive information is diluted in the middle of the prompt. This article proposes PARCER as an engineering response to these limitations. The framework acts as a declarative "operational contract" in YAML, transforming unstructured interactions into versioned and executable artifacts. PARCER imposes strict governance structured into seven operational phases, introducing decision hygiene practices inspired by legal judgments to mitigate noise, adaptive token budgeting, formalized recovery routes (fallbacks) for context preservation, and systemic observability via OpenTelemetry. The objective of this work is to present the conceptual and technical architecture of PARCER, positioning it as a necessary transition from simple "prompt engineering" to "context engineering with governable governance".

AI.tldr: PARCER是一个工程框架，通过声明式的YAML操作契约，将非结构化LLM交互转化为版本化可执行工件，提供严格治理以解决LLM系统的随机性、上下文利用不足和成本控制问题。
AI.motivation: LLM系统在自动化研究和软件生产方面表现出色，但在需要绝对一致性、可审计性、成本与延迟可预测控制的场景下，治理仍然困难。主要挑战包括：1）模型判断的随机方差（系统性噪声）；2）长输入中上下文利用的显著退化，关键信息在提示中间被稀释时出现严重损失。
AI.method: PARCER框架作为声明式的YAML操作契约，将非结构化交互转化为版本化可执行工件。它实施严格的七阶段操作治理：引入受法律判决启发的决策卫生实践来减少噪声、自适应令牌预算、形式化的恢复路径（回退机制）用于上下文保留，以及通过OpenTelemetry实现系统可观测性。
AI.result: PARCER提出了从简单的"提示工程"向"具有可治理性的上下文工程"的必要转变。该框架提供了概念和技术架构，能够更好地控制LLM系统的随机性、上下文利用和操作成本。
AI.conclusion: PARCER框架代表了LLM系统治理的重要进展，通过结构化、版本化和可观测的方法，解决了当前LLM应用中的关键挑战，为实现可预测、可审计的自动化系统提供了工程解决方案。

title: Unifying Heterogeneous Multi-Modal Remote Sensing Detection Via Language-Pivoted Pretraining
summary: Heterogeneous multi-modal remote sensing object detection aims to accurately detect objects from diverse sensors (e.g., RGB, SAR, Infrared). Existing approaches largely adopt a late alignment paradigm, in which modality alignment and task-specific optimization are entangled during downstream fine-tuning. This tight coupling complicates optimization and often results in unstable training and suboptimal generalization. To address these limitations, we propose BabelRS, a unified language-pivoted pretraining framework that explicitly decouples modality alignment from downstream task learning. BabelRS comprises two key components: Concept-Shared Instruction Aligning (CSIA) and Layerwise Visual-Semantic Annealing (LVSA). CSIA aligns each sensor modality to a shared set of linguistic concepts, using language as a semantic pivot to bridge heterogeneous visual representations. To further mitigate the granularity mismatch between high-level language representations and dense detection objectives, LVSA progressively aggregates multi-scale visual features to provide fine-grained semantic guidance. Extensive experiments demonstrate that BabelRS stabilizes training and consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods without bells and whistles. Code: https://github.com/zcablii/SM3Det.

AI.tldr: BabelRS是一个基于语言枢纽的预训练框架，用于异构多模态遥感目标检测，通过概念共享指令对齐和层级视觉语义退火技术，将模态对齐与下游任务学习解耦，提升训练稳定性和检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有异构多模态遥感目标检测方法大多采用后期对齐范式，将模态对齐与任务特定优化在下游微调中纠缠在一起，导致优化复杂、训练不稳定和泛化性能不佳。需要一种能明确解耦模态对齐与下游任务学习的框架。
AI.method: 提出BabelRS框架，包含两个关键组件：1) 概念共享指令对齐(CSIA)：将每个传感器模态对齐到共享的语义概念集，使用语言作为语义枢纽桥接异构视觉表示；2) 层级视觉语义退火(LVSA)：逐步聚合多尺度视觉特征，为密集检测目标提供细粒度语义指导。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，BabelRS能够稳定训练，并在无需额外技巧的情况下持续优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: BabelRS通过语言枢纽预训练框架成功解耦了模态对齐与下游任务学习，解决了异构多模态遥感目标检测中的优化复杂性和训练不稳定问题，实现了更好的泛化性能。

title: Efficient Test-Time Optimization for Depth Completion via Low-Rank Decoder Adaptation
comment: 17 pages, 7 figures [We achieved a new Pareto frontier in test-time depth completion.]
summary: Zero-shot depth completion has gained attention for its ability to generalize across environments without sensor-specific datasets or retraining. However, most existing approaches rely on diffusion-based test-time optimization, which is computationally expensive due to iterative denoising. Recent visual-prompt-based methods reduce training cost but still require repeated forward--backward passes through the full frozen network to optimize input-level prompts, resulting in slow inference. In this work, we show that adapting only the decoder is sufficient for effective test-time optimization, as depth foundation models concentrate depth-relevant information within a low-dimensional decoder subspace. Based on this insight, we propose a lightweight test-time adaptation method that updates only this low-dimensional subspace using sparse depth supervision. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance, establishing a new Pareto frontier between accuracy and efficiency for test-time adaptation. Extensive experiments on five indoor and outdoor datasets demonstrate consistent improvements over prior methods, highlighting the practicality of fast zero-shot depth completion.

AI.tldr: 提出一种轻量级测试时适应方法，仅更新深度基础模型的低维解码器子空间，实现高效零样本深度补全，在准确性和效率之间建立新的帕累托前沿。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本深度补全方法存在计算效率问题：基于扩散的方法需要迭代去噪计算昂贵，基于视觉提示的方法需要重复前向-反向传播优化输入级提示导致推理缓慢。需要更高效的测试时适应方法。
AI.method: 基于深度基础模型将深度相关信息集中在低维解码器子空间的洞察，提出仅更新该低维子空间的轻量级测试时适应方法。使用稀疏深度监督，仅优化解码器而非整个网络，显著减少计算量。
AI.result: 在5个室内外数据集上取得最先进性能，建立了测试时适应在准确性和效率之间的新帕累托前沿。相比先前方法有持续改进，展示了快速零样本深度补全的实用性。
AI.conclusion: 仅适应解码器就足以实现有效的测试时优化，因为深度基础模型将深度相关信息集中在低维解码器子空间中。该方法为高效零样本深度补全提供了实用解决方案。

title: Artificial Superintelligence May be Useless: Equilibria in the Economy of Multiple AI Agents
summary: With recent development of artificial intelligence, it is more common to adopt AI agents in economic activities. This paper explores the economic actions of agents, including human agents and AI agents, in an economic game of trading products/services, and the equilibria in this economy involving multiple agents. We derive a range of equilibrium results and their corresponding conditions using a Markov chain stationary distribution based model. One distinct feature of our model is that we consider the long-term utility generated by economic activities instead of their short-term benefits. For the model consisting of two agents, we fully characterize all the possible economic equilibria and conditions. Interestingly, we show that unless each agent can at least double (not merely increase) its marginal utility by purchasing the other agent's products/services, purchasing the other agent's products/services will not happen in any economic equilibrium. We further extend our results to three and more agents, where we characterize more economic equilibria. We find that in some equilibria, the ``more powerful'' AI agents contribute zero utility to ``less capable'' agents.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究包含人类和AI代理的经济博弈中的均衡，使用基于马尔可夫链平稳分布的模型分析长期效用而非短期收益，发现在某些均衡中"更强大"的AI代理对"能力较弱"的代理贡献零效用。
AI.motivation: 随着人工智能的发展，AI代理在经济活动中越来越普遍。论文旨在探索包含人类和AI代理的经济博弈中的均衡状态，特别是考虑长期效用而非短期收益的经济行为。
AI.method: 使用基于马尔可夫链平稳分布的模型来分析经济均衡。模型考虑经济活动的长期效用，而非短期收益。首先分析两个代理的情况，然后扩展到三个及更多代理。
AI.result:
1. 对于两个代理的情况，完全描述了所有可能的经济均衡及其条件。有趣的是，除非每个代理通过购买对方产品/服务至少能将其边际效用翻倍（而不仅仅是增加），否则在任何经济均衡中都不会发生购买对方产品/服务的行为。
2. 扩展到三个及更多代理时，发现了更多经济均衡。在某些均衡中，"更强大"的AI代理对"能力较弱"的代理贡献零效用。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为理解包含AI代理的经济系统提供了理论框架，揭示了在长期效用考虑下的经济均衡特征，特别是AI代理之间的不对称效用贡献现象。

title: Downstream Task Inspired Underwater Image Enhancement: A Perception-Aware Study from Dataset Construction to Network Design
comment: Accepted for publication in IEEE TIP 2026
summary: In real underwater environments, downstream image recognition tasks such as semantic segmentation and object detection often face challenges posed by problems like blurring and color inconsistencies. Underwater image enhancement (UIE) has emerged as a promising preprocessing approach, aiming to improve the recognizability of targets in underwater images. However, most existing UIE methods mainly focus on enhancing images for human visual perception, frequently failing to reconstruct high-frequency details that are critical for task-specific recognition. To address this issue, we propose a Downstream Task-Inspired Underwater Image Enhancement (DTI-UIE) framework, which leverages human visual perception model to enhance images effectively for underwater vision tasks. Specifically, we design an efficient two-branch network with task-aware attention module for feature mixing. The network benefits from a multi-stage training framework and a task-driven perceptual loss. Additionally, inspired by human perception, we automatically construct a Task-Inspired UIE Dataset (TI-UIED) using various task-specific networks. Experimental results demonstrate that DTI-UIE significantly improves task performance by generating preprocessed images that are beneficial for downstream tasks such as semantic segmentation, object detection, and instance segmentation. The codes are publicly available at https://github.com/oucailab/DTIUIE.

AI.tldr: 提出DTI-UIE框架，通过任务感知注意力模块和任务驱动感知损失，生成有利于下游视觉任务的水下图像增强方法
AI.motivation: 现有水下图像增强方法主要针对人类视觉感知，缺乏对下游任务（如语义分割、目标检测）所需高频细节的重建能力，导致任务性能受限
AI.method: 1) 设计高效双分支网络，包含任务感知注意力模块进行特征融合；2) 采用多阶段训练框架和任务驱动感知损失；3) 基于人类感知模型自动构建任务启发式数据集TI-UIED
AI.result: DTI-UIE显著提升了语义分割、目标检测和实例分割等下游任务的性能，生成的预处理图像对任务识别更有利
AI.conclusion: 提出的任务启发式水下图像增强框架有效解决了现有方法忽视下游任务需求的问题，通过任务感知设计提升了水下视觉任务的性能

title: GCL-Sampler: Discovering Kernel Similarity for Sampled GPU Simulation via Graph Contrastive Learning
summary: GPU architectural simulation is orders of magnitude slower than native execution, necessitating workload sampling for practical speedups. Existing methods rely on hand-crafted features with limited expressiveness, yielding either aggressive sampling with high errors or conservative sampling with constrained speedups. To address these issues, we propose GCL-Sampler, a sampling framework that leverages Relational Graph Convolutional Networks with contrastive learning to automatically discover high-dimensional kernel similarities from trace graphs. By encoding instruction sequences and data dependencies into graph embeddings, GCL-Sampler captures rich structural and semantic properties of program execution, enabling both high fidelity and substantial speedup. Evaluations on extensive benchmarks show that GCL-Sampler achieves 258.94x average speedup against full workload with 0.37% error, outperforming state-of-the-art methods, PKA (129.23x, 20.90%), Sieve (94.90x, 4.10%) and STEM+ROOT (56.57x, 0.38%).

AI.tldr: GCL-Sampler：基于关系图卷积网络和对比学习的GPU架构仿真采样框架，通过自动发现内核相似性实现高保真度和高速仿真
AI.motivation: GPU架构仿真比原生执行慢几个数量级，需要采样来加速。现有方法依赖手工特征，表达能力有限，导致要么采样激进误差大，要么采样保守加速有限。
AI.method: 使用关系图卷积网络（Relational Graph Convolutional Networks）结合对比学习，从跟踪图中自动发现高维内核相似性。将指令序列和数据依赖编码为图嵌入，捕获程序执行的结构和语义特性。
AI.result: 在广泛基准测试中，GCL-Sampler相比完整工作负载实现258.94倍平均加速，误差仅0.37%。显著优于现有最佳方法：PKA（129.23倍，20.90%误差）、Sieve（94.90倍，4.10%误差）和STEM+ROOT（56.57倍，0.38%误差）。
AI.conclusion: GCL-Sampler通过图神经网络自动学习内核相似性，在保持高保真度的同时实现了显著的仿真加速，解决了传统手工特征方法的局限性。

title: AMDS: Attack-Aware Multi-Stage Defense System for Network Intrusion Detection with Two-Stage Adaptive Weight Learning
summary: Machine learning based network intrusion detection systems are vulnerable to adversarial attacks that degrade classification performance under both gradient-based and distribution shift threat models. Existing defenses typically apply uniform detection strategies, which may not account for heterogeneous attack characteristics. This paper proposes an attack-aware multi-stage defense framework that learns attack-specific detection strategies through a weighted combination of ensemble disagreement, predictive uncertainty, and distributional anomaly signals. Empirical analysis across seven adversarial attack types reveals distinct detection signatures, enabling a two-stage adaptive detection mechanism. Experimental evaluation on a benchmark intrusion detection dataset indicates that the proposed system attains 94.2% area under the receiver operating characteristic curve and improves classification accuracy by 4.5 percentage points and F1-score by 9.0 points over adversarially trained ensembles. Under adaptive white-box attacks with full architectural knowledge, the system appears to maintain 94.4% accuracy with a 4.2% attack success rate, though this evaluation is limited to two adaptive variants and does not constitute a formal robustness guarantee. Cross-dataset validation further suggests that defense effectiveness depends on baseline classifier competence and may vary with feature dimensionality. These results suggest that attack-specific optimization combined with multi-signal integration can provide a practical approach to improving adversarial robustness in machine learning-based intrusion detection systems.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种针对网络入侵检测系统对抗攻击的多阶段防御框架，通过集成分歧、预测不确定性和分布异常信号的加权组合来学习攻击特定的检测策略，在基准数据集上取得了94.2%的AUC和4.5%的分类准确率提升。
AI.motivation: 基于机器学习的网络入侵检测系统容易受到对抗攻击，现有防御通常采用统一的检测策略，未能考虑不同攻击类型的异质性特征。需要开发能够适应不同攻击特性的防御机制。
AI.method: 提出攻击感知的多阶段防御框架：1) 通过集成模型分歧、预测不确定性和分布异常信号的加权组合学习攻击特定的检测策略；2) 采用两阶段自适应检测机制；3) 在七种对抗攻击类型上进行经验分析，识别不同的检测特征。
AI.result: 在基准入侵检测数据集上：达到94.2%的ROC曲线下面积；分类准确率提升4.5个百分点；F1分数提升9.0分；在自适应白盒攻击下保持94.4%准确率，攻击成功率4.2%。跨数据集验证显示防御效果依赖于基线分类器能力和特征维度。
AI.conclusion: 攻击特定的优化结合多信号集成可以为基于机器学习的入侵检测系统提供实用的对抗鲁棒性改进方法，但防御效果依赖于基线分类器能力，且需要进一步验证在更广泛自适应攻击下的鲁棒性。

title: Non-verbal Real-time Human-AI Interaction in Constrained Robotic Environments
summary: We study the ongoing debate regarding the statistical fidelity of AI-generated data compared to human-generated data in the context of non-verbal communication using full body motion. Concretely, we ask if contemporary generative models move beyond surface mimicry to participate in the silent, but expressive dialogue of body language. We tackle this question by introducing the first framework that generates a natural non-verbal interaction between Human and AI in real-time from 2D body keypoints. Our experiments utilize four lightweight architectures which run at up to 100 FPS on an NVIDIA Orin Nano, effectively closing the perception-action loop needed for natural Human-AI interaction. We trained on 437 human video clips and demonstrated that pretraining on synthetically-generated sequences reduces motion errors significantly, without sacrificing speed. Yet, a measurable reality gap persists. When the best model is evaluated on keypoints extracted from cutting-edge text-to-video systems, such as SORA and VEO, we observe that performance drops on SORA-generated clips. However, it degrades far less on VEO, suggesting that temporal coherence, not image fidelity, drives real-world performance. Our results demonstrate that statistically distinguishable differences persist between Human and AI motion.

AI.tldr: 该研究探讨了AI生成的非语言身体动作数据与人类数据的统计保真度差异，开发了首个实时人机非语言交互框架，发现AI生成的动作在统计上仍与人类动作存在可区分差异。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是探讨当前生成模型是否超越了表面模仿，能够参与身体语言的无声表达对话，解决AI生成数据与人类数据在非语言交流中的统计保真度争议。
AI.method: 方法包括：1) 引入首个从2D身体关键点实时生成人机非语言交互的框架；2) 使用四种轻量级架构，在NVIDIA Orin Nano上达到100 FPS；3) 在437个人类视频片段上训练；4) 利用合成生成序列进行预训练；5) 在SORA和VEO等先进文本到视频系统提取的关键点上评估模型性能。
AI.result: 结果显示：1) 在合成序列上预训练显著减少了运动误差而不牺牲速度；2) 现实差距仍然存在；3) 在SORA生成的片段上性能下降，但在VEO上下降较少；4) 时间一致性而非图像保真度驱动真实世界性能；5) 人类和AI动作之间存在统计上可区分的差异。
AI.conclusion: 结论是AI生成的身体动作与人类动作在统计上仍存在可区分差异，时间一致性比图像保真度更重要，这为评估生成模型的非语言交流能力提供了新框架。

title: TopoEdge: Topology-Grounded Agentic Framework for Edge Networking Code Generation and Repair
summary: TopoEdge is a topology-grounded, edge-deployable framework for end-to-end software-defined networking (SDN) configuration generation and repair, motivated by the brittleness of configuration artefacts under topology variation and by strict operational constraints on latency, privacy, and on-site execution. TopoEdge represents each target topology as a router-level graph and embeds it using a contrastively trained graph neural network (GNN), enabling nearest-neighbour retrieval of a verified reference configuration paired with an executable Python driver (a Topotest/pytest test script that orchestrates the emulated network and checks protocol assertions). The target topology, retrieved reference topology, and reference driver are assembled into a topology-grounded retrieval-augmented generation context (TopoRAG), which grounds a distributed, execution-centric generate--verify--repair loop coordinated by a central controller and realised by three role-specialised agents: (i) a Planning agent that produces a topology-consistent configuration plan and a per-device skeleton; (ii) a Generation agent that materialises executable configuration artefacts, including device configurations and the driver; and (iii) a Verification agent that runs the FRRouting Topotest/pytest harness, compresses failures into a compact trace, and emits localised patch directives for iterative repair.

AI.tldr: TopoEdge是一个基于拓扑的、可边缘部署的框架，用于端到端的软件定义网络(SDN)配置生成和修复，通过图神经网络嵌入拓扑，使用检索增强生成和生成-验证-修复循环来生成和修复网络配置。
AI.motivation: 网络配置在拓扑变化下的脆弱性，以及在延迟、隐私和现场执行方面的严格操作约束，需要一种能够适应拓扑变化并满足边缘部署要求的自动化配置解决方案。
AI.method: 1) 使用对比训练的图神经网络(GNN)嵌入目标拓扑；2) 通过最近邻检索获取已验证的参考配置和Python驱动；3) 构建拓扑基础的检索增强生成上下文(TopoRAG)；4) 采用分布式、执行中心的生成-验证-修复循环，由三个专门化智能体实现：规划智能体、生成智能体和验证智能体。
AI.result: TopoEdge框架能够自动化生成和修复SDN配置，通过拓扑基础的检索增强生成和智能体协作，提高了配置的可靠性和适应性，满足边缘部署的严格约束。
