Finally, we construct an epoch-based policy that combines an optimal stationary policy for the worst-case model with an anytime-valid sequential test and an online learning fallback, achieving a constant-order transient value.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究非矩形鲁棒马尔可夫决策过程在平均奖励准则下的问题，证明了历史依赖策略的鲁棒最优性，建立了鲁棒值的极小极大表示，并提出了具有常数阶瞬态值的策略设计方法。
AI.motivation: 传统鲁棒MDP通常假设矩形性（rectangularity），即不同状态的转移概率相互独立，这在许多实际应用中过于严格。本文旨在研究非矩形鲁棒MDP，其中模糊集耦合了不同状态的转移概率，对手在整个时间范围内承诺使用固定的转移核。
AI.method: 1) 证明了在弱通信假设下，任何在模糊集上实现次线性期望后悔的历史依赖策略都是鲁棒最优的；2) 建立了鲁棒值的极小极大表示；3) 引入瞬态值框架评估有限时间性能；4) 设计了基于周期的策略，结合最坏情况模型的平稳策略、随时有效的序贯检验和在线学习回退机制。
AI.result: 1) 证明了鲁棒最优策略的存在性；2) 建立了鲁棒值的极小极大表示，无需矩形性或鲁棒动态规划原理；3) 揭示了平均奖励最优性可能掩盖任意差的瞬态性能；4) 构造了实现常数阶瞬态值的策略。
AI.conclusion: 本文为非矩形鲁棒MDP提供了理论框架，证明了鲁棒最优策略的存在性和性质，并提出了具有良好瞬态性能的实用策略设计方法，为鲁棒强化学习提供了新的理论工具。

title: NICO-RAG: Multimodal Hypergraph Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Understanding the Nicotine Public Health Crisis
summary: The nicotine addiction public health crisis continues to be pervasive. In this century alone, the tobacco industry has released and marketed new products in an aggressive effort to lure new and young customers for life. Such innovations and product development, namely flavored nicotine or tobacco such as nicotine pouches, have undone years of anti-tobacco campaign work. Past work is limited both in scope and in its ability to connect large-scale data points. Thus, we introduce the Nicotine Innovation Counter-Offensive (NICO) Dataset to provide public health researchers with over 200,000 multimodal samples, including images and text descriptions, on 55 tobacco and nicotine product brands. In addition, to provide public health researchers with factual connections across a large-scale dataset, we propose NICO-RAG, a retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) framework that can retrieve image features without incurring the high-cost of language models, as well as the added cost of processing image tokens with large-scale datasets such as NICO. At construction time, NICO-RAG organizes image- and text-extracted entities and relations into hypergraphs to produce as factual responses as possible. This joint multimodal knowledge representation enables NICO-RAG to retrieve images for query answering not only by visual similarity but also by the semantic similarity of image descriptions. Experimentals show that without needing to process additional tokens from images for over 100 questions, NICO-RAG performs comparably to the state-of-the-art RAG method adapted for images.

AI.tldr: 提出了NICO数据集（20万+多模态样本）和NICO-RAG框架，用于烟草/尼古丁产品研究，通过超图知识表示实现图像检索和问答
AI.motivation: 烟草行业持续推出新产品（如尼古丁袋）吸引年轻用户，现有研究数据规模有限且难以关联大规模数据点，需要更好的工具支持公共卫生研究
AI.method: 1) 构建NICO多模态数据集（55个品牌，20万+图像和文本样本）；2) 提出NICO-RAG框架，使用超图组织图像和文本提取的实体关系，避免语言模型高成本和图像token处理开销
AI.result: NICO-RAG在100+问题上表现与最先进的图像RAG方法相当，无需处理额外图像token，能通过视觉相似性和语义相似性检索图像
AI.conclusion: NICO数据集和NICO-RAG框架为公共卫生研究提供了大规模多模态数据和高效检索工具，有助于对抗烟草行业创新营销

title: Learning with the Nash-Sutcliffe loss
summary: The Nash-Sutcliffe efficiency ($\text{NSE}$) is a widely used, positively oriented relative measure for evaluating forecasts across multiple time series. However, it lacks a decision-theoretic foundation for this purpose. To address this, we examine its negatively oriented counterpart, which we refer to as Nash-Sutcliffe loss, defined as $L_{\text{NS}} = 1 - \text{NSE}$. We prove that $L_{\text{NS}}$ is strictly consistent for an elicitable and identifiable multi-dimensional functional, which we name the Nash-Sutcliffe functional. This functional is a data-weighted component-wise mean. The common practice of maximizing the average NSE across multiple series is the sample analog of minimizing the expected $L_{\text{NS}}$. Consequently, this operation implicitly assumes that all series originate from a single non-stationary, stochastic process. We introduce Nash-Sutcliffe linear regression, a multi-dimensional model estimated by minimizing the average $L_{\text{NS}}$, which reduces to a data-weighted least squares formulation. By reorienting the sample average loss function, we extend the previously proposed evaluation and estimation framework to forecasting multiple stationary dependent time series with differing stochastic properties. This constitutes a more natural empirical implementation of the $\text{NSE}$ than the earlier formulation. Our results establish a decision-theoretic foundation for $\text{NSE}$-based model estimation and forecast evaluation in large datasets, while further clarifying the benefits of global over local machine learning models.

AI.tldr: 该论文为Nash-Sutcliffe效率(NSE)建立了决策理论基础，证明其负向对应形式L_NS是严格一致的，并提出了Nash-Sutcliffe线性回归方法，为多时间序列预测评估提供了理论框架。
AI.motivation: Nash-Sutcliffe效率(NSE)被广泛用于多时间序列预测评估，但缺乏决策理论基础。作者旨在为NSE建立严格的理论基础，并扩展其在多时间序列评估中的应用。
AI.method: 1) 定义Nash-Sutcliffe损失L_NS = 1 - NSE；2) 证明L_NS对于可激发且可识别的多维函数（Nash-Sutcliffe函数）是严格一致的；3) 提出Nash-Sutcliffe线性回归，通过最小化平均L_NS进行估计；4) 将框架扩展到具有不同随机特性的多平稳依赖时间序列。
AI.result: 1) 建立了NSE的决策理论基础；2) 证明了最大化平均NSE等价于最小化期望L_NS；3) 提出了数据加权的Nash-Sutcliffe线性回归方法；4) 扩展了评估框架，使其更适合多时间序列的实际应用。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为NSE在多时间序列预测评估中的使用提供了坚实的决策理论基础，澄清了全局机器学习模型相对于局部模型的优势，并为大规模数据集中的模型估计和预测评估建立了理论框架。

title: WorldStereo: Bridging Camera-Guided Video Generation and Scene Reconstruction via 3D Geometric Memories
summary: Recent advances in foundational Video Diffusion Models (VDMs) have yielded significant progress. Yet, despite the remarkable visual quality of generated videos, reconstructing consistent 3D scenes from these outputs remains challenging, due to limited camera controllability and inconsistent generated content when viewed from distinct camera trajectories. In this paper, we propose WorldStereo, a novel framework that bridges camera-guided video generation and 3D reconstruction via two dedicated geometric memory modules. Formally, the global-geometric memory enables precise camera control while injecting coarse structural priors through incrementally updated point clouds. Moreover, the spatial-stereo memory constrains the model's attention receptive fields with 3D correspondence to focus on fine-grained details from the memory bank. These components enable WorldStereo to generate multi-view-consistent videos under precise camera control, facilitating high-quality 3D reconstruction. Furthermore, the flexible control branch-based WorldStereo shows impressive efficiency, benefiting from the distribution matching distilled VDM backbone without joint training. Extensive experiments across both camera-guided video generation and 3D reconstruction benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach. Notably, we show that WorldStereo acts as a powerful world model, tackling diverse scene generation tasks (whether starting from perspective or panoramic images) with high-fidelity 3D results. Models will be released.

AI.tldr: WorldStereo是一个连接相机引导视频生成和3D重建的框架，通过几何记忆模块实现多视角一致的视频生成，便于高质量3D重建
AI.motivation: 当前视频扩散模型生成的视频虽然视觉质量高，但难以重建一致的3D场景，主要原因是相机可控性有限和不同相机轨迹下生成内容不一致
AI.method: 提出WorldStereo框架，包含两个几何记忆模块：全局几何记忆（通过增量更新的点云注入粗略结构先验）和空间立体记忆（通过3D对应关系约束注意力感受野）。使用分布匹配蒸馏的VDM骨干，无需联合训练
AI.result: 在相机引导视频生成和3D重建基准测试中表现优异，能够生成多视角一致的视频，实现高质量3D重建，可作为强大的世界模型处理多样化场景生成任务
AI.conclusion: WorldStereo成功解决了视频扩散模型在3D重建中的一致性问题，通过几何记忆模块实现了相机可控的多视角一致视频生成，为高质量3D重建提供了有效解决方案

title: Random Features for Operator-Valued Kernels: Bridging Kernel Methods and Neural Operators
summary: In this work, we investigate the generalization properties of random feature methods. Our analysis extends prior results for Tikhonov regularization to a broad class of spectral regularization techniques and further generalizes the setting to operator-valued kernels. This unified framework enables a rigorous theoretical analysis of neural operators and neural networks through the lens of the Neural Tangent Kernel (NTK). In particular, it allows us to establish optimal learning rates and provides a good understanding of how many neurons are required to achieve a given accuracy. Furthermore, we establish minimax rates in the well-specified case and also in the misspecified case, where the target is not contained in the reproducing kernel Hilbert space. These results sharpen and complete earlier findings for specific kernel algorithms.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了随机特征方法的泛化性质，将Tikhonov正则化的结果扩展到更广泛的谱正则化技术和算子值核，为神经算子和神经网络提供了统一的NTK理论分析框架。
AI.motivation: 研究随机特征方法的泛化性质，特别是如何将传统的核方法理论扩展到神经网络的NTK分析，以理解神经网络的学习能力和所需神经元数量。
AI.method: 采用算子值核的统一框架，将谱正则化技术从Tikhonov正则化扩展到更广泛的类别，通过NTK视角分析神经算子和神经网络。
AI.result: 建立了最优学习率，明确了达到给定精度所需的神经元数量，并在正确设定和错误设定情况下建立了极小极大率。
AI.conclusion: 该理论框架为神经网络提供了严格的泛化理论分析，完善了特定核算法的先前结果，深化了对神经网络学习能力的理解。

title: ORGAN: Object-Centric Representation Learning using Cycle Consistent Generative Adversarial Networks
summary: Although data generation is often straightforward, extracting information from data is more difficult. Object-centric representation learning can extract information from images in an unsupervised manner. It does so by segmenting an image into its subcomponents: the objects. Each object is then represented in a low-dimensional latent space that can be used for downstream processing. Object-centric representation learning is dominated by autoencoder architectures (AEs). Here, we present ORGAN, a novel approach for object-centric representation learning, which is based on cycle-consistent Generative Adversarial Networks instead. We show that it performs similarly to other state-of-the-art approaches on synthetic datasets, while at the same time being the only approach tested here capable of handling more challenging real-world datasets with many objects and low visual contrast. Complementing these results, ORGAN creates expressive latent space representations that allow for object manipulation. Finally, we show that ORGAN scales well both with respect to the number of objects and the size of the images, giving it a unique edge over current state-of-the-art approaches.

AI.tldr: ORGAN是一种基于循环一致生成对抗网络的对象中心表示学习方法，相比传统自编码器方法，在处理复杂真实世界数据集方面表现更优，具有更好的可扩展性和对象操作能力。
AI.motivation: 当前对象中心表示学习主要依赖自编码器架构，但这类方法在处理具有多个对象和低视觉对比度的真实世界数据集时存在局限性。需要开发能够更好处理复杂真实场景的方法。
AI.method: 提出ORGAN方法，基于循环一致生成对抗网络进行对象中心表示学习。通过GAN框架学习将图像分割为对象组件，并在低维潜在空间中表示每个对象，支持下游处理。
AI.result: 在合成数据集上性能与现有方法相当，但在处理具有多个对象和低视觉对比度的真实世界数据集时表现更优。能够创建富有表现力的潜在空间表示，支持对象操作，并且在对象数量和图像尺寸方面具有良好的可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: ORGAN为对象中心表示学习提供了一种基于GAN的有效替代方案，特别适合处理复杂的真实世界场景，在可扩展性和对象操作能力方面具有独特优势。

title: Silo-Bench: A Scalable Environment for Evaluating Distributed Coordination in Multi-Agent LLM Systems
summary: Large language models are increasingly deployed in multi-agent systems to overcome context limitations by distributing information across agents. Yet whether agents can reliably compute with distributed information -- rather than merely exchange it -- remains an open question. We introduce Silo-Bench, a role-agnostic benchmark of 30 algorithmic tasks across three communication complexity levels, evaluating 54 configurations over 1,620 experiments. Our experiments expose a fundamental Communication-Reasoning Gap: agents spontaneously form task-appropriate coordination topologies and exchange information actively, yet systematically fail to synthesize distributed state into correct answers. The failure is localized to the reasoning-integration stage -- agents often acquire sufficient information but cannot integrate it. This coordination overhead compounds with scale, eventually eliminating parallelization gains entirely. These findings demonstrate that naively scaling agent count cannot circumvent context limitations, and Silo-Bench provides a foundation for tracking progress toward genuinely collaborative multi-agent systems.

AI.tldr: Silo-Bench是一个多智能体系统基准测试，包含30个算法任务和3个通信复杂度级别，揭示了智能体在分布式信息计算中存在通信-推理鸿沟：智能体能有效交换信息但无法整合分布式状态得出正确答案。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型越来越多地部署在多智能体系统中以克服上下文限制，但智能体是否能可靠地计算分布式信息（而不仅仅是交换信息）仍然是一个开放问题。需要评估多智能体系统是否真正具备协作计算能力。
AI.method: 提出Silo-Bench基准测试，包含30个算法任务，覆盖三个通信复杂度级别。在54种配置下进行了1,620次实验，评估智能体在分布式信息计算中的表现。
AI.result: 实验揭示了通信-推理鸿沟：智能体能自发形成任务适当的协调拓扑并积极交换信息，但系统性地无法将分布式状态合成为正确答案。失败集中在推理整合阶段，智能体获取了足够信息但无法整合。随着规模扩大，协调开销会抵消并行化收益。
AI.conclusion: 简单地增加智能体数量无法绕过上下文限制，多智能体系统需要真正的协作推理能力。Silo-Bench为追踪真正协作多智能体系统的进展提供了基础。

title: MMNavAgent: Multi-Magnification WSI Navigation Agent for Clinically Consistent Whole-Slide Analysis
summary: Recent AI navigation approaches aim to improve Whole-Slide Image (WSI) diagnosis by modeling spatial exploration and selecting diagnostically relevant regions, yet most operate at a single fixed magnification or rely on predefined magnification traversal. In clinical practice, pathologists examine slides across multiple magnifications and selectively inspect only necessary scales, dynamically integrating global and cellular evidence in a sequential manner. This mismatch prevents existing methods from modeling cross-magnification interactions and adaptive magnification selection inherent to real diagnostic workflows. To these, we propose a clinically consistent Multi-Magnification WSI Navigation Agent (MMNavAgent) that explicitly models multi magnification interaction and adaptive magnification selection. Specifically, we introduce a Cross-Magnification navigation Tool (CMT) that aggregates contextual information from adjacent magnifications to enhance discriminative representations along the navigation path. We further introduce a Magnification Selection Tool (MST) that leverages memory-driven reasoning within the agent framework to enable interactive and adaptive magnification selection, mimicking the sequential decision process of pathologists. Extensive experiments on a public dataset demonstrate improved diagnostic performance, with 1.45% gain of AUC and 2.93% gain of BACC over a non-agent baseline. Code will be public upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 提出MMNavAgent，一个多倍率WSI导航代理，通过交叉倍率工具和倍率选择工具模拟病理学家跨倍率检查的工作流程，提升诊断性能。
AI.motivation: 现有AI导航方法通常只在单一固定倍率下操作或依赖预定义倍率遍历，而临床实践中病理学家会跨多个倍率检查并动态选择必要尺度，这种不匹配阻碍了交叉倍率交互和自适应倍率选择的建模。
AI.method: 提出MMNavAgent，包含：1) 交叉倍率导航工具(CMT)，聚合相邻倍率的上下文信息以增强导航路径上的判别性表示；2) 倍率选择工具(MST)，在代理框架内利用记忆驱动推理实现交互式和自适应倍率选择，模拟病理学家的顺序决策过程。
AI.result: 在公共数据集上的实验显示诊断性能提升，相比非代理基线AUC提高1.45%，BACC提高2.93%。
AI.conclusion: MMNavAgent通过建模多倍率交互和自适应倍率选择，更贴近临床诊断工作流程，显著提升了WSI诊断性能。

title: SoberDSE: Sample-Efficient Design Space Exploration via Learning-Based Algorithm Selection
summary: High-Level Synthesis (HLS) is a pivotal electronic design automation (EDA) technology that enables the generation of hardware circuits from high-level language descriptions. A critical step in HLS is Design Space Exploration (DSE), which seeks to identify high-quality hardware architectures under given constraints. However, the enormous size of the design space makes DSE computationally prohibitive. Although numerous algorithms have been proposed to accelerate DSE, our extensive experimental studies reveal that no single algorithm consistently achieves Pareto dominance across all problem instances. Consequently, the inability of any single algorithm to dominate all benchmarks necessitates an automated selection mechanism to identify the best-performing DSE algorithm for each specific case. To address this challenge, we propose the SoberDSE framework, which recommends suitable algorithm based on benchmark characteristics. Experimental results demonstrate that our SoberDSE framework significantly outperforms state-of-the-art heuristic-based DSE algorithms by up to 5.7 $\times$ and state-of-the-art learning-based DSE methods by up to 4.2 $\times$. Furthermore, compared to conventional classification models, SoberDSE delivers superior accuracy in small-sample learning scenarios, with an average enhancement of 35.57\%. Code and models are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/Sober-4377.

AI.tldr: SoberDSE是一个用于硬件高级综合（HLS）中设计空间探索（DSE）的算法推荐框架，通过分析基准特征自动选择最佳DSE算法，显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 在硬件高级综合的设计空间探索中，由于设计空间巨大，DSE计算成本高昂。现有多种DSE算法各有优劣，但没有单一算法能在所有问题实例上始终表现最优，因此需要自动化机制为每个具体案例选择最佳算法。
AI.method: 提出SoberDSE框架，基于基准特征推荐合适的DSE算法。该框架通过分析问题特征来预测哪种算法在特定情况下表现最好，特别是在小样本学习场景中表现出色。
AI.result: SoberDSE显著优于现有方法：比最先进的启发式DSE算法快5.7倍，比最先进的学习型DSE方法快4.2倍。在小样本学习场景中，相比传统分类模型，平均准确率提升35.57%。
AI.conclusion: SoberDSE通过自动化算法选择机制有效解决了HLS设计空间探索中的算法选择问题，在性能和效率方面显著优于现有方法，为EDA领域提供了实用的解决方案。

title: RepoRepair: Leveraging Code Documentation for Repository-Level Automated Program Repair
summary: Automated program repair (APR) struggles to scale from isolated functions to full repositories, as it demands a global, task-aware understanding to locate necessary changes. Current methods, limited by context and reliant on shallow retrieval or costly agent iterations, falter on complex cross-file issues. To this end, we propose RepoRepair, a novel documentation-enhanced approach for repository-level fault localization and program repair. Our core insight is to leverage LLMs to generate hierarchical code documentation (from functions to files) for code repositories, creating structured semantic abstractions that enable LLMs to comprehend repository-level context and dependencies. Specifically, RepoRepair first employs a text-based LLM (e.g., DeepSeek-V3) to generate file/function-level code documentation for repositories, which serves as auxiliary knowledge to guide fault localization. Subsequently, based on the fault localization results and the issue description, a powerful LLM (e.g., Claude-4) attempts to repair the identified suspicious code snippets. Evaluated on SWE-bench Lite, RepoRepair achieves a 45.7% repair rate at a low cost of $0.44 per fix. On SWE-bench Multimodal, it delivers state-of-the-art performance with a 37.1% repair rate despite a higher cost of $0.56 per fix, demonstrating robust and cost-effective performance across diverse problem domains.

AI.tldr: RepoRepair提出了一种基于文档增强的仓库级程序修复方法，通过LLM生成分层代码文档来理解仓库级上下文和依赖关系，从而提高复杂跨文件问题的修复能力。
AI.motivation: 当前自动程序修复（APR）方法难以从孤立函数扩展到完整代码仓库，因为它们需要全局的、任务感知的理解来定位必要更改。现有方法受限于上下文，依赖浅层检索或昂贵的代理迭代，在处理复杂跨文件问题时表现不佳。
AI.method:
1. 使用文本LLM（如DeepSeek-V3）为代码仓库生成文件/函数级代码文档，创建结构化语义抽象
2. 利用这些文档作为辅助知识指导故障定位
3. 基于故障定位结果和问题描述，使用强大LLM（如Claude-4）修复识别出的可疑代码片段
AI.result: 在SWE-bench Lite上达到45.7%的修复率，每次修复成本仅0.44美元；在SWE-bench Multimodal上达到最先进的37.1%修复率，每次修复成本0.56美元，展示了跨不同问题领域的鲁棒且经济高效的性能。
AI.conclusion: RepoRepair通过文档增强方法有效解决了仓库级程序修复的挑战，利用LLM生成的分层文档使模型能够理解仓库级上下文和依赖关系，在保持成本效益的同时实现了显著的性能提升。

title: From Pixels to Patches: Pooling Strategies for Earth Embeddings
summary: As geospatial foundation models shift from patch-level to pixel-level embeddings, practitioners must aggregate thousands of pixel vectors into patch representations that preserve class-discriminative signal while matching downstream label resolution. The default choice, mean pooling, discards within-patch variability and can drop accuracy by more than 10% under spatial shift. To evaluate this effect, we introduce EuroSAT-Embed: 81,000 embedding GeoTIFFs derived from three foundation models: AlphaEarth, OlmoEarth, and Tessera. We benchmark 11 training-free and 2 parametric pooling methods under both random and geographically disjoint test splits. Our results show that richer pooling schemes reduce the geographic generalization gap by up to 40% relative to mean pooling and increases accuracy by up to 5% on spatial splits. We recommend Generalized Mean Pooling (GeM) as a drop-in replacement for mean pooling: it improves accuracy without increasing embedding dimensionality. For maximum accuracy, Stats pooling (concatenation of min/max/mean/std pooling) performs best at 4x the embedding size. We further find that pooling effectiveness varies across embedding sources and that higher-dimensional embeddings benefit most from distributional statistics.

AI.tldr: 论文研究了地理空间基础模型中像素级嵌入的聚合方法，发现传统均值池化会丢弃空间变化信息，导致地理泛化性能下降，提出了更丰富的池化方案能显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 随着地理空间基础模型从图像块级转向像素级嵌入，需要将数千个像素向量聚合为图像块表示。默认的均值池化方法会丢弃图像块内的空间变异性，在地理空间偏移下可能导致超过10%的准确率下降。
AI.method: 创建了EuroSAT-Embed数据集（81,000个嵌入GeoTIFF文件），基于三个基础模型（AlphaEarth、OlmoEarth、Tessera）。评估了11种无训练池化方法和2种参数化池化方法，在随机和地理分离测试划分下进行基准测试。
AI.result: 更丰富的池化方案能将地理泛化差距相对均值池化减少高达40%，在空间划分上准确率提升高达5%。广义均值池化（GeM）作为均值池化的直接替代效果最好，不增加嵌入维度。统计池化（最小/最大/均值/标准差池化的拼接）性能最佳，但嵌入维度增加4倍。
AI.conclusion: 建议使用广义均值池化（GeM）作为均值池化的直接替代，能提升准确率而不增加嵌入维度。对于追求最高准确率的场景，统计池化效果最好但维度成本高。池化效果因嵌入源而异，高维嵌入从分布统计中获益最多。

title: Detection-Gated Glottal Segmentation with Zero-Shot Cross-Dataset Transfer and Clinical Feature Extraction
summary:
Background: Accurate glottal segmentation in high-speed videoendoscopy (HSV) is essential for extracting kinematic biomarkers of laryngeal function. However, existing deep learning models often produce spurious artifacts in non-glottal frames and fail to generalize across different clinical settings.
  Methods: We propose a detection-gated pipeline that integrates a YOLOv8-based detector with a U-Net segmenter. A temporal consistency wrapper ensures robustness by suppressing false positives during glottal closure and instrument occlusion. The model was trained on a limited subset of the GIRAFE dataset (600 frames) and evaluated via zero-shot transfer on the large-scale BAGLS dataset.
  Results: The pipeline achieved state-of-the-art performance on the GIRAFE benchmark (DSC 0.81) and demonstrated superior generalizability on BAGLS (DSC 0.85, in-distribution) without institutional fine-tuning. Downstream validation on a 65-subject clinical cohort confirmed that automated kinematic features (Open Quotient, coefficient of variation) remained consistent with established clinical benchmarks. The coefficient of variation (CV) of the glottal area was found to be a significant marker for distinguishing healthy from pathological vocal function (p=0.006).
  Conclusions: The detection-gated architecture provides a lightweight, computationally efficient solution (~35 frames/s) for real-time clinical use. By enabling robust zero-shot transfer, this framework facilitates the standardized, large-scale extraction of clinical biomarkers across diverse endoscopy platforms. Code, trained weights, and evaluation scripts are released at https://github.com/hari-krishnan/openglottal.

AI.tldr: 提出检测门控管道，结合YOLOv8检测器和U-Net分割器，用于高速视频内窥镜中的声门分割，实现零样本迁移和实时临床使用
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型在非声门帧中产生虚假伪影，且在不同临床设置中泛化能力不足，需要更鲁棒、可泛化的声门分割方法
AI.method: 检测门控管道：YOLOv8检测器识别声门区域，U-Net进行精确分割，时间一致性包装器抑制假阳性，在GIRAFE数据集600帧上训练，在BAGLS数据集进行零样本迁移评估
AI.result: 在GIRAFE基准上达到SOTA性能(DSC 0.81)，在BAGLS上显示优越泛化能力(DSC 0.85)，无需机构微调，临床验证显示自动运动学特征与临床基准一致，声门面积变异系数能显著区分健康与病理声功能(p=0.006)
AI.conclusion: 检测门控架构提供轻量级、计算高效(约35帧/秒)的实时临床解决方案，通过鲁棒零样本迁移促进跨不同内窥镜平台的标准化大规模临床生物标志物提取

title: BadRSSD: Backdoor Attacks on Regularized Self-Supervised Diffusion Models
summary: Self-supervised diffusion models learn high-quality visual representations via latent space denoising. However, their representation layer poses a distinct threat: unlike traditional attacks targeting generative outputs, its unconstrained latent semantic space allows for stealthy backdoors, permitting malicious control upon triggering. In this paper, we propose BadRSSD, the first backdoor attack targeting the representation layer of self-supervised diffusion models. Specifically, it hijacks the semantic representations of poisoned samples with triggers in Principal Component Analysis (PCA) space toward those of a target image, then controls the denoising trajectory during diffusion by applying coordinated constraints across latent, pixel, and feature distribution spaces to steer the model toward generating the specified target. Additionally, we integrate representation dispersion regularization into the constraint framework to maintain feature space uniformity, significantly enhancing attack stealth. This approach preserves normal model functionality (high utility) while achieving precise target generation upon trigger activation (high specificity). Experiments on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that BadRSSD substantially outperforms existing attacks in both FID and MSE metrics, reliably establishing backdoors across different architectures and configurations, and effectively resisting state-of-the-art backdoor defenses.

AI.tldr: BadRSSD：首个针对自监督扩散模型表示层的后门攻击方法，通过在PCA空间中劫持语义表示，控制扩散去噪轨迹，实现隐蔽的目标图像生成。
AI.motivation: 自监督扩散模型通过潜在空间去噪学习高质量视觉表示，但其表示层存在独特安全威胁：与针对生成输出的传统攻击不同，其无约束的潜在语义空间允许隐蔽的后门，在触发时允许恶意控制。
AI.method: 1. 在PCA空间中劫持带触发器的中毒样本的语义表示，使其指向目标图像；2. 在扩散过程中通过潜在空间、像素空间和特征分布空间的协调约束控制去噪轨迹；3. 集成表示分散正则化以保持特征空间均匀性，增强攻击隐蔽性。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上的实验表明，BadRSSD在FID和MSE指标上显著优于现有攻击方法，可靠地在不同架构和配置中建立后门，并能有效抵抗最先进的后门防御。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持正常模型功能（高实用性）的同时，在触发激活时实现精确目标生成（高特异性），揭示了扩散模型表示层的安全漏洞。

title: Turning Black Box into White Box: Dataset Distillation Leaks
summary: Dataset distillation compresses a large real dataset into a small synthetic one, enabling models trained on the synthetic data to achieve performance comparable to those trained on the real data. Although synthetic datasets are assumed to be privacy-preserving, we show that existing distillation methods can cause severe privacy leakage because synthetic datasets implicitly encode the weight trajectories of the distilled model, they become over-informative and exploitable by adversaries. To expose this risk, we introduce the Information Revelation Attack (IRA) against state-of-the-art distillation techniques. Experiments show that IRA accurately predicts both the distillation algorithm and model architecture, and can successfully infer membership and recover sensitive samples from the real dataset.

AI.tldr: 论文揭示数据集蒸馏方法存在严重隐私泄露风险，合成数据集会编码蒸馏模型的权重轨迹，使攻击者能够推断原始数据信息
AI.motivation: 数据集蒸馏方法通常被认为具有隐私保护特性，但作者发现现有蒸馏方法会导致严重的隐私泄露，因为合成数据集会隐式编码蒸馏模型的权重轨迹，使其变得过度信息丰富且可被攻击者利用
AI.method: 提出了信息揭示攻击（IRA），针对最先进的数据集蒸馏技术进行攻击实验，通过分析合成数据集来推断蒸馏算法、模型架构，并成功恢复原始敏感样本
AI.result: 实验表明IRA能够准确预测蒸馏算法和模型架构，成功推断成员信息并从真实数据集中恢复敏感样本，揭示了现有数据集蒸馏方法的严重隐私漏洞
AI.conclusion: 数据集蒸馏方法并非天然具有隐私保护性，合成数据集可能编码过多信息导致隐私泄露，需要重新评估和设计隐私保护的蒸馏方法

title: FluxMem: Adaptive Hierarchical Memory for Streaming Video Understanding
comment: Accepted at CVPR 2026. Project page: https://yiwengxie.com/FluxMem/
summary: This paper presents FluxMem, a training-free framework for efficient streaming video understanding. FluxMem adaptively compresses redundant visual memory through a hierarchical, two-stage design: (1) a Temporal Adjacency Selection (TAS) module removes redundant visual tokens across adjacent frames, and (2) a Spatial Domain Consolidation (SDC) module further merges spatially repetitive regions within each frame into compact representations. To adapt effectively to dynamic scenes, we introduce a self-adaptive token compression mechanism in both TAS and SDC, which automatically determines the compression rate based on intrinsic scene statistics rather than manual tuning. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FluxMem achieves new state-of-the-art results on existing online video benchmarks, reaching 76.4 on StreamingBench and 67.2 on OVO-Bench under real-time settings, while reducing latency by 69.9% and peak GPU memory by 34.5% on OVO-Bench. Furthermore, it maintains strong offline performance, achieving 73.1 on MLVU while using 65% fewer visual tokens.

AI.tldr: FluxMem是一个无需训练的高效流式视频理解框架，通过自适应压缩冗余视觉记忆，在保持性能的同时显著降低计算和内存开销。
AI.motivation: 流式视频理解需要处理连续的视频帧，但相邻帧之间存在大量视觉冗余，导致计算和内存开销巨大。现有方法要么性能不足，要么需要大量手动调优，无法适应动态场景变化。
AI.method: 采用分层两阶段设计：1) 时间邻接选择(TAS)模块去除相邻帧间的冗余视觉标记；2) 空间域整合(SDC)模块合并每帧内的空间重复区域。引入自适应标记压缩机制，基于场景统计自动确定压缩率。
AI.result: 在流式视频基准测试中达到SOTA：StreamingBench 76.4，OVO-Bench 67.2（实时设置），同时降低延迟69.9%，峰值GPU内存34.5%。离线性能也保持强劲：MLVU 73.1，使用视觉标记减少65%。
AI.conclusion: FluxMem通过自适应压缩冗余视觉记忆，在流式视频理解中实现了性能与效率的最佳平衡，无需训练即可适应动态场景，为实时视频分析提供了高效解决方案。

title: TriMoE: Augmenting GPU with AMX-Enabled CPU and DIMM-NDP for High-Throughput MoE Inference via Offloading
summary: To deploy large Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models cost-effectively, offloading-based single-GPU heterogeneous inference is crucial. While GPU-CPU architectures that offload cold experts are constrained by host memory bandwidth, emerging GPU-NDP architectures utilize DIMM-NDP to offload non-hot experts. However, non-hot experts are not a homogeneous memory-bound group: a significant subset of warm experts exists is severely penalized by high GPU I/O latency yet can saturate NDP compute throughput, exposing a critical compute gap. We present TriMoE, a novel GPU-CPU-NDP architecture that fills this gap by synergistically leveraging AMX-enabled CPU to precisely map hot, warm, and cold experts onto their optimal compute units. We further introduce a bottleneck-aware expert scheduling policy and a prediction-driven dynamic relayout/rebalancing scheme. Experiments demonstrate that TriMoE achieves up to 2.83x speedup over state-of-the-art solutions.

AI.tldr: TriMoE：一种新型GPU-CPU-NDP架构，通过协同利用AMX-enabled CPU将热、温、冷专家精确映射到最优计算单元，实现混合专家模型的高效异构推理，相比现有方案最高可达2.83倍加速。
AI.motivation: 部署大型混合专家模型需要成本效益高的异构推理方案。现有GPU-CPU架构受限于主机内存带宽，而新兴GPU-NDP架构虽然利用DIMM-NDP卸载非热专家，但未能区分温专家（受GPU I/O延迟严重惩罚但能饱和NDP计算吞吐量）和冷专家，存在关键的计算缺口。
AI.method: 提出TriMoE架构：1）协同利用AMX-enabled CPU，将热、温、冷专家精确映射到GPU、CPU和NDP的最优计算单元；2）引入瓶颈感知的专家调度策略；3）预测驱动的动态重新布局/再平衡方案。
AI.result: 实验表明TriMoE相比最先进解决方案实现了最高2.83倍的加速。
AI.conclusion: TriMoE通过填补现有架构中的计算缺口，为大型MoE模型提供了更高效的异构推理方案，显著提升了推理性能。

title: A 3D mesh convolution-based autoencoder for geometry compression
summary: In this paper, we introduce a novel 3D mesh convolution-based autoencoder for geometry compression, able to deal with irregular mesh data without requiring neither preprocessing nor manifold/watertightness conditions. The proposed approach extracts meaningful latent representations by learning features directly from the mesh faces, while preserving connectivity through dedicated pooling and unpooling operations. The encoder compresses the input mesh into a compact base mesh space, which ensures that the latent space remains comparable. The decoder reconstructs the original connectivity and restores the compressed geometry to its full resolution. Extensive experiments on multi-class datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art approaches in both 3D mesh geometry reconstruction and latent space classification tasks. Code available at: github.com/germainGB/MeshConv3D

AI.tldr: 提出基于3D网格卷积的自编码器用于几何压缩，无需预处理或流形/水密性条件，直接处理不规则网格数据
AI.motivation: 现有3D网格压缩方法通常需要预处理或对网格拓扑有严格要求（如流形/水密性），限制了实际应用。需要一种能直接处理不规则网格数据的通用压缩方法
AI.method: 基于3D网格卷积的自编码器，直接从网格面学习特征，通过专用池化和反池化操作保持连接性。编码器将输入网格压缩到紧凑的基础网格空间，解码器重建原始连接性和几何细节
AI.result: 在多类数据集上的实验表明，该方法在3D网格几何重建和潜在空间分类任务上均优于现有最先进方法
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法能够有效处理不规则网格数据，无需预处理或拓扑限制，在压缩和表示学习方面表现出色

title: Hide&Seek: Remove Image Watermarks with Negligible Cost via Pixel-wise Reconstruction
summary: Watermarking has emerged as a key defense against the misuse of machine-generated images (MGIs). Yet the robustness of these protections remains underexplored. To reveal the limits of SOTA proactive image watermarking defenses, we propose HIDE&SEEK (HS), a suite of versatile and cost-effective attacks that reliably remove embedded watermarks while preserving high visual fidelity.

AI.tldr: 提出HIDE&SEEK攻击框架，有效移除SOTA图像水印防御，揭示现有主动水印保护的脆弱性
AI.motivation: 机器学习生成图像(MGIs)的滥用问题日益严重，水印技术作为关键防御手段被广泛采用。然而，现有水印防御的鲁棒性研究不足，需要揭示SOTA主动图像水印保护的局限性。
AI.method: 提出HIDE&SEEK(HS)攻击套件，包含多种通用且成本效益高的攻击方法，能够可靠地移除嵌入的水印，同时保持高视觉保真度。
AI.result: HS攻击框架成功展示了现有SOTA主动图像水印防御的脆弱性，能够有效移除水印而不显著影响图像质量。
AI.conclusion: 当前主动图像水印防御存在严重安全漏洞，需要更鲁棒的水印方案来应对实际攻击威胁。

title: LiftAvatar: Kinematic-Space Completion for Expression-Controlled 3D Gaussian Avatar Animation
summary: We present LiftAvatar, a new paradigm that completes sparse monocular observations in kinematic space (e.g., facial expressions and head pose) and uses the completed signals to drive high-fidelity avatar animation. LiftAvatar is a fine-grained, expression-controllable large-scale video diffusion Transformer that synthesizes high-quality, temporally coherent expression sequences conditioned on single or multiple reference images. The key idea is to lift incomplete input data into a richer kinematic representation, thereby strengthening both reconstruction and animation in downstream 3D avatar pipelines. To this end, we introduce (i) a multi-granularity expression control scheme that combines shading maps with expression coefficients for precise and stable driving, and (ii) a multi-reference conditioning mechanism that aggregates complementary cues from multiple frames, enabling strong 3D consistency and controllability. As a plug-and-play enhancer, LiftAvatar directly addresses the limited expressiveness and reconstruction artifacts of 3D Gaussian Splatting-based avatars caused by sparse kinematic cues in everyday monocular videos. By expanding incomplete observations into diverse pose-expression variations, LiftAvatar also enables effective prior distillation from large-scale video generative models into 3D pipelines, leading to substantial gains. Extensive experiments show that LiftAvatar consistently boosts animation quality and quantitative metrics of state-of-the-art 3D avatar methods, especially under extreme, unseen expressions.

AI.tldr: LiftAvatar是一种通过运动学空间补全稀疏单目观测来驱动高质量虚拟形象动画的新范式，结合了视频扩散Transformer和多参考条件机制，显著提升了3D虚拟形象的动画质量。
AI.motivation: 解决日常单目视频中稀疏运动学线索导致的3D高斯溅射虚拟形象表达受限和重建伪影问题，通过补全不完整观测来增强下游3D虚拟形象管道的重建和动画能力。
AI.method: 1) 在运动学空间补全稀疏单目观测；2) 使用细粒度、表情可控的大规模视频扩散Transformer；3) 多粒度表情控制方案（结合着色图和表情系数）；4) 多参考条件机制聚合多帧互补线索；5) 作为即插即用增强器提升现有3D虚拟形象方法。
AI.result: LiftAvatar显著提升了最先进3D虚拟形象方法的动画质量和定量指标，特别是在极端、未见表情条件下表现优异，有效解决了稀疏运动学线索导致的表达受限问题。
AI.conclusion: 通过将不完整观测提升到更丰富的运动学表示，LiftAvatar成功地将大规模视频生成模型的先验知识蒸馏到3D管道中，为3D虚拟形象动画提供了有效的增强解决方案。

title: Feasible Pairings for Decentralized Integral Controllability of Non-Square Systems
summary: This paper investigates the determination of feasible input-output pairings for the decentralized integral controllability of non-square systems. The relevance of this problem extends beyond traditional industrial processes into modern AI research, particularly Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL), where environments frequently act as strongly non-square mappings that evaluate high-dimensional joint action spaces via comparatively low-dimensional global rewards. To address the stability of these complex distributed architectures, we extend the concept of D-stability to non-square matrices, providing a crucial mathematical foundation. We formally define D-stability for non-square matrices as a direct generalization of the square case. By introducing the concept of ``Squared Matrices'', which are derived from specific column selections of the non-square formulation and directly correspond to candidate control pairings, we establish a fundamental link between the stability of these square sub-components and the original non-square system. Ultimately, we propose sufficient conditions under which the individual Volterra-Lyapunov stability of these squared components guarantees the extended D-stability of the non-square matrix, thereby providing a rigorous method to identify feasible pairings that ensure robust decentralized control across both classical and data-driven applications.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了非方系统分散积分可控性的可行输入输出配对确定问题，将D稳定性概念扩展到非方矩阵，为复杂分布式架构（如多智能体强化学习）的稳定性分析提供了数学基础。
AI.motivation: 传统工业过程中的非方系统控制问题在现代AI研究中具有重要相关性，特别是在多智能体强化学习（MARL）中，环境通常作为强非方映射，通过相对低维的全局奖励评估高维联合动作空间。需要为这些复杂分布式架构的稳定性提供数学基础。
AI.method: 将D稳定性概念扩展到非方矩阵，引入"平方矩阵"概念（从非方公式的特定列选择派生），建立这些平方子组件稳定性与原非方系统之间的基本联系。提出充分条件，确保平方组件的个体Volterra-Lyapunov稳定性保证非方矩阵的扩展D稳定性。
AI.result: 建立了非方矩阵D稳定性的正式定义，提出了识别可行配对的方法，确保在经典和数据驱动应用中都能实现鲁棒的分散控制。为复杂分布式系统的稳定性分析提供了严格的数学框架。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为非方系统的分散控制提供了理论基础，特别适用于多智能体强化学习等现代AI应用。通过将D稳定性扩展到非方矩阵并建立平方组件稳定性与原系统之间的联系，为复杂分布式架构的稳定性分析提供了实用方法。

title: Stereo-Inertial Poser: Towards Metric-Accurate Shape-Aware Motion Capture Using Sparse IMUs and a Single Stereo Camera
comment: The code, data, and supplementary materials are available at \url{https://sites.google.com/view/stereo-inertial-poser}. Accepted to ICRA 2026
summary: Recent advancements in visual-inertial motion capture systems have demonstrated the potential of combining monocular cameras with sparse inertial measurement units (IMUs) as cost-effective solutions, which effectively mitigate occlusion and drift issues inherent in single-modality systems. However, they are still limited by metric inaccuracies in global translations stemming from monocular depth ambiguity, and shape-agnostic local motion estimations that ignore anthropometric variations. We present Stereo-Inertial Poser, a real-time motion capture system that leverages a single stereo camera and six IMUs to estimate metric-accurate and shape-aware 3D human motion. By replacing the monocular RGB with stereo vision, our system resolves depth ambiguity through calibrated baseline geometry, enabling direct 3D keypoint extraction and body shape parameter estimation. IMU data and visual cues are fused for predicting drift-compensated joint positions and root movements, while a novel shape-aware fusion module dynamically harmonizes anthropometry variations with global translations. Our end-to-end pipeline achieves over 200 FPS without optimization-based post-processing, enabling real-time deployment. Quantitative evaluations across various datasets demonstrate state-of-the-art performance. Qualitative results show our method produces drift-free global translation under a long recording time and reduces foot-skating effects.

AI.tldr: Stereo-Inertial Poser：利用单目立体相机和6个IMU实现实时、度量准确、形状感知的3D人体运动捕捉系统，解决单目深度模糊和忽略人体测量变化的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-惯性运动捕捉系统虽然结合单目相机和稀疏IMU解决了遮挡和漂移问题，但仍存在两个主要限制：1）单目深度模糊导致的全局平移度量不准确；2）忽略人体测量变化的形状无关局部运动估计。
AI.method: 使用单目立体相机替代单目RGB相机，通过校准基线几何解决深度模糊，实现直接3D关键点提取和身体形状参数估计。融合IMU数据和视觉线索预测漂移补偿的关节位置和根运动，并引入新颖的形状感知融合模块动态协调人体测量变化与全局平移。
AI.result: 端到端管道实现超过200 FPS，无需基于优化的后处理，支持实时部署。在多个数据集上的定量评估显示达到最先进性能。定性结果表明该方法在长时间录制下产生无漂移的全局平移，并减少脚滑效应。
AI.conclusion: Stereo-Inertial Poser通过立体视觉和IMU的融合，解决了现有系统的深度模糊和形状无关问题，实现了度量准确、形状感知的实时3D人体运动捕捉。

title: SimRecon: SimReady Compositional Scene Reconstruction from Real Videos
summary: Compositional scene reconstruction seeks to create object-centric representations rather than holistic scenes from real-world videos, which is natively applicable for simulation and interaction. Conventional compositional reconstruction approaches primarily emphasize on visual appearance and show limited generalization ability to real-world scenarios. In this paper, we propose SimRecon, a framework that realizes a "Perception-Generation-Simulation" pipeline towards cluttered scene reconstruction, which first conducts scene-level semantic reconstruction from video input, then performs single-object generation, and finally assembles these assets in the simulator. However, naively combining these three stages leads to visual infidelity of generated assets and physical implausibility of the final scene, a problem particularly severe for complex scenes. Thus, we further propose two bridging modules between the three stages to address this problem. To be specific, for the transition from Perception to Generation, critical for visual fidelity, we introduce Active Viewpoint Optimization, which actively searches in 3D space to acquire optimal projected images as conditions for single-object completion. Moreover, for the transition from Generation to Simulation, essential for physical plausibility, we propose a Scene Graph Synthesizer, which guides the construction from scratch in 3D simulators, mirroring the native, constructive principle of the real world. Extensive experiments on the ScanNet dataset validate our method's superior performance over previous state-of-the-art approaches.

AI.tldr: SimRecon是一个从视频重建组合场景的框架，通过"感知-生成-模拟"流程，使用主动视点优化和场景图合成器解决视觉保真度和物理合理性问题。
AI.motivation: 传统的组合重建方法主要关注视觉外观，对真实场景的泛化能力有限。需要一种能够创建适用于模拟和交互的对象中心表示的方法。
AI.method: 提出SimRecon框架，包含三个阶段：1) 从视频输入进行场景级语义重建；2) 执行单对象生成；3) 在模拟器中组装资产。为解决视觉保真度和物理合理性问题，引入两个桥接模块：主动视点优化（用于感知到生成的过渡）和场景图合成器（用于生成到模拟的过渡）。
AI.result: 在ScanNet数据集上的广泛实验验证了该方法优于之前的最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: SimRecon通过创新的桥接模块实现了从真实世界视频到可模拟组合场景的有效重建，解决了视觉保真度和物理合理性的关键挑战。

title: Super-resolution of turbulent reacting flows on complex meshes using graph neural networks
summary: State-of-the-art deep learning models have been extensively utilized to reconstruct small-scale structures from coarse-grained data in turbulent flows. However, their application has predominantly been restricted to structured uniform meshes, limiting their applicability to data associated with complex geometries that are typically simulated on structured non-uniform or unstructured meshes. Machine learning (ML) models based on graph neural networks (GNNs), known for their ability to process unstructured data, offer a promising alternative. In this study, we leverage the inherent flexibility of GNNs featuring message passing layers to develop a methodology for reconstructing unresolved small-scale structures from low-resolution data on complex meshes. The accuracy of the proposed approach is demonstrated using two cases: a reacting channel flow on a structured non-uniform mesh, and a reacting hydrogen fueled internal combustion (IC) engine featuring an unstructured mesh. Evaluation of results based on visual agreement, statistical metrics, and cumulative error reduction indicates the effectiveness of the method in accurately reconstructing fine-scale features. Overall, this study provides a pathway for integrating data-driven small-scale reconstruction and subgrid-scale modeling to enhance the accuracy of coarse-grained simulations on complex meshes.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种基于图神经网络（GNN）的方法，用于在复杂网格上从低分辨率数据重建未解析的小尺度湍流结构，突破了传统方法仅限于均匀结构化网格的限制。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型主要局限于均匀结构化网格，无法处理复杂几何形状的非均匀或非结构化网格数据。图神经网络因其处理非结构化数据的能力，为解决这一限制提供了有前景的替代方案。
AI.method: 利用图神经网络的消息传递层固有灵活性，开发了一种在复杂网格上从低分辨率数据重建未解析小尺度结构的方法。该方法在两个案例中验证：结构化非均匀网格的反应通道流，以及非结构化网格的氢燃料内燃机反应流。
AI.result: 通过视觉一致性、统计指标和累积误差减少的评估表明，该方法能准确重建细尺度特征。在两个测试案例中都取得了有效的结果。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为在复杂网格上集成数据驱动的小尺度重建和亚网格尺度建模提供了途径，从而提高了粗粒度模拟的准确性。

title: OnlineX: Unified Online 3D Reconstruction and Understanding with Active-to-Stable State Evolution
summary: Recent advances in generalizable 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) have enabled rapid 3D scene reconstruction within seconds, eliminating the need for per-scene optimization. However, existing methods primarily follow an offline reconstruction paradigm, lacking the capacity for continuous reconstruction, which limits their applicability to online scenarios such as robotics and VR/AR. In this paper, we introduce OnlineX, a feed-forward framework that reconstructs both 3D visual appearance and language fields in an online manner using only streaming images. A key challenge in online formulation is the cumulative drift issue, which is rooted in the fundamental conflict between two opposing roles of the memory state: an active role that constantly refreshes to capture high-frequency local geometry, and a stable role that conservatively accumulates and preserves the long-term global structure. To address this, we introduce a decoupled active-to-stable state evolution paradigm. Our framework decouples the memory state into a dedicated active state and a persistent stable state, and then cohesively fuses the information from the former into the latter to achieve both fidelity and stability. Moreover, we jointly model visual appearance and language fields and incorporate an implicit Gaussian fusion module to enhance reconstruction quality. Experiments on mainstream datasets demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms prior work in novel view synthesis and semantic understanding, showcasing robust performance across input sequences of varying lengths with real-time inference speed.

AI.tldr: OnlineX：首个在线3D高斯溅射框架，通过解耦主动-稳定状态演化解决累积漂移问题，实现实时3D视觉外观和语言场的联合重建
AI.motivation: 现有可泛化3D高斯溅射方法主要遵循离线重建范式，缺乏连续重建能力，限制了在机器人、VR/AR等在线场景的应用。在线重建面临累积漂移的核心挑战，源于内存状态既要不断刷新捕捉高频局部几何（主动角色），又要保守积累保持长期全局结构（稳定角色）的根本冲突。
AI.method: 提出解耦的主动-稳定状态演化范式：1）将内存状态解耦为专用主动状态和持久稳定状态；2）将前者信息融合到后者以实现保真度和稳定性；3）联合建模视觉外观和语言场；4）引入隐式高斯融合模块提升重建质量。仅使用流式图像输入。
AI.result: 在主流数据集上，方法在新视角合成和语义理解方面持续优于先前工作，在不同长度输入序列上展现鲁棒性能，具有实时推理速度。
AI.conclusion: OnlineX是首个在线3D高斯溅射框架，通过解耦主动-稳定状态演化有效解决累积漂移问题，实现了高质量的在线3D视觉和语义重建，为机器人、VR/AR等实时应用提供了可行解决方案。

title: SyncTrack: Rhythmic Stability and Synchronization in Multi-Track Music Generation
summary: Multi-track music generation has garnered significant research interest due to its precise mixing and remixing capabilities. However, existing models often overlook essential attributes such as rhythmic stability and synchronization, leading to a focus on differences between tracks rather than their inherent properties. In this paper, we introduce SyncTrack, a synchronous multi-track waveform music generation model designed to capture the unique characteristics of multi-track music. SyncTrack features a novel architecture that includes track-shared modules to establish a common rhythm across all tracks and track-specific modules to accommodate diverse timbres and pitch ranges. Each track-shared module employs two cross-track attention mechanisms to synchronize rhythmic information, while each track-specific module utilizes learnable instrument priors to better represent timbre and other unique features. Additionally, we enhance the evaluation of multi-track music quality by introducing rhythmic consistency through three novel metrics: Inner-track Rhythmic Stability (IRS), Cross-track Beat Synchronization (CBS), and Cross-track Beat Dispersion (CBD). Experiments demonstrate that SyncTrack significantly improves the multi-track music quality by enhancing rhythmic consistency.

AI.tldr: SyncTrack是一个同步多轨波形音乐生成模型，通过共享轨道模块建立共同节奏，专用轨道模块处理不同音色，并引入新的节奏一致性评估指标，显著提升了多轨音乐质量。
AI.motivation: 现有多轨音乐生成模型往往忽视节奏稳定性和同步性等关键属性，过于关注轨道间的差异而非其固有特性，导致生成音乐质量受限。
AI.method: 提出SyncTrack模型架构，包含轨道共享模块（使用跨轨道注意力机制同步节奏信息）和轨道专用模块（使用可学习乐器先验表示音色特征），并引入三个新的节奏一致性评估指标：轨道内节奏稳定性、跨轨道节拍同步性和跨轨道节拍分散度。
AI.result: 实验表明SyncTrack通过增强节奏一致性，显著提升了多轨音乐生成质量。
AI.conclusion: SyncTrack通过创新的架构设计和评估指标，有效解决了多轨音乐生成中的节奏同步问题，为高质量多轨音乐生成提供了新方法。

title: OmniLottie: Generating Vector Animations via Parameterized Lottie Tokens
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2026. Project Page: https://openvglab.github.io/OmniLottie/
summary: OmniLottie is a versatile framework that generates high quality vector animations from multi-modal instructions. For flexible motion and visual content control, we focus on Lottie, a light weight JSON formatting for both shapes and animation behaviors representation. However, the raw Lottie JSON files contain extensive invariant structural metadata and formatting tokens, posing significant challenges for learning vector animation generation. Therefore, we introduce a well designed Lottie tokenizer that transforms JSON files into structured sequences of commands and parameters representing shapes, animation functions and control parameters. Such tokenizer enables us to build OmniLottie upon pretrained vision language models to follow multi-modal interleaved instructions and generate high quality vector animations. To further advance research in vector animation generation, we curate MMLottie-2M, a large scale dataset of professionally designed vector animations paired with textual and visual annotations. With extensive experiments, we validate that OmniLottie can produce vivid and semantically aligned vector animations that adhere closely to multi modal human instructions.

AI.tldr: OmniLottie是一个从多模态指令生成高质量矢量动画的框架，通过专门的Lottie分词器将JSON文件转换为结构化序列，并基于预训练视觉语言模型实现动画生成。
AI.motivation: Lottie作为轻量级JSON格式能同时表示形状和动画行为，但原始JSON文件包含大量不变的结构元数据和格式化标记，给学习矢量动画生成带来挑战，需要专门的分词器来解决。
AI.method: 1) 设计专门的Lottie分词器，将JSON文件转换为表示形状、动画函数和控制参数的结构化命令和参数序列；2) 基于预训练视觉语言模型构建OmniLottie框架；3) 构建MMLottie-2M大规模数据集，包含专业设计的矢量动画及文本和视觉标注。
AI.result: 通过大量实验验证，OmniLottie能够生成生动且语义对齐的矢量动画，紧密遵循多模态人类指令。
AI.conclusion: OmniLottie框架通过专门的分词器解决了Lottie JSON格式的学习挑战，成功实现了从多模态指令生成高质量矢量动画的能力，并提供了大规模数据集推动该领域研究。

title: Egocentric Co-Pilot: Web-Native Smart-Glasses Agents for Assistive Egocentric AI
summary: What if accessing the web did not require a screen, a stable desk, or even free hands? For people navigating crowded cities, living with low vision, or experiencing cognitive overload, smart glasses coupled with AI agents could turn the web into an always-on assistive layer over daily life. We present Egocentric Co-Pilot, a web-native neuro-symbolic framework that runs on smart glasses and uses a Large Language Model (LLM) to orchestrate a toolbox of perception, reasoning, and web tools. An egocentric reasoning core combines Temporal Chain-of-Thought with Hierarchical Context Compression to support long-horizon question answering and decision support over continuous first-person video, far beyond a single model's context window. Additionally, a lightweight multimodal intent layer maps noisy speech and gaze into structured commands. We further implement and evaluate a cloud-native WebRTC pipeline integrating streaming speech, video, and control messages into a unified channel for smart glasses and browsers. In parallel, we deploy an on-premise WebSocket baseline, exposing concrete trade-offs between local inference and cloud offloading in terms of latency, mobility, and resource use. Experiments on Egolife and HD-EPIC demonstrate competitive or state-of-the-art egocentric QA performance, and a human-in-the-loop study on smart glasses shows higher task completion and user satisfaction than leading commercial baselines. Taken together, these results indicate that web-connected egocentric co-pilots can be a practical path toward more accessible, context-aware assistance in everyday life. By grounding operation in web-native communication primitives and modular, auditable tool use, Egocentric Co-Pilot offers a concrete blueprint for assistive, always-on web agents that support education, accessibility, and social inclusion for people who may benefit most from contextual, egocentric AI.

AI.tldr: Egocentric Co-Pilot：一个运行在智能眼镜上的Web原生神经符号框架，利用LLM协调感知、推理和Web工具，通过时间链式思维和分层上下文压缩支持长时程问答，为日常生活中的辅助应用提供上下文感知支持。
AI.motivation: 为视力低下、认知负荷过重或在拥挤城市中生活的人群提供无需屏幕、稳定桌面甚至双手的Web访问方式，将Web转变为日常生活中的始终在线辅助层。
AI.method: 1) 神经符号框架：LLM协调感知、推理和Web工具的工具箱；2) 自我中心推理核心：结合时间链式思维和分层上下文压缩支持长时程问答；3) 轻量级多模态意图层：将嘈杂语音和视线映射为结构化命令；4) 云原生WebRTC管道：集成流式语音、视频和控制消息；5) 本地WebSocket基线：展示本地推理与云端卸载的权衡。
AI.result: 在Egolife和HD-EPIC数据集上展示竞争性或最先进的自我中心问答性能；智能眼镜上的人机交互研究显示比领先商业基线更高的任务完成率和用户满意度。
AI.conclusion: Web连接的自我中心协同助手是迈向更易访问、上下文感知日常辅助的实际路径，通过基于Web原生通信原语和模块化、可审计的工具使用，为辅助性、始终在线的Web代理提供具体蓝图。

title: Is Bigger Always Better? Efficiency Analysis in Resource-Constrained Small Object Detection
summary: Scaling laws assume larger models trained on more data consistently outperform smaller ones -- an assumption that drives model selection in computer vision but remains untested in resource-constrained Earth observation (EO). We conduct a systematic efficiency analysis across three scaling dimensions: model size, dataset size, and input resolution, on rooftop PV detection in Madagascar. Optimizing for model efficiency (mAP$_{50}$ per unit of model size), we find a consistent efficiency inversion: YOLO11N achieves both the highest efficiency ($24\times$ higher than YOLO11X) and the highest absolute mAP$_{50}$ (0.617). Resolution is the dominant resource allocation lever ($+$120% efficiency gain), while additional data yields negligible returns at low resolution. These findings are robust to the deployment objective: small high-resolution configurations are Pareto-dominant across all 44 setups in the joint accuracy-throughput space, leaving no tradeoff to resolve. In data-scarce EO, bigger is not just unnecessary: it can be worse.

AI.tldr: 在资源受限的地球观测任务中，研究发现模型效率与规模呈现"效率反转"现象：小型高分辨率模型（YOLO11N）比大型模型效率高24倍且绝对性能更优，挑战了传统"越大越好"的缩放定律假设。
AI.motivation: 传统缩放定律假设更大的模型在更多数据上训练总是表现更好，这一假设在计算机视觉领域驱动模型选择，但在资源受限的地球观测（EO）领域尚未得到验证。研究旨在系统分析模型规模、数据集大小和输入分辨率三个维度在EO任务中的效率表现。
AI.method: 在马达加斯加的屋顶光伏检测任务上，系统分析了三个缩放维度：模型大小（YOLO11N到YOLO11X）、数据集大小和输入分辨率。通过优化模型效率（单位模型大小的mAP50），评估了44种不同配置在准确率-吞吐量联合空间的表现。
AI.result: 发现一致的效率反转现象：YOLO11N不仅效率最高（比YOLO11X高24倍），而且绝对mAP50也最高（0.617）。分辨率是主导资源分配杠杆（+120%效率增益），而低分辨率下增加数据带来的收益可忽略。小型高分辨率配置在所有44个设置中都是帕累托最优的。
AI.conclusion: 在数据稀缺的地球观测领域，更大的模型不仅不必要，反而可能更差。小型高分辨率模型配置在准确率-吞吐量权衡中占据主导地位，挑战了传统缩放定律在资源受限环境下的适用性。

title: Adaptive-Growth Randomized Neural Networks for Level-Set Computation of Multivalued Nonlinear First-Order PDEs with Hyperbolic Characteristics
summary: This paper proposes an Adaptive-Growth Randomized Neural Network (AG-RaNN) method for computing multivalued solutions of nonlinear first-order PDEs with hyperbolic characteristics, including quasilinear hyperbolic balance laws and Hamilton--Jacobi equations. Such solutions arise in geometric optics, seismic waves, semiclassical limit of quantum dynamics and high frequency limit of linear waves, and differ markedly from the viscosity or entropic solutions. The main computational challenges lie in that the solutions are no longer functions, and become union of multiple branches, after the formation of singularities. Level-set formulations offer a systematic alternative by embedding the nonlinear dynamics into linear transport equations posed in an augmented phase space, at the price of substantially increased dimensionality. To alleviate this computational burden, we combine AG-RaNN with an adaptive collocation strategy that concentrates samples in a tubular neighborhood of the zero level set, together with a layer-growth mechanism that progressively enriches the randomized feature space. Under standard regularity assumptions on the transport field and the characteristic flow, we establish a convergence result for the AG-RaNN approximation of the level-set equations. Numerical experiments demonstrate that the proposed method can efficiently recover multivalued structures and resolve nonsmooth features in high-dimensional settings.

AI.tldr: 提出自适应增长随机神经网络(AG-RaNN)方法，用于计算具有双曲特性的非线性一阶PDE的多值解，包括拟线性双曲平衡律和Hamilton-Jacobi方程。
AI.motivation: 几何光学、地震波、量子动力学的半经典极限和线性波的高频极限等问题中会出现多值解，这些解在奇点形成后不再是函数，而是多个分支的并集。水平集方法虽然能系统处理，但会显著增加维度，带来计算负担。
AI.method: 结合AG-RaNN与自适应配点策略，在零水平集的管状邻域内集中采样，并通过层增长机制逐步丰富随机特征空间。在传输场和特征流的正则性假设下，建立了AG-RaNN近似水平集方程的收敛性结果。
AI.result: 数值实验表明，该方法能高效恢复多值结构，并在高维设置中解析非光滑特征。
AI.conclusion: AG-RaNN方法有效解决了非线性一阶PDE多值解的计算挑战，特别是在高维情况下表现出良好的计算效率。

title: Robust Weighted Triangulation of Causal Effects Under Model Uncertainty
summary: A fundamental challenge in causal inference with observational data is correct specification of a causal model. When there is model uncertainty, analysts may seek to use estimates from multiple candidate models that rely on distinct, and possibly partially overlapping, sets of identifying assumptions to infer the causal effect, a process known as triangulation. Principled methods for triangulation, however, remain underdeveloped. Here, we develop a framework for causal effect triangulation that combines model testability methods from causal discovery with statistical inference methods from semiparametric theory, while avoiding explicit model selection and post-selection inference problems. We propose a triangulation functional that combines identified functionals from each model with data-driven measures of model validity. We provide a bound on the distance of the functional from the true causal effect along with conditions under which this distance can be taken to zero. Finally, we derive valid statistical inference for this functional. Our framework formalizes robustness under causal pluralism without requiring agreement across models or commitment to a single specification. We demonstrate its performance through simulations and an empirical application.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种因果推断三角验证框架，结合因果发现中的模型可测试性和半参数统计推断方法，避免显式模型选择和选择后推断问题
AI.motivation: 在观察性数据的因果推断中，正确指定因果模型是一个基本挑战。当存在模型不确定性时，分析人员可能希望使用多个候选模型的估计结果进行三角验证，但目前缺乏原则性的三角验证方法。
AI.method: 开发了一个因果效应三角验证框架，结合因果发现中的模型可测试性方法和半参数理论的统计推断方法。提出了一个三角验证函数，将每个模型的识别函数与数据驱动的模型有效性度量相结合。
AI.result: 提供了该函数与真实因果效应之间距离的界限，并给出了该距离可以趋近于零的条件。推导了该函数的有效统计推断，并通过模拟和实证应用验证了其性能。
AI.conclusion: 该框架在不要求模型间一致或承诺单一规范的情况下，形式化了因果多元主义下的鲁棒性，为因果推断三角验证提供了原则性方法。

title: 3D Field of Junctions: A Noise-Robust, Training-Free Structural Prior for Volumetric Inverse Problems
summary: Volume denoising is a foundational problem in computational imaging, as many 3D imaging inverse problems face high levels of measurement noise. Inspired by the strong 2D image denoising properties of Field of Junctions (ICCV 2021), we propose a novel, fully volumetric 3D Field of Junctions (3D FoJ) representation that optimizes a junction of 3D wedges that best explain each 3D patch of a full volume, while encouraging consistency between overlapping patches. In addition to direct volume denoising, we leverage our 3D FoJ representation as a structural prior that: (i) requires no training data, and thus precludes the risk of hallucination, (ii) preserves and enhances sharp edge and corner structures in 3D, even under low signal to noise ratio (SNR), and (iii) can be used as a drop-in denoising representation via projected or proximal gradient descent for any volumetric inverse problem with low SNR. We demonstrate successful volume reconstruction and denoising with 3D FoJ across three diverse 3D imaging tasks with low-SNR measurements: low-dose X-ray computed tomography (CT), cryogenic electron tomography (cryo-ET), and denoising point clouds such as those from lidar in adverse weather. Across these challenging low-SNR volumetric imaging problems, 3D FoJ outperforms a mixture of classical and neural methods.

AI.tldr: 提出3D Field of Junctions表示法用于三维体积去噪，无需训练数据，能保持边缘和角结构，在低信噪比下优于经典和神经网络方法
AI.motivation: 三维成像逆问题常面临高测量噪声，现有方法可能产生幻觉或无法保持锐利结构。需要一种无需训练数据、能保持三维边缘和角结构的去噪表示法
AI.method: 提出3D Field of Junctions表示法，优化三维楔形连接以解释每个三维补丁，同时鼓励重叠补丁间的一致性。可作为结构先验用于投影或近端梯度下降
AI.result: 在低剂量X射线CT、冷冻电子断层扫描和点云去噪等低信噪比三维成像任务中，3D FoJ优于经典和神经网络方法
AI.conclusion: 3D FoJ是一种有效的无训练数据三维去噪表示法，能保持结构完整性，适用于多种低信噪比体积成像问题

title: Bridging the gap between Performance and Interpretability: An Explainable Disentangled Multimodal Framework for Cancer Survival Prediction
summary: While multimodal survival prediction models are increasingly more accurate, their complexity often reduces interpretability, limiting insight into how different data sources influence predictions. To address this, we introduce DIMAFx, an explainable multimodal framework for cancer survival prediction that produces disentangled, interpretable modality-specific and modality-shared representations from histopathology whole-slide images and transcriptomics data. Across multiple cancer cohorts, DIMAFx achieves state-of-the-art performance and improved representation disentanglement. Leveraging its interpretable design and SHapley Additive exPlanations, DIMAFx systematically reveals key multimodal interactions and the biological information encoded in the disentangled representations. In breast cancer survival prediction, the most predictive features contain modality-shared information, including one capturing solid tumor morphology contextualized primarily by late estrogen response, where higher-grade morphology aligned with pathway upregulation and increased risk, consistent with known breast cancer biology. Key modality-specific features capture microenvironmental signals from interacting adipose and stromal morphologies. These results show that multimodal models can overcome the traditional trade-off between performance and explainability, supporting their application in precision medicine.

AI.tldr: DIMAFx是一个可解释的多模态癌症生存预测框架，使用组织病理学全切片图像和转录组学数据，通过解耦的模态特定和模态共享表示实现高性能和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 虽然多模态生存预测模型越来越准确，但其复杂性降低了可解释性，限制了理解不同数据源如何影响预测的能力。需要克服性能与可解释性之间的传统权衡。
AI.method: 提出DIMAFx框架，从组织病理学全切片图像和转录组学数据中生成解耦的、可解释的模态特定和模态共享表示，结合SHAP解释方法分析多模态交互。
AI.result: 在多个癌症队列中达到最先进性能，改善表示解耦。在乳腺癌生存预测中，最具预测性的特征包含模态共享信息，包括捕获实体肿瘤形态的信息，与已知乳腺癌生物学一致。
AI.conclusion: 多模态模型可以克服性能与可解释性之间的传统权衡，支持其在精准医学中的应用。

title: GeoDiT: Point-Conditioned Diffusion Transformer for Satellite Image Synthesis
summary: We introduce GeoDiT, a diffusion transformer designed for text-to-satellite image generation with point-based control. Existing controlled satellite image generative models often require pixel-level maps that are time-consuming to acquire, yet semantically limited. To address this limitation, we introduce a novel point-based conditioning framework that controls the generation process through the spatial location of the points and the textual description associated with each point, providing semantically rich control signals. This approach enables flexible, annotation-friendly, and computationally simple inference for satellite image generation. To this end, we introduce an adaptive local attention mechanism that effectively regularizes the attention scores based on the input point queries. We systematically evaluate various domain-specific design choices for training GeoDiT, including the selection of satellite image representation for alignment and geolocation representation for conditioning. Our experiments demonstrate that GeoDiT achieves impressive generation performance, surpassing the state-of-the-art remote sensing generative models.

AI.tldr: GeoDiT是一个用于文本到卫星图像生成的扩散变换器，通过点基控制实现灵活、标注友好的卫星图像生成，超越了现有遥感生成模型。
AI.motivation: 现有受控卫星图像生成模型通常需要像素级地图，这些地图获取耗时且语义有限。为了解决这一限制，作者提出了一种新颖的点基条件框架，通过点的空间位置和每个点的文本描述来控制生成过程。
AI.method:
1. 设计用于文本到卫星图像生成的扩散变换器GeoDiT
2. 引入点基条件框架，通过空间位置和文本描述控制生成
3. 提出自适应局部注意力机制，基于输入点查询有效正则化注意力分数
4. 系统评估领域特定设计选择，包括卫星图像表示对齐和地理位置表示条件
AI.result: GeoDiT在生成性能方面表现出色，超越了最先进的遥感生成模型，实现了灵活、标注友好且计算简单的卫星图像生成推理。
AI.conclusion: GeoDiT通过点基控制框架解决了现有卫星图像生成模型的局限性，提供了一种更灵活、语义更丰富的控制方法，在遥感图像生成领域取得了显著进展。

title: Structure-preserving Randomized Neural Networks for Incompressible Magnetohydrodynamics Equations
summary: The incompressible magnetohydrodynamic (MHD) equations are fundamental in many scientific and engineering applications. However, their strong nonlinearity and dual divergence-free constraints make them highly challenging for conventional numerical solvers. To overcome these difficulties, we propose a Structure-Preserving Randomized Neural Network (SP-RaNN) that automatically and exactly satisfies the divergence-free conditions. Unlike deep neural network (DNN) approaches that rely on expensive nonlinear and nonconvex optimization, SP-RaNN reformulates the training process into a linear least-squares system, thereby eliminating nonconvex optimization. The method linearizes the governing equations through Picard or Newton iterations, discretizes them at collocation points within the domain and on the boundaries using finite-difference schemes, and solves the resulting linear system via a linear least-squares procedure. By design, SP-RaNN preserves the intrinsic mathematical structure of the equations within a unified space-time framework, ensuring both stability and accuracy. Numerical experiments on the Navier-Stokes, Maxwell, and MHD equations demonstrate that SP-RaNN achieves higher accuracy, faster convergence, and exact enforcement of divergence-free constraints compared with both traditional numerical methods and DNN-based approaches. This structure-preserving framework provides an efficient and reliable tool for solving complex PDE systems while rigorously maintaining their underlying physical laws.

AI.tldr: 提出SP-RaNN方法，通过随机神经网络和线性最小二乘求解，自动精确满足磁流体动力学方程中的散度自由约束，避免传统深度神经网络中的非凸优化问题。
AI.motivation: 不可压缩磁流体动力学方程在科学和工程中有广泛应用，但其强非线性和双重散度自由约束使得传统数值求解器面临挑战。现有深度神经网络方法依赖昂贵的非线性非凸优化，难以精确满足物理约束。
AI.method: 提出结构保持随机神经网络(SP-RaNN)，通过Picard或Newton迭代将控制方程线性化，在域内和边界上使用有限差分方案离散化，通过线性最小二乘求解。该方法在统一时空框架内保持方程的内在数学结构。
AI.result: 在Navier-Stokes、Maxwell和MHD方程上的数值实验表明，SP-RaNN相比传统数值方法和基于DNN的方法，具有更高的精度、更快的收敛速度，并能精确执行散度自由约束。
AI.conclusion: SP-RaNN为求解复杂PDE系统提供了高效可靠的工具，同时严格保持了底层物理定律，为解决具有物理约束的偏微分方程提供了新思路。

title: MedCollab: Causal-Driven Multi-Agent Collaboration for Full-Cycle Clinical Diagnosis via IBIS-Structured Argumentation
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have shown promise in healthcare applications, however, their use in clinical practice is still limited by diagnostic hallucinations and insufficiently interpretable reasoning. We present MedCollab, a novel multi-agent framework that emulates the hierarchical consultation workflow of modern hospitals to autonomously navigate the full-cycle diagnostic process. The framework incorporates a dynamic specialist recruitment mechanism that adaptively assembles clinical and examination agents according to patient-specific symptoms and examination results. To ensure the rigor of clinical work, we adopt a structured Issue-Based Information System (IBIS) argumentation protocol that requires agents to provide ``Positions'' backed by traceable evidence from medical knowledge and clinical data. Furthermore, the framework constructs a Hierarchical Disease Causal Chain that transforms flattened diagnostic predictions into a structured model of pathological progression through explicit logical operators. A multi-round Consensus Mechanism iteratively filters low-quality reasoning through logic auditing and weighted voting. Evaluated on real-world clinical datasets, MedCollab significantly outperforms pure LLMs and medical multi-agent systems in Accuracy and RaTEScore, demonstrating a marked reduction in medical hallucinations. These findings indicate that MedCollab provides an extensible, transparent, and clinically compliant approach to medical decision-making.

AI.tldr: MedCollab是一个模拟医院分层会诊流程的多智能体框架，通过动态专家招募、结构化论证协议和疾病因果链构建，显著减少医疗幻觉，提升诊断准确性。
AI.motivation: 当前大语言模型在医疗应用中存在诊断幻觉和推理可解释性不足的问题，限制了其在临床实践中的应用。需要开发能够模拟真实医院工作流程、提供透明可追溯推理的医疗决策系统。
AI.method: 1. 多智能体框架模拟医院分层会诊流程；2. 动态专家招募机制根据患者症状和检查结果自适应组建临床和检查智能体；3. 采用结构化IBIS论证协议，要求智能体提供基于医学知识和临床数据的可追溯证据；4. 构建分层疾病因果链，通过显式逻辑运算符将扁平化诊断预测转化为结构化病理进展模型；5. 多轮共识机制通过逻辑审计和加权投票过滤低质量推理。
AI.result: 在真实临床数据集上评估，MedCollab在准确性和RaTEScore方面显著优于纯LLM和现有医疗多智能体系统，医疗幻觉显著减少。
AI.conclusion: MedCollab提供了一个可扩展、透明且符合临床规范的医疗决策方法，为LLM在医疗领域的可靠应用提供了有前景的解决方案。

title: Kiwi-Edit: Versatile Video Editing via Instruction and Reference Guidance
summary: Instruction-based video editing has witnessed rapid progress, yet current methods often struggle with precise visual control, as natural language is inherently limited in describing complex visual nuances. Although reference-guided editing offers a robust solution, its potential is currently bottlenecked by the scarcity of high-quality paired training data. To bridge this gap, we introduce a scalable data generation pipeline that transforms existing video editing pairs into high-fidelity training quadruplets, leveraging image generative models to create synthesized reference scaffolds. Using this pipeline, we construct RefVIE, a large-scale dataset tailored for instruction-reference-following tasks, and establish RefVIE-Bench for comprehensive evaluation. Furthermore, we propose a unified editing architecture, Kiwi-Edit, that synergizes learnable queries and latent visual features for reference semantic guidance. Our model achieves significant gains in instruction following and reference fidelity via a progressive multi-stage training curriculum. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our data and architecture establish a new state-of-the-art in controllable video editing. All datasets, models, and code is released at https://github.com/showlab/Kiwi-Edit.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Kiwi-Edit，一个用于指令参考视频编辑的统一架构，通过可扩展的数据生成管道构建RefVIE数据集，解决了现有方法在精确视觉控制方面的局限性。
AI.motivation: 当前基于指令的视频编辑方法在精确视觉控制方面存在困难，因为自然语言难以描述复杂的视觉细节。虽然参考引导编辑提供了稳健解决方案，但高质量配对训练数据的稀缺限制了其潜力。
AI.method: 1) 提出可扩展的数据生成管道，将现有视频编辑对转换为高质量训练四元组，利用图像生成模型创建合成参考支架；2) 构建RefVIE大规模数据集和RefVIE-Bench评估基准；3) 提出Kiwi-Edit统一编辑架构，结合可学习查询和潜在视觉特征进行参考语义引导；4) 采用渐进式多阶段训练课程。
AI.result: 模型在指令跟随和参考保真度方面取得显著提升，在可控视频编辑任务中建立了新的最先进水平。所有数据集、模型和代码均已开源。
AI.conclusion: 提出的数据生成管道和统一架构有效解决了指令参考视频编辑中的精确控制问题，为可控视频编辑领域提供了新的解决方案和基准。

title: Leveraging Model Soups to Classify Intangible Cultural Heritage Images from the Mekong Delta
comment: Early accept of Vol 2025 No 3, November : Journal on Information Technologies & Communications
summary: The classification of Intangible Cultural Heritage (ICH) images in the Mekong Delta poses unique challenges due to limited annotated data, high visual similarity among classes, and domain heterogeneity. In such low-resource settings, conventional deep learning models often suffer from high variance or overfit to spurious correlations, leading to poor generalization. To address these limitations, we propose a robust framework that integrates the hybrid CoAtNet architecture with model soups, a lightweight weight-space ensembling technique that averages checkpoints from a single training trajectory without increasing inference cost. CoAtNet captures both local and global patterns through stage-wise fusion of convolution and self-attention. We apply two ensembling strategies - greedy and uniform soup - to selectively combine diverse checkpoints into a final model. Beyond performance improvements, we analyze the ensembling effect through the lens of bias-variance decomposition. Our findings show that model soups reduces variance by stabilizing predictions across diverse model snapshots, while introducing minimal additional bias. Furthermore, using cross-entropy-based distance metrics and Multidimensional Scaling (MDS), we show that model soups selects geometrically diverse checkpoints, unlike Soft Voting, which blends redundant models centered in output space. Evaluated on the ICH-17 dataset (7,406 images across 17 classes), our approach achieves state-of-the-art results with 72.36% top-1 accuracy and 69.28% macro F1-score, outperforming strong baselines including ResNet-50, DenseNet-121, and ViT. These results underscore that diversity-aware checkpoint averaging provides a principled and efficient way to reduce variance and enhance generalization in culturally rich, data-scarce classification tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出结合CoAtNet架构与模型汤（model soups）的框架，用于湄公河三角洲非物质文化遗产图像分类，在数据稀缺、类别相似度高的情况下提升泛化能力，通过权重空间集成减少方差而不增加推理成本。
AI.motivation: 非物质文化遗产图像分类面临标注数据有限、类别视觉相似度高、领域异质性等挑战。传统深度学习模型在低资源场景下容易过拟合或产生高方差，导致泛化能力差。需要开发鲁棒的分类框架来处理这些文化丰富但数据稀缺的任务。
AI.method: 1) 采用混合CoAtNet架构，通过卷积和自注意力的阶段融合捕获局部和全局模式；2) 使用模型汤（model soups）技术，对单个训练轨迹中的检查点进行权重空间集成，包括贪婪汤和均匀汤两种策略；3) 通过偏差-方差分解分析集成效果；4) 使用基于交叉熵的距离度量和多维缩放分析检查点多样性。
AI.result: 在ICH-17数据集（17个类别，7,406张图像）上达到72.36%的top-1准确率和69.28%的宏F1分数，优于ResNet-50、DenseNet-121和ViT等基线模型。模型汤通过稳定不同模型快照的预测来减少方差，同时引入最小额外偏差。
AI.conclusion: 多样性感知的检查点平均提供了一种原则性且高效的方法，在文化丰富、数据稀缺的分类任务中减少方差并增强泛化能力。模型汤能够选择几何上多样化的检查点，与Soft Voting等输出空间冗余集成方法形成对比。

title: Grokking as a Phase Transition between Competing Basins: a Singular Learning Theory Approach
summary: Grokking, the abrupt transition from memorization to generalisation after extended training, suggests the presence of competing solution basins with distinct statistical properties. We study this phenomenon through the lens of Singular Learning Theory (SLT), a Bayesian framework that characterizes the geometry of the loss landscape via the local learning coefficient (LLC), a measure of the local degeneracy of the loss surface. SLT links lower-LLC basins to higher posterior mass concentration and lower expected generalisation error. Leveraging this theory, we interpret grokking in quadratic networks as a phase transition between competing near-zero-loss solution basins. Our contributions are two-fold: we derive closed-form expressions for the LLC in quadratic networks trained on modular arithmetic tasks, with the corresponding empirical verification; as well as empirical evidence demonstrating that LLC trajectories provide a reliable tool for tracking generalisation dynamics and interpreting phase transitions during training.

AI.tldr: 该论文从奇异学习理论(SLT)的角度研究深度学习中的"顿悟"(grokking)现象，即模型在长时间训练后突然从记忆转向泛化的过程。作者在二次网络上推导了局部学习系数(LLC)的闭式解，并证明LLC轨迹可以可靠地追踪泛化动态和解释训练中的相变。
AI.motivation: 顿悟现象表明深度学习中存在具有不同统计特性的竞争解盆地。理解这些解盆地的几何结构和统计特性对于解释深度学习中的泛化行为至关重要。奇异学习理论提供了一个贝叶斯框架，通过局部学习系数(LLC)来量化损失景观的局部退化程度，从而连接了模型几何结构与泛化性能。
AI.method:
1. 采用奇异学习理论(SLT)作为理论框架，该理论将局部学习系数(LLC)作为损失表面局部退化的度量
2. 在二次网络上推导模块算术任务中LLC的闭式表达式
3. 通过实验验证理论推导的正确性
4. 使用LLC轨迹来追踪训练过程中的泛化动态和相变
AI.result:
1. 成功推导出二次网络在模块算术任务中局部学习系数(LLC)的闭式表达式
2. 实验验证了理论推导的正确性
3. 证明LLC轨迹能够可靠地追踪泛化动态，并解释训练中的相变现象
4. 将顿悟现象解释为竞争近零损失解盆地之间的相变
AI.conclusion: 该研究为理解深度学习中的顿悟现象提供了新的理论视角。通过奇异学习理论和局部学习系数，研究者可以量化损失景观的几何特性，并解释训练过程中泛化能力的突然转变。这项工作为分析深度学习模型的泛化行为提供了新的工具和理论框架。

title: Sketch2Colab: Sketch-Conditioned Multi-Human Animation via Controllable Flow Distillation
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026 Main Conference (11 pages, 5 figures)
summary: We present Sketch2Colab, which turns storyboard-style 2D sketches into coherent, object-aware 3D multi-human motion with fine-grained control over agents, joints, timing, and contacts. Conventional diffusion-based motion generators have advanced realism; however, achieving precise adherence to rich interaction constraints typically demands extensive training and/or costly posterior guidance, and performance can degrade under strong multi-entity conditioning. Sketch2Colab instead first learns a sketch-driven diffusion prior and then distills it into an efficient rectified-flow student operating in latent space for fast, stable sampling. Differentiable energies over keyframes, trajectories, and physics-based constraints directly shape the student's transport field, steering samples toward motions that faithfully satisfy the storyboard while remaining physically plausible. To capture coordinated interaction, we augment the continuous flow with a continuous-time Markov chain (CTMC) planner that schedules discrete events such as touches, grasps, and handoffs, modulating the dynamics to produce crisp, well-phased human-object-human collaborations. Experiments on CORE4D and InterHuman show that Sketch2Colab achieves state-of-the-art constraint adherence and perceptual quality while offering significantly faster inference than diffusion-only baselines.

AI.tldr: Sketch2Colab：将2D故事板草图转换为具有细粒度控制的3D多人运动，通过扩散先验学习和整流流蒸馏实现高效采样，结合CTMC规划器处理交互事件
AI.motivation: 传统基于扩散的运动生成器虽然提升了真实感，但在处理丰富的交互约束时需要大量训练和昂贵的后验引导，且在强多实体条件下性能会下降。需要一种能够精确遵循故事板约束、保持物理合理性，并能高效生成多人交互运动的方法。
AI.method:
1. 学习草图驱动的扩散先验，然后蒸馏到高效的整流流学生模型中，在潜在空间进行快速稳定采样
2. 通过关键帧、轨迹和基于物理约束的可微能量函数直接塑造学生的传输场
3. 使用连续时间马尔可夫链（CTMC）规划器调度离散事件（如触摸、抓取、交接），增强协调交互能力
AI.result: 在CORE4D和InterHuman数据集上的实验表明，Sketch2Colab在约束遵循和感知质量方面达到最先进水平，同时推理速度显著快于纯扩散基线方法
AI.conclusion: Sketch2Colab提供了一种高效、可控的从2D草图生成3D多人运动的方法，通过结合扩散先验、整流流蒸馏和CTMC规划，实现了对故事板约束的精确遵循和物理合理的交互运动生成

title: From Leaderboard to Deployment: Code Quality Challenges in AV Perception Repositories
summary: Autonomous vehicle (AV) perception models are typically evaluated solely on benchmark performance metrics, with limited attention to code quality, production readiness and long-term maintainability. This creates a significant gap between research excellence and real-world deployment in safety-critical systems subject to international safety standards. To address this gap, we present the first large-scale empirical study of software quality in AV perception repositories, systematically analyzing 178 unique models from the KITTI and NuScenes 3D Object Detection leaderboards. Using static analysis tools (Pylint, Bandit, and Radon), we evaluated code errors, security vulnerabilities, maintainability, and development practices. Our findings revealed that only 7.3% of the studied repositories meet basic production-readiness criteria, defined as having zero critical errors and no high-severity security vulnerabilities. Security issues are highly concentrated, with the top five issues responsible for almost 80% of occurrences, which prompted us to develop a set of actionable guidelines to prevent them. Additionally, the adoption of Continuous Integration/Continuous Deployment pipelines was correlated with better code maintainability. Our findings highlight that leaderboard performance does not reflect production readiness and that targeted interventions could substantially improve the quality and safety of AV perception code.

AI.tldr: 论文对自动驾驶感知模型代码质量进行首次大规模实证研究，发现仅7.3%仓库满足基本生产就绪标准，性能排行榜与生产就绪性无关
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶感知模型通常只关注基准性能指标，忽视代码质量、生产就绪性和长期可维护性，导致研究卓越性与实际部署之间存在安全关键系统的差距
AI.method: 使用静态分析工具(Pylint、Bandit、Radon)系统分析KITTI和NuScenes 3D目标检测排行榜中的178个独特模型，评估代码错误、安全漏洞、可维护性和开发实践
AI.result: 仅7.3%仓库满足基本生产就绪标准(零关键错误和无高严重性安全漏洞)，安全问题高度集中，前五大问题占近80%，CI/CD采用与更好的代码可维护性相关
AI.conclusion: 排行榜性能不能反映生产就绪性，有针对性的干预可以显著提高自动驾驶感知代码的质量和安全性，需要关注软件工程实践

title: Can AI Agents Agree?
summary: Large language models are increasingly deployed as cooperating agents, yet their behavior in adversarial consensus settings has not been systematically studied. We evaluate LLM-based agents on a Byzantine consensus game over scalar values using a synchronous all-to-all simulation. We test consensus in a no-stake setting where agents have no preferences over the final value, so evaluation focuses on agreement rather than value optimality. Across hundreds of simulations spanning model sizes, group sizes, and Byzantine fractions, we find that valid agreement is not reliable even in benign settings and degrades as group size grows. Introducing a small number of Byzantine agents further reduces success. Failures are dominated by loss of liveness, such as timeouts and stalled convergence, rather than subtle value corruption. Overall, the results suggest that reliable agreement is not yet a dependable emergent capability of current LLM-agent groups even in no-stake settings, raising caution for deployments that rely on robust coordination.

AI.tldr: 论文评估了LLM智能体在拜占庭共识游戏中的表现，发现在无利益设置下，即使没有恶意节点，当前LLM智能体群体也难以达成可靠共识，主要失败原因是活性丧失而非数值腐败。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM智能体越来越多地被部署为协作代理，但它们在对抗性共识环境中的行为尚未得到系统研究。作者旨在评估LLM智能体在拜占庭共识问题上的表现，特别是在无利益设置下的共识能力。
AI.method: 使用同步全连接模拟，在标量值的拜占庭共识游戏上评估LLM智能体。测试了无利益设置（智能体对最终值没有偏好），重点关注协议达成而非数值最优性。进行了数百次模拟，涵盖不同模型大小、群体规模和拜占庭节点比例。
AI.result: 即使在良性设置下，有效协议也不可靠，且随着群体规模增大而恶化。引入少量拜占庭节点会进一步降低成功率。失败主要由活性丧失主导（如超时和停滞收敛），而非微妙的数值腐败。
AI.conclusion: 可靠共识尚未成为当前LLM智能体群体的可靠涌现能力，即使在无利益设置下也是如此。这对依赖稳健协调的部署提出了警示。

title: Adaptive Confidence Regularization for Multimodal Failure Detection
summary: The deployment of multimodal models in high-stakes domains, such as self-driving vehicles and medical diagnostics, demands not only strong predictive performance but also reliable mechanisms for detecting failures. In this work, we address the largely unexplored problem of failure detection in multimodal contexts. We propose Adaptive Confidence Regularization (ACR), a novel framework specifically designed to detect multimodal failures. Our approach is driven by a key observation: in most failure cases, the confidence of the multimodal prediction is significantly lower than that of at least one unimodal branch, a phenomenon we term confidence degradation. To mitigate this, we introduce an Adaptive Confidence Loss that penalizes such degradations during training. In addition, we propose Multimodal Feature Swapping, a novel outlier synthesis technique that generates challenging, failure-aware training examples. By training with these synthetic failures, ACR learns to more effectively recognize and reject uncertain predictions, thereby improving overall reliability. Extensive experiments across four datasets, three modalities, and multiple evaluation settings demonstrate that ACR achieves consistent and robust gains. The source code will be available at https://github.com/mona4399/ACR.

AI.tldr: 提出ACR框架用于多模态失败检测，通过自适应置信度正则化和多模态特征交换技术提升模型可靠性
AI.motivation: 多模态模型在自动驾驶、医疗诊断等高风险领域部署时，不仅需要强预测性能，还需要可靠的失败检测机制。当前多模态失败检测问题尚未充分探索。
AI.method: 提出自适应置信度正则化(ACR)框架：1) 基于观察发现失败时多模态置信度显著低于至少一个单模态分支（置信度退化现象）；2) 引入自适应置信度损失惩罚这种退化；3) 提出多模态特征交换技术，合成具有挑战性的失败感知训练样本。
AI.result: 在4个数据集、3种模态和多种评估设置下的广泛实验表明，ACR实现了持续且稳健的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: ACR框架能有效检测多模态失败，通过自适应置信度正则化和合成失败样本训练，显著提升模型可靠性。

title: HiFi-Inpaint: Towards High-Fidelity Reference-Based Inpainting for Generating Detail-Preserving Human-Product Images
summary: Human-product images, which showcase the integration of humans and products, play a vital role in advertising, e-commerce, and digital marketing. The essential challenge of generating such images lies in ensuring the high-fidelity preservation of product details. Among existing paradigms, reference-based inpainting offers a targeted solution by leveraging product reference images to guide the inpainting process. However, limitations remain in three key aspects: the lack of diverse large-scale training data, the struggle of current models to focus on product detail preservation, and the inability of coarse supervision for achieving precise guidance.
