To address these issues, we propose HiFi-Inpaint, a novel high-fidelity reference-based inpainting framework tailored for generating human-product images. HiFi-Inpaint introduces Shared Enhancement Attention (SEA) to refine fine-grained product features and Detail-Aware Loss (DAL) to enforce precise pixel-level supervision using high-frequency maps. Additionally, we construct a new dataset, HP-Image-40K, with samples curated from self-synthesis data and processed with automatic filtering. Experimental results show that HiFi-Inpaint achieves state-of-the-art performance, delivering detail-preserving human-product images.

AI.tldr: HiFi-Inpaint：针对人-产品图像生成的高保真参考修复框架，通过共享增强注意力和细节感知损失解决产品细节保真度问题
AI.motivation: 人-产品图像在广告、电商和数字营销中至关重要，现有基于参考的修复方法在三个关键方面存在局限：缺乏多样化大规模训练数据、模型难以专注于产品细节保护、粗粒度监督无法实现精确指导
AI.method: 提出HiFi-Inpaint框架，包含共享增强注意力（SEA）来细化细粒度产品特征，以及细节感知损失（DAL）利用高频图进行像素级监督；构建新数据集HP-Image-40K，包含自合成数据和自动过滤处理样本
AI.result: 实验结果显示HiFi-Inpaint达到最先进性能，能够生成细节保留良好的人-产品图像
AI.conclusion: HiFi-Inpaint通过创新的注意力机制和损失函数设计，有效解决了人-产品图像生成中的细节保真度问题，为相关应用提供了高质量解决方案

title: ATLAS: AI-Assisted Threat-to-Assertion Learning for System-on-Chip Security Verification
comment: Accepted at the 63rd Design Automation Conference (DAC 2026), Long Beach, CA, USA (July, 2026)
summary: This work presents ATLAS, an LLM-driven framework that bridges standardized threat modeling and property-based formal verification for System-on-Chip (SoC) security. Starting from vulnerability knowledge bases such as Common Weakness Enumeration (CWE), ATLAS identifies SoC-specific assets, maps relevant weaknesses, and generates assertion-based security properties and JasperGold scripts for verification. By combining asset-centric analysis with standardized threat model templates and multi-source SoC context, ATLAS automates the transformation from vulnerability reasoning to formal proof. Evaluated on three HACK@DAC benchmarks, ATLAS detected 39/48 CWEs and generated correct properties for 33 of those bugs, advancing automated, knowledge-driven SoC security verification toward a secure-by-design paradigm.

AI.tldr: ATLAS是一个LLM驱动的框架，通过结合标准化威胁建模和基于属性的形式验证，实现SoC安全自动化分析。它从CWE等漏洞知识库出发，识别SoC特定资产，生成安全属性和验证脚本，在HACK@DAC基准测试中检测到39/48个CWE漏洞。
AI.motivation: SoC安全验证通常依赖人工分析，过程耗时且易出错。现有方法缺乏将标准化漏洞知识库与形式验证自动结合的框架。ATLAS旨在通过LLM技术自动化这一过程，实现从漏洞推理到形式证明的转换，推动安全设计范式。
AI.method: 1. 从CWE等知识库提取漏洞信息；2. 识别SoC特定资产并映射相关弱点；3. 使用标准化威胁模型模板和多源SoC上下文；4. 生成基于断言的security properties和JasperGold验证脚本；5. 结合资产中心分析和形式验证。
AI.result: 在三个HACK@DAC基准测试中：1. 检测到39/48个CWE漏洞；2. 为其中33个漏洞生成了正确的安全属性；3. 展示了自动化、知识驱动的SoC安全验证可行性。
AI.conclusion: ATLAS成功将LLM应用于SoC安全验证，实现了从标准化威胁建模到形式验证的自动化转换，推动了安全设计范式的发展，为自动化硬件安全验证提供了新方法。

title: MemeIntel: Explainable Detection of Propagandistic and Hateful Memes
comment: disinformation, misinformation, factuality, harmfulness, fake news, propaganda, hateful meme, multimodality, text, images
summary: The proliferation of multimodal content on social media presents significant challenges in understanding and moderating complex, context-dependent issues such as misinformation, hate speech, and propaganda. While efforts have been made to develop resources and propose new methods for automatic detection, limited attention has been given to jointly modeling label detection and the generation of explanation-based rationales, which often leads to degraded classification performance when trained simultaneously. To address this challenge, we introduce MemeXplain, an explanation-enhanced dataset for propagandistic memes in Arabic and hateful memes in English, making it the first large-scale resource for these tasks. To solve these tasks, we propose a multi-stage optimization approach and train Vision-Language Models (VLMs). Our results show that this strategy significantly improves both label detection and explanation generation quality over the base model, outperforming the current state-of-the-art with an absolute improvement of ~1.4% (Acc) on ArMeme and ~2.2% (Acc) on Hateful Memes. For reproducibility and future research, we aim to make the MemeXplain dataset and scripts publicly available (https://github.com/MohamedBayan/MemeIntel).

AI.tldr: 提出了MemeXplain数据集和优化方法，用于多模态内容（阿拉伯语宣传性模因和英语仇恨模因）的标签检测和解释生成，通过多阶段优化显著提升了性能。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体多模态内容（如模因）在检测虚假信息、仇恨言论和宣传方面面临挑战，现有方法很少同时建模标签检测和解释生成，导致联合训练时性能下降。
AI.method: 1) 创建MemeXplain数据集（阿拉伯语宣传性模因和英语仇恨模因）；2) 提出多阶段优化方法训练视觉语言模型（VLMs），分别优化标签检测和解释生成任务。
AI.result: 多阶段优化策略显著提升了标签检测和解释生成质量，在ArMeme数据集上准确率绝对提升约1.4%，在Hateful Memes数据集上提升约2.2%，超越了当前最佳方法。
AI.conclusion: MemeXplain是首个大规模的多模态内容标签检测和解释生成资源，多阶段优化方法有效解决了联合训练中的性能下降问题，为可解释性多模态分析提供了新方向。

title: Multiview Progress Prediction of Robot Activities
summary: For robots to operate effectively and safely alongside humans, they must be able to understand the progress of ongoing actions. This ability, known as action progress prediction, is critical for tasks ranging from timely assistance to autonomous decision-making. However, modeling action progression in robotics has often been overlooked. Moreover, a single camera may be insufficient for understanding robot's ego-actions, as self-occlusion can significantly hinder perception and model performance. In this paper, we propose a multi-view architecture for action progress prediction in robot manipulation tasks. Experiments on Mobile ALOHA demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach.

AI.tldr: 提出多视角架构用于机器人操作任务中的动作进度预测，解决单视角自遮挡问题
AI.motivation: 机器人需要理解动作进度以实现安全有效的人机协作，但现有研究常忽视动作进度建模，且单视角相机因自遮挡问题难以准确感知机器人自身动作
AI.method: 提出多视角架构用于机器人操作任务中的动作进度预测，通过多个视角解决单视角自遮挡问题
AI.result: 在Mobile ALOHA平台上实验验证了所提方法的有效性
AI.conclusion: 多视角架构能有效解决机器人动作进度预测中的自遮挡问题，提升机器人对动作进度的理解能力

title: Communication-Efficient Quantum Federated Learning over Large-Scale Wireless Networks
comment: 21 pages, accepted at IEEE Transactions on Networking
summary: Quantum federated learning (QFL) combines the robust data processing of quantum computing with the privacy-preserving features of federated learning (FL). However, in large-scale wireless networks, optimizing sum-rate is crucial for unlocking the true potential of QFL, facilitating effective model sharing and aggregation as devices compete for limited bandwidth amid dynamic channel conditions and fluctuating power resources. This paper studies a novel sum-rate maximization problem within a muti-channel QFL framework, specifically designed for non-orthogonal multiple access (NOMA)-based large-scale wireless networks. We develop a sum-rate maximization problem by jointly considering quantum device's channel selection and transmit power. Our formulated problem is a non-convex, mixed-integer nonlinear programming (MINLP) challenge that remains non-deterministic polynomial time (NP)-hard even with specified channel selection parameters. The complexity of the problem motivates us to create an effective iterative optimization approach that utilizes the sophisticated quantum approximate optimization algorithm (QAOA) to derive high-quality approximate solutions. Additionally, our study presents the first theoretical exploration of QFL convergence properties under full device participation, rigorously analyzing real-world scenarios with nonconvex loss functions, diverse data distributions, and the effects of quantum shot noise. Extensive simulation results indicate that our multi-channel NOMA-based QFL framework enhances model training and convergence behavior, surpassing conventional algorithms in terms of accuracy and loss. Moreover, our quantum-centric joint optimization approach achieves more than a 100% increase in sum-rate while ensuring rapid convergence, significantly outperforming the state-of-the-arts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于非正交多址接入(NOMA)的大规模无线网络中多通道量子联邦学习(QFL)框架，通过联合优化量子设备的信道选择和发射功率来解决和速率最大化问题，并首次理论分析了QFL在非凸损失函数、异构数据分布和量子噪声下的收敛性。
AI.motivation: 在大规模无线网络中，量子联邦学习(QFL)结合了量子计算的强大数据处理能力和联邦学习的隐私保护特性，但设备在动态信道条件和有限带宽下竞争资源，和速率优化成为关键挑战。现有研究缺乏对QFL在真实无线环境中的系统优化和理论分析。
AI.method: 1) 构建多通道NOMA-based QFL框架，将和速率最大化问题建模为非凸混合整数非线性规划(MINLP)问题；2) 提出迭代优化方法，利用量子近似优化算法(QAOA)求解高质量近似解；3) 首次理论分析QFL在全设备参与下的收敛性，考虑非凸损失函数、异构数据分布和量子噪声影响。
AI.result: 1) 多通道NOMA-based QFL框架显著提升模型训练和收敛性能，在准确率和损失方面优于传统算法；2) 量子中心的联合优化方法和速率提升超过100%，同时确保快速收敛，显著优于现有技术；3) 理论分析为QFL在真实无线环境中的部署提供了理论保障。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的多通道NOMA-based QFL框架和量子优化方法有效解决了大规模无线网络中的资源优化问题，为量子联邦学习在实际部署中的性能提升和理论分析提供了重要贡献。

title: GazeXPErT: An Expert Eye-tracking Dataset for Interpretable and Explainable AI in Oncologic FDG-PET/CT Scans
summary: [18F]FDG-PET/CT is a cornerstone imaging modality for tumor staging and treatment response assessment across many cancer types, yet expert reader shortages necessitate more efficient diagnostic aids. While standalone AI models for automatic lesion segmentation exist, clinical translation remains hindered by concerns about interpretability, explainability, reliability, and workflow integration. We present GazeXPErT, a 4D eye-tracking dataset capturing expert search patterns during tumor detection and measurement on 346 FDG-PET/CT scans. Each study was read by a trainee and a board-certified nuclear medicine or radiology specialist using an eye-tracking-enabled annotation platform that simulates routine clinical reads. From 3,948 minutes of raw 60Hz eye-tracking data, 9,030 unique gaze-to-lesion trajectories were extracted, synchronized with PET/CT image slices, and rendered in COCO-style format for multiple machine learning applications. Baseline validation experiments demonstrate that a 3D nnUNet tumor segmentation model achieved superior performance when incorporating expert gaze patterns versus without (DICE score 0.6819 versus 0.6008), and that vision transformers trained on sequential gaze and PET/CT images can improve dynamic lesion localization (74.95% predicted gaze point closer to tumor) and expert intention prediction (Accuracy 67.53% and AUROC 0.747). GazeXPErT is a valuable resource designed to explore multiple machine learning problems beyond these baseline experiments, which include and are not limited to, visual grounding or causal reasoning, clinically explainable feature augmentation, human-computer interaction, human intention prediction or understanding, and expert gaze-rewarded modeling approaches to AI in oncologic FDG-PET/CT imaging.

AI.tldr: GazeXPErT：首个4D眼动追踪数据集，捕捉专家在FDG-PET/CT肿瘤检测中的视觉搜索模式，用于提升AI模型的可解释性和性能
AI.motivation: 临床FDG-PET/CT影像解读面临专家短缺问题，现有AI模型在可解释性、可靠性和工作流集成方面存在不足。专家视觉搜索模式蕴含丰富的诊断知识，但缺乏系统性数据集来利用这些信息提升AI模型。
AI.method: 收集346个FDG-PET/CT扫描的眼动追踪数据，由学员和专家使用眼动追踪注释平台进行解读。从3,948分钟60Hz原始数据中提取9,030个独特的注视-病灶轨迹，与PET/CT图像切片同步，并以COCO格式呈现。进行基线实验：1）3D nnUNet肿瘤分割模型结合专家注视模式；2）视觉Transformer训练于序列化注视和PET/CT图像。
AI.result: 结合专家注视模式的nnUNet模型DICE得分0.6819 vs 0.6008（无注视模式）。视觉Transformer在动态病灶定位中，74.95%的预测注视点更接近肿瘤；专家意图预测准确率67.53%，AUROC 0.747。
AI.conclusion: GazeXPErT数据集为探索视觉基础、因果推理、临床可解释特征增强、人机交互、人类意图预测等机器学习问题提供了宝贵资源，有助于开发更可靠、可解释的AI辅助诊断系统。

title: GPU-friendly and Linearly Convergent First-order Methods for Certifying Optimal $k$-sparse GLMs
comment: Extended version of the ICML 2025 conference paper
summary: We investigate the problem of certifying optimality for sparse generalized linear models (GLMs), where sparsity is enforced through a cardinality constraint. While Branch-and-Bound (BnB) frameworks can certify optimality using perspective relaxations, existing methods for solving these relaxations are computationally intensive, limiting their scalability. To address this challenge, we reformulate the relaxations as composite optimization problems and develop a unified proximal framework that is both linearly convergent and computationally efficient. Under specific geometric regularity conditions, our analysis links primal quadratic growth to dual quadratic decay, yielding error bounds that make the Fenchel duality gap a sharp proxy for progress towards the solution set. This leads to a duality gap-based restart scheme that upgrades a broad class of sublinear proximal methods to provably linearly convergent methods, and applies beyond the sparse GLM setting. For the implicit perspective regularizer, we further derive specialized routines to evaluate the regularizer and its proximal operator exactly in log-linear time, avoiding costly generic conic solvers. The resulting iterations are dominated by matrix--vector multiplications, which enables GPU acceleration. Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets show orders-of-magnitude faster dual-bound computations and substantially improved BnB scalability on large instances.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种用于稀疏广义线性模型最优性认证的统一近端框架，通过将透视松弛重新表述为复合优化问题，实现了线性收敛和计算效率，显著提升了分支定界算法的可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 稀疏广义线性模型的最优性认证通常使用分支定界框架和透视松弛方法，但现有方法计算成本高，限制了可扩展性。需要开发更高效的算法来解决这些松弛问题。
AI.method: 将透视松弛重新表述为复合优化问题，开发统一近端框架。在几何正则性条件下，分析原始二次增长与对偶二次衰减的关系，提出基于对偶间隙的重启方案。对于隐式透视正则化器，推导了在log-linear时间内精确计算正则化器及其近端算子的专门例程。
AI.result: 在合成和真实数据集上的实验显示，对偶边界计算速度提高了数量级，在大规模实例上显著改善了分支定界算法的可扩展性。迭代主要由矩阵-向量乘法主导，支持GPU加速。
AI.conclusion: 提出的统一近端框架为稀疏广义线性模型的最优性认证提供了高效、可扩展的解决方案，对偶间隙重启方案将广泛的次线性近端方法升级为可证明线性收敛的方法，且适用范围超出稀疏GLM设置。

title: From GEV to ResLogit: Spatially Correlated Discrete Choice Models for Pedestrian Movement Prediction
summary: High frequency pedestrian motion forecasting when interacting with autonomous vehicles (AVs) can be enhanced through the use of behavioural frameworks, such as discrete choice models, that can explicitly account for correlation among similar movement alternatives. We formulate the pedestrian next step choice as a spatial discrete choice defined by a grid of speed adjustment and heading change. Using naturalistic pedestrian-AV encounters from nuScenes and Argoverse 2 (1 sec decision interval), we estimate a multinomial logit baseline and four spatial generalized extreme value (GEV) specifications (SCL, GSCL, SCNL, and GSCNL). We then compare them to a residual neural network logit (ResLogit) model that learns cross alternative effects while retaining an interpretable linear utility component. Across the evaluated data, spatial GEV structures yield only marginal improvements over multinomial logit, whereas ResLogit achieves a substantially better fit and produces behaviourally coherent errors concentrated among neighbouring grid cells. The results suggest that in dense, high frequency spatial choice sets, learning based residual corrections can capture proximity induced correlation more effectively than analyst specified GEV nesting structures, while maintaining interpretability.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种用于行人运动预测的ResLogit模型，结合了离散选择模型和残差神经网络，在高频空间选择场景中比传统GEV模型表现更好，同时保持可解释性。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是提升自动驾驶车辆与行人交互时的高频运动预测能力。传统离散选择模型（如GEV）虽然能处理相似运动选择之间的相关性，但在密集高频空间选择场景中效果有限，需要更有效的方法来捕捉邻近诱导的相关性。
AI.method: 方法包括：1）将行人下一步选择建模为速度调整和航向变化网格定义的空间离散选择；2）使用nuScenes和Argoverse 2数据集（1秒决策间隔）；3）估计多项logit基准和四种空间GEV规格（SCL、GSCL、SCNL、GSCNL）；4）提出残差神经网络logit（ResLogit）模型，通过学习跨选择效应同时保留可解释的线性效用组件。
AI.result: 结果显示：空间GEV结构相比多项logit只有边际改进，而ResLogit模型获得了显著更好的拟合效果，并产生行为一致的误差（集中在相邻网格单元）。这表明在密集高频空间选择集中，基于学习的残差修正比分析师指定的GEV嵌套结构更能有效捕捉邻近诱导的相关性。
AI.conclusion: 结论是：在行人运动预测的高频空间选择场景中，结合学习方法的残差修正模型（ResLogit）比传统GEV模型更有效，既能捕捉复杂的相关性模式，又能保持模型的可解释性，为自动驾驶中的行人行为预测提供了更好的解决方案。

title: RMBench: Memory-Dependent Robotic Manipulation Benchmark with Insights into Policy Design
summary: Robotic manipulation policies have made rapid progress in recent years, yet most existing approaches give limited consideration to memory capabilities. Consequently, they struggle to solve tasks that require reasoning over historical observations and maintaining task-relevant information over time, which are common requirements in real-world manipulation scenarios. Although several memory-aware policies have been proposed, systematic evaluation of memory-dependent manipulation remains underexplored, and the relationship between architectural design choices and memory performance is still not well understood. To address this gap, we introduce RMBench, a simulation benchmark comprising 9 manipulation tasks that span multiple levels of memory complexity, enabling systematic evaluation of policy memory capabilities. We further propose Mem-0, a modular manipulation policy with explicit memory components designed to support controlled ablation studies. Through extensive simulation and real-world experiments, we identify memory-related limitations in existing policies and provide empirical insights into how architectural design choices influence memory performance. The website is available at https://rmbench.github.io/.

AI.tldr: 提出了RMBench基准测试和Mem-0策略，用于系统评估机器人操作策略的记忆能力，填补了记忆依赖型操作任务评估的空白。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人操作策略大多忽视记忆能力，难以处理需要历史观察推理和时间信息保持的任务，而记忆感知策略的系统评估和架构设计选择对记忆性能的影响尚未充分研究。
AI.method: 1) 提出RMBench仿真基准，包含9个不同记忆复杂度的操作任务；2) 设计Mem-0模块化操作策略，具有显式记忆组件，支持受控消融研究。
AI.result: 通过大量仿真和真实世界实验，识别了现有策略的记忆相关局限性，并提供了架构设计选择如何影响记忆性能的实证见解。
AI.conclusion: RMBench和Mem-0为系统评估机器人操作策略的记忆能力提供了工具，揭示了记忆架构设计的重要性，推动了记忆依赖型操作任务的研究。

title: TARSE: Test-Time Adaptation via Retrieval of Skills and Experience for Reasoning Agents
summary: Complex clinical decision making often fails not because a model lacks facts, but because it cannot reliably select and apply the right procedural knowledge and the right prior example at the right reasoning step. We frame clinical question answering as an agent problem with two explicit, retrievable resources: skills, reusable clinical procedures such as guidelines, protocols, and pharmacologic mechanisms; and experience, verified reasoning trajectories from previously solved cases (e.g., chain-of-thought solutions and their step-level decompositions). At test time, the agent retrieves both relevant skills and experiences from curated libraries and performs lightweight test-time adaptation to align the language model's intermediate reasoning with clinically valid logic. Concretely, we build (i) a skills library from guideline-style documents organized as executable decision rules, (ii) an experience library of exemplar clinical reasoning chains indexed by step-level transitions, and (iii) a step-aware retriever that selects the most useful skill and experience items for the current case. We then adapt the model on the retrieved items to reduce instance-step misalignment and to prevent reasoning from drifting toward unsupported shortcuts. Experiments on medical question-answering benchmarks show consistent gains over strong medical RAG baselines and prompting-only reasoning methods. Our results suggest that explicitly separating and retrieving clinical skills and experience, and then aligning the model at test time, is a practical approach to more reliable medical agents.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种临床问答代理框架，通过检索技能库（临床指南/协议）和经验库（已解决案例的推理轨迹），在测试时进行轻量级适应，以提升临床决策的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 临床决策失败往往不是因为模型缺乏事实知识，而是无法在正确的推理步骤中可靠地选择和运用正确的程序性知识和先验案例。需要解决模型在临床推理中对程序性知识和案例经验的可靠选择与应用问题。
AI.method: 构建技能库（从指南文档组织为可执行决策规则）、经验库（索引化推理链的步骤级转换）、步骤感知检索器（选择当前案例最有用的技能和经验项），然后在测试时对检索到的项目进行轻量级适应，减少实例-步骤错位，防止推理漂移。
AI.result: 在医学问答基准测试中，相比强大的医学RAG基线和仅提示的推理方法，该方法取得了持续的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 明确分离和检索临床技能与经验，然后在测试时对齐模型，是构建更可靠医学代理的实用方法。

title: GLIDE-Reg: Global-to-Local Deformable Registration Using Co-Optimized Foundation and Handcrafted Features
summary: Deformable registration is crucial in medical imaging. Several existing applications include lesion tracking, probabilistic atlas generation, and treatment response evaluation. However, current methods often lack robustness and generalizability across two key factors: spatial resolution and differences in anatomical coverage. We jointly optimize a registration field and a learnable dimensionality reduction module so that compressed VFM embeddings remain registration-relevant, and fuse these global semantic cues with MIND local descriptors. GLIDE-Reg achieves average dice similarity coefficients (DSC) across 6 anatomical structures of 0.859, 0.862, and 0.901 in two public cohorts (Lung250M and NLST) and one institution cohort (UCLA5DCT), and outperforms the state-of-the-art DEEDS (0.834, 0.858, 0.900) with relative improvements of 3.0%, 0.5%, and 0.1%. For target registration errors, GLIDE-Reg achieves 1.58 mm on Lung250M landmarks (compared to 1.25 mm on corrField and 1.91 mm on DEEDS) and 1.11 mm on NLST nodule centers (compared to 1.11 mm on DEEDS). The substantiated performance on the nodule centers also demonstrates its robustness across challenging downstream tasks, such as nodule tracking, which is an essential prior step for early-stage lung cancer diagnosis.

AI.tldr: GLIDE-Reg是一种医学图像可变形配准方法，通过联合优化配准场和可学习降维模块，融合全局语义特征与局部描述符，在肺CT图像配准中优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 当前医学图像配准方法在空间分辨率和解剖覆盖范围差异方面缺乏鲁棒性和泛化性，需要一种能同时处理这两个关键因素的配准方法。
AI.method: 联合优化配准场和可学习降维模块，压缩VFM嵌入保持配准相关性，并将这些全局语义线索与MIND局部描述符融合。
AI.result: 在两个公共数据集(Lung250M和NLST)和一个机构数据集(UCLA5DCT)上，对6个解剖结构的平均DSC分别为0.859、0.862和0.901，优于DEEDS方法。在目标配准误差方面，Lung250M上为1.58mm，NLST结节中心为1.11mm。
AI.conclusion: GLIDE-Reg在肺CT图像配准中表现出优越性能，特别是在结节跟踪等具有挑战性的下游任务中，这对早期肺癌诊断至关重要。

title: Defensive Refusal Bias: How Safety Alignment Fails Cyber Defenders
summary: Safety alignment in large language models (LLMs), particularly for cybersecurity tasks, primarily focuses on preventing misuse. While this approach reduces direct harm, it obscures a complementary failure mode: denial of assistance to legitimate defenders. We study Defensive Refusal Bias -- the tendency of safety-tuned frontier LLMs to refuse assistance for authorized defensive cybersecurity tasks when those tasks include similar language to an offensive cyber task. Based on 2,390 real-world examples from the National Collegiate Cyber Defense Competition (NCCDC), we find that LLMs refuse defensive requests containing security-sensitive keywords at $2.72\times$ the rate of semantically equivalent neutral requests ($p < 0.001$). The highest refusal rates occur in the most operationally critical tasks: system hardening (43.8%) and malware analysis (34.3%). Interestingly, explicit authorization, where the user directly instructs the model that they have authority to complete the target task, increases refusal rates, suggesting models interpret justifications as adversarial rather than exculpatory. These findings are urgent for interactive use and critical for autonomous defensive agents, which cannot rephrase refused queries or retry. Our findings suggest that current LLM cybersecurity alignment relies on semantic similarity to harmful content rather than reasoning about intent or authorization. We call for mitigations that analyze intent to maximize defensive capabilities while still preventing harmful compliance.

AI.tldr: 研究发现安全对齐的LLMs存在防御性拒绝偏见：在网络安全任务中，模型会过度拒绝包含安全敏感关键词的合法防御请求，即使这些请求来自授权用户。这种偏见在关键防御任务（系统加固43.8%、恶意软件分析34.3%）中尤为严重。
AI.motivation: 当前LLMs的安全对齐主要关注防止滥用，但忽视了另一种失败模式：拒绝为合法防御者提供帮助。研究者希望探索防御性拒绝偏见——安全调优的LLMs倾向于拒绝包含类似攻击性任务语言的合法防御性网络安全请求。
AI.method: 基于国家大学网络防御竞赛（NCCDC）的2,390个真实世界示例，比较安全调优的LLMs对包含安全敏感关键词的防御请求与语义等效的中性请求的拒绝率。研究还测试了明确授权对拒绝率的影响。
AI.result: LLMs拒绝包含安全敏感关键词的防御请求的比率是语义等效中性请求的2.72倍（p<0.001）。拒绝率最高的任务：系统加固（43.8%）和恶意软件分析（34.3%）。有趣的是，明确授权反而增加了拒绝率，表明模型将解释视为对抗性而非免责性。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLM网络安全对齐依赖于与有害内容的语义相似性，而非意图或授权推理。需要开发能够分析意图的缓解措施，在防止有害合规的同时最大化防御能力。

title: Adaptive Estimation and Inference in Conditional Moment Models via the Discrepancy Principle
summary:
We study adaptive estimation and inference in ill-posed linear inverse problems defined by conditional moment restrictions. Existing regularized estimators such as Regularized DeepIV (RDIV) require prior knowledge of the smoothness of the nuisance function, typically encoded by a beta source condition to tune their regularization parameters. In practice, this smoothness is unknown, and misspecified hyperparameters can lead to suboptimal convergence or instability.
  We introduce a discrepancy-principle-based framework for adaptive hyperparameter selection that automatically balances bias and variance without relying on the unknown smoothness parameter. Our framework applies to both RDIV (Li et al. [2024]) and the Tikhonov Regularized Adversarial Estimator (TRAE) (Bennett et al. [2023a]) and achieves the same rates in both weak and strong metrics. Building on this, we construct a fully adaptive doubly robust estimator for linear functionals that attains the optimal rate of the better-conditioned primal or dual problem, providing a practical, theoretically grounded approach for adaptive inference in ill-posed econometric models.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于差异原则的自适应超参数选择框架，用于解决条件矩限制下的病态线性逆问题，无需已知平滑度参数，实现了偏差-方差平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有正则化估计器（如RDIV）需要已知平滑度参数来调整正则化参数，但在实践中该参数未知，错误设置会导致次优收敛或不稳定。需要自适应方法。
AI.method: 基于差异原则的自适应超参数选择框架，自动平衡偏差和方差，不依赖未知平滑度参数。适用于RDIV和TRAE，并构建了完全自适应的双重稳健估计器。
AI.result: 框架在弱度和强度度量下达到相同速率，构建的完全自适应双重稳健估计器在原始或对偶问题中达到最优速率。
AI.conclusion: 为病态计量经济模型中的自适应推断提供了实用且理论可靠的方法，解决了超参数选择依赖未知平滑度参数的问题。

title: Causal Effects with Unobserved Unit Types in Interacting Human-AI Systems
summary: We study experiments on interacting populations of humans and AI agents, where both unit types and the interaction network remain unobserved. Although causal effects propagate throughout the system, the goal is to estimate effects on humans. Examples include online platforms where human users interact alongside AI-driven accounts. We assume a human-AI prior that gives each unit a probability of being human. While humans cannot be distinguished at the unit level, the prior allows us to compute the average human composition within large subpopulations. We then model outcome dynamics through a causal message passing (CMP) framework and analyze sample-mean outcomes across subpopulations. We show that by constructing subpopulations that vary in expected human composition and treatment exposure, one can consistently recover human-specific causal effects. Our results characterize when distributional knowledge of population composition (without observing unit types or the interaction network) is sufficient for identification. We validate the approach on a simulated human-AI platform driven by behaviorally differentiated LLM agents. Together, these results provide a theoretical and practical framework for experimentation in emerging human-AI systems.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种在人类与AI代理混合系统中估计人类因果效应的框架，即使无法直接区分个体类型和观察交互网络。
AI.motivation: 在线平台等新兴人类-AI系统中，人类用户与AI驱动账户混合交互，但个体类型和交互网络通常不可观测。传统实验方法无法直接估计人类特定因果效应，需要新框架来处理这种混合系统。
AI.method: 使用人类-AI先验概率（每个单元为人类的概率），通过因果消息传递（CMP）框架建模结果动态，构建不同人类组成比例和处理暴露程度的子群体，分析子群体样本均值结果来一致恢复人类特定因果效应。
AI.result: 证明了通过构建在期望人类组成和处理暴露方面变化的子群体，可以一致恢复人类特定因果效应。表征了在何种情况下仅凭群体组成的分布知识（无需观测单元类型或交互网络）足以进行识别。在由行为差异化LLM代理驱动的人类-AI平台模拟中验证了该方法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为新兴人类-AI系统中的实验提供了理论和实践框架，使得在无法直接区分人类和AI代理的情况下，仍能可靠估计人类特定因果效应。

title: SubstratumGraphEnv: Reinforcement Learning Environment (RLE) for Modeling System Attack Paths
comment: Presented at the AI for Cyber Security Workshop at AAAI-26
summary: Automating network security analysis, particularly the identification of potential attack paths, presents significant challenges. Due in part to the sequential, interconnected, and evolutionary nature of system events which most artificial intelligence (AI) techniques struggle to model effectively. This paper proposes a Reinforcement Learning (RL) environment generation framework that simulates the sequence of processes executed on a Windows operating system, enabling dynamic modeling of malicious processes on a system. This methodology models operating system state and transitions using a graph representation. This graph is derived from open-source System Monitor (Sysmon) logs. To address the variety in system event types, fields, and log formats, a mechanism was developed to capture and model parent-child processes from Sysmon logs. A Gymnasium environment (SubstratumGraphEnv) was constructed to establish the perceptible basis for an RL environment, and a customized PyTorch interface was also built (SubstratumBridge) to translate Gymnasium graphs into Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) observations and discrete actions. Graph Convolutional Networks (GCNs) concretize the graph's local and global state, which feed the distinct policy and critic heads of an Advantage Actor-Critic (A2C) model. This work's central contribution lies in the design of a novel deep graphical RL environment that automates translation of sequential user and system events, furnishing crucial context for cybersecurity analysis. This work provides a foundation for future research into shaping training parameters and advanced reward shaping, while also offering insight into which system events attributes are critical to training autonomous RL agents.

AI.tldr: 提出一个基于强化学习的网络安全分析框架，通过图表示模拟Windows系统进程序列，使用GCN和A2C模型自动化识别攻击路径
AI.motivation: 网络安全的攻击路径识别面临挑战，传统AI技术难以有效建模系统事件的序列性、互联性和演化性。需要动态建模恶意进程的系统级行为。
AI.method: 1) 从Sysmon日志构建图表示操作系统状态和转换；2) 开发Gymnasium环境(SubstratumGraphEnv)作为RL环境基础；3) 构建PyTorch接口(SubstratumBridge)转换图为DRL观测和动作；4) 使用GCN提取图局部和全局状态特征；5) 采用A2C模型进行强化学习训练
AI.result: 设计了一个新颖的深度图强化学习环境，能够自动化转换序列化的用户和系统事件，为网络安全分析提供关键上下文。建立了未来研究训练参数调整和奖励塑形的基础。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为自动化网络安全分析提供了有效的强化学习框架，特别在系统事件建模和攻击路径识别方面有创新贡献，为自主RL智能体训练提供了关键系统事件属性的见解。

title: Quasar: Quantized Self-Speculative Acceleration for Rapid Inference via Memory-Efficient Verification
summary: Speculative Decoding (SD) has emerged as a premier technique for accelerating Large Language Model (LLM) inference by decoupling token generation into rapid drafting and parallel verification. While recent advancements in self-speculation and lookahead decoding have successfully minimized drafting overhead, they have shifted the primary performance bottleneck to the verification phase. Since verification requires a full forward pass of the target model, it remains strictly memory-bandwidth bound, fundamentally limiting the maximum achievable speedup.In this paper, we introduce \textbf{Quasar} (\textbf{Qua}ntized \textbf{S}elf-speculative \textbf{A}cceleration for \textbf{R}apid Inference), a novel, training-free framework designed to overcome this "memory wall" by employing low-bit quantization specifically for the verification stage. Our empirical analysis reveals that while aggressive structural pruning significantly degrades verification accuracy, quantization-based verification preserves the logit distribution with high fidelity while effectively halving memory traffic. Extensive experiments on state-of-the-art models (e.g., OpenPangu and Qwen3) demonstrate that Quasar maintains a speculative acceptance length comparable to full-precision methods while achieving a $1.28\times$ improvement in end-to-end throughput. Being orthogonal to existing drafting strategies, Quasar offers a generic and efficient pathway to accelerate the verification leg of speculative execution. Code is available at https://github.com/Tom-HG/Quasar.

AI.tldr: Quasar提出了一种无需训练的量化自推测加速框架，通过低比特量化验证阶段来突破推测解码中的内存墙瓶颈，在保持推测接受长度的同时实现1.28倍端到端吞吐提升。
AI.motivation: 推测解码技术通过解耦草稿和验证阶段加速LLM推理，但验证阶段需要目标模型的完整前向传播，成为严格的内存带宽瓶颈，限制了最大可实现的加速比。
AI.method: Quasar采用训练无关的框架，专门针对验证阶段使用低比特量化。研究发现，虽然激进的结构剪枝会显著降低验证精度，但基于量化的验证能高保真地保持logit分布，同时有效减少一半内存流量。
AI.result: 在OpenPangu和Qwen3等最先进模型上的实验表明，Quasar在保持与全精度方法相当的推测接受长度的同时，实现了1.28倍的端到端吞吐提升。
AI.conclusion: Quasar为推测执行的验证阶段提供了一条通用且高效的加速路径，与现有草稿策略正交，有效突破了内存墙限制。

title: On the Stability Connection Between Discrete-Time Algorithms and Their Resolution ODEs: Applications to Min-Max Optimisation
summary: This work establishes a rigorous connection between stability properties of discrete-time algorithms (DTAs) and corresponding continuous-time dynamical systems derived through $ O(s^r) $-resolution ordinary differential equations (ODEs). We show that for discrete- and continuous-time dynamical systems satisfying a mild error assumption, exponential stability of a common equilibrium with respect to the continuous time dynamics implies exponential stability of the corresponding equilibrium for the discrete-time dynamics, provided that the step size is chosen sufficiently small. We extend this result to common compact invariant sets. We prove that if an equilibrium is exponentially stable for the $ O(s^r) $-resolution ODE, then it is also exponentially stable for the associated DTA. We apply this framework to analyse the limit point properties of several prominent optimisation algorithms, including Two-Timescale Gradient Descent--Ascent (TT-GDA), Generalised Extragradient (GEG), Two-Timescale Proximal Point (TT-PPM), Damped Newton (DN), Regularised Damped Newton (RDN), and the Jacobian method (JM), by studying their $ O(1) $- and $ O(s) $-resolution ODEs. We show that under a proper choice of hyperparameters, the set of saddle points of the objective function is a subset of the set of exponentially stable equilibria of GEG, TT-PPM, DN, and RDN. We relax the common Hessian invariance assumption through direct analysis of the resolution ODEs, broadening the applicability of our results. Numerical examples illustrate the theoretical findings.

AI.tldr: 该论文建立了离散时间算法与连续时间动力系统之间的稳定性联系，证明了在适当步长下，连续时间系统的指数稳定性可保证离散时间算法的指数稳定性，并将该框架应用于分析多种优化算法的极限点性质。
AI.motivation: 研究动机在于建立离散时间优化算法与连续时间动力系统之间的严格理论联系，为分析优化算法的稳定性提供统一框架。当前研究需要更严谨的理论基础来分析算法在均衡点附近的收敛行为。
AI.method: 采用$O(s^r)$-分辨率常微分方程方法，将离散时间算法转化为连续时间动力系统。通过误差分析和稳定性理论，证明连续时间系统指数稳定性可传递到离散时间算法。应用该框架分析TT-GDA、GEG、TT-PPM、DN、RDN和JM等优化算法。
AI.result: 证明了在适当超参数选择下，目标函数的鞍点集是GEG、TT-PPM、DN和RDN算法指数稳定均衡点的子集。放松了常见的Hessian不变性假设，通过直接分析分辨率ODE扩展了结果适用性。数值实验验证了理论发现。
AI.conclusion: 该工作建立了离散时间算法与连续时间系统稳定性的严格对应关系，为优化算法分析提供了统一的理论框架。结果表明多种优化算法在适当条件下能稳定收敛到鞍点，对理解算法收敛行为有重要意义。

title: SEAnet: A Deep Learning Architecture for Data Series Similarity Search
comment: This paper was published in IEEE Transactions on Knowledge and Data Engineering (Volume: 35, Issue: 12, Page(s): 12972 - 12986, 01 December 2023). Date of Publication: 25 April 2023
summary: A key operation for massive data series collection analysis is similarity search. According to recent studies, SAX-based indexes offer state-of-the-art performance for similarity search tasks. However, their performance lags under high-frequency, weakly correlated, excessively noisy, or other dataset-specific properties. In this work, we propose Deep Embedding Approximation (DEA), a novel family of data series summarization techniques based on deep neural networks. Moreover, we describe SEAnet, a novel architecture especially designed for learning DEA, that introduces the Sum of Squares preservation property into the deep network design. We further enhance SEAnet with SEAtrans encoder. Finally, we propose novel sampling strategies, SEAsam and SEAsamE, that allow SEAnet to effectively train on massive datasets. Comprehensive experiments on 7 diverse synthetic and real datasets verify the advantages of DEA learned using SEAnet in providing high-quality data series summarizations and similarity search results.

AI.tldr: 提出Deep Embedding Approximation (DEA)数据序列摘要技术，基于深度神经网络，特别设计了SEAnet架构，引入平方和保持特性，并结合SEAtrans编码器和SEAsam采样策略，在7个数据集上验证了相似性搜索性能优势。
AI.motivation: 当前SAX-based索引在相似性搜索中表现优异，但在处理高频、弱相关、噪声大或特定数据集属性时性能下降。需要一种能适应各种数据特性的高效数据序列摘要方法。
AI.method: 1) 提出Deep Embedding Approximation (DEA)数据序列摘要技术；2) 设计SEAnet架构，引入平方和保持特性；3) 使用SEAtrans编码器增强；4) 提出SEAsam和SEAsamE采样策略处理大规模数据集训练。
AI.result: 在7个合成和真实数据集上的综合实验验证了DEA和SEAnet在提供高质量数据序列摘要和相似性搜索结果方面的优势，特别是在处理复杂数据特性时表现优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: DEA和SEAnet为数据序列相似性搜索提供了有效的深度学习解决方案，能够适应各种数据特性，在大规模数据集上表现出色。

title: PhysFormer: A Physics-Embedded Generative Model for Physically Self-Consistent Spectral Synthesis
summary: In scientific and engineering domains, modeling high-dimensional complex systems governed by partial differential equations (PDEs) remains challenging in terms of physical consistency and numerical stability. However, existing approaches, such as physics-informed neural networks (PINNs), typically rely on known physical fields or coefficients and enforce physical constraints via external loss functions, which can lead to training instability and make it difficult to handle high-dimensional or unobservable scenarios. To this end, we propose PhysFormer, a generative modeling framework that is self-consistent at both the data and physical levels. PhysFormer leverages a low-dimensional, physically interpretable latent space to learn key physical quantities directly from data without requiring known high-dimensional physical field parameters, and embeds the physical process of radiative flux generation within the network to ensure the physical consistency of the generated spectra. In high-dimensional, degenerate inversion tasks, PhysFormer constrains generation within physical limits and enhances spectral fidelity and inversion stability under varying signal-to-noise ratios (SNRs). More broadly, this approach shifts the physical processes from external loss functions into the generative mechanism itself, providing a physically consistent generative modeling paradigm for complex systems involving unknown or unobservable physical quantities.

AI.tldr: PhysFormer：一种生成建模框架，通过低维物理可解释的潜在空间学习物理量，将物理过程嵌入网络内部而非外部损失函数，确保物理一致性，特别适用于高维复杂系统和不可观测物理量的场景。
AI.motivation: 解决高维复杂偏微分方程系统建模中的物理一致性和数值稳定性问题。现有方法如PINNs依赖已知物理场或系数，通过外部损失函数施加物理约束，导致训练不稳定且难以处理高维或不可观测场景。
AI.method: 提出PhysFormer框架，利用低维物理可解释的潜在空间直接从数据学习关键物理量，无需已知高维物理场参数。将辐射通量生成的物理过程嵌入网络内部，确保生成光谱的物理一致性。在高度退化反演任务中约束生成在物理极限内。
AI.result: PhysFormer在高维退化反演任务中约束生成在物理极限内，在不同信噪比下增强光谱保真度和反演稳定性。将物理过程从外部损失函数转移到生成机制内部。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为涉及未知或不可观测物理量的复杂系统提供了物理一致的生成建模范式，改变了传统通过外部损失函数施加物理约束的方式。

title: Reconstructing Content via Collaborative Attention to Improve Multimodal Embedding Quality
summary: Multimodal embedding models, rooted in multimodal large language models (MLLMs), have yielded significant performance improvements across diverse tasks such as retrieval and classification. However, most existing approaches rely heavily on large-scale contrastive learning, with limited exploration of how the architectural and training paradigms of MLLMs affect embedding quality. While effective for generation, the causal attention and next-token prediction paradigm of MLLMs does not explicitly encourage the formation of globally compact representations, limiting their effectiveness as multimodal embedding backbones. To address this, we propose CoCoA, a Content reconstruction pre-training paradigm based on Collaborative Attention for multimodal embedding optimization. Specifically, we restructure the attention flow and introduce an EOS-based reconstruction task, encouraging the model to reconstruct input from the corresponding <EOS> embeddings. This drives the multimodal model to compress the semantic information of the input into the <EOS> token, laying the foundations for subsequent contrastive learning. Extensive experiments on MMEB-V1 demonstrate that CoCoA built upon Qwen2-VL and Qwen2.5-VL significantly improves embedding quality. Results validate that content reconstruction serves as an effective strategy to maximize the value of existing data, enabling multimodal embedding models generate compact and informative representations, raising their performance ceiling.

AI.tldr: CoCoA提出了一种基于协作注意力的内容重建预训练范式，用于优化多模态嵌入模型，通过重构输入来压缩语义信息到<EOS>标记中，提升嵌入质量
AI.motivation: 现有基于MLLM的多模态嵌入模型主要依赖大规模对比学习，但MLLM的因果注意力和下一标记预测范式并未显式鼓励形成全局紧凑表示，限制了其作为多模态嵌入骨干的有效性
AI.method: CoCoA通过重构注意力流并引入基于EOS的重建任务，鼓励模型从对应的<EOS>嵌入中重构输入，驱动多模态模型将输入语义信息压缩到<EOS>标记中，为后续对比学习奠定基础
AI.result: 在MMEB-V1基准测试中，基于Qwen2-VL和Qwen2.5-VL构建的CoCoA显著提升了嵌入质量，验证了内容重建作为最大化现有数据价值的有效策略
AI.conclusion: 内容重建预训练范式能够使多模态嵌入模型生成紧凑且信息丰富的表示，提高其性能上限，为多模态嵌入优化提供了新思路

title: UniHM: Unified Dexterous Hand Manipulation with Vision Language Model
summary: Planning physically feasible dexterous hand manipulation is a central challenge in robotic manipulation and Embodied AI. Prior work typically relies on object-centric cues or precise hand-object interaction sequences, foregoing the rich, compositional guidance of open-vocabulary instruction. We introduce UniHM, the first framework for unified dexterous hand manipulation guided by free-form language commands. We propose a Unified Hand-Dexterous Tokenizer that maps heterogeneous dexterous-hand morphologies into a single shared codebook, improving cross-dexterous hand generalization and scalability to new morphologies. Our vision language action model is trained solely on human-object interaction data, eliminating the need for massive real-world teleoperation datasets, and demonstrates strong generalizability in producing human-like manipulation sequences from open-ended language instructions. To ensure physical realism, we introduce a physics-guided dynamic refinement module that performs segment-wise joint optimization under generative and temporal priors, yielding smooth and physically feasible manipulation sequences. Across multiple datasets and real-world evaluations, UniHM attains state-of-the-art results on both seen and unseen objects and trajectories, demonstrating strong generalization and high physical feasibility. Our project page at \href{https://unihm.github.io/}{https://unihm.github.io/}.

AI.tldr: UniHM是一个统一的灵巧手操作框架，通过自由形式语言指令指导，使用统一的令牌化器处理不同手部形态，仅需人类-物体交互数据进行训练，并通过物理引导的动态优化模块确保物理可行性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常依赖物体中心线索或精确的手-物体交互序列，缺乏开放词汇指令的丰富组合性指导。需要一种能够理解自由形式语言指令并生成物理可行灵巧手操作的统一框架。
AI.method: 1) 提出统一手部灵巧令牌化器，将异构手部形态映射到共享码本；2) 仅使用人类-物体交互数据训练视觉语言动作模型；3) 引入物理引导的动态优化模块，在生成和时间先验下进行分段联合优化。
AI.result: 在多个数据集和真实世界评估中，UniHM在已见和未见物体及轨迹上都达到了最先进的结果，展示了强大的泛化能力和高物理可行性。
AI.conclusion: UniHM是首个通过自由形式语言指令指导的统一灵巧手操作框架，能够生成人类类似的操作序列，具有强大的泛化能力和物理可行性。

title: A SUPERB-Style Benchmark of Self-Supervised Speech Models for Audio Deepfake Detection
summary: Self-supervised learning (SSL) has transformed speech processing, with benchmarks such as SUPERB establishing fair comparisons across diverse downstream tasks. Despite it's security-critical importance, Audio deepfake detection has remained outside these efforts. In this work, we introduce Spoof-SUPERB, a benchmark for audio deepfake detection that systematically evaluates 20 SSL models spanning generative, discriminative, and spectrogram-based architectures. We evaluated these models on multiple in-domain and out-of-domain datasets. Our results reveal that large-scale discriminative models such as XLS-R, UniSpeech-SAT, and WavLM Large consistently outperform other models, benefiting from multilingual pretraining, speaker-aware objectives, and model scale. We further analyze the robustness of these models under acoustic degradations, showing that generative approaches degrade sharply, while discriminative models remain resilient. This benchmark establishes a reproducible baseline and provides practical insights into which SSL representations are most reliable for securing speech systems against audio deepfakes.

AI.tldr: 提出了Spoof-SUPERB基准，用于系统评估20个自监督学习模型在音频深度伪造检测任务上的表现，发现大规模判别式模型在跨领域和抗声学退化方面表现最佳。
AI.motivation: 尽管自监督学习在语音处理领域取得了显著进展，但音频深度伪造检测这一安全关键任务尚未被纳入主流基准评估体系。现有基准如SUPERB主要关注一般语音任务，缺乏对音频伪造检测的系统性评估。
AI.method: 构建了Spoof-SUPERB基准，系统评估了20个自监督学习模型，包括生成式、判别式和基于频谱图的架构。在多个领域内和跨领域数据集上进行评估，并测试了模型在声学退化条件下的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 大规模判别式模型（如XLS-R、UniSpeech-SAT、WavLM Large）在音频深度伪造检测中表现最佳，受益于多语言预训练、说话人感知目标和模型规模。生成式方法在声学退化条件下性能急剧下降，而判别式模型保持较强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: Spoof-SUPERB为音频深度伪造检测建立了可复现的基线，提供了关于哪些自监督学习表示对保护语音系统免受音频伪造攻击最可靠的实用见解。判别式模型在安全关键应用中更具优势。

title: Inference-Time Safety For Code LLMs Via Retrieval-Augmented Revision
comment: Accepted at the ICLR 2026 Workshop on Principled Design for Trustworthy AI: Interpretability, Robustness, and Safety Across Modalities
summary:
Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed for code generation in high-stakes software development, yet their limited transparency in security reasoning and brittleness to evolving vulnerability patterns raise critical trustworthiness concerns. Models trained on static datasets cannot readily adapt to newly discovered vulnerabilities or changing security standards without retraining, leading to the repeated generation of unsafe code.
  We present a principled approach to trustworthy code generation by design that operates as an inference-time safety mechanism. Our approach employs retrieval-augmented generation to surface relevant security risks in generated code and retrieve related security discussions from a curated Stack Overflow knowledge base, which are then used to guide an LLM during code revision. This design emphasizes three aspects relevant to trustworthiness: (1) interpretability, through transparent safety interventions grounded in expert community explanations; (2) robustness, by allowing adaptation to evolving security practices without model retraining; and (3) safety alignment, through real-time intervention before unsafe code reaches deployment.
  Across real-world and benchmark datasets, our approach improves the security of LLM-generated code compared to prompting alone, while introducing no new vulnerabilities as measured by static analysis. These results suggest that principled, retrieval-augmented inference-time interventions can serve as a complementary mechanism for improving the safety of LLM-based code generation, and highlight the ongoing value of community knowledge in supporting trustworthy AI deployment.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于检索增强生成的安全代码生成方法，在推理时通过检索Stack Overflow安全讨论来指导LLM修订代码，提高代码安全性
AI.motivation: LLM在代码生成中缺乏安全推理透明度，对不断演变的漏洞模式脆弱，静态训练数据无法适应新发现的安全漏洞，导致重复生成不安全代码
AI.method: 采用检索增强生成方法，从Stack Overflow知识库中检索相关安全风险和讨论，在推理时指导LLM进行代码修订，强调可解释性、鲁棒性和安全对齐
AI.result: 在真实世界和基准数据集上，相比仅使用提示的方法，该方法提高了LLM生成代码的安全性，且静态分析未引入新漏洞
AI.conclusion: 基于检索增强的推理时干预可作为提高LLM代码生成安全的补充机制，社区知识在可信AI部署中具有持续价值

title: Solving a Nonlinear Blind Inverse Problem for Tagged MRI with Physics and Deep Generative Priors
summary: Tagged MRI enables tracking internal tissue motion non-invasively. It encodes motion by modulating anatomy with periodic tags, which deform along with tissue. However, the entanglement between anatomy, tags and motion poses significant challenges for post-processing. The existence of tags and imaging blur hinders downstream tasks such as segmenting anatomy. Tag fading, due to T1-relaxation, disrupts the brightness constancy assumption for motion tracking. For decades, these challenges have been handled in isolation and sub-optimally. In contrast, we introduce a blind and nonlinear inverse framework for tagged MRI that, for the first time, unifies these tasks: anatomical image recovery, high-resolution cine image synthesis, and motion estimation. At its core, the synergy of MR physics and generative priors enables us to blindly estimate the unknown forward imaging models and high-resolution underlying anatomy, while simultaneously tracking 3D diffeomorphic Lagrangian motion over time. Experiments on tagged brain MRI demonstrate that our approach yields high-resolution anatomy images, cine images, and more accurate motion than specialized methods.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种针对标记MRI的盲非线性逆框架，首次统一了三个任务：解剖图像恢复、高分辨率电影图像合成和运动估计，通过MR物理与生成先验的协同作用实现
AI.motivation: 标记MRI通过周期性标记编码组织运动，但标记与解剖结构的纠缠、成像模糊和标记衰减给后处理带来挑战，传统方法孤立处理这些任务且效果不佳
AI.method: 结合MR物理模型和生成先验，盲估计未知前向成像模型和高分辨率底层解剖结构，同时跟踪3D微分同胚拉格朗日运动
AI.result: 在标记脑MRI实验中，该方法能生成高分辨率解剖图像、电影图像，并获得比专门方法更准确的运动估计
AI.conclusion: 提出的统一框架解决了标记MRI中长期存在的挑战，为解剖恢复、电影图像合成和运动估计提供了协同解决方案

title: Adversarial Query Synthesis via Bayesian Optimization
summary: Benchmark workloads are extremely important to the database management research community, especially as more machine learning components are integrated into database systems. Here, we propose a Bayesian optimization technique to automatically search for difficult benchmark queries, significantly reducing the amount of manual effort usually required. In preliminary experiments, we show that our approach can generate queries with more than double the optimization headroom compared to existing benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 提出基于贝叶斯优化的自动搜索方法，用于生成困难的数据库基准查询，相比现有基准可产生两倍以上的优化空间
AI.motivation: 随着机器学习组件越来越多地集成到数据库系统中，基准工作负载对数据库管理研究社区变得极其重要。传统方法需要大量人工努力来设计困难的基准查询，因此需要自动化方法来减少人工工作量。
AI.method: 采用贝叶斯优化技术自动搜索困难的基准查询。该方法能够系统地探索查询空间，找到那些对数据库系统优化最具挑战性的查询实例。
AI.result: 初步实验表明，该方法生成的查询相比现有基准具有两倍以上的优化空间（optimization headroom），显著提高了基准的难度和有效性。
AI.conclusion: 贝叶斯优化是自动生成困难数据库基准查询的有效方法，能够大幅减少人工工作量，同时产生更具挑战性的测试用例。

title: KERV: Kinematic-Rectified Speculative Decoding for Embodied VLA Models
comment: This paper has been accepted by DAC 2026
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models build a token-domain robot control paradigm, yet suffer from low speed. Speculative Decoding (SD) is an optimization strategy that can boost inference speed. Two key issues emerge when integrating VLA and SD: first, SD relies on re-inference to address token errors, which is computationally expensive; second, to mitigate token errors, the acceptance threshold in SD requires careful adjustment. Existing works fail to address the above two issues effectively. Meanwhile, as the bridge between AI and the physical world, existing embodied intelligence has overlooked the application of robotic kinematics. To address these issues, we innovatively combine token-domain VLA models with kinematic-domain prediction for SD, proposing a kinematic-rectified SD framework named KERV. We employ a kinematics-based Kalman Filter to predict actions and compensate for SD errors, avoiding costly re-inference. Moreover, we design a kinematics-based adjustment strategy to dynamically rectify the acceptance threshold, addressing the difficulty of threshold determination. Experimental results across diverse tasks and environments demonstrate that KERV achieves 27%~37% acceleration with nearly no Success Rate loss.

AI.tldr: KERV提出了一种结合视觉-语言-动作模型与运动学校正的推测解码框架，通过卡尔曼滤波器预测动作补偿推测错误，避免重新推理，实现27%~37%的加速且成功率几乎无损失。
AI.motivation: VLA模型在机器人控制中速度较慢，推测解码可以加速推理但存在两个关键问题：1）重新推理处理token错误计算成本高；2）接受阈值需要仔细调整。同时现有具身智能研究忽视了机器人运动学的应用。
AI.method: 提出KERV框架，将token域的VLA模型与运动学域的预测结合：1）使用基于运动学的卡尔曼滤波器预测动作并补偿推测解码错误，避免重新推理；2）设计基于运动学的调整策略动态校正接受阈值。
AI.result: 在多种任务和环境中的实验结果表明，KERV实现了27%~37%的加速，同时成功率几乎没有任何损失。
AI.conclusion: KERV通过结合运动学预测有效解决了推测解码在VLA模型中的两个关键问题，显著提升了推理速度，为具身智能系统提供了高效的优化方案。

title: SHIELD8-UAV: Sequential 8-bit Hardware Implementation of a Precision-Aware 1D-F-CNN for Low-Energy UAV Acoustic Detection and Temporal Tracking
comment: Preprint of work submitted to ISVLSI 2026
summary: Real-time unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) acoustic detection at the edge demands low-latency inference under strict power and hardware limits. This paper presents SHIELD8-UAV, a sequential 8-bit hardware implementation of a precision-aware 1D feature-driven CNN (1D-F-CNN) accelerator for continuous acoustic monitoring. The design performs layer-wise execution on a shared multi-precision datapath, eliminating the need for replicated processing elements. A layer-sensitivity quantisation framework supports FP32, BF16, INT8, and FXP8 modes, while structured channel pruning reduces the flattened feature dimension from 35,072 to 8,704 (75%), thereby lowering serialised dense-layer cycles. The model achieves 89.91% detection accuracy in FP32 with less than 2.5% degradation in 8-bit modes. The accelerator uses 2,268 LUTs and 0.94 W power with 116 ms end-to-end latency, achieving 37.8% and 49.6% latency reduction compared with QuantMAC and LPRE, respectively, on a Pynq-Z2 FPGA, and 5-9% lower logic usage than parallel designs. ASIC synthesis in UMC 40 nm technology shows a maximum operating frequency of 1.56 GHz, 3.29 mm2 core area, and 1.65 W total power. These results demonstrate that sequential execution combined with precision-aware quantisation and serialisation-aware pruning enables practical low-energy edge inference without relying on massive parallelism.

AI.tldr: SHIELD8-UAV：用于无人机声学检测的8位顺序硬件加速器，采用精度感知量化与序列化感知剪枝，在边缘设备上实现低延迟推理
AI.motivation: 边缘设备上的实时无人机声学检测需要在严格的功耗和硬件限制下实现低延迟推理。现有方案通常依赖大规模并行处理，导致资源消耗大，不适用于边缘场景。
AI.method: 提出顺序8位硬件实现，采用精度感知1D特征驱动CNN加速器。设计包括：层间执行共享多精度数据路径、层敏感量化框架（支持FP32/BF16/INT8/FXP8）、结构化通道剪枝（特征维度减少75%）、序列化感知优化。
AI.result: FP32精度下检测准确率89.91%，8位模式下精度下降小于2.5%。FPGA实现：2,268 LUTs，0.94W功耗，116ms端到端延迟，相比QuantMAC和LPRE分别减少37.8%和49.6%延迟。ASIC合成：1.56GHz最大频率，3.29mm²核心面积，1.65W总功耗。
AI.conclusion: 顺序执行结合精度感知量化和序列化感知剪枝，可在不依赖大规模并行的情况下实现实用的低能耗边缘推理，为边缘AI硬件设计提供了新思路。

title: IDProxy: Cold-Start CTR Prediction for Ads and Recommendation at Xiaohongshu with Multimodal LLMs
summary: Click-through rate (CTR) models in advertising and recommendation systems rely heavily on item ID embeddings, which struggle in item cold-start settings. We present IDProxy, a solution that leverages multimodal large language models (MLLMs) to generate proxy embeddings from rich content signals, enabling effective CTR prediction for new items without usage data. These proxies are explicitly aligned with the existing ID embedding space and are optimized end-to-end under CTR objectives together with the ranking model, allowing seamless integration into existing large-scale ranking pipelines. Offline experiments and online A/B tests demonstrate the effectiveness of IDProxy, which has been successfully deployed in both Content Feed and Display Ads features of Xiaohongshu's Explore Feed, serving hundreds of millions of users daily.

AI.tldr: IDProxy利用多模态大语言模型为冷启动商品生成代理嵌入，解决广告推荐系统中ID嵌入在冷启动场景下的局限性，实现无需使用数据的有效CTR预测。
AI.motivation: 广告和推荐系统中的点击率模型严重依赖商品ID嵌入，但在商品冷启动场景下，由于缺乏使用数据，传统ID嵌入方法效果不佳。需要一种能够利用商品丰富内容信号来生成有效嵌入的解决方案。
AI.method: IDProxy使用多模态大语言模型从商品内容信号生成代理嵌入，这些代理嵌入与现有ID嵌入空间显式对齐，并在CTR目标下与排序模型端到端联合优化，可无缝集成到现有大规模排序流水线中。
AI.result: 离线和在线A/B测试证明了IDProxy的有效性，已成功部署在小红书探索流的Content Feed和Display Ads功能中，每日服务数亿用户。
AI.conclusion: IDProxy通过MLLM生成代理嵌入，有效解决了商品冷启动问题，为广告推荐系统提供了一种实用的解决方案，并在实际生产环境中验证了其效果。

title: D-REX: Differentiable Real-to-Sim-to-Real Engine for Learning Dexterous Grasping
summary: Simulation provides a cost-effective and flexible platform for data generation and policy learning to develop robotic systems. However, bridging the gap between simulation and real-world dynamics remains a significant challenge, especially in physical parameter identification. In this work, we introduce a real-to-sim-to-real engine that leverages the Gaussian Splat representations to build a differentiable engine, enabling object mass identification from real-world visual observations and robot control signals, while enabling grasping policy learning simultaneously. Through optimizing the mass of the manipulated object, our method automatically builds high-fidelity and physically plausible digital twins. Additionally, we propose a novel approach to train force-aware grasping policies from limited data by transferring feasible human demonstrations into simulated robot demonstrations. Through comprehensive experiments, we demonstrate that our engine achieves accurate and robust performance in mass identification across various object geometries and mass values. Those optimized mass values facilitate force-aware policy learning, achieving superior and high performance in object grasping, effectively reducing the sim-to-real gap.

AI.tldr: 提出一个基于高斯泼溅表示的可微分引擎，通过真实到模拟再到真实的流程，从视觉观察和机器人控制信号中识别物体质量，同时学习抓取策略，减少模拟到真实的差距。
AI.motivation: 模拟环境为机器人系统开发提供了成本效益高且灵活的数据生成和政策学习平台，但模拟与真实世界动力学之间的差距仍然是重大挑战，特别是在物理参数识别方面。
AI.method: 1) 使用高斯泼溅表示构建可微分引擎；2) 从真实世界视觉观察和机器人控制信号中识别物体质量；3) 通过优化被操纵物体的质量自动构建高保真数字孪生；4) 提出新方法从有限数据中训练力感知抓取策略，将可行的人类演示转移到模拟机器人演示。
AI.result: 该引擎在各种物体几何形状和质量值上实现了准确且鲁棒的质量识别性能。优化的质量值促进了力感知策略学习，在物体抓取方面实现了优越性能，有效减少了模拟到真实的差距。
AI.conclusion: 提出的真实到模拟再到真实引擎能够准确识别物体质量并构建物理合理的数字孪生，同时支持力感知抓取策略学习，为机器人系统开发提供了有效的模拟到真实桥梁。

title: Certifiable Estimation with Factor Graphs
summary:
Factor graphs provide a convenient modular modeling language that enables practitioners to design and deploy high-performance robotic state estimation systems by composing simple, reusable building blocks. However, inference in these models is typically performed using local optimization methods that can converge to suboptimal solutions, a serious reliability concern in safety-critical applications. Conversely, certifiable estimators based on convex relaxation can recover verifiably globally optimal solutions in many practical settings, but the computational cost of solving their large-scale relaxations necessitates specialized, structure-exploiting solvers that require substantial expertise to implement, significantly hampering practical deployment.
  In this paper, we show that these two paradigms, which have thus far been treated as independent in the literature, can be naturally synthesized into a unified framework for certifiable factor graph optimization. The key insight is that factor graph structure is preserved under Shor's relaxation and Burer-Monteiro factorization: applying these transformations to a QCQP with an associated factor graph representation yields a lifted problem admitting a factor graph model with identical connectivity, in which variables and factors are simple one-to-one algebraic transformations of those in the original QCQP. This structural preservation enables the Riemannian Staircase methodology for certifiable estimation to be implemented using the same mature, highly-performant factor graph libraries and workflows already ubiquitously employed throughout robotics and computer vision, making certifiable estimation as straightforward to design and deploy as conventional factor graph inference.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个统一框架，将因子图建模与可认证优化相结合，使可认证估计能够利用成熟的因子图库和工作流程，简化部署过程。
AI.motivation: 传统因子图推理使用局部优化方法，可能收敛到次优解，在安全关键应用中存在可靠性问题。而基于凸松弛的可认证估计器虽然能获得可验证的全局最优解，但需要专门的求解器实现复杂，阻碍了实际部署。
AI.method: 通过Shor松弛和Burer-Monteiro分解，将因子图结构在QCQP问题中保持，使得提升后的问题仍具有相同的因子图连接性。利用黎曼阶梯方法，在相同的因子图库和工作流程中实现可认证估计。
AI.result: 该框架实现了因子图建模与可认证优化的自然合成，使得可认证估计能够像传统因子图推理一样简单设计和部署，无需专门求解器。
AI.conclusion: 论文成功地将两个独立的研究范式统一起来，为机器人状态估计提供了既可靠又易于部署的解决方案，显著降低了可认证估计的实现门槛。

title: Revisiting Global Token Mixing in Task-Dependent MRI Restoration: Insights from Minimal Gated CNN Baselines
summary: Global token mixing, implemented via self-attention or state-space sequence models, has become a popular model design choice for MRI restoration. However, MRI restoration tasks differ substantially in how their degradations vary over image and k-space domains, and in the degree to which global coupling is already imposed by physics-driven data consistency terms. In this work, we ask the question whether global token mixing is actually beneficial in each individual task across three representative settings: accelerated MRI reconstruction with explicit data consistency, MRI super-resolution with k-space center cropping, and denoising of clinical carotid MRI data with spatially heteroscedastic noise. To reduce confounding factors, we establish a controlled testbed comparing a minimal local gated CNN and its large-field variant, benchmarking them directly against state-of-the-art global models under aligned training and evaluation protocols. For accelerated MRI reconstruction, the minimal unrolled gated-CNN baseline is already highly competitive compared to recent token-mixing approaches in public reconstruction benchmarks, suggesting limited additional benefits when the forward model and data-consistency steps provide strong global constraints. For super-resolution, where low-frequency k-space data are largely preserved by the controlled low-pass degradation, local gated models remain competitive, and a lightweight large-field variant yields only modest improvements. In contrast, for denoising with pronounced spatially heteroscedastic noise, token-mixing models achieve the strongest overall performance, consistent with the need to estimate spatially varying reliability. In conclusion, our results demonstrate that the utility of global token mixing in MRI restoration is task-dependent, and it should be tailored to the underlying imaging physics and degradation structure.

AI.tldr: 该研究探讨了全局token混合（自注意力或状态空间模型）在MRI恢复任务中的必要性，发现其效用高度依赖于具体任务类型和物理约束。
AI.motivation: MRI恢复任务中的退化模式在图像域和k空间域中差异很大，且物理驱动的数据一致性项已经施加了不同程度的全局耦合。研究者质疑全局token混合是否在所有MRI恢复任务中都真正有益。
AI.method: 建立受控测试平台，比较最小化局部门控CNN及其大感受野变体，在三种代表性MRI恢复任务中与最先进的全局模型进行对齐训练和评估：1）带显式数据一致性的加速MRI重建；2）k空间中心裁剪的MRI超分辨率；3）具有空间异方差噪声的临床颈动脉MRI去噪。
AI.result: 1）加速MRI重建中，最小化展开门控CNN基线已具有高度竞争力，表明当物理模型和数据一致性提供强全局约束时，token混合的额外收益有限；2）超分辨率任务中，局部门控模型仍具竞争力，轻量大感受野变体仅带来适度改进；3）具有明显空间异方差噪声的去噪任务中，token混合模型表现最佳，符合估计空间变化可靠性的需求。
AI.conclusion: 全局token混合在MRI恢复中的效用是任务依赖性的，应根据底层成像物理和退化结构进行定制化设计。

title: Randomized Neural Networks for Partial Differential Equation on Static and Evolving Surfaces
summary: Surface partial differential equations arise in numerous scientific and engineering applications. Their numerical solution on static and evolving surfaces remains challenging due to geometric complexity and, for evolving geometries, the need for repeated mesh updates and geometry or solution transfer. While neural-network-based methods offer mesh-free discretizations, approaches based on nonconvex training can be costly and may fail to deliver high accuracy in practice. In this work, we develop a randomized neural network (RaNN) method for solving PDEs on both static and evolving surfaces: the hidden-layer parameters are randomly generated and kept fixed, and the output-layer coefficients are determined efficiently by solving a least-squares problem. For static surfaces, we present formulations for parametrized surfaces, implicit level-set surfaces, and point-cloud geometries, and provide a corresponding theoretical analysis for the parametrization-based formulation with interface compatibility. For evolving surfaces with topology preserved over time, we introduce a RaNN-based strategy that learns the surface evolution through a flow-map representation and then solves the surface PDE on a space--time collocation set, avoiding remeshing. Extensive numerical experiments demonstrate broad applicability and favorable accuracy--efficiency performance on representative benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于求解静态和演化曲面PDE的随机神经网络方法，通过随机生成隐藏层参数并固定，仅求解输出层系数的最小二乘问题，避免了传统神经网络方法的非凸训练问题。
AI.motivation: 曲面PDE在科学和工程中广泛应用，但数值求解面临几何复杂性和演化曲面需要重复网格更新的挑战。传统神经网络方法存在非凸训练成本高、精度不足的问题。
AI.method: 开发随机神经网络方法：隐藏层参数随机生成并固定，输出层系数通过求解最小二乘问题确定。针对静态曲面提供参数化、隐式水平集和点云几何的公式，对演化曲面引入流映射表示学习曲面演化。
AI.result: 广泛的数值实验表明该方法具有广泛的适用性和优越的精度-效率性能，在代表性基准测试中表现良好。
AI.conclusion: 随机神经网络方法为静态和演化曲面PDE提供了一种高效、准确的数值求解方案，避免了传统方法的网格更新和几何传输问题。

title: PhotoBench: Beyond Visual Matching Towards Personalized Intent-Driven Photo Retrieval
summary: Personal photo albums are not merely collections of static images but living, ecological archives defined by temporal continuity, social entanglement, and rich metadata, which makes the personalized photo retrieval non-trivial. However, existing retrieval benchmarks rely heavily on context-isolated web snapshots, failing to capture the multi-source reasoning required to resolve authentic, intent-driven user queries. To bridge this gap, we introduce PhotoBench, the first benchmark constructed from authentic, personal albums. It is designed to shift the paradigm from visual matching to personalized multi-source intent-driven reasoning. Based on a rigorous multi-source profiling framework, which integrates visual semantics, spatial-temporal metadata, social identity, and temporal events for each image, we synthesize complex intent-driven queries rooted in users' life trajectories. Extensive evaluation on PhotoBench exposes two critical limitations: the modality gap, where unified embedding models collapse on non-visual constraints, and the source fusion paradox, where agentic systems perform poor tool orchestration. These findings indicate that the next frontier in personal multimodal retrieval lies beyond unified embeddings, necessitating robust agentic reasoning systems capable of precise constraint satisfaction and multi-source fusion. Our PhotoBench is available.

AI.tldr: PhotoBench是首个基于真实个人相册构建的检索基准，旨在从视觉匹配转向个性化多源意图驱动推理，揭示了统一嵌入模型的模态鸿沟和代理系统的源融合悖论问题。
AI.motivation: 现有检索基准主要依赖上下文孤立的网络快照，无法捕捉解决真实意图驱动查询所需的多源推理能力。个人相册具有时间连续性、社交关联性和丰富元数据等生态特征，使得个性化照片检索变得复杂。
AI.method: 基于多源分析框架，整合视觉语义、时空元数据、社交身份和时间事件等图像信息，合成基于用户生命轨迹的复杂意图驱动查询，构建首个真实个人相册基准PhotoBench。
AI.result: 评估揭示了两个关键局限：1) 模态鸿沟 - 统一嵌入模型在非视觉约束上失效；2) 源融合悖论 - 代理系统在工具编排上表现不佳。表明个人多模态检索需要超越统一嵌入的鲁棒代理推理系统。
AI.conclusion: 个人多模态检索的下一个前沿在于开发能够精确满足约束条件和实现多源融合的鲁棒代理推理系统，而非仅依赖统一嵌入模型。

title: Security Risks in Machining Process Monitoring: Sequence-to-Sequence Learning for Reconstruction of CNC Axis Positions
comment: Accepted for presentation at the 2026 IEEE Symposium on Artificial Intelligence for Instrumentation and Measurement (AI4IM 2026). Proceedings to be included in IEEE Xplore
summary: Accelerometer-based process monitoring is widely deployed in modern machining systems. When mounted on moving machine components, such sensors implicitly capture kinematic information related to machine motion and tool trajectories. If this information can be reconstructed, condition monitoring data constitutes a severe security threat, particularly for retrofitted or weakly protected sensor systems. Classical signal processing approaches are infeasible for position reconstruction from broadband accelerometer signals due to sensor- and process-specific non-idealities, like noise or sensor placement effects. In this work, we demonstrate that sequence-to-sequence machine learning models can overcome these non-idealities and enable reconstruction of CNC axis and tool positions. Our approach employs LSTM-based sequence-to-sequence models and is evaluated on an industrial milling dataset. We show that learning-based models reduce the reconstruction error by up to 98% for low complexity motion profiles and by up to 85% for complex machining sequences compared to double integration. Furthermore, key geometric characteristics of tool trajectories and workpiece-related motion features are preserved. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first study demonstrating learning-based CNC position reconstruction from industrial condition monitoring accelerometer data.

AI.tldr: 该研究首次展示了基于学习的CNC位置重建方法，利用LSTM序列到序列模型从工业状态监测加速度计数据中重建机床轴和刀具位置，相比传统双积分方法误差降低85-98%。
AI.motivation: 加速度计在加工系统中广泛用于状态监测，但当安装在运动部件上时，这些传感器隐含地捕获了机器运动和刀具轨迹的动力学信息。如果这些信息能够被重建，状态监测数据可能构成严重的安全威胁，特别是对于改造或弱保护的传感器系统。传统信号处理方法由于传感器和过程特定的非理想性（如噪声或传感器放置效应）而无法实现宽带加速度信号的位置重建。
AI.method: 采用基于LSTM的序列到序列机器学习模型来克服传感器非理想性，从加速度计数据重建CNC轴和刀具位置。该方法在工业铣削数据集上进行评估，处理低复杂度运动轮廓和复杂加工序列。
AI.result: 学习模型相比双积分方法，对于低复杂度运动轮廓的重建误差降低了98%，对于复杂加工序列降低了85%。关键几何特征和工件相关运动特征得以保留。这是首次展示基于学习的CNC位置重建从工业状态监测加速度计数据。
AI.conclusion: 序列到序列机器学习模型能够有效克服传感器非理想性，实现从加速度计数据重建CNC位置，揭示了工业状态监测数据的安全风险，为保护关键制造数据提供了重要见解。

title: Tiny-DroNeRF: Tiny Neural Radiance Fields aboard Federated Learning-enabled Nano-drones
comment: This paper has been accepted for publication in the IEEE ICRA 2026 conference. ©2026 IEEE
summary: Sub-30g nano-sized aerial robots can leverage their agility and form factor to autonomously explore cluttered and narrow environments, like in industrial inspection and search and rescue missions. However, the price for their tiny size is a strong limit in their resources, i.e., sub-100 mW microcontroller units (MCUs) delivering $\sim$100 GOps/s at best, and memory budgets well below 100 MB. Despite these strict constraints, we aim to enable complex vision-based tasks aboard nano-drones, such as dense 3D scene reconstruction: a key robotic task underlying fundamental capabilities like spatial awareness and motion planning. Top-performing 3D reconstruction methods leverage neural radiance fields (NeRF) models, which require GBs of memory and massive computation, usually delivered by high-end GPUs consuming 100s of Watts. Our work introduces Tiny-DroNeRF, a lightweight NeRF model, based on Instant-NGP, and optimized for running on a GAP9 ultra-low-power (ULP) MCU aboard our nano-drones. Then, we further empower our Tiny-DroNeRF by leveraging a collaborative federated learning scheme, which distributes the model training among multiple nano-drones. Our experimental results show a 96% reduction in Tiny-DroNeRF's memory footprint compared to Instant-NGP, with only a 5.7 dB drop in reconstruction accuracy. Finally, our federated learning scheme allows Tiny-DroNeRF to train with an amount of data otherwise impossible to keep in a single drone's memory, increasing the overall reconstruction accuracy. Ultimately, our work combines, for the first time, NeRF training on an ULP MCU with federated learning on nano-drones.

AI.tldr: Tiny-DroNeRF：基于Instant-NGP的轻量化NeRF模型，专为纳米无人机上的超低功耗MCU设计，通过联邦学习实现分布式训练，内存占用减少96%，重建精度下降仅5.7dB
AI.motivation: 纳米无人机（<30g）在工业检测和搜救任务中具有优势，但其资源受限（<100mW MCU，<100MB内存）。现有NeRF方法需要GB级内存和高性能GPU，无法在纳米无人机上运行。需要开发轻量化3D重建方案以实现空间感知和运动规划能力。
AI.method: 1. 基于Instant-NGP开发Tiny-DroNeRF轻量化模型，针对GAP9超低功耗MCU优化；2. 采用协作式联邦学习方案，在多个纳米无人机间分布式训练模型；3. 通过模型压缩和优化减少内存占用。
AI.result: 1. 内存占用相比Instant-NGP减少96%；2. 重建精度仅下降5.7dB；3. 联邦学习使模型能够处理单机无法存储的数据量，提高整体重建精度；4. 首次在超低功耗MCU上实现NeRF训练与纳米无人机联邦学习的结合。
AI.conclusion: Tiny-DroNeRF成功在资源受限的纳米无人机上实现了NeRF-based 3D重建，通过模型轻量化和联邦学习的创新结合，为微型机器人系统的复杂视觉任务提供了可行方案。

title: MealRec: Multi-granularity Sequential Modeling via Hierarchical Diffusion Models for Micro-Video Recommendation
summary: Micro-video recommendation aims to capture user preferences from the collaborative and context information of the interacted micro-videos, thereby predicting the appropriate videos. This target is often hindered by the inherent noise within multimodal content and unreliable implicit feedback, which weakens the correspondence between behaviors and underlying interests. While conventional works have predominantly approached such scenario through behavior-augmented modeling and content-centric multimodal analysis, these paradigms can inadvertently give rise to two non-trivial challenges: preference-irrelative video representation extraction and inherent modality conflicts. To address these issues, we propose a Multi-granularity sequential modeling method via hierarchical diffusion models for micro-video Recommendation (MealRec), which simultaneously considers temporal correlations during preference modeling from intra- and inter-video perspectives. Specifically, we first propose Temporal-guided Content Diffusion (TCD) to refine video representations under intra-video temporal guidance and personalized collaborative signals to emphasize salient content while suppressing redundancy. To achieve the semantically coherent preference modeling, we further design the Noise-unconditional Preference Denoising (NPD) to recovers informative user preferences from corrupted states under the blind denoising. Extensive experiments and analyses on four micro-video datasets from two platforms demonstrate the effectiveness, universality, and robustness of our MealRec, further uncovering the effective mechanism of our proposed TCD and NPD. The source code and corresponding dataset will be available upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MealRec，一种基于分层扩散模型的多粒度序列建模方法，用于微视频推荐，通过时间引导内容扩散和噪声无条件偏好去噪解决视频表示提取和模态冲突问题。
AI.motivation: 微视频推荐面临两个主要挑战：1) 多模态内容中的固有噪声和不可靠的隐式反馈削弱了行为与潜在兴趣的对应关系；2) 传统方法导致偏好无关的视频表示提取和固有的模态冲突。
AI.method: 提出MealRec方法，包含两个核心组件：1) 时间引导内容扩散(TCD)：在视频内时间指导和个性化协作信号下细化视频表示，强调显著内容并抑制冗余；2) 噪声无条件偏好去噪(NPD)：在盲去噪条件下从损坏状态恢复信息性用户偏好。
AI.result: 在来自两个平台的四个微视频数据集上进行广泛实验和分析，证明了MealRec的有效性、普适性和鲁棒性，并揭示了TCD和NPD的有效机制。
AI.conclusion: MealRec通过同时考虑视频内和视频间视角的时间相关性，实现了语义连贯的偏好建模，解决了微视频推荐中的表示提取和模态冲突问题。

title: Non-Markovian Long-Horizon Robot Manipulation via Keyframe Chaining
summary: Existing Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models often struggle to generalize to long-horizon tasks due to their heavy reliance on immediate observations. While recent studies incorporate retrieval mechanisms or extend context windows to handle procedural tasks, they often struggle to capture Non-Markovian dependencies, where optimal actions rely solely on specific past states rather than the current observation. To address this, we introduce Keyframe-Chaining VLA, a framework that extracts and links key historical frames to model long-horizon dependencies. Specifically, we propose an automatic keyframe selector that learns a discriminative embedding space, effectively identifying distinct state transitions. To capture task-critical information, we design a progress-aware query mechanism that dynamically retrieves historical frames based on their temporal relevance to the current execution phase. These selected keyframes are integrated into the VLA as interleaved visual tokens, explicitly grounding the policy in the long-horizon temporal context. Finally, we introduce a suite of four Non-Markovian manipulation tasks built upon the ManiSkill simulator to measure task success rates. Experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves superior performance, effectively tackling robot manipulation tasks characterized by long-horizon temporal dependencies. Code is available at https://github.com/cytoplastm/KC-VLA.

AI.tldr: 提出Keyframe-Chaining VLA框架，通过提取和链接关键历史帧来建模长时程依赖，解决VLA模型在非马尔可夫任务中的泛化问题
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言-动作模型在处理长时程任务时过度依赖即时观测，难以捕捉非马尔可夫依赖关系（最优动作仅依赖于特定历史状态而非当前观测）
AI.method: 1) 自动关键帧选择器学习判别性嵌入空间识别状态转移；2) 进度感知查询机制动态检索与当前执行阶段相关历史帧；3) 将关键帧作为交错视觉token集成到VLA中，显式地将策略锚定在长时程时间上下文中
AI.result: 在基于ManiSkill模拟器构建的四个非马尔可夫操作任务上取得优越性能，有效处理具有长时程时间依赖的机器人操作任务
AI.conclusion: Keyframe-Chaining VLA框架通过建模长时程依赖显著提升VLA模型在非马尔可夫任务上的性能，为机器人操作提供了有效的长时程上下文建模方法

title: Co-optimization for Adaptive Conformal Prediction
summary: Conformal prediction (CP) provides finite-sample, distribution-free marginal coverage, but standard conformal regression intervals can be inefficient under heteroscedasticity and skewness. In particular, popular constructions such as conformalized quantile regression (CQR) often inherit a fixed notion of center and enforce equal-tailed errors, which can displace the interval away from high-density regions and produce unnecessarily wide sets. We propose Co-optimization for Adaptive Conformal Prediction (CoCP), a framework that learns prediction intervals by jointly optimizing a center $m(x)$ and a radius $h(x)$.CoCP alternates between (i) learning $h(x)$ via quantile regression on the folded absolute residual around the current center, and (ii) refining $m(x)$ with a differentiable soft-coverage objective whose gradients concentrate near the current boundaries, effectively correcting mis-centering without estimating the full conditional density. Finite-sample marginal validity is guaranteed by split-conformal calibration with a normalized nonconformity score. Theory characterizes the population fixed point of the soft objective and shows that, under standard regularity conditions, CoCP asymptotically approaches the length-minimizing conditional interval at the target coverage level as the estimation error and smoothing vanish. Experiments on synthetic and real benchmarks demonstrate that CoCP yields consistently shorter intervals and achieves state-of-the-art conditional-coverage diagnostics.

AI.tldr: 提出CoCP框架，通过联合优化中心m(x)和半径h(x)来学习预测区间，解决了传统共形预测在异方差和偏态下的效率问题，保证有限样本边际有效性并实现更短的区间
AI.motivation: 传统共形预测回归区间在异方差和偏态情况下效率低下，特别是像CQR这样的流行构造通常继承固定的中心概念并强制等尾误差，这会使区间偏离高密度区域并产生不必要的宽集
AI.method: 提出CoCP框架，通过交替优化中心m(x)和半径h(x)来学习预测区间：(1)通过折叠绝对残差的量化回归学习h(x)，(2)通过可微的软覆盖目标细化m(x)，其梯度集中在当前边界附近，有效纠正中心偏差而不需要估计完整的条件密度
AI.result: 理论分析表明CoCP在标准正则条件下渐近地接近目标覆盖水平下的长度最小化条件区间，实验证明CoCP产生更短的区间并在条件覆盖诊断方面达到最先进水平
AI.conclusion: CoCP框架通过联合优化中心和半径，解决了传统共形预测的效率问题，在保证有限样本边际有效性的同时实现了更优的条件覆盖和更短的预测区间

title: Mean-Flow based One-Step Vision-Language-Action
summary: Recent advances in FlowMatching-based Vision-Language-Action (VLA) frameworks have demonstrated remarkable advantages in generating high-frequency action chunks, particularly for highly dexterous robotic manipulation tasks. Despite these notable achievements, their practical applications are constrained by prolonged generation latency, which stems from inherent iterative sampling requirements and architectural limitations. To address this critical bottleneck, we propose a Mean-Flow based One-Step VLA approach. Specifically, we resolve the noise-induced issues in the action generation process, thereby eliminating the consistency constraints inherent to conventional Flow-Matching methods. This significantly enhances generation efficiency and enables one-step action generation. Real-world robotic experiments show that the generation speed of the proposed Mean-Flow based One-Step VLA is 8.7 times and 83.9 times faster than that of SmolVLA and Diffusion Policy, respectively. These results elucidate its great potential as a high-efficiency backbone for VLA-based robotic manipulation.

AI.tldr: 提出基于Mean-Flow的单步视觉-语言-动作生成方法，解决FlowMatching VLA框架生成延迟问题，实现高效的单步动作生成
AI.motivation: 现有的FlowMatching VLA框架虽然在高频动作块生成方面表现出色，但存在生成延迟问题，这源于迭代采样需求和架构限制，限制了实际应用
AI.method: 提出Mean-Flow单步VLA方法，解决动作生成过程中的噪声问题，消除传统Flow-Matching方法的一致性约束，实现单步动作生成
AI.result: 真实机器人实验显示，该方法生成速度比SmolVLA快8.7倍，比Diffusion Policy快83.9倍，显著提升生成效率
AI.conclusion: 该方法作为VLA机器人操作的高效骨干具有巨大潜力，解决了现有方法的延迟瓶颈

title: Closed-Loop Action Chunks with Dynamic Corrections for Training-Free Diffusion Policy
summary: Diffusion-based policies have achieved remarkable results in robotic manipulation but often struggle to adapt rapidly in dynamic scenarios, leading to delayed responses or task failures. We present DCDP, a Dynamic Closed-Loop Diffusion Policy framework that integrates chunk-based action generation with real-time correction. DCDP integrates a self-supervised dynamic feature encoder, cross-attention fusion, and an asymmetric action encoder-decoder to inject environmental dynamics before action execution, achieving real-time closed-loop action correction and enhancing the system's adaptability in dynamic scenarios. In dynamic PushT simulations, DCDP improves adaptability by 19\% without retraining while requiring only 5\% additional computation. Its modular design enables plug-and-play integration, achieving both temporal coherence and real-time responsiveness in dynamic robotic scenarios, including real-world manipulation tasks. The project page is at: https://github.com/wupengyuan/dcdp

AI.tldr: DCDP提出动态闭环扩散策略框架，通过分块动作生成与实时校正相结合，提升机器人操作在动态场景中的适应能力
AI.motivation: 现有基于扩散的策略在机器人操作中表现优异，但在动态场景中适应能力不足，响应延迟或任务失败。需要一种能够实时适应环境变化的策略框架。
AI.method: 提出DCDP框架，包含自监督动态特征编码器、交叉注意力融合和不对称动作编码器-解码器。通过分块动作生成与实时校正，在执行前注入环境动态信息。
AI.result: 在动态PushT仿真中，DCDP将适应能力提升19%且无需重新训练，仅需5%额外计算开销。模块化设计支持即插即用，在真实世界操作任务中实现时间一致性和实时响应。
AI.conclusion: DCDP通过闭环动作校正有效提升了扩散策略在动态场景中的适应能力，为机器人操作提供了实时响应解决方案。

title: Shape-Interpretable Visual Self-Modeling Enables Geometry-Aware Continuum Robot Control
summary: Continuum robots possess high flexibility and redundancy, making them well suited for safe interaction in complex environments, yet their continuous deformation and nonlinear dynamics pose fundamental challenges to perception, modeling, and control. Existing vision-based control approaches often rely on end-to-end learning, achieving shape regulation without explicit awareness of robot geometry or its interaction with the environment. Here, we introduce a shape-interpretable visual self-modeling framework for continuum robots that enables geometry-aware control. Robot shapes are encoded from multi-view planar images using a Bezier-curve representation, transforming visual observations into a compact and physically meaningful shape space that uniquely characterizes the robot's three-dimensional configuration. Based on this representation, neural ordinary differential equations are employed to self-model both shape and end-effector dynamics directly from data, enabling hybrid shape-position control without analytical models or dense body markers. The explicit geometric structure of the learned shape space allows the robot to reason about its body and surroundings, supporting environment-aware behaviors such as obstacle avoidance and self-motion while maintaining end-effector objectives. Experiments on a cable-driven continuum robot demonstrate accurate shape-position regulation and tracking, with shape errors within 1.56% of image resolution and end-effector errors within 2% of robot length, as well as robust performance in constrained environments. By elevating visual shape representations from two-dimensional observations to an interpretable three-dimensional self-model, this work establishes a principled alternative to vision-based end-to-end control and advances autonomous, geometry-aware manipulation for continuum robots.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于连续体机器人的形状可解释视觉自建模框架，通过贝塞尔曲线表示从多视角平面图像编码机器人形状，使用神经常微分方程自建模形状和末端执行器动力学，实现几何感知的混合形状-位置控制。
AI.motivation: 连续体机器人具有高灵活性和冗余性，适合复杂环境中的安全交互，但其连续变形和非线性动力学给感知、建模和控制带来了根本性挑战。现有的基于视觉的控制方法通常依赖端到端学习，缺乏对机器人几何形状及其与环境交互的明确认知。
AI.method: 1. 使用贝塞尔曲线表示从多视角平面图像编码机器人形状，将视觉观测转换为紧凑且物理意义明确的形状空间；2. 采用神经常微分方程从数据中自建模形状和末端执行器动力学；3. 实现无需解析模型或密集体标记的混合形状-位置控制。
AI.result: 在电缆驱动连续体机器人上的实验表明：形状误差在图像分辨率的1.56%以内，末端执行器误差在机器人长度的2%以内，在受限环境中表现出鲁棒性能，能够实现精确的形状-位置调节和跟踪。
AI.conclusion: 通过将视觉形状表示从二维观测提升到可解释的三维自模型，这项工作为基于视觉的端到端控制提供了原则性替代方案，推动了连续体机器人的自主几何感知操作。
