title: GCTAM: Global and Contextual Truncated Affinity Combined Maximization Model For Unsupervised Graph Anomaly Detection
summary: Anomalies often occur in real-world information networks/graphs, such as malevolent users, malicious comments, banned users, and fake news in social graphs. The latest graph anomaly detection methods use a novel mechanism called truncated affinity maximization (TAM) to detect anomaly nodes without using any label information and achieve impressive results. TAM maximizes the affinities among the normal nodes while truncating the affinities of the anomalous nodes to identify the anomalies. However, existing TAM-based methods truncate suspicious nodes according to a rigid threshold that ignores the specificity and high-order affinities of different nodes. This inevitably causes inefficient truncations from both normal and anomalous nodes, limiting the effectiveness of anomaly detection. To this end, this paper proposes a novel truncation model combining contextual and global affinity to truncate the anomalous nodes. The core idea of the work is to use contextual truncation to decrease the affinity of anomalous nodes, while global truncation increases the affinity of normal nodes. Extensive experiments on massive real-world datasets show that our method surpasses peer methods in most graph anomaly detection tasks. In highlights, compared with previous state-of-the-art methods, the proposed method has +15\% $\sim$ +20\% improvements in two famous real-world datasets, Amazon and YelpChi. Notably, our method works well in large datasets, Amazin-all and YelpChi-all, and achieves the best results, while most previous models cannot complete the tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合上下文和全局亲和力的新型截断模型，用于图异常检测，相比现有方法在多个真实数据集上取得了显著改进。
AI.motivation: 现有基于截断亲和力最大化(TAM)的图异常检测方法使用刚性阈值截断可疑节点，忽略了不同节点的特异性和高阶亲和力，导致对正常和异常节点的低效截断，限制了异常检测效果。
AI.method: 提出结合上下文截断和全局截断的新模型：上下文截断降低异常节点的亲和力，全局截断增加正常节点的亲和力，从而更精确地识别异常节点。
AI.result: 在多个真实数据集上的实验表明，该方法超越了现有方法，在Amazon和YelpChi数据集上相比之前SOTA方法有15%-20%的提升，在大规模数据集Amazon-all和YelpChi-all上表现最佳，而大多数先前模型无法完成这些任务。
AI.conclusion: 提出的结合上下文和全局亲和力的截断模型能更有效地识别图异常节点，在真实世界图异常检测任务中表现出色，特别是在大规模数据集上具有优势。

title: Learning Vision-Based Omnidirectional Navigation: A Teacher-Student Approach Using Monocular Depth Estimation
summary: Reliable obstacle avoidance in industrial settings demands 3D scene understanding, but widely used 2D LiDAR sensors perceive only a single horizontal slice of the environment, missing critical obstacles above or below the scan plane. We present a teacher-student framework for vision-based mobile robot navigation that eliminates the need for LiDAR sensors. A teacher policy trained via Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) in NVIDIA Isaac Lab leverages privileged 2D LiDAR observations that account for the full robot footprint to learn robust navigation. The learned behavior is distilled into a student policy that relies solely on monocular depth maps predicted by a fine-tuned Depth Anything V2 model from four RGB cameras. The complete inference pipeline, comprising monocular depth estimation (MDE), policy execution, and motor control, runs entirely onboard an NVIDIA Jetson Orin AGX mounted on a DJI RoboMaster platform, requiring no external computation for inference. In simulation, the student achieves success rates of 82-96.5%, consistently outperforming the standard 2D LiDAR teacher (50-89%). In real-world experiments, the MDE-based student outperforms the 2D LiDAR teacher when navigating around obstacles with complex 3D geometries, such as overhanging structures and low-profile objects, that fall outside the single scan plane of a 2D LiDAR.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于视觉的移动机器人导航师生框架，用深度预测替代2D LiDAR，解决工业环境中3D障碍物检测问题
AI.motivation: 工业环境中可靠的障碍物规避需要3D场景理解，但广泛使用的2D LiDAR传感器只能感知环境的单个水平切片，会错过扫描平面上方或下方的关键障碍物。需要开发不依赖LiDAR的视觉导航方案。
AI.method: 采用师生框架：1) 教师策略使用PPO在NVIDIA Isaac Lab中训练，利用特权2D LiDAR观测学习鲁棒导航；2) 将学习到的行为蒸馏到学生策略，仅依赖四个RGB摄像头通过微调的Depth Anything V2模型预测的单目深度图；3) 完整推理管道（单目深度估计、策略执行和电机控制）完全在NVIDIA Jetson Orin AGX上运行。
AI.result: 在仿真中，学生策略成功率82-96.5%，始终优于标准2D LiDAR教师（50-89%）。在真实世界实验中，基于MDE的学生在导航具有复杂3D几何形状的障碍物（如悬垂结构和低矮物体）时优于2D LiDAR教师。
AI.conclusion: 提出的视觉导航框架成功消除了对LiDAR传感器的需求，通过深度预测实现了更好的3D障碍物感知，在复杂工业环境中表现出优越性能。

title: Deep Learning for Financial Time Series: A Large-Scale Benchmark of Risk-Adjusted Performance
summary: We present a large scale benchmark of modern deep learning architectures for a financial time series prediction and position sizing task, with a primary focus on Sharpe ratio optimization. Evaluating linear models, recurrent networks, transformer based architectures, state space models, and recent sequence representation approaches, we assess out of sample performance on a daily futures dataset spanning commodities, equity indices, bonds, and FX spanning 2010 to 2025. Our evaluation goes beyond average returns and includes statistical significance, downside and tail risk measures, breakeven transaction cost analysis, robustness to random seed selection, and computational efficiency. We find that models explicitly designed to learn rich temporal representations consistently outperform linear benchmarks and generic deep learning models, which often lead the ranking in standard time series benchmarks. Hybrid models such as VSN with LSTM, a combination of Variable Selection Networks (VSN) and LSTMs, achieves the highest overall Sharpe ratio, while VSN with xLSTM and LSTM with PatchTST exhibit superior downside adjusted characteristics. xLSTM demonstrates the largest breakeven transaction cost buffer, indicating improved robustness to trading frictions.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个用于金融时间序列预测和头寸规模调整的大规模深度学习架构基准测试，主要关注夏普比率优化，评估了线性模型、循环网络、Transformer、状态空间模型等，发现专门设计用于学习丰富时间表示的模型表现最佳。
AI.motivation: 金融时间序列预测是深度学习的重要应用领域，但现有基准测试往往只关注平均回报，缺乏对统计显著性、下行风险、交易成本鲁棒性等实际交易重要指标的全面评估。需要系统比较现代深度学习架构在真实金融数据上的表现。
AI.method: 使用2010-2025年涵盖商品、股指、债券、外汇的每日期货数据集，评估线性模型、循环网络（LSTM）、Transformer架构、状态空间模型（如Mamba）和序列表示方法。评估指标包括夏普比率、统计显著性、下行风险、尾部风险、盈亏平衡交易成本分析、随机种子鲁棒性和计算效率。
AI.result: 专门设计用于学习丰富时间表示的模型持续优于线性基准和通用深度学习模型。VSN与LSTM的混合模型获得最高夏普比率，VSN与xLSTM以及LSTM与PatchTST在风险调整特性上表现优异。xLSTM具有最大的盈亏平衡交易成本缓冲，表明对交易摩擦的鲁棒性更强。
AI.conclusion: 金融时间序列预测需要专门的时间表示学习架构，而非通用深度学习模型。混合架构（如VSN与LSTM）在夏普比率优化方面表现最佳，而xLSTM在交易成本鲁棒性方面优势明显。评估应超越平均回报，包含风险调整指标和实际交易约束。

title: LAD-Drive: Bridging Language and Trajectory with Action-Aware Diffusion Transformers
summary: While multimodal large language models (MLLMs) provide advanced reasoning for autonomous driving, translating their discrete semantic knowledge into continuous trajectories remains a fundamental challenge. Existing methods often rely on unimodal planning heads that inherently limit their ability to represent multimodal driving behavior. Furthermore, most generative approaches frequently condition on one-hot encoded actions, discarding the nuanced navigational uncertainty critical for complex scenarios. To resolve these limitations, we introduce LAD-Drive, a generative framework that structurally disentangles high-level intention from low-level spatial planning. LAD-Drive employs an action decoder to infer a probabilistic meta-action distribution, establishing an explicit belief state that preserves the nuanced intent typically lost by one-hot encodings. This distribution, fused with the vehicle's kinematic state, conditions an action-aware diffusion decoder that utilizes a truncated denoising process to refine learned motion anchors into safe, kinematically feasible trajectories. Extensive evaluations on the LangAuto benchmark demonstrate that LAD-Drive achieves state-of-the-art results, outperforming competitive baselines by up to 59% in Driving Score while significantly reducing route deviations and collisions. We will publicly release the code and models on https://github.com/iis-esslingen/lad-drive.

AI.tldr: LAD-Drive是一个生成式自动驾驶框架，通过结构化解耦高层意图和低层空间规划，使用概率元动作分布和动作感知扩散解码器将MLLM的语义知识转化为连续轨迹。
AI.motivation: 现有方法存在两个主要问题：1) 依赖单模态规划头，限制了多模态驾驶行为的表示能力；2) 大多使用one-hot编码动作，丢弃了复杂场景中关键的导航不确定性信息。
AI.method: LAD-Drive采用结构化解耦方法：1) 动作解码器推断概率元动作分布，建立显式信念状态；2) 将分布与车辆运动状态融合，条件化动作感知扩散解码器；3) 使用截断去噪过程将学习到的运动锚点细化为安全、运动学可行的轨迹。
AI.result: 在LangAuto基准测试中，LAD-Drive实现了最先进的结果，比竞争基线在驾驶分数上提高了59%，同时显著减少了路线偏差和碰撞。
AI.conclusion: LAD-Drive通过结构化解耦意图和规划，有效解决了将MLLM离散语义知识转化为连续轨迹的挑战，在自动驾驶规划中实现了更好的性能和安全性。

title: Probing Materials Knowledge in LLMs: From Latent Embeddings to Reliable Predictions
summary: Large language models are increasingly applied to materials science, yet fundamental questions remain about their reliability and knowledge encoding. Evaluating 25 LLMs across four materials science tasks -- over 200 base and fine-tuned configurations -- we find that output modality fundamentally determines model behavior. For symbolic tasks, fine-tuning converges to consistent, verifiable answers with reduced response entropy, while for numerical tasks, fine-tuning improves prediction accuracy but models remain inconsistent across repeated inference runs, limiting their reliability as quantitative predictors. For numerical regression, we find that better performance can be obtained by extracting embeddings directly from intermediate transformer layers than from model text output, revealing an ``LLM head bottleneck,'' though this effect is property- and dataset-dependent. Finally, we present a longitudinal study of GPT model performance in materials science, tracking four models over 18 months and observing 9--43\% performance variation that poses reproducibility challenges for scientific applications.

AI.tldr: 该论文评估了25个LLM在材料科学任务上的表现，发现输出模态（符号vs数值）决定模型行为，揭示了LLM头部瓶颈现象，并展示了GPT模型在18个月内性能波动9-43%的再现性问题。
AI.motivation: 随着大语言模型在材料科学中的应用日益增多，但其可靠性和知识编码机制仍存在基本问题。作者旨在系统评估LLM在材料科学任务中的表现，理解其行为模式，并识别影响可靠性的关键因素。
AI.method: 评估了25个LLM在四个材料科学任务上的表现，涵盖超过200个基础模型和微调配置。研究了符号任务和数值任务的不同行为模式，分析了从中间transformer层提取嵌入与从文本输出提取的差异，并对GPT模型进行了18个月的纵向跟踪研究。
AI.result: 1) 符号任务微调后收敛到一致、可验证答案，响应熵降低；2) 数值任务微调提高准确性但跨推理运行仍不一致；3) 发现"LLM头部瓶颈"现象：从中间层提取嵌入比从文本输出获得更好性能；4) GPT模型在18个月内性能波动9-43%，存在再现性挑战。
AI.conclusion: LLM在材料科学应用中的可靠性受输出模态、微调策略和模型架构影响。数值预测任务存在固有不确定性，LLM头部可能限制性能。纵向性能波动对科学应用构成严重再现性挑战，需要更稳健的评估框架。

title: Towards Privacy-Preserving LLM Inference via Collaborative Obfuscation (Technical Report)
summary: The rapid development of large language models (LLMs) has driven the widespread adoption of cloud-based LLM inference services, while also bringing prominent privacy risks associated with the transmission and processing of private data in remote inference. For privacy-preserving LLM inference technologies to be practically applied in industrial scenarios, three core requirements must be satisfied simultaneously: (1) Accuracy and efficiency losses should be minimized to mitigate degradation in service experience. (2) The inference process can be run on large-scale clusters consist of heterogeneous legacy xPUs. (3) Compatibility with existing LLM infrastructures should be ensured to reuse their engineering optimizations. To the best of our knowledge, none of the existing privacy-preserving LLM inference methods satisfy all the above constraints while delivering meaningful privacy guarantees. In this paper, we propose AloePri, the first privacy-preserving LLM inference method for industrial applications. AloePri protects both the input and output data by covariant obfuscation, which jointly transforms data and model parameters to achieve better accuracy and privacy. We carefully design the transformation for each model component to ensure inference accuracy and data privacy while keeping full compatibility with existing infrastructures of Language Model as a Service. AloePri has been integrated into an industrial system for the evaluation of mainstream LLMs. The evaluation on Deepseek-V3.1-Terminus model (671B parameters) demonstrates that AloePri causes accuracy loss of 0.0%~3.5% and exhibits efficiency equivalent to that of plaintext inference. Meanwhile, AloePri successfully resists state-of-the-art attacks, with less than 5\% of tokens recovered. To the best of our knowledge, AloePri is the first method to exhibit practical applicability to large-scale models in real-world systems.

AI.tldr: AloePri：首个面向工业应用的隐私保护LLM推理方法，通过协变量混淆技术保护输入输出数据，在保持与现有基础设施兼容的同时实现高精度和效率
AI.motivation: 云LLM推理服务带来隐私风险，现有隐私保护方法无法同时满足工业场景的三个核心需求：最小化精度效率损失、支持异构硬件集群、兼容现有LLM基础设施
AI.method: 采用协变量混淆技术，联合变换数据和模型参数，为每个模型组件精心设计变换方案，确保推理精度和数据隐私，同时完全兼容语言模型即服务基础设施
AI.result: 在Deepseek-V3.1-Terminus模型（671B参数）上评估，精度损失仅0.0%~3.5%，效率与明文推理相当，成功抵抗最先进攻击，少于5%的token被恢复
AI.conclusion: AloePri是首个在真实系统中适用于大规模模型的实用隐私保护LLM推理方法，满足工业应用需求

title: $π$-StepNFT: Wider Space Needs Finer Steps in Online RL for Flow-based VLAs
summary: Flow-based vision-language-action (VLA) models excel in embodied control but suffer from intractable likelihoods during multi-step sampling, hindering online reinforcement learning. We propose \textbf{\textit{$\boldsymbolπ$-StepNFT}} (Step-wise Negative-aware Fine-Tuning), a critic-and-likelihood-free framework that requires only a single forward pass per optimization step and eliminates auxiliary value networks. We identify that wider exploration spaces necessitate finer-grained, step-wise guidance for alignment. Empirically, $π$-StepNFT unlocks latent potential on LIBERO with competitive few-shot robustness. Moreover, it achieves superior generalization on ManiSkill, outperforming value-based baselines in OOD scenarios by preventing overfitting to multimodal features. This property offers a scalable solution promising for complex real-world applications.

AI.tldr: 提出π-StepNFT框架，通过单步前向传播优化流式VLA模型，无需辅助价值网络，解决多步采样中的似然计算难题，提升在线强化学习性能。
AI.motivation: 流式视觉-语言-动作模型在具身控制中表现出色，但在多步采样时面临难以处理的似然计算问题，这阻碍了在线强化学习的应用。现有方法需要复杂的价值网络和多次前向传播。
AI.method: 提出π-StepNFT框架，采用步级负感知微调方法，仅需单步前向传播即可优化，无需辅助价值网络。通过步级细粒度指导实现探索空间与对齐的平衡。
AI.result: 在LIBERO基准上展现出竞争性的少样本鲁棒性，在ManiSkill上实现优越的泛化性能，在分布外场景中优于基于价值的方法，防止了对多模态特征的过拟合。
AI.conclusion: π-StepNFT为复杂现实世界应用提供了可扩展的解决方案，通过消除价值网络依赖和简化优化过程，显著提升了流式VLA模型在在线强化学习中的实用性。

title: Generalizing Logic-based Explanations for Machine Learning Classifiers via Optimization
comment: Preprint version. For the final published version, see the DOI below
summary: Machine learning models support decision-making, yet the reasons behind their predictions are opaque. Clear and reliable explanations help users make informed decisions and avoid blindly trusting model outputs. However, many existing explanation methods fail to guarantee correctness. Logic-based approaches ensure correctness but often offer overly constrained explanations, limiting coverage. Recent work addresses this by incrementally expanding explanations while maintaining correctness. This process is performed separately for each feature, adjusting both its upper and lower bounds. However, this approach faces a trade-off: smaller increments incur high computational costs, whereas larger ones may lead to explanations covering fewer instances. To overcome this, we propose two novel methods. Onestep builds upon this prior work, generating explanations in a single step for each feature and each bound, eliminating the overhead of an iterative process. \textit{Twostep} takes a gradual approach, improving coverage. Experimental results show that Twostep significantly increases explanation coverage (by up to 72.60\% on average across datasets) compared to Onestep and, consequently, to prior work.

AI.tldr: 提出两种新的逻辑解释方法：Onestep（单步生成特征边界）和Twostep（渐进式优化），显著提升解释覆盖率
AI.motivation: 现有机器学习模型解释方法存在正确性保证不足的问题：逻辑方法保证正确性但覆盖范围有限，增量扩展方法面临计算成本与覆盖率的权衡
AI.method: 提出两种新方法：1) Onestep：为每个特征和每个边界单步生成解释，消除迭代开销；2) Twostep：采用渐进方法优化覆盖率
AI.result: Twostep相比Onestep显著提升解释覆盖率（平均提升72.60%），因此也优于先前工作
AI.conclusion: Twostep方法通过渐进式优化有效解决了逻辑解释方法中覆盖率与计算效率的权衡问题

title: The Sentience Readiness Index: Measuring National Preparedness for the Possibility of Artificial Sentience
summary: The scientific study of consciousness has begun to generate testable predictions about artificial systems. A landmark collaborative assessment evaluated current AI architectures against six leading theories of consciousness and found that none currently qualifies as a strong candidate, but that future systems might. A precautionary approach to AI sentience, which holds that credible possibility of sentience warrants governance action even without proof, has gained philosophical and institutional traction. Yet existing AI readiness indices, including the Oxford Insights Government AI Readiness Index, the IMF AI Preparedness Index, and the Stanford AI Index, measure economic, technological, and governance preparedness without assessing whether societies are prepared for the possibility that AI systems might warrant moral consideration. This paper introduces the Sentience Readiness Index (SRI), a composite index measuring national-level preparedness across six weighted categories for 31 jurisdictions. The SRI was constructed following the OECD/JRC framework for composite indicators and employs LLM-assisted expert scoring with iterative expert review. No jurisdiction exceeds "Partially Prepared" (the United Kingdom leads at 49/100). Research Environment scores are universally the strongest category; Professional Readiness is universally the weakest. These findings suggest that if AI sentience becomes scientifically plausible, no society currently possesses adequate institutional, professional, or cultural infrastructure to respond. The SRI provides a diagnostic baseline and identifies specific capacity deficits that policy can address.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了"感知准备指数(SRI)"，用于评估各国对AI可能具有感知能力的准备程度，发现所有国家都准备不足。
AI.motivation: 现有AI准备指数只关注经济、技术和治理准备，忽视了AI可能具有感知能力这一重要伦理维度。随着AI意识研究进展，需要评估社会是否准备好应对AI可能值得道德考量的情况。
AI.method: 采用OECD/JRC复合指标框架，构建包含6个加权类别的SRI指数，覆盖31个司法管辖区。使用LLM辅助的专家评分和迭代专家评审方法。
AI.result: 没有国家超过"部分准备"水平（英国最高49/100）。研究环境得分普遍最强，专业准备最弱。所有社会都缺乏足够的制度、专业或文化基础设施来应对AI感知可能性。
AI.conclusion: 如果AI感知成为科学上可信的可能性，当前社会准备严重不足。SRI提供了诊断基准，识别了政策可以解决的具体能力缺陷。

title: Bound Propagation meets Constraint Simplification: Improving Logic-based XAI for Neural Networks
comment: Preprint version. For the final published version, see the DOI below
summary: Logic-based methods for explaining neural network decisions offer formal guarantees of correctness and non-redundancy, but they often suffer from high computational costs, especially for large networks. In this work, we improve the efficiency of such methods by combining bound propagation with constraint simplification. These simplifications, derived from the propagation, tighten neuron bounds and eliminate unnecessary binary variables, making the explanation process more efficient. Our experiments suggest that combining these techniques reduces explanation time by up to 89.26\%, particularly for larger neural networks.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种结合边界传播和约束简化的方法，以提高基于逻辑的神经网络解释方法的效率，减少解释时间达89.26%。
AI.motivation: 基于逻辑的神经网络决策解释方法虽然能提供形式化的正确性和非冗余性保证，但计算成本高，尤其对于大型网络。需要提高这类方法的效率。
AI.method: 结合边界传播和约束简化：通过传播推导出的简化操作，收紧神经元边界并消除不必要的二元变量，使解释过程更高效。
AI.result: 实验表明，结合这些技术可将解释时间减少高达89.26%，特别是对于较大的神经网络。
AI.conclusion: 通过边界传播与约束简化的结合，可以显著提高基于逻辑的神经网络解释方法的效率，使其更适用于大型网络。

title: NextAds: Towards Next-generation Personalized Video Advertising
summary:
With the rapid growth of online video consumption, video advertising has become increasingly dominant in the digital advertising landscape. Yet diverse users and viewing contexts makes one-size-fits-all ad creatives insufficient for consistent effectiveness, underlining the importance of personalization. In practice, most personalized video advertising systems follow a retrieval-based paradigm, selecting the optimal one from a small set of professionally pre-produced creatives for each user. Such static and finite inventories limits both the granularity and the timeliness of personalization, and prevents the creatives from being continuously refined based on online user feedback. Recent advances in generative AI make it possible to move beyond retrieval toward optimizing video creatives in a continuous space at serving time.
  In this light, we propose NextAds, a generation-based paradigm for next-generation personalized video advertising, and conceptualize NextAds with four core components. To enable comparable research progress, we formulate two representative tasks: personalized creative generation and personalized creative integration, and introduce corresponding lightweight benchmarks. To assess feasibility, we instantiate end-to-end pipelines for both tasks and conduct initial exploratory experiments, demonstrating that GenAI can generate and integrate personalized creatives with encouraging performance. Moreover, we discuss the key challenges and opportunities under this paradigm, aiming to provide actionable insights for both researchers and practitioners and to catalyze progress in personalized video advertising.

AI.tldr: 论文提出NextAds，一种基于生成式AI的下一代个性化视频广告范式，超越传统检索式方法，在连续空间中优化视频创意
AI.motivation: 传统检索式个性化视频广告系统从有限的预制作创意库中选择，限制了个性化的粒度、时效性和基于用户反馈的持续优化能力。生成式AI的发展使得在服务时在连续空间中优化视频创意成为可能
AI.method: 提出NextAds范式，包含四个核心组件；制定两个代表性任务：个性化创意生成和个性化创意整合；建立轻量级基准测试；实现端到端流程并进行初步探索性实验
AI.result: 初步实验表明生成式AI能够以令人鼓舞的性能生成和整合个性化创意，验证了该范式的可行性
AI.conclusion: 生成式AI为个性化视频广告带来了新范式，能够实现更细粒度、更及时的个性化，并支持基于用户反馈的持续优化。论文讨论了该范式下的关键挑战和机遇

title: Rethinking Camera Choice: An Empirical Study on Fisheye Camera Properties in Robotic Manipulation
summary: The adoption of fisheye cameras in robotic manipulation, driven by their exceptionally wide Field of View (FoV), is rapidly outpacing a systematic understanding of their downstream effects on policy learning. This paper presents the first comprehensive empirical study to bridge this gap, rigorously analyzing the properties of wrist-mounted fisheye cameras for imitation learning. Through extensive experiments in both simulation and the real world, we investigate three critical research questions: spatial localization, scene generalization, and hardware generalization. Our investigation reveals that: (1) The wide FoV significantly enhances spatial localization, but this benefit is critically contingent on the visual complexity of the environment. (2) Fisheye-trained policies, while prone to overfitting in simple scenes, unlock superior scene generalization when trained with sufficient environmental diversity. (3) While naive cross-camera transfer leads to failures, we identify the root cause as scale overfitting and demonstrate that hardware generalization performance can be improved with a simple Random Scale Augmentation (RSA) strategy. Collectively, our findings provide concrete, actionable guidance for the large-scale collection and effective use of fisheye datasets in robotic learning. More results and videos are available on https://robo-fisheye.github.io/

AI.tldr: 该论文首次系统研究了鱼眼摄像头在机器人模仿学习中的影响，发现宽视野能增强空间定位但依赖环境复杂度，鱼眼训练策略在多样化环境中具有更好的场景泛化能力，并提出随机尺度增强策略改善硬件泛化性能。
AI.motivation: 鱼眼摄像头因其超宽视野在机器人操作中应用日益广泛，但缺乏对其在策略学习下游影响的系统理解。本文旨在填补这一空白，为鱼眼数据集的大规模收集和有效使用提供实证指导。
AI.method: 通过仿真和真实世界的广泛实验，研究三个关键问题：空间定位、场景泛化和硬件泛化。使用手腕安装的鱼眼摄像头进行模仿学习实验，并提出随机尺度增强策略来改善跨摄像头泛化。
AI.result: 1) 宽视野显著增强空间定位，但效果高度依赖环境视觉复杂度；2) 鱼眼训练策略在简单场景容易过拟合，但在多样化环境中展现出优越的场景泛化能力；3) 跨摄像头转移失败的根本原因是尺度过拟合，随机尺度增强策略能显著改善硬件泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: 研究为机器人学习中鱼眼数据集的大规模收集和有效使用提供了具体可行的指导，揭示了鱼眼摄像头在策略学习中的关键特性和优化方法。

title: LOCUS: A Distribution-Free Loss-Quantile Score for Risk-Aware Predictions
comment: The article contains nine pages and the appendix twelve
summary: Modern machine learning models can be accurate on average yet still make mistakes that dominate deployment cost. We introduce Locus, a distribution-free wrapper that produces a per-input loss-scale reliability score for a fixed prediction function. Rather than quantifying uncertainty about the label, Locus models the realized loss of the prediction function using any engine that outputs a predictive distribution for the loss given an input. A simple split-calibration step turns this function into a distribution-free interpretable score that is comparable across inputs and can be read as an upper loss level. The score is useful on its own for ranking, and it can optionally be thresholded to obtain a transparent flagging rule with distribution-free control of large-loss events. Experiments across 13 regression benchmarks show that Locus yields effective risk ranking and reduces large-loss frequency compared to standard heuristics.

AI.tldr: Locus是一个分布无关的包装器，为固定预测函数生成每个输入的损失尺度可靠性分数，用于建模预测函数的实际损失，可用于风险排序和减少大损失事件。
AI.motivation: 现代机器学习模型可能在平均意义上准确，但仍会产生主导部署成本的错误。需要一种方法来评估每个输入预测的可靠性，特别是可能造成大损失的情况。
AI.method: Locus使用任何能够输出给定输入的损失预测分布的引擎来建模预测函数的实际损失。通过简单的分割校准步骤，将其转化为分布无关的可解释分数，该分数可作为损失上限水平，并可用于排序或阈值化以获得透明标记规则。
AI.result: 在13个回归基准测试中，Locus相比标准启发式方法，在风险排序方面表现有效，并显著减少了大规模损失频率。
AI.conclusion: Locus提供了一种实用的分布无关方法来评估预测可靠性，特别适用于识别和减少可能造成大损失的预测错误，对实际部署有重要意义。

title: Quantitative Convergence of Wasserstein Gradient Flows of Kernel Mean Discrepancies
summary: We study the quantitative convergence of Wasserstein gradient flows of Kernel Mean Discrepancy (KMD) (also known as Maximum Mean Discrepancy (MMD)) functionals. Our setting covers in particular the training dynamics of shallow neural networks in the infinite-width and continuous time limit, as well as interacting particle systems with pairwise Riesz kernel interaction in the mean-field and overdamped limit. Our main analysis concerns the model case of KMD functionals given by the squared Sobolev distance $ \mathscr{E}^ν_{s}(μ)= \frac{1}{2}\lVert μ-ν\rVert_{\dot H^{-s}}^{2}$ for any $s\geq 1 $ and $ν$ a fixed probability measure on the $d$-dimensional torus. First, inspired by Yudovich theory for the $2d$-Euler equation, we establish existence and uniqueness in natural weak regularity classes. Next, we show that for $s=1$ the flow converges globally at an exponential rate under minimal assumptions, while for $s>1$ we prove local convergence at polynomial rates that depend explicitly on $s$ and on the Sobolev regularity of $μ$ and $ν$. These rates hold both at the energy level and in higher regularity classes and are tight for $ν$ uniform. We then consider the gradient flow of the population loss for shallow neural networks with ReLU activation, which can be cast as a Wasserstein--Fisher--Rao gradient flow on the space of nonnegative measures on the sphere $\mathbb{S}^d$. Exploiting a correspondence with the Sobolev energy case with $s=(d+3)/2$, we derive an explicit polynomial local convergence rate for this dynamics. Except for the special case $s=1$, even non-quantitative convergence was previously open in all these settings. We also include numerical experiments in dimension $d=1$ using both PDE and particle methods which illustrate our analysis.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了Kernel Mean Discrepancy (KMD) Wasserstein梯度流的定量收敛性，特别关注浅层神经网络训练动态和相互作用粒子系统，证明了不同参数下的收敛速率。
AI.motivation: 研究KMD Wasserstein梯度流的定量收敛问题，特别是针对浅层神经网络无限宽度连续时间极限的训练动态，以及平均场过阻尼极限下的相互作用粒子系统。此前除了s=1的特殊情况外，这些设置的收敛性甚至非定量收敛都是开放问题。
AI.method: 采用Sobolev距离平方作为KMD泛函模型，建立自然弱正则类中的存在唯一性。对于s=1的情况证明全局指数收敛，对于s>1的情况证明局部多项式收敛。将浅层神经网络ReLU激活的群体损失梯度流转化为球面上的Wasserstein-Fisher-Rao梯度流，利用与Sobolev能量情况的对应关系推导收敛速率。
AI.result: 证明了s=1时在最小假设下全局指数收敛，s>1时局部多项式收敛，收敛速率明确依赖于s和Sobolev正则性。对于浅层神经网络ReLU激活情况，推导出显式的多项式局部收敛速率。在d=1维进行了数值实验验证分析。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为KMD Wasserstein梯度流建立了定量收敛理论，解决了先前开放的问题，特别为浅层神经网络训练动态提供了理论保证，扩展了Yudovich理论的应用范围。

title: DualSentinel: A Lightweight Framework for Detecting Targeted Attacks in Black-box LLM via Dual Entropy Lull Pattern
summary: Recent intelligent systems integrate powerful Large Language Models (LLMs) through APIs, but their trustworthiness may be critically undermined by targeted attacks like backdoor and prompt injection attacks, which secretly force LLMs to generate specific malicious sequences. Existing defensive approaches for such threats typically rely on high access rights, impose prohibitive costs, and hinder normal inference, rendering them impractical for real-world scenarios. To solve these limitations, we introduce DualSentinel, a lightweight and unified defense framework that can accurately and promptly detect the activation of targeted attacks alongside the LLM generation process. We first identify a characteristic of compromised LLMs, termed Entropy Lull: when a targeted attack successfully hijacks the generation process, the LLM exhibits a distinct period of abnormally low and stable token probability entropy, indicating it is following a fixed path rather than making creative choices. DualSentinel leverages this pattern by developing an innovative dual-check approach. It first employs a magnitude and trend-aware monitoring method to proactively and sensitively flag an entropy lull pattern at runtime. Upon such flagging, it triggers a lightweight yet powerful secondary verification based on task-flipping. An attack is confirmed only if the entropy lull pattern persists across both the original and the flipped task, proving that the LLM's output is coercively controlled. Extensive evaluations show that DualSentinel is both highly effective (superior detection accuracy with near-zero false positives) and remarkably efficient (negligible additional cost), offering a truly practical path toward securing deployed LLMs. The source code can be accessed at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18479273.

AI.tldr: DualSentinel：轻量级统一防御框架，通过检测"熵平静"模式来识别针对LLM的后门和提示注入攻击，在推理过程中实时监控并验证攻击激活。
AI.motivation: 现有基于API的LLM系统面临后门和提示注入等针对性攻击，现有防御方法需要高权限、成本高昂且影响正常推理，缺乏实用解决方案。
AI.method: 提出"熵平静"概念：攻击成功劫持生成过程时，LLM会表现出异常低且稳定的token概率熵。采用双重检查方法：1) 运行时监控熵平静模式；2) 触发任务翻转的轻量级二次验证。
AI.result: DualSentinel在广泛评估中表现出高有效性（检测准确率高，接近零误报）和高效性（额外成本可忽略），为部署LLM提供了实用安全路径。
AI.conclusion: DualSentinel通过检测熵平静模式提供了一种轻量级、统一的防御框架，能够准确及时地检测针对性攻击，解决了现有防御方法的局限性。

title: Accurate, private, secure, federated U-statistics with higher degree
summary: We study the problem of computing a U-statistic with a kernel function f of degree k $\ge$ 2, i.e., the average of some function f over all k-tuples of instances, in a federated learning setting. Ustatistics of degree 2 include several useful statistics such as Kendall's $τ$ coefficient, the Area under the Receiver-Operator Curve and the Gini mean difference. Existing methods provide solutions only under the lower-utility local differential privacy model and/or scale poorly in the size of the domain discretization. In this work, we propose a protocol that securely computes U-statistics of degree k $\ge$ 2 under central differential privacy by leveraging Multi Party Computation (MPC). Our method substantially improves accuracy when compared to prior solutions. We provide a detailed theoretical analysis of its accuracy, communication and computational properties. We evaluate its performance empirically, obtaining favorable results, e.g., for Kendall's $τ$ coefficient, our approach reduces the Mean Squared Error by up to four orders of magnitude over existing baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出一种在联邦学习场景下，使用多方计算(MPC)安全计算k≥2阶U统计量的协议，相比现有方法在中心差分隐私下显著提升准确性
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅在本地差分隐私模型下提供解决方案，且/或在域离散化规模上扩展性差，需要更准确、可扩展的联邦U统计量计算方法
AI.method: 提出基于多方计算(MPC)的协议，在中心差分隐私下安全计算k≥2阶U统计量，包括理论分析其准确性、通信和计算特性
AI.result: 方法显著提高准确性，例如对于Kendall's τ系数，均方误差比现有基线降低高达四个数量级
AI.conclusion: 提出的MPC协议在联邦学习环境中有效解决了U统计量的安全计算问题，在准确性和实用性方面优于现有方法

authors: Jose Manuel de la Chica Rodriguez
title: Selection as Power: Constrained Reinforcement for Bounded Decision Authority
summary:
Selection as Power argued that upstream selection authority, rather than internal objective misalignment, constitutes a primary source of risk in high-stakes agentic systems. However, the original framework was static: governance constraints bounded selection power but did not adapt over time. In this work, we extend the framework to dynamic settings by introducing incentivized selection governance, where reinforcement updates are applied to scoring and reducer parameters under externally enforced sovereignty constraints.
  We formalize selection as a constrained reinforcement process in which parameter updates are projected onto governance-defined feasible sets, preventing concentration beyond prescribed bounds. Across multiple regulated financial scenarios, unconstrained reinforcement consistently collapses into deterministic dominance under repeated feedback, especially at higher learning rates. In contrast, incentivized governance enables adaptive improvement while maintaining bounded selection concentration.
  Projection-based constraints transform reinforcement from irreversible lock-in into controlled adaptation, with governance debt quantifying the tension between optimization pressure and authority bounds. These results demonstrate that learning dynamics can coexist with structural diversity when sovereignty constraints are enforced at every update step, offering a principled approach to integrating reinforcement into high-stakes agentic systems without surrendering bounded selection authority.

AI.tldr: 将静态选择权力框架扩展为动态激励选择治理，通过强化学习更新评分和缩减参数，在外部主权约束下实现有界选择集中度
AI.motivation: 原始Selection as Power框架是静态的，治理约束限制了选择权力但不随时间适应。需要将框架扩展到动态设置，使强化学习能够与有界选择权力共存
AI.method: 引入激励选择治理，将选择形式化为约束强化过程，参数更新投影到治理定义的可行集上，防止超出规定界限的集中
AI.result: 在多个受监管金融场景中，无约束强化学习在重复反馈下会崩溃为确定性主导，而激励治理能够在保持有界选择集中度的同时实现自适应改进
AI.conclusion: 投影约束将强化学习从不可逆锁定转变为受控适应，治理债务量化优化压力与权力界限之间的张力，为高风险智能体系统集成强化学习提供了原则性方法

title: TCG CREST System Description for the DISPLACE-M Challenge
comment: Report submitted for the DISPLACE-M challenge
summary: This report presents the TCG CREST system description for Track 1 (Speaker Diarization) of the DISPLACE-M challenge, focusing on naturalistic medical conversations in noisy rural-healthcare scenarios. Our study evaluates the impact of various voice activity detection (VAD) methods and advanced clustering algorithms on overall speaker diarization (SD) performance. We compare and analyze two SD frameworks: a modular pipeline utilizing SpeechBrain with ECAPA-TDNN embeddings, and a state-of-the-art (SOTA) hybrid end-to-end neural diarization system, Diarizen, built on top of a pre-trained WavLM. With these frameworks, we explore diverse clustering techniques, including agglomerative hierarchical clustering (AHC), and multiple novel variants of spectral clustering, such as SC-adapt, SC-PNA, and SC-MK. Experimental results demonstrate that the Diarizen system provides an approximate $39\%$ relative improvement in the diarization error rate (DER) on the post-evaluation analysis of Phase~I compared to the SpeechBrain baseline. Our best-performing submitted system employing the Diarizen baseline with AHC employing a median filtering with a larger context window of $29$ achieved a DER of 10.37\% on the development and 9.21\% on the evaluation sets, respectively. Our team ranked sixth out of the 11 participating teams after the Phase~I evaluation.

AI.tldr: 该论文介绍了TCG CREST系统在DISPLACE-M挑战赛Track 1（说话人日志）中的表现，比较了两种说话人日志框架：基于SpeechBrain的模块化流水线和基于WavLM的Diarizen端到端系统，展示了Diarizen系统在说话人错误率上相对提升39%的显著改进。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是解决嘈杂农村医疗场景中自然医疗对话的说话人日志问题，评估不同语音活动检测方法和聚类算法对说话人日志性能的影响，旨在提升医疗环境中语音处理的准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.method: 方法包括：1）比较两种说话人日志框架：基于SpeechBrain的模块化流水线（使用ECAPA-TDNN嵌入）和基于预训练WavLM的Diarizen端到端系统；2）探索多种聚类技术：凝聚层次聚类（AHC）和多种谱聚类变体（SC-adapt、SC-PNA、SC-MK）；3）采用中值滤波和更大上下文窗口（29帧）的后处理技术。
AI.result: 实验结果显示：1）Diarizen系统相比SpeechBrain基线在说话人错误率上获得约39%的相对提升；2）最佳提交系统（Diarizen+AHC+中值滤波）在开发集上达到10.37%的DER，在评估集上达到9.21%的DER；3）在11个参赛团队中排名第六。
AI.conclusion: 结论表明：基于预训练WavLM的端到端Diarizen系统在嘈杂医疗对话的说话人日志任务中显著优于传统模块化方法，结合先进的聚类算法和后处理技术可以进一步提升性能，为医疗语音处理提供了有效的技术方案。

title: Assessing Crime Disclosure Patterns in a Large-Scale Cybercrime Forum
summary: Cybercrime forums play a central role in the cybercrime ecosystem, serving as hubs for the exchange of illicit goods, services, and knowledge. Previous studies have explored the market and social structures of these forums, but less is known about the behavioral dynamics of users, particularly regarding participants' disclosure of criminal activity. This study provides the first large-scale assessment of crime disclosure patterns in a major cybercrime forum, analysing over 3.5 million posts from nearly 300k users. Using a three-level classification scheme (benign, grey, and crime) and a scalable labelling pipeline powered by large language models (LLMs), we measure the level of crime disclosure present in initial posts, analyse how participants switch between levels, and assess how crime disclosure behavior relates to private communications. Our results show that crime disclosure is relatively normative: one quarter of initial posts include explicit crime-related content, and more than one third of users disclose criminal activity at least once in their initial posts. At the same time, most participants show restraint, with over two-thirds posting only benign or grey content and typically escalating disclosure gradually. Grey initial posts are particularly prominent, indicating that many users avoid overt statements and instead anchor their activity in ambiguous content. The study highlights the value of LLM-based text classification and Markov chain modelling for capturing crime disclosure patterns, offering insights for law enforcement efforts aimed at distinguishing benign, grey, and criminal content in cybercrime forums.

AI.tldr: 使用LLM进行文本分类分析网络犯罪论坛中用户犯罪披露行为模式的研究，发现约1/4初始帖子包含犯罪内容，1/3用户至少披露一次犯罪活动，但大多数用户保持克制，逐步升级披露程度。
AI.motivation: 网络犯罪论坛是网络犯罪生态系统的核心，但以往研究主要关注市场和社会结构，对用户行为动态特别是犯罪活动披露模式了解不足。本研究旨在首次大规模评估主要网络犯罪论坛中的犯罪披露模式。
AI.method: 1) 收集超过350万条帖子和近30万用户数据；2) 设计三级分类方案（良性、灰色、犯罪）；3) 构建基于大语言模型（LLM）的可扩展标注流水线进行文本分类；4) 使用马尔可夫链模型分析用户在不同披露级别间的转换模式；5) 分析犯罪披露行为与私人通信的关系。
AI.result: 1) 犯罪披露相对规范：25%的初始帖子包含明确的犯罪相关内容；2) 超过1/3的用户至少在其初始帖子中披露过一次犯罪活动；3) 大多数参与者保持克制：超过2/3的用户只发布良性或灰色内容，通常逐步升级披露；4) 灰色初始帖子特别突出，表明许多用户避免明确陈述，而是将活动锚定在模糊内容中。
AI.conclusion: 本研究展示了基于LLM的文本分类和马尔可夫链建模在捕捉犯罪披露模式方面的价值，为执法部门区分网络犯罪论坛中的良性、灰色和犯罪内容提供了见解。灰色内容的普遍性表明用户策略性地使用模糊性，这对执法监控策略有重要影响。

title: Graph neural network force fields for adiabatic dynamics of lattice Hamiltonians
summary: Scalable and symmetry-consistent force-field models are essential for extending quantum-accurate simulations to large spatiotemporal scales. While descriptor-based neural networks can incorporate lattice symmetries through carefully engineered features, we show that graph neural networks (GNNs) provide a conceptually simpler and more unified alternative in which discrete lattice translation and point-group symmetries are enforced directly through local message passing and weight sharing. We develop a GNN-based force-field framework for the adiabatic dynamics of lattice Hamiltonians and demonstrate it for the semiclassical Holstein model. Trained on exact-diagonalization data, the GNN achieves high force accuracy, strict linear scaling with system size, and direct transferability to large lattices. Enabled by this scalability, we perform large-scale Langevin simulations of charge-density-wave ordering following thermal quenches, revealing dynamical scaling and anomalously slow sub--Allen--Cahn coarsening. These results establish GNNs as an elegant and efficient architecture for symmetry-aware, large-scale dynamical simulations of correlated lattice systems.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于图神经网络（GNN）的力场框架，用于晶格哈密顿量的绝热动力学模拟，在Holstein模型中实现了高精度、线性可扩展性和大晶格直接可迁移性。
AI.motivation: 开发可扩展且对称性一致的力场模型对于将量子精确模拟扩展到大的时空尺度至关重要。传统基于描述符的神经网络需要通过精心设计的特征来纳入晶格对称性，而GNN提供了一种更简单、更统一的替代方案。
AI.method: 开发了基于GNN的力场框架，通过局部消息传递和权重共享直接强制执行离散晶格平移和点群对称性，应用于半经典Holstein模型的绝热动力学。
AI.result: GNN在精确对角化数据上训练后，实现了高力精度、严格的系统尺寸线性缩放以及到大晶格的直接可迁移性。通过大规模Langevin模拟揭示了电荷密度波有序化过程中的动力学标度和异常缓慢的亚Allen-Cahn粗化。
AI.conclusion: GNN为对称感知、大规模相关晶格系统的动力学模拟提供了一种优雅高效的架构，能够实现量子精确的大尺度模拟。

title: TRAKNN: Efficient Trajectory Aware Spatiotemporal kNN for Rare Meteorological Trajectory Detection
summary: Extreme weather events, such as windstorms and heatwaves, are driven by persistent atmospheric circulation patterns that evolve over several consecutive days. While traditional circulation-based studies often focus on instantaneous atmospheric states, capturing the temporal evolution, or trajectory, of these spatial fields is essential for characterizing rare and potentially impactful atmospheric behavior. However, performing an exhaustive similarity search on multi-decadal, continental-scale gridded datasets presents significant computational and memory challenges. In this paper, we propose TRAKNN (TRajectory Aware KNN), a fully unsupervised and data-agnostic framework for detecting geometrically rare short trajectories in spatio-temporal data with an exact kNN approach. TRAKNN leverages a recurrence-based algorithm that decouples computational complexity from trajectory length and efficient batch operations, maximizing computational intensity. These optimizations enable exhaustive analysis on standard workstations, either on CPU or on GPU. We evaluate our approach on 75 years of daily European sea-level pressure data. Our results illustrate that rare trajectories identified by TRAKNN correspond to physically coherent atmospheric anomalies and align with independent extreme-event databases.

AI.tldr: TRAKNN是一个无监督、数据无关的框架，用于在时空数据中检测几何上罕见的短轨迹，采用精确kNN方法，特别适用于分析极端天气事件的大气环流模式演化。
AI.motivation: 传统的大气环流研究通常关注瞬时大气状态，但极端天气事件（如风暴和热浪）是由持续数天的大气环流模式演化驱动的。捕捉这些空间场的时序演化轨迹对于表征罕见且有潜在影响的大气行为至关重要。然而，在多年代、大陆尺度的网格数据集上进行穷举相似性搜索面临显著的计算和内存挑战。
AI.method: 提出TRAKNN（TRajectory Aware KNN）框架，采用完全无监督和数据无关的方法。利用基于递归的算法，将计算复杂度与轨迹长度解耦，并通过高效的批处理操作最大化计算强度。这些优化使得可以在标准工作站（CPU或GPU）上进行穷举分析。
AI.result: 在75年欧洲海平面压力日数据上评估该方法。结果表明，TRAKNN识别的罕见轨迹对应于物理上一致的大气异常，并且与独立的极端事件数据库相吻合。
AI.conclusion: TRAKNN为检测时空数据中的罕见轨迹提供了一个高效、可扩展的解决方案，特别适用于大气科学中的极端天气事件分析，能够识别物理上一致的大气异常模式。

title: Orchestrating Multimodal DNN Workloads in Wireless Neural Processing
summary: In edge inference, wireless resource allocation and accelerator-level deep neural network (DNN) scheduling have yet to be co-optimized in an end-to-end manner. The lack of coordination between wireless transmission and accelerator-level DNN execution prevents efficient overlap, leading to higher end-to-end inference latency. To address this issue, this paper investigates multimodal DNN workload orchestration in wireless neural processing (WNP), a paradigm that integrates wireless transmission and multi-core accelerator execution into a unified end-to-end pipeline. First, we develop a unified communication-computation model for multimodal DNN execution and formulate the corresponding optimization problem. Second, we propose O-WiN, a framework that orchestrates DNN workloads in WNP through two tightly coupled stages: simulation-based optimization and runtime execution. Third, we develop two algorithms, RTFS and PACS. RTFS schedules communication and computation sequentially, whereas PACS interleaves them to enable pipeline parallelism by overlapping wireless data transfer with accelerator-level DNN execution. Simulation results demonstrate that PACS significantly outperforms RTFS under high modality heterogeneity by better masking wireless latency through communication-computation overlap, thereby highlighting the effectiveness of communication-computation pipelining in accelerating multimodal DNN execution in WNP.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了O-WiN框架，用于在无线神经处理中协调多模态DNN工作负载，通过通信-计算流水线并行来降低端到端推理延迟
AI.motivation: 在边缘推理中，无线资源分配和加速器级DNN调度尚未以端到端方式协同优化。无线传输和加速器级DNN执行之间缺乏协调，导致无法有效重叠操作，增加了端到端推理延迟。
AI.method:
1. 开发了多模态DNN执行的统一通信-计算模型并制定优化问题
2. 提出O-WiN框架，包含仿真优化和运行时执行两个紧密耦合阶段
3. 开发了RTFS和PACS两种算法：RTFS顺序调度通信和计算，PACS通过交错调度实现流水线并行，重叠无线数据传输与DNN执行
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，在高模态异构性下，PACS显著优于RTFS，通过通信-计算重叠更好地掩盖无线延迟，证明了通信-计算流水线在加速WNP中多模态DNN执行的有效性
AI.conclusion: 通过O-WiN框架和PACS算法实现了无线神经处理中通信与计算的协同优化，显著降低了多模态DNN推理的端到端延迟，为边缘AI推理提供了有效的系统级解决方案

title: Robometer: Scaling General-Purpose Robotic Reward Models via Trajectory Comparisons
summary: General-purpose robot reward models are typically trained to predict absolute task progress from expert demonstrations, providing only local, frame-level supervision. While effective for expert demonstrations, this paradigm scales poorly to large-scale robotics datasets where failed and suboptimal trajectories are abundant and assigning dense progress labels is ambiguous. We introduce Robometer, a scalable reward modeling framework that combines intra-trajectory progress supervision with inter-trajectory preference supervision. Robometer is trained with a dual objective: a frame-level progress loss that anchors reward magnitude on expert data, and a trajectory-comparison preference loss that imposes global ordering constraints across trajectories of the same task, enabling effective learning from both real and augmented failed trajectories. To support this formulation at scale, we curate RBM-1M, a reward-learning dataset comprising over one million trajectories spanning diverse robot embodiments and tasks, including substantial suboptimal and failure data. Across benchmarks and real-world evaluations, Robometer learns more generalizable reward functions than prior methods and improves robot learning performance across a diverse set of downstream applications. Code, model weights, and videos at https://robometer.github.io/.

AI.tldr: Robometer：结合轨迹内进度监督与轨迹间偏好监督的可扩展奖励建模框架，通过RBM-1M数据集提升机器人奖励函数的泛化能力
AI.motivation: 传统机器人奖励模型通常基于专家演示预测绝对任务进度，仅提供局部帧级监督。这种方法在专家演示上有效，但难以扩展到大规模机器人数据集，因为失败和次优轨迹众多，且分配密集进度标签存在模糊性。
AI.method: 提出Robometer框架，结合两种监督：1) 帧级进度损失（基于专家数据锚定奖励幅度）；2) 轨迹比较偏好损失（对同一任务的不同轨迹施加全局排序约束）。使用RBM-1M数据集（包含100多万条轨迹，涵盖多种机器人形态和任务，包含大量次优和失败数据）。
AI.result: 在基准测试和实际评估中，Robometer比现有方法学习到更具泛化性的奖励函数，并在多种下游应用中提升了机器人学习性能。
AI.conclusion: Robometer通过结合进度监督和偏好监督，解决了大规模机器人数据集奖励建模的扩展性问题，显著提升了奖励函数的泛化能力和机器人学习效果。

title: Instrumental and Proximal Causal Inference with Gaussian Processes
summary: Instrumental variable (IV) and proximal causal learning (Proxy) methods are central frameworks for causal inference in the presence of unobserved confounding. Despite substantial methodological advances, existing approaches rarely provide reliable epistemic uncertainty (EU) quantification. We address this gap through a Deconditional Gaussian Process (DGP) framework for uncertainty-aware causal learning. Our formulation recovers popular kernel estimators as the posterior mean, ensuring predictive precision, while the posterior variance yields principled and well-calibrated EU. Moreover, the probabilistic structure enables systematic model selection via marginal log-likelihood optimization. Empirical results demonstrate strong predictive performance alongside informative EU quantification, evaluated via empirical coverage frequencies and decision-aware accuracy rejection curves. Together, our approach provides a unified, practical solution for causal inference under unobserved confounding with reliable uncertainty.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于解条件高斯过程（DGP）的因果推断框架，用于处理未观测混杂变量情况下的认知不确定性量化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有工具变量（IV）和近端因果学习（Proxy）方法在未观测混杂变量情况下很少能提供可靠的认知不确定性量化，这限制了因果推断的可靠性评估。
AI.method: 采用解条件高斯过程（DGP）框架，将流行的核估计器恢复为后验均值以确保预测精度，同时利用后验方差提供原则性的、校准良好的认知不确定性量化。
AI.result: 实证结果显示该方法具有强大的预测性能，同时提供了信息丰富的认知不确定性量化，通过经验覆盖频率和决策感知的准确率拒绝曲线进行评估。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为未观测混杂变量下的因果推断提供了一个统一的、实用的解决方案，具有可靠的认知不确定性量化能力。

title: Solving Inverse PDE Problems using Minimization Methods and AI
summary: Many physical and engineering systems require solving direct problems to predict behavior and inverse problems to determine unknown parameters from measurement. In this work, we study both aspects for systems governed by differential equations, contrasting well-established numerical methods with new AI-based techniques, specifically Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs). We first analyze the logistic differential equation, using its closed-form solution to verify numerical schemes and validate PINN performance. We then address the Porous Medium Equation (PME), a nonlinear partial differential equation with no general closed-form solution, building strong solvers of the direct problem and testing techniques for parameter estimation in the inverse problem. Our results suggest that PINNs can closely estimate solutions at competitive computational cost, and thus propose an effective tool for solving both direct and inverse problems for complex systems.

AI.tldr: 该论文对比传统数值方法与物理信息神经网络(PINNs)在微分方程正问题和反问题求解中的表现，以逻辑方程和多孔介质方程为例验证PINN的有效性。
AI.motivation: 物理和工程系统需要求解正问题预测行为，以及反问题从测量确定未知参数。传统数值方法已成熟，但AI技术如PINNs提供了新的可能性，需要系统对比验证其有效性。
AI.method: 1. 分析逻辑微分方程，利用其解析解验证数值方案和PINN性能；2. 处理多孔介质方程(非线性偏微分方程，无一般解析解)，构建正问题的强求解器并测试反问题的参数估计技术。
AI.result: PINNs能够以有竞争力的计算成本紧密估计解，表明其可作为复杂系统正问题和反问题求解的有效工具。
AI.conclusion: PINNs在微分方程正反问题求解中表现良好，为复杂系统建模提供了有效的AI工具，可与传统数值方法竞争。

title: Federated Agentic AI for Wireless Networks: Fundamentals, Approaches, and Applications
summary: Agentic artificial intelligence (AI) presents a promising pathway toward realizing autonomous and self-improving wireless network services. However, resource-constrained, widely distributed, and data-heterogeneous nature of wireless networks poses significant challenges to existing agentic AI that relies on centralized architectures, leading to high communication overhead, privacy risks, and non-independent and identically distributed (non-IID) data. Federated learning (FL) has the potential to improve the overall loop of agentic AI through collaborative local learning and parameter sharing without exchanging raw data. This paper proposes new federated agentic AI approaches for wireless networks. We first summarize fundamentals of agentic AI and mainstream FL types. Then, we illustrate how each FL type can strengthen a specific component of agentic AI's loop. Moreover, we conduct a case study on using FRL to improve the performance of agentic AI's action decision in low-altitude wireless networks (LAWNs). Finally, we provide a conclusion and discuss future research directions.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出将联邦学习与智能体AI结合用于无线网络，通过联邦强化学习提升智能体AI在资源受限、数据异构的无线网络中的性能
AI.motivation: 无线网络具有资源受限、分布广泛、数据异构的特点，传统集中式智能体AI面临通信开销大、隐私风险高、非IID数据等挑战，需要联邦学习来改进智能体AI的完整循环
AI.method: 提出联邦智能体AI方法，首先总结智能体AI基础和主流联邦学习类型，然后说明每种联邦学习类型如何增强智能体AI循环的特定组件，并通过低空无线网络案例研究展示联邦强化学习如何改进智能体AI的动作决策
AI.result: 论文展示了联邦学习能够有效提升智能体AI在无线网络中的性能，特别是通过联邦强化学习改进低空无线网络中智能体AI的动作决策能力
AI.conclusion: 联邦智能体AI是无线网络中有前景的方向，能够解决集中式架构的局限性，未来需要进一步研究联邦学习与智能体AI的深度融合

title: Co-Evolutionary Multi-Modal Alignment via Structured Adversarial Evolution
summary: Adversarial behavior plays a central role in aligning large language models with human values. However, existing alignment methods largely rely on static adversarial settings, which fundamentally limit robustness, particularly in multimodal settings with a larger attack surface. In this work, we move beyond static adversarial supervision and introduce co-evolutionary alignment with evolving attacks, instantiated by CEMMA (Co-Evolutionary Multi-Modal Alignment), an automated and adaptive framework for multimodal safety alignment. We introduce an Evolutionary Attacker that decomposes adversarial prompts into method templates and harmful intents. By employing genetic operators, including mutation, crossover, and differential evolution, it enables simple seed attacks to inherit the structural efficacy of sophisticated jailbreaks. The Adaptive Defender is iteratively updated on the synthesized hard negatives, forming a closed-loop process that adapts alignment to evolving attacks. Experiments show that the Evolutionary Attacker substantially increases red-teaming jailbreak attack success rate (ASR), while the Adaptive Defender improves robustness and generalization across benchmarks with higher data efficiency, without inducing excessive benign refusal, and remains compatible with inference-time defenses such as AdaShield.

AI.tldr: CEMMA：一种通过进化攻击者与自适应防御者协同进化的多模态安全对齐框架，超越静态对抗监督，实现自动化自适应多模态安全对齐
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型对齐方法主要依赖静态对抗设置，这在多模态环境下存在较大攻击面时限制了鲁棒性。需要超越静态对抗监督，实现自适应对齐。
AI.method: 提出CEMMA框架：1) 进化攻击者将对抗提示分解为方法模板和有害意图，通过遗传算子（突变、交叉、差分进化）使简单种子攻击继承复杂越狱的结构有效性；2) 自适应防御者在合成硬负样本上迭代更新，形成适应进化攻击的闭环过程
AI.result: 进化攻击者显著提高红队越狱攻击成功率，自适应防御者提高跨基准的鲁棒性和泛化能力，具有更高数据效率，不会引起过度良性拒绝，且与AdaShield等推理时防御兼容
AI.conclusion: 通过协同进化框架实现多模态安全对齐，超越静态对抗监督，提供自动化、自适应的安全对齐解决方案

title: Phishing the Phishers with SpecularNet: Hierarchical Graph Autoencoding for Reference-Free Web Phishing Detection
summary: Phishing remains the most pervasive threat to the Web, enabling large-scale credential theft and financial fraud through deceptive webpages. While recent reference-based and generative-AI-driven phishing detectors achieve strong accuracy, their reliance on external knowledge bases, cloud services, and complex multimodal pipelines fundamentally limits practicality, scalability, and reproducibility. In contrast, conventional deep learning approaches often fail to generalize to evolving phishing campaigns. We introduce SpecularNet, a novel lightweight framework for reference-free web phishing detection that demonstrates how carefully designed compact architectures can rival heavyweight systems. SpecularNet operates solely on the domain name and HTML structure, modeling the Document Object Model (DOM) as a tree and leveraging a hierarchical graph autoencoding architecture with directional, level-wise message passing. This design captures higher-order structural invariants of phishing webpages while enabling fast, end-to-end inference on standard CPUs. Extensive evaluation against 13 state of the art phishing detectors, including leading reference-based systems, shows that SpecularNet achieves competitive detection performance with dramatically lower computational cost. On benchmark datasets, it reaches an F1 score of 93.9%, trailing the best reference-based method slightly while reducing inference time from several seconds to approximately 20 milliseconds per webpage. Field and robustness evaluations further validate SpecularNet in real-world deployments, on a newly collected 2026 open-world dataset, and against adversarial attacks.

AI.tldr: SpecularNet：一种轻量级、无参考的网页钓鱼检测框架，仅使用域名和HTML结构，通过分层图自编码架构实现高效检测，性能接近基于参考的重型系统但计算成本大幅降低。
AI.motivation: 现有钓鱼检测方法存在局限性：基于参考的方法依赖外部知识库和云服务，实用性、可扩展性和可复现性受限；传统深度学习方法对不断演变的钓鱼攻击泛化能力不足。需要一种轻量级、无参考且高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 将DOM建模为树结构，采用分层图自编码架构，利用定向、层级式消息传递来捕捉钓鱼网页的高阶结构不变性。仅使用域名和HTML结构，无需外部参考或复杂多模态管道。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上达到93.9%的F1分数，与最佳基于参考方法性能接近，同时将推理时间从数秒降低到约20毫秒/网页。在真实部署、2026年新收集的开放世界数据集和对抗攻击测试中均表现稳健。
AI.conclusion: 精心设计的紧凑架构可以媲美重型系统，SpecularNet展示了轻量级、无参考钓鱼检测的可行性，为实际部署提供了高效解决方案。

title: Agentic Code Reasoning
summary: Can LLM agents explore codebases and reason about code semantics without executing the code? We study this capability, which we call agentic code reasoning, and introduce semi-formal reasoning: a structured prompting methodology that requires agents to construct explicit premises, trace execution paths, and derive formal conclusions. Unlike unstructured chain-of-thought, semi-formal reasoning acts as a certificate: the agent cannot skip cases or make unsupported claims. We evaluate across three tasks (patch equivalence verification, fault localization, and code question answering) and show that semi-formal reasoning consistently improves accuracy on all of them. For patch equivalence, accuracy improves from 78% to 88% on curated examples and reaches 93% on real-world agent-generated patches, approaching the reliability needed for execution-free RL reward signals. For code question answering on RubberDuckBench Mohammad et al. (2026), semi-formal reasoning achieves 87% accuracy. For fault localization on Defects4J Just et al. (2014), semi-formal reasoning improves Top-5 accuracy by 5 percentage points over standard reasoning. These results demonstrate that structured agentic reasoning enables meaningful semantic code analysis without execution, opening practical applications in RL training pipelines, code review, and static program analysis.

AI.tldr: 论文提出半形式推理方法，通过结构化提示要求LLM智能体构建明确前提、追踪执行路径并推导形式结论，从而在不执行代码的情况下进行代码语义分析，显著提升了补丁等价验证、故障定位和代码问答任务的准确性。
AI.motivation: 研究LLM智能体是否能在不执行代码的情况下探索代码库并推理代码语义，这种能力被称为"智能体代码推理"。当前的无结构思维链方法存在跳过案例或做出无支持声明的风险，需要更可靠的结构化推理方法。
AI.method: 提出半形式推理方法，这是一种结构化提示方法，要求智能体：1) 构建明确的前提；2) 追踪执行路径；3) 推导形式结论。与无结构思维链不同，半形式推理作为证书，智能体不能跳过案例或做出无支持的声明。
AI.result: 在三个任务上评估：1) 补丁等价验证：准确率从78%提升到88%（精选示例），在真实世界智能体生成补丁上达到93%；2) 代码问答（RubberDuckBench）：达到87%准确率；3) 故障定位（Defects4J）：Top-5准确率比标准推理提升5个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 结构化智能体推理使得无需执行代码即可进行有意义的语义代码分析成为可能，为RL训练管道、代码审查和静态程序分析等实际应用开辟了道路。

title: Real Money, Fake Models: Deceptive Model Claims in Shadow APIs
summary: Access to frontier large language models (LLMs), such as GPT-5 and Gemini-2.5, is often hindered by high pricing, payment barriers, and regional restrictions. These limitations drive the proliferation of $\textit{shadow APIs}$, third-party services that claim to provide access to official model services without regional limitations via indirect access. Despite their widespread use, it remains unclear whether shadow APIs deliver outputs consistent with those of the official APIs, raising concerns about the reliability of downstream applications and the validity of research findings that depend on them. In this paper, we present the first systematic audit between official LLM APIs and corresponding shadow APIs. We first identify 17 shadow APIs that have been utilized in 187 academic papers, with the most popular one reaching 5,966 citations and 58,639 GitHub stars by December 6, 2025. Through multidimensional auditing of three representative shadow APIs across utility, safety, and model verification, we uncover both indirect and direct evidence of deception practices in shadow APIs. Specifically, we reveal performance divergence reaching up to $47.21\%$, significant unpredictability in safety behaviors, and identity verification failures in $45.83\%$ of fingerprint tests. These deceptive practices critically undermine the reproducibility and validity of scientific research, harm the interests of shadow API users, and damage the reputation of official model providers.

AI.tldr: 首次系统审计官方LLM API与影子API，发现影子API存在欺骗行为：性能差异高达47.21%，安全性不可预测，45.83%指纹测试验证失败，严重影响科研可重复性和下游应用可靠性。
AI.motivation: 前沿LLM（如GPT-5、Gemini-2.5）存在高定价、支付障碍和区域限制，导致影子API（声称绕过限制提供官方模型服务的第三方服务）广泛使用。但影子API输出是否与官方API一致尚不明确，影响下游应用可靠性和研究成果有效性。
AI.method: 1. 识别17个在187篇学术论文中使用的影子API；2. 对3个代表性影子API进行多维审计：效用性、安全性、模型验证；3. 通过性能比较、安全行为分析和指纹测试等方法检测欺骗行为。
AI.result: 1. 性能差异高达47.21%；2. 安全行为显著不可预测；3. 45.83%的指纹测试验证失败；4. 发现影子API存在直接和间接欺骗证据；5. 最受欢迎的影子API达到5,966次引用和58,639个GitHub星标。
AI.conclusion: 影子API的欺骗行为严重损害科学研究的可重复性和有效性，损害用户利益，并损害官方模型提供商的声誉。需要更严格的验证机制和透明度要求。

title: Ignore All Previous Instructions: Jailbreaking as a de-escalatory peace building practise to resist LLM social media bots
comment: Accepted to ICLR 2026 AI for peace workshop
summary: Large Language Models have intensified the scale and strategic manipulation of political discourse on social media, leading to conflict escalation. The existing literature largely focuses on platform-led moderation as a countermeasure. In this paper, we propose a user-centric view of "jailbreaking" as an emergent, non-violent de-escalation practice. Online users engage with suspected LLM-powered accounts to circumvent large language model safeguards, exposing automated behaviour and disrupting the circulation of misleading narratives.

AI.tldr: 用户将"越狱"重新定义为一种非暴力的降级实践，通过绕过LLM安全措施来揭露自动化行为并破坏误导性叙事传播
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型加剧了社交媒体上政治话语的规模和策略性操纵，导致冲突升级。现有文献主要关注平台主导的审核作为对策，但本文提出从用户角度看待"越狱"作为一种新兴的非暴力降级实践。
AI.method: 提出用户中心的"越狱"视角，即在线用户与疑似LLM驱动的账户互动，绕过大型语言模型的安全保障措施，暴露自动化行为并破坏误导性叙事的传播。
AI.result: 将"越狱"重新概念化为一种非暴力的降级实践，为用户提供了一种对抗LLM驱动的政治操纵的新方法，能够揭露自动化行为并破坏误导性叙事的传播。
AI.conclusion: 用户中心的"越狱"实践可以作为对抗LLM驱动的政治操纵的有效手段，提供了一种不同于平台审核的替代性降级策略。

title: CodecFlow: Efficient Bandwidth Extension via Conditional Flow Matching in Neural Codec Latent Space
summary: Speech Bandwidth Extension improves clarity and intelligibility by restoring/inferring appropriate high-frequency content for low-bandwidth speech. Existing methods often rely on spectrogram or waveform modeling, which can incur higher computational cost and have limited high-frequency fidelity. Neural audio codecs offer compact latent representations that better preserve acoustic detail, yet accurately recovering high-resolution latent information remains challenging due to representation mismatch. We present CodecFlow, a neural codec-based BWE framework that performs efficient speech reconstruction in a compact latent space. CodecFlow employs a voicing-aware conditional flow converter on continuous codec embeddings and a structure-constrained residual vector quantizer to improve latent alignment stability. Optimized end-to-end, CodecFlow achieves strong spectral fidelity and enhanced perceptual quality on 8 kHz to 16 kHz and 44.1 kHz speech BWE tasks.

AI.tldr: CodecFlow：基于神经编解码器的语音带宽扩展框架，在紧凑的潜在空间中实现高效语音重建，通过条件流转换器和结构约束残差向量量化器提升潜在对齐稳定性
AI.motivation: 现有语音带宽扩展方法依赖频谱图或波形建模，计算成本高且高频保真度有限。神经音频编解码器提供紧凑的潜在表示，但准确恢复高分辨率潜在信息仍具挑战性
AI.method: 采用基于神经编解码器的BWE框架，使用基于语音感知的条件流转换器处理连续编解码嵌入，结合结构约束残差向量量化器改善潜在对齐稳定性，端到端优化
AI.result: 在8kHz到16kHz和44.1kHz语音BWE任务上实现了强大的频谱保真度和增强的感知质量
AI.conclusion: CodecFlow在紧凑潜在空间中实现了高效的语音重建，解决了现有方法计算成本高和保真度有限的问题

title: "When to Hand Off, When to Work Together": Expanding Human-Agent Co-Creative Collaboration through Concurrent Interaction
summary: Human collaborators coordinate dynamically through process visibility and workspace awareness, yet AI agents typically either provide only final outputs or expose read-only execution processes (e.g., planning, reasoning) without interpreting concurrent user actions on shared artifacts. Building on mixed-initiative interaction principles, we explore whether agents can achieve collaborative context awareness -- interpreting concurrent user actions on shared artifacts and adapting in real-time. Study 1 (N=10 professional designers) revealed that process visibility enabled reasoning about agent actions but exposed conflicts when agents could not distinguish feedback from independent work. We developed CLEO, which interprets collaborative intent and adapts in real-time. Study 2 (N=10, two-day with stimulated recall interviews) analyzed 214 turns, identifying five action patterns, six triggers, and four enabling factors explaining when designers choose delegation (70.1%), direction (28.5%), or concurrent work (31.8%). We present a decision model with six interaction loops, design implications, and an annotated dataset.

AI.tldr: CLEO系统探索AI代理如何通过解释用户对共享工件的并发操作来实现协作上下文感知，并在实时中适应，研究揭示了设计师与AI协作时的行为模式和交互循环。
AI.motivation: 人类协作通过过程可见性和工作空间意识动态协调，但AI代理通常只提供最终输出或暴露只读执行过程，无法解释用户在共享工件上的并发操作。本研究基于混合主动交互原则，探索代理是否能实现协作上下文感知。
AI.method: 研究1（10名专业设计师）通过过程可见性分析代理行为；开发了CLEO系统，能够解释协作意图并实时适应；研究2（10名设计师，为期两天）分析了214个交互回合，识别行为模式、触发因素和促成因素。
AI.result: 研究1显示过程可见性使设计师能够推理代理行为，但当代理无法区分反馈和独立工作时会暴露冲突。研究2识别了五种行为模式、六种触发因素和四种促成因素，揭示了设计师选择委托（70.1%）、指导（28.5%）或并发工作（31.8%）的决策模式。
AI.conclusion: 提出了包含六个交互循环的决策模型、设计启示和标注数据集，为AI代理实现协作上下文感知提供了理论基础和实践指导。

title: A Resource-Rational Principle for Modeling Visual Attention Control
summary: Understanding how people allocate visual attention is central to Human-Computer Interaction (HCI), yet existing computational models of attention are often either descriptive, task-specific, or difficult to interpret. My dissertation develops a resource-rational, simulation-based framework for modeling visual attention as a sequential decision-making process under perceptual, memory, and time constraints. I formalize visual tasks, such as reading and multitasking, as bounded-optimal control problems using Partially Observable Markov Decision Processes, enabling eye-movement behaviors such as fixation and attention switching to emerge from rational adaptation rather than being hand-coded or purely data-driven. These models are instantiated in simulation environments spanning traditional text reading and reading-while-walking with smart glasses, where they reproduce classic empirical effects, explain observed trade-offs between comprehension and safety, and generate novel predictions under time pressure and interface variation. Collectively, this work contributes a unified computational account of visual attention, offering new tools for theory-driven and resource-efficient HCI design.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于资源理性的模拟框架，将视觉注意力建模为感知、记忆和时间约束下的序列决策过程，使用部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程形式化视觉任务，在阅读和行走阅读等场景中验证模型。
AI.motivation: 现有注意力计算模型要么是描述性的，要么是任务特定的，或者难以解释。需要建立一个统一的、可解释的计算框架来理解人类视觉注意力分配机制。
AI.method: 采用资源理性、基于模拟的框架，将视觉注意力建模为序列决策过程。使用部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程形式化视觉任务，让注视和注意力切换等眼动行为从理性适应中自然涌现，而非手工编码或纯数据驱动。
AI.result: 模型在传统文本阅读和行走阅读等模拟环境中实例化，重现了经典经验效应，解释了理解与安全之间的权衡，并在时间压力和界面变化下生成了新的预测。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为视觉注意力提供了统一的计算解释，为理论驱动和资源高效的人机交互设计提供了新工具。

title: Cognitive Prosthetic: An AI-Enabled Multimodal System for Episodic Recall in Knowledge Work
summary: Modern knowledge workplaces increasingly strain human episodic memory as individuals navigate fragmented attention, overlapping meetings, and multimodal information streams. Existing workplace tools provide partial support through note-taking or analytics but rarely integrate cognitive, physiological, and attentional context into retrievable memory representations. This paper presents the Cognitive Prosthetic Multimodal System (CPMS) --an AI-enabled proof-of-concept designed to support episodic recall in knowledge work through structured episodic capture and natural language retrieval. CPMS synchronizes speech transcripts, physiological signals, and gaze behavior into temporally aligned, JSON-based episodic records processed locally for privacy. Beyond data logging, the system includes a web-based retrieval interface that allows users to query past workplace experiences using natural language, referencing semantic content, time, attentional focus, or physiological state. We present CPMS as a functional proof-of-concept demonstrating the technical feasibility of transforming heterogeneous sensor data into queryable episodic memories. The system is designed to be modular, supporting operation with partial sensor configurations, and incorporates privacy safeguards for workplace deployment. This work contributes an end-to-end, privacy-aware architecture for AI-enabled memory augmentation in workplace settings.

AI.tldr: CPMS是一个AI驱动的认知假体系统，通过整合语音、生理信号和眼动数据构建结构化情景记忆，支持自然语言检索，旨在增强知识工作者的情景回忆能力。
AI.motivation: 现代知识工作环境对人类情景记忆造成巨大压力，工作者面临注意力分散、会议重叠和多模态信息流。现有工具仅提供笔记或分析功能，缺乏整合认知、生理和注意力上下文的可检索记忆表示。
AI.method: 开发了认知假体多模态系统(CPMS)，同步语音转录、生理信号和眼动行为，构建时间对齐的JSON格式情景记录，本地处理保护隐私。系统包含基于Web的检索界面，支持自然语言查询。
AI.result: 提出了一个功能性的概念验证系统，展示了将异构传感器数据转化为可查询情景记忆的技术可行性。系统采用模块化设计，支持部分传感器配置，并包含隐私保护机制。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作为工作场所AI增强记忆提供了一个端到端、隐私感知的架构，展示了多模态数据整合和自然语言检索在认知增强方面的潜力。

title: Boltzmann-based Exploration for Robust Decentralized Multi-Agent Planning
summary: Decentralized Monte Carlo Tree Search (Dec-MCTS) is widely used for cooperative multi-agent planning but struggles in sparse or skewed reward environments. We introduce Coordinated Boltzmann MCTS (CB-MCTS), which replaces deterministic UCT with a stochastic Boltzmann policy and a decaying entropy bonus for sustained yet focused exploration. While Boltzmann exploration has been studied in single-agent MCTS, applying it in multi-agent systems poses unique challenges. CB-MCTS is the first to address this. We analyze CB-MCTS in the simple-regret setting and show in simulations that it outperforms Dec-MCTS in deceptive scenarios and remains competitive on standard benchmarks, providing a robust solution for multi-agent planning.

AI.tldr: CB-MCTS是一种用于多智能体规划的协调玻尔兹曼MCTS方法，通过随机玻尔兹曼策略和衰减熵奖励来改进稀疏/偏斜奖励环境中的探索，在欺骗性场景中优于Dec-MCTS。
AI.motivation: 现有的去中心化蒙特卡洛树搜索(Dec-MCTS)在稀疏或偏斜奖励环境中表现不佳，特别是在多智能体合作规划中。需要一种能够持续探索但保持专注的方法来处理欺骗性场景。
AI.method: 提出协调玻尔兹曼MCTS(CB-MCTS)，用随机玻尔兹曼策略替代确定性UCT，并引入衰减熵奖励来平衡探索与利用。这是首次将玻尔兹曼探索应用于多智能体系统。
AI.result: 在简单遗憾设置下分析CB-MCTS，仿真显示在欺骗性场景中优于Dec-MCTS，在标准基准测试中保持竞争力，为多智能体规划提供了鲁棒解决方案。
AI.conclusion: CB-MCTS通过玻尔兹曼探索和熵奖励机制有效解决了多智能体规划中的探索挑战，特别是在稀疏/偏斜奖励环境中，为多智能体决策提供了改进方法。

title: How Small Can 6G Reason? Scaling Tiny Language Models for AI-Native Networks
summary: Emerging 6G visions, reflected in ongoing standardization efforts within 3GPP, IETF, ETSI, ITU-T, and the O-RAN Alliance, increasingly characterize networks as AI-native systems in which high-level semantic reasoning layers operate above standardized control and data-plane functions. Although frontier-scale large language models (LLMs) such as Qwen2.5-7B and Olmo-3-7B demonstrate strong reasoning capability, their computational footprint limits deployment in latency-sensitive, edge-native infrastructures. This paper presents a systematic empirical study of the scaling behavior and deployment efficiency of compact language models for network-level semantic reasoning in AI-native 6G systems. Using 6G-Bench, a standardization-aligned benchmark comprising 30 decision-making tasks across five capability domains, we evaluate models ranging from 135M (SmolLM2-135M) to 7B parameters (Qwen2.5-7B), including mid-scale architectures such as Llama-3.2-1B, Granite-1B, and Qwen2.5-3B. Deterministic accuracy (pass@1) increases from 0.224 at 135M to 0.707 at 7B, but scaling gains are highly non-uniform. A pronounced stability transition occurs in the 1 to 1.5B range, where accuracy rises from 0.373 (Llama-3.2-1B) to 0.531 (Qwen2.5-1.5B) and the instability gap Delta_5 contracts from 0.356 to 0.138. Beyond 3B parameters, improvements diminish (+0.064 from 3B to 7B). Through single-query inference profiling and an Edge Score metric that normalizes accuracy by latency and memory footprint, we show that semantic reliability per unit edge resource does not scale monotonically with parameter count. Instead, mid-scale models (approximately 1.5 to 3B) achieve the most favorable balance between deterministic stability and computational efficiency, providing deployment-relevant guidance for AI-native 6G architectures. All scripts and results are publicly available at https://github.com/maferrag/6G-Bench

AI.tldr: 该论文系统研究了紧凑语言模型在AI原生6G网络语义推理中的扩展行为和部署效率，发现1.5-3B参数的中等规模模型在确定性稳定性和计算效率之间达到最佳平衡。
AI.motivation: 6G网络正朝着AI原生系统发展，需要语义推理层，但前沿大语言模型计算开销大，难以部署在延迟敏感的边缘基础设施中。需要研究紧凑语言模型的扩展行为和部署效率。
AI.method: 使用6G-Bench标准化基准（包含5个能力域的30个决策任务），评估从135M到7B参数的模型，包括SmolLM2-135M、Llama-3.2-1B、Granite-1B、Qwen2.5-1.5B、Qwen2.5-3B和Qwen2.5-7B。通过确定性准确率、单查询推理分析和Edge Score指标（准确率/延迟/内存占用）评估性能。
AI.result: 准确率从135M的0.224提升到7B的0.707，但扩展收益高度不均匀。1-1.5B参数范围出现明显的稳定性转变，准确率从0.373提升到0.531，不稳定性差距从0.356缩小到0.138。超过3B参数后改进有限（+0.064）。Edge Score显示语义可靠性并不随参数数量单调扩展，1.5-3B的中等规模模型在稳定性和计算效率之间达到最佳平衡。
AI.conclusion: 中等规模语言模型（约1.5-3B参数）为AI原生6G架构提供了部署相关的指导，在确定性稳定性和计算效率之间达到最有利的平衡，而非简单地追求更大模型。
